File: app/Actions/Admin/ReplaceProcessedDocument.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions\Admin;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\RequestDocument;
 6: use Illuminate\Http\UploadedFile;
 7: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
 8: 
 9: class ReplaceProcessedDocument
10: {
11:     public function handle(RequestDocument $document, UploadedFile $file): RequestDocument
12:     {
13:         $oldPath = $document->file_path;
14:         $newPath = $file->store('request_results');
15: 
16:         $document->update([
17:             'file_path' => $newPath,
18:             'original_name' => $file->getClientOriginalName(),
19:             'file_size' => $file->getSize(),
20:         ]);
21: 
22:         if ($oldPath) {
23:             Storage::delete($oldPath);
24:         }
25: 
26:         return $document;
27:     }
28: }

================
File: app/Actions/Admin/StoreProcessedDocument.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions\Admin;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 6: use App\Models\RequestDocument;
 7: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
 8: use App\Notifications\ComplaintRevisedDataNotification;
 9: use App\Notifications\DataRequestStatusNotification;
10: 
11: class StoreProcessedDocument
12: {
13:     public function handle(DataRequest $dataRequest, array $files, \App\Models\User $admin, ?array $requiredSurveys = null): void
14:     {
15:         $wasProcessing = $dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::Processing;
16:         $hasFeedback = !is_null($dataRequest->user_feedback);
17:         
18:         $paths = [];
19:         foreach ($files as $file) {
20:             $paths[] = [
21:                 'path' => $file->store('request_results'),
22:                 'original_name' => $file->getClientOriginalName(),
23:                 'size' => $file->getSize(),
24:             ];
25:         }
26: 
27:         try {
28:             \Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB::transaction(function () use ($dataRequest, $paths, $admin, $requiredSurveys, $hasFeedback) {
29:                 foreach ($paths as $fileInfo) {
30:                     RequestDocument::create([
31:                         'data_request_id' => $dataRequest->id,
32:                         'document_type' => 'processed_data_result',
33:                         'file_path' => $fileInfo['path'],
34:                         'original_name' => $fileInfo['original_name'],
35:                         'file_size' => $fileInfo['size'],
36:                     ]);
37:                 }
38: 
39:                 $updates = [];
40:                 if ($dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::Processing) {
41:                     $updates['status'] = RequestStatus::Completed;
42:                 }
43: 
44:                 if ($requiredSurveys !== null) {
45:                     $updates['required_surveys'] = $requiredSurveys;
46:                 }
47: 
48:                 if (!empty($updates)) {
49:                     $dataRequest->update($updates);
50:                 }
51: 
52:                 activity()
53:                     ->performedOn($dataRequest)
54:                     ->causedBy($admin)
55:                     ->event('processed_data_uploaded')
56:                     ->log('Admin mengunggah data hasil untuk pengaju.');
57: 
58:                 if ($hasFeedback) {
59:                     activity()
60:                         ->performedOn($dataRequest)
61:                         ->causedBy($admin)
62:                         ->event('feedback_revision_uploaded')
63:                         ->log('Admin mengunggah ulang data setelah feedback pengaju.');
64:                 }
65:             });
66:         } catch (\Exception $e) {
67:             foreach ($paths as $fileInfo) {
68:                 \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage::delete($fileInfo['path']);
69:             }
70:             throw $e;
71:         }
72: 
73:         $dataRequest->refresh()->loadMissing('user');
74: 
75:         if ($hasFeedback) {
76:             $dataRequest->user?->notify(new ComplaintRevisedDataNotification($dataRequest));
77:         } elseif ($wasProcessing && $dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::Completed) {
78:             $dataRequest->user?->notify(new DataRequestStatusNotification($dataRequest));
79:         }
80:     }
81: }

================
File: app/Actions/Auth/HandleSocialLogin.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions\Auth;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\UserRole;
 6: use App\Models\User;
 7: use Laravel\Socialite\Contracts\User as SocialiteUser;
 8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
 9: 
10: class HandleSocialLogin
11: {
12:     /**
13:      * Handle social login/registration.
14:      */
15:     public function handle(string $provider, SocialiteUser $socialiteUser): User
16:     {
17:         return DB::transaction(function () use ($provider, $socialiteUser) {
18:             // First try to find by provider ID
19:             $user = User::where($provider . '_id', $socialiteUser->getId())->first();
20: 
21:             if ($user) {
22:                 // Update avatar if it changed
23:                 if ($user->avatar !== $socialiteUser->getAvatar()) {
24:                     $user->update(['avatar' => $socialiteUser->getAvatar()]);
25:                 }
26:                 return $user;
27:             }
28: 
29:             // Next try to find by email
30:             $user = User::where('email', $socialiteUser->getEmail())->first();
31: 
32:             if ($user) {
33:                 // Link the provider to the existing account
34:                 $user->update([
35:                     $provider . '_id' => $socialiteUser->getId(),
36:                     'avatar' => $user->avatar ?? $socialiteUser->getAvatar(),
37:                     // Verify email automatically since it's from Google
38:                     'email_verified_at' => $user->email_verified_at ?? now(),
39:                 ]);
40:                 return $user;
41:             }
42: 
43:             // If completely new, register them
44:             $user = User::create([
45:                 'name' => $socialiteUser->getName() ?? $socialiteUser->getNickname(),
46:                 'email' => $socialiteUser->getEmail(),
47:                 'email_verified_at' => now(), // Auto verify social logins
48:                 'password' => null, // No password
49:                 'role' => UserRole::User, // Default role
50:                 'phone' => '0000000000', // Google OAuth doesn't return phone, provide a placeholder
51:                 $provider . '_id' => $socialiteUser->getId(),
52:                 'avatar' => $socialiteUser->getAvatar(),
53:             ]);
54: 
55:             // Explicitly mark it as verified here to ensure Laravel's event listeners 
56:             // don't conflict with what we set in `User::create`.
57:             $user->markEmailAsVerified();
58: 
59:             return $user;
60:         });
61:     }
62: }

================
File: app/Actions/CreateAdminUser.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\UserRole;
 6: use App\Models\User;
 7: use App\Support\PhoneNumberNormalizer;
 8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
 9: use Illuminate\Support\Str;
10: 
11: class CreateAdminUser
12: {
13:     /**
14:      * Create a new Admin user and generate a temporary password.
15:      *
16:      * @param array $data
17:      * @return array Contains 'user' and 'temporary_password'
18:      */
19:     public function handle(array $data): array
20:     {
21:         $isManual = !empty($data['password']);
22:         $tempPassword = $isManual ? $data['password'] : Str::password(12);
23: 
24:         $user = User::create([
25:             'name' => $data['name'],
26:             'email' => $data['email'],
27:             'phone' => PhoneNumberNormalizer::toE164($data['phone'], $data['phone_country']),
28:             'role' => UserRole::Admin,
29:             'password' => Hash::make($tempPassword),
30:         ]);
31: 
32:         $user->markEmailAsVerified();
33: 
34:         return [
35:             'user' => $user,
36:             'temporary_password' => $isManual ? null : $tempPassword,
37:         ];
38:     }
39: }

================
File: app/Actions/DownloadProcessedDataZip.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 6: use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\StreamedResponse;
 7: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
 8: use ZipArchive;
 9: 
10: class DownloadProcessedDataZip
11: {
12:     /**
13:      * Download all processed documents as a ZIP file.
14:      */
15:     public function handle(DataRequest $dataRequest): StreamedResponse
16:     {
17:         $documents = $dataRequest->documents()
18:             ->where('document_type', 'processed_data_result')
19:             ->get();
20: 
21:         abort_if($documents->isEmpty(), 404, 'Tidak ada dokumen hasil yang dapat diunduh.');
22: 
23:         $zipFileName = 'data-hasil-' . $dataRequest->request_code . '.zip';
24:         $tempFile = tempnam(sys_get_temp_dir(), 'zip');
25: 
26:         $zip = new ZipArchive();
27:         if ($zip->open($tempFile, ZipArchive::CREATE | ZipArchive::OVERWRITE) === TRUE) {
28:             $nameCount = [];
29: 
30:             foreach ($documents as $doc) {
31:                 $fullPath = Storage::disk('local')->path($doc->file_path);
32:                 
33:                 if (file_exists($fullPath)) {
34:                     $baseName = pathinfo($doc->original_name, PATHINFO_FILENAME);
35:                     $extension = pathinfo($doc->original_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION);
36:                     $zipEntryName = $doc->original_name;
37: 
38:                     // Handle duplicate original names
39:                     if (isset($nameCount[$doc->original_name])) {
40:                         $nameCount[$doc->original_name]++;
41:                         $zipEntryName = $baseName . ' (' . $nameCount[$doc->original_name] . ').' . $extension;
42:                     } else {
43:                         $nameCount[$doc->original_name] = 0;
44:                     }
45: 
46:                     $zip->addFile($fullPath, $zipEntryName);
47:                 }
48:             }
49:             $zip->close();
50:         }
51: 
52:         abort_unless(file_exists($tempFile), 500, 'Gagal membuat file ZIP.');
53: 
54:         return response()->streamDownload(function () use ($tempFile) {
55:             readfile($tempFile);
56:             @unlink($tempFile);
57:         }, $zipFileName, [
58:             'Content-Type' => 'application/zip',
59:         ]);
60:     }
61: }

================
File: app/Actions/RequestNewInvoice.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
 6: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 7: 
 8: class RequestNewInvoice
 9: {
10:     /**
11:      * Handle the user re-requesting an invoice after expiration.
12:      */
13:     public function handle(DataRequest $dataRequest): DataRequest
14:     {
15:         $dataRequest->checkAndExpireIfNeeded();
16: 
17:         abort_unless(
18:             $dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::Expired,
19:             403,
20:             'Hanya bisa mengajukan ulang jika status saat ini kedaluwarsa.'
21:         );
22: 
23:         \Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB::transaction(function () use ($dataRequest) {
24:             // Expire semua invoice lama yang masih aktif
25:             $dataRequest->invoices()
26:                 ->whereIn('status', [
27:                     \App\Enums\InvoiceStatus::Issued,
28:                     \App\Enums\InvoiceStatus::Invalid,
29:                 ])
30:                 ->update(['status' => \App\Enums\InvoiceStatus::Expired]);
31: 
32:             $dataRequest->update([
33:                 'status' => RequestStatus::PaymentRequired,
34:                 'rejection_reason' => null,
35:             ]);
36:         });
37: 
38:         activity('payment')
39:             ->performedOn($dataRequest)
40:             ->causedBy(auth()->user())
41:             ->event('invoice_reissue_requested')
42:             ->log('User mengajukan ulang tagihan setelah kedaluwarsa.');
43: 
44:         return $dataRequest;
45:     }
46: }

File: app/Actions/StartProcessingRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 6: 
 7: class StartProcessingRequest
 8: {
 9:     /**
10:      * Move request to processing state.
11:      */
12:     public function handle(DataRequest $dataRequest): DataRequest
13:     {
14:         if ($dataRequest->status === \App\Enums\RequestStatus::Processing) {
15:             return $dataRequest;
16:         }
17: 
18:         abort_unless(
19:             $dataRequest->status === \App\Enums\RequestStatus::PaymentVerified,
20:             403,
21:             'Permohonan hanya bisa diproses setelah pembayaran terverifikasi.'
22:         );
23: 
24:         $dataRequest->update([
25:             'status' => \App\Enums\RequestStatus::Processing,
26:         ]);
27: 
28:         return $dataRequest;
29:     }
30: }

================
File: app/Actions/SubmitDataRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\PurposeType;
 6: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
 7: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 8: use App\Models\RequestDocument;
 9: use Illuminate\Http\UploadedFile;
10: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
11: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
12: 
13: class SubmitDataRequest
14: {
15:     /**
16:      * Create a new data request with uploaded documents.
17:      *
18:      * @param  \App\Models\User  $user
19:      * @param  array  $data  Validated form data
20:      * @param  array<string, UploadedFile>  $files  Keyed by document_type
21:      * @return \App\Models\DataRequest
22:      */
23:     public function handle($user, array $data, array $files): DataRequest
24:     {
25:         return DB::transaction(function () use ($user, $data, $files) {
26:             $purposeType = PurposeType::from($data['purpose_type']);
27: 
28:             $dataRequest = DataRequest::create([
29:                 'request_code' => DataRequest::generateRequestCode(),
30:                 'user_id' => $user->id,
31:                 'title' => $data['title'],
32:                 'company_name' => $data['company_name'] ?? null,
33:                 'purpose_type' => $purposeType->value,
34:                 'applicant_type' => $data['applicant_type'],
35:                 'request_category' => $purposeType->category()->value,
36:                 'status' => RequestStatus::Pending,
37:                 'research_target_date' => $data['research_target_date'] ?? null,
38:             ]);
39: 
40:             // Update user's company name if it's currently empty and provided in the request
41:             if ($data['applicant_type'] === 'instansi' && empty($user->company_name) && !empty($data['company_name'])) {
42:                 $user->update(['company_name' => $data['company_name']]);
43:             }
44: 
45:             foreach ($files as $documentType => $file) {
46:                 $path = $file->store(
47:                     "data-requests/{$dataRequest->id}",
48:                     'local'
49:                 );
50: 
51:                 RequestDocument::create([
52:                     'data_request_id' => $dataRequest->id,
53:                     'document_type' => $documentType,
54:                     'file_path' => $path,
55:                     'original_name' => $file->getClientOriginalName(),
56:                     'file_size' => $file->getSize(),
57:                 ]);
58:             }
59: 
60:             activity()
61:                 ->performedOn($dataRequest)
62:                 ->causedBy($user)
63:                 ->event('data_request_submitted')
64:                 ->log('User mengajukan permohonan data baru.');
65: 
66:             return $dataRequest->load('documents');
67:         });
68:     }
69: }

================
File: app/Actions/SubmitPaymentProof.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 6: use App\Models\Invoice;
 7: use App\Enums\InvoiceStatus;
 8: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
 9: use Illuminate\Http\UploadedFile;
10: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
11: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
12: 
13: class SubmitPaymentProof
14: {
15:     /**
16:      * Upload proof of payment and update the active Invoice status to verifying.
17:      */
18:     public function handle(DataRequest $dataRequest, UploadedFile $file): Invoice
19:     {
20:         $invoice = $dataRequest->activeInvoice;
21:         abort_unless($invoice, 404, 'Tagihan aktif tidak ditemukan.');
22:         $wasRejectedBefore = $invoice->status === InvoiceStatus::Invalid;
23: 
24:         $path = $file->store('payment_documents/proofs');
25: 
26:         try {
27:             return DB::transaction(function () use ($invoice, $dataRequest, $path, $wasRejectedBefore) {
28:                 if ($invoice->proof_path) {
29:                     Storage::delete($invoice->proof_path);
30:                 }
31: 
32:                 $invoice->update([
33:                     'proof_path' => $path,
34:                     'status' => InvoiceStatus::Verifying,
35:                     'rejection_reason' => null,
36:                 ]);
37: 
38:                 $dataRequest->update([
39:                     'status' => RequestStatus::PaymentVerifying,
40:                 ]);
41: 
42:                 activity('payment')
43:                     ->performedOn($invoice)
44:                     ->causedBy($dataRequest->user)
45:                     ->withProperties([
46:                         'data_request_id' => $dataRequest->id,
47:                         'invoice_id' => $invoice->id,
48:                     ])
49:                     ->event($wasRejectedBefore ? 'payment_proof_resubmitted' : 'payment_proof_submitted')
50:                     ->log($wasRejectedBefore ? 'Payment proof resubmitted by user.' : 'Payment proof submitted by user.');
51: 
52:                 return $invoice;
53:             });
54:         } catch (\Exception $e) {
55:             Storage::delete($path);
56:             throw $e;
57:         }
58:     }
59: }

================
File: app/Actions/SubmitProductUpload.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 6: use App\Models\ProductUpload;
 7: use Illuminate\Http\UploadedFile;
 8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
 9: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
10: 
11: class SubmitProductUpload
12: {
13:     /**
14:      * Upload product files and create the records.
15:      * 
16:      * @param DataRequest $dataRequest
17:      * @param UploadedFile[] $files
18:      */
19:     public function handle(DataRequest $dataRequest, array $files): array
20:     {
21:         // Enforce maximum 10 total uploads limit globally per request
22:         $existingCount = $dataRequest->productUploads()->count();
23:         if ($existingCount + count($files) > 10) {
24:             throw \Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException::withMessages([
25:                 'files' => 'Total produk yang diunggah tidak boleh lebih dari 10 file. (Saat ini: ' . $existingCount . ' file)'
26:             ]);
27:         }
28: 
29:         $paths = [];
30:         try {
31:             return DB::transaction(function () use ($dataRequest, $files, &$paths) {
32:                 $uploads = [];
33:                 foreach ($files as $file) {
34:                     $path = $file->store('product_uploads');
35:                     $paths[] = $path; // track for cleanup on failure
36: 
37:                     $uploads[] = $dataRequest->productUploads()->create([
38:                         'file_path' => $path,
39:                         'original_name' => $file->getClientOriginalName(),
40:                         'file_size' => $file->getSize(),
41:                     ]);
42:                 }
43: 
44:                 activity()
45:                     ->performedOn($dataRequest)
46:                     ->causedBy(auth()->user())
47:                     ->withProperties([
48:                         'file_count' => count($uploads),
49:                     ])
50:                     ->event('product_uploaded')
51:                     ->log('User mengunggah produk penelitian.');
52: 
53:                 return $uploads;
54:             });
55:         } catch (\Exception $e) {
56:             foreach ($paths as $path) {
57:                 Storage::delete($path);
58:             }
59:             throw $e;
60:         }
61:     }
62: }

File: app/Actions/SubmitSurveyProof.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 6: use App\Models\Survey;
 7: use App\Enums\SurveyStatus;
 8: use App\Enums\SurveyType;
 9: use Illuminate\Http\UploadedFile;
10: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
11: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
12: 
13: class SubmitSurveyProof
14: {
15:     /**
16:      * Upload proof of survey and update or create the record.
17:      */
18:     public function handle(DataRequest $dataRequest, SurveyType $surveyType, UploadedFile $file): Survey
19:     {
20:         // Snapshot logic: Once a user starts uploading, we freeze the requirement list 
21:         // to whatever was active at that moment to ensure consistency.
22:         if ($dataRequest->required_surveys === null) {
23:             $dataRequest->update(['required_surveys' => $dataRequest->effective_required_surveys]);
24:         }
25: 
26:         $path = $file->store('survey_proofs');
27: 
28:         try {
29:             return DB::transaction(function () use ($dataRequest, $surveyType, $file, $path) {
30:                 /** @var \App\Models\Survey|null $survey */
31:                 $survey = $dataRequest->surveys()->where('survey_type', $surveyType)->first();
32: 
33:                 if ($survey) {
34:                     if ($survey->proof_path) {
35:                         Storage::delete($survey->proof_path);
36:                     }
37:                     $survey->update([
38:                         'proof_path' => $path,
39:                         'proof_original_name' => $file->getClientOriginalName(),
40:                         'status' => SurveyStatus::Pending,
41:                         'rejection_reason' => null,
42:                         'reviewed_by' => null,
43:                         'reviewed_at' => null,
44:                     ]);
45:                 } else {
46:                     $survey = $dataRequest->surveys()->create([
47:                         'survey_type' => $surveyType,
48:                         'proof_path' => $path,
49:                         'proof_original_name' => $file->getClientOriginalName(),
50:                         'status' => SurveyStatus::Pending,
51:                     ]);
52:                 }
53: 
54:                 activity('survey')
55:                     ->performedOn($survey)
56:                     ->causedBy(auth()->user())
57:                     ->withProperties([
58:                         'data_request_id' => $dataRequest->id,
59:                         'survey_type' => $surveyType->value,
60:                     ])
61:                     ->event('survey_proof_submitted')
62:                     ->log('User mengunggah bukti survei.');
63: 
64:                 return $survey;
65:             });
66:         } catch (\Exception $e) {
67:             Storage::delete($path);
68:             throw $e;
69:         }
70:     }
71: }

================
File: app/Actions/UploadPaymentInvoice.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\InvoiceOcrStatus;
 6: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 7: use App\Models\Invoice;
 8: use App\Enums\InvoiceStatus;
 9: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
10: use App\Jobs\ExtractInvoicePaymentDetails;
11: use App\Notifications\InvoiceAvailableNotification;
12: use Illuminate\Http\UploadedFile;
13: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
14: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
15: 
16: class UploadPaymentInvoice
17: {
18:     /**
19:      * Upload an invoice and create a new Invoice record.
20:      */
21:     public function handle(DataRequest $dataRequest, UploadedFile $file, ?float $amount, ?string $billingCode = null): Invoice
22:     {
23:         $previousInvoice = $dataRequest->invoices()
24:             ->where('status', InvoiceStatus::Issued->value)
25:             ->latest()
26:             ->first();
27: 
28:         $path = $file->store('payment_documents/invoices');
29:         $isPdfInvoice = strtolower($file->getClientOriginalExtension()) === 'pdf';
30: 
31:         $resolvedAmount = $amount ?? null;
32:         $resolvedBillingCode = $billingCode ?? null;
33:         $ocrStatus = $isPdfInvoice ? InvoiceOcrStatus::Pending : InvoiceOcrStatus::Skipped;
34: 
35:         try {
36:             $invoice = DB::transaction(function () use ($dataRequest, $path, $resolvedAmount, $resolvedBillingCode, $previousInvoice, $ocrStatus) {
37:                 if ($previousInvoice?->exists) {
38:                     $previousInvoice->update(['status' => InvoiceStatus::Expired]);
39:                 }
40: 
41:                 $invoice = $dataRequest->invoices()->create([
42:                     'amount' => $resolvedAmount,
43:                     'billing_code' => $resolvedBillingCode,
44:                     'invoice_path' => $path,
45:                     'status' => InvoiceStatus::Issued,
46:                     'ocr_status' => $ocrStatus,
47:                     'expires_at' => now()->addDays(7),
48:                 ]);
49: 
50:                 $dataRequest->update([
51:                     'status' => RequestStatus::PaymentRequired,
52:                 ]);
53: 
54:                 return $invoice;
55:             });
56:         } catch (\Exception $e) {
57:             Storage::delete($path);
58:             throw $e;
59:         }
60: 
61:         if ($isPdfInvoice) {
62:             ExtractInvoicePaymentDetails::dispatch($invoice->id)
63:                 ->onQueue('ocr')
64:                 ->afterCommit();
65:         }
66: 
67:         $dataRequest->refresh()->loadMissing('user');
68:         $invoice->refresh();
69:         $dataRequest->user?->notify(new InvoiceAvailableNotification($dataRequest, $invoice));
70: 
71:         return $invoice;
72:     }
73: }

================
File: app/Actions/VerifyDataRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\RequestCategory;
 6: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
 7: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 8: use App\Models\User;
 9: use App\Notifications\DataRequestStatusNotification;
10: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
11: 
12: class VerifyDataRequest
13: {
14:     /**
15:      * Approve or reject a data request.
16:      *
17:      * @param  \App\Models\DataRequest  $dataRequest
18:      * @param  \App\Models\User  $reviewer  The admin performing the review
19:      * @param  string  $action  'approve' or 'reject'
20:      * @param  string|null  $rejectionReason  Required if action is 'reject'
21:      * @return \App\Models\DataRequest
22:      */
23:     public function handle(DataRequest $dataRequest, User $reviewer, string $action, ?string $rejectionReason = null): DataRequest
24:     {
25:         if ($action === 'approve') {
26:             $newStatus = $dataRequest->purpose_type->category() === RequestCategory::Paid
27:                 ? RequestStatus::PaymentRequired
28:                 : RequestStatus::Processing;
29:         } elseif ($action === 'reject') {
30:             $newStatus = RequestStatus::Rejected;
31:         } else {
32:             throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Invalid action: {$action}");
33:         }
34: 
35:         $isRejection = in_array($newStatus, [RequestStatus::Rejected, RequestStatus::PaymentInvalid, RequestStatus::Expired]);
36: 
37:         DB::transaction(function () use ($dataRequest, $reviewer, $newStatus, $isRejection, $rejectionReason) {
38:             $dataRequest->update([
39:                 'status' => $newStatus,
40:                 'rejection_reason' => $isRejection ? $rejectionReason : null,
41:                 'reviewed_by' => $reviewer->id,
42:                 'reviewed_at' => now(),
43:             ]);
44:         });
45: 
46:         $dataRequest->refresh();
47: 
48:         if ($newStatus !== RequestStatus::Pending) {
49:             $dataRequest->user->notify(new DataRequestStatusNotification($dataRequest));
50:         }
51: 
52:         return $dataRequest;
53:     }
54: }

================
File: app/Actions/VerifyPaymentProof.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\InvoiceStatus;
 6: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
 7: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 8: use App\Models\Invoice;
 9: use App\Models\User;
10: use App\Notifications\DataRequestStatusNotification;
11: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
12: 
13: class VerifyPaymentProof
14: {
15:     /**
16:      * Admin verifies the payment proof.
17:      */
18:     public function handle(DataRequest $dataRequest, User $admin, string $action, ?string $rejectionReason = null): Invoice
19:     {
20:         $invoice = $dataRequest->invoices()->where('status', InvoiceStatus::Verifying)->latest()->firstOrFail();
21: 
22:         $invoice = DB::transaction(function () use ($invoice, $dataRequest, $action, $rejectionReason, $admin) {
23:             if ($action === 'accept') {
24:                 $invoice->update([
25:                     'status' => InvoiceStatus::Paid,
26:                     'verified_at' => now(),
27:                     'rejection_reason' => null,
28:                 ]);
29: 
30:                 $dataRequest->update([
31:                     'status' => RequestStatus::Processing,
32:                     'rejection_reason' => null,
33:                 ]);
34: 
35:                 activity('payment')
36:                     ->performedOn($invoice)
37:                     ->causedBy($admin)
38:                     ->withProperties([
39:                         'data_request_id' => $dataRequest->id,
40:                         'invoice_id' => $invoice->id,
41:                     ])
42:                     ->event('payment_proof_verified')
43:                     ->log('Payment proof verified by admin.');
44:             } else {
45:                 $invoice->update([
46:                     'status' => InvoiceStatus::Invalid,
47:                     'rejection_reason' => $rejectionReason,
48:                 ]);
49: 
50:                 $dataRequest->update([
51:                     'status' => RequestStatus::PaymentInvalid,
52:                     'rejection_reason' => $rejectionReason,
53:                 ]);
54: 
55:                 activity('payment')
56:                     ->performedOn($invoice)
57:                     ->causedBy($admin)
58:                     ->withProperties([
59:                         'data_request_id' => $dataRequest->id,
60:                         'invoice_id' => $invoice->id,
61:                         'rejection_reason' => $rejectionReason,
62:                     ])
63:                     ->event('payment_proof_rejected')
64:                     ->log('Payment proof rejected by admin.');
65:             }
66: 
67:             return $invoice;
68:         });
69: 
70:         // Send queued email notification **outside** the transaction to avoid holding DB connections.
71:         $dataRequest->refresh();
72:         $dataRequest->user->notify(new DataRequestStatusNotification($dataRequest));
73: 
74:         return $invoice;
75:     }
76: }

================
File: app/Actions/VerifySurveyProof.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Actions;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\SurveyStatus;
 6: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 7: use App\Models\Survey;
 8: use App\Models\User;
 9: use App\Notifications\SurveyApprovedDownloadReadyNotification;
10: use App\Notifications\SurveyRejectedNotification;
11: 
12: class VerifySurveyProof
13: {
14:     /**
15:      * Admin approve or reject a survey proof.
16:      */
17:     public function handle(Survey $survey, User $admin, string $action, ?string $rejectionReason = null): Survey
18:     {
19:         $status = $action === 'approve' ? SurveyStatus::Approved : SurveyStatus::Rejected;
20: 
21:         $survey->update([
22:             'status' => $status,
23:             'rejection_reason' => $action === 'reject' ? $rejectionReason : null,
24:             'reviewed_by' => $admin->id,
25:             'reviewed_at' => now(),
26:         ]);
27: 
28:         $survey->refresh();
29: 
30:         activity('survey')
31:             ->performedOn($survey)
32:             ->causedBy($admin)
33:             ->withProperties([
34:                 'data_request_id' => $survey->data_request_id,
35:                 'survey_type' => $survey->survey_type->value ?? $survey->survey_type,
36:                 'rejection_reason' => $rejectionReason,
37:             ])
38:             ->event($action === 'approve' ? 'survey_proof_approved' : 'survey_proof_rejected')
39:             ->log($action === 'approve' ? 'Admin menyetujui bukti survei.' : 'Admin menolak bukti survei.');
40: 
41:         /** @var DataRequest $dataRequest */
42:         $dataRequest = $survey->dataRequest()
43:             ->with(['user', 'surveys'])
44:             ->firstOrFail();
45: 
46:         if ($status === SurveyStatus::Rejected) {
47:             $dataRequest->user?->notify(new SurveyRejectedNotification($dataRequest, $survey));
48:             return $survey;
49:         }
50: 
51:         $requiredSurveyTypes = $dataRequest->effective_required_surveys;
52:         $surveyType = $survey->survey_type->value ?? $survey->survey_type;
53: 
54:         if (
55:             !empty($requiredSurveyTypes)
56:             && in_array($surveyType, $requiredSurveyTypes, true)
57:         ) {
58:             $allCompleted = $dataRequest->are_surveys_completed;
59:             $dataRequest->user?->notify(new SurveyApprovedDownloadReadyNotification($dataRequest, $survey, $allCompleted));
60:         }
61: 
62:         return $survey;
63:     }
64: }

================
File: app/Console/Commands/CreateSuperAdmin.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Console\Commands;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\UserRole;
 6: use App\Models\User;
 7: use Illuminate\Console\Command;
 8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
 9: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;
10: 
11: class CreateSuperAdmin extends Command
12: {
13:     protected $signature = 'make:superadmin';
14:     protected $description = 'Create a new superadmin user';
15: 
16:     public function handle(): int
17:     {
18:         $this->info('Creating a new superadmin...');
19:         $this->newLine();
20: 
21:         $name = $this->ask('Name');
22:         $email = $this->ask('Email');
23:         $phone = $this->ask('Phone number');
24:         $password = $this->secret('Password');
25: 
26:         $validator = Validator::make(
27:             compact('name', 'email', 'phone', 'password'),
28:             [
29:                 'name' => 'required|string|max:255',
30:                 'email' => 'required|email|unique:users,email',
31:                 'phone' => ['required', 'string', 'max:20', 'regex:/^[0-9+\-\s()]+$/'],
32:                 'password' => 'required|min:8',
33:             ]
34:         );
35: 
36:         if ($validator->fails()) {
37:             foreach ($validator->errors()->all() as $error) {
38:                 $this->error($error);
39:             }
40:             return self::FAILURE;
41:         }
42: 
43:         $user = User::create([
44:             'name' => $name,
45:             'email' => $email,
46:             'phone' => $phone,
47:             'role' => UserRole::SuperAdmin,
48:             'password' => Hash::make($password),
49:         ]);
50: 
51:         $user->markEmailAsVerified();
52: 
53:         $this->newLine();
54:         $this->info("Superadmin created successfully!");
55:         $this->table(
56:             ['ID', 'Name', 'Email', 'Role'],
57:             [[$user->id, $user->name, $user->email, $user->role->value]]
58:         );
59: 
60:         return self::SUCCESS;
61:     }
62: }

================
File: app/Console/Commands/ExpireInvoices.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Console\Commands;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\InvoiceStatus;
 6: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
 7: use App\Models\Invoice;
 8: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 9: use Illuminate\Console\Command;
10: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
11: 
12: class ExpireInvoices extends Command
13: {
14:     protected $signature = 'invoices:expire';
15:     protected $description = 'Mark issued invoices missing payment as expired past their due date';
16: 
17:     public function handle()
18:     {
19:         $expiredInvoiceIds = Invoice::where('status', InvoiceStatus::Issued)
20:             ->where('expires_at', '<', now())
21:             ->pluck('id');
22: 
23:         if ($expiredInvoiceIds->isEmpty()) {
24:             return;
25:         }
26: 
27:         DB::transaction(function () use ($expiredInvoiceIds) {
28:             Invoice::whereIn('id', $expiredInvoiceIds)
29:                 ->update(['status' => InvoiceStatus::Expired]);
30: 
31:             DataRequest::where('status', RequestStatus::PaymentRequired)
32:                 ->whereHas('invoices', function ($query) use ($expiredInvoiceIds) {
33:                     $query->whereIn('invoices.id', $expiredInvoiceIds);
34:                 })->update(['status' => RequestStatus::Expired]);
35:         });
36:     }
37: }

File: app/Console/Commands/TestInvoiceExtraction.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Console\Commands;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Console\Command;
 6: use App\Services\InvoiceExtractionService;
 7: 
 8: class TestInvoiceExtraction extends Command
 9: {
10:     /**
11:      * The name and signature of the console command.
12:      *
13:      * @var string
14:      */
15:     protected $signature = 'invoice:test-extract {path : The path relative to project root, e.g., docs/invoice.pdf}';
16: 
17:     /**
18:      * The console command description.
19:      *
20:      * @var string
21:      */
22:     protected $description = 'Test the PDF invoice extraction logic on a specific file.';
23: 
24:     /**
25:      * Execute the console command.
26:      */
27:     public function handle(InvoiceExtractionService $extractionService)
28:     {
29:         $relativePath = $this->argument('path');
30:         $absolutePath = base_path($relativePath);
31: 
32:         $this->info("Extracting data from: {$absolutePath}");
33: 
34:         if (!file_exists($absolutePath)) {
35:             $this->error("File does not exist!");
36:             return Command::FAILURE;
37:         }
38: 
39:         $result = $extractionService->extractData($absolutePath);
40: 
41:         if ($result === null) {
42:             $this->error("Failed to extract data. See logs for details.");
43:             return Command::FAILURE;
44:         }
45: 
46:         $this->table(
47:             ['Field', 'Extracted Value'],
48:             [
49:                 ['Kode Billing', $result['kode_billing'] ?? 'NOT FOUND'],
50:                 ['Tanggal Kadaluarsa', $result['tanggal_kadaluarsa'] ?? 'NOT FOUND'],
51:                 ['Total Disetor', $result['total_disetor'] ?? 'NOT FOUND'],
52:             ]
53:         );
54: 
55:         $this->info("\n--- RAW TEXT EXTRACTED ---");
56:         $this->line(substr($result['raw_text'], 0, 1000) . (strlen($result['raw_text']) > 1000 ? "\n... (truncated)" : ""));
57:         $this->info("--------------------------");
58: 
59:         return Command::SUCCESS;
60:     }
61: }

 7: enum PurposeType: string

18:         return match ($this) {

20:             self::NonCommercialIndividu => 'Non-Komersial (Individu)',
21:             self::NonCommercialInstansi => 'Non-Komersial (Instansi)',
22:         };

26:      * Auto-determine request category from purpose type.
27:      * Commercial → Paid, Non-Commercial → Free.
28:      */

30:     {

32:             self::Commercial => RequestCategory::Paid,
33:             self::NonCommercialIndividu, self::NonCommercialInstansi => RequestCategory::Free,
34:         };
35:     }
36:

38:      * Returns the list of required document types for this purpose.
39:      * Each key is the document_type stored in request_documents table,

41:      */
42:     public function requiredDocuments(): array
43:     {
44:         return match ($this) {
45:             self::Commercial => [
46:                 'form_pernyataan',
47:                 'scan_ktp',
48:             ],
49:             self::NonCommercialIndividu => [
50:                 'surat_permohonan',
51:                 'scan_ktp',
52:                 'proposal',
53:                 'form_pernyataan',
54:             ],
55:             self::NonCommercialInstansi => [
56:                 'surat_permohonan',
57:                 'kartu_identitas_instansi',
58:                 'proposal',
59:                 'form_pernyataan',
60:             ],
61:         };
62:     }
63: 
64:     /**
65:      * Human-readable label for each document type.
66:      */
67:     public static function documentLabel(string $documentType): string
68:     {
69:         return match ($documentType) {
70:             'form_pernyataan' => 'Surat Pernyataan',
71:             'scan_ktp' => 'Scan KTP',
72:             'surat_permohonan' => 'Surat Permohonan',
73:             'proposal' => 'Proposal Penelitian',
74:             'kartu_identitas_instansi' => 'Kartu Identitas Instansi',
75:             default => $documentType,
76:         };
77:     }
78: }

 7:     case Pending = 'pending';

================
File: app/Enums/UserRole.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Enums;
 4: 
 5: enum UserRole: string
 6: {
 7:     case User = 'user';
 8:     case Admin = 'admin';
 9:     case SuperAdmin = 'superadmin';
10: 
11:     /**
12:      * Check if this role has at least the given minimum role level.
13:      */
14:     public function hasAccess(self $minimumRole): bool
15:     {
16:         return self::roleLevel($this) >= self::roleLevel($minimumRole);
17:     }
18: 
19:     /**
20:      * Get the numeric level for the role hierarchy.
21:      * user(0) < admin(1) < superadmin(2)
22:      */
23:     private static function roleLevel(self $role): int
24:     {
25:         return match ($role) {
26:             self::User => 0,
27:             self::Admin => 1,
28:             self::SuperAdmin => 2,
29:         };
30:     }
31: }

================
File: app/Exports/Admin/DataRequestExport.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Exports\Admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Models\DataRequest;
  6: use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\FromQuery;
  7: use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\WithHeadings;
  8: use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\WithMapping;
  9: use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\WithStyles;
 10: use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\ShouldAutoSize;
 11: use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\WithColumnFormatting;
 12: use PhpOffice\PhpSpreadsheet\Worksheet\Worksheet;
 13: use PhpOffice\PhpSpreadsheet\Style\NumberFormat;
 14: 
 15: class DataRequestExport implements FromQuery, WithHeadings, WithMapping, WithStyles, ShouldAutoSize, WithColumnFormatting
 16: {
 17:     public function __construct(private array $filters) {}
 18: 
 19:     public function query()
 20:     {
 21:         return DataRequest::query()
 22:             ->with(['user', 'activeInvoice'])
 23:             ->filter($this->filters)
 24:             ->latest('created_at');
 25:     }
 26: 
 27:     public function headings(): array
 28:     {
 29:         return [
 30:             'Nomor Pendaftaran',
 31:             'Tanggal Diterima',
 32:             'Nama Pemohon',
 33:             'Tipe Pemohon',
 34:             'Instansi Pemohon',
 35:             'Email',
 36:             'No Telepon',
 37:             'Jenis Layanan',
 38:             'Status Permohonan',
 39:             'Status Tagihan',
 40:             'Nominal (Rp.)',
 41:             'Kode Billing',
 42:             'Tanggal Selesai',
 43:             'Durasi Pelayanan (Hari)',
 44:         ];
 45:     }
 46: 
 47:     public function map($abstract): array
 48:     {
 49:         /** @var DataRequest $request */
 50:         $request = $abstract;
 51:         $activeInvoice = $request->activeInvoice;
 52:         $tanggalSelesai = $request->status === \App\Enums\RequestStatus::Completed 
 53:             ? clone $request->updated_at 
 54:             : null;
 55:             
 56:         $durasi = '-';
 57:         if ($tanggalSelesai) {
 58:             // SLA: calculate difference in days + 1 to consider identical dates as 1 day
 59:             $durasi = max(1, $request->created_at->startOfDay()->diffInDays($tanggalSelesai->clone()->startOfDay()) + 1);
 60:         }
 61: 
 62:         $statusTagihan = '-';
 63:         $nominal = 0;
 64:         $kodeBilling = '-';
 65:         
 66:         if ($activeInvoice) {
 67:             $statusTagihan = $activeInvoice->status?->label() ?? '-';
 68:             $nominal = $activeInvoice->amount;
 69:             $kodeBilling = $activeInvoice->payment_code ?? '-';
 70:         } elseif (in_array($request->purpose_type, [
 71:             \App\Enums\PurposeType::NonCommercialIndividu,
 72:             \App\Enums\PurposeType::NonCommercialInstansi,
 73:         ])) {
 74:             $statusTagihan = 'Gratis';
 75:         }
 76: 
 77:         return [
 78:             $request->request_code,
 79:             $request->created_at?->format('Y-m-d') ?? '-',
 80:             $request->user?->name ?? '-',
 81:             $request->applicant_type?->label() ?? '-',
 82:             $request->company_name ?? '-',
 83:             $request->user?->email ?? '-',
 84:             $request->user?->phone ?? '-',
 85:             $request->purpose_type?->label() ?? '-',
 86:             $request->status?->label() ?? '-',
 87:             $statusTagihan,
 88:             $nominal,
 89:             $kodeBilling,
 90:             $tanggalSelesai ? $tanggalSelesai->format('Y-m-d') : '-',
 91:             $durasi,
 92:         ];
 93:     }
 94:     
 95:     public function styles(Worksheet $sheet)
 96:     {
 97:         return [
 98:             1 => ['font' => ['bold' => true]],
 99:         ];
100:     }
101: 
102:     public function columnFormats(): array
103:     {
104:         return [
105:             'H' => NumberFormat::FORMAT_NUMBER_COMMA_SEPARATED1,
106:         ];
107:     }
108: }

================
File: app/Exports/Admin/UserExport.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Exports\Admin;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\User;
 6: use App\Enums\UserRole;
 7: use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\FromQuery;
 8: use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\WithHeadings;
 9: use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\WithMapping;
10: use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\WithStyles;
11: use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\ShouldAutoSize;
12: use PhpOffice\PhpSpreadsheet\Worksheet\Worksheet;
13: 
14: class UserExport implements FromQuery, WithHeadings, WithMapping, WithStyles, ShouldAutoSize
15: {
16:     public function __construct(private array $filters) {}
17: 
18:     public function query()
19:     {
20:         $query = User::query()
21:             ->where('role', UserRole::User->value)
22:             ->withCount(['dataRequests' => function ($q) {
23:                 $q->whereNotNull('user_id');
24:             }])
25:             ->latest('created_at');
26: 
27:         if (!empty($this->filters['start_date'])) {
28:             $query->whereDate('created_at', '>=', $this->filters['start_date']);
29:         }
30: 
31:         if (!empty($this->filters['end_date'])) {
32:             $query->whereDate('created_at', '<=', $this->filters['end_date']);
33:         }
34: 
35:         return $query;
36:     }
37: 
38:     public function headings(): array
39:     {
40:         return [
41:             'Nama Lengkap',
42:             'Email',
43:             'No Telepon',
44:             'Instansi',
45:             'Tanggal Mendaftar',
46:             'Jumlah Pengajuan',
47:         ];
48:     }
49: 
50:     public function map($abstract): array
51:     {
52:         /** @var User $user */
53:         $user = $abstract;
54: 
55:         return [
56:             $user->name ?? '-',
57:             $user->email ?? '-',
58:             $user->phone ?? '-',
59:             $user->company_name ?? '-',
60:             $user->created_at?->format('Y-m-d') ?? '-',
61:             $user->data_requests_count ?? 0,
62:         ];
63:     }
64: 
65:     public function styles(Worksheet $sheet)
66:     {
67:         return [
68:             1 => ['font' => ['bold' => true]],
69:         ];
70:     }
71: }

 9: use App\Models\CatalogItem;

24:             'catalogItems' => $this->catalogService->all(),
25:             'categories' => CatalogCategory::orderBy('name')->get(),
26:         ]);
27:     }
28:

32:         $this->catalogService->refreshKnowledge();

34:         return redirect()->route('admin.catalogs.index')
35:             ->with('success', 'Katalog berhasil ditambahkan.');
36:     }

38:     public function update(SaveCatalogItemRequest $request, CatalogItem $catalog): RedirectResponse

41:         $this->catalogService->refreshKnowledge();
42: 
43:         return redirect()->route('admin.catalogs.index')
44:             ->with('success', 'Katalog berhasil diperbarui.');
45:     }
46:

48:     {
49:         $this->catalogService->deleteCatalogItem($catalog);
50:         $this->catalogService->refreshKnowledge();

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/DataRequestController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Actions\VerifyDataRequest;
  6: use App\Enums\InvoiceOcrStatus;
  7: use App\Enums\InvoiceStatus;
  8: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
  9: use App\Enums\SurveyStatus;
 10: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 11: use App\Http\Requests\ReviewDataRequestRequest;
 12: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 13: use App\Models\Invoice;
 14: use App\Models\RejectionTemplate;
 15: use App\Models\RequestDocument;
 16: use App\Services\SurveySettingService;
 17: use Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse;
 18: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 19: use Illuminate\Pagination\LengthAwarePaginator;
 20: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
 21: use Inertia\Inertia;
 22: use Inertia\Response;
 23: use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\StreamedResponse;
 24: use App\Http\Requests\StoreInvoiceRequest;
 25: use App\Http\Requests\VerifyPaymentRequest;
 26: use App\Http\Requests\Admin\UpdateInvoicePaymentDetailsRequest;
 27: use App\Actions\UploadPaymentInvoice;
 28: use App\Actions\VerifyPaymentProof;
 29: use App\Actions\StartProcessingRequest;
 30: use App\Notifications\ComplaintRevisedDataNotification;
 31: use App\Notifications\DataRequestStatusNotification;
 32: use Spatie\Activitylog\Models\Activity;
 33: use App\Services\AdminDataRequestService;
 34: 
 35: class DataRequestController extends Controller
 36: {
 37:     use \App\Http\Controllers\Concerns\ResolvesDocuments;
 38: 
 39:     /**
 40:      * Display all data requests for admin review, with optional filters.
 41:      */
 42:     public function index(Request $request, AdminDataRequestService $adminService): Response
 43:     {
 44:         $filters = $request->only(['status', 'search', 'purpose', 'date_from', 'date_to', 'sort', 'sort_by']);
 45:         $statusFilter = $filters['status'] ?? null;
 46:         $derivedStatusFilters = ['survey_waiting_input', 'survey_verification', 'survey_rejected', 'completed'];
 47:         $requiresInMemoryStatusFilter = in_array($statusFilter, $derivedStatusFilters, true);
 48:         $sortBy = $filters['sort_by'] ?? 'updated_at';
 49:         $sortDirection = ($filters['sort'] ?? 'desc') === 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc';
 50:         $queryFilters = $filters;
 51: 
 52:         if ($requiresInMemoryStatusFilter) {
 53:             $queryFilters['status'] = null;
 54:         }
 55: 
 56:         $query = DataRequest::with(['user:id,name,email,company_name', 'reviewer:id,name'])
 57:             ->with(['activeInvoice:invoices.id,invoices.data_request_id,invoices.status'])
 58:             ->with(['surveys:id,data_request_id,survey_type,status'])
 59:             ->filter($queryFilters)
 60:             ->when($sortBy === 'user_name', function ($query) use ($sortDirection) {
 61:                 $query->leftJoin('users', 'users.id', '=', 'data_requests.user_id')
 62:                     ->select('data_requests.*')
 63:                     ->orderBy('users.name', $sortDirection)
 64:                     ->orderBy('data_requests.updated_at', 'desc');
 65:             }, function ($query) use ($sortBy, $sortDirection) {
 66:                 $allowedSorts = ['created_at', 'updated_at', 'request_code'];
 67:                 $column = in_array($sortBy, $allowedSorts, true) ? $sortBy : 'updated_at';
 68: 
 69:                 $query->orderBy('data_requests.' . $column, $sortDirection);
 70:             });
 71: 
 72:         if ($requiresInMemoryStatusFilter) {
 73:             $allItems = $query->get()->map(function (DataRequest $dataRequest) use ($adminService) {
 74:                 $dataRequest->setAttribute('admin_status_key', $adminService->resolveAdminStatusKey($dataRequest));
 75:                 return $dataRequest;
 76:             })->filter(fn(DataRequest $dataRequest) => $dataRequest->admin_status_key === $statusFilter)
 77:                 ->values();
 78: 
 79:             $perPage = 15;
 80:             $currentPage = LengthAwarePaginator::resolveCurrentPage();
 81:             $pageItems = $allItems->slice(($currentPage - 1) * $perPage, $perPage)->values();
 82: 
 83:             $dataRequests = new LengthAwarePaginator(
 84:                 $pageItems,
 85:                 $allItems->count(),
 86:                 $perPage,
 87:                 $currentPage,
 88:                 [
 89:                     'path' => $request->url(),
 90:                     'query' => $request->query(),
 91:                 ]
 92:             );
 93:         } else {
 94:             $dataRequests = $query->paginate(15)->withQueryString();
 95:             $dataRequests->through(function (DataRequest $dataRequest) use ($adminService) {
 96:                 $dataRequest->setAttribute(
 97:                     'admin_status_key',
 98:                     $adminService->resolveAdminStatusKey($dataRequest)
 99:                 );
100: 
101:                 return $dataRequest;
102:             });
103:         }
104: 
105:         $stats = $adminService->getDashboardStats();
106: 
107:         return Inertia::render('Admin/DataRequests/Index', [
108:             'dataRequests' => $dataRequests,
109:             'stats' => $stats,
110:             'filters' => (object) $filters,
111:         ]);
112:     }
113: 
114:     /**
115:      * Display a single data request with its documents for review.
116:      */
117:     public function show(DataRequest $dataRequest, SurveySettingService $surveySettings, AdminDataRequestService $adminService): Response
118:     {
119:         $this->authorize('view', $dataRequest);
120: 
121:         $dataRequest->load([
122:             'user:id,name,email,phone,company_name',
123:             'documents',
124:             'reviewer:id,name',
125:             'activeInvoice',
126:             'invoices' => fn ($query) => $query->latest(),
127:             'surveys.reviewer:id,name',
128:         ]);
129: 
130:         // Lazy expiration check BEFORE attaching virtual attributes
131:         $dataRequest->checkAndExpireIfNeeded();
132: 
133:         // --- SMART SNAPSHOT & PRUNING LOGIC ---
134:         // This ensures the survey requirements follow a "One-Way" progression.
135:         $currentSnapshot = $dataRequest->required_surveys;
136:         $effectiveSurveys = $dataRequest->effective_required_surveys;
137: 
138:         if ($currentSnapshot === null || $currentSnapshot === []) {
139:             // Initial Snapshot: Freeze the effective surveys so they don't change if
140:             // global settings are modified later. This applies when:
141:             // - required_surveys was never set (null)
142:             // - required_surveys was empty ([]) meaning "inherit from global"
143:             if (!empty($effectiveSurveys) || $dataRequest->surveys()->exists()) {
144:                 \App\Models\DataRequest::where('id', $dataRequest->id)->update([
145:                     'required_surveys' => json_encode($effectiveSurveys)
146:                 ]);
147:                 $dataRequest->refresh();
148:             }
149:         } else {
150:             // 2. Pruning: If the current effective list is SMALLER than the saved snapshot 
151:             // (meaning admin turned off a survey the user hadn't uploaded yet),
152:             // prune the snapshot so the survey never comes back even if admin turns it back on.
153:             if (count($effectiveSurveys) < count($currentSnapshot)) {
154:                 \App\Models\DataRequest::where('id', $dataRequest->id)->update([
155:                     'required_surveys' => json_encode($effectiveSurveys)
156:                 ]);
157:                 $dataRequest->refresh();
158:             }
159:         }
160: 
161:         $processedDocuments = $dataRequest->documents
162:             ->where('document_type', 'processed_data_result')
163:             ->values();
164:         $submissionDocuments = $dataRequest->documents
165:             ->where('document_type', '!=', 'processed_data_result')
166:             ->values();
167:         $dataRequest->setRelation('documents', $submissionDocuments);
168:         $dataRequest->setAttribute('processed_documents', $processedDocuments);
169: 
170:         $dataRequest->setAttribute(
171:             'admin_status_key',
172:             $adminService->resolveAdminStatusKey($dataRequest)
173:         );
174: 
175:         $paymentActivityLogs = Activity::query()
176:             ->with('causer:id,name')
177:             ->where('subject_type', Invoice::class)
178:             ->whereIn('subject_id', $dataRequest->invoices->pluck('id'))
179:             ->whereIn('event', [
180:                 'invoice_uploaded',
181:                 'payment_proof_submitted',
182:                 'payment_proof_resubmitted',
183:                 'payment_proof_rejected',
184:                 'payment_proof_verified',
185:             ])
186:             ->orderBy('created_at')
187:             ->get()
188:             ->map(fn(Activity $activity) => [
189:                 'invoice_id' => $activity->subject_id,
190:                 'event' => $activity->event,
191:                 'logged_at' => $activity->created_at?->toISOString(),
192:                 'causer_name' => $activity->causer?->name,
193:                 'rejection_reason' => data_get($activity->properties, 'rejection_reason'),
194:             ])
195:             ->values();
196: 
197:         $complaintActivityLogs = Activity::query()
198:             ->with('causer:id,name')
199:             ->where('subject_type', DataRequest::class)
200:             ->where('subject_id', $dataRequest->id)
201:             ->whereIn('event', [
202:                 'processing_started',
203:                 'user_feedback_submitted',
204:                 'processed_data_uploaded',
205:                 'feedback_revision_uploaded',
206:                 'complaint_marked_resolved',
207:             ])
208:             ->orderBy('created_at')
209:             ->get()
210:             ->map(fn(Activity $activity) => [
211:                 'event' => $activity->event,
212:                 'logged_at' => $activity->created_at?->toISOString(),
213:                 'causer_name' => $activity->causer?->name,
214:             ])
215:             ->values();
216: 
217:         $dataRequest->setAttribute('payment_activity_logs', $paymentActivityLogs);
218:         $dataRequest->setAttribute('complaint_activity_logs', $complaintActivityLogs);
219:         
220:         $dataRequest->append('has_submitted_feedback');
221:         $dataRequest->append('are_surveys_completed');
222: 
223:         // Transform surveys for frontend
224:         $surveys = $dataRequest->surveys->map(fn($survey) => [
225:             'id' => $survey->id,
226:             'survey_type' => $survey->survey_type->value ?? $survey->survey_type,
227:             'status' => $survey->status->value ?? $survey->status,
228:             'rejection_reason' => $survey->rejection_reason,
229:             'reviewed_by_name' => $survey->reviewer?->name,
230:             'reviewed_at' => $survey->reviewed_at?->toISOString(),
231:             'created_at' => $survey->created_at->toISOString(),
232:             'proof_preview_path' => route('admin.data-requests.surveys.preview', [$dataRequest, $survey]),
233:             'proof_download_path' => route('admin.data-requests.surveys.download', [$dataRequest, $survey]),
234:         ]);
235: 
236:         // Format product uploads
237:         $productUploads = $dataRequest->productUploads()->get()->map(fn($upload) => [
238:             'id' => $upload->id,
239:             'original_name' => $upload->original_name,
240:             'file_size' => $upload->file_size,
241:             'preview_path' => route('admin.data-requests.product-uploads.preview', [$dataRequest, $upload]),
242:             'download_path' => route('admin.data-requests.product-uploads.download', [$dataRequest, $upload]),
243:             'created_at' => $upload->created_at->toISOString(),
244:         ]);
245: 
246:         $availableSurveys = $surveySettings->optionsForFrontend(false);
247: 
248:         return Inertia::render('Admin/DataRequests/Show', [
249:             'dataRequest' => $dataRequest,
250:             'surveys' => $surveys,
251:             'rejectionTemplates' => RejectionTemplate::active()
252:                 ->select('id', 'title', 'body')
253:                 ->get(),
254:             'ocrReviewInvoiceId' => session('ocr_review_invoice_id'),
255:             'availableSurveys' => $availableSurveys,
256:             'productUploads' => $productUploads,
257:         ]);
258:     }
259: 
260:     /**
261:      * Approve or reject a data request.
262:      */
263:     public function verify(ReviewDataRequestRequest $request, DataRequest $dataRequest): RedirectResponse
264:     {
265:         $this->authorize('verify', $dataRequest);
266: 
267:         $action = app(VerifyDataRequest::class);
268:         $action->handle(
269:             $dataRequest,
270:             $request->user(),
271:             $request->validated('action'),
272:             $request->validated('rejection_reason')
273:         );
274: 
275:         $createdInvoice = null;
276:         if ($request->validated('action') === 'approve' && $request->hasFile('invoice_file')) {
277:             $createdInvoice = app(\App\Actions\UploadPaymentInvoice::class)->handle(
278:                 $dataRequest,
279:                 $request->file('invoice_file'),
280:                 null,
281:                 $request->input('billing_code')
282:             );
283:         }
284: 
285:         $message = $request->validated('action') === 'approve'
286:             ? 'Permohonan data berhasil disetujui.'
287:             : 'Permohonan data telah ditolak.';
288: 
289:         $redirect = redirect()
290:             ->route('admin.data-requests.show', $dataRequest);
291: 
292:         if ($createdInvoice && $createdInvoice->ocr_status === InvoiceOcrStatus::Pending) {
293:             $redirect->with('ocr_review_invoice_id', $createdInvoice->id);
294:         }
295: 
296:         if ($createdInvoice) {
297:             activity('payment')
298:                 ->performedOn($createdInvoice)
299:                 ->causedBy($request->user())
300:                 ->event('invoice_uploaded')
301:                 ->withProperties([
302:                     'invoice_id' => $createdInvoice->id,
303:                     'data_request_id' => $dataRequest->id,
304:                 ])
305:                 ->log('Admin mengunggah invoice pembayaran.');
306:         }
307: 
308:         return $redirect->with('success', $message);
309:     }
310: 
311:     public function invoiceOcrStatus(DataRequest $dataRequest, Invoice $invoice)
312:     {
313:         $this->authorize('view', $dataRequest);
314:         abort_unless($invoice->data_request_id === $dataRequest->id, 404);
315: 
316:         // NOTE: Intentional JSON endpoint for frontend polling of OCR status.
317:         return response()->json([
318:             'invoice' => [
319:                 'id' => $invoice->id,
320:                 'ocr_status' => $invoice->ocr_status?->value,
321:                 'ocr_error' => $invoice->ocr_error,
322:                 'ocr_extracted_at' => $invoice->ocr_extracted_at?->toISOString(),
323:                 'amount' => $invoice->amount,
324:                 'billing_code' => $invoice->billing_code,
325:                 'expires_at' => $invoice->expires_at?->toISOString(),
326:             ],
327:         ]);
328:     }
329: 
330:     public function updateInvoicePaymentDetails(UpdateInvoicePaymentDetailsRequest $request, DataRequest $dataRequest, Invoice $invoice): RedirectResponse
331:     {
332:         $this->authorize('updateInvoicePaymentDetails', $dataRequest);
333:         abort_unless($invoice->data_request_id === $dataRequest->id, 404);
334: 
335:         $newExpiresAt = $request->validated('expires_at');
336:         $wasExpired = $invoice->status === InvoiceStatus::Expired;
337: 
338:         \Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB::transaction(function () use ($invoice, $dataRequest, $request, $newExpiresAt, $wasExpired) {
339:             $invoice->update([
340:                 'amount' => $request->validated('amount'),
341:                 'billing_code' => $request->validated('billing_code'),
342:                 'expires_at' => $newExpiresAt,
343:                 'ocr_status' => $invoice->ocr_status === InvoiceOcrStatus::Pending
344:                     ? InvoiceOcrStatus::Completed
345:                     : $invoice->ocr_status,
346:                 'ocr_error' => null,
347:             ]);
348: 
349:             // If the invoice was expired and admin extended the date to the future,
350:             // revert both statuses so the user can pay again.
351:             $isFutureDate = $newExpiresAt && \Carbon\Carbon::parse($newExpiresAt)->isFuture();
352:             if ($wasExpired && $isFutureDate) {
353:                 $invoice->update(['status' => InvoiceStatus::Issued]);
354:                 if ($dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::Expired) {
355:                     $dataRequest->update(['status' => RequestStatus::PaymentRequired]);
356:                 }
357:             }
358:         });
359: 
360:         activity('payment')
361:             ->performedOn($invoice)
362:             ->causedBy($request->user())
363:             ->withProperties([
364:                 'data_request_id' => $dataRequest->id,
365:                 'invoice_id' => $invoice->id,
366:             ])
367:             ->event('invoice_payment_details_updated')
368:             ->log('Admin memperbarui detail pembayaran invoice.');
369: 
370:         return redirect()
371:             ->route('admin.data-requests.show', $dataRequest)
372:             ->with('success', 'Detail pembayaran berhasil diperbarui.');
373:     }
374: 
375:     /**
376:      * Download an uploaded document.
377:      */
378:     public function downloadDocument(DataRequest $dataRequest, RequestDocument $document): StreamedResponse
379:     {
380:         $this->authorize('downloadDocument', $dataRequest);
381:         $this->resolveDocument($dataRequest, $document);
382: 
383:         return Storage::download(
384:             $document->file_path,
385:             $document->original_name
386:         );
387:     }
388: 
389:     /**
390:      * Preview (inline) an uploaded document in the browser.
391:      */
392:     public function previewDocument(DataRequest $dataRequest, RequestDocument $document): \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\BinaryFileResponse
393:     {
394:         $this->authorize('downloadDocument', $dataRequest);
395:         $this->resolveDocument($dataRequest, $document);
396: 
397:         $fullPath = Storage::disk('local')->path($document->file_path);
398: 
399:         abort_unless(file_exists($fullPath), 404, 'File not found.');
400: 
401:         return response()->file($fullPath, [
402:             'Content-Type' => 'application/pdf',
403:             'Content-Disposition' => 'inline; filename="' . $document->original_name . '"',
404:         ]);
405:     }
406: 
407:     /**
408:      * Store the uploaded invoice.
409:      */
410:     public function storeInvoice(StoreInvoiceRequest $request, DataRequest $dataRequest, UploadPaymentInvoice $action): RedirectResponse
411:     {
412:         $this->authorize('uploadInvoice', $dataRequest);
413: 
414:         $createdInvoice = $action->handle(
415:             $dataRequest,
416:             $request->file('file'),
417:             $request->input('amount'),
418:             $request->input('billing_code')
419:         );
420: 
421:         $redirect = redirect()
422:             ->route('admin.data-requests.show', $dataRequest)
423:             ->with('success', 'Tagihan berhasil diunggah.');
424: 
425:         if ($createdInvoice->ocr_status === InvoiceOcrStatus::Pending) {
426:             $redirect->with('ocr_review_invoice_id', $createdInvoice->id);
427:         }
428: 
429:         activity('payment')
430:             ->performedOn($createdInvoice)
431:             ->causedBy($request->user())
432:             ->event('invoice_uploaded')
433:             ->withProperties([
434:                 'invoice_id' => $createdInvoice->id,
435:                 'data_request_id' => $dataRequest->id,
436:             ])
437:             ->log('Admin mengunggah invoice pembayaran.');
438: 
439:         return $redirect;
440:     }
441: 
442:     /**
443:      * Verify the uploaded payment proof.
444:      */
445:     public function verifyPayment(VerifyPaymentRequest $request, DataRequest $dataRequest, VerifyPaymentProof $action): RedirectResponse
446:     {
447:         $this->authorize('verifyPayment', $dataRequest);
448: 
449:         $action->handle(
450:             $dataRequest,
451:             $request->user(),
452:             $request->validated('action'),
453:             $request->validated('rejection_reason')
454:         );
455: 
456:         $message = $request->validated('action') === 'accept'
457:             ? 'Bukti pembayaran berhasil diverifikasi dan permohonan langsung masuk pemrosesan.'
458:             : 'Bukti pembayaran ditolak.';
459: 
460:         return back()->with('success', $message);
461:     }
462: 
463:     /**
464:      * Start processing the data request after payment is verified.
465:      */
466:     public function process(DataRequest $dataRequest, Request $request, StartProcessingRequest $action): RedirectResponse
467:     {
468:         $this->authorize('process', $dataRequest);
469: 
470:         $wasProcessing = $dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::Processing;
471:         $action->handle($dataRequest);
472:         $dataRequest->refresh();
473: 
474:         if (!$wasProcessing && $dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::Processing) {
475:             activity()
476:                 ->performedOn($dataRequest)
477:                 ->causedBy($request->user())
478:                 ->event('processing_started')
479:                 ->log('Admin memulai pemrosesan data.');
480:         }
481: 
482:         return back()->with('success', 'Status permohonan diubah menjadi sedang diproses.');
483:     }
484: 
485:     /**
486:      * Store processed result document from admin (allows multiple files).
487:      */
488:     public function storeProcessedDocument(
489:         \App\Http\Requests\Admin\StoreProcessedDocumentRequest $request, 
490:         DataRequest $dataRequest, 
491:         \App\Actions\Admin\StoreProcessedDocument $action
492:     ): RedirectResponse {
493:         $action->handle(
494:             $dataRequest,
495:             $request->file('files'),
496:             $request->user(),
497:             $request->has('required_surveys') ? $request->input('required_surveys') : null
498:         );
499: 
500:         return back()->with('success', 'Dokumen hasil berhasil diunggah.');
501:     }
502: 
503:     /**
504:      * Mark complaint as resolved (data already correct) and notify user with hardcoded message.
505:      */
506:     public function markComplaintResolved(DataRequest $dataRequest, Request $request): RedirectResponse
507:     {
508:         $this->authorize('resolveComplaint', $dataRequest);
509: 
510:         \Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB::transaction(function () use ($dataRequest, $request) {
511:             if ($dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::Processing) {
512:                 $dataRequest->update(['status' => RequestStatus::Completed]);
513:             }
514: 
515:             activity()
516:                 ->performedOn($dataRequest)
517:                 ->causedBy($request->user())
518:                 ->event('complaint_marked_resolved')
519:                 ->log('Admin menandai data sudah sesuai setelah feedback pengaju.');
520:         });
521: 
522:         $dataRequest->user?->notify(new \App\Notifications\ComplaintMarkedAsResolvedNotification($dataRequest));
523: 
524:         return back()->with('success', 'Status keluhan ditandai selesai. Notifikasi telah dikirim ke pengaju.');
525:     }
526: 
527:     /**
528:      * Replace an existing processed result document.
529:      */
530:     public function replaceProcessedDocument(\App\Http\Requests\Admin\ReplaceProcessedDocumentRequest $request, DataRequest $dataRequest, RequestDocument $document, \App\Actions\Admin\ReplaceProcessedDocument $action): RedirectResponse
531:     {
532:         $this->authorize('uploadProcessedData', $dataRequest);
533:         $document = $this->resolveProcessedDocument($dataRequest, $document);
534:         $action->handle($document, $request->file('file'));
535: 
536:         activity()
537:             ->performedOn($dataRequest)
538:             ->causedBy($request->user())
539:             ->withProperties([
540:                 'document_id' => $document->id,
541:                 'new_name' => $request->file('file')->getClientOriginalName(),
542:             ])
543:             ->event('processed_document_replaced')
544:             ->log('Admin mengganti dokumen hasil.');
545: 
546:         return back()->with('success', 'Dokumen hasil berhasil diganti.');
547:     }
548: 
549:     /**
550:      * Delete a processed result document.
551:      */
552:     public function destroyProcessedDocument(DataRequest $dataRequest, RequestDocument $document): RedirectResponse
553:     {
554:         $this->authorize('uploadProcessedData', $dataRequest);
555:         $document = $this->resolveProcessedDocument($dataRequest, $document);
556: 
557:         if ($document->file_path) {
558:             Storage::delete($document->file_path);
559:         }
560:         $document->delete();
561: 
562:         activity()
563:             ->performedOn($dataRequest)
564:             ->causedBy(auth()->user())
565:             ->withProperties([
566:                 'document_name' => $document->original_name,
567:             ])
568:             ->event('processed_document_deleted')
569:             ->log('Admin menghapus dokumen hasil.');
570: 
571:         $remainingCount = RequestDocument::query()
572:             ->where('data_request_id', $dataRequest->id)
573:             ->where('document_type', 'processed_data_result')
574:             ->count();
575: 
576:         if ($remainingCount === 0 && $dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::Completed) {
577:             $dataRequest->update(['status' => RequestStatus::Processing]);
578:         }
579: 
580:         return back()->with('success', 'Dokumen hasil berhasil dihapus.');
581:     }
582: 
583:     /**
584:      * Delete multiple processed result documents at once.
585:      */
586:     public function destroyProcessedDocumentsBulk(\App\Http\Requests\Admin\BulkDestroyProcessedDocumentRequest $request, DataRequest $dataRequest, \App\Actions\Admin\BulkDestroyProcessedDocuments $action): RedirectResponse
587:     {
588:         $count = $action->handle($dataRequest, $request->validated('document_ids'));
589: 
590:         return back()->with('success', $count . ' dokumen hasil berhasil dihapus.');
591:     }
592: 
593:     private function resolveProcessedDocument(DataRequest $dataRequest, RequestDocument $document): RequestDocument
594:     {
595:         abort_unless(
596:             $document->data_request_id === $dataRequest->id && $document->document_type === 'processed_data_result',
597:             404,
598:             'Dokumen hasil tidak ditemukan.'
599:         );
600: 
601:         return $document;
602:     }
603: 
604:     /**
605:      * Preview the invoice.
606:      */
607:     public function previewInvoice(DataRequest $dataRequest): \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\BinaryFileResponse
608:     {
609:         $this->authorize('view', $dataRequest);
610:         $invoice = $dataRequest->activeInvoice;
611:         abort_unless($invoice && $invoice->invoice_path, 404, 'Invoice belum diunggah atau tidak aktif.');
612: 
613:         $fullPath = Storage::disk('local')->path($invoice->invoice_path);
614:         abort_unless(file_exists($fullPath), 404, 'File not found.');
615: 
616:         $mime = mime_content_type($fullPath);
617:         return response()->file($fullPath, [
618:             'Content-Type' => $mime,
619:             'Content-Disposition' => 'inline; filename="invoice-' . $dataRequest->request_code . '.' . pathinfo($invoice->invoice_path, PATHINFO_EXTENSION) . '"',
620:         ]);
621:     }
622: 
623:     /**
624:      * Preview the payment proof.
625:      */
626:     public function previewProof(DataRequest $dataRequest): \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\BinaryFileResponse
627:     {
628:         $this->authorize('view', $dataRequest);
629:         
630:         $invoice = $dataRequest->invoices()->whereNotNull('proof_path')->latest()->first();
631:         abort_unless($invoice && $invoice->proof_path, 404, 'Bukti bayar tidak ditemukan.');
632: 
633:         $fullPath = Storage::disk('local')->path($invoice->proof_path);
634:         abort_unless(file_exists($fullPath), 404, 'File not found.');
635: 
636:         $mime = mime_content_type($fullPath);
637:         return response()->file($fullPath, [
638:             'Content-Type' => $mime,
639:             'Content-Disposition' => 'inline; filename="bukti-bayar-' . $dataRequest->request_code . '.' . pathinfo($invoice->proof_path, PATHINFO_EXTENSION) . '"',
640:         ]);
641:     }
642:

653:     }

666:
