712:     /**
713:      * Admin approve or reject a survey proof.
714:      */
715:     public function verifySurvey(\App\Http\Requests\Admin\VerifySurveyRequest $request, DataRequest $dataRequest, \App\Models\Survey $survey, \App\Actions\VerifySurveyProof $action): RedirectResponse
716:     {
717:         $this->authorize('verifySurvey', $dataRequest);
718:         abort_unless($survey->data_request_id === $dataRequest->id, 404);
719: 
720:         $action->handle(
721:             $survey,
722:             $request->user(),
723:             $request->validated('action'),
724:             $request->validated('rejection_reason')
725:         );
726: 
727:         $message = $request->validated('action') === 'approve'
728:             ? 'Bukti survei berhasil disetujui.'
729:             : 'Bukti survei ditolak.';
730: 
731:         return back()->with('success', $message);
732:     }

734:     /**

738:     {
739:         $this->authorize('viewSurveyProof', $dataRequest);

745: 
746:         return response()->file($fullPath, [

748:             'Content-Disposition' => 'inline; filename="bukti-survei-' . $survey->survey_type->value . '-' . $dataRequest->request_code . '.' . pathinfo($survey->proof_path, PATHINFO_EXTENSION) . '"',
749:         ]);
750:     }

767:     /**
768:      * Update required surveys after completion so admin doesn't need to reupload to change it.
769:      */
770:     public function updateRequiredSurveys(\App\Http\Requests\Admin\UpdateRequiredSurveysRequest $request, DataRequest $dataRequest): RedirectResponse
771:     {
772:         $dataRequest->update([
773:             'required_surveys' => $request->validated('required_surveys') ?? []
774:         ]);
775: 
776:         activity()
777:             ->performedOn($dataRequest)
778:             ->causedBy($request->user())
779:             ->withProperties([
780:                 'required_surveys' => $request->validated('required_surveys') ?? [],
781:             ])
782:             ->event('required_surveys_updated')
783:             ->log('Admin memperbarui persyaratan survei.');
784: 
785:         return back()->with('success', 'Persyaratan survei berhasil diperbarui.');
786:     }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/DataRequestReportController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Enums\PurposeType;
  6: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
  7: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
  8: use App\Models\DataRequest;
  9: use App\Models\Invoice;
 10: use App\Models\User;
 11: use App\Enums\UserRole;
 12: use Illuminate\Support\Collection;
 13: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 14: use Inertia\Inertia;
 15: use Inertia\Response;
 16: 
 17: class DataRequestReportController extends Controller
 18: {
 19:     private const HEADINGS = [
 20:         'Nomor Pendaftaran',
 21:         'Tanggal Diterima',
 22:         'Nama Pemohon',
 23:         'Instansi Pemohon',
 24:         'Jenis Layanan',
 25:         'Status Permohonan',
 26:         'Status Tagihan',
 27:         'Nominal (Rp.)',
 28:         'Kode Billing',
 29:         'Tanggal Selesai',
 30:         'Durasi Pelayanan (Hari)',
 31:     ];
 32: 
 33:     public function index(Request $request): Response
 34:     {
 35:         $this->authorize('export', DataRequest::class);
 36: 
 37:         $filters = array_merge(
 38:             ['start_date' => null, 'end_date' => null, 'status' => null, 'report' => 'requests'],
 39:             $request->only(['start_date', 'end_date', 'status', 'report'])
 40:         );
 41:         $isPreviewRequested = $request->boolean('preview');
 42:         $previewLimit = 25;
 43:         $totalRows = 0;
 44:         $previewRows = [];
 45:         $headings = self::HEADINGS;
 46: 
 47:         if ($isPreviewRequested) {
 48:             if (($filters['report'] ?? 'requests') === 'users') {
 49:                 $baseQuery = User::query()
 50:                     ->where('role', UserRole::User)
 51:                     ->withCount(['dataRequests' => function ($q) {
 52:                         $q->whereNotNull('user_id');
 53:                     }])
 54:                     ->when($filters['start_date'], fn ($q, $d) => $q->whereDate('created_at', '>=', $d))
 55:                     ->when($filters['end_date'], fn ($q, $d) => $q->whereDate('created_at', '<=', $d))
 56:                     ->latest('created_at');
 57: 
 58:                 $headings = [
 59:                     'Nama Lengkap',
 60:                     'Email',
 61:                     'No Telepon',
 62:                     'Instansi',
 63:                     'Tanggal Mendaftar',
 64:                     'Jumlah Pengajuan',
 65:                 ];
 66: 
 67:                 $totalRows = (clone $baseQuery)->count();
 68:                 $previewRows = (clone $baseQuery)
 69:                     ->limit($previewLimit)
 70:                     ->get()
 71:                     ->map(fn (User $user) => [
 72:                         $user->name ?? '-',
 73:                         $user->email ?? '-',
 74:                         $user->phone ?? '-',
 75:                         $user->company_name ?? '-',
 76:                         $user->created_at?->format('Y-m-d') ?? '-',
 77:                         $user->data_requests_count ?? 0,
 78:                     ])
 79:                     ->values()
 80:                     ->all();
 81:             } else {
 82:                 $baseQuery = DataRequest::query()
 83:                     ->with(['user', 'activeInvoice', 'surveys'])
 84:                     ->filter($filters)
 85:                     ->latest('created_at');
 86: 
 87:                 $totalRows = (clone $baseQuery)->count();
 88:                 $previewRows = (clone $baseQuery)
 89:                     ->limit($previewLimit)
 90:                     ->get()
 91:                     ->map(fn (DataRequest $dataRequest) => $this->mapPreviewRow($dataRequest))
 92:                     ->values()
 93:                     ->all();
 94:             }
 95:         }
 96: 
 97:         return Inertia::render('Admin/Reports/DataRequestExport', [
 98:             'filters' => $filters,
 99:             'statusOptions' => $this->statusOptions()->all(),
100:             'headings' => $headings,
101:             'previewRows' => $previewRows,
102:             'previewMeta' => [
103:                 'limit' => $previewLimit,
104:                 'total' => $totalRows,
105:                 'is_requested' => $isPreviewRequested,
106:             ],
107:         ]);
108:     }
109: 
110:     private function mapPreviewRow(DataRequest $request): array
111:     {
112:         /** @var Invoice|null $activeInvoice */
113:         $activeInvoice = $request->activeInvoice;
114:         $completedAt = $request->status === RequestStatus::Completed ? $request->updated_at?->copy() : null;
115: 
116:         $durationDays = '-';
117:         if ($completedAt) {
118:             $durationDays = max(1, $request->created_at->startOfDay()->diffInDays($completedAt->startOfDay()) + 1);
119:         }
120: 
121:         $billingStatus = '-';
122:         $amount = 0;
123:         $billingCode = '-';
124: 
125:         if ($activeInvoice) {
126:             $billingStatus = $activeInvoice->status->label();
127:             $amount = $activeInvoice->amount;
128:             $billingCode = $activeInvoice->payment_code ?? '-';
129:         } elseif (in_array($request->purpose_type, [PurposeType::NonCommercialIndividu, PurposeType::NonCommercialInstansi], true)) {
130:             $billingStatus = 'Gratis';
131:         }
132: 
133:         return [
134:             $request->request_code,
135:             $request->created_at->format('Y-m-d'),
136:             $request->user?->name ?? '-',
137:             $request->user?->company_name ?? '-',
138:             $request->purpose_type->label(),
139:             $request->status->label(),
140:             $billingStatus,
141:             $amount,
142:             $billingCode,
143:             $completedAt ? $completedAt->format('Y-m-d') : '-',
144:             $durationDays,
145:         ];
146:     }
147: 
148:     private function statusOptions(): Collection
149:     {
150:         return collect([
151:             ['value' => RequestStatus::Pending->value, 'label' => RequestStatus::Pending->label()],
152:             ['value' => 'invoice_reissue_requested', 'label' => 'Minta Invoice Baru'],
153:             ['value' => RequestStatus::PaymentRequired->value, 'label' => RequestStatus::PaymentRequired->label()],
154:             ['value' => RequestStatus::PaymentVerifying->value, 'label' => RequestStatus::PaymentVerifying->label()],
155:             ['value' => RequestStatus::PaymentInvalid->value, 'label' => RequestStatus::PaymentInvalid->label()],
156:             ['value' => RequestStatus::Expired->value, 'label' => RequestStatus::Expired->label()],
157:             ['value' => 'data_processing', 'label' => 'Pemrosesan Data'],
158:             ['value' => RequestStatus::Processing->value, 'label' => RequestStatus::Processing->label()],
159:             ['value' => 'complaint', 'label' => 'Keluhan'],
160:             ['value' => 'survey_waiting_input', 'label' => 'Menunggu Isi Survey'],
161:             ['value' => 'survey_verification', 'label' => 'Verifikasi Survey'],
162:             ['value' => 'survey_rejected', 'label' => 'Bukti Survey Ditolak'],
163:             ['value' => RequestStatus::Rejected->value, 'label' => RequestStatus::Rejected->label()],
164:             ['value' => RequestStatus::Completed->value, 'label' => RequestStatus::Completed->label()],
165:         ]);
166:     }
167: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/FaqController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
  6: use App\Http\Requests\Admin\StoreFaqRequest;
  7: use App\Http\Requests\Admin\UpdateFaqRequest;
  8: use App\Models\Faq;
  9: use App\Services\FaqService;
 10: use Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse;
 11: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 12: use Inertia\Inertia;
 13: use Inertia\Response;
 14: 
 15: class FaqController extends Controller
 16: {
 17:     public function __construct(
 18:         private FaqService $service
 19:     ) {}
 20: 
 21:     /**
 22:      * Display a listing of the FAQs.
 23:      */
 24:     public function index(): Response
 25:     {
 26:         $this->authorize('viewAny', Faq::class);
 27: 
 28:         $faqs = Faq::orderBy('order')->get();
 29: 
 30:         return Inertia::render('Admin/Faqs/Index', [
 31:             'faqs' => $faqs
 32:         ]);
 33:     }
 34: 
 35:     /**
 36:      * Show the form for creating a new FAQ.
 37:      */
 38:     public function create(): Response
 39:     {
 40:         $this->authorize('create', Faq::class);
 41: 
 42:         return Inertia::render('Admin/Faqs/Create');
 43:     }
 44: 
 45:     /**
 46:      * Store a newly created FAQ in storage.
 47:      */
 48:     public function store(StoreFaqRequest $request): RedirectResponse
 49:     {
 50:         $this->service->createFaq($request->validated());
 51: 
 52:         return redirect()->route('admin.faqs.index')
 53:             ->with('success', 'FAQ berhasil ditambahkan.');
 54:     }
 55: 
 56:     /**
 57:      * Show the form for editing the specified FAQ.
 58:      */
 59:     public function edit(Faq $faq): Response
 60:     {
 61:         $this->authorize('update', $faq);
 62: 
 63:         return Inertia::render('Admin/Faqs/Edit', [
 64:             'faq' => $faq
 65:         ]);
 66:     }
 67: 
 68:     /**
 69:      * Update the specified FAQ in storage.
 70:      */
 71:     public function update(UpdateFaqRequest $request, Faq $faq): RedirectResponse
 72:     {
 73:         $this->service->updateFaq($faq, $request->validated());
 74: 
 75:         return redirect()->route('admin.faqs.index')
 76:             ->with('success', 'FAQ berhasil diperbarui.');
 77:     }
 78: 
 79:     /**
 80:      * Remove the specified FAQ from storage.
 81:      */
 82:     public function destroy(Faq $faq): RedirectResponse
 83:     {
 84:         $this->authorize('delete', $faq);
 85: 
 86:         $this->service->deleteFaq($faq);
 87: 
 88:         return redirect()->route('admin.faqs.index')
 89:             ->with('success', 'FAQ berhasil dihapus.');
 90:     }
 91: 
 92:     /**
 93:      * Reorder FAQs.
 94:      */
 95:     public function reorder(Request $request): RedirectResponse
 96:     {
 97:         $this->authorize('viewAny', Faq::class);
 98: 
 99:         $request->validate([
100:             'orders' => 'required|array',
101:             'orders.*' => 'required|integer|min:1',
102:         ]);
103: 
104:         // Validate that all keys in the order array are actual valid faq IDs
105:         $faqIds = array_keys($request->input('orders'));
106:         if (Faq::whereIn('id', $faqIds)->count() !== count($faqIds)) {
107:             return redirect()->back()->withErrors(['orders' => 'Invalid FAQ IDs provided for reordering.']);
108:         }
109: 
110:         $this->service->reorderFaqs($request->input('orders'));
111: 
112:         return redirect()->route('admin.faqs.index')
113:             ->with('success', 'Urutan FAQ berhasil diperbarui.');
114:     }
115: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/Auth/AuthenticatedSessionController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth;
 4: 
 5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 6: use App\Http\Requests\Auth\LoginRequest;
 7: use Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse;
 8: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 9: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
10: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;
11: use Inertia\Inertia;
12: use Inertia\Response;
13: 
14: class AuthenticatedSessionController extends Controller
15: {
16:     /**
17:      * Display the login view.
18:      */
19:     public function create(): Response
20:     {
21:         return Inertia::render('Auth/Login', [
22:             'canResetPassword' => Route::has('password.request'),
23:             'status' => session('status'),
24:         ]);
25:     }
26: 
27:     /**
28:      * Handle an incoming authentication request.
29:      */
30:     public function store(LoginRequest $request): RedirectResponse
31:     {
32:         $request->authenticate();
33: 
34:         $request->session()->regenerate();
35: 
36:         $defaultRoute = $request->user()->isAdmin()
37:             ? route('dashboard', absolute: false)
38:             : route('data-requests.index', absolute: false);
39: 
40:         return redirect()->intended($defaultRoute);
41:     }
42: 
43:     /**
44:      * Destroy an authenticated session.
45:      */
46:     public function destroy(Request $request): RedirectResponse
47:     {
48:         Auth::guard('web')->logout();
49: 
50:         $request->session()->invalidate();
51: 
52:         $request->session()->regenerateToken();
53: 
54:         return redirect('/');
55:     }
56: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/Auth/CompleteProfileController.php

 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth;

 5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 6: use App\Http\Requests\CompleteProfileRequest;

21:             'user' => [
22:                 'name' => $request->user()->name,
23:                 // Do not pass the dummy phone number to the frontend, let it be empty so the user fills it out
24:                 'phone' => '',
25:                 'phone_country' => 'ID',
26:                 'company_name' => $request->user()->company_name,
27:             ]
28:         ]);

32:      * Update the user's profile with real information.
33:      */

37: 
38:         $user->update([
39:             'name' => $request->name,
40:             'phone' => PhoneNumberNormalizer::toE164($request->phone, $request->phone_country),
41:             'company_name' => $request->company_name,
42:         ]);
43: 
44:         // Redirect back to intended destination (usually dashboard)
45:         return redirect()->intended(route('dashboard', absolute: false));
46:     }
47: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/Auth/ConfirmablePasswordController.php

 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth;
 4: 
 5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 6: use Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse;
 7: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
 9: use Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException;
10: use Inertia\Inertia;
11: use Inertia\Response;
12: 
13: class ConfirmablePasswordController extends Controller
14: {
15:     /**
16:      * Show the confirm password view.
17:      */
18:     public function show(): Response
19:     {
20:         return Inertia::render('Auth/ConfirmPassword');
21:     }
22: 
23:     /**
24:      * Confirm the user's password.
25:      */
26:     public function store(Request $request): RedirectResponse
27:     {
28:         if (! Auth::guard('web')->validate([
29:             'email' => $request->user()->email,
30:             'password' => $request->password,
31:         ])) {
32:             throw ValidationException::withMessages([
33:                 'password' => __('auth.password'),
34:             ]);
35:         }
36: 
37:         $request->session()->put('auth.password_confirmed_at', time());
38: 
39:         return redirect()->intended(route('dashboard', absolute: false));
40:     }
41: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/Auth/GoogleController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth;
 4: 
 5: use App\Actions\Auth\HandleSocialLogin;
 6: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 7: use Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse;
 8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
 9: use Laravel\Socialite\Facades\Socialite;
10: use Throwable;
11: 
12: class GoogleController extends Controller
13: {
14:     /**
15:      * Redirect the user to the Google authentication page.
16:      */
17:     public function redirect(): RedirectResponse
18:     {
19:         return Socialite::driver('google')->redirect();
20:     }
21: 
22:     /**
23:      * Obtain the user information from Google.
24:      */
25:     public function callback(HandleSocialLogin $handleSocialLogin): RedirectResponse
26:     {
27:         try {
28:             $googleUser = Socialite::driver('google')->user();
29: 
30:             $user = $handleSocialLogin->handle('google', $googleUser);
31: 
32:             auth()->login($user);
33: 
34:             return redirect()->intended(route('dashboard'));
35:         } catch (Throwable $e) {
36:             Log::error('Google OAuth callback failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
37: 
38:             return redirect()->route('login')->withErrors([
39:                 'email' => 'Unable to authenticate with Google. Please try again or use another method.',
40:             ]);
41:         }
42:     }
43: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Auth/NewPasswordController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth;
 4: 
 5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 6: use Illuminate\Auth\Events\PasswordReset;
 7: use Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse;
 8: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 9: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
10: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Password;
11: use Illuminate\Support\Str;
12: use Illuminate\Validation\Rules;
13: use Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException;
14: use Inertia\Inertia;
15: use Inertia\Response;
16: 
17: class NewPasswordController extends Controller
18: {
19:     /**
20:      * Display the password reset view.
21:      */
22:     public function create(Request $request): Response
23:     {
24:         return Inertia::render('Auth/ResetPassword', [
25:             'email' => $request->email,
26:             'token' => $request->route('token'),
27:         ]);
28:     }
29: 
30:     /**
31:      * Handle an incoming new password request.
32:      *
33:      * @throws \Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException
34:      */
35:     public function store(Request $request): RedirectResponse
36:     {
37:         $request->validate([
38:             'token' => 'required',
39:             'email' => 'required|email',
40:             'password' => ['required', 'confirmed', Rules\Password::defaults()],
41:         ]);
42: 
43:         // Here we will attempt to reset the user's password. If it is successful we
44:         // will update the password on an actual user model and persist it to the
45:         // database. Otherwise we will parse the error and return the response.
46:         $status = Password::reset(
47:             $request->only('email', 'password', 'password_confirmation', 'token'),
48:             function ($user) use ($request) {
49:                 $user->forceFill([
50:                     'password' => Hash::make($request->password),
51:                     'remember_token' => Str::random(60),
52:                 ])->save();
53: 
54:                 event(new PasswordReset($user));
55:             }
56:         );
57: 
58:         // If the password was successfully reset, we will redirect the user back to
59:         // the application's home authenticated view. If there is an error we can
60:         // redirect them back to where they came from with their error message.
61:         if ($status == Password::PASSWORD_RESET) {
62:             return redirect()->route('login')->with('status', __($status));
63:         }
64: 
65:         throw ValidationException::withMessages([
66:             'email' => [trans($status)],
67:         ]);
68:     }
69: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Auth/PasswordController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth;
 4: 
 5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 6: use Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse;
 7: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
 9: use Illuminate\Validation\Rules\Password;
10: 
11: class PasswordController extends Controller
12: {
13:     /**
14:      * Update the user's password.
15:      */
16:     public function update(Request $request): RedirectResponse
17:     {
18:         $validated = $request->validate([
19:             'current_password' => ['required', 'current_password'],
20:             'password' => ['required', Password::defaults(), 'confirmed'],
21:         ]);
22: 
23:         $request->user()->update([
24:             'password' => Hash::make($validated['password']),
25:         ]);
26: 
27:         return back();
28:     }
29: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/Auth/PasswordResetLinkController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth;
 4: 
 5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 6: use App\Models\User;
 7: use Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse;
 8: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 9: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Password;
10: use Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException;
11: use Inertia\Inertia;
12: use Inertia\Response;
13: 
14: class PasswordResetLinkController extends Controller
15: {
16:     /**
17:      * Display the password reset link request view.
18:      */
19:     public function create(): Response
20:     {
21:         return Inertia::render('Auth/ForgotPassword', [
22:             'status' => session('status'),
23:         ]);
24:     }
25: 
26:     /**
27:      * Handle an incoming password reset link request.
28:      *
29:      * @throws \Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException
30:      */
31:     public function store(\App\Http\Requests\Auth\SendPasswordResetLinkRequest $request): RedirectResponse
32:     {
33: 
34:         // We will send the password reset link to this user. Once we have attempted
35:         // to send the link, we will examine the response then see the message we
36:         // need to show to the user. Finally, we'll send out a proper response.
37:         $status = Password::sendResetLink(
38:             $request->only('email')
39:         );
40: 
41:         if ($status == Password::RESET_LINK_SENT) {
42:             return back()->with('status', __($status));
43:         }
44: 
45:         throw ValidationException::withMessages([
46:             'email' => [trans($status)],
47:         ]);
48:     }
49: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Auth/RegisteredUserController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\UserRole;
 6: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 7: use App\Models\User;
 8: use App\Support\PhoneNumberNormalizer;
 9: use Illuminate\Auth\Events\Registered;
10: use Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse;
11: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
12: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
13: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
14: use Illuminate\Validation\Rules;
15: use Inertia\Inertia;
16: use Inertia\Response;
17: 
18: class RegisteredUserController extends Controller
19: {
20:     /**
21:      * Display the registration view.
22:      */
23:     public function create(): Response
24:     {
25:         return Inertia::render('Auth/Register');
26:     }
27: 
28:     /**
29:      * Handle an incoming registration request.
30:      *
31:      * @throws \Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException
32:      */
33:     public function store(\App\Http\Requests\Auth\RegisterUserRequest $request): RedirectResponse
34:     {
35: 
36:         $user = User::create([
37:             'name' => $request->name,
38:             'email' => $request->email,
39:             'phone' => PhoneNumberNormalizer::toE164($request->phone, $request->phone_country),
40:             'company_name' => $request->company_name,
41:             'role' => UserRole::User,
42:             'password' => Hash::make($request->password),
43:         ]);
44: 
45:         event(new Registered($user));
46: 
47:         Auth::login($user);
48: 
49:         return redirect(route('dashboard', absolute: false));
50:     }
51: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/Auth/VerifyEmailController.php

 1: <?php

 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth;

 9:

13:      * Mark the authenticated user's email address as verified.

18:             return redirect()->intended(route('dashboard', absolute: false) . '?verified=1');

22:             event(new Verified($request->user()));

26:     }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/ChatbotController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: declare(strict_types=1);
  4: 
  5: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
  6: 
  7: use App\Services\Chatbot\ChatbotService;
  8: use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
  9: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 10: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
 11: use Illuminate\Support\Str;
 12: use Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException;
 13: use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
 14: 
 15: class ChatbotController extends Controller
 16: {
 17:     public function __construct(private readonly ChatbotService $chatbotService) {}
 18: 
 19:     /**
 20:      * Send a message to the chatbot.
 21:      *
 22:      * @param Request $request
 23:      * @return JsonResponse
 24:      */
 25:     public function sendMessage(Request $request): JsonResponse
 26:     {
 27:         $traceId = (string) Str::ulid();
 28: 
 29:         if (!config('chatbot.enabled', true)) {
 30:             Log::warning('ChatbotController: chatbot disabled', [
 31:                 'trace_id' => $traceId,
 32:             ]);
 33: 
 34:             return response()->json([
 35:                 'success' => false,
 36:                 'message' => config('chatbot.ui.offline_message', 'Chatbot sedang tidak tersedia.'),
 37:                 'trace_id' => $traceId,
 38:             ], Response::HTTP_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE);
 39:         }
 40: 
 41:         try {
 42:             $validated = $request->validate([
 43:                 'message' => ['required', 'string', 'max:500'],
 44:                 'conversation_id' => ['nullable', 'string', 'ulid'],
 45:             ]);
 46: 
 47:             $user = $request->user();
 48:             $sessionId = $request->session()->getId();
 49: 
 50:             Log::info('ChatbotController: sendMessage request', [
 51:                 'trace_id' => $traceId,
 52:                 'conversation_id' => $validated['conversation_id'] ?? null,
 53:                 'session_id' => $sessionId,
 54:                 'user_id' => $user?->id,
 55:                 'message_preview' => substr($validated['message'], 0, 120),
 56:             ]);
 57: 
 58:             $result = $this->chatbotService->sendMessage(
 59:                 $validated['message'],
 60:                 $sessionId,
 61:                 $user,
 62:                 $validated['conversation_id'] ?? null
 63:             );
 64: 
 65:             Log::info('ChatbotController: sendMessage success', [
 66:                 'trace_id' => $traceId,
 67:                 'conversation_id' => $result['conversation_id'] ?? null,
 68:                 'cached' => $result['cached'] ?? null,
 69:                 'response_preview' => isset($result['message']) ? substr($result['message'], 0, 140) : null,
 70:             ]);
 71: 
 72:             return response()->json([
 73:                 'success' => true,
 74:                 'data' => $result,
 75:                 'trace_id' => $traceId,
 76:             ]);
 77:         } catch (ValidationException $e) {
 78:             return response()->json([
 79:                 'success' => false,
 80:                 'message' => 'Input tidak valid.',
 81:                 'errors' => $e->errors(),
 82:                 'trace_id' => $traceId,
 83:             ], Response::HTTP_UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY);
 84:         } catch (\InvalidArgumentException $e) {
 85:             return response()->json([
 86:                 'success' => false,
 87:                 'message' => $e->getMessage(),
 88:                 'trace_id' => $traceId,
 89:             ], Response::HTTP_BAD_REQUEST);
 90:         } catch (\Exception $e) {
 91:             Log::error('ChatbotController: sendMessage error', [
 92:                 'trace_id' => $traceId,
 93:                 'message' => $e->getMessage(),
 94:             ]);
 95: 
 96:             report($e);
 97:             return response()->json([
 98:                 'success' => false,
 99:                 'message' => config('chatbot.ui.error_message', 'Maaf, terjadi kesalahan. Silakan coba lagi.'),
100:                 'trace_id' => $traceId,
101:             ], Response::HTTP_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR);
102:         }
103:     }
104: 
105:     /**
106:      * Get user's conversation history list
107:      * 
108:      * @param Request $request
109:      * @return JsonResponse
110:      */
111:     public function getConversations(Request $request): JsonResponse
112:     {
113:         $user = $request->user();
114: 
115:         if ($user === null) {
116:             return response()->json([
117:                 'success' => false,
118:                 'message' => 'Unauthorized.',
119:             ], Response::HTTP_UNAUTHORIZED);
120:         }
121: 
122:         $conversations = $this->chatbotService->getUserConversations($user);
123: 
124:         return response()->json([
125:             'success' => true,
126:             'data' => [
127:                 'conversations' => $conversations,
128:             ],
129:         ]);
130:     }
131: 
132:     /**
133:      * Get a conversation with its messages.
134:      *
135:      * @param Request $request
136:      * @param string $conversationId
137:      * @return JsonResponse
138:      */
139:     public function getConversation(Request $request, string $conversationId): JsonResponse
140:     {
141:         $user = $request->user();
142:         $sessionId = $request->session()->getId();
143: 
144:         $conversation = $this->chatbotService->getConversation($conversationId, $user, $sessionId);
145: 
146:         if ($conversation === null) {
147:             return response()->json([
148:                 'success' => false,
149:                 'message' => 'Conversation not found.',
150:             ], Response::HTTP_NOT_FOUND);
151:         }
152: 
153:         return response()->json([
154:             'success' => true,
155:             'data' => $conversation,
156:         ]);
157:     }
158: 
159:     /**
160:      * Get suggested questions for quick start.
161:      *
162:      * @return JsonResponse
163:      */
164:     public function suggestedQuestions(): JsonResponse
165:     {
166:         $questions = $this->chatbotService->getSuggestedQuestions();
167: 
168:         return response()->json([
169:             'success' => true,
170:             'data' => [
171:                 'questions' => $questions,
172:             ],
173:         ]);
174:     }
175: 
176:     /**
177:      * Check if chatbot is available.
178:      *
179:      * @return JsonResponse
180:      */
181:     public function status(): JsonResponse
182:     {
183:         return response()->json([
184:             'success' => true,
185:             'data' => [
186:                 'enabled' => config('chatbot.enabled', true),
187:                 'available' => $this->chatbotService->isAvailable(),
188:             ],
189:         ]);
190:     }
191: 
192:     /**
193:      * Archive a conversation.
194:      *
195:      * @param Request $request
196:      * @param string $conversationId
197:      * @return JsonResponse
198:      */
199:     public function archiveConversation(Request $request, string $conversationId): JsonResponse
200:     {
201:         $user = $request->user();
202: 
203:         if ($user === null) {
204:             return response()->json([
205:                 'success' => false,
206:                 'message' => 'Unauthorized.',
207:             ], Response::HTTP_UNAUTHORIZED);
208:         }
209: 
210:         $sessionId = $request->session()->getId();
211: 
212:         $success = $this->chatbotService->archiveConversation($conversationId, $user, $sessionId);
213: 
214:         if (!$success) {
215:             return response()->json([
216:                 'success' => false,
217:                 'message' => 'Conversation not found.',
218:             ], Response::HTTP_NOT_FOUND);
219:         }
220: 
221:         return response()->json([
222:             'success' => true,
223:             'message' => 'Conversation archived successfully.',
224:         ]);
225:     }
226: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Concerns/ResolvesDocuments.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Concerns;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 6: use App\Models\RequestDocument;
 7: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
 8: 
 9: trait ResolvesDocuments
10: {
11:     /**
12:      * Assert that a document belongs to the given request and exists on disk.
13:      */
14:     private function resolveDocument(DataRequest $dataRequest, RequestDocument $document): void
15:     {
16:         abort_unless(
17:             $document->data_request_id === $dataRequest->id,
18:             404,
19:             'Document not found for this request.'
20:         );
21: 
22:         abort_unless(
23:             Storage::disk('local')->exists($document->file_path),
24:             404,
25:             'File not found.'
26:         );
27:     }
28: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/DataRequestController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
  4: 
  5: use App\Enums\PurposeType;
  6: use App\Http\Requests\StoreDataRequestRequest;
  7: use App\Models\DataRequest;
  8: use App\Models\RequestDocument;
  9: use App\Services\DataRequestService;
 10: use App\Services\SurveySettingService;
 11: use Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse;
 12: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
 13: use App\Models\Invoice;
 14: use Inertia\Inertia;
 15: use Inertia\Response;
 16: use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\StreamedResponse;
 17: use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\BinaryFileResponse;
 18: use App\Http\Requests\StorePaymentProofRequest;
 19: use App\Actions\SubmitPaymentProof;
 20: 
 21: class DataRequestController extends Controller
 22: {
 23:     use \App\Http\Controllers\Concerns\ResolvesDocuments;
 24: 
 25:     public function __construct(private DataRequestService $service)
 26:     {
 27:     }
 28:     public function index(\Illuminate\Http\Request $request): Response
 29:     {
 30:         $sortableColumns = ['created_at', 'updated_at', 'request_code', 'title', 'purpose_type', 'status'];
 31:         $sortColumn = in_array($request->input('sort_by'), $sortableColumns)
 32:             ? $request->input('sort_by')
 33:             : 'updated_at';
 34: 
 35:         $sortOrder = in_array($request->input('sort'), ['asc', 'desc'])
 36:             ? $request->input('sort')
 37:             : 'desc';
 38: 
 39:         $query = DataRequest::forUser($request->user())
 40:             ->filter($request->only(['search', 'status', 'start_date', 'end_date']))
 41:             ->with('documents')
 42:             ->orderBy($sortColumn, $sortOrder);
 43: 
 44:         $dataRequests = $query->paginate(10)->withQueryString();
 45: 
 46:         return Inertia::render('DataRequests/Index', [
 47:             'dataRequests' => $dataRequests,
 48:             'filters' => (object) $request->only(['search', 'status', 'start_date', 'end_date', 'sort', 'sort_by']),
 49:         ]);
 50:     }
 51: 
 52: 
 53:     /**
 54:      * Show the submission form.
 55:      */
 56:     public function create(): Response
 57:     {
 58:         return Inertia::render('DataRequests/Create', [
 59:             'purposeTypes' => collect(PurposeType::cases())->map(fn($type) => [
 60:                 'value' => $type->value,
 61:                 'label' => $type->label(),
 62:                 'category' => $type->category()->label(),
 63:                 'requiredDocuments' => $type->requiredDocuments(),
 64:             ]),
 65:         ]);
 66:     }
 67: 
 68:     /**
 69:      * Store a new data request.
 70:      */
 71:     public function store(StoreDataRequestRequest $request): RedirectResponse
 72:     {
 73:         $validated = $request->validated();
 74:         $purposeType = PurposeType::from($validated['purpose_type']);
 75: 
 76:         // Extract uploaded files keyed by document_type
 77:         $files = [];
 78:         foreach ($purposeType->requiredDocuments() as $documentType) {
 79:             if ($request->hasFile($documentType)) {
 80:                 $files[$documentType] = $request->file($documentType);
 81:             }
 82:         }
 83: 
 84:         $dataRequest = $this->service->submit($request->user(), $validated, $files);
 85: 
 86:         return redirect()
 87:             ->route('data-requests.show', $dataRequest->id)
 88:             ->with('success', 'Permohonan data berhasil diajukan.');
 89:     }
 90: 
 91:     /**
 92:      * Display a single data request.
 93:      */
 94:     public function show(DataRequest $dataRequest, SurveySettingService $surveySettings): Response
 95:     {
 96:         $this->authorize('view', $dataRequest);
 97: 
 98:         $dataRequest->load(['user', 'documents', 'reviewer', 'activeInvoice', 'invoices', 'surveys', 'productUploads']);
 99: 
100:         // Lazy expiration check BEFORE attaching virtual attributes
101:         $dataRequest->checkAndExpireIfNeeded();
102: 
103:         // --- SMART SNAPSHOT & PRUNING LOGIC ---
104:         // This ensures the survey requirements follow a "One-Way" progression.
105:         $currentSnapshot = $dataRequest->required_surveys;
106:         $effectiveSurveys = $dataRequest->effective_required_surveys;
107: 
108:         if ($currentSnapshot === null || $currentSnapshot === []) {
109:             // Initial Snapshot: Freeze the effective surveys so they don't change if
110:             // global settings are modified later. This applies when:
111:             // - required_surveys was never set (null)
112:             // - required_surveys was empty ([]) meaning "inherit from global"
113:             if (!empty($effectiveSurveys) || $dataRequest->surveys()->exists()) {
114:                 \App\Models\DataRequest::where('id', $dataRequest->id)->update([
115:                     'required_surveys' => json_encode($effectiveSurveys)
116:                 ]);
117:                 $dataRequest->refresh();
118:             }
119:         } else {
120:             // 2. Pruning: If the current effective list is SMALLER than the saved snapshot 
121:             // (meaning admin turned off a survey the user hadn't uploaded yet),
122:             // prune the snapshot so the survey never comes back even if admin turns it back on.
123:             if (count($effectiveSurveys) < count($currentSnapshot)) {
124:                 \App\Models\DataRequest::where('id', $dataRequest->id)->update([
125:                     'required_surveys' => json_encode($effectiveSurveys)
126:                 ]);
127:                 $dataRequest->refresh();
128:             }
129:         }
130: 
131:         $processedDocuments = $dataRequest->documents
132:             ->where('document_type', 'processed_data_result')
133:             ->values();
134:         $submissionDocuments = $dataRequest->documents
135:             ->where('document_type', '!=', 'processed_data_result')
136:             ->values();
137:         $dataRequest->setRelation('documents', $submissionDocuments);
138:         $dataRequest->setAttribute('processed_documents', $processedDocuments);
139: 
140:         // Build billing history from ALL invoices (sorted newest first)
141:         $billingHistory = $dataRequest->invoices
142:             ->sortByDesc('created_at')
143:             ->values()
144:             ->map(fn(Invoice $invoice) => [
145:                 'id' => $invoice->id,
146:                 'status' => $invoice->status->value,
147:                 'amount' => $invoice->amount,
148:                 'rejection_reason' => $invoice->rejection_reason,
149:                 'created_at' => $invoice->created_at?->toISOString(),
150:                 'expires_at' => $invoice->expires_at?->toISOString(),
151:                 'verified_at' => $invoice->verified_at?->toISOString(),
152:                 'invoice_preview_path' => $invoice->invoice_path
153:                     ? route('data-requests.invoices.preview', [$dataRequest, $invoice])
154:                     : null,
155:                 'invoice_download_path' => $invoice->invoice_path
156:                     ? route('data-requests.invoices.download', [$dataRequest, $invoice])
157:                     : null,
158:                 'proof_preview_path' => $invoice->proof_path
159:                     ? route('data-requests.invoices.proof-preview', [$dataRequest, $invoice])
160:                     : null,
161:                 'proof_download_path' => $invoice->proof_path
162:                     ? route('data-requests.invoices.proof-download', [$dataRequest, $invoice])
163:                     : null,
164:                 'proof_original_name' => $invoice->proof_path
165:                     ? 'bukti-bayar-' . $dataRequest->request_code . '.' . strtolower(pathinfo($invoice->proof_path, PATHINFO_EXTENSION))
166:                     : null,
167:             ]);
168: 
169:         $dataRequest->append('has_submitted_feedback');
170:         $dataRequest->append('are_surveys_completed');
171:         $dataRequest->append('can_upload_product');
172: 
173:         // Transform surveys for frontend
174:         $surveys = $dataRequest->surveys->map(fn($survey) => [
175:             'id' => $survey->id,
176:             'survey_type' => $survey->survey_type->value ?? $survey->survey_type,
177:             'status' => $survey->status->value ?? $survey->status,
178:             'rejection_reason' => $survey->rejection_reason,
179:             'reviewed_at' => $survey->reviewed_at?->toISOString(),
180:             'created_at' => $survey->created_at->toISOString(),
181:             'proof_original_name' => $survey->proof_original_name,
182:             'proof_preview_path' => route('data-requests.surveys.preview', [$dataRequest, $survey]),
183:             'proof_download_path' => route('data-requests.surveys.download', [$dataRequest, $survey]),
184:         ]);
185: 
186:         $availableSurveys = $surveySettings->optionsForFrontend(true);
187: 
188:         // Format product uploads
189:         $productUploads = $dataRequest->productUploads->map(fn($upload) => [
190:             'id' => $upload->id,
191:             'original_name' => $upload->original_name,
192:             'file_size' => $upload->file_size,
193:             'preview_path' => route('data-requests.product-uploads.preview', [$dataRequest, $upload]),
194:             'download_path' => route('data-requests.product-uploads.download', [$dataRequest, $upload]),
195:             'created_at' => $upload->created_at->toISOString(),
196:         ]);
197: 
198:         return Inertia::render('DataRequests/Show', [
199:             'dataRequest' => $dataRequest,
200:             'billingHistory' => $billingHistory,
201:             'surveys' => $surveys,
202:             'availableSurveys' => $availableSurveys,
203:             'productUploads' => $productUploads,
204:         ]);
205:     }
206: 
207:     /**
208:      * Download an uploaded document.
209:      */
210:     public function downloadDocument(DataRequest $dataRequest, RequestDocument $document): StreamedResponse
211:     {
212:         $this->authorize('downloadDocument', $dataRequest);
213:         $this->resolveDocument($dataRequest, $document);
214: 
215:         return Storage::download(
216:             $document->file_path,
217:             $document->original_name
218:         );
219:     }
220: 
221:     // preview proof of payment
222:     public function previewProof(DataRequest $dataRequest)
223:     {
224:         // authorize user owns this request
225:         $this->authorize('view', $dataRequest);
226: 
227:         $invoice = $dataRequest->activeInvoice;
228: 
229:         if (!$invoice || !$invoice->proof_path) {
230:             abort(404);
231:         }
232: 
233:         $fullPath = \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage::disk('local')->path($invoice->proof_path);
234:         abort_unless(file_exists($fullPath), 404, 'File not found.');
235: 
236:         return response()->file($fullPath);
237:     }
238: 
239:     /**
240:      * Preview (inline) an uploaded document in the browser.
241:      */
242:     public function previewDocument(DataRequest $dataRequest, RequestDocument $document): BinaryFileResponse
243:     {
244:         $this->authorize('downloadDocument', $dataRequest);
245:         $this->resolveDocument($dataRequest, $document);
246: 
247:         $fullPath = Storage::disk('local')->path($document->file_path);
248: 
249:         abort_unless(file_exists($fullPath), 404, 'File not found.');
250: 
251:         return response()->file($fullPath, [
252:             'Content-Type' => mime_content_type($fullPath) ?: 'application/octet-stream',
253:             'Content-Disposition' => 'inline; filename="' . $document->original_name . '"',
254:         ]);
255:     }
256:

258:      * Store the uploaded payment proof.
259:      */

261:     {
262:         $dataRequest->checkAndExpireIfNeeded();
263:         $this->authorize('uploadPaymentProof', $dataRequest);
264: 
265:         $action->handle($dataRequest, $request->file('file'));
266: 
267:         return back()->with('success', 'Bukti pembayaran berhasil diunggah dan sedang memproses verifikasi.');
268:     }

277:         abort_unless($invoice && $invoice->invoice_path, 404, 'Invoice belum diunggah atau tidak aktif.');
278: 
279:         return Storage::download($invoice->invoice_path, 'invoice-' . $dataRequest->request_code . '.' . pathinfo($invoice->invoice_path, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
280:     }

491:     /**
492:      * Download product upload.
493:      */
494:     public function downloadProductUpload(DataRequest $dataRequest, \App\Models\ProductUpload $upload): StreamedResponse
495:     {
496:         $this->authorize('viewProductUpload', $dataRequest);
497:         abort_unless($upload->data_request_id === $dataRequest->id, 404);
498: 
499:         return Storage::download(
500:             $upload->file_path,
501:             $upload->original_name
502:         );
503:     }
504: 
505:     /**
506:      * Delete a product upload.
507:      */
508:     public function deleteProductUpload(DataRequest $dataRequest, \App\Models\ProductUpload $upload): RedirectResponse
509:     {
510:         $this->authorize('deleteProductUpload', $dataRequest);
511:         abort_unless($upload->data_request_id === $dataRequest->id, 404);
512: 
513:         \Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB::transaction(function () use ($dataRequest, $upload) {
514:             $upload->delete();
515: 
516:             activity()
517:                 ->performedOn($dataRequest)
518:                 ->causedBy(auth()->user())
519:                 ->withProperties([
520:                     'original_name' => $upload->original_name,
521:                 ])
522:                 ->event('product_deleted')
523:                 ->log('User menghapus produk penelitian.');
524:         });
525:         
526:         Storage::delete($upload->file_path);
527: 
528:         return back()->with('success', 'Produk berhasil dihapus.');
529:     }
530: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/DownloadFaqDocumentController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\Faq;
 6: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
 7: 
 8: class DownloadFaqDocumentController extends Controller
 9: {
10:     /**
11:      * Handle the incoming request to download a FAQ document.
12:      */
13:     public function __invoke(Faq $faq)
14:     {
15:         // Only allow public download for active FAQs, unless the user is an admin
16:         if (!$faq->is_active && (!auth()->check() || !auth()->user()->isAdmin())) {
17:             abort(403, 'Akses dokumen ditolak.');
18:         }
19: 
20:         if (!$faq->file_path || !Storage::disk('local')->exists($faq->file_path)) {
21:             abort(404, 'Dokumen tidak ditemukan.');
22:         }
23: 
24:         return Storage::disk('local')->download(
25:             $faq->file_path,
26:             $faq->original_filename ?? 'document.pdf'
27:         );
28:     }
29: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/ProfileController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
 4: 
 5: use App\Http\Requests\ProfileUpdateRequest;
 6: use App\Support\PhoneNumberNormalizer;
 7: use Illuminate\Contracts\Auth\MustVerifyEmail;
 8: use Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse;
 9: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
10: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
11: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Redirect;
12: use Inertia\Inertia;
13: use Inertia\Response;
14: 
15: class ProfileController extends Controller
16: {
17:     /**
18:      * Display the user's profile form.
19:      */
20:     public function edit(Request $request): Response
21:     {
22:         return Inertia::render('Profile/Edit', [
23:             'mustVerifyEmail' => $request->user() instanceof MustVerifyEmail,
24:             'status' => session('status'),
25:         ]);
26:     }
27: 
28:     /**
29:      * Update the user's profile information.
30:      */
31:     public function update(ProfileUpdateRequest $request): RedirectResponse
32:     {
33:         $validated = $request->validated();
34:         if (isset($validated['phone'])) {
35:             $validated['phone'] = PhoneNumberNormalizer::toE164($validated['phone'], $validated['phone_country']);
36:         }
37:         $request->user()->fill($validated);
38: 
39:         if ($request->user()->isDirty('email')) {
40:             $request->user()->email_verified_at = null;
41:         }
42: 
43:         $request->user()->save();
44: 
45:         return Redirect::route('profile.edit');
46:     }
47: 
48:     /**
49:      * Delete the user's account.
50:      */
51:     public function destroy(\App\Http\Requests\ProfileDestroyRequest $request): RedirectResponse
52:     {
53: 
54:         $user = $request->user();
55: 
56:         Auth::logout();
57: 
58:         $user->delete();
59: 
60:         $request->session()->invalidate();
61:         $request->session()->regenerateToken();
62: 
63:         return Redirect::to('/');
64:     }
65: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/TrackRequestController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
  4: 
  5: use App\Enums\UserRole;
  6: use App\Http\Requests\TrackRequestFormRequest;
  7: use App\Models\DataRequest;
  8: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  9: use Inertia\Inertia;
 10: use Inertia\Response;
 11: 
 12: class TrackRequestController extends Controller
 13: {
 14:     /**
 15:      * Track a data request status publicly (no auth required).
 16:      * User provides email + request_code from the HeroSection form.
 17:      */
 18:     public function track(TrackRequestFormRequest $request): Response
 19:     {
 20:         $validated = $request->validated();
 21:         $showChatbot = $this->shouldShowChatbot();
 22: 
 23:         $dataRequest = DataRequest::where('request_code', $validated['request_code'])
 24:             ->whereHas('user', fn($query) => $query->where('email', $validated['email']))
 25:             ->with(['activeInvoice', 'invoices'])
 26:             ->first();
 27: 
 28:         $faqService = app(\App\Services\FaqService::class);
 29:         $statsService = app(\App\Services\StatsService::class);
 30: 
 31:         $faqs = $faqService->getFeaturedFaqs()->take(5);
 32:         if ($faqs->isEmpty()) {
 33:             $faqs = $faqService->getActiveFaqs()->take(5);
 34:         }
 35: 
 36:         if (!$dataRequest) {
 37:             return Inertia::render('Welcome/Index', [
 38:                 'trackingError' => 'Permohonan tidak ditemukan. Pastikan email dan kode permohonan sudah benar.',
 39:                 'canLogin' => \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route::has('login'),
 40:                 'canRegister' => \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route::has('register'),
 41:                 'faqs' => $faqs,
 42:                 'stats' => $statsService->getLandingStats(),
 43:                 'showChatbot' => $showChatbot,
 44:             ]);
 45:         }
 46: 
 47:         // Lazy expiration check before rendering
 48:         $dataRequest->checkAndExpireIfNeeded();
 49: 
 50:         $activeInvoice = $dataRequest->activeInvoice;
 51:         $invoices = $dataRequest->invoices->sortByDesc('created_at');
 52: 
 53:         return Inertia::render('Welcome/Index', [
 54:             'canLogin' => \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route::has('login'),
 55:             'canRegister' => \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route::has('register'),
 56:             'faqs' => $faqs,
 57:             'stats' => $statsService->getLandingStats(),
 58:             'showChatbot' => $showChatbot,
 59:             'trackingResult' => [
 60:                 'id' => $dataRequest->id,
 61:                 'request_code' => $dataRequest->request_code,
 62:                 'status' => $dataRequest->status->value,
 63:                 'status_label' => $dataRequest->status->label(),
 64:                 'status_color' => $dataRequest->status->color(),
 65:                 'submitted_at' => $dataRequest->created_at->format('d M Y'),
 66:                 'reviewed_at' => $dataRequest->reviewed_at?->format('d M Y'),
 67:                 
 68:                 // Active billing details
 69:                 'billing_code' => $activeInvoice?->billing_code,
 70:                 'amount' => $activeInvoice?->amount,
 71:                 'invoice_issued_at' => $activeInvoice?->created_at?->format('d M Y'),
 72:                 'expires_at' => $activeInvoice?->expires_at?->format('d M Y H:i'),
 73:                 'payment_submitted_at' => $activeInvoice?->proof_path ? $activeInvoice->updated_at?->format('d M Y') : null,
 74:                 'payment_verified_at' => $activeInvoice?->verified_at?->format('d M Y'),
 75:                 'completed_at' => $dataRequest->status->value === 'completed' ? $dataRequest->updated_at->format('d M Y') : null,
 76:                 
 77:                 // Billing history audit
 78:                 'expiration_count' => $dataRequest->invoices->where('status', \App\Enums\InvoiceStatus::Expired)->count(),
 79:                 'billing_history' => $invoices->map(fn($inv) => [
 80:                     'status' => $inv->status->value,
 81:                     'status_label' => $inv->status->label(),
 82:                     'amount' => $inv->amount,
 83:                     'created_at' => $inv->created_at->format('d M Y'),
 84:                     'expires_at' => $inv->expires_at?->format('d M Y'),
 85:                 ]),
 86:                 
 87:                 'is_free' => $dataRequest->request_category === \App\Enums\RequestCategory::Free,
 88:                 'is_non_commercial' => in_array($dataRequest->purpose_type, [
 89:                     \App\Enums\PurposeType::NonCommercialIndividu,
 90:                     \App\Enums\PurposeType::NonCommercialInstansi,
 91:                 ]),
 92:                 'has_uploaded_report' => $dataRequest->productUploads->isNotEmpty(),
 93:                 'rejection_reason' => $dataRequest->rejection_reason,
 94:                 // Survey states
 95:                 'are_surveys_completed' => $dataRequest->are_surveys_completed,
 96:                 'has_rejected_surveys' => $dataRequest->surveys->where('status', \App\Enums\SurveyStatus::Rejected)->isNotEmpty(),
 97:                 'has_pending_surveys' => $dataRequest->surveys->where('status', \App\Enums\SurveyStatus::Pending)->isNotEmpty(),
 98:                 'has_missing_surveys' => collect($dataRequest->effective_required_surveys)->filter(function ($req) use ($dataRequest) {
 99:                     return !$dataRequest->surveys->contains(function ($s) use ($req) {
100:                         $sType = $s->survey_type->value ?? $s->survey_type;
101:                         return $sType === $req && in_array($s->status, [\App\Enums\SurveyStatus::Pending, \App\Enums\SurveyStatus::Approved]);
102:                     });
103:                 })->isNotEmpty(),
104:             ],
105:             'canLogin' => true,
106:             'canRegister' => true,
107:             'showChatbot' => $showChatbot,
108:         ]);
109:     }
110: 
111:     private function shouldShowChatbot(): bool
112:     {
113:         $user = auth()->user();
114: 
115:         return !$user || $user->role === UserRole::User;
116:     }
117: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/UserManagementController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
  4: 
  5: use App\Enums\UserRole;
  6: use App\Http\Requests\IndexUserRequest;
  7: use App\Models\User;
  8: use App\Support\PhoneNumberNormalizer;
  9: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 10: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
 11: use Illuminate\Support\Str;
 12: use Inertia\Inertia;
 13: 
 14: class UserManagementController extends Controller
 15: {
 16:     /**
 17:      * Display a listing of users/admins.
 18:      */
 19:     public function index(IndexUserRequest $request)
 20:     {
 21:         $query = User::orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
 22: 
 23:         if ($search = $request->input('search')) {
 24:             $query->where(function ($q) use ($search) {
 25:                 $q->where('name', 'like', "%{$search}%")
 26:                     ->orWhere('email', 'like', "%{$search}%");
 27:             });
 28:         }
 29: 
 30:         if ($role = $request->input('role')) {
 31:             $query->where('role', $role);
 32:         }
 33: 
 34:         $users = $query->paginate(20)->withQueryString();
 35: 
 36:         // Stats always reflect full counts regardless of filter
 37:         $stats = User::query()
 38:             ->selectRaw("SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'admin' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as admin")
 39:             ->selectRaw("SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'user' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as user")
 40:             ->selectRaw("SUM(CASE WHEN role IN ('admin', 'user') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total")
 41:             ->first();
 42: 
 43:         return Inertia::render('Superadmin/UserManagement', [
 44:             'users' => $users,
 45:             'stats' => $stats,
 46:             'filters' => $request->only(['search', 'role']),
 47:         ]);
 48:     }
 49: 
 50:     /**
 51:      * Store a newly created Admin in storage.
 52:      */
 53:     public function store(\App\Http\Requests\StoreAdminRequest $request, \App\Actions\CreateAdminUser $createAdmin)
 54:     {
 55:         $result = $createAdmin->handle($request->validated());
 56: 
 57:         $response = back()->with('success', "Admin created successfully!");
 58: 
 59:         // Only flash credentials when the password was auto-generated (no manual password supplied).
 60:         if ($result['temporary_password'] !== null) {
 61:             $response = $response->with('credentials', [
 62:                 'email' => $result['user']->email,
 63:                 'password' => $result['temporary_password'],
 64:             ]);
 65:         }
 66: 
 67:         return $response;
 68:     }
 69: 
 70:     /**
 71:      * Update the role of the specified resource.
 72:      * Superadmin can only promote/demote between User <-> Admin.
 73:      */
 74:     public function update(\App\Http\Requests\UpdateUserRoleRequest $request, User $user)
 75:     {
 76:         $validated = $request->validated();
 77: 
 78:         if (!empty($validated['role'])) {
 79:             $user->update([
 80:                 'role' => UserRole::from($validated['role']),
 81:             ]);
 82: 
 83:             return back()->with('success', "Role updated successfully for {$user->name}.");
 84:         }
 85: 
 86:         $updateData = [
 87:             'name' => $validated['name'],
 88:             'email' => $validated['email'],
 89:             'phone' => PhoneNumberNormalizer::toE164($validated['phone'], $validated['phone_country']),
 90:         ];
 91: 
 92:         if (!empty($validated['password'])) {
 93:             $updateData['password'] = Hash::make($validated['password']);
 94:         }
 95: 
 96:         $user->update($updateData);
 97: 
 98:         return back()->with('success', "Admin account for {$user->name} updated successfully.");
 99:     }
100: 
101:     /**
102:      * Reset the password for an admin.
103:      * Only Admin-role accounts can be reset. Users reset their own
104:      * via Forgot Password. Superadmin accounts cannot be reset here.
105:      */
106:     public function resetPassword(\App\Http\Requests\ResetAdminPasswordRequest $request, User $user)
107:     {
108: 
109:         $tempPassword = Str::password(12);
110: 
111:         $user->update([
112:             'password' => Hash::make($tempPassword),
113:         ]);
114: 
115:         return back()
116:             ->with('success', "Password for {$user->name} reset successfully!")
117:             ->with('credentials', [
118:                 'email' => $user->email,
119:                 'password' => $tempPassword,
120:             ]);
121:     }
122: 
123:     /**
124:      * Soft-delete the specified user from storage.
125:      * Superadmin can deactivate Admin and User accounts.
126:      * Cannot delete self or other Superadmins.
127:      */
128:     public function destroy(\App\Http\Requests\DestroyUserRequest $request, User $user)
129:     {
130: 
131:         $user->delete();
132: 
133:         return back()->with('success', "Account for {$user->name} has been deactivated.");
134:     }
135: }

================
File: app/Http/Middleware/EnsureProfileIsComplete.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Middleware;
 4: 
 5: use Closure;
 6: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 7: use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
 8: 
 9: class EnsureProfileIsComplete
10: {
11:     /**
12:      * Handle an incoming request.
13:      *
14:      * @param  \Closure(\Illuminate\Http\Request): (\Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response)  $next
15:      */
16:     public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next): Response
17:     {
18:         $user = $request->user();
19: 
20:         // If the user is logged in, but has the dummy phone number (meaning they just signed up via Google)
21:         if ($user && $user->hasIncompleteProfile()) {
22:             // Allow them to visit the profile complete page or logout so they aren't trapped in a redirect loop
23:             if (
24:                 !$request->routeIs('profile.complete') &&
25:                 !$request->routeIs('profile.complete.update') &&
26:                 !$request->routeIs('logout')
27:             ) {
28:                 return redirect()->route('profile.complete');
29:             }
30:         }
31: 
32:         return $next($request);
33:     }
34: }

================
File: app/Http/Middleware/EnsureUserHasRole.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Middleware;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\UserRole;
 6: use Closure;
 7: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 8: use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
 9: 
10: class EnsureUserHasRole
11: {
12:     /**
13:      * Handle an incoming request.
14:      *
15:      * Usage:
16:      *   Route::middleware('role:admin')      → admin + superadmin
17:      *   Route::middleware('role:superadmin') → superadmin only
18:      */
19:     public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next, string $role): Response
20:     {
21:         $minimumRole = UserRole::from($role);
22: 
23:         if (!$request->user() || !$request->user()->role->hasAccess($minimumRole)) {
24:             return redirect()->route('dashboard')->with('error', 'Unauthorized access.');
25:         }
26: 
27:         return $next($request);
28:     }
29: }

File: app/Http/Middleware/HandleInertiaRequests.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Middleware;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 6: use Inertia\Middleware;
 7: 
 8: class HandleInertiaRequests extends Middleware
 9: {
10:     /**
11:      * The root template that is loaded on the first page visit.
12:      *
13:      * @var string
14:      */
15:     protected $rootView = 'app';
16: 
17:     /**
18:      * Determine the current asset version.
19:      */
20:     public function version(Request $request): ?string
21:     {
22:         return parent::version($request);
23:     }
24: 
25:     /**
26:      * Define the props that are shared by default.
27:      *
28:      * @return array<string, mixed>
29:      */
30:     public function share(Request $request): array
31:     {
32:         return [
33:             ...parent::share($request),
34:             'auth' => [
35:                 'user' => $request->user(),
36:             ],
37:             'flash' => [
38:                 'success' => $request->session()->get('success'),
39:                 'error' => $request->session()->get('error'),
40:                 'credentials' => $request->session()->get('credentials'),
41:                 'key' => $request->session()->has('success') || $request->session()->has('error')
42:                     ? (string) now()->getTimestampMs()
43:                     : null,
44:             ],
45:             'contactSettings' => fn () => app(\App\Services\ContactSettingService::class)->forFrontend(),
46:             'catalogItems' => fn () => app(\App\Services\CatalogService::class)->forFrontend(),
47:             'uploadLimits' => [
48:                 'invoice'        => config('upload_limits.invoice', 5120),
49:                 'payment_proof'  => config('upload_limits.payment_proof', 5120),
50:                 'survey_proof'   => config('upload_limits.survey_proof', 5120),
51:                 'identity_doc'   => config('upload_limits.identity_doc', 5120),
52:                 'processed_data' => config('upload_limits.processed_data', 102400),
53:                 'product_upload' => config('upload_limits.product_upload', 20480),
54:             ],
55:         ];
56:     }
57: }

================
File: app/Http/Middleware/SecurityHeaders.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Middleware;
 4: 
 5: use Closure;
 6: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 7: use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
 8: 
 9: class SecurityHeaders
10: {
11:     /**
12:      * Handle an incoming request.
13:      *
14:      * @param  \Closure(\Illuminate\Http\Request): (\Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response)  $next
15:      */
16:     public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next): Response
17:     {
18:         $response = $next($request);
19: 
20:         $response->headers->set('X-Content-Type-Options', 'nosniff');   // Mencegah browser untuk melakukan sniffing tipe konten
21:         $response->headers->set('X-Frame-Options', 'SAMEORIGIN');       // Mencegah 
22:         $response->headers->set('X-XSS-Protection', '1; mode=block');
23:         $response->headers->set('Referrer-Policy', 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin');
24:         $response->headers->set('Permissions-Policy', 'geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=()');
25: 
26:         return $response;
27:     }
28: }

File: app/Http/Requests/Admin/ReplaceProcessedDocumentRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests\Admin;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 6: use Illuminate\Http\UploadedFile;
 7: 
 8: class ReplaceProcessedDocumentRequest extends FormRequest
 9: {
10:     public function authorize(): bool
11:     {
12:         return $this->user()->can('uploadProcessedData', $this->route('dataRequest'));
13:     }
14: 
15:     public function rules(): array
16:     {
17:         return [
18:             'file' => [
19:                 'required',
20:                 'file',
21:                 'max:' . config('upload_limits.processed_data', 102400),
22:                 function (string $attribute, mixed $value, \Closure $fail) {
23:                     $dangerousExtensions = ['exe', 'bat', 'sh', 'php', 'js', 'py', 'pl', 'jsp', 'asp', 'aspx', 'cgi', 'dll', 'cmd', 'vbs'];
24:                     if ($value instanceof UploadedFile) {
25:                         $extension = strtolower($value->getClientOriginalExtension());
26:                         if (in_array($extension, $dangerousExtensions, true)) {
27:                             $fail('File dengan ekstensi .' . $extension . ' tidak diperbolehkan demi keamanan.');
28:                         }
29:                     }
30:                 },
31:             ],
32:         ];
33:     }
34: 
35:     public function messages(): array
36:     {
37:         return [
38:             'file.required' => 'Dokumen pengganti wajib diunggah.',
39:             'file.file' => 'File tidak valid.',
40:             'file.max' => 'Ukuran file maksimal 100MB.',
41:         ];
42:     }
43: }

================
File: app/Http/Requests/Admin/UpdateSurveySettingsRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests\Admin;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\SurveyType;
 6: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 7: 
 8: class UpdateSurveySettingsRequest extends FormRequest
 9: {
10:     public function authorize(): bool
11:     {
12:         return $this->user()?->isAdmin() ?? false;
13:     }
14: 
15:     public function rules(): array
16:     {
17:         $rules = [
18:             'surveys' => ['required', 'array'],
19:         ];
20: 
21:         foreach (SurveyType::cases() as $surveyType) {
22:             $rules['surveys.' . $surveyType->value . '.url'] = ['nullable', 'url:http,https'];
23:             $rules['surveys.' . $surveyType->value . '.is_active'] = ['required', 'boolean'];
24:         }
25: 
26:         return $rules;
27:     }
28: 
29:     public function withValidator($validator): void
30:     {
31:         $validator->after(function ($validator) {
32:             foreach (SurveyType::cases() as $surveyType) {
33:                 $urlKey = 'surveys.' . $surveyType->value . '.url';
34:                 $activeKey = 'surveys.' . $surveyType->value . '.is_active';
35: 
36:                 if ($this->boolean($activeKey) && blank($this->input($urlKey))) {
37:                     $validator->errors()->add($urlKey, 'Link survei wajib diisi saat survei diaktifkan.');
38:                 }
39:             }
40:         });
41:     }
42: 
43:     public function messages(): array
44:     {
45:         return [
46:             'surveys.required' => 'Data pengaturan survei wajib dikirim.',
47:             'surveys.array' => 'Format pengaturan survei tidak valid.',
48:             'surveys.*.url.url' => 'Link survei harus berupa URL yang valid.',
49:             'surveys.*.is_active.required' => 'Status aktif survei wajib diisi.',
50:             'surveys.*.is_active.boolean' => 'Status aktif survei tidak valid.',
51:         ];
52:     }
53: 
54:     public function validatedSettings(): array
55:     {
56:         $validated = $this->validated('surveys');
57: 
58:         return collect(SurveyType::cases())
59:             ->mapWithKeys(function (SurveyType $surveyType) use ($validated) {
60:                 $payload = $validated[$surveyType->value] ?? [];
61: 
62:                 return [
63:                     $surveyType->value => [
64:                         'url' => $payload['url'] ?? $surveyType->defaultUrl(),
65:                         'is_active' => (bool) ($payload['is_active'] ?? true),
66:                     ],
67:                 ];
68:             })
69:             ->all();
70:     }
71: }

================
File: app/Http/Requests/Auth/LoginRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests\Auth;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Auth\Events\Lockout;
 6: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 7: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
 8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\RateLimiter;
 9: use Illuminate\Support\Str;
10: use Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException;
11: 
12: class LoginRequest extends FormRequest
13: {
14:     /**
15:      * Determine if the user is authorized to make this request.
16:      */
17:     public function authorize(): bool
18:     {
19:         return true;
20:     }
21: 
22:     /**
23:      * Get the validation rules that apply to the request.
24:      *
25:      * @return array<string, \Illuminate\Contracts\Validation\ValidationRule|array<mixed>|string>
26:      */
27:     public function rules(): array
28:     {
29:         return [
30:             'email' => ['required', 'string', 'email'],
31:             'password' => ['required', 'string'],
32:         ];
33:     }
34: 
35:     /**
36:      * Attempt to authenticate the request's credentials.
37:      *
38:      * @throws \Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException
39:      */
40:     public function authenticate(): void
41:     {
42:         $this->ensureIsNotRateLimited();
43: 
44: 
45:         if (!Auth::attempt($this->only('email', 'password'), $this->boolean('remember'))) {
46:             RateLimiter::hit($this->throttleKey());
47: 
48:             throw ValidationException::withMessages([
49:                 'email' => trans('auth.failed'),
50:             ]);
51:         }
52: 
53:         RateLimiter::clear($this->throttleKey());
54:     }
55: 
56:     /**
57:      * Ensure the login request is not rate limited.
58:      *
59:      * @throws \Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException
60:      */
61:     public function ensureIsNotRateLimited(): void
62:     {
63:         if (!RateLimiter::tooManyAttempts($this->throttleKey(), 5)) {
64:             return;
65:         }
66: 
67:         event(new Lockout($this));
68: 
69:         $seconds = RateLimiter::availableIn($this->throttleKey());
70: 
71:         throw ValidationException::withMessages([
72:             'email' => trans('auth.throttle', [
73:                 'seconds' => $seconds,
74:                 'minutes' => ceil($seconds / 60),
75:             ]),
76:         ]);
77:     }
78: 
79:     /**
80:      * Get the rate limiting throttle key for the request.
81:      */
82:     public function throttleKey(): string
83:     {
84:         return Str::transliterate(Str::lower($this->string('email')) . '|' . $this->ip());
85:     }
86: }

================
File: app/Http/Requests/Auth/RegisterUserRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests\Auth;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 6: 
 7: use App\Models\User;
 8: use Illuminate\Validation\Rules;
 9: use Illuminate\Validation\Rule;
10: 
11: class RegisterUserRequest extends FormRequest
12: {
13:     /**
14:      * Determine if the user is authorized to make this request.
15:      */
16:     public function authorize(): bool
17:     {
18:         return true;
19:     }
20: 
21:     /**
22:      * Get the validation rules that apply to the request.
23:      *
24:      * @return array<string, \Illuminate\Contracts\Validation\ValidationRule|array<mixed>|string>
25:      */
26:     public function rules(): array
27:     {
28:         return [
29:             'name' => 'required|string|max:255',
30:             'email' => ['required', 'string', 'lowercase', 'email', 'max:255', Rule::unique(User::class)->whereNull('deleted_at')],
31:             'phone_country' => ['required', 'string', 'size:2', 'alpha'],
32:             'phone' => ['required', 'string', 'phone:INTERNATIONAL,phone_country,mobile'],
33:             'company_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
34:             'password' => ['required', 'confirmed', Rules\Password::min(8)->mixedCase()->numbers()->symbols()],
35:         ];
36:     }
37: }

File: app/Http/Requests/Auth/SendPasswordResetLinkRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests\Auth;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 6: 
 7: use App\Models\User;
 8: use Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException;
 9: 
10: class SendPasswordResetLinkRequest extends FormRequest
11: {
12:     /**
13:      * Determine if the user is authorized to make this request.
14:      */
15:     public function authorize(): bool
16:     {
17:         return true;
18:     }
19: 
20:     /**
21:      * Get the validation rules that apply to the request.
22:      *
23:      * @return array<string, \Illuminate\Contracts\Validation\ValidationRule|array<mixed>|string>
24:      */
25:     public function rules(): array
26:     {
27:         return [
28:             'email' => 'required|email',
29:         ];
30:     }
31: 
32:     /**
33:      * Handle a passed validation attempt.
34:      */
35:     protected function passedValidation(): void
36:     {
37:         $user = User::where('email', $this->email)->first();
38: 
39:         // Strict Approach: Admin/Superadmin cannot use the Forgot Password form
40:         if ($user && $user->isAdmin()) {
41:             throw ValidationException::withMessages([
42:                 'email' => ['Admin accounts cannot reset passwords here. Please contact Superadmin.'],
43:             ]);
44:         }
45:     }
46: }
