================
File: app/Http/Requests/Concerns/HasDynamicAuthorizationMessage.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests\Concerns;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Http\Exceptions\HttpResponseException;
 6: 
 7: /**
 8:  * Allows a FormRequest to set a dynamic authorization error message
 9:  * before returning false from authorize(), then redirect back with it.
10:  *
11:  * Usage: set $this->authorizationMessage before returning false.
12:  */
13: trait HasDynamicAuthorizationMessage
14: {
15:     protected string $authorizationMessage = 'Unauthorized action.';
16: 
17:     protected function failedAuthorization()
18:     {
19:         throw new HttpResponseException(back()->with('error', $this->authorizationMessage));
20:     }
21: }

================
File: app/Http/Requests/DestroyUserRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 6: 
 7: use App\Http\Requests\Concerns\HasDynamicAuthorizationMessage;
 8: 
 9: class DestroyUserRequest extends FormRequest
10: {
11:     use HasDynamicAuthorizationMessage;
12: 
13:     /**
14:      * Determine if the user is authorized to make this request.
15:      */
16:     public function authorize(): bool
17:     {
18:         $targetUser = $this->route('user');
19: 
20:         if ($targetUser->id === $this->user()->id) {
21:             $this->authorizationMessage = 'You cannot delete yourself.';
22:             return false;
23:         }
24: 
25:         if ($targetUser->isSuperAdmin()) {
26:             $this->authorizationMessage = 'Cannot delete a Superadmin.';
27:             return false;
28:         }
29: 
30:         return true;
31:     }
32: 
33: 
34:     /**
35:      * Get the validation rules that apply to the request.
36:      *
37:      * @return array<string, \Illuminate\Contracts\Validation\ValidationRule|array<mixed>|string>
38:      */
39:     public function rules(): array
40:     {
41:         return [
42:             // No user input validation rules needed
43:         ];
44:     }
45: }

================
File: app/Http/Requests/IndexUserRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 6: 
 7: class IndexUserRequest extends FormRequest
 8: {
 9:     /**
10:      * Determine if the user is authorized to make this request.
11:      */
12:     public function authorize(): bool
13:     {
14:         return true;
15:     }
16: 
17:     /**
18:      * Get the validation rules that apply to the request.
19:      *
20:      * @return array<string, \Illuminate\Contracts\Validation\ValidationRule|array<mixed>|string>
21:      */
22:     public function rules(): array
23:     {
24:         return [
25:             'search' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:100'],
26:             'role' => ['nullable', 'string', 'in:admin,user'],
27:         ];
28:     }
29: }

File: app/Http/Requests/ProfileUpdateRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\User;
 6: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 7: use Illuminate\Validation\Rule;
 8: 
 9: class ProfileUpdateRequest extends FormRequest
10: {
11:     /**
12:      * Get the validation rules that apply to the request.
13:      *
14:      * @return array<string, \Illuminate\Contracts\Validation\ValidationRule|array<mixed>|string>
15:      */
16:     public function rules(): array
17:     {
18:         return [
19:             'name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
20:             'email' => [
21:                 'required',
22:                 'string',
23:                 'lowercase',
24:                 'email',
25:                 'max:255',
26:                 Rule::unique(User::class)->ignore($this->user()->id),
27:             ],
28:             'phone_country' => ['required', 'string', 'size:2', 'alpha'],
29:             'phone' => ['required', 'string', 'phone:INTERNATIONAL,phone_country,mobile'],
30:             'company_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
31:         ];
32:     }
33: }

================
File: app/Http/Requests/ResetAdminPasswordRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 6: 
 7: use App\Http\Requests\Concerns\HasDynamicAuthorizationMessage;
 8: use App\Enums\UserRole;
 9: 
10: class ResetAdminPasswordRequest extends FormRequest
11: {
12:     use HasDynamicAuthorizationMessage;
13: 
14:     /**
15:      * Determine if the user is authorized to make this request.
16:      */
17:     public function authorize(): bool
18:     {
19:         $targetUser = $this->route('user');
20: 
21:         if ($targetUser->id === $this->user()->id) {
22:             $this->authorizationMessage = 'You cannot reset your own password from here.';
23:             return false;
24:         }
25: 
26:         if ($targetUser->role !== UserRole::Admin) {
27:             $this->authorizationMessage = 'Can only reset password for Admin accounts.';
28:             return false;
29:         }
30: 
31:         return true;
32:     }
33: 
34: 
35:     /**
36:      * Get the validation rules that apply to the request.
37:      *
38:      * @return array<string, \Illuminate\Contracts\Validation\ValidationRule|array<mixed>|string>
39:      */
40:     public function rules(): array
41:     {
42:         return [
43:             // No user input rules needed since the payload is empty
44:         ];
45:     }
46: }

================
File: app/Http/Requests/ReviewDataRequestRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 6: use Illuminate\Validation\Rule;
 7: 
 8: class ReviewDataRequestRequest extends FormRequest
 9: {
10:     public function authorize(): bool
11:     {
12:         return $this->user()->isAdmin();
13:     }
14: 
15:     public function rules(): array
16:     {
17:         return [
18:             'action' => [
19:                 'required',
20:                 'string',
21:                 Rule::in([
22:                     'approve',
23:                     'reject',
24:                 ])
25:             ],
26:             'rejection_reason' => ['required_if:action,reject,payment_invalid', 'nullable', 'string', 'max:2000'],
27:             'invoice_file' => ['nullable', 'file', 'mimes:pdf', 'max:' . config('upload_limits.invoice', 5120)],
28:             'billing_code' => ['nullable', 'numeric'],
29:         ];
30:     }
31: 
32:     public function messages(): array
33:     {
34:         return [
35:             'action.required' => 'Aksi verifikasi wajib dipilih.',
36:             'action.in' => 'Aksi verifikasi harus berupa "approve" atau "reject".',
37:             'rejection_reason.required_if' => 'Alasan penolakan wajib diisi jika permohonan ditolak.',
38:             'billing_code.numeric' => 'Kode billing harus berupa angka.',
39:         ];
40:     }
41: }

================
File: app/Http/Requests/StoreAdminRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 6: use Illuminate\Validation\Rules\Password;
 7: 
 8: use App\Models\User;
 9: 
10: class StoreAdminRequest extends FormRequest
11: {
12:     /**
13:      * Determine if the user is authorized to make this request.
14:      */
15:     public function authorize(): bool
16:     {
17:         return $this->user()->isSuperAdmin();
18:     }
19: 
20:     /**
21:      * Get the validation rules that apply to the request.
22:      *
23:      * @return array<string, \Illuminate\Contracts\Validation\ValidationRule|array<mixed>|string>
24:      */
25:     public function rules(): array
26:     {
27:         return [
28:             'name' => 'required|string|max:255',
29:             'email' => 'required|string|lowercase|email|max:255|unique:' . User::class,
30:             'phone_country' => ['required', 'string', 'size:2', 'alpha'],
31:             'phone' => ['required', 'string', 'phone:INTERNATIONAL,phone_country,mobile'],
32:             'password' => ['nullable', Password::min(8)->mixedCase()->numbers()->symbols()],
33:         ];
34:     }
35: 
36:     public function messages(): array
37:     {
38:         return [
39:             'password.min' => 'Password minimal 8 karakter.',
40:             'password.mixed' => 'Password harus mengandung huruf besar dan kecil.',
41:             'password.numbers' => 'Password harus mengandung angka.',
42:             'password.symbols' => 'Password harus mengandung simbol.',
43:         ];
44:     }
45: }

================
File: app/Http/Requests/StoreDataRequestRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\PurposeType;
 6: use App\Enums\RequestCategory;
 7: use App\Enums\ApplicantType;
 8: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 9: use Illuminate\Validation\Rule;
10: 
11: class StoreDataRequestRequest extends FormRequest
12: {
13:     public function authorize(): bool
14:     {
15:         return true; // Auth handled via middleware
16:     }
17: 
18:     public function rules(): array
19:     {
20:         $rules = [
21:             'title' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
22:             'company_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
23:             'purpose_type' => ['required', 'string', Rule::enum(PurposeType::class)],
24:             'applicant_type' => ['required', 'string', Rule::enum(ApplicantType::class)],
25:         ];
26: 
27:         // Dynamically add validation based on purpose_type
28:         $purposeType = PurposeType::tryFrom($this->input('purpose_type'));
29: 
30:         if ($purposeType) {
31:             if ($this->input('applicant_type') === 'instansi') {
32:                 $rules['company_name'] = ['required', 'string', 'max:255'];
33:             }
34: 
35:             if ($purposeType === PurposeType::NonCommercialIndividu) {
36:                 $rules['research_target_date'] = ['required', 'date', 'after:today'];
37:             }
38: 
39:             foreach ($purposeType->requiredDocuments() as $documentType) {
40:                 $rules[$documentType] = ['required', 'file', 'mimes:pdf', 'max:' . config('upload_limits.identity_doc', 5120)];
41:             }
42:         }
43: 
44:         return $rules;
45:     }
46: 
47:     public function messages(): array
48:     {
49:         return [
50:             'title.required' => 'Judul permohonan wajib diisi.',
51:             'title.max' => 'Judul permohonan maksimal 255 karakter.',
52:             'purpose_type.required' => 'Tipe tujuan permohonan wajib dipilih.',
53:             'applicant_type.required' => 'Tipe pemohon wajib dipilih.',
54:             'research_target_date.required' => 'Tanggal rencana unggah hasil penelitian wajib diisi.',
55:             'research_target_date.date' => 'Tanggal rencana unggah hasil penelitian tidak valid.',
56:             'research_target_date.after' => 'Tanggal rencana unggah hasil penelitian harus setelah hari ini.',
57:             '*.mimes' => 'Dokumen :attribute harus berformat PDF.',
58:             '*.max' => 'Ukuran dokumen :attribute tidak boleh melebihi 5MB.',
59:             '*.required' => 'Dokumen :attribute wajib diunggah.',
60:         ];
61:     }
62: 
63:     public function attributes(): array
64:     {
65:         return [
66:             'title' => 'Judul Permohonan',
67:             'form_pernyataan' => 'Surat Pernyataan',
68:             'scan_ktp' => 'Scan KTP',
69:             'surat_permohonan' => 'Surat Permohonan',
70:             'proposal' => 'Proposal Penelitian',
71:             'kartu_identitas_instansi' => 'Kartu Identitas Instansi',
72:             'research_target_date' => 'Rencana Tanggal Unggah Hasil Penelitian',
73:         ];
74:     }
75: }

 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 6: 
 7: class StoreInvoiceRequest extends FormRequest
 8: {
 9:     /**
10:      * Determine if the user is authorized to make this request.
11:      */

13:     {
14:         return $this->user()->isAdmin();
15:     }
16: 
17:     /**
18:      * Get the validation rules that apply to the request.

21:      */

23:     {
24:         return [
25:             'file' => ['required', 'file', 'mimes:pdf,jpg,jpeg,png', 'max:' . config('upload_limits.invoice', 5120)],
26:             'amount' => ['nullable', 'numeric', 'min:0'],

28:         ];

30:

34:             'file.required' => 'Dokumen tagihan wajib diunggah.',

37:             'amount.numeric' => 'Nominal tagihan harus berupa angka.',

39:         ];
40:     }
41: }

File: app/Http/Requests/StoreSurveyProofRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\SurveyType;
 6: use App\Services\SurveySettingService;
 7: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 8: use Illuminate\Validation\Rule;
 9: 
10: class StoreSurveyProofRequest extends FormRequest
11: {
12:     public function authorize(): bool
13:     {
14:         return $this->user()->can('submitSurvey', $this->route('dataRequest'));
15:     }
16: 
17:     public function rules(): array
18:     {
19:         $dataRequest = $this->route('dataRequest');
20:         
21:         return [
22:             'survey_type' => ['required', 'string', Rule::in($dataRequest->effective_required_surveys)],
23:             'file' => ['required', 'file', 'mimes:jpg,jpeg,png,webp,svg', 'max:' . config('upload_limits.survey_proof', 5120)],
24:         ];
25:     }
26: 
27:     public function messages(): array
28:     {
29:         return [
30:             'survey_type.required' => 'Jenis survei wajib dipilih.',
31:             'survey_type.in' => 'Jenis survei tidak aktif atau tidak valid.',
32:             'file.required' => 'Bukti survei wajib diunggah.',
33:             'file.mimes' => 'Format file harus berupa JPG, PNG, WEBP, atau SVG.',
34:             'file.max' => 'Ukuran file maksimal 5MB.',
35:         ];
36:     }
37: }

================
File: app/Http/Requests/UpdateUserRoleRequest.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Requests;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;
 6: use Illuminate\Validation\Rule;
 7: use Illuminate\Validation\Rules\Password;
 8: 
 9: use App\Models\User;
10: 
11: use App\Http\Requests\Concerns\HasDynamicAuthorizationMessage;
12: 
13: class UpdateUserRoleRequest extends FormRequest
14: {
15:     use HasDynamicAuthorizationMessage;
16: 
17:     /**
18:      * Determine if the user is authorized to make this request.
19:      */
20:     public function authorize(): bool
21:     {
22:         $targetUser = $this->route('user');
23: 
24:         if (!$this->user()->isSuperAdmin()) {
25:             return false;
26:         }
27: 
28:         if ($targetUser->id === $this->user()->id) {
29:             $this->authorizationMessage = 'You cannot change your own role.';
30:             return false;
31:         }
32: 
33:         if ($targetUser->isSuperAdmin()) {
34:             $this->authorizationMessage = 'Cannot modify a Superadmin account.';
35:             return false;
36:         }
37: 
38:         return true;
39:     }
40: 
41: 
42:     /**
43:      * Get the validation rules that apply to the request.
44:      *
45:      * @return array<string, \Illuminate\Contracts\Validation\ValidationRule|array<mixed>|string>
46:      */
47:     public function rules(): array
48:     {
49:         return [
50:             'role' => ['nullable', 'string', 'in:user,admin'],
51:             'name' => ['required_without:role', 'string', 'max:255'],
52:             'email' => [
53:                 'required_without:role',
54:                 'string',
55:                 'lowercase',
56:                 'email',
57:                 'max:255',
58:                 Rule::unique(User::class)->ignore($this->route('user')?->id),
59:             ],
60:             'phone_country' => ['required_without:role', 'string', 'size:2', 'alpha'],
61:             'phone' => ['required_without:role', 'string', 'phone:INTERNATIONAL,phone_country,mobile'],
62:             'password' => ['nullable', Password::min(8)->mixedCase()->numbers()->symbols()],
63:         ];
64:     }
65: }

================
File: app/Jobs/ExtractInvoicePaymentDetails.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Jobs;
  4: 
  5: use App\Enums\InvoiceOcrStatus;
  6: use App\Models\Invoice;
  7: use App\Services\InvoiceExtractionService;
  8: use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
  9: use Illuminate\Foundation\Queue\Queueable;
 10: use Illuminate\Support\Carbon;
 11: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
 12: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
 13: 
 14: class ExtractInvoicePaymentDetails implements ShouldQueue
 15: {
 16:     use Queueable;
 17: 
 18:     public int $timeout = 90;
 19:     public int $tries = 2;
 20:     public array $backoff = [2, 5];
 21: 
 22:     private const MAX_OCR_AMOUNT = 5_000_000;
 23: 
 24:     /**
 25:      * Create a new job instance.
 26:      */
 27:     public function __construct(private readonly string $invoiceId)
 28:     {
 29:         $this->onQueue('ocr');
 30:     }
 31: 
 32:     /**
 33:      * Execute the job.
 34:      */
 35:     public function handle(InvoiceExtractionService $invoiceExtractionService): void
 36:     {
 37:         $invoice = Invoice::query()->find($this->invoiceId);
 38: 
 39:         if (!$invoice || !$invoice->invoice_path) {
 40:             return;
 41:         }
 42: 
 43:         $fullPath = Storage::disk('local')->path($invoice->invoice_path);
 44:         if (!file_exists($fullPath)) {
 45:             $invoice->forceFill([
 46:                 'ocr_status' => InvoiceOcrStatus::Failed,
 47:                 'ocr_error' => 'File invoice tidak ditemukan.',
 48:             ])->save();
 49:             return;
 50:         }
 51: 
 52:         $invoice->forceFill([
 53:             'ocr_status' => InvoiceOcrStatus::Processing,
 54:             'ocr_error' => null,
 55:         ])->save();
 56: 
 57:         $startedAt = microtime(true);
 58:         $queueWaitSeconds = $invoice->created_at?->diffInSeconds(now());
 59: 
 60:         Log::info('Invoice OCR job started.', [
 61:             'invoice_id' => $invoice->id,
 62:             'data_request_id' => $invoice->data_request_id,
 63:             'queue_wait_seconds' => $queueWaitSeconds,
 64:         ]);
 65: 
 66:         try {
 67:             $extractedData = $invoiceExtractionService->extractData($fullPath);
 68: 
 69:             if (!$extractedData) {
 70:                 $invoice->forceFill([
 71:                     'ocr_status' => InvoiceOcrStatus::Failed,
 72:                     'ocr_error' => 'OCR tidak menemukan data yang valid dari invoice.',
 73:                 ])->save();
 74:                 return;
 75:             }
 76: 
 77:             $amountFromOcr = $extractedData['amount'] ?? null;
 78:             $normalizedAmount = is_numeric($amountFromOcr) ? (int) $amountFromOcr : null;
 79: 
 80:             if ($normalizedAmount !== null && $normalizedAmount > self::MAX_OCR_AMOUNT) {
 81:                 Log::info('Invoice OCR amount ignored because it exceeds configured maximum.', [
 82:                     'invoice_id' => $invoice->id,
 83:                     'data_request_id' => $invoice->data_request_id,
 84:                     'amount' => $normalizedAmount,
 85:                     'max_ocr_amount' => self::MAX_OCR_AMOUNT,
 86:                 ]);
 87: 
 88:                 $normalizedAmount = null;
 89:             }
 90: 
 91:             $invoice->forceFill([
 92:                 'amount' => $invoice->amount ?? $normalizedAmount,
 93:                 'billing_code' => $invoice->billing_code ?? ($extractedData['billing_code'] ?? null),
 94:                 'expires_at' => $this->resolveExpiresAt($extractedData['expires_at'] ?? null) ?? $invoice->expires_at,
 95:                 'ocr_status' => InvoiceOcrStatus::Completed,
 96:                 'ocr_extracted_at' => now(),
 97:                 'ocr_error' => null,
 98:             ])->save();
 99: 
100:             Log::info('Invoice OCR job completed.', [
101:                 'invoice_id' => $invoice->id,
102:                 'data_request_id' => $invoice->data_request_id,
103:                 'queue_wait_seconds' => $queueWaitSeconds,
104:                 'extract_duration_ms' => (int) round((microtime(true) - $startedAt) * 1000),
105:             ]);
106:         } catch (\Throwable $exception) {
107:             Log::warning('Invoice OCR background extraction failed.', [
108:                 'invoice_id' => $invoice->id,
109:                 'data_request_id' => $invoice->data_request_id,
110:                 'message' => $exception->getMessage(),
111:             ]);
112: 
113:             $invoice->forceFill([
114:                 'ocr_status' => InvoiceOcrStatus::Failed,
115:                 'ocr_error' => 'OCR gagal diproses. Silakan isi data pembayaran manual.',
116:             ])->save();
117:         }
118:     }
119: 
120:     private function resolveExpiresAt(mixed $expiresAt): ?Carbon
121:     {
122:         if (!$expiresAt) {
123:             return null;
124:         }
125: 
126:         try {
127:             return Carbon::parse($expiresAt);
128:         } catch (\Throwable) {
129:             return null;
130:         }
131:     }
132: }

File: app/Jobs/SyncFaqKnowledge.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Jobs;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\Faq;
 6: use App\Services\Chatbot\FaqKnowledgeIndexService;
 7: use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
 8: use Illuminate\Foundation\Queue\Queueable;
 9: 
10: class SyncFaqKnowledge implements ShouldQueue
11: {
12:     use Queueable;
13: 
14:     public function __construct(private readonly string $faqId)
15:     {
16:         $this->onQueue('knowledge');
17:     }
18: 
19:     public function handle(FaqKnowledgeIndexService $faqKnowledgeIndexService): void
20:     {
21:         $faq = Faq::query()->withTrashed()->find($this->faqId);
22: 
23:         if (!$faq) {
24:             $faqKnowledgeIndexService->purgeByFaqId($this->faqId);
25: 
26:             return;
27:         }
28: 
29:         $faqKnowledgeIndexService->sync($faq);
30:     }
31: }

================
File: app/Listeners/LogAuthenticationEvents.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Listeners;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Auth\Events\Failed;
 6: use Illuminate\Auth\Events\Lockout;
 7: use Illuminate\Auth\Events\Login;
 8: use Illuminate\Auth\Events\Logout;
 9: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
10: 
11: class LogAuthenticationEvents
12: {
13:     protected Request $request;
14: 
15:     /**
16:      * Create the event listener.
17:      */
18:     public function __construct(Request $request)
19:     {
20:         $this->request = $request;
21:     }
22: 
23:     /**
24:      * Handle the given event.
25:      */
26:     public function handle(Login|Failed|Logout|Lockout $event): void
27:     {
28:         $action = 'unknown_auth_event';
29:         $user = null;
30:         $properties = [
31:             'ip' => $this->request->ip(),
32:             'user_agent' => $this->request->userAgent(),
33:         ];
34: 
35:         if ($event instanceof Login) {
36:             $action = 'login_success';
37:             $user = $event->user;
38:         } elseif ($event instanceof Failed) {
39:             $action = 'login_failed';
40:             $user = $event->user;
41:             $properties['email'] = $event->credentials['email'] ?? null;
42:         } elseif ($event instanceof Logout) {
43:             $action = 'logout';
44:             $user = $event->user;
45:         } elseif ($event instanceof Lockout) {
46:             $action = 'lockout';
47:             $properties['email'] = $event->request->input('email');
48:         }
49: 
50:         $activity = activity('authentication')
51:             ->event($action)
52:             ->withProperties($properties);
53: 
54:         if ($user) {
55:             $activity->causedBy($user);
56:         }
57: 
58:         $activity->log("Authentication event: {$action}");
59:     }
60: }

================
File: app/Models/CachedQaPair.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: declare(strict_types=1);
 4: 
 5: namespace App\Models;
 6: 
 7: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Concerns\HasUlids;
 8: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
 9: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
10: 
11: class CachedQaPair extends Model
12: {
13:     use HasFactory, HasUlids;
14: 
15:     protected $fillable = [
16:         'question',
17:         'answer',
18:         'sources',
19:         'hit_count',
20:         'is_verified',
21:         'rating_sum',
22:         'rating_count',
23:         'last_hit_at',
24:     ];
25: 
26:     protected function casts(): array
27:     {
28:         return [
29:             'sources' => 'array',
30:             'hit_count' => 'integer',
31:             'is_verified' => 'boolean',
32:             'rating_sum' => 'integer',
33:             'rating_count' => 'integer',
34:             'last_hit_at' => 'datetime',
35:         ];
36:     }
37: 
38:     /**
39:      * Get average rating.
40:      */
41:     public function averageRating(): float
42:     {
43:         if ($this->rating_count === 0) {
44:             return 0.0;
45:         }
46: 
47:         return $this->rating_sum / $this->rating_count;
48:     }
49: 
50:     /**
51:      * Add a rating to this pair.
52:      */
53:     public function addRating(int $rating): void
54:     {
55:         $this->increment('rating_count');
56:         $this->increment('rating_sum', $rating);
57:     }
58: 
59:     /**
60:      * Scope for verified pairs.
61:      */
62:     public function scopeVerified($query)
63:     {
64:         return $query->where('is_verified', true);
65:     }
66: 
67:     /**
68:      * Scope for unverified pairs.
69:      */
70:     public function scopeUnverified($query)
71:     {
72:         return $query->where('is_verified', false);
73:     }
74: 
75:     /**
76:      * Scope for popular pairs (hit count).
77:      */
78:     public function scopePopular($query, int $minHits = 5)
79:     {
80:         return $query->where('hit_count', '>=', $minHits);
81:     }
82: 
83:     /**
84:      * Scope for recently used pairs.
85:      */
86:     public function scopeRecentlyUsed($query, int $days = 30)
87:     {
88:         return $query->where('last_hit_at', '>=', now()->subDays($days));
89:     }
90: }

18:         'user_id',

62:     }

70:     }

78:     }

84:     {

86:             return false;
87:         }
88: 
89:         $limit = config('chatbot.limits.guest_max_messages', 5);
90: 
91:         return $this->message_count >= $limit;
92:     }
93: }

File: app/Models/DataRequest.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Models;
  4: 
  5: use App\Enums\PurposeType;
  6: use App\Enums\RequestCategory;
  7: use App\Enums\InvoiceStatus;
  8: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
  9: use App\Enums\SurveyStatus;
 10: use App\Enums\ApplicantType;
 11: use App\Services\SurveySettingService;
 12: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Concerns\HasUlids;
 13: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
 14: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
 15: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;
 16: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\HasMany;
 17: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
 18: use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;
 19: use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;
 20: 
 21: class DataRequest extends Model
 22: {
 23:     use HasUlids, HasFactory, SoftDeletes, LogsActivity;
 24: 
 25:     protected $fillable = [
 26:         'request_code',
 27:         'title',
 28:         'company_name',
 29:         'user_id',
 30:         'purpose_type',
 31:         'applicant_type',
 32:         'request_category',
 33:         'status',
 34:         'rejection_reason',
 35:         'required_surveys',
 36:         'user_feedback',
 37:         'user_feedback_at',
 38:         'reviewed_by',
 39:         'reviewed_at',
 40:         'research_target_date',
 41:     ];
 42: 
 43:     protected $appends = [
 44:         'effective_required_surveys',
 45:         'are_surveys_completed',
 46:     ];
 47: 
 48:     protected function casts(): array
 49:     {
 50:         return [
 51:             'purpose_type' => PurposeType::class ,
 52:             'applicant_type' => ApplicantType::class ,
 53:             'request_category' => RequestCategory::class ,
 54:             'status' => RequestStatus::class ,
 55:             'user_feedback_at' => 'datetime',
 56:             'reviewed_at' => 'datetime',
 57:             'required_surveys' => 'array',
 58:             'research_target_date' => 'date',
 59:         ];
 60:     }
 61: 
 62:     /**
 63:      * Activity log configuration — tracks status changes for audit trail.
 64:      */
 65:     public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
 66:     {
 67:         return LogOptions::defaults()
 68:             ->logOnly(['title', 'status', 'rejection_reason', 'reviewed_by', 'reviewed_at'])
 69:             ->logOnlyDirty()
 70:             ->dontSubmitEmptyLogs();
 71:     }
 72: 
 73:     /**
 74:      * Check if the active invoice is expired (and the command hasn't run yet)
 75:      * and update the status of both invoice and request accordingly.
 76:      */
 77:     public function checkAndExpireIfNeeded(): void
 78:     {
 79:         if ($this->status === RequestStatus::PaymentRequired && $this->activeInvoice) {
 80:             if ($this->activeInvoice->expires_at?->isPast() && $this->activeInvoice->status === \App\Enums\InvoiceStatus::Issued) {
 81:                 \Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB::transaction(function () {
 82:                     $this->activeInvoice->update(['status' => \App\Enums\InvoiceStatus::Expired]);
 83:                     $this->update(['status' => RequestStatus::Expired]);
 84:                 });
 85:             }
 86:         }
 87:     }
 88: 
 89:     public function getHasSubmittedFeedbackAttribute(): bool
 90:     {
 91:         return !is_null($this->user_feedback);
 92:     }
 93: 
 94:     public function getAreSurveysCompletedAttribute(): bool
 95:     {
 96:         $requiredSurveyTypes = $this->effective_required_surveys;
 97: 
 98:         if (empty($requiredSurveyTypes)) {
 99:             return true;
100:         }
101: 
102:         $approvedTypes = $this->surveys
103:             ->where('status', \App\Enums\SurveyStatus::Approved)
104:             ->map(fn($survey) => $survey->survey_type->value ?? $survey->survey_type)
105:             ->toArray();
106: 
107:         foreach ($requiredSurveyTypes as $required) {
108:             if (!in_array($required, $approvedTypes, true)) {
109:                 return false;
110:             }
111:         }
112: 
113:         return true;
114:     }
115: 
116:     public function getEffectiveRequiredSurveysAttribute(): array
117:     {
118:         $surveySettings = app(SurveySettingService::class);
119:         
120:         // 1. Get currently submitted survey types
121:         $submittedSurveyTypes = $this->surveys
122:             ->map(fn($survey) => $survey->survey_type instanceof \UnitEnum ? $survey->survey_type->value : $survey->survey_type)
123:             ->unique()
124:             ->values()
125:             ->toArray();
126: 
127:         // 2. Resolve Snapshot
128:         $snapshot = $this->required_surveys;
129:         if ($snapshot === null && count($submittedSurveyTypes) > 0) {
130:             // If no explicit snapshot exists but they have already uploaded surveys,
131:             // we assume the snapshot is exactly what they have uploaded.
132:             $snapshot = $submittedSurveyTypes;
133:         } else {
134:             $snapshot = $surveySettings->effectiveRequiredTypes($snapshot);
135:         }
136: 
137:         // 3. Get currently active global types
138:         $globalActive = $surveySettings->activeTypes();
139: 
140:         // 4. Hybrid Logic:
141:         // - If already submitted: Must stay (Frozen).
142:         // - If not submitted: Only stay if still globally active.
143:         // - Both must be part of the original snapshot (No new global surveys added).
144:         return collect($snapshot)
145:             ->filter(fn($type) => in_array($type, $submittedSurveyTypes) || in_array($type, $globalActive))
146:             ->unique()
147:             ->values()
148:             ->toArray();
149:     }
150: 
151:     public function getCanUploadProductAttribute(): bool
152:     {
153:         return $this->status === RequestStatus::Completed
154:             && in_array($this->purpose_type, [
155:                 \App\Enums\PurposeType::NonCommercialIndividu,
156:                 \App\Enums\PurposeType::NonCommercialInstansi,
157:             ]);
158:     }
159:     
160:     // ─── Relationships ───────────────────────────────────────
161: 
162:     public function user(): BelongsTo
163:     {
164:         return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
165:     }
166: 
167:     public function reviewer(): BelongsTo
168:     {
169:         return $this->belongsTo(User::class , 'reviewed_by');
170:     }
171: 
172:     public function documents(): HasMany
173:     {
174:         return $this->hasMany(RequestDocument::class);
175:     }
176: 
177:     public function surveys(): HasMany
178:     {
179:         return $this->hasMany(Survey::class);
180:     }
181: 
182:     public function invoices(): HasMany
183:     {
184:         return $this->hasMany(Invoice::class);
185:     }
186: 
187:     public function productUploads(): HasMany
188:     {
189:         return $this->hasMany(ProductUpload::class);
190:     }
191: 
192:     public function activeInvoice(): \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\HasOne
193:     {
194:         return $this->hasOne(Invoice::class)->latestOfMany();
195:     }
196: 
197:     // ─── Request Code Generation ─────────────────────────────
198: 
199:     /**
200:      * Generate a unique request code in the format: BMKG-{YY}{MonthLetter}-{4 random}
201:      * Example: BMKG-26B-X7K3 (February 2026)
202:      */
203:     public static function generateRequestCode(): string
204:     {
205:         $year = now()->format('y');
206:         $monthLetter = chr(64 + (int)now()->format('n')); // A=Jan, B=Feb, ..., L=Dec
207: 
208:         do {
209:             $random = strtoupper(substr(str_shuffle('ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789'), 0, 4));
210:             $code = "BMKG-{$year}{$monthLetter}-{$random}";
211:         } while (self::where('request_code', $code)->exists());
212: 
213:         return $code;
214:     }
215: 
216:     // ─── Query Scopes ────────────────────────────────────────
217: 
218:     public function scopePending($query)
219:     {
220:         return $query->where('status', RequestStatus::Pending);
221:     }
222: 
223:     public function scopeForUser($query, User $user)
224:     {
225:         return $query->where('user_id', $user->id);
226:     }
227: 
228:     public function scopeFilter($query, array $filters)
229:     {
230:         $query->when($filters['search'] ?? null, function ($query, $search) {
231:             // encapsulate in nested where to avoid breaking base query conditions
232:             $query->where(function ($q) use ($search) {
233:                     $q->where('request_code', 'like', "%{$search}%")
234:                         ->orWhere('title', 'like', "%{$search}%")
235:                         ->orWhereHas(
236:                         'user',
237:                     fn($uq) => $uq
238:                     ->where('name', 'like', "%{$search}%")
239:                     ->orWhere('email', 'like', "%{$search}%")
240:                     );
241:                 }
242:                 );
243:             });
244: 
245:         $query->when($filters['status'] ?? null, function ($query, $status) {
246:             if ($status === 'Semua' || $status === 'all')
247:                 return;
248: 
249:             if ($status === 'invoice_reissue_requested') {
250:                 $query->where('status', RequestStatus::PaymentRequired->value)
251:                     ->whereHas('activeInvoice', function ($invoiceQuery) {
252:                         $invoiceQuery->where('status', InvoiceStatus::Expired->value);
253:                     });
254: 
255:                 return;
256:             }
257: 
258:             if ($status === 'data_processing') {
259:                 $query->where('status', RequestStatus::Processing->value)
260:                     ->whereNull('user_feedback');
261: 
262:                 return;
263:             }
264: 
265:             if ($status === 'complaint') {
266:                 $query->where('status', RequestStatus::Processing->value)
267:                     ->whereNotNull('user_feedback');
268: 
269:                 return;
270:             }
271: 
272:             if ($status === 'survey_rejected') {
273:                 $query->where('status', RequestStatus::Completed->value)
274:                     ->whereNotNull('required_surveys')
275:                     ->where('required_surveys', '!=', '[]')
276:                     ->whereHas('surveys', function ($surveyQuery) {
277:                         $surveyQuery->where('status', SurveyStatus::Rejected->value);
278:                     });
279: 
280:                 return;
281:             }
282: 
283:             if ($status === 'survey_verification') {
284:                 $query->where('status', RequestStatus::Completed->value)
285:                     ->whereHas('surveys', function ($surveyQuery) {
286:                         $surveyQuery->where('status', SurveyStatus::Pending->value);
287:                     })
288:                     ->whereDoesntHave('surveys', function ($surveyQuery) {
289:                         $surveyQuery->where('status', SurveyStatus::Rejected->value);
290:                     });
291: 
292:                 return;
293:             }
294: 
295:             if ($status === 'survey_waiting_input') {
296:                 $query->where('status', RequestStatus::Completed->value)
297:                     ->whereNotNull('required_surveys')
298:                     ->where('required_surveys', '!=', '[]')
299:                     ->whereDoesntHave('surveys', function ($surveyQuery) {
300:                         $surveyQuery->whereIn('status', [SurveyStatus::Pending->value, SurveyStatus::Rejected->value]);
301:                     });
302: 
303:                 return;
304:             }
305: 
306:             if ($status === RequestStatus::Completed->value) {
307:                 $query->where('status', RequestStatus::Completed->value)
308:                     ->whereDoesntHave('surveys', function ($surveyQuery) {
309:                         $surveyQuery->where('status', SurveyStatus::Rejected->value);
310:                     });
311: 
312:                 return;
313:             }
314: 
315:             if ($status === RequestStatus::PaymentVerifying->value) {
316:                 $query->where(function ($requestQuery) {
317:                     $requestQuery->where('status', RequestStatus::PaymentVerifying->value)
318:                         ->orWhereHas('invoices', function ($invoiceQuery) {
319:                             $invoiceQuery->where('status', InvoiceStatus::Verifying->value);
320:                         });
321:                 });
322: 
323:                 return;
324:             }
325: 
326:             $query->where('status', RequestStatus::tryFrom($status) ?? $status);
327:         });
328: 
329:         $query->when($filters['purpose'] ?? null, function ($query, $purpose) {
330:             $query->where('purpose_type', $purpose);
331:         });
332: 
333:         $startDate = $filters['start_date'] ?? $filters['date_from'] ?? null;
334:         $query->when($startDate, function ($query, $date) {
335:             $query->whereDate('created_at', '>=', $date);
336:         });
337: 
338:         $endDate = $filters['end_date'] ?? $filters['date_to'] ?? null;
339:         $query->when($endDate, function ($query, $date) {
340:             $query->whereDate('created_at', '<=', $date);
341:         });
342: 
343:         $query->when(isset($filters['has_feedback']), function ($query) {
344:             $query->whereNotNull('user_feedback');
345:         });
346:     }
347: }

File: app/Models/Faq.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Models;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Concerns\HasUlids;
 6: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
 7: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
 8: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\HasMany;
 9: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
10: use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;
11: use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;
12: 
13: class Faq extends Model
14: {
15:     /** @use HasFactory<\Database\Factories\FaqFactory> */
16:     use HasFactory, HasUlids, SoftDeletes, LogsActivity;
17: 
18:     protected $fillable = [
19:         'question',
20:         'answer',
21:         'file_path',
22:         'original_filename',
23:         'is_active',
24:         'is_featured',
25:         'order',
26:     ];
27: 
28:     protected function casts(): array
29:     {
30:         return [
31:             'is_active' => 'boolean',
32:             'is_featured' => 'boolean',
33:             'order' => 'integer',
34:         ];
35:     }
36: 
37:     /**
38:      * Activity log configuration.
39:      */
40:     public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
41:     {
42:         return LogOptions::defaults()
43:             ->logOnly(['question', 'is_active', 'is_featured', 'order', 'file_path'])
44:             ->logOnlyDirty()
45:             ->dontSubmitEmptyLogs();
46:     }
47: 
48:     /**
49:      * Scope a query to only include active FAQs.
50:      */
51:     public function scopeActive($query)
52:     {
53:         return $query->where('is_active', true);
54:     }
55: 
56:     /**
57:      * Scope a query to only include featured FAQs.
58:      */
59:     public function scopeFeatured($query)
60:     {
61:         return $query->where('is_featured', true);
62:     }
63: 
64:     /**
65:      * Knowledge chunks derived from this FAQ.
66:      */
67:     public function knowledgeChunks(): HasMany
68:     {
69:         return $this->hasMany(FaqKnowledgeChunk::class);
70:     }
71: }

File: app/Models/Invoice.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Models;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\InvoiceOcrStatus;
 6: use App\Enums\InvoiceStatus;
 7: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Concerns\HasUlids;
 8: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
 9: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
10: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;
11: 
12: class Invoice extends Model
13: {
14:     use HasFactory, HasUlids;
15: 
16:     protected $fillable = [
17:         'data_request_id',
18:         'amount',
19:         'billing_code',
20:         'invoice_path',
21:         'proof_path',
22:         'status',
23:         'ocr_status',
24:         'rejection_reason',
25:         'expires_at',
26:         'verified_at',
27:         'ocr_extracted_at',
28:         'ocr_error',
29:     ];
30: 
31:     protected function casts(): array
32:     {
33:         return [
34:             'status' => InvoiceStatus::class,
35:             'ocr_status' => InvoiceOcrStatus::class,
36:             'amount' => 'decimal:2',
37:             'expires_at' => 'datetime',
38:             'verified_at' => 'datetime',
39:             'ocr_extracted_at' => 'datetime',
40:         ];
41:     }
42: 
43:     public function dataRequest(): BelongsTo
44:     {
45:         return $this->belongsTo(DataRequest::class);
46:     }
47: 
48:     public function scopeActive($query)
49:     {
50:         return $query->whereIn('status', [
51:             InvoiceStatus::Issued,
52:             InvoiceStatus::Verifying,
53:             InvoiceStatus::Invalid,
54:         ]);
55:     }
56: 
57:     public function getIsExpiredAttribute(): bool
58:     {
59:         return $this->expires_at?->isPast() && $this->status === InvoiceStatus::Issued;
60:     }
61: }

File: app/Models/User.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Models;
  4: 
  5: use App\Enums\UserRole;
  6: use Illuminate\Contracts\Auth\MustVerifyEmail;
  7: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Concerns\HasUlids;
  8: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
  9: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\SoftDeletes;
 10: use Illuminate\Foundation\Auth\User as Authenticatable;
 11: use Illuminate\Notifications\Notifiable;
 12: use Spatie\Activitylog\LogOptions;
 13: use Spatie\Activitylog\Traits\LogsActivity;
 14: 
 15: class User extends Authenticatable implements MustVerifyEmail
 16: {
 17:     /** @use HasFactory<\Database\Factories\UserFactory> */
 18:     use HasFactory, HasUlids, Notifiable, LogsActivity, SoftDeletes;
 19: 
 20:     /**
 21:      * Dummy phone number assigned to OAuth users who haven't completed their profile.
 22:      */
 23:     const INCOMPLETE_PHONE = '0000000000';
 24: 
 25:     /**
 26:      * Check if the user's profile is incomplete (e.g. OAuth user who hasn't set their phone).
 27:      */
 28:     public function hasIncompleteProfile(): bool
 29:     {
 30:         return $this->phone === self::INCOMPLETE_PHONE;
 31:     }
 32: 
 33:     /**
 34:      * Get the options for recording activity.
 35:      */
 36:     public function getActivitylogOptions(): LogOptions
 37:     {
 38:         return LogOptions::defaults()
 39:             ->logOnly(['name', 'email', 'phone', 'company_name', 'role']) // Do not log password
 40:             ->logOnlyDirty()
 41:             ->dontSubmitEmptyLogs();
 42:     }
 43: 
 44:     /**
 45:      * The attributes that are mass assignable.
 46:      *
 47:      * @var list<string>
 48:      */
 49:     protected $fillable = [
 50:         'name',
 51:         'email',
 52:         'phone',
 53:         'company_name',
 54:         'role',
 55:         'password',
 56:         'google_id',
 57:         'avatar',
 58:     ];
 59: 
 60:     /**
 61:      * The attributes that should be hidden for serialization.
 62:      *
 63:      * @var list<string>
 64:      */
 65:     protected $hidden = [
 66:         'password',
 67:         'remember_token',
 68:     ];
 69: 
 70:     /**
 71:      * The accessors to append to the model's array form.
 72:      *
 73:      * @var list<string>
 74:      */
 75:     protected $appends = [
 76:         'phone_country',
 77:     ];
 78: 
 79:     /**
 80:      * Get the attributes that should be cast.
 81:      *
 82:      * @return array<string, string>
 83:      */
 84:     protected function casts(): array
 85:     {
 86:         return [
 87:             'email_verified_at' => 'datetime',
 88:             'password' => 'hashed',
 89:             'role' => UserRole::class,
 90:         ];
 91:     }
 92: 
 93:     /**
 94:      * Check if user is at least admin (admin or superadmin).
 95:      */
 96:     public function isAdmin(): bool
 97:     {
 98:         return $this->role->hasAccess(UserRole::Admin);
 99:     }
100: 
101:     /**
102:      * Check if user is superadmin.
103:      */
104:     public function isSuperAdmin(): bool
105:     {
106:         return $this->role === UserRole::SuperAdmin;
107:     }
108: 
109:     /**
110:      * Get the data requests belonging to this user.
111:      */
112:     public function dataRequests()
113:     {
114:         return $this->hasMany(DataRequest::class);
115:     }
116: 
117:     /**
118:      * Send the email verification notification using a queued background job.
119:      */
120:     public function sendEmailVerificationNotification(): void
121:     {
122:         $this->notify(new \App\Notifications\QueuedVerifyEmail);
123:     }
124: 
125:     /**
126:      * Infer ISO2 country from stored E.164 phone number for frontend prefill.
127:      */
128:     public function getPhoneCountryAttribute(): string
129:     {
130:         if (empty($this->phone) || $this->phone === self::INCOMPLETE_PHONE) {
131:             return 'ID';
132:         }
133: 
134:         try {
135:             return phone($this->phone)->getCountry() ?? 'ID';
136:         } catch (\Throwable) {
137:             return 'ID';
138:         }
139:     }
140: }

File: app/Notifications/ComplaintMarkedAsResolvedNotification.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Notifications;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 6: use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable;
 7: use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
 8: use Illuminate\Notifications\Messages\MailMessage;
 9: use Illuminate\Notifications\Notification;
10: 
11: class ComplaintMarkedAsResolvedNotification extends Notification implements ShouldQueue
12: {
13:     use Queueable;
14: 
15:     public function __construct(public DataRequest $dataRequest)
16:     {
17:     }
18: 
19:     public function via(object $notifiable): array
20:     {
21:         return ['mail'];
22:     }
23: 
24:     public function toMail(object $notifiable): MailMessage
25:     {
26:         $code = $this->dataRequest->request_code;
27:         $url = url('/data-requests/' . $this->dataRequest->id);
28: 
29:         return (new MailMessage)
30:             ->subject("Tindak Lanjut Feedback - {$code}")
31:             ->greeting('Halo ' . $notifiable->name . ',')
32:             ->line('Terima kasih atas feedback Anda untuk permohonan **' . $code . '**.')
33:             ->line('Setelah kami lakukan peninjauan, data yang telah dikirim dinyatakan **sudah sesuai** dari sisi admin.')
34:             ->line('Jika Anda masih ingin menyampaikan komplain lanjutan, silakan hubungi CS melalui WhatsApp pada kontak yang tersedia di halaman detail permohonan.')
35:             ->action('Lihat Detail Permohonan', $url)
36:             ->line('Salam, Tim BMKG Stasiun Geofisika Bandung')
37:             ->salutation(' ');
38:     }
39: }

================
File: app/Notifications/ComplaintRevisedDataNotification.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Notifications;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\SurveyType;
 6: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 7: use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable;
 8: use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
 9: use Illuminate\Notifications\Messages\MailMessage;
10: use Illuminate\Notifications\Notification;
11: 
12: class ComplaintRevisedDataNotification extends Notification implements ShouldQueue
13: {
14:     use Queueable;
15: 
16:     public function __construct(public DataRequest $dataRequest)
17:     {
18:     }
19: 
20:     public function via(object $notifiable): array
21:     {
22:         return ['mail'];
23:     }
24: 
25:     public function toMail(object $notifiable): MailMessage
26:     {
27:         $code = $this->dataRequest->request_code;
28:         $url = url('/data-requests/' . $this->dataRequest->id);
29:         $requiredSurveyLabels = $this->requiredSurveyLabels();
30: 
31:         $mail = (new MailMessage)
32:             ->subject("Tindak Lanjut Feedback Tersedia - {$code}")
33:             ->greeting('Halo ' . $notifiable->name . ',')
34:             ->line('Feedback Anda untuk permohonan **' . $code . '** telah ditindaklanjuti oleh tim BMKG.')
35:             ->line('Admin telah mengunggah revisi data berdasarkan masukan Anda. Silakan login ke portal untuk meninjau pembaruan tersebut.');
36: 
37:         if ($requiredSurveyLabels !== '') {
38:             $mail->line('Jika data sudah sesuai, lengkapi survei berikut agar akses unduh dibuka: **' . $requiredSurveyLabels . '**.');
39:         } else {
40:             $mail->line('Jika data sudah sesuai, Anda dapat langsung mengunduhnya melalui portal.');
41:         }
42: 
43:         return $mail
44:             ->action('Lihat Detail Permohonan', $url)
45:             ->line('Jika masih ada kendala lanjutan, silakan hubungi CS melalui kontak yang tersedia pada halaman detail permohonan.')
46:             ->line('Salam, **Tim BMKG Stasiun Geofisika Bandung**')
47:             ->salutation(' ');
48:     }
49: 
50:     public function toArray(object $notifiable): array
51:     {
52:         return [];
53:     }
54: 
55:     private function requiredSurveyLabels(): string
56:     {
57:         return collect($this->dataRequest->effective_required_surveys)
58:             ->map(fn (string $surveyType) => SurveyType::tryFrom($surveyType)?->label() ?? strtoupper($surveyType))
59:             ->implode(', ');
60:     }
61: }

================

================
File: app/Notifications/DataRequestStatusNotification.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Notifications;
  4: 
  5: use App\Enums\PurposeType;
  6: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
  7: use App\Enums\SurveyType;
  8: use App\Models\DataRequest;
  9: use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable;
 10: use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
 11: use Illuminate\Notifications\Messages\MailMessage;
 12: use Illuminate\Notifications\Notification;
 13: 
 14: class DataRequestStatusNotification extends Notification implements ShouldQueue
 15: {
 16:     use Queueable;
 17: 
 18:     public function __construct(public DataRequest $dataRequest)
 19:     {
 20:     }
 21: 
 22:     public function via(object $notifiable): array
 23:     {
 24:         return ['mail'];
 25:     }
 26: 
 27:     public function toMail(object $notifiable): MailMessage
 28:     {
 29:         $code = $this->dataRequest->request_code;
 30:         $status = $this->dataRequest->status;
 31:         $url = url('/data-requests/' . $this->dataRequest->id);
 32:         $isCommercial = $this->dataRequest->purpose_type === PurposeType::Commercial;
 33:         $requiredSurveyLabels = $this->requiredSurveyLabels();
 34: 
 35:         [$subject, $lines] = match ($status) {
 36:             RequestStatus::PaymentRequired => [
 37:                 "Permohonan Disetujui - {$code}",
 38:                 [
 39:                     'Permohonan data Anda dengan nomor tiket **' . $code . '** telah **disetujui** oleh tim BMKG.',
 40:                     'Silakan lakukan pembayaran sesuai ketentuan PNBP yang berlaku untuk melanjutkan proses permohonan Anda.',
 41:                     'Pastikan pembayaran dilakukan sebelum batas waktu yang ditentukan agar permohonan tidak kedaluwarsa.',
 42:                 ],
 43:             ],
 44:             RequestStatus::Rejected => [
 45:                 "Permohonan Ditolak - {$code}",
 46:                 [
 47:                     'Mohon maaf, permohonan data Anda dengan nomor tiket **' . $code . '** telah **ditolak**.',
 48:                     '**Alasan Penolakan:** ' . ($this->dataRequest->rejection_reason ?? '-'),
 49:                     'Silakan periksa kembali kelengkapan dokumen dan ajukan ulang jika diperlukan.',
 50:                 ],
 51:             ],
 52:             RequestStatus::PaymentInvalid => [
 53:                 "Pembayaran Tidak Valid - {$code}",
 54:                 [
 55:                     'Mohon maaf, pembayaran untuk permohonan **' . $code . '** tidak valid.',
 56:                     '**Alasan:** ' . ($this->dataRequest->rejection_reason ?? '-'),
 57:                     'Silakan unnggah ulang bukti pembayaran atau ajukan ulang permohonan jika diperlukan.',
 58:                 ],
 59:             ],
 60:             RequestStatus::PaymentVerified => [
 61:                 "Data Sedang Diproses - {$code}",
 62:                 [
 63:                     'Pembayaran untuk permohonan data Anda dengan nomor tiket **' . $code . '** telah **dikonfirmasi** oleh tim BMKG.',
 64:                     'Permohonan Anda langsung masuk tahap pemrosesan. Kami akan menginformasikan kembali ketika data sudah siap untuk diunduh.',
 65:                 ],
 66:             ],
 67:             RequestStatus::Expired => [
 68:                 "Permohonan Kedaluwarsa - {$code}",
 69:                 [
 70:                     'Permohonan data Anda dengan nomor tiket **' . $code . '** telah **kedaluwarsa**.',
 71:                     'Batas waktu pembayaran telah habis. Silakan ajukan permohonan baru jika masih diperlukan.',
 72:                 ],
 73:             ],
 74:             RequestStatus::Processing => $isCommercial
 75:             ? [
 76:                 "Data Sedang Diproses - {$code}",
 77:                 [
 78:                     'Permohonan data **' . $code . '** sedang **diproses** oleh tim BMKG.',
 79:                     'Kami akan menginformasikan kembali ketika data sudah siap diunduh.',
 80:                 ],
 81:             ]
 82:             : [
 83:                 "Permohonan Disetujui - {$code}",
 84:                 [
 85:                     'Permohonan data Anda dengan nomor tiket **' . $code . '** telah **disetujui** oleh tim BMKG.',
 86:                     'Permohonan Anda tidak dikenakan biaya dan saat ini sedang **diproses** oleh tim BMKG.',
 87:                     'Kami akan menginformasikan kembali ketika data sudah siap diunduh.',
 88:                 ],
 89:             ],
 90:             RequestStatus::Completed => $requiredSurveyLabels !== ''
 91:                 ? [
 92:                     "Data Siap, Lengkapi Survei - {$code}",
 93:                     [
 94:                         'Data untuk permohonan **' . $code . '** sudah selesai diproses oleh tim BMKG.',
 95:                         'Sebelum akses unduh dibuka, silakan tinjau data Anda lalu lengkapi survei berikut melalui portal: **' . $requiredSurveyLabels . '**.',
 96:                         'Setelah survei diisi, unggah bukti screenshot agar admin dapat melakukan verifikasi.',
 97:                     ],
 98:                 ]
 99:                 : [
100:                     "Data Siap Diunduh - {$code}",
101:                     [
102:                         'Data untuk permohonan **' . $code . '** sudah **siap diunduh**.',
103:                         'Silakan login ke portal dan unduh data Anda melalui tautan di bawah ini.',
104:                     ],
105:                 ],
106:             default => [
107:                 "Permohonan Diperbarui - {$code}",
108:                 [
109:                     'Status permohonan data Anda dengan nomor tiket **' . $code . '** telah diperbarui.',
110:                     'Anda dapat melihat detail permohonan melalui tautan di bawah ini.',
111:                 ],
112:             ],
113:         };
114: 
115:         $mail = (new MailMessage)
116:             ->subject($subject)
117:             ->greeting('Halo ' . $notifiable->name . ',');
118: 
119:         foreach ($lines as $line) {
120:             $mail->line($line);
121:         }
122: 
123:         return $mail
124:             ->action('Lihat Detail Permohonan', $url)
125:             ->line('Terima kasih telah menggunakan layanan BMKG.')
126:             ->line('Salam, **Tim BMKG Stasiun Geofisika Bandung**')
127:             ->salutation(' ');
128:     }
129: 
130:     public function toArray(object $notifiable): array
131:     {
132:         return [];
133:     }
134: 
135:     private function requiredSurveyLabels(): string
136:     {
137:         return collect($this->dataRequest->effective_required_surveys)
138:             ->map(fn (string $surveyType) => SurveyType::tryFrom($surveyType)?->label() ?? strtoupper($surveyType))
139:             ->implode(', ');
140:     }
141: }

================
File: app/Notifications/InvoiceAvailableNotification.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Notifications;
 4: 
 5: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 6: use App\Models\Invoice;
 7: use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable;
 8: use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
 9: use Illuminate\Notifications\Messages\MailMessage;
10: use Illuminate\Notifications\Notification;
11: 
12: class InvoiceAvailableNotification extends Notification implements ShouldQueue
13: {
14:     use Queueable;
15: 
16:     public function __construct(
17:         public DataRequest $dataRequest,
18:         public Invoice $invoice,
19:     ) {
20:     }
21: 
22:     public function via(object $notifiable): array
23:     {
24:         return ['mail'];
25:     }
26: 
27:     public function toMail(object $notifiable): MailMessage
28:     {
29:         $code = $this->dataRequest->request_code;
30:         $url = url('/data-requests/' . $this->dataRequest->id);
31: 
32:         $mail = (new MailMessage)
33:             ->subject("Tagihan Pembayaran Tersedia - {$code}")
34:             ->greeting('Halo ' . $notifiable->name . ',')
35:             ->line('Tagihan pembayaran untuk permohonan **' . $code . '** sudah tersedia di portal BMKG.');
36: 
37:         if ($this->invoice->amount !== null) {
38:             $mail->line('**Nominal:** Rp ' . number_format((float) $this->invoice->amount, 0, ',', '.'));
39:         }
40: 
41:         if ($this->invoice->billing_code) {
42:             $mail->line('**Kode Billing:** ' . $this->invoice->billing_code);
43:         }
44: 
45:         if ($this->invoice->expires_at) {
46:             $mail->line('Silakan lakukan pembayaran sebelum **' . $this->invoice->expires_at->translatedFormat('d F Y H:i') . '** agar permohonan tidak kedaluwarsa.');
47:         }
48: 
49:         return $mail
50:             ->action('Lihat Detail Tagihan', $url)
51:             ->line('Terima kasih telah menggunakan layanan BMKG.')
52:             ->line('Salam, **Tim BMKG Stasiun Geofisika Bandung**')
53:             ->salutation(' ');
54:     }
55: 
56:     public function toArray(object $notifiable): array
57:     {
58:         return [];
59:     }
60: }

================
File: app/Notifications/SurveyApprovedDownloadReadyNotification.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Notifications;
 4: 
 5: use App\Enums\SurveyType;
 6: use App\Models\DataRequest;
 7: use App\Models\Survey;
 8: use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable;
 9: use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
10: use Illuminate\Notifications\Messages\MailMessage;
11: use Illuminate\Notifications\Notification;
12: 
13: class SurveyApprovedDownloadReadyNotification extends Notification implements ShouldQueue
14: {
15:     use Queueable;
16: 
17:     public function __construct(
18:         public DataRequest $dataRequest,
19:         public Survey $survey,
20:         public bool $allCompleted = true,
21:     ) {
22:     }
23: 
24:     public function via(object $notifiable): array
25:     {
26:         return ['mail'];
27:     }
28: 
29:     public function toMail(object $notifiable): MailMessage
30:     {
31:         $code = $this->dataRequest->request_code;
32:         $url = url('/data-requests/' . $this->dataRequest->id);
33: 
34:         if ($this->allCompleted) {
35:             return (new MailMessage)
36:                 ->subject("Survei Disetujui, Data Siap Diunduh - {$code}")
37:                 ->greeting('Halo ' . $notifiable->name . ',')
38:                 ->line('Bukti untuk **' . $this->surveyLabel() . '** pada permohonan **' . $code . '** telah **disetujui** oleh admin.')
39:                 ->line('Seluruh persyaratan survei sudah terpenuhi, sehingga data Anda sekarang **siap diunduh** melalui portal BMKG.')
40:                 ->action('Lihat Detail Permohonan', $url)
41:                 ->line('Terima kasih telah menggunakan layanan BMKG.')
42:                 ->line('Salam, **Tim BMKG Stasiun Geofisika Bandung**')
43:                 ->salutation(' ');
44:         }
45: 
46:         $remainingLabels = $this->remainingSurveyLabels();
47: 
48:         return (new MailMessage)
49:             ->subject("Bukti Survei Disetujui - {$code}")
50:             ->greeting('Halo ' . $notifiable->name . ',')
51:             ->line('Bukti untuk **' . $this->surveyLabel() . '** pada permohonan **' . $code . '** telah **disetujui** oleh admin.')
52:             ->line('Untuk membuka akses unduh data, silakan lengkapi survei berikut: **' . $remainingLabels . '**.')
53:             ->line('Setelah survei diisi, unggah bukti screenshot agar admin dapat melakukan verifikasi.')
54:             ->action('Lihat Detail Permohonan', $url)
55:             ->line('Terima kasih telah menggunakan layanan BMKG.')
56:             ->line('Salam, **Tim BMKG Stasiun Geofisika Bandung**')
57:             ->salutation(' ');
58:     }
59: 
60:     public function toArray(object $notifiable): array
61:     {
62:         return [];
63:     }
64: 
65:     private function surveyLabel(): string
66:     {
67:         $surveyType = $this->survey->survey_type;
68: 
69:         if ($surveyType instanceof SurveyType) {
70:             return $surveyType->label();
71:         }
72: 
73:         return SurveyType::tryFrom((string) $surveyType)?->label() ?? strtoupper((string) $surveyType);
74:     }
75: 
76:     private function remainingSurveyLabels(): string
77:     {
78:         $requiredTypes = $this->dataRequest->effective_required_surveys;
79:         $approvedType = $this->survey->survey_type->value ?? $this->survey->survey_type;
80: 
81:         return collect($requiredTypes)
82:             ->reject(fn (string $type) => $type === $approvedType)
83:             ->map(fn (string $type) => SurveyType::tryFrom($type)?->label() ?? strtoupper($type))
84:             ->implode(', ');
85:     }
86: }

 3: namespace App\Notifications;

20:     ) {

================
File: app/Policies/DataRequestPolicy.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Policies;
  4: 
  5: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
  6: use App\Models\DataRequest;
  7: use App\Models\User;
  8: 
  9: class DataRequestPolicy
 10: {
 11:     /**
 12:      * Any authenticated user can view the list (scoped to own in controller).
 13:      */
 14:     public function viewAny(User $user): bool
 15:     {
 16:         return true;
 17:     }
 18: 
 19:     /**
 20:      * Users can view their own requests. Admin can view all.
 21:      */
 22:     public function view(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
 23:     {
 24:         return $user->id === $dataRequest->user_id || $user->isAdmin();
 25:     }
 26: 
 27:     /**
 28:      * Any authenticated + verified user can create a request.
 29:      */
 30:     public function create(User $user): bool
 31:     {
 32:         return true;
 33:     }
 34: 
 35:     /**
 36:      * Only admin can verify (approve/reject) requests.
 37:      */
 38:     public function verify(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
 39:     {
 40:         return $user->isAdmin() && $dataRequest->status !== RequestStatus::Completed;
 41:     }
 42: 
 43:     /**
 44:      * Admin can upload an invoice when payment is required (or about to be).
 45:      */
 46:     public function uploadInvoice(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
 47:     {
 48:         return $user->isAdmin() && in_array($dataRequest->status, [RequestStatus::Pending, RequestStatus::PaymentRequired]);
 49:     }
 50: 
 51:     /**
 52:      * Admin can edit invoice payment details (OCR correction) as long as the
 53:      * request hasn't been rejected. This is intentionally broader than
 54:      * uploadInvoice because correcting extracted data can happen at any stage.
 55:      */
 56:     public function updateInvoicePaymentDetails(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
 57:     {
 58:         return $user->isAdmin()
 59:             && !in_array($dataRequest->status, [RequestStatus::Pending, RequestStatus::Rejected]);
 60:     }
 61: 
 62:     /**
 63:      * User can upload proof if payment is required or was marked invalid.
 64:      * Note: Allowing Expired status is an intentional design choice so users can 
 65:      * upload proof for an expired invoice before hitting the request new invoice button.
 66:      */
 67:     public function uploadPaymentProof(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
 68:     {
 69:         return $user->id === $dataRequest->user_id
 70:             && in_array($dataRequest->status, [RequestStatus::PaymentRequired, RequestStatus::PaymentInvalid, RequestStatus::Expired,]);
 71:     }
 72: 
 73:     /**
 74:      * Admin can verify the uploaded proof.
 75:      */
 76:     public function verifyPayment(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
 77:     {
 78:         return $user->isAdmin() && $dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::PaymentVerifying;
 79:     }
 80: 
 81:     /**
 82:      * Admin can start processing once payment is verified.
 83:      */
 84:     public function process(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
 85:     {
 86:         return $user->isAdmin() && in_array($dataRequest->status, [RequestStatus::PaymentVerified, RequestStatus::Processing]);
 87:     }
 88: 
 89:     /**
 90:      * Admin can upload processed result files when request is being processed or already completed.
 91:      */
 92:     public function uploadProcessedData(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
 93:     {
 94:         return $user->isAdmin() && in_array($dataRequest->status, [RequestStatus::Processing, RequestStatus::Completed]);
 95:     }
 96: 
 97:     /**
 98:      * Admin can mark complaint as resolved for requests that already have user feedback.
 99:      */
100:     public function resolveComplaint(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
101:     {
102:         return $user->isAdmin()
103:             && !is_null($dataRequest->user_feedback)
104:             && in_array($dataRequest->status, [RequestStatus::Processing, RequestStatus::Completed]);
105:     }
106: 
107:     /**
108:      * Users can submit one-time feedback if request is completed and no previous feedback exists.
109:      */
110:     public function submitFeedback(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
111:     {
112:         return $user->id === $dataRequest->user_id
113:             && $dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::Completed
114:             && is_null($dataRequest->user_feedback);
115:     }
116: 
117:     /**
118:      * Users can download documents associated with their own requests.
119:      * Admins can download any documents.
120:      */
121:     public function downloadDocument(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest, ?\App\Models\RequestDocument $document = null): bool
122:     {
123:         if ($user->isAdmin()) {
124:             return true;
125:         }
126: 
127:         if ($user->id !== $dataRequest->user_id) {
128:             return false;
129:         }
130: 
131:         if ($document && $document->document_type === 'processed_data_result') {
132:             return $dataRequest->are_surveys_completed;
133:         }
134: 
135:         return true;
136:     }
137: 
138:     /**
139:      * User can request a new invoice if the current one has expired.
140:      */
141:     public function requestNewInvoice(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
142:     {
143:         return $user->id === $dataRequest->user_id
144:             && $dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::Expired;
145:     }
146: 
147:     /**
148:      * Users and Admins can download all processed data as zip.
149:      */
150:     public function downloadAllProcessedData(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
151:     {
152:         return ($user->id === $dataRequest->user_id || $user->isAdmin())
153:             && in_array($dataRequest->status, [RequestStatus::Processing, RequestStatus::Completed])
154:             && ($user->isAdmin() || $dataRequest->are_surveys_completed);
155:     }
156: 
157:     /**
158:      * Users can submit a survey if request is Completed.
159:      */
160:     public function submitSurvey(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
161:     {
162:         return $user->id === $dataRequest->user_id
163:             && $dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::Completed;
164:     }
165: 
166:     /**
167:      * Only admin can verify surveys.
168:      */
169:     public function verifySurvey(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
170:     {
171:         return $user->isAdmin();
172:     }
173: 
174:     /**
175:      * Users can view their own survey proof, admins can view any.
176:      */
177:     public function viewSurveyProof(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
178:     {
179:         return $user->id === $dataRequest->user_id || $user->isAdmin();
180:     }
181: 
182:     /**
183:      * User can upload product if they own the request, it's completed, and it's non-commercial
184:      */
185:     public function uploadProduct(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
186:     {
187:         return $user->id === $dataRequest->user_id
188:             && $dataRequest->status === RequestStatus::Completed
189:             && in_array($dataRequest->purpose_type, [
190:                 \App\Enums\PurposeType::NonCommercialIndividu,
191:                 \App\Enums\PurposeType::NonCommercialInstansi,
192:             ]);
193:     }
194: 
195:     /**
196:      * User can delete their own product uploads, admin can delete any
197:      */
198:     public function deleteProductUpload(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
199:     {
200:         return $user->id === $dataRequest->user_id || $user->isAdmin();
201:     }
202: 
203:     /**
204:      * User/admin can view/download
205:      */
206:     public function viewProductUpload(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
207:     {
208:         return $user->id === $dataRequest->user_id || $user->isAdmin();
209:     }
210: 
211:     /**
212:      * Admin can export data requests.
213:      */
214:     public function export(User $user): bool
215:     {
216:         return $user->isAdmin();
217:     }
218: 
219:     /**
220:      * Admin can update required surveys for a request that is being processed or completed.
221:      */
222:     public function updateRequiredSurveys(User $user, DataRequest $dataRequest): bool
223:     {
224:         return $user->isAdmin()
225:             && in_array($dataRequest->status, [RequestStatus::Processing, RequestStatus::Completed]);
226:     }
227: }

================
File: app/Providers/AppServiceProvider.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Providers;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Vite;
 6: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\URL;
 7: use Illuminate\Support\ServiceProvider;
 8: use Illuminate\Auth\Notifications\VerifyEmail;
 9: use Illuminate\Auth\Notifications\ResetPassword;
10: use Illuminate\Notifications\Messages\MailMessage;
11: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Event;
12: use Illuminate\Auth\Events\Login;
13: use Illuminate\Auth\Events\Failed;
14: use Illuminate\Auth\Events\Logout;
15: use Illuminate\Auth\Events\Lockout;
16: use App\Listeners\LogAuthenticationEvents;
17: 
18: class AppServiceProvider extends ServiceProvider
19: {
20:     /**
21:      * Register any application services.
22:      */
23:     public function register(): void
24:     {
25:         // Chatbot service bindings
26:         $this->app->singleton(\App\Services\Contracts\LLMServiceInterface::class, function ($app) {
27:             $provider = (string) config('chatbot.llm.provider', 'gemini');
28: 
29:             return match ($provider) {
30:                 'nim' => $app->make(\App\Services\Chatbot\NvidiaNimLLMService::class),
31:                 default => $app->make(\App\Services\Chatbot\LLMService::class),
32:             };
33:         });
34:         $this->app->singleton(\App\Services\Contracts\VectorStoreInterface::class, \App\Services\Chatbot\VectorStoreService::class);
35:     }
36: 
37:     /**
38:      * Bootstrap any application services.
39:      */
40:     public function boot(): void
41:     {
42:         Vite::prefetch(concurrency: 3);
43: 
44:         Event::listen(Login::class, LogAuthenticationEvents::class);
45:         Event::listen(Failed::class, LogAuthenticationEvents::class);
46:         Event::listen(Logout::class, LogAuthenticationEvents::class);
47:         Event::listen(Lockout::class, LogAuthenticationEvents::class);
48:         if (env('APP_ENV') !== 'local' || str_contains(env('APP_URL'), 'ngrok')) {
49:             URL::forceScheme('https');
50:             URL::forceRootUrl(config('app.url'));
51:         }
52: 
53:         // 1. Kustomisasi Email Verifikasi Akun
54:         VerifyEmail::toMailUsing(function (object $notifiable, string $url) {
55:             return (new MailMessage)
56:                 ->subject('Aktivasi Akun - Web BMKG Data Request')
57:                 ->greeting('Halo, ' . $notifiable->name . '!')
58:                 ->line('Terima kasih telah mendaftar di layanan permintaan data Stasiun Geofisika Bandung.')
59:                 ->line('Silakan klik tombol di bawah ini untuk memverifikasi alamat email Anda.')
60:                 ->action('Verifikasi Akun', $url)
61:                 ->line('Link verifikasi ini akan kedaluwarsa dalam waktu 60 menit.')
62:                 ->line('Jika Anda tidak merasa mendaftar, abaikan email ini.')
63:                 ->salutation('Salam, Admin BMKG Bandung');
64:         });
65: 
66:         // 2. Kustomisasi Email Reset Password (Lupa Password)
67:         ResetPassword::toMailUsing(function (object $notifiable, string $token) {
68:             $url = url(route('password.reset', [
69:                 'token' => $token,
70:                 'email' => $notifiable->getEmailForPasswordReset(),
71:             ], false));
72: 
73:             return (new MailMessage)
74:                 ->subject('Permintaan Reset Password')
75:                 ->greeting('Halo!')
76:                 ->line('Kami menerima permintaan untuk mengatur ulang kata sandi akun Anda.')
77:                 ->action('Atur Ulang Password', $url)
78:                 ->line('Link ini akan kedaluwarsa dalam 60 menit.')
79:                 ->line('Jika Anda tidak merasa meminta reset password, abaikan saja email ini.')
80:                 ->salutation('Salam, Admin BMKG Bandung');
81:         });
82: 
83:     }
84: }

================
File: app/Services/AdminDataRequestService.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Services;
  4: 
  5: use App\Enums\InvoiceStatus;
  6: use App\Enums\RequestStatus;
  7: use App\Enums\SurveyStatus;
  8: use App\Models\DataRequest;
  9: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Builder;
 10: 
 11: class AdminDataRequestService
 12: {
 13:     public function getDashboardStats(): object
 14:     {
 15:         $stats = DataRequest::query()
 16:             ->selectRaw('COUNT(*) as total')
 17:             ->selectRaw("SUM(CASE WHEN status = ? THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending", [RequestStatus::Pending->value])
 18:             ->selectRaw("SUM(CASE WHEN status = ? THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as payment_required", [RequestStatus::PaymentRequired->value])
 19:             ->selectRaw("SUM(CASE WHEN status = ? THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as payment_invalid", [RequestStatus::PaymentInvalid->value])
 20:             ->selectRaw("SUM(CASE WHEN status = ? THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as expired", [RequestStatus::Expired->value])
 21:             ->selectRaw("SUM(CASE WHEN status = ? AND user_feedback IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as data_processing", [RequestStatus::Processing->value])
 22:             ->selectRaw("SUM(CASE WHEN status = ? AND user_feedback IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as complaint", [RequestStatus::Processing->value])
 23:             ->selectRaw("SUM(CASE WHEN status = ? THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected", [RequestStatus::Rejected->value])
 24:             ->first();
 25: 
 26:         $paymentVerifyingCount = DataRequest::query()
 27:             ->where(function (Builder $query) {
 28:                 $query->where('status', RequestStatus::PaymentVerifying->value)
 29:                     ->orWhereHas('invoices', function (Builder $invoiceQuery) {
 30:                         $invoiceQuery->where('status', InvoiceStatus::Verifying->value);
 31:                     });
 32:             })
 33:             ->count();
 34:
