 35:         $invoiceReissueRequestedCount = DataRequest::query()
 36:             ->where('status', RequestStatus::PaymentRequired->value)
 37:             ->whereHas('activeInvoice', function (Builder $invoiceQuery) {
 38:                 $invoiceQuery->where('status', InvoiceStatus::Expired->value);
 39:             })
 40:             ->count();
 41: 
 42:         $completedRequests = DataRequest::query()
 43:             ->where('status', RequestStatus::Completed->value)
 44:             ->with(['surveys:id,data_request_id,survey_type,status'])
 45:             ->get();
 46: 
 47:         $surveyRejectedCount = 0;
 48:         $surveyVerificationCount = 0;
 49:         $surveyWaitingInputCount = 0;
 50:         $completedCount = 0;
 51: 
 52:         foreach ($completedRequests as $completedRequest) {
 53:             $completedStatusKey = $this->resolveCompletedSurveyStatus($completedRequest);
 54: 
 55:             if ($completedStatusKey === 'survey_rejected') {
 56:                 $surveyRejectedCount++;
 57:                 continue;
 58:             }
 59: 
 60:             if ($completedStatusKey === 'survey_verification') {
 61:                 $surveyVerificationCount++;
 62:                 continue;
 63:             }
 64: 
 65:             if ($completedStatusKey === 'survey_waiting_input') {
 66:                 $surveyWaitingInputCount++;
 67:                 continue;
 68:             }
 69: 
 70:             $completedCount++;
 71:         }
 72: 
 73:         $stats->setAttribute('payment_verifying', $paymentVerifyingCount);
 74:         $stats->setAttribute('invoice_reissue_requested', $invoiceReissueRequestedCount);
 75:         $stats->setAttribute('survey_waiting_input', $surveyWaitingInputCount);
 76:         $stats->setAttribute('survey_verification', $surveyVerificationCount);
 77:         $stats->setAttribute('survey_rejected', $surveyRejectedCount);
 78:         $stats->setAttribute('completed', $completedCount);
 79: 
 80:         return $stats;
 81:     }
 82: 
 83:     public function resolveAdminStatusKey(DataRequest $dataRequest): string
 84:     {
 85:         $requestStatus = $dataRequest->status?->value ?? $dataRequest->status;
 86:         $activeInvoiceStatus = $dataRequest->activeInvoice?->status?->value ?? $dataRequest->activeInvoice?->status;
 87: 
 88:         if (
 89:             $requestStatus === RequestStatus::PaymentRequired->value
 90:             && $activeInvoiceStatus === InvoiceStatus::Expired->value
 91:         ) {
 92:             return 'invoice_reissue_requested';
 93:         }
 94: 
 95:         if ($requestStatus === RequestStatus::Processing->value && !is_null($dataRequest->user_feedback)) {
 96:             return 'complaint';
 97:         }
 98: 
 99:         if ($requestStatus === RequestStatus::Processing->value) {
100:             return 'data_processing';
101:         }
102: 
103:         if ($requestStatus === RequestStatus::Completed->value) {
104:             return $this->resolveCompletedSurveyStatus($dataRequest);
105:         }
106: 
107:         return $requestStatus;
108:     }
109: 
110:     public function resolveCompletedSurveyStatus(DataRequest $dataRequest): string
111:     {
112:         $requiredSurveyTypes = collect($dataRequest->effective_required_surveys)->filter()->unique()->values();
113: 
114:         if ($requiredSurveyTypes->isEmpty()) {
115:             return RequestStatus::Completed->value;
116:         }
117: 
118:         $requiredSurveys = $dataRequest->surveys->filter(function ($survey) use ($requiredSurveyTypes) {
119:             $surveyType = $survey->survey_type?->value ?? $survey->survey_type;
120:             return $requiredSurveyTypes->contains($surveyType);
121:         });
122: 
123:         // If any required survey was rejected, the applicant must resend the survey proof.
124:         // In this case the request should be treated as "waiting for survey input" rather than a separate
125:         // "rejected" state, because the admin's action (rejection) has already been completed and now we wait
126:         // for the user to provide a valid survey proof.
127:         if ($requiredSurveys->contains(fn($survey) => ($survey->status?->value ?? $survey->status) === SurveyStatus::Rejected->value)) {
128:             return 'survey_waiting_input';
129:         }
130: 
131:         if ($requiredSurveys->contains(fn($survey) => ($survey->status?->value ?? $survey->status) === SurveyStatus::Pending->value)) {
132:             return 'survey_verification';
133:         }
134: 
135:         $approvedTypes = $requiredSurveys
136:             ->filter(fn($survey) => ($survey->status?->value ?? $survey->status) === SurveyStatus::Approved->value)
137:             ->map(fn($survey) => $survey->survey_type?->value ?? $survey->survey_type)
138:             ->unique()
139:             ->values();
140: 
141:         if ($approvedTypes->count() < $requiredSurveyTypes->count()) {
142:             return 'survey_waiting_input';
143:         }
144: 
145:         return RequestStatus::Completed->value;
146:     }
147: }

================
File: app/Services/CatalogService.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: declare(strict_types=1);
 4: 
 5: namespace App\Services;
 6: 
 7: use App\Models\CatalogItem;
 8: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Collection;
 9: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache;
10: 
11: class CatalogService
12: {
13:     public function all(): Collection
14:     {
15:         return CatalogItem::query()
16:             ->with('catalogCategory')
17:             ->orderBy('title')
18:             ->get();
19:     }
20: 
21:     public function forFrontend(): Collection
22:     {
23:         return Cache::rememberForever('catalog_items.active', function () {
24:             return CatalogItem::query()
25:                 ->with('catalogCategory')
26:                 ->active()
27:                 ->orderBy('title')
28:                 ->get();
29:         });
30:     }
31: 
32:     public function createCatalogItem(array $data): CatalogItem
33:     {
34:         $catalogItem = new CatalogItem();
35:         $this->fillCatalogItem($catalogItem, $data);
36:         $catalogItem->save();
37: 
38:         $this->clearCache();
39: 
40:         return $catalogItem;
41:     }
42: 
43:     public function updateCatalogItem(CatalogItem $catalogItem, array $data): CatalogItem
44:     {
45:         $this->fillCatalogItem($catalogItem, $data);
46:         $catalogItem->save();
47: 
48:         $this->clearCache();
49: 
50:         return $catalogItem;
51:     }
52: 
53:     public function deleteCatalogItem(CatalogItem $catalogItem): void
54:     {
55:         $catalogItem->delete();
56: 
57:         $this->clearCache();
58:     }
59: 
60:     public function clearCache(): void
61:     {
62:         Cache::forget('catalog_items.active');
63:     }
64: 
65:     /**
66:      * Refresh cached catalog knowledge after changes.
67:      */
68:     public function refreshKnowledge(): void
69:     {
70:         $this->clearCache();
71:         $this->forFrontend();
72:     }
73: 
74:     private function fillCatalogItem(CatalogItem $catalogItem, array $data): void
75:     {
76:         $catalogItem->catalog_category_id = $data['category_id'];
77:         $catalogItem->title = $data['title'];
78:         $catalogItem->price = $data['price'];
79:         $catalogItem->unit = $data['unit'];
80:         $catalogItem->is_active = $data['is_active'] ?? true;
81:     }
82: }

================
File: app/Services/Chatbot/CacheService.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: declare(strict_types=1);
  4: 
  5: namespace App\Services\Chatbot;
  6: 
  7: use App\Models\CachedQaPair;
  8: use App\Services\Contracts\VectorStoreInterface;
  9: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
 10: 
 11: class CacheService
 12: {
 13:     private VectorStoreInterface $vectorStore;
 14:     private float $threshold;
 15: 
 16:     public function __construct(VectorStoreInterface $vectorStore)
 17:     {
 18:         $this->vectorStore = $vectorStore;
 19:         $this->threshold = config('chatbot.cache.similarity_threshold', 0.7);
 20:     }
 21: 
 22:     /**
 23:      * Try to get a cached answer for a similar question.
 24:      *
 25:      * @param string $question The user's question
 26:      * @return array{answer: string, sources: array}|null Cached result or null
 27:      */
 28:     public function get(string $question): ?array
 29:     {
 30:         if (!config('chatbot.cache.enabled', true)) {
 31:             return null;
 32:         }
 33: 
 34:         // First try exact/match within 30 days
 35:         $exactMatch = $this->findExactMatch($question);
 36:         if ($exactMatch !== null) {
 37:             $this->incrementHitCount($exactMatch);
 38:             Log::info('CacheService: Exact match found', ['question' => $question]);
 39:             return $exactMatch;
 40:         }
 41: 
 42:         // Try semantic similarity match
 43:         $semanticMatch = $this->findSimilarMatch($question);
 44:         if ($semanticMatch !== null) {
 45:             if ($this->looksLikeDegenerateMatch($question, $semanticMatch['answer'] ?? '')) {
 46:                 Log::warning('CacheService: Ignoring degenerate semantic cache match', [
 47:                     'question' => substr($question, 0, 100),
 48:                     'matched_question' => $semanticMatch['original_question'] ?? '',
 49:                 ]);
 50:                 return null;
 51:             }
 52: 
 53:             $this->incrementHitCount($semanticMatch);
 54:             Log::info('CacheService: Semantic match found', [
 55:                 'question' => $question,
 56:                 'matched_question' => $semanticMatch['original_question'] ?? '',
 57:             ]);
 58:             return $semanticMatch;
 59:         }
 60: 
 61:         return null;
 62:     }
 63: 
 64:     /**
 65:      * Store a new Q&A pair in cache.
 66:      *
 67:      * @param string $question The original question
 68:      * @param string $answer The generated answer
 69:      * @param array $sources Source references
 70:      * @param bool $isVerified Whether this pair is verified
 71:      * @return bool Success status
 72:      */
 73:     public function put(string $question, string $answer, array $sources = [], bool $isVerified = false): bool
 74:     {
 75:         try {
 76:             CachedQaPair::create([
 77:                 'question' => $question,
 78:                 'answer' => $answer,
 79:                 'sources' => $sources,
 80:                 'is_verified' => $isVerified,
 81:                 'hit_count' => 0,
 82:                 'rating_sum' => 0,
 83:                 'rating_count' => 0,
 84:             ]);
 85: 
 86:             Log::info('CacheService: Stored new Q&A pair', ['question' => substr($question, 0, 100)]);
 87:             return true;
 88:         } catch (\Exception $e) {
 89:             Log::error('CacheService: Failed to store Q&A pair', [
 90:                 'message' => $e->getMessage(),
 91:             ]);
 92:             return false;
 93:         }
 94:     }
 95: 
 96:     /**
 97:      * Find an exact or near-exact match in cache.
 98:      *
 99:      * @return array{answer: string, sources: array, original_question: string}|null
100:      */
101:     private function findExactMatch(string $question): ?array
102:     {
103:         // Normalize for comparison
104:         $normalized = $this->normalizeQuestion($question);
105: 
106:         // Direct match check
107:         $match = CachedQaPair::whereRaw('LOWER(question) = ?', [strtolower($question)])
108:             ->orWhereRaw('LOWER(question) = ?', [$normalized])
109:             ->where('created_at', '>=', now()->subDays(30))
110:             ->first();
111: 
112:         if ($match !== null) {
113:             // Ignore low-quality/exact cached fallbacks to avoid poisoning answers.
114:             if ($this->isLowQualityCachedEntry($match)) {
115:                 Log::warning('CacheService: Ignoring low-quality exact cache entry', ['question' => $question, 'matched_question' => $match->question]);
116:                 try {
117:                     $match->delete();
118:                     Log::info('CacheService: Deleted low-quality exact cache entry', ['matched_question' => $match->question]);
119:                 } catch (\Throwable $e) {
120:                     Log::warning('CacheService: Failed to delete low-quality cache entry', ['error' => $e->getMessage()]);
121:                 }
122: 
123:                 return null;
124:             }
125:             return [
126:                 'answer' => $match->answer,
127:                 'sources' => $match->sources ?? [],
128:                 'original_question' => $match->question,
129:             ];
130:         }
131: 
132:         return null;
133:     }
134: 
135:     /**
136:      * Find a semantically similar match using simple keyword overlap.
137:      *
138:      * @return array{answer: string, sources: array, original_question: string}|null
139:      */
140:     private function findSimilarMatch(string $question): ?array
141:     {
142:         // For pilot mode: use database query with word matching
143:         // For scale-up: use vector similarity
144: 
145:         // Get recent unexpired cache entries
146:         $candidates = CachedQaPair::query()
147:             ->where('created_at', '>=', now()->subDays(config('chatbot.cache.max_age_days', 30)))
148:             ->limit(100)
149:             ->get();
150: 
151:         if ($candidates->isEmpty()) {
152:             return null;
153:         }
154: 
155:         $queryWords = $this->extractWords($question);
156:         $bestMatch = null;
157:         $bestScore = 0.0;
158: 
159:         foreach ($candidates as $candidate) {
160:             $candidateWords = $this->extractWords($candidate->question);
161:             $score = $this->calculateWordOverlap($queryWords, $candidateWords);
162:             $overlapCount = count(array_intersect($queryWords, $candidateWords));
163: 
164:             // Require stronger overlap to prevent wrong-answer cache hits.
165:             if ($score > $bestScore && $score >= $this->threshold && $overlapCount >= 2) {
166:                 $bestScore = $score;
167:                 $bestMatch = $candidate;
168:             }
169:         }
170: 
171:         if ($bestMatch !== null) {
172:             // Ignore low-quality semantic cache matches as well
173:             if ($this->isLowQualityCachedEntry($bestMatch)) {
174:                 Log::warning('CacheService: Ignoring low-quality semantic cache match', ['question' => $question, 'matched_question' => $bestMatch->question]);
175:                 try {
176:                     $bestMatch->delete();
177:                     Log::info('CacheService: Deleted low-quality semantic cache entry', ['matched_question' => $bestMatch->question]);
178:                 } catch (\Throwable $e) {
179:                     Log::warning('CacheService: Failed to delete low-quality cache entry', ['error' => $e->getMessage()]);
180:                 }
181: 
182:                 return null;
183:             }
184: 
185:             return [
186:                 'answer' => $bestMatch->answer,
187:                 'sources' => $bestMatch->sources ?? [],
188:                 'original_question' => $bestMatch->question,
189:                 'similarity_score' => round($bestScore, 2),
190:             ];
191:         }
192: 
193:         return null;
194:     }
195: 
196:     /**
197:      * Increment hit count for a cached entry.
198:      *
199:      * @param array<string, mixed> $match
200:      */
201:     private function incrementHitCount(array $match): void
202:     {
203:         if (isset($match['original_question'])) {
204:             CachedQaPair::query()
205:                 ->where('question', $match['original_question'])
206:                 ->update([
207:                     'hit_count' => \DB::raw('hit_count + 1'),
208:                     'last_hit_at' => now(),
209:                 ]);
210:         }
211:     }
212: 
213:     /**
214:      * Normalize question text for comparison.
215:      */
216:     private function normalizeQuestion(string $question): string
217:     {
218:         $text = strtolower($question);
219:         $text = preg_replace('/[^\w\s]/u', '', $text);
220:         $text = preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $text);
221:         return trim($text);
222:     }
223: 
224:     private function looksLikeDegenerateMatch(string $question, string $answer): bool
225:     {
226:         $q = $this->normalizeQuestion($question);
227:         $a = $this->normalizeQuestion($answer);
228: 
229:         if ($q === '' || $a === '') {
230:             return false;
231:         }
232: 
233:         if ($q === $a) {
234:             return true;
235:         }
236: 
237:         // If answer is only a tiny paraphrase/repeat of the question, treat as low quality cache.
238:         return str_contains($a, $q) && strlen($a) <= (strlen($q) + 30);
239:     }
240: 
241:     private function isLowQualityCachedEntry($entry): bool
242:     {
243:         // $entry may be a model instance
244:         $answer = (string) ($entry->answer ?? '');
245:         $sources = $entry->sources ?? [];
246:         $isVerified = $entry->is_verified ?? false;
247: 
248:         // If explicitly verified, consider it acceptable
249:         if ($isVerified) {
250:             return false;
251:         }
252: 
253:         $normalized = $this->normalizeQuestion($answer);
254: 
255:         // If answer is very short or repeats the question, treat as low quality
256:         if ($normalized === '' || strlen($normalized) < 20) {
257:             return true;
258:         }
259: 
260:         // Common fallback phrases that should not be cached
261:         $fallbackPhrases = [
262:             'maaf', 'tidak dapat', 'tidak tersedia', 'tidak tahu', 'saya tidak', 'sedang tidak tersedia', 'silakan coba lagi', 'model ai sedang',
263:         ];
264: 
265:         foreach ($fallbackPhrases as $phrase) {
266:             if (str_contains(mb_strtolower($normalized), $phrase)) {
267:                 return true;
268:             }
269:         }
270: 
271:         // If there are no sources attached, and not verified, treat cautiously.
272:         if (empty($sources)) {
273:             return true;
274:         }
275: 
276:         return false;
277:     }
278: 
279:     /**
280:      * Extract significant words from text.
281:      *
282:      * @return array<string>
283:      */
284:     private function extractWords(string $text): array
285:     {
286:         $commonWords = [
287:             'yang', 'dan', 'atau', 'di', 'ke', 'dari', 'pada', 'untuk', 'dengan', 'adalah',
288:             'ini', 'itu', 'saya', 'anda', 'kami', 'mereka', 'apa', 'bagaimana', 'kapan',
289:             'where', 'the', 'and', 'or', 'in', 'to', 'for', 'is', 'a', 'an', 'of', 'on',
290:         ];
291: 
292:         $normalized = $this->normalizeQuestion($text);
293:         $words = explode(' ', $normalized);
294: 
295:         return array_values(array_diff($words, $commonWords));
296:     }
297: 
298:     /**
299:      * Calculate word overlap similarity (Jaccard index like).
300:      *
301:      * @param array<string> $a
302:      * @param array<string> $b
303:      */
304:     private function calculateWordOverlap(array $a, array $b): float
305:     {
306:         if (empty($a) || empty($b)) {
307:             return 0.0;
308:         }
309: 
310:         $intersection = count(array_intersect($a, $b));
311:         $union = count(array_unique(array_merge($a, $b)));
312: 
313:         return $union > 0 ? $intersection / $union : 0.0;
314:     }
315: 
316:     /**
317:      * Clear expired cache entries.
318:      *
319:      * @return int Number of entries deleted
320:      */
321:     public function clearExpired(): int
322:     {
323:         $maxAge = config('chatbot.cache.max_age_days', 30);
324: 
325:         $deleted = CachedQaPair::query()
326:             ->where('created_at', '<', now()->subDays($maxAge))
327:             ->where('is_verified', false)
328:             ->delete();
329: 
330:         Log::info('CacheService: Cleared expired cache entries', ['count' => $deleted]);
331: 
332:         return $deleted;
333:     }
334: }

================
File: app/Services/Chatbot/CatalogKnowledgeService.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: declare(strict_types=1);
  4: 
  5: namespace App\Services\Chatbot;
  6: 
  7: use App\Models\CatalogItem;
  8: use App\Services\CatalogService;
  9: use Illuminate\Support\Collection;
 10: 
 11: class CatalogKnowledgeService
 12: {
 13:     public function __construct(private readonly CatalogService $catalogService) {}
 14: 
 15:     /**
 16:      * @return array<int, array{id: string, content: string, score: float, metadata: array}>
 17:      */
 18:     public function retrieve(string $query, int $limit = 5): array
 19:     {
 20:         if (!$this->isCatalogIntent($query)) {
 21:             return [];
 22:         }
 23: 
 24:         /** @var Collection<int, CatalogItem> $items */
 25:         $items = $this->catalogService->forFrontend();
 26: 
 27:         if ($items->isEmpty()) {
 28:             return [];
 29:         }
 30: 
 31:         $keywords = $this->extractKeywords($query);
 32:         $summary = $this->buildSummaryChunk($items);
 33: 
 34:         $chunks = [[
 35:             'id' => 'catalog-summary',
 36:             'content' => $summary,
 37:             'score' => 0.98,
 38:             'metadata' => [
 39:                 'source_type' => 'catalog_summary',
 40:                 'source_label' => 'Katalog data tersedia',
 41:                 'catalog_item_count' => $items->count(),
 42:             ],
 43:         ]];
 44: 
 45:         foreach ($items as $item) {
 46:             $score = $this->scoreItem($item, $keywords, $query);
 47:             if ($score <= 0.0) {
 48:                 continue;
 49:             }
 50: 
 51:             $chunks[] = [
 52:                 'id' => 'catalog-' . $item->getKey(),
 53:                 'content' => $this->formatItemContent($item),
 54:                 'score' => $score,
 55:                 'metadata' => [
 56:                     'source_type' => 'catalog_item',
 57:                     'catalog_item_id' => $item->getKey(),
 58:                     'source_label' => $item->catalogCategory?->name ? ('Katalog ' . $item->catalogCategory->name) : 'Katalog data',
 59:                     'catalog_title' => $item->title,
 60:                     'catalog_category' => $item->category,
 61:                 ],
 62:             ];
 63:         }
 64: 
 65:         usort($chunks, static fn(array $a, array $b): int => $b['score'] <=> $a['score']);
 66: 
 67:         return array_slice($chunks, 0, $limit);
 68:     }
 69: 
 70:     private function isCatalogIntent(string $query): bool
 71:     {
 72:         $normalized = mb_strtolower(trim($query));
 73: 
 74:         return $this->containsAny($normalized, [
 75:             'katalog',
 76:             'data apa saja',
 77:             'apa saja data',
 78:             'data yang tersedia',
 79:             'jenis data',
 80:             'daftar data',
 81:             'tersedia',
 82:             'pilihan data',
 83:             'ketersediaan data',
 84:         ]);
 85:     }
 86: 
 87:     /**
 88:      * @return array<int, string>
 89:      */
 90:     private function extractKeywords(string $text): array
 91:     {
 92:         $stopWords = ['yang', 'dan', 'atau', 'di', 'ke', 'dari', 'pada', 'untuk', 'dengan', 'apa', 'saja', 'data', 'tersedia'];
 93:         $words = preg_split('/\s+/u', mb_strtolower(trim($text)), -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY) ?: [];
 94:         $words = array_map(static fn(string $word): string => trim($word), $words);
 95:         $words = array_filter($words, static fn(string $word): bool => mb_strlen($word) > 2);
 96:         $words = array_values(array_diff($words, $stopWords));
 97: 
 98:         return array_values(array_unique($words));
 99:     }
100: 
101:     private function scoreItem(CatalogItem $item, array $keywords, string $query): float
102:     {
103:         $text = mb_strtolower(trim($item->title . ' ' . $item->category . ' ' . $item->unit));
104:         $score = 0.0;
105: 
106:         foreach ($keywords as $keyword) {
107:             if ($keyword !== '' && str_contains($text, $keyword)) {
108:                 $score += 0.18;
109:             }
110:         }
111: 
112:         $normalizedQuery = mb_strtolower(trim($query));
113:         if ($this->containsAny($normalizedQuery, ['apa saja data', 'data yang tersedia', 'daftar data', 'jenis data'])) {
114:             $score += 0.25;
115:         }
116: 
117:         if ($this->containsAny($text, [mb_strtolower($item->title), mb_strtolower($item->category)])) {
118:             $score += 0.15;
119:         }
120: 
121:         return min($score, 1.0);
122:     }
123: 
124:     private function buildSummaryChunk(Collection $items): string
125:     {
126:         $lines = ['Berikut daftar data yang tersedia pada katalog BMKG:'];
127: 
128:         foreach ($items as $item) {
129:             $price = number_format((int) $item->price, 0, ',', '.');
130:             $category = $item->category !== '' ? $item->category . ': ' : '';
131:             $lines[] = "- {$category}{$item->title} ({$price}/{$item->unit})";
132:         }
133: 
134:         return implode("\n", $lines);
135:     }
136: 
137:     private function formatItemContent(CatalogItem $item): string
138:     {
139:         $price = number_format((int) $item->price, 0, ',', '.');
140:         $category = $item->category !== '' ? $item->category : 'Katalog data';
141: 
142:         return "Kategori: {$category}\nNama data: {$item->title}\nHarga: Rp{$price}/{$item->unit}";
143:     }
144: 
145:     /**
146:      * @param array<int, string> $needles
147:      */
148:     private function containsAny(string $text, array $needles): bool
149:     {
150:         foreach ($needles as $needle) {
151:             if ($needle !== '' && str_contains($text, $needle)) {
152:                 return true;
153:             }
154:         }
155: 
156:         return false;
157:     }
158: }

================
File: app/Services/Chatbot/ChatbotService.php
================
   1: <?php
   2: 
   3: declare(strict_types=1);
   4: 
   5: namespace App\Services\Chatbot;
   6: 
   7: use App\Models\ChatConversation;
   8: use App\Models\Faq;
   9: use App\Models\User;
  10: use App\Services\Contracts\LLMServiceInterface;
  11: use App\Services\Contracts\VectorStoreInterface;
  12: use Carbon\Carbon;
  13: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache;
  14: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
  15: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
  16: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Session;
  17: use Throwable;
  18: 
  19: class ChatbotService
  20: {
  21:     private RetrievalService $retrievalService;
  22:     private CacheService $cacheService;
  23:     private PromptBuilder $promptBuilder;
  24:     private LLMServiceInterface $llmService;
  25:     private VectorStoreInterface $vectorStore;
  26: 
  27:     public function __construct(
  28:         RetrievalService $retrievalService,
  29:         CacheService $cacheService,
  30:         PromptBuilder $promptBuilder,
  31:         LLMServiceInterface $llmService,
  32:         VectorStoreInterface $vectorStore
  33:     ) {
  34:         $this->retrievalService = $retrievalService;
  35:         $this->cacheService = $cacheService;
  36:         $this->promptBuilder = $promptBuilder;
  37:         $this->llmService = $llmService;
  38:         $this->vectorStore = $vectorStore;
  39:     }
  40: 
  41:     /**
  42:      * Get the session key for conversation history.
  43:      *
  44:      * @param string $conversationId
  45:      * @return string
  46:      */
  47:     private function getSessionHistoryKey(string $conversationId): string
  48:     {
  49:         return "chat_history_{$conversationId}";
  50:     }
  51: 
  52:     /**
  53:      * Process a chat message and generate a response.
  54:      *
  55:      * @param string $message User's message
  56:      * @param string|null $sessionId Session ID for guests
  57:      * @param User|null $user Authenticated user
  58:      * @param string|null $conversationId Existing conversation ID
  59:      * @return array{message: string, conversation_id: string, sources: array, cached: bool}
  60:      * @throws \Exception
  61:      */
  62:     public function sendMessage(
  63:         string $message,
  64:         ?string $sessionId = null,
  65:         ?User $user = null,
  66:         ?string $conversationId = null
  67:     ): array {
  68:         Log::info('ChatbotService: sendMessage start', [
  69:             'conversation_id' => $conversationId,
  70:             'session_id' => $sessionId,
  71:             'user_id' => $user?->id,
  72:             'message_preview' => substr($message, 0, 120),
  73:         ]);
  74: 
  75:         // Validate and sanitize input
  76:         $message = $this->sanitizeInput($message);
  77: 
  78:         if (empty($message)) {
  79:             throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Pesan tidak boleh kosong.');
  80:         }
  81: 
  82:         // Prevent concurrent requests from the same user/session to avoid API burst calls.
  83:         $actorKey = $user?->id ? ('user:' . $user->id) : ('session:' . ($sessionId ?? 'guest'));
  84:         $lock = Cache::lock('chatbot:send-message:' . $actorKey, 10);
  85:         if (!$lock->get()) {
  86:             throw new \Exception('Permintaan sebelumnya masih diproses. Mohon tunggu sebentar lalu coba lagi.');
  87:         }
  88: 
  89:         // Get or create conversation
  90:         $conversation = $this->getOrCreateConversation($conversationId, $sessionId, $user);
  91: 
  92:         // Check rate limits for guests
  93:         if ($this->isGuest($user)) {
  94:             $this->checkGuestMessageLimit($conversation);
  95:         }
  96: 
  97:         DB::beginTransaction();
  98: 
  99:         try {
 100:             // Save user message
 101:             $this->saveMessage($conversation, 'user', $message);
 102: 
 103:             // SECURITY: Check for jailbreak attempts
 104:             if ($this->detectJailbreakAttempt($message)) {
 105:                 $response = 'Saya mendeteksi upaya manipulasi sistem. Saya tidak dapat memproses permintaan tersebut. Silakan ajukan pertanyaan terkait layanan BMKG dengan cara yang wajar.';
 106:                 $this->saveMessage($conversation, 'assistant', $response);
 107: 
 108:                 Log::warning('ChatbotService: Jailbreak attempt detected', [
 109:                     'message' => substr($message, 0, 200),
 110:                     'user_id' => $user?->id,
 111:                     'session_id' => $sessionId,
 112:                 ]);
 113: 
 114:                 DB::commit();
 115: 
 116:                 return [
 117:                     'message' => $response,
 118:                     'conversation_id' => $conversation->getKey(),
 119:                     'sources' => [],
 120:                     'cached' => false,
 121:                 ];
 122:             }
 123: 
 124:             // Check cache first or highly-similar FAQ
 125:             $faqMatch = $this->findDirectFaqAnswer($message) ?? $this->findNearFaqAnswer($message);
 126:             // Allow FAQ answers to be returned even for consultative phrasing
 127:             // when the FAQ match is high-confidence (e.g. direct match or high similarity).
 128:             // Confidence threshold for consultative queries lowered from 0.6 to 0.3
 129:             // to allow moderate‑confidence near‑matches (e.g. pricing/student queries)
 130:             // to be served directly from the FAQ without falling back to the LLM.
 131:             $faqConfidence = $faqMatch['similarity'] ?? 1.0;
 132:             if ($faqMatch !== null && (!$this->isConsultativeQuery($message) || $faqConfidence >= 0.3)) {
 133:                 $matchType = isset($faqMatch['similarity']) ? 'faq-near-match' : 'faq-direct-match';
 134:                 Log::info('ChatbotService: using FAQ match', [
 135:                     'faq_id' => $faqMatch['faq_id'],
 136:                     'match_type' => $matchType,
 137:                 ]);
 138: 
 139:                 $sources = [[
 140:                     'chunk_id' => $matchType,
 141:                     'source_type' => 'faq',
 142:                     'faq_id' => $faqMatch['faq_id'],
 143:                     'relevance' => $faqMatch['similarity'] ?? 1.0,
 144:                 ]];
 145: 
 146:                 $this->saveMessage(
 147:                     $conversation,
 148:                     'assistant',
 149:                     $faqMatch['answer'],
 150:                     $sources,
 151:                     null,
 152:                     $matchType === 'faq-near-match' ? 'faq-near' : 'faq-direct'
 153:                 );
 154: 
 155:                 // Keep cache updated with high-confidence answer from canonical FAQ.
 156:                 $this->cacheService->put($message, $faqMatch['answer'], $sources, true);
 157: 
 158:                 $conversation->increment('message_count');
 159:                 $conversation->touch();
 160: 
 161:                 DB::commit();
 162: 
 163:                 return [
 164:                     'message' => $faqMatch['answer'],
 165:                     'conversation_id' => $conversation->getKey(),
 166:                     'sources' => $sources,
 167:                     'cached' => false,
 168:                 ];
 169:             }
 170: 
 171:             // Check if off-topic
 172:             if ($this->promptBuilder->isOffTopic($message)) {
 173:                 $response = 'Maaf, saya hanya dapat membantu terkait layanan permohonan data BMKG. Silakan ajukan pertanyaan terkait prosedur permohonan data, jenis data, atau informasi BMKG. Jika perlu bantuan lebih lanjut, silakan hubungi admin.';
 174:                 $this->saveMessage($conversation, 'assistant', $response);
 175: 
 176:                 DB::commit();
 177: 
 178:                 return [
 179:                     'message' => $response,
 180:                     'conversation_id' => $conversation->getKey(),
 181:                     'sources' => [],
 182:                     'cached' => false,
 183:                 ];
 184:             }
 185: 
 186:             // Check if we have a generic generated response cached
 187:             $cachedResponse = $this->cacheService->get($message);
 188:             if ($cachedResponse !== null) {
 189:                 Log::info('ChatbotService: using cached response', [
 190:                     'sources_count' => count($cachedResponse['sources'] ?? []),
 191:                 ]);
 192: 
 193:                 $this->saveMessage(
 194:                     $conversation,
 195:                     'assistant',
 196:                     $cachedResponse['answer'],
 197:                     $cachedResponse['sources'],
 198:                     null,
 199:                     null
 200:                 );
 201: 
 202:                 DB::commit();
 203: 
 204:                 return [
 205:                     'message' => $cachedResponse['answer'],
 206:                     'conversation_id' => $conversation->getKey(),
 207:                     'sources' => $cachedResponse['sources'],
 208:                     'cached' => true,
 209:                 ];
 210:             }
 211: 
 212:             // Retrieve relevant context
 213:             $chunks = $this->retrievalService->retrieve($message);
 214:             Log::info('ChatbotService: retrieval completed', [
 215:                 'chunks_count' => count($chunks),
 216:             ]);
 217: 
 218:             // Get conversation history
 219:             $history = $this->getConversationHistory($conversation);
 220: 
 221:             // Build prompt
 222:             $prompt = $this->promptBuilder->buildPrompt($chunks, $history, $message);
 223: 
 224:             $llmAvailable = $this->llmService->isAvailable();
 225:             $allowNonLlmFallback = (bool) config('chatbot.retrieval.allow_non_llm_fallback', false);
 226: 
 227:             // LLM-first mode: use model reasoning whenever available; heuristics only as fallback.
 228:             if ($llmAvailable) {
 229:                 try {
 230:                     $llmResponse = $this->llmService->generateResponse($prompt);
 231:                     $response = $this->formatSteps($llmResponse['content']);
 232:                     $tokensUsed = $llmResponse['tokens_used'];
 233:                     $model = $llmResponse['model'];
 234:                     Log::info('ChatbotService: llm response received', [
 235:                         'model' => $model,
 236:                         'tokens_used' => $tokensUsed,
 237:                         'response_preview' => substr($response, 0, 140),
 238:                     ]);
 239:                 } catch (Throwable $llmException) {
 240:                     Log::warning('ChatbotService: Primary LLM failed, attempting Gemini fallback', [
 241:                         'message' => $llmException->getMessage(),
 242:                     ]);
 243: 
 244:                     try {
 245:                         // Fallback automatically to Gemini model as backup
 246:                         $geminiService = app()->make(\App\Services\Chatbot\LLMService::class);
 247:                         if ($geminiService->isAvailable()) {
 248:                             $llmResponse = $geminiService->generateResponse($prompt);
 249:                             $response = $this->formatSteps($llmResponse['content']);
 250:                             $tokensUsed = $llmResponse['tokens_used'];
 251:                             $model = $llmResponse['model'] . ' (fallback)';
 252:                             
 253:                             Log::info('ChatbotService: Gemini fallback LLM success', [
 254:                                 'model' => $model,
 255:                                 'tokens_used' => $tokensUsed,
 256:                             ]);
 257:                         } else {
 258:                             throw new \Exception('Gemini fallback service is not available (missing API key)');
 259:                         }
 260:                     } catch (Throwable $geminiException) {
 261:                         Log::warning('ChatbotService: Gemini fallback also failed, using retrieval fallback response', [
 262:                             'message' => $geminiException->getMessage(),
 263:                         ]);
 264: 
 265:                         if ($allowNonLlmFallback) {
 266:                             $response = $this->buildRetrievalFallbackResponse($message, $chunks);
 267:                             $tokensUsed = null;
 268:                             $model = 'fallback-retrieval';
 269:                         } else {
 270:                             $response = 'Model AI sedang tidak tersedia saat ini (quota/layanan). Silakan coba lagi beberapa saat.';
 271:                             $tokensUsed = null;
 272:                             $model = 'fallback-unavailable';
 273:                         }
 274:                     }
 275:                 }
 276:             } else {
 277:                 Log::warning('ChatbotService: LLM unavailable, using retrieval fallback response');
 278:                 if ($allowNonLlmFallback) {
 279:                     $response = $this->buildRetrievalFallbackResponse($message, $chunks);
 280:                     $tokensUsed = null;
 281:                     $model = 'fallback-retrieval';
 282:                 } else {
 283:                     $response = 'Model AI sedang tidak tersedia saat ini. Silakan coba lagi beberapa saat.';
 284:                     $tokensUsed = null;
 285:                     $model = 'fallback-unavailable';
 286:                 }
 287:             }
 288: 
 289:             // Get sources from retrieved chunks
 290:             $sources = $this->retrievalService->getSources($chunks);
 291: 
 292:             // Save assistant message
 293:             // Sanitize assistant response server-side as extra safety layer
 294:             $response = $this->sanitizeOutput($response);
 295: 
 296:             $this->saveMessage(
 297:                 $conversation,
 298:                 'assistant',
 299:                 $response,
 300:                 $sources,
 301:                 $tokensUsed,
 302:                 $model
 303:             );
 304: 
 305:             // Cache only high-confidence model responses.
 306:             // Do not cache any fallback text to avoid poisoning future answers.
 307:             if (!str_starts_with((string) $model, 'fallback-')) {
 308:                 $this->cacheService->put($message, $response, $sources, false);
 309:             }
 310: 
 311:             // Update conversation counter
 312:             $conversation->increment('message_count');
 313:             $conversation->touch();
 314: 
 315:             DB::commit();
 316: 
 317:             return [
 318:                 'message' => $response,
 319:                 'conversation_id' => $conversation->getKey(),
 320:                 'sources' => $sources,
 321:                 'cached' => false,
 322:             ];
 323:         } catch (Throwable $e) {
 324:             DB::rollBack();
 325:             Log::error('ChatbotService: Error processing message', [
 326:                 'message' => $e->getMessage(),
 327:                 'trace' => $e->getTraceAsString(),
 328:             ]);
 329:             throw $e;
 330:         } finally {
 331:             optional($lock)->release();
 332:         }
 333: 
 334:             // Additional targeted FAQ keyword fallback for consultative pricing/student queries.
 335:             // Some users ask in natural language (e.g. "Saya seorang mahasiswa... apakah bisa gratis?")
 336:             // which may not lexically match FAQ questions. Try a lightweight DB keyword search
 337:             // for pricing/education related FAQs before proceeding to LLM.
 338:             $pricingStudentKeywords = ['gratis', 'rp0', 'nol rupiah', 'mahasiswa', 'pelajar', 'pendidikan', 'penelitian non-komersial'];
 339:             $lower = $this->normalizeForMatch($message);
 340:             if ($this->containsAny($lower, $pricingStudentKeywords)) {
 341:                 $pricingFaq = Faq::query()
 342:                     ->where('is_active', true)
 343:                     ->get(['question', 'answer'])
 344:                     ->first(function (Faq $f) use ($pricingStudentKeywords) {
 345:                         $hay = $this->normalizeForMatch($f->question . ' ' . $f->answer);
 346:                         foreach ($pricingStudentKeywords as $k) {
 347:                             if (str_contains($hay, $this->normalizeForMatch($k))) {
 348:                                 return true;
 349:                             }
 350:                         }
 351: 
 352:                         return false;
 353:                     });
 354: 
 355:                 if ($pricingFaq !== null) {
 356:                     $answer = $pricingFaq->answer;
 357:                     $this->saveMessage($conversation, 'assistant', $answer, [['chunk_id' => 'faq-pricing', 'source_type' => 'faq']]);
 358:                     DB::commit();
 359: 
 360:                     return [
 361:                         'message' => $answer,
 362:                         'conversation_id' => $conversation->getKey(),
 363:                         'sources' => [['chunk_id' => 'faq-pricing', 'source_type' => 'faq']],
 364:                         'cached' => false,
 365:                     ];
 366:                 }
 367:             }
 368:     }
 369: 
 370:     /**
 371:      * Get or create a conversation.
 372:      */
 373:     private function getOrCreateConversation(
 374:         ?string $conversationId,
 375:         ?string $sessionId,
 376:         ?User $user
 377:     ): ChatConversation {
 378:         if ($conversationId !== null) {
 379:             $conversation = ChatConversation::find($conversationId);
 380:             if ($conversation !== null) {
 381:                 // Verify ownership
 382:                 if ($user !== null && $conversation->user_id !== $user->id) {
 383:                     throw new \Exception('Akses ditolak.');
 384:                 }
 385:                 if ($user === null && $conversation->session_id !== $sessionId) {
 386:                     throw new \Exception('Akses ditolak.');
 387:                 }
 388:                 // Initialize session history if not exists
 389:                 $key = $this->getSessionHistoryKey($conversation->getKey());
 390:                 if (Session::get($key) === null) {
 391:                     Session::put($key, []);
 392:                 }
 393:                 return $conversation;
 394:             }
 395:         }
 396: 
 397:         $conversation = ChatConversation::create([
 398:             'user_id' => $user?->id,
 399:             'session_id' => $sessionId ?? session()->getId(),
 400:             'status' => 'active',
 401:             'message_count' => 0,
 402:         ]);
 403: 
 404:         // Initialize session history for new conversation
 405:         $key = $this->getSessionHistoryKey($conversation->getKey());
 406:         Session::put($key, []);
 407: 
 408:         return $conversation;
 409:     }
 410: 
 411:     /**
 412:      * Save a message to the conversation.
 413:      *
 414:      * @param array<int, array<string, mixed>>|null $sources
 415:      */
 416:     private function saveMessage(
 417:         ChatConversation $conversation,
 418:         string $role,
 419:         string $content,
 420:         ?array $sources = null,
 421:         ?int $tokensUsed = null,
 422:         ?string $model = null
 423:     ): void {
 424:         // Store message in session history
 425:         $key = $this->getSessionHistoryKey($conversation->getKey());
 426:         $history = Session::get($key, []);
 427:         $history[] = [
 428:             'role' => $role,
 429:             'content' => $content,
 430:         ];
 431:         Session::put($key, $history);
 432: 
 433:         // Set title on first user message
 434:         if ($role === 'user' && $conversation->title === null) {
 435:             $conversation->title = substr($content, 0, 50) . (strlen($content) > 50 ? '...' : '');
 436:             $conversation->save();
 437:         }
 438:     }
 439: 
 440:     /**
 441:      * Get conversation history for context.
 442:      *
 443:      * @return array<int, array{role: string, content: string}>
 444:      */
 445:     private function getConversationHistory(ChatConversation $conversation): array
 446:     {
 447:         $key = $this->getSessionHistoryKey($conversation->getKey());
 448:         $history = Session::get($key, []);
 449: 
 450:         // Get the last 10 messages
 451:         $recent = array_slice($history, -10, 10, true);
 452:         $recent = array_values($recent);
 453: 
 454:         return $recent;
 455:     }
 456: 
 457:     /**
 458:      * Check if user is a guest.
 459:      */
 460:     private function isGuest(?User $user): bool
 461:     {
 462:         return $user === null;
 463:     }
 464: 
 465:     /**
 466:      * Check guest message limit.
 467:      *
 468:      * @throws \Exception When limit exceeded
 469:      */
 470:     private function checkGuestMessageLimit(ChatConversation $conversation): void
 471:     {
 472:         $limit = config('chatbot.limits.guest_max_messages', 5);
 473: 
 474:         if ($conversation->message_count >= $limit) {
 475:             throw new \Exception($this->promptBuilder->getGuestLimitMessage());
 476:         }
 477:     }
 478: 
 479:     /**
 480:      * Detect potential jailbreak/prompt injection attempts.
 481:      *
 482:      * Returns true if message contains suspicious patterns indicating
 483:      * an attempt to manipulate the AI's behavior or reveal system instructions.
 484:      */
 485:     private function detectJailbreakAttempt(string $message): bool
 486:     {
 487:         $messageLower = strtolower($message);
 488: 
 489:         // Common jailbreak patterns
 490:         $jailbreakPatterns = [
 491:             // Attempts to ignore/replace instructions
 492:             'ignore previous instructions',
 493:             'ignore all prior instructions',
 494:             'ignore the above',
 495:             'disregard previous',
 496:             'system prompt',
 497:             'system instructions',
 498:             'system message',
 499: 
 500:             // Developer/admin mode attempts
 501:             'developer mode',
 502:             'dev mode',
 503:             'admin mode',
 504:             'sudo',
 505:             'root access',
 506:             'superuser',
 507: 
 508:             // Role playing to bypass restrictions
 509:             'roleplay as',
 510:             'pretend you are',
 511:             'act as',
 512:             'you are now',
 513:             'from now on you are',
 514: 
 515:             // Attempts to reveal hidden information
 516:             'show me the',
 517:             'reveal your',
 518:             'print your',
 519:             'output your',
 520:             'repeat the words',
 521:             'repeat after me',
 522:             'what is your prompt',
 523:             'what were your instructions',
 524: 
 525:             // DAN and similar jailbreaks
 526:             'do anything now',
 527:             'dan mode',
 528:             'd.a.n',
 529:             'your instructions do not',
 530: 
 531:             // Delimiter spoofing
 532:             '[begin_',
 533:             '[end_',
 534:             '<system>',
 535:             '</system>',
 536:             '<<<',
 537:             '>>>',
 538: 
 539:             // Multi-language attacks
 540:             'lupakan semua',
 541:             'abaikan perintah',
 542:             'tunjukkan prompt',
 543: 
 544:             // Attempts to get the model to say harmful things
 545:             'simulate',
 546:             'hypothetically',
 547:             'hypothetical scenario',
 548:             'for educational purposes',
 549:             'purely fictional',
 550: 
 551:             // Encoding/escaping attempts
 552:             'base64',
 553:             'hex decode',
 554:             'rot13',
 555: 
 556:             // Social engineering
 557:             'this is a test',
 558:             'debug mode',
 559:             'maintenance mode',
 560:         ];
 561: 
 562:         foreach ($jailbreakPatterns as $pattern) {
 563:             if (str_contains($messageLower, $pattern)) {
 564:                 Log::warning('Jailbreak pattern detected', ['pattern' => $pattern]);
 565:                 return true;
 566:             }
 567:         }
 568: 
 569:         // Check for repetition of control characters or unusual patterns
 570:         if (preg_match('/([<>\[\]{()}])\1{4,}/', $message)) {
 571:             Log::warning('Suspicious character repetition detected');
 572:             return true;
 573:         }
 574: 
 575:         // Check for very long messages with unusual character ratios
 576:         // (often used in token smuggling attacks)
 577:         $length = strlen($message);
 578:         if ($length > 200) {
 579:             $uppercaseCount = preg_match_all('/[A-Z]/', $message);
 580:             $lowercaseCount = preg_match_all('/[a-z]/', $message);
 581: 
 582:             // If mostly uppercase, potentially trying to hide patterns
 583:             if ($uppercaseCount > ($lowercaseCount * 3) && $length > 100) {
 584:                 Log::warning('Unusual capitalization pattern detected');
 585:                 return true;
 586:             }
 587:         }
 588: 
 589:         return false;
 590:     }
 591: 
 592:     /**
 593:      * Sanitize user input.
 594:      */
 595:     private function sanitizeInput(string $input): string
 596:     {
 597:         $maxLength = config('chatbot.limits.max_input_length', 500);
 598: 
 599:         // Strip HTML tags
 600:         $clean = strip_tags($input);
 601: 
 602:         // Trim whitespace
 603:         $clean = trim($clean);
 604: 
 605:         // Limit length
 606:         if (strlen($clean) > $maxLength) {
 607:             $clean = substr($clean, 0, $maxLength);
 608:         }
 609: 
 610:         return $clean;
 611:     }
 612: 
 613:     /**
 614:      * Try to answer directly from active FAQs before semantic retrieval.
 615:      *
 616:      * @return array{faq_id: string, answer: string}|null
 617:      */
 618:     private function findDirectFaqAnswer(string $message): ?array
 619:     {
 620:         $normalizedMessage = $this->normalizeForMatch($message);
 621: 
 622:         if ($normalizedMessage === '') {
 623:             return null;
 624:         }
 625: 
 626:         $faq = Faq::query()
 627:             ->where('is_active', true)
 628:             ->get(['id', 'question', 'answer'])
 629:             ->first(function (Faq $candidate) use ($normalizedMessage): bool {
 630:                 return $this->normalizeForMatch($candidate->question) === $normalizedMessage;
 631:             });
 632: 
 633:         if ($faq === null) {
 634:             return null;
 635:         }
 636: 
 637:         return [
 638:             'faq_id' => (string) $faq->getKey(),
 639:             'answer' => $faq->answer,
 640:         ];
 641:     }
 642: 
 643:     private function normalizeForMatch(string $text): string
 644:     {
 645:         $normalized = mb_strtolower(trim($text));
 646:         $normalized = preg_replace('/[^\p{L}\p{N}\s]/u', '', $normalized) ?? '';
 647:         $normalized = preg_replace('/\s+/u', ' ', $normalized) ?? '';
 648: 
 649:         return trim($normalized);
 650:     }
 651: 
 652:     /**
 653:      * Fallback lexical FAQ matching for paraphrased questions.
 654:      *
 655:      * @return array{faq_id: string, answer: string, similarity: float}|null
 656:      */
 657:     private function findNearFaqAnswer(string $message): ?array
 658:     {
 659:         $normalizedMessage = $this->normalizeForMatch($message);
 660:         if ($normalizedMessage === '') {
 661:             return null;
 662:         }
 663: 
 664:         $messageTokens = $this->tokenizeForSimilarity($normalizedMessage);
 665:         if (count($messageTokens) < 2) {
 666:             return null;
 667:         }
 668: 
 669:         $bestFaq = null;
 670:         $bestScore = 0.0;
 671:         $secondBestScore = 0.0;
 672: 
 673:         $faqs = Faq::query()
 674:             ->where('is_active', true)
 675:             ->get(['id', 'question', 'answer']);
 676: 
 677:         foreach ($faqs as $faq) {
 678:             $questionTokens = $this->tokenizeForSimilarity($this->normalizeForMatch($faq->question));
 679:             if (empty($questionTokens)) {
 680:                 continue;
 681:             }
 682: 
 683:             $intersection = count(array_intersect($messageTokens, $questionTokens));
 684:             $union = count(array_unique(array_merge($messageTokens, $questionTokens)));
 685:             $jaccard = $union > 0 ? ($intersection / $union) : 0.0;
 686: 
 687:             // Intent boost: user asks "how/procedure", prioritize FAQ that talks about flow/how-to.
 688:             $messageLooksProcedural = $this->containsAny($normalizedMessage, [
 689:                 'bagaimana', 'gimana', 'cara', 'alur', 'prosedur', 'langkah', 'mengajukan', 'pengajuan',
 690:             ]);
 691:             $faqLooksProcedural = $this->containsAny($this->normalizeForMatch($faq->question), [
 692:                 'bagaimana', 'cara', 'alur', 'prosedur', 'langkah', 'mengajukan', 'pengajuan',
 693:             ]);
 694: 
 695:             $messageLooksSubmission = $this->containsAny($normalizedMessage, [
 696:                 'pengajuan', 'mengajukan', 'permohonan', 'request data', 'permintaan data',
 697:             ]);
 698:             $faqLooksSubmission = $this->containsAny($this->normalizeForMatch($faq->question), [
 699:                 'pengajuan', 'mengajukan', 'permohonan', 'request data', 'permintaan data',
 700:             ]);
 701: 
 702:             $messageLooksDownload = $this->containsAny($normalizedMessage, [
 703:                 'unduh', 'download', 'mengunduh', 'tautan unduh', 'link unduhan',
 704:             ]);
 705:             $faqLooksDownload = $this->containsAny($this->normalizeForMatch($faq->question), [
 706:                 'unduh', 'download', 'mengunduh', 'tautan unduh', 'link unduhan',
 707:             ]);
 708: 
 709:             $messageLooksDocumentRequirement = $this->containsAny($normalizedMessage, [
 710:                 'dokumen', 'syarat', 'wajib', 'kategori', 'lampiran',
 711:             ]);
 712:             $faqLooksDocumentRequirement = $this->containsAny($this->normalizeForMatch($faq->question), [
 713:                 'dokumen', 'syarat', 'wajib', 'kategori', 'lampiran',
 714:             ]);
 715: 
 716:             $messageLooksPricing = $this->containsAny($normalizedMessage, [
 717:                 'gratis', 'biaya', 'tarif', 'rp0', 'nol rupiah', 'pnbp',
 718:             ]);
 719:             $faqLooksPricing = $this->containsAny($this->normalizeForMatch($faq->question . ' ' . $faq->answer), [
 720:                 'gratis', 'biaya', 'tarif', 'rp0', 'nol rupiah', 'pnbp', 'non-komersial',
 721:             ]);
 722: 
 723:             $messageLooksStudentOrEducation = $this->containsAny($normalizedMessage, [
 724:                 'mahasiswa', 'pelajar', 'pendidikan', 'akademik', 'kampus', 'skripsi', 'tesis', 'disertasi',
 725:             ]);
 726:             $faqLooksStudentOrEducation = $this->containsAny($this->normalizeForMatch($faq->question . ' ' . $faq->answer), [
 727:                 'mahasiswa', 'pelajar', 'pendidikan', 'akademik', 'kampus', 'skripsi', 'tesis', 'disertasi',
 728:             ]);
 729: 
 730:             $score = $jaccard;
 731:             if ($messageLooksProcedural && $faqLooksProcedural) {
 732:                 $score += 0.22;
 733:             }
 734: 
 735:             // Intent alignment: prioritize the same action intent (submission vs download)
 736:             if ($messageLooksSubmission && $faqLooksSubmission) {
 737:                 $score += 0.28;
 738:             }
 739:             if ($messageLooksSubmission && $faqLooksDownload) {
 740:                 $score -= 0.22;
 741:             }
 742:             if ($messageLooksDownload && $faqLooksDownload) {
 743:                 $score += 0.24;
 744:             }
 745:             if ($messageLooksDownload && $faqLooksSubmission) {
 746:                 $score -= 0.18;
 747:             }
 748: 
 749:             if ($messageLooksProcedural && $faqLooksDocumentRequirement) {
 750:                 $score -= 0.10;
 751:             }
 752:             if (!$messageLooksDocumentRequirement && $faqLooksDocumentRequirement) {
 753:                 $score -= 0.08;
 754:             }
 755:             if ($messageLooksPricing && $faqLooksPricing) {
 756:                 $score += 0.24;
 757:             }
 758:             if ($messageLooksPricing && $faqLooksProcedural) {
 759:                 $score -= 0.10;
 760:             }
 761:             if ($messageLooksPricing && $messageLooksStudentOrEducation && $faqLooksStudentOrEducation) {
 762:                 $score += 0.22;
 763:             }
 764:             if ($messageLooksPricing && $messageLooksStudentOrEducation && $faqLooksPricing) {
 765:                 $score += 0.10;
 766:             }
 767: 
 768:             if ($score > $bestScore) {
 769:                 $secondBestScore = $bestScore;
 770:                 $bestScore = $score;
 771:                 $bestFaq = $faq;
 772:             } elseif ($score > $secondBestScore) {
 773:                 $secondBestScore = $score;
 774:             }
 775:         }
 776: 
 777:         // Accept moderate-confidence lexical intent match, but require separation from runner-up.
 778:         if ($bestFaq === null || $bestScore < 0.22) {
 779:             return null;
 780:         }
 781: 
 782:         if (($bestScore - $secondBestScore) < 0.05) {
 783:             return null;
 784:         }
 785: 
 786:         return [
 787:             'faq_id' => (string) $bestFaq->getKey(),
 788:             'answer' => $bestFaq->answer,
 789:             'similarity' => $bestScore,
 790:         ];
 791:     }
 792: 
 793:     /**
 794:      * @return array<int, string>
 795:      */
 796:     private function tokenizeForSimilarity(string $text): array
 797:     {
 798:         $stopWords = [
 799:             'yang', 'dan', 'atau', 'di', 'ke', 'dari', 'pada', 'untuk', 'dengan',
 800:             'apa', 'kapan', 'dimana', 'mengapa', 'saya',
 801:         ];
 802: 
 803:         $words = preg_split('/\s+/u', $text, -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY) ?: [];
 804:         $words = array_map(static fn(string $word): string => trim($word), $words);
 805:         $words = array_filter($words, static fn(string $word): bool => strlen($word) > 2);
 806:         $words = array_values(array_diff($words, $stopWords));
 807: 
 808:         return array_values(array_unique($words));
 809:     }
 810: 
 811:     /**
 812:      * @param array<int, string> $needles
 813:      */
 814:     private function containsAny(string $text, array $needles): bool
 815:     {
 816:         foreach ($needles as $needle) {
 817:             if ($needle !== '' && str_contains($text, $needle)) {
 818:                 return true;
 819:             }
 820:         }
 821: 
 822:         return false;
 823:     }
 824: 
 825:     /**
 826:      * Build a deterministic response when LLM provider is unavailable/quota-limited.
 827:      *
 828:      * @param array<int, array{id: string, content: string, score: float, metadata: array}> $chunks
 829:      */
 830:     private function buildRetrievalFallbackResponse(string $message, array $chunks): string
 831:     {
 832:         if (empty($chunks)) {
 833:             return 'Maaf, layanan chatbot sedang sibuk dan saya belum menemukan jawaban yang relevan. Silakan coba lagi beberapa saat atau hubungi admin BMKG.';
 834:         }
 835: 
 836:         // Prioritize explicit FAQ answer chunks first, to avoid echoing question text.
 837:         foreach ($chunks as $chunk) {
 838:             $sourceType = $chunk['metadata']['source_type'] ?? null;
 839:             $content = trim($chunk['content'] ?? '');
 840:             if ($sourceType === 'answer' && $content !== '') {
 841:                 return $content;
 842:             }
 843:         }
 844: 
 845:         $top = $chunks[0];
 846:         $sourceType = $top['metadata']['source_type'] ?? null;
 847:         $faqQuestion = $top['metadata']['faq_question'] ?? null;
 848:         $content = trim($top['content'] ?? '');
 849:         $faqId = $top['metadata']['faq_id'] ?? null;
 850:         $faqId = is_scalar($faqId) ? (string) $faqId : '';
 851: 
 852:         // If top chunk is a question chunk, try to fetch canonical FAQ answer directly.
 853:         if ($sourceType === 'question' && $faqId !== '') {
 854:             $faq = Faq::query()->whereKey($faqId)->first(['answer']);
 855:             if ($faq !== null && trim($faq->answer) !== '') {
 856:                 return trim($faq->answer);
 857:             }
 858:         }
 859: 
 860:         if ($faqQuestion !== null && $content !== '') {
 861:             return "Untuk pertanyaan \"{$faqQuestion}\", informasinya:\n{$content}";
 862:         }
 863: 
 864:         return $content !== ''
 865:             ? $content
 866:             : 'Maaf, layanan chatbot sedang sibuk. Silakan coba lagi beberapa saat atau hubungi admin BMKG.';
 867:     }
 868: 
 869:     private function isConsultativeQuery(string $message): bool
 870:     {
 871:         $text = $this->normalizeForMatch($message);
 872: 
 873:         return $this->containsAny($text, [
 874:             'jika', 'kalau', 'kira kira', 'kira-kira', 'sebaiknya',
 875:             'menurutmu', 'menurut anda', 'mana yang cocok', 'mana yang harus',
 876:             'saran', 'rekomendasi', 'apakah lebih baik', 'apakah bisa gratis',
 877:             'bisa gratis', 'tarif', 'biaya', 'rp0', 'nol rupiah', 'mahasiswa', 'pelajar', 'pendidikan', 'kampus', 'skripsi', 'tesis', 'disertasi',
 878:         ]);
 879:     }
 880: 
 881:     /**
 882:      * Get conversation with messages.
 883:      *
 884:      * @param string $conversationId
 885:      * @param User|null $user
 886:      * @param string|null $sessionId
 887:      * @return array<string, mixed>|null
 888:      */
 889:     /**
 890:      * Get conversations for a specific user.
 891:      *
 892:      * @param User $user
 893:      * @return \Illuminate\Support\Collection
 894:      */
 895:     public function getUserConversations(User $user)
 896:     {
 897:         return ChatConversation::where('user_id', $user->id)
 898:             ->where('status', 'active')
 899:             ->orderBy('updated_at', 'desc')
 900:             ->limit(20)
 901:             ->get(['id', 'title', 'message_count', 'updated_at'])
 902:             ->map(function ($conv) {
 903:                 return [
 904:                     'id' => $conv->getKey(),
 905:                     'title' => $conv->title ?? 'Percakapan (' . $conv->updated_at->format('d M Y') . ')',
 906:                     'message_count' => $conv->message_count,
 907:                     'updated_at' => $conv->updated_at->toISOString(),
 908:                 ];
 909:             });
 910:     }
 911: 
 912:     public function getConversation(string $conversationId, ?User $user, ?string $sessionId): ?array
 913:     {
 914:         $conversation = ChatConversation::find($conversationId);
 915: 
 916:         if ($conversation === null) {
 917:             return null;
 918:         }
 919: 
 920:         // Verify ownership
 921:         if ($user !== null && $conversation->user_id !== $user->id) {
 922:             return null;
 923:         }
 924:         if ($user === null && $conversation->session_id !== $sessionId) {
 925:             return null;
 926:         }
 927: 
 928:         return [
 929:             'id' => $conversation->getKey(),
 930:             'title' => $conversation->title,
 931:             'status' => $conversation->status,
 932:             'message_count' => $conversation->message_count,
 933:             'created_at' => $conversation->created_at,
 934:             'messages' => $conversation->messages()
 935:                 ->orderBy('created_at')
 936:                 ->get()
 937:                 ->map(fn(ChatMessage $msg): array => [
 938:                     'id' => $msg->getKey(),
 939:                     'role' => $msg->role,
 940:                     'content' => $msg->content,
 941:                     'sources' => $msg->sources,
 942:                     'created_at' => $msg->created_at,
 943:                 ])
 944:                 ->all(),
 945:         ];
 946:     }
 947: 
 948:     /**
 949:      * Get suggested questions for quick start.
 950:      *
 951:      * @return array<string>
 952:      */
 953:     public function getSuggestedQuestions(): array
 954:     {
 955:         return [
 956:             'Bagaimana cara mengajukan permohonan data?',
 957:             'Apa saja jenis data yang tersedia?',
 958:             'Berapa lama proses permohonan?',
 959:             'Apa persyaratan permohonan data?',
 960:             'Bagaimana cara mengecek status permohonan?',
 961:             'Apakah ada biaya untuk permohonan data?',
 962:             'Bagaimana cara menjadi mitra BMKG?',
 963:         ];
 964:     }
 965: 
 966:     /**
 967:      * Check if chatbot is enabled and available.
 968:      */
 969:     public function isAvailable(): bool
 970:     {
 971:         if (!config('chatbot.enabled', true)) {
 972:             return false;
 973:         }
 974: 
 975:         return $this->llmService->isAvailable() || $this->vectorStore->isAvailable();
 976:     }
 977: 
 978:     /**
 979:      * Archive a conversation.
 980:      *
 981:      * @param string $conversationId
 982:      * @param User|null $user
 983:      * @param string|null $sessionId
 984:      * @return bool
 985:      */
 986:     public function archiveConversation(string $conversationId, ?User $user, ?string $sessionId): bool
 987:     {
 988:         $conversation = ChatConversation::find($conversationId);
 989: 
 990:         if ($conversation === null) {
 991:             return false;
 992:         }
 993: 
 994:         // Verify ownership
 995:         if ($user !== null && $conversation->user_id !== $user->id) {
 996:             return false;
 997:         }
 998:         if ($user === null && $conversation->session_id !== $sessionId) {
 999:             return false;
1000:         }
1001: 
1002:         $conversation->update(['status' => 'archived']);
1003: 
1004:         return true;
1005:     }
1006: 
1007:     /**
1008:      * Format numbered steps to ensure each step appears on a separate line.
1009:      *
1010:      * @param string $content Raw response content that may contain multiple steps
1011:      * @return string Formatted content with steps separated by newlines
1012:      */
1013:     private function formatSteps(string $content): string
1014:     {
1015:         // Ensure each step numbering appears on its own line
1016:         // Pattern matches step numbers followed by ')' or '.' and captures the number
1017:         return preg_replace(
1018:             '/(\d+)[\)\.\s]+(?=\d+[\)\.\s])/', 
1019:             '$0' . PHP_EOL, 
1020:             $content
1021:         );
1022:     }
1023: 
1024:     /**
1025:      * Basic server-side sanitization for assistant output.
1026:      *
1027:      * - Removes script/style blocks
1028:      * - Strips disallowed tags but keeps simple presentation tags if present
1029:      * - Removes inline event handlers (on*) and javascript: hrefs
1030:      *
1031:      * This is an additional safety layer; frontend also sanitizes/uses markdown renderer.
1032:      */
1033:     private function sanitizeOutput(string $output): string
1034:     {
1035:         // Remove script and style blocks
1036:         $output = preg_replace('#<\s*(script|style)[^>]*>.*?<\s*/\s*\1\s*>#is', '', $output);
1037: 
1038:         // Remove on* attributes (e.g., onclick)
1039:         $output = preg_replace('/\s+on[a-z]+\s*=\s*("[^"]*"|\'[^\']*\'|[^\s>]+)/i', '', $output);
1040: 
1041:         // Neutralize javascript: URIs in href/src
1042:         $output = preg_replace_callback('/(href|src)\s*=\s*("[^"]*"|\'[^\']*\'|[^\s>]+)/i', function ($m) {
1043:             $val = trim($m[2], " \"\'");
1044:             if (preg_match('/^\s*javascript:/i', $val)) {
1045:                 return $m[1] . '="#"';
1046:             }
1047:             return $m[1] . '="' . htmlspecialchars($val, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8') . '"';
1048:         }, $output);
1049: 
1050:         // Allow only a small set of tags; strip others
1051:         $allowed = '<a><p><ul><ol><li><br><strong><b><em><i><span>';
1052:         $output = strip_tags($output, $allowed);
1053: 
1054:         // Finally, trim excessive whitespace
1055:         $output = trim($output);
1056: 
1057:         return $output;
1058:     }
1059: }

================
File: app/Services/Chatbot/ContactKnowledgeService.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: declare(strict_types=1);
 4: 
 5: namespace App\Services\Chatbot;
 6: 
 7: use App\Services\ContactSettingService;
 8: 
 9: class ContactKnowledgeService
10: {
11:     public function __construct(private readonly ContactSettingService $contactService) {}
12: 
13:     /**
14:      * Return knowledge chunks about contact settings when query intent matches.
15:      * @return array<int, array{id:string, content:string, score:float, metadata:array}>
16:      */
17:     public function retrieve(string $query, int $limit = 3): array
18:     {
19:         if (!$this->isContactIntent($query)) {
20:             return [];
21:         }
22: 
23:         $settings = $this->contactService->all();
24: 
25:         $lines = ['Informasi kontak layanan BMKG:'];
26:         if (!empty($settings['cs_email'])) {
27:             $lines[] = '- Email: ' . $settings['cs_email'];
28:         }
29:         if (!empty($settings['cs_phone'])) {
30:             $lines[] = '- Telepon: ' . $settings['cs_phone'];
31:         }
32:         if (!empty($settings['cs_whatsapp'])) {
33:             $lines[] = '- WhatsApp: ' . $settings['cs_whatsapp'];
34:         }
35:         if (!empty($settings['office_hours'])) {
36:             $lines[] = '- Jam operasional: ' . $settings['office_hours'];
37:         }
38:         foreach (['instagram' => 'Instagram', 'twitter' => 'Twitter/X', 'facebook' => 'Facebook', 'youtube' => 'YouTube', 'tiktok' => 'TikTok'] as $key => $label) {
39:             if (!empty($settings[$key])) {
40:                 $lines[] = '- ' . $label . ': ' . $settings[$key];
41:             }
42:         }
43: 
44:         $summary = implode("\n", $lines);
45: 
46:         return [[
47:             'id' => 'contact-summary',
48:             'content' => $summary,
49:             'score' => 0.95,
50:             'metadata' => [
51:                 'source_type' => 'contact',
52:                 'source_label' => 'Kontak / Pusat Bantuan',
53:             ],
54:         ]];
55:     }
56: 
57:     private function isContactIntent(string $query): bool
58:     {
59:         $q = mb_strtolower($query);
60: 
61:         return str_contains($q, 'kontak')
62:             || str_contains($q, 'pusat bantuan')
63:             || str_contains($q, 'hubungi')
64:             || str_contains($q, 'telepon')
65:             || str_contains($q, 'email')
66:             || str_contains($q, 'whatsapp')
67:             || str_contains($q, 'sosial media')
68:             || str_contains($q, 'media sosial')
69:             || str_contains($q, 'instagram')
70:             || str_contains($q, 'twitter')
71:             || str_contains($q, 'x.com')
72:             || str_contains($q, 'facebook')
73:             || str_contains($q, 'youtube')
74:             || str_contains($q, 'tiktok');
75:     }
76: }

================
File: app/Services/Chatbot/EmbeddingService.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: declare(strict_types=1);
  4: 
  5: namespace App\Services\Chatbot;
  6: 
  7: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;
  8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
  9: 
 10: class EmbeddingService
 11: {
 12:     private string $provider;
 13:     private string $apiKey;
 14:     private string $model;
 15:     private string $endpoint;
 16: 
 17:     public function __construct()
 18:     {
 19:         $this->provider = (string) config('chatbot.embedding.provider', 'gemini');
 20: 
 21:         if ($this->provider === 'nim') {
 22:             $this->apiKey = (string) config('chatbot.nim.api_key', '');
 23:             $this->model = (string) config('chatbot.nim.embedding_model', 'llama-3_2-nemoretriever-300m-embed-v1');
 24:             $this->endpoint = rtrim((string) config('chatbot.nim.endpoint', 'https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1'), '/');
 25:             return;
 26:         }
 27: 
 28:         $this->apiKey = (string) config('chatbot.gemini.api_key', '');
 29:         $this->model = (string) config('chatbot.gemini.embedding_model', 'gemini-embedding-001');
 30:         $this->endpoint = (string) config('chatbot.gemini.endpoint', 'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta');
 31:     }
 32: 
 33:     /**
 34:      * Generate embeddings for a given text.
 35:      *
 36:      * @param string $text The text to embed
 37:      * @return array<float>|null Embedding vector or null on failure
 38:      */
 39:     public function embed(string $text): ?array
 40:     {
 41:         if (!$this->isAvailable()) {
 42:             Log::warning('EmbeddingService: API key not configured');
 43:             return null;
 44:         }
 45: 
 46:         try {
 47:             if ($this->provider === 'nim') {
 48:                 return $this->embedWithNim($text);
 49:             }
 50: 
 51:             $modelsToTry = $this->embeddingModelCandidates();
 52:             foreach ($modelsToTry as $candidateModel) {
 53:                 $response = Http::withHeaders([
 54:                     'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
 55:                 ])->post(
 56:                     "{$this->endpoint}/models/{$candidateModel}:embedContent?key={$this->apiKey}",
 57:                     [
 58:                         'model' => "models/{$candidateModel}",
 59:                         'content' => [
 60:                             'parts' => [
 61:                                 ['text' => $text],
 62:                             ],
 63:                         ],
 64:                     ]
 65:                 );
 66: 
 67:                 if ($response->successful()) {
 68:                     $data = $response->json();
 69:                     $embedding = $data['embedding']['values'] ?? null;
 70: 
 71:                     if (!is_array($embedding)) {
 72:                         Log::error('EmbeddingService: Invalid response format', [
 73:                             'model' => $candidateModel,
 74:                         ]);
 75:                         return null;
 76:                     }
 77: 
 78:                     if ($candidateModel !== $this->model) {
 79:                         Log::warning('EmbeddingService: switched embedding model fallback', [
 80:                             'configured_model' => $this->model,
 81:                             'active_model' => $candidateModel,
 82:                         ]);
 83:                     }
 84: 
 85:                     return $embedding;
 86:                 }
 87: 
 88:                 $status = $response->status();
 89:                 $body = $response->body();
 90:                 $isModelNotFound = $status === 404
 91:                     && str_contains(strtolower($body), 'not found');
 92: 
 93:                 Log::warning('EmbeddingService: candidate model failed', [
 94:                     'model' => $candidateModel,
 95:                     'status' => $status,
 96:                 ]);
 97: 
 98:                 if (!$isModelNotFound) {
 99:                     Log::error('EmbeddingService: API call failed', [
100:                         'status' => $status,
101:                         'body' => $body,
102:                         'model' => $candidateModel,
103:                     ]);
104:                     return null;
105:                 }
106:             }
107: 
108:             Log::error('EmbeddingService: all embedding model candidates failed', [
109:                 'candidates' => $modelsToTry,
110:             ]);
111:             return null;
112:         } catch (\Exception $e) {
113:             Log::error('EmbeddingService: Exception thrown', [
114:                 'message' => $e->getMessage(),
115:             ]);
116:             return null;
117:         }
118:     }
119: 
120:     /**
121:      * OpenAI-compatible embeddings API for NVIDIA NIM.
122:      *
123:      * @return array<float>|null
124:      */
125:     private function embedWithNim(string $text): ?array
126:     {
