================
File: docs/chatbot-faq-guide.md
================
  1: # Panduan FAQ Chatbot BMKG — Setup, Seed, dan Reindex
  2: 
  3: Panduan ini menjelaskan langkah-langkah lengkap untuk setup, migrasi, seeding, clear cache, dan reindex knowledge base FAQ chatbot BMKG (pilot mode).
  4: 
  5: ---
  6: 
  7: ## 0. Konfigurasi Provider LLM/Embedding/Rerank
  8: Gunakan provider sesuai kebutuhan. API key yang wajib hanya untuk provider yang dipakai.
  9: 
 10: Contoh **Gemini only**:
 11: ```
 12: CHATBOT_LLM_PROVIDER=gemini
 13: CHATBOT_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=gemini
 14: CHATBOT_RERANK_PROVIDER=none
 15: GEMINI_API_KEY=your-gemini-key
 16: ```
 17: 
 18: Contoh **NIM only**:
 19: ```
 20: CHATBOT_LLM_PROVIDER=nim
 21: CHATBOT_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=nim
 22: CHATBOT_RERANK_PROVIDER=nim
 23: NIM_API_KEY=your-nim-key
 24: NIM_MODEL=meta/llama-3.1-70b-instruct
 25: NIM_EMBEDDING_MODEL=llama-3_2-nemoretriever-300m-embed-v1
 26: NIM_RERANK_MODEL=llama-3.2-nemoretriever-500m-rerank-v2
 27: ```
 28: 
 29: Setelah ubah `.env`, jalankan:
 30: ```
 31: php artisan config:clear
 32: php artisan optimize:clear
 33: ```
 34: 
 35: ---
 36: 
 37: ## 1. Migrasi Database
 38: Pastikan semua tabel sudah tersedia:
 39: ```
 40: php artisan migrate
 41: ```
 42: 
 43: ---
 44: 
 45: ## 2. Seed FAQ (Isi FAQ ke Database)
 46: ```
 47: php artisan db:seed --class=FaqSeeder
 48: ```
 49: 
 50: ---
 51: 
 52: ## 3. Clear Cache FAQ (Agar Data Baru Terbaca)
 53: Masuk ke tinker:
 54: ```
 55: php artisan tinker
 56: >>> app(App\Services\FaqService::class)->clearCache();
 57: ```
 58: 
 59: ---
 60: 
 61: ## 4. Reindex Knowledge Chunks (Sinkronisasi FAQ ke Knowledge Base)
 62: Jalankan command berikut:
 63: ```
 64: php artisan faq:reindex
 65: ```
 66: Command ini akan rebuild seluruh knowledge chunk dari FAQ aktif ke tabel `faq_knowledge_chunks`.
 67: 
 68: ---
 69: 
 70: ## 5. (Opsional) Clear Cache Q&A Lama
 71: ```
 72: php artisan tinker
 73: >>> \App\Models\CachedQaPair::truncate();
 74: ```
 75: 
 76: ---
 77: 
 78: ## 6. (Opsional) Restart Queue Worker (Jika Pakai Queue)
 79: ```
 80: php artisan queue:restart
 81: ```
 82: 
 83: ---
 84: 
 85: ## 7. Testing
 86: - Coba tanya chatbot dengan pertanyaan FAQ.
 87: - Jika masih fallback, cek log error dan pastikan semua langkah di atas sudah dijalankan.
 88: 
 89: ---
 90: 
 91: ## Troubleshooting
 92: - Jika FAQ tidak muncul, pastikan sudah reindex dan cache sudah di-clear.
 93: - Pastikan field `is_active` di FAQ bernilai `true`.
 94: - Jika command `faq:reindex` tidak ditemukan, cek di `app/Console/Commands/` untuk nama class-nya.
 95: - Untuk development, pastikan queue worker aktif agar job indexing berjalan otomatis.
 96: 
 97: ---
 98: 
 99: **Referensi:**
100: - Seeder: `database/seeders/FaqSeeder.php`
101: - Service: `app/Services/FaqService.php`, `app/Services/Chatbot/FaqKnowledgeIndexService.php`
102: - Command: `app/Console/Commands/ReindexFaqKnowledge.php`
103: - Model: `app/Models/Faq.php`, `app/Models/FaqKnowledgeChunk.php`
104: 
105: - **Catatan**: Pastikan mengedit file yang sudah ada (`chatbot-rag-plan.md` dan `chatbot-faq-guide.md`) untuk mencatalogkan langkah migrasi dan updatenya, serta menghindari upaya pembuatan file baru yang menghasilkan error token limit.

================
File: docs/chatbot-rag-plan.md
================
  1: # RAG Chatbot Plan — BMKG Data Request System
  2: 
  3: > **Status**: Implemented and Validated (Phase 1-4 Complete)  
  4: > **Author**: Development Team  
  5: > **Created**: 2026-02-13  
  6: > **Updated**: 2026-05-06  
  7: > **Stack**: Laravel 12 + Inertia.js + React 18 + MySQL + Pluggable LLM/Vector Providers
  8: > **Approach**: Multi-Tier Resilient RAG — Highly Fault-Tolerant, AI-Optional (Smart Bypass), Scale-up ready
  9: 
 10: ---
 11: 
 12: ## 1. Overview
 13: 
 14: ### Tujuan
 15: Membangun chatbot berbasis RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) sebagai asisten layanan web permohonan data BMKG. Chatbot membantu user memahami prosedur pengajuan data, jenis data yang tersedia, dan informasi umum terkait BMKG, dengan jawaban yang dibatasi oleh knowledge base resmi dan kontrol keamanan yang ketat.
 16: 
 17: ### Kenapa RAG & Arsitektur Baru Ini?
 18: - **Contextual**: Jawaban berbasis knowledge base resmi BMKG, bukan hallucination
 19: - **Smart Bypass (Zero Token)**: Exact & Semantic FAQ matches bypass LLM sepenuhnya secara *hardcoded* demi akurasi 100% dan efisiensi API.
 20: - **Double Fallback Resilience**: Primary LLM (Nvidia NIM) bermasalah -> Auto-fallback ke Gemini -> Auto-fallback ke Text Retrieval.
 21: - **Self-Healing Cache**: Overwrites "poisoned cache" saat intervensi semantic match terpicu.
 22: - **Lightweight MVP**: local MySQL untuk chunk storage & semantic caching.
 23: 
 24: ### Pendekatan: Pilot Mode → Scale-up Mode
 25: **Pilot (Low-Resource) Mode** (current):
 26: - FAQ sebagai source of truth (admin-managed knowledge)
 27: - Local MySQL storage untuk knowledge chunks dan percakapan chatbot
 28: - Pluggable vector backend (abstraction layer) — siap untuk swap ke Qdrant/Upstash nanti
 29: - Semantic caching dengan similarity berbasis keyword + embedding
 30: - Gemini Flash API (free tier: 15 RPM, 1M token/day)
 31: 
 32: **Scale-up Mode** (future):
 33: - Swap ke Qdrant local (Docker) atau Upstash Vector (managed)
 34: - Streaming responses (Server-Sent Events)
 35: - Advanced caching strategies
 36: - Dedicated LLM provider options
 37: 
 38: ### Scope (MVP)
 39: - Floating chat widget di semua halaman (public + authenticated)
 40: - Guest: max 5 pesan per session (rate limited)
 41: - Logged-in user: unlimited, history tersimpan
 42: - Kontak admin/pelayanan BMKG selalu visible di widget
 43: - Bahasa: Indonesia (primary)
 44: - Knowledge base: FAQ + SOP + jenis data BMKG
 45: 
 46: ---
 47: 
 48: ## 2. Technology Stack (Pilot Mode)
 49: 
 50: | Komponen | Teknologi | Alasan |
 51: |----------|-----------|--------|
 52: | **Retrieval** | Vector Similarity Search (Pluggable) | Semantic search + keyword fallback |
 53: | **LLM** | Pluggable: Gemini / NVIDIA NIM | Bisa switch provider via env (`CHATBOT_LLM_PROVIDER`) |
 54: | **Embedding** | Pluggable: Gemini / NVIDIA NIM | Bisa switch provider via env (`CHATBOT_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER`) |
 55: | **Reranker (optional)** | NVIDIA NeMo Retriever Rerank | Tingkatkan relevansi kandidat context (`CHATBOT_RERANK_PROVIDER=nim`) |
 56: | **Vector Backend** | **MySQL (Pilot) → Qdrant/Upstash (Scale-up)** | Pilot: local MySQL untuk development. Scale-up: pluggable ke Qdrant/Upstash |
 57: | **Knowledge Source** | FAQ Model (via admin CRUD) | Lightweight — FAQ sudah jadi admin surface, tinggal index chunks |
 58: | **Caching** | MySQL + Semantic Similarity | Cache Q&A pairs + simple cosine distance |
 59: | **Frontend** | React Chat Widget | Floating widget, responsive |
 60: | **Backend** | Laravel Services (Pluggable Interfaces) | ChatbotService, RetrievalService, LLMService — siap swap providers |
 61: 
 62: ### Pilihan Vector Backend
 63: 
 64: | Mode | Solusi | Keuntungan | Setup |
 65: |------|--------|-----------|-------|
 66: | **Pilot (MVP)** | MySQL + Simple Similarity | Tidak perlu infra eksternal, lokal development | `php artisan migrate` |
 67: | **Scale-up (Recommended)** | Qdrant Local (Docker) | 1GB free, self-host, unlimited queries | `docker compose` |
 68: | **Alternative** | Upstash Vector (REST API) | Managed, serverless, gratis | Sign up + env var |
 69: 
 70: ### Embedding: Provider-based
 71: - **Gemini**: `gemini-embedding-001` (endpoint Gemini v1beta embedContent)
 72: - **NVIDIA NIM**: `llama-3_2-nemoretriever-300m-embed-v1` (OpenAI-compatible `/v1/embeddings`)
 73: - Provider dipilih via `CHATBOT_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER`
 74: 
 75: ### Provider Notes
 76: - **Gemini**: cocok untuk setup gratis, namun terikat quota free tier.
 77: - **NVIDIA NIM**: mendukung model chat, embedding, dan rerank untuk pipeline RAG.
 78: - API key yang wajib hanya untuk provider yang dipakai.
 79: 
 80: ### Upgrade Path (Scale-up)
 81: Jika BMKG mau invest lebih:
 82: 1. Docker pull `qdrant/qdrant` → local Qdrant cluster (unlimited)
 83: 2. Ganti LLMService → OpenAI GPT-4o atau provider lain (via interface swap)
 84: 3. Streaming responses (Server-Sent Events)
 85: 
 86: ---
 87: 
 88: ## 3. Knowledge Base Architecture (Lightweight)
 89: 
 90: ### Source of Truth: FAQ Model (Admin-Managed)
 91: - Admin CRUD FAQ melalui existing surface (`app/Http/Controllers/Admin/FaqController.php`)
 92: - Setiap create/update/delete FAQ → auto-trigger knowledge chunk sync
 93: - Chunks disimpan di `faq_knowledge_chunks` tabel (lokal MySQL)
 94: - Attachment (PDF/TXT) di FAQ → auto-extract text → chunk
 95: 
 96: ### Knowledge Ingestion Pipeline
 97: ```
 98: Admin Create/Update/Delete FAQ
 99:     ↓
100: Dispatch SyncFaqKnowledge Job
101:     ↓
102: Extract Text (question + answer + attachment)
103:     ↓
104: Split into Chunks (900 char max, sentence-aware)
105:     ↓
106: Store Chunks (faq_knowledge_chunks table with metadata)
107:     ↓
108: (Future) Embed & Sync to Vector Store
109: ```
110: 
111: ### Chunk Storage (Pilot Mode: MySQL)
112: - **Table**: `faq_knowledge_chunks`
113: - **Columns**: `faq_id`, `source_type` (question/answer/attachment), `chunk_text`, `metadata` (JSON), `created_at`
114: - **Index**: `(faq_id, source_type)` untuk retrieval cepat
115: - **Embedding**: Diambil on-demand dari Gemini saat retrieval; tidak disimpan sebagai vektor permanen di MySQL
116: 
117: ### Scale-up Path (Qdrant Local)
118: ```
119: When ready to scale:
120: 1. Docker run Qdrant instance
121: 2. Create VectorStoreService adapter untuk Qdrant (via interface)
122: 3. Run artisan command: php artisan chatbot:sync-to-vector-store
123: 4. Query flow: MySQL chunks + Qdrant vector similarity search
124: ```
125: 
126: ---
127: 
128: ## 4. System Flow (Simplified)
129: 
130: ### Backend Architecture (Laravel) — Phase-based
131: 
132: **Phase 1 (STARTED): Knowledge Indexing Foundation**
133: ```
134: app/Services/Chatbot/
135: ├── FaqKnowledgeIndexService.php         ✅ DONE
136:     └── sync(Faq) → extract text → chunk → save to DB
137: app/Jobs/
138: ├── SyncFaqKnowledge.php                 ✅ DONE
139:     └── Queue job dispatched on FAQ CUD
140: app/Models/
141: ├── Faq.php                              ✅ UPDATED (added knowledgeChunks relation)
142: ├── FaqKnowledgeChunk.php                ✅ DONE (new model)
143: app/Console/Commands/
144: ├── ReindexFaqKnowledge.php              ✅ DONE
145: ```
146: 
147: **Phase 2 (DONE): Retrieval & Chatbot Service Layer**
148: ```
149: app/Services/Chatbot/
150: ├── EmbeddingService.php                 🔲 TODO
151:     └── Provider-based embedding client (Gemini/NIM)
152: ├── VectorStoreService.php               🔲 TODO
153:     └── (Pilot: Simple MySQL similarity, Scale-up: Qdrant/Upstash)
154: ├── RetrievalService.php                 🔲 TODO
155:     └── Orchestrate: encode query → search chunks → rank
156: ├── CacheService.php                     🔲 TODO
157:     └── Q&A caching logic
158: ├── PromptBuilder.php                    🔲 TODO
159:     └── System prompt + context assembly
160: ├── ChatbotService.php                   🔲 TODO
161:     └── Main orchestrator
162: └── LLMService.php                       🔲 TODO
163:     └── Gemini API client
164: app/Services/Contracts/
165: ├── LLMServiceInterface.php              🔲 TODO
166: ├── VectorStoreInterface.php             🔲 TODO
167: app/Http/Controllers/
168: ├── ChatbotController.php                🔲 TODO
169: app/Models/
170: ├── ChatConversation.php                 🔲 TODO
171: ├── ChatMessage.php                      🔲 TODO
172: ├── CachedQaPair.php                     🔲 TODO
173: ```
174: 
175: **Phase 3 (DONE): Frontend Widget**
176: ```
177: resources/js/Components/Chatbot/
178: ├── ChatWidget.jsx
179: ├── ChatWindow.jsx
180: ├── ChatMessage.jsx
181: └── ...
182: ```
183: 
184: ### Frontend Architecture (React)
185: 
186: ```
187: resources/js/
188: ├── Components/
189: │   └── Chatbot/
190: │       ├── ChatWidget.jsx                  # Floating bubble + window container
191: │       ├── ChatWindow.jsx                  # Main chat window
192: │       ├── ChatMessage.jsx                 # Message bubble (user/bot)
193: │       ├── ChatInput.jsx                   # Text input + send button
194: │       ├── ChatHeader.jsx                  # Header with title + close
195: │       ├── AdminContact.jsx                # Kontak admin/pelayanan
196: │       ├── TypingIndicator.jsx             # "Bot sedang mengetik..."
197: │       └── SuggestedQuestions.jsx           # Quick question buttons
198: └── Hooks/
199:     └── useChatbot.js                       # Chat state management hook
200: ```
201: 
202: ### API Routes
203: 
204: ```php
205: // routes/api.php + web middleware (JSON response, but still session-aware)
206: Route::prefix('chatbot')->name('chatbot.')->group(function () {
207:     Route::get('/status', [ChatbotController::class, 'status'])->name('status');
208:     Route::get('/suggested-questions', [ChatbotController::class, 'suggestedQuestions'])->name('suggested.questions');
209:     Route::post('/message', [ChatbotController::class, 'sendMessage'])->name('message')->middleware(['web', 'throttle:15,1']);
210:     Route::get('/conversations/{conversation}', [ChatbotController::class, 'getConversation'])->name('conversation.show')->middleware(['web']);
211:     Route::post('/conversations/{conversation}/archive', [ChatbotController::class, 'archiveConversation'])->name('conversation.archive')->middleware(['web', 'auth']);
212: });
213: ```
214: 
215: > **Note**: Chatbot memang memakai response JSON, tetapi tetap dibungkus middleware `web` untuk session guest tracking, CSRF, dan rate limit. Ini membuat chatbot bisa tetap stateful tanpa membuat API token layer terpisah.
216: 
217: ---
218: 
219: ## 4. Cara Kerja Saat Ini
220: 
221: Bagian ini adalah referensi operasional paling penting untuk proposal dan laporan karena menjelaskan alur aktual yang sudah berjalan di kode.
222: 
223: ### 4.1 Ingestion Knowledge
224: 1. Admin membuat atau memperbarui FAQ melalui CRUD existing.
225: 2. `FaqService` memicu job `SyncFaqKnowledge`.
226: 3. `FaqKnowledgeIndexService` mengekstrak teks dari pertanyaan, jawaban, dan attachment.
227: 4. Teks dipotong menjadi chunk yang lebih kecil dan disimpan ke `faq_knowledge_chunks`.
228: 5. Metadata seperti `source_type`, `faq_question`, dan `source_label` ikut disimpan untuk membantu retrieval dan citation.
229: 
230: ### 4.2 Saat User Mengirim Pesan
231: 1. Frontend chat widget memanggil `POST /api/chatbot/message`.
232: 2. `ChatbotController` memvalidasi input lalu meneruskan ke `ChatbotService`.
233: 3. Pesan disanitasi dan dicek against batas input, rate limit guest, serta deteksi jailbreak.
234: 4. Percakapan diambil atau dibuat berdasarkan `conversation_id` atau `session_id`.
235: 5. Pesan user disimpan ke `chat_messages` agar history percakapan tetap ada.
236: 
237: ### 4.3 SmartFAQ / Retrieval Flow (Multi-Tier Architecture)
238: 1. **Direct FAQ Intercept**: `findDirectFaqAnswer` memverifikasi kesamaan literal (huruf-per-huruf). Jika sama, langsung memuntahkan jawaban asli FAQ (Zero Token, No Latency, Bypass Cache LLM).
239: 2. **Lexical/Semantic FAQ Intercept**: `findNearFaqAnswer` memecah *user prompt* dan membandingkannya dengan koleksi pertanyaan FAQ via *Jaccard Similarity* & *Keyword Overlap*. Jika nilai relevansinya tinggi (>= 22%), langsung memuntahkan jawaban asli FAQ.
240: 3. **Generic Caching Evaluation**: Jika tidak ada FAQ match, sistem membaca `cached_qa_pairs`. Apabila pernah di-*generate* sebelumnya oleh LLM, jawaban dipulihkan dari cache (selama bukan dari rentetan fallback text).
241: 4. **Retrieval & RAG Prompting**: Apabila ini adalah pertanyaan unik yang baru, `RetrievalService` meminta *embedding query*.
242: 5. `VectorStoreService` mensuplai kandidat potongan (chunks) dokumen terbaik via pencocokan *cosine distance*/keywords.
243: 6. `PromptBuilder` menyusun RAG system prompt secara utuh (chunks, history, dan safety boundaries).
244: 7. **The Double-Fallback Generation**:
245:    - Sistem mencoba **Primary LLM** (Provider yang diset via .env, misal: Nvidia NIM).
246:    - *Try-Catch*: Jika Primary LLM error (limit/timeout), catch block ini akan instansiasi kelas wrapper sekunder (**Gemini LLM Service**) secara tersembunyi.
247:    - *Try-Catch 2*: Jika Gemini juga mati, sistem masuk ke Fallback Retrieval Text biasa atau penolakan halus.
248: 8. Jawaban di-*save* ke `chat_messages` dan di-*inject* ke Cache untuk iterasi orang berikutnya.
249: 
250: ### 4.4 Output Policy
251: - Jika konteks cukup, jawaban dibuat spesifik, singkat, dan mengutip sumber relevan.
252: - Jika konteks kosong atau tidak relevan, chatbot diarahkan untuk menjawab aman dan menyarankan kontak admin.
253: - Jika input terdeteksi sebagai jailbreak, chatbot menolak permintaan dengan pesan standar.
254: 
255: ### 4.5 Dampak ke Database
256: - Chat disimpan ke MySQL untuk percakapan, audit, dan history.
257: - Knowledge chunks juga disimpan di MySQL sebagai source of truth pilot mode.
258: - Cache Q&A dipakai untuk mengurangi panggilan LLM berulang.
259: - Karena ada guest history dan cache, beban database tetap ringan tetapi tetap real write path, jadi perlu retensi dan pembersihan cache berkala.
260: 
261: ---
262: 
263: ## 5. Database Design
264: 
265: ### ERD
266: 
267: ```
268: knowledge_documents          knowledge_chunks
269: ┌──────────────────┐        ┌─────────────────────┐
270: │ id (PK)          │───┐    │ id (PK)             │
271: │ title            │   │    │ document_id (FK)     │
272: │ category (enum)  │   └──→ │ content (TEXT)       │ ← FULLTEXT INDEX
273: │ description      │        │ metadata (JSON)      │
274: │ source           │        │ chunk_order (INT)    │
275: │ is_active (BOOL) │        │ tokens_count (INT)   │
276: │ created_at       │        │ created_at           │
277: │ updated_at       │        │ updated_at           │
278: └──────────────────┘        └─────────────────────┘
279: 
280: chat_conversations           chat_messages
281: ┌──────────────────┐        ┌─────────────────────┐
282: │ id (PK)          │───┐    │ id (PK)             │
283: │ user_id (FK,null)│   │    │ conversation_id (FK) │
284: │ session_id       │   └──→ │ role (enum)          │
285: │ title            │        │ content (TEXT)       │
286: │ status (enum)    │        │ sources (JSON)       │
287: │ message_count    │        │ tokens_used (INT)    │
288: │ created_at       │        │ model (VARCHAR)      │
289: │ updated_at       │        │ created_at           │
290: └──────────────────┘        └─────────────────────┘
291: 
292: cached_qa_pairs
293: ┌──────────────────────┐
294: │ id (PK)              │
295: │ question (TEXT)       │ ← FULLTEXT INDEX
296: │ answer (TEXT)         │
297: │ sources (JSON)        │
298: │ hit_count (INT)       │
299: │ is_verified (BOOL)    │
300: │ rating_sum (INT)      │
301: │ rating_count (INT)    │
302: │ last_hit_at           │
303: │ created_at            │
304: │ updated_at            │
305: └──────────────────────┘
306: ```
307: 
308: ### Table Details
309: 
310: #### `knowledge_documents` — Sumber dokumen knowledge base
311: | Column | Type | Description |
312: |--------|------|-------------|
313: | `id` | BIGINT UNSIGNED PK | Auto-increment |
314: | `title` | VARCHAR(255) | Judul dokumen (e.g., "FAQ Permohonan Data") |
315: | `category` | ENUM | `faq`, `data_type`, `sop`, `guide`, `contact`, `general` |
316: | `description` | TEXT, nullable | Deskripsi singkat dokumen |
317: | `source` | VARCHAR(255), nullable | Asal dokumen (URL/file path) |
318: | `is_active` | BOOLEAN, default true | Apakah dokumen aktif digunakan |
319: | `created_at` | TIMESTAMP | |
320: | `updated_at` | TIMESTAMP | |
321: 
322: #### `knowledge_chunks` — Potongan dokumen untuk retrieval
323: | Column | Type | Description |
324: |--------|------|-------------|
325: | `id` | BIGINT UNSIGNED PK | Auto-increment |
326: | `document_id` | FK → knowledge_documents | Parent document |
327: | `content` | TEXT | Isi chunk (max ~500 kata per chunk) |
328: | `metadata` | JSON, nullable | Extra info: `{"section": "syarat", "page": 2}` |
329: | `chunk_order` | INT UNSIGNED | Urutan chunk dalam dokumen |
330: | `tokens_count` | INT UNSIGNED, nullable | Estimasi jumlah token |
331: | `vector_id` | VARCHAR(100), nullable | ID vektor di Upstash/Qdrant (misal: `chunk_42`) |
332: | `embedding_synced_at` | TIMESTAMP, nullable | Kapan terakhir di-embed ke vector store |
333: | `created_at` | TIMESTAMP | |
334: | `updated_at` | TIMESTAMP | |
335: 
336: > **Catatan**: Embedding (array float 768 dimensi) **tidak** disimpan di MySQL — terlalu besar dan tidak bisa di-query secara efisien. Embedding disimpan di **Upstash Vector** / **Qdrant**, MySQL hanya menyimpan konten teks dan metadata. Kolom `vector_id` dipakai untuk sinkronisasi.
337: >
338: > **Index**: `INDEX idx_chunks_document (document_id)` — FULLTEXT dihapus dari kolom ini
339: 
340: #### `chat_conversations` — Sesi percakapan
341: | Column | Type | Description |
342: |--------|------|-------------|
343: | `id` | BIGINT UNSIGNED PK | Auto-increment |
344: | `user_id` | FK → users, nullable | Null jika guest |
345: | `session_id` | VARCHAR(255) | Session ID untuk tracking guest |
346: | `title` | VARCHAR(255), nullable | Auto-generated dari pesan pertama |
347: | `status` | ENUM | `active`, `archived` |
348: | `message_count` | INT UNSIGNED, default 0 | Counter untuk rate limiting |
349: | `created_at` | TIMESTAMP | |
350: | `updated_at` | TIMESTAMP | |
351: 
352: > **Index**: `INDEX idx_conversations_session (session_id)`, `INDEX idx_conversations_user_status (user_id, status)`
353: 
354: #### `chat_messages` — Pesan individual
355: | Column | Type | Description |
356: |--------|------|-------------|
357: | `id` | BIGINT UNSIGNED PK | Auto-increment |
358: | `conversation_id` | FK → chat_conversations | Parent conversation |
359: | `role` | ENUM | `user`, `assistant`, `system` |
360: | `content` | TEXT | Isi pesan |
361: | `sources` | JSON, nullable | Referensi chunk: `[{"chunk_id": 1, "relevance": 0.85}]` |
362: | `tokens_used` | INT UNSIGNED, nullable | Token yang digunakan (monitoring) |
363: | `model` | VARCHAR(100), nullable | Model yang digunakan (e.g., "gemini-2.0-flash") |
364: | `created_at` | TIMESTAMP | |
365: 
366: > **Note**: Tidak ada `updated_at` — messages immutable setelah dibuat
367: 
368: #### `cached_qa_pairs` — Smart FAQ / Semantic Cache
369: | Column | Type | Description |
370: |--------|------|-------------|
371: | `id` | BIGINT UNSIGNED PK | Auto-increment |
372: | `question` | TEXT | Pertanyaan original |
373: | `answer` | TEXT | Jawaban yang sudah di-generate |
374: | `sources` | JSON, nullable | Referensi knowledge chunks |
375: | `hit_count` | INT UNSIGNED, default 0 | Berapa kali cache ini terpakai |
376: | `is_verified` | BOOLEAN, default false | Admin sudah verifikasi jawaban |
377: | `rating_sum` | INT, default 0 | Total rating dari user |
378: | `rating_count` | INT UNSIGNED, default 0 | Jumlah rating |
379: | `last_hit_at` | TIMESTAMP, nullable | Terakhir kali cache dipakai |
380: | `created_at` | TIMESTAMP | |
381: | `updated_at` | TIMESTAMP | |
382: 
383: > **Index**: `FULLTEXT INDEX idx_qa_question (question)` — dipakai untuk exact/near-exact cache lookup sebelum masuk ke vector search
384: 
385: ---
386: 
387: ## 6. Knowledge Base Content
388: 
389: ### Kategori Konten
390: 
391: #### 6.1 FAQ Pengajuan Data
392: - Apa itu layanan pengajuan data BMKG?
393: - Siapa yang bisa melakukan pengajuan?
394: - Bagaimana cara melakukan pengajuan data?
395: - Berapa lama proses pengajuan?
396: - Apakah ada biaya untuk pengajuan data?
397: - Apa saja dokumen yang diperlukan?
398: - Bagaimana cara mengecek status pengajuan?
399: - Apa yang harus dilakukan jika pengajuan ditolak?
400: 
401: #### 5.2 Jenis Data BMKG
402: - **Meteorologi**: Data cuaca, iklim, suhu, curah hujan, kelembaban, kecepatan angin
403: - **Klimatologi**: Data iklim historis, pola cuaca, perubahan iklim
404: - **Geofisika**: Data gempa bumi, tsunami, magnet bumi, gravitasi
405: - **Maritim**: Data gelombang laut, pasang surut, suhu permukaan laut, arus laut
406: 
407: #### 5.3 SOP/Regulasi
408: - Prosedur resmi permohonan data
409: - Persyaratan administratif
410: - Ketentuan penggunaan data
411: - Kebijakan privasi data
412: 
413: #### 5.4 Panduan Website
414: - Cara mendaftar akun
415: - Cara submit permohonan data
416: - Cara melacak status permohonan
417: - Cara mengunduh data yang sudah disetujui
418: - Cara mengedit/membatalkan permohonan
419: 
420: #### 5.5 Info Kontak & Lokasi
421: - Alamat kantor pusat BMKG
422: - Nomor telepon pelayanan
423: - Email pelayanan
424: - Jam operasional
425: - Media sosial resmi
426: - Kantor cabang/regional
427: 
428: ### Chunking Strategy
429: - Setiap chunk: **100-500 kata** (optimal untuk FULLTEXT search)
430: - Satu FAQ = satu chunk (question + answer)
431: - Dokumen panjang (SOP): dipecah per section/halaman
432: - Setiap chunk punya metadata: `{"section": "...", "topic": "..."}`
433: 
434: ### 5.6 Content Preparation Checklist
435: - **Extract** teks relevan dari PDF regulasi atau dokumen lain menggunakan `pdftotext`, LibreOffice, atau copy manual.
436: - **Structure** konten menjadi potongan 100–300 kata per topik lalu beri metadata (`section`, `source`, `topic`).
437: - **Store** potongan tersebut di `docs/knowledge/` (Markdown/JSON) jika kamu ingin review sebelum dimasukkan ke database.
438: - **Seed** ke database melalui `KnowledgeBaseSeeder` atau `php artisan tinker` (`KnowledgeDocument::create()` + `KnowledgeChunk::create()`).
439: - **Verify** dengan `php artisan test --filter=Chatbot` dan coba UI (`php artisan serve`) sebelum dianggap ready.
440: 
441: ---
442: 
443: ## 7. System Prompt Design
444: 
445: ```
446: Kamu adalah asisten virtual BMKG (Badan Meteorologi, Klimatologi, dan Geofisika) 
447: yang membantu pengguna dengan layanan permohonan data.
448: 
449: ATURAN:
450: 1. Jawab HANYA berdasarkan konteks yang diberikan. Jangan mengarang informasi.
451: 2. Jika tidak tahu jawabannya, katakan dengan jujur dan arahkan ke kontak admin.
452: 3. Gunakan bahasa Indonesia yang sopan dan profesional.
453: 4. Jawab dengan ringkas dan jelas (maksimal 2-3 paragraf).
454: 5. Jika pertanyaan di luar topik BMKG/permohonan data, tolak dengan sopan.
455: 6. Sertakan referensi/sumber jika memungkinkan.
456: 7. Untuk masalah teknis atau kompleks, sarankan menghubungi admin langsung.
457: 
458: KONTAK ADMIN:
459: - Email: pelayanan@bmkg.go.id
460: - Telepon: (021) 6546315
461: - WhatsApp: +62-xxx-xxxx-xxxx
462: - Jam operasional: Senin-Jumat, 08:00-16:00 WIB
463: 
464: KONTEKS:
465: {retrieved_chunks}
466: 
467: RIWAYAT PERCAKAPAN:
468: {conversation_history}
469: 
470: PERTANYAAN USER:
471: {user_question}
472: ```

476: ## 8. Chat Widget UI Design
477: 
478: ### Floating Button (Collapsed)
479: ```
480:                     ┌──────┐
481:                     │  💬  │  ← Circular button, bottom-right
482:                     │      │     Pulse animation saat pertama load
483:                     └──────┘
484: ```
485: 
486: ### Chat Window (Expanded)
487: ```
488: ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
489: │ 🤖 Asisten BMKG           [−] [✕] │  ← Header: title, minimize, close
490: ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
491: │                                     │
492: │  ┌─────────────────────────┐        │  ← Bot welcome message
493: │  │ Halo! 👋 Saya asisten   │        │
494: │  │ virtual BMKG. Ada yang  │        │
495: │  │ bisa saya bantu terkait │        │
496: │  │ permohonan data?        │        │
497: │  └─────────────────────────┘        │
498: │                                     │
499: │  ┌──────────────────┐               │  ← Suggested questions
500: │  │ 📋 Cara request  │               │
501: │  │ 📊 Jenis data    │               │
502: │  │ ⏱️ Berapa lama?  │               │
503: │  └──────────────────┘               │
504: │                                     │
505: │        ┌─────────────────────┐      │  ← User message
506: │        │ Bagaimana cara      │      │
507: │        │ mengajukan          │      │
508: │        │ permohonan data?    │      │
509: │        └─────────────────────┘      │
510: │                                     │
511: │  ┌─────────────────────────┐        │  ← Bot response
512: │  │ Untuk mengajukan        │        │
513: │  │ permohonan data BMKG:   │        │
514: │  │                         │        │
515: │  │ 1. Daftar/Login akun    │        │
516: │  │ 2. Isi formulir data    │        │
517: │  │ 3. Upload dokumen       │        │
518: │  │ 4. Submit permohonan    │        │
519: │  │                         │        │
520: │  │ 📌 Sumber: FAQ #3       │        │
521: │  └─────────────────────────┘        │
522: │                                     │
523: │  ⟳ Bot sedang mengetik...           │  ← Typing indicator
524: │                                     │
525: ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
526: │ [Ketik pertanyaan Anda...]  [Send]  │  ← Input area
527: ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
528: │ 📞 Butuh bantuan langsung?          │  ← Admin contact section
529: │ WhatsApp: +62-xxx | Email: xxx      │     Selalu visible
530: └─────────────────────────────────────┘
531: ```
532: 
533: ### Responsive Design
534: - **Desktop**: Widget width 380px, height 550px, bottom-right corner
535: - **Mobile**: Full-screen overlay saat expanded
536: - **Tablet**: Widget width 350px
537: 
538: ### Suggested Questions (Quick Buttons)
539: 1. "Bagaimana cara mengajukan permohonan data?"
540: 2. "Apa saja jenis data yang tersedia?"
541: 3. "Berapa lama proses permohonan?"
542: 4. "Apa persyaratan permohonan data?"
543: 5. "Bagaimana cara mengecek status permohonan?"
544: 
545: ---
546: 
547: ## 9. Rate Limiting & Security
548: 
549: ### Guest (Belum Login)
550: - Max **5 pesan per session**
551: - Tracked by `session_id` (Laravel session)
552: - Setelah limit, tampilkan: "Silakan login untuk melanjutkan percakapan" + kontak admin
553: - Tidak ada history persistence (hilang setelah session expire)
554: 
555: ### Authenticated User
556: - **Unlimited** pesan
557: - History tersimpan per conversation
558: - Bisa mulai conversation baru
559: - Bisa lihat history percakapan sebelumnya (future)
560: 
561: ### Security
562: - CSRF protection via Laravel session
563: - Input sanitization (strip HTML tags)
564: - Rate limiting API: `throttle:15,1` (15 req/menit, sesuai Gemini limit)
565: - Max input length: 500 karakter per pesan
566: - Jangan expose knowledge_chunks raw ke frontend
567: - Gemini API key di `.env`, never committed
568: - **Prompt Injection Protection (Jailbreak Defense)**:
569:   - System prompt dengan prioritas keamanan tertinggi
570:   - Delimiter yang kuat (`[BEGIN_KONTEKS]`, `[END_KONTEKS]`, dll) untuk memisahkan instruksi dari input
571:   - Input sanitization yang aktif menghapus pattern berbahaya:
572:     - `ignore previous instructions`
573:     - `system prompt`, `system instructions`
574:     - `developer mode`, `admin mode`
575:     - `act as`, `pretend you are`
576:     - `jailbreak`, `DAN`, `Do Anything Now`
577:     - Spoofing delimiter: `[BEGIN_`, `[END_`, `<system>`
578:   - Deteksi jailbreak otomatis (pattern + behavioral analysis)
579:   - Response refusal dengan pesan standar jika terdeteksi upaya manipulasi
580:   - Pesan tidak menyebutkan instruksi sistem atau konteks mentah
581: 
582: ---

660: ## 11. Admin OCR Insight (future)
661: 
662: - Catat dulu ide ini di repo tanpa push — kamu akan `git clone` kembali ketika fitur core siap.
663: - Tujuannya: setelah pemohon upload surat permohonan/data, jalankan OCR untuk ekstraksi informasi kunci (nama pemohon, instansi/perusahaan, jenis data yang dimohon, tujuan penggunaan, apakah komersial/non-komersial, dokumen pendukung lain).
664: - Outputnya harus menjadi `structured insight` yang bisa disimpan di database (JSON) sekaligus dipakai di dashboard admin. Bisa tambahkan rekomendasi otomatis (misal minta form komersial, referensi PNBP, kontak admin) berdasarkan hasil OCR.
665: - Nanti OCR bisa dipanggil lewat queue/job setelah file upload agar tidak blocking user upload.
666: - Simpan script parsing ini di folder `docs/notes/ocr-insight.md` agar langkah pengembangan terdokumentasi sebelum kamu mulai ulang dari fresh clone.

743: 
744: ## 13. Configuration
745: 
746: ### .env Variables
747: ```env
748: # Provider selection
749: CHATBOT_LLM_PROVIDER=gemini        # gemini|nim
750: CHATBOT_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=gemini  # gemini|nim
751: CHATBOT_RERANK_PROVIDER=none       # none|nim
752: 
753: # Gemini (required only if provider=gemini)
754: GEMINI_API_KEY=your-api-key-here
755: GEMINI_MODEL=gemini-2.0-flash
756: GEMINI_EMBEDDING_MODEL=gemini-embedding-001
757: 
758: # NVIDIA NIM (required only if provider=nim)
759: NIM_API_KEY=your-nim-key-here
760: NIM_MODEL=meta/llama-3.1-70b-instruct
761: NIM_EMBEDDING_MODEL=llama-3_2-nemoretriever-300m-embed-v1
762: NIM_RERANK_MODEL=llama-3.2-nemoretriever-500m-rerank-v2
763: NIM_ENDPOINT=https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1
764: NIM_RERANK_ENDPOINT=https://ai.api.nvidia.com/v1/retrieval/nvidia
765: 
766: # Vector Store — pilih salah satu:
767: # Opsi A: Upstash Vector (recommended, managed)
768: VECTOR_STORE_DRIVER=upstash
769: UPSTASH_VECTOR_REST_URL=https://xxx-vector.upstash.io
770: UPSTASH_VECTOR_REST_TOKEN=your-token-here
771: 
772: # Opsi B: Qdrant Cloud (free 1GB cluster)
773: # VECTOR_STORE_DRIVER=qdrant
774: # QDRANT_URL=https://xxx.qdrant.io
775: # QDRANT_API_KEY=your-api-key-here
776: # QDRANT_COLLECTION=bmkg_knowledge
777: 
778: # Chatbot Settings
779: CHATBOT_ENABLED=true
780: CHATBOT_GUEST_MESSAGE_LIMIT=5
781: CHATBOT_MAX_INPUT_LENGTH=500
782: CHATBOT_MAX_CONTEXT_CHUNKS=5
783: CHATBOT_CACHE_SIMILARITY_THRESHOLD=0.7
784: ```
785: 
786: ### config/chatbot.php
787: ```php
788: return [
789:     'enabled' => env('CHATBOT_ENABLED', true),
790: 
791:     'gemini' => [
792:         'api_key' => env('GEMINI_API_KEY'),
793:         'model' => env('GEMINI_MODEL', 'gemini-2.0-flash'),
794:         'embedding_model' => env('GEMINI_EMBEDDING_MODEL', 'text-embedding-004'),
795:         'endpoint' => 'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta',
796:         'max_tokens' => 1024,
797:         'temperature' => 0.3,  // Lower = more factual
798:     ],
799: 
800:     // Vector Store: 'upstash' atau 'qdrant'
801:     'vector_store' => [
802:         'driver' => env('VECTOR_STORE_DRIVER', 'upstash'),
803: 
804:         'upstash' => [
805:             'url'   => env('UPSTASH_VECTOR_REST_URL'),
806:             'token' => env('UPSTASH_VECTOR_REST_TOKEN'),
807:         ],
808: 
809:         'qdrant' => [
810:             'url'        => env('QDRANT_URL', 'http://localhost:6333'),
811:             'api_key'    => env('QDRANT_API_KEY'),
812:             'collection' => env('QDRANT_COLLECTION', 'bmkg_knowledge'),
813:         ],
814:     ],
815: 
816:     'retrieval' => [
817:         'max_chunks' => (int) env('CHATBOT_MAX_CONTEXT_CHUNKS', 5),
818:         'min_relevance_score' => 0.5,  // Cosine similarity threshold (0-1)
819:     ],
820: 
821:     'cache' => [
822:         'enabled' => true,
823:         'similarity_threshold' => (float) env('CHATBOT_CACHE_SIMILARITY_THRESHOLD', 0.7),
824:         'max_age_days' => 30,
825:     ],
826: 
827:     'limits' => [
828:         'guest_max_messages' => (int) env('CHATBOT_GUEST_MESSAGE_LIMIT', 5),
829:         'max_input_length' => (int) env('CHATBOT_MAX_INPUT_LENGTH', 500),
830:         'rate_limit_per_minute' => 15,
831:     ],
832: 
833:     'ui' => [
834:         'welcome_message' => 'Halo! 👋 Saya asisten virtual BMKG. Ada yang bisa saya bantu terkait permohonan data?',
835:         'guest_limit_message' => 'Anda telah mencapai batas percakapan. Silakan login atau hubungi admin untuk bantuan lebih lanjut.',
836:         'error_message' => 'Maaf, terjadi kesalahan. Silakan coba lagi atau hubungi admin.',
837:         'offline_message' => 'Chatbot sedang tidak tersedia. Silakan hubungi admin langsung.',
838:     ],
839: 
840:     'admin_contact' => [
841:         'phone' => '(021) 6546315',
842:         'whatsapp' => '+62-xxx-xxxx-xxxx',
843:         'email' => 'pelayanan@bmkg.go.id',
844:         'hours' => 'Senin-Jumat, 08:00-16:00 WIB',
845:     ],
846: ];
847: ```
848:

876: 
877: ## 15. Monitoring & Analytics
878: 
879: ### Metrics to Track
880: | Metric | How | Purpose |
881: |--------|-----|---------|
882: | Total conversations | `COUNT(chat_conversations)` | Usage tracking |
883: | Messages per day | `COUNT(chat_messages) GROUP BY date` | Traffic patterns |
884: | Cache hit rate | `cached hits / total queries` | Cost savings |
885: | Avg response time | Log in chat_messages | Performance |
886: | Top questions | `cached_qa_pairs ORDER BY hit_count` | Content gaps |
887: | Guest vs Auth ratio | `chat_conversations WHERE user_id IS NULL` | Feature adoption |
888: | Gemini token usage | Sum `tokens_used` from chat_messages | Cost monitoring |
889: 
890: ---
891: 
892: ## 16. Risks & Mitigations
893: 
894: | Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
895: |------|--------|------------|
896: | Gemini free tier rate limit hit | Chatbot unresponsive | Aggressive caching, queue requests |
897: | Gemini API down | No chatbot | Fallback to cached answers + "contact admin" |
898: | Hallucination/wrong answers | Misinformation | Strict system prompt, only use provided context |
899: | Inappropriate questions | Reputation risk | Content filtering, topic restriction in prompt |
900: | Database performance (large knowledge base) | Slow retrieval | FULLTEXT indexed, limit chunk count |
901: | Session hijacking (guest) | Rate limit bypass | Laravel session security, IP tracking |
902: | Knowledge base outdated | Stale answers | Regular admin review, `is_active` flag |
903: 
904: ---

================
File: docs/dashboard-backend-notes.md
================
 1: # Backend & Data Notes for Admin/User Dashboards
 2: 
 3: ## Dashboard Logic Structure
 4: - **Controller Strategy**: The main `DashboardController` (or `dashboard` route handler) acts as a dispatcher.
 5:   - Checks `auth.user.role`.
 6:   - If `admin` or `superadmin` -> Renders `AdminDashboard.jsx`.
 7:   - If `user` -> Renders `UserDashboard.jsx`.
 8:   - This separation ensures role-specific logic and UI are decoupled.
 9: 
10: ## Data sources & endpoints needed
11: 1. **Dashboard stats (admin + superadmin)**
12:    - `/api/dashboard/stats` (Inertia controller method) returns counts: `pending_requests`, `approved_requests`, `rejected_requests`, `total_users`, `average_request_turnaround`, `new_requests_today`.
13:    - Source: `DataRequest` model with scopes like `pending`, `approved`, `createdToday`.
14:    - Cache per minute if counts expensive.
15: 
16: 2. **Recent data requests panel**
17:    - Endpoint: `DataRequestController@index` with `?per_page=6&order=latest`.
18:    - Include relations: `user`, `requestType`, `assigned_admin`.
19:    - Fields: `id`, `title`, `user.name`, `status`, `submitted_at`, `priority`.
20: 
21: 3. **Requests table & filters**
22:    - Filters: status, data_type, requester name, date range.
23:    - Backend: repository method `filterBy($filters)` returning paginated results plus counts for status chips.
24: 
25: 4. **Superadmin user management data**
26:    - Endpoint: `UserManagementController@index` already returning paginated `users`.
27:    - Need `roles`, `permissions` relationships to display badges.
28:    - Additional actions: `users.resetPassword`, `users.destroy`, `users.store`, `users.assignRole`.
29:    - For export: `UserExportService` (CSV) triggered from front-end button.
30: 
31: 5. **Export functionality**
32:    - `AdminExportController@exportRequests` returns `StreamedResponse` CSV built via `Leaguelysystem` or `FastExcel`.
33:    - Trigger from Dashboard quick action; includes applied filters.
34:    - Superadmin uses same export; include ability to export filtered user list.
35: 
36: 6. **Notifications & actions**
37:    - Approve/reject actions should dispatch events / create `DataRequestActivityLog` records.
38:    - Email notifications optional—documented for future (notify request owner on decision).
39: 
40: 7. **Authorization**
41:    - Policies: `DataRequestPolicy` for `viewAny`, `approve`, `reject` (admin/superadmin) and `UserPolicy` for `manage`.
42:    - Gates for `superadmin` exclusive features.
43: 
44: 8. **Inertia props**
45:    - Dashboard controller must share `auth.user`, `stats`, `recentRequests`, `requestFilters` (backed by query params).
46:    - Use `HandleInertiaRequests` to share `roles`, `permissions`, `flash`.
47: 
48: ## Notes for implementation
49: - Keep controllers thin by delegating to `DashboardService` / `DataRequestRepository`.
50: - Write feature tests covering stats loads for admin vs superadmin (see `tests/Feature/DataRequestTest.php`).
51: - Export tests can hit `artisan route:list --name=export` to ensure CSV downloads.
52: - Ensure cache invalidation when requests change status, use `Cache::tags(['dashboard-stats'])->forget(...)`.
