 1: export default function BrandLogo({ className = "h-9 w-auto", mode = 'dark', isCollapsed = false }) {
 2:     const isLight = mode === 'light';
 3: 
 4:     return (
 5:         <div className={`flex items-center transition-all duration-300 ${isCollapsed ? 'justify-center' : 'gap-3'} ${className}`}>
 6:             <img
 7:                 src="/images/bmkg-logo.png"
 8:                 alt="BMKG"
 9:                 // Tambahkan transisi pada lebar gambar jika perlu
10:                 className={`h-full w-auto object-contain transition-all duration-300 ${isCollapsed ? 'scale-90' : 'scale-100'}`}
11:                 onError={(e) => { e.target.style.display = 'none'; }}
12:             />
13: 
14:             {/* Gunakan max-width untuk animasi smooth dari teks */}
15:             <div className={`
16:                 flex items-center overflow-hidden transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out
17:                 ${isCollapsed ? 'max-w-0 opacity-0' : 'max-w-[200px] opacity-100'}
18:             `}>
19:                 <span className={`font-bold text-xl tracking-tight leading-none whitespace-nowrap ${isLight ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-900'}`}>
20:                     BMKG <span className={`font-normal ${isLight ? 'text-blue-200' : 'text-slate-500'}`}>Data</span>
21:                 </span>
22:             </div>
23:         </div>
24:     );
25: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/ChatBotButton.jsx
================
  1: import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
  2: import { useChatbot } from '@/Hooks/useChatbot';
  3: import { usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';
  4: import ReactMarkdown from 'react-markdown';
  5: import remarkGfm from 'remark-gfm';
  6: import rehypeSanitize from 'rehype-sanitize';
  7: 
  8: export default function ChatBotButton() {
  9:     const [isHovered, setIsHovered] = useState(false);
 10:     const [isHistoryOpen, setIsHistoryOpen] = useState(false);
 11:     const { contactSettings = {}, auth } = usePage().props;
 12: 
 13:     const whatsapp = contactSettings?.cs_whatsapp || '';
 14:     const phone = contactSettings?.cs_phone || '';
 15:     const email = contactSettings?.cs_email || '';
 16:     const waHref = whatsapp ? `https://wa.me/${whatsapp.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '')}` : null;
 17:     const phoneHref = phone ? `tel:${phone.replace(/[^0-9+]/g, '')}` : null;
 18:     const emailHref = email ? `mailto:${email}` : null;
 19: 
 20:     const {
 21:         isOpen,
 22:         messages,
 23:         isLoading,
 24:         suggestedQuestions,
 25:         openChat,
 26:         closeChat,
 27:         sendMessage,
 28:         conversationsList,
 29:         isLoadingList,
 30:         fetchConversationsList,
 31:         loadConversation,
 32:         clearConversation,
 33:     } = useChatbot({ isAuthenticated: !!auth?.user });
 34: 
 35:     const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('');
 36:     const messagesEndRef = useRef(null);
 37: 
 38:     useEffect(() => {
 39:         messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
 40:     }, [messages, isOpen, isLoading]);
 41: 
 42:     useEffect(() => {
 43:         if (isHistoryOpen) {
 44:             fetchConversationsList();
 45:         }
 46:     }, [isHistoryOpen, fetchConversationsList]);
 47: 
 48:     const handleLoadHistory = async (id) => {
 49:         try {
 50:             await loadConversation(id);
 51:             setIsHistoryOpen(false);
 52:         } catch (e) {
 53:             console.error('Failed to load conversation', e);
 54:         }
 55:     };
 56: 
 57:     const handleNewChat = () => {
 58:         clearConversation();
 59:         setIsHistoryOpen(false);
 60:     };
 61: 
 62:     const handleSend = async (e) => {
 63:         e.preventDefault();
 64:         if (!inputValue.trim() || isLoading) return;
 65: 
 66:         const current = inputValue;
 67:         setInputValue('');
 68:         try {
 69:             await sendMessage(current);
 70:         } catch {
 71:             // Error message already handled by useChatbot hook.
 72:         }
 73:     };
 74: 
 75:     return (
 76:         <div className="fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 flex flex-col items-end gap-4 p-2 sm:bottom-10 sm:right-10 sm:p-0 pointer-events-none">
 77:             {isOpen && (
 78:                 <div className="bg-white w-[calc(100vw-40px)] sm:w-[420px] md:w-[460px] h-[560px] max-h-[calc(100vh-140px)] rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-slate-200 flex flex-col overflow-hidden animate-fade-in-up origin-bottom-right mb-2 pointer-events-auto">
 79:                     <div className="bg-slate-900 p-4 flex items-center justify-between text-white">
 80:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 81:                             <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-white/10 flex items-center justify-center">
 82:                                 <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
 83:                                     <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M8 10h.01M12 10h.01M16 10h.01M9 16H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-5l-5 5v-5z" />
 84:                                 </svg>
 85:                             </div>
 86:                             <div>
 87:                                 <h3 className="font-bold text-sm">Asisten BMKG</h3>
 88:                                 <div className="text-[10px] text-slate-300 leading-relaxed">
 89:                                     {phone && phoneHref && (
 90:                                         <a href={phoneHref} className="block hover:text-white transition-colors">
 91:                                             {phone}
 92:                                         </a>
 93:                                     )}
 94:                                     {email && emailHref && (
 95:                                         <a href={emailHref} className="block hover:text-white transition-colors">
 96:                                             {email}
 97:                                         </a>
 98:                                     )}
 99:                                 </div>
100:                             </div>
101:                         </div>
102:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
103:                             {auth?.user && (
104:                                 <button
105:                                     onClick={() => setIsHistoryOpen(!isHistoryOpen)}
106:                                     className={`p-2 transition-colors ${isHistoryOpen ? 'text-white bg-white/10 rounded-lg' : 'text-slate-300 hover:text-white'}`}
107:                                     title="Riwayat Percakapan"
108:                                     aria-label="Riwayat Percakapan"
109:                                 >
110:                                     <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
111:                                         <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M12 8v4l3 3m6-3a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" />
112:                                     </svg>
113:                                 </button>
114:                             )}
115:                             {whatsapp && waHref && (
116:                                 <a
117:                                     href={waHref}
118:                                     target="_blank"
119:                                     rel="noopener noreferrer"
120:                                     className="p-2 text-slate-300 hover:text-white transition-colors"
121:                                     title="Hubungi via WhatsApp"
122:                                     aria-label="Hubungi via WhatsApp"
123:                                 >
124:                                     <svg className="w-5 h-5" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true">
125:                                         <path d="M20.52 3.48A11.82 11.82 0 0 0 12.04 0C5.5 0 .2 5.3.2 11.84c0 2.08.54 4.11 1.57 5.89L0 24l6.47-1.69a11.8 11.8 0 0 0 5.57 1.42h.01c6.54 0 11.84-5.3 11.84-11.84 0-3.16-1.23-6.13-3.37-8.41Zm-8.48 18.2h-.01a9.8 9.8 0 0 1-5-1.37l-.36-.21-3.84 1 1.03-3.74-.24-.39a9.8 9.8 0 0 1-1.5-5.17c0-5.44 4.42-9.86 9.86-9.86 2.63 0 5.1 1.03 6.95 2.88a9.77 9.77 0 0 1 2.9 6.95c0 5.44-4.43 9.9-9.8 9.9Zm5.4-7.37c-.3-.15-1.77-.87-2.04-.97-.27-.1-.47-.15-.67.15-.2.3-.77.97-.95 1.17-.17.2-.35.22-.65.08-.3-.15-1.28-.47-2.43-1.5-.9-.8-1.5-1.8-1.67-2.1-.17-.3-.02-.46.13-.61.13-.13.3-.35.45-.52.15-.18.2-.3.3-.5.1-.2.05-.37-.03-.52-.08-.15-.67-1.62-.92-2.22-.24-.58-.49-.5-.67-.5h-.57c-.2 0-.52.08-.8.37-.27.3-1.05 1.02-1.05 2.48 0 1.45 1.08 2.86 1.22 3.06.15.2 2.11 3.23 5.11 4.52.71.31 1.27.5 1.7.64.72.23 1.38.2 1.9.12.58-.09 1.77-.72 2.02-1.43.25-.7.25-1.3.17-1.43-.07-.12-.27-.2-.57-.35Z" />
126:                                     </svg>
127:                                 </a>
128:                             )}
129:                             <button onClick={closeChat} className="p-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors">
130:                                 <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
131:                                     <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" />
132:                                 </svg>
133:                             </button>
134:                         </div>
135:                     </div>
136: 
137:                     {isHistoryOpen ? (
138:                         <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 bg-slate-50 scrollbar-hide">
139:                             <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
140:                                 <h4 className="font-bold text-sm text-slate-700">Riwayat Percakapan</h4>
141:                                 <button onClick={handleNewChat} className="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors">
142:                                     + Percakapan Baru
143:                                 </button>
144:                             </div>
145:                             <div className="space-y-3">
146:                                 {isLoadingList ? (
147:                                     <div className="text-center py-8">
148:                                         <div className="w-6 h-6 border-2 border-slate-300 border-t-slate-800 rounded-full animate-spin mx-auto"></div>
149:                                         <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-2">Memuat riwayat...</p>
150:                                     </div>
151:                                 ) : conversationsList && conversationsList.length > 0 ? (
152:                                     conversationsList.map((conv) => (
153:                                         <button 
154:                                             key={conv.id} 
155:                                             onClick={() => handleLoadHistory(conv.id)}
156:                                             className="w-full text-left p-3 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl hover:border-slate-400 hover:shadow-sm transition-all focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-400"
157:                                         >
158:                                             <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-800 truncate">{conv.title}</p>
159:                                             <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-2">
160:                                                 <span className="text-[11px] text-slate-500">{conv.message_count} pesan</span>
161:                                                 <span className="text-[11px] text-slate-400">
162:                                                     {new Date(conv.updated_at).toLocaleDateString('id-ID', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short' })}
163:                                                 </span>
164:                                             </div>
165:                                         </button>
166:                                     ))
167:                                 ) : (
168:                                     <div className="text-sm text-slate-500 text-center py-8 bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-xl shadow-sm">
169:                                         <svg className="w-10 h-10 mx-auto text-slate-300 mb-2" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
170:                                             <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={1.5} d="M12 8v4l3 3m6-3a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" />
171:                                         </svg>
172:                                         <p>Belum ada riwayat tersedia</p>
173:                                     </div>
174:                                 )}
175:                             </div>
176:                         </div>
177:                     ) : (
178:                         <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4 bg-slate-50 scrollbar-hide">
179:                             {messages.length === 0 && (
180:                                 <div className="flex justify-start">
181:                                 <div className="max-w-[80%] p-3 rounded-2xl text-sm leading-relaxed bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 rounded-tl-none shadow-sm">
182:                                     Halo! Ada yang bisa saya bantu terkait Permohonan Data BMKG?
183:                                 </div>
184:                             </div>
185:                         )}
186: 
187:                         {messages.map((msg) => {
188:                             const isUser = msg.role === 'user';
189:                             return (
190:                                 <div key={msg.id} className={`flex ${isUser ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>
191:                                     <div
192:                                         className={`max-w-[80%] p-3 rounded-2xl text-sm leading-relaxed ${
193:                                             isUser
194:                                                 ? 'bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-tr-none'
195:                                                 : msg.isError
196:                                                     ? 'bg-red-50 border border-red-200 text-red-700 rounded-tl-none shadow-sm'
197:                                                     : 'bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 rounded-tl-none shadow-sm'
198:                                         }`}
199:                                     >
200:                                         <div className={`prose prose-sm max-w-full ${isUser ? 'prose-invert text-white' : 'text-slate-700'}`}>
201:                                             <ReactMarkdown
202:                                                 remarkPlugins={[remarkGfm]}
203:                                                 rehypePlugins={[rehypeSanitize]}
204:                                                 components={{
205:                                                     a: ({ node, ...props }) => (
206:                                                         <a
207:                                                             {...props}
208:                                                             target="_blank"
209:                                                             rel="noopener noreferrer"
210:                                                             className={isUser ? 'underline text-slate-100 hover:text-white' : 'underline text-sky-600 hover:text-sky-700'}
211:                                                         />
212:                                                     ),
213:                                                 }}
214:                                             >
215:                                                 {String(msg.content ?? '')}
216:                                             </ReactMarkdown>
217:                                         </div>
218:                                     </div>
219:                                 </div>
220:                             );
221:                         })}
222: 
223:                         {isLoading && (
224:                             <div className="flex justify-start">
225:                                 <div className="max-w-[80%] p-3 rounded-2xl text-sm leading-relaxed bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-500 rounded-tl-none shadow-sm">
226:                                     Memproses pertanyaan...
227:                                 </div>
228:                             </div>
229:                         )}
230: 
231:                         {suggestedQuestions.length > 0 && !isLoading && (
232:                             <div className="pt-1">
233:                                 <p className="text-[11px] text-slate-500 mb-2">Pertanyaan cepat:</p>
234:                                 <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
235:                                     {suggestedQuestions.slice(0, 3).map((q) => (
236:                                         <button
237:                                             key={q}
238:                                             type="button"
239:                                             onClick={() => sendMessage(q)}
240:                                             className="text-[11px] px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-slate-300 bg-white text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors"
241:                                         >
242:                                             {q}
243:                                         </button>
244:                                     ))}
245:                                 </div>
246:                             </div>
247:                         )}
248:                         <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
249:                         </div>
250:                     )} {/* Tutup kondisi isHistoryOpen */}
251: 
252:                     {!isHistoryOpen && (
253:                         <form onSubmit={handleSend} className="p-3 bg-white border-t border-slate-100 flex gap-2">
254:                             <input
255:                                 type="text"
256:                                 value={inputValue}
257:                                 onChange={(e) => setInputValue(e.target.value)}
258:                                 placeholder="Ketik pesan..."
259:                                 className="flex-1 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-slate-900 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-900 transition-all text-slate-800 placeholder:text-slate-400"
260:                             />
261:                             <button
262:                                 type="submit"
263:                                 disabled={!inputValue.trim() || isLoading}
264:                                 className="p-2 bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-800 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors"
265:                             >
266:                                 <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
267:                                     <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M12 19l9 2-9-18-9 18 9-2zm0 0v-8" />
268:                                 </svg>
269:                             </button>
270:                         </form>
271:                     )}
272:                 </div>
273:             )}
274: 
275:             <div className="relative flex items-center justify-end">
276:                 {!isOpen && isHovered && (
277:                     <div
278:                         className="absolute right-[calc(100%+1rem)] whitespace-nowrap hidden sm:block bg-white px-4 py-2 rounded-xl shadow-lg border border-slate-100 transition-all duration-300 transform origin-right opacity-100 scale-100 pointer-events-auto"
279:                     >
280:                         <p className="text-sm font-bold text-slate-800">Butuh Bantuan?</p>
281:                     </div>
282:                 )}
283: 
284:                 <button
285:                     onClick={isOpen ? closeChat : openChat}
286:                     onMouseEnter={() => setIsHovered(true)}
287:                     onMouseLeave={() => setIsHovered(false)}
288:                     className={`relative group w-14 h-14 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-slate-900/20 active:scale-95 pointer-events-auto ${
289:                         isOpen ? 'bg-slate-800 rotate-90 shadow-slate-900/40' : 'bg-slate-900 shadow-slate-900/30 hover:scale-110 hover:shadow-slate-900/40'
290:                     }`}
291:                 >
292:                     {!isOpen && <span className="absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-slate-400 opacity-20 animate-ping group-hover:hidden"></span>}
293: 
294:                     {isOpen ? (
295:                         <svg className="w-6 h-6 text-white" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
296:                             <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" />
297:                         </svg>
298:                     ) : (
299:                         <svg
300:                             className="w-6 h-6 text-white transform transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:rotate-12"
301:                             fill="none"
302:                             viewBox="0 0 24 24"
303:                             stroke="currentColor"
304:                             strokeWidth={2}
305:                         >
306:                             <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M8 10h.01M12 10h.01M16 10h.01M9 16H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-5l-5 5v-5z" />
307:                         </svg>
308:                     )}
309:                 </button>
310:             </div>
311:         </div>
312:     );
313: }

 1: export default function DangerButton({
 2:     className = '',
 3:     disabled,
 4:     children,
 5:     ...props
 6: }) {
 7:     return (
 8:         <button
 9:             {...props}
10:             className={
11:                 `inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-transparent bg-red-600 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-white transition duration-150 ease-in-out hover:bg-red-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500 focus:ring-offset-2 active:bg-red-700 ${
12:                     disabled && 'opacity-25'
13:                 } ` + className
14:             }
15:             disabled={disabled}
16:         >
17:             {children}
18:         </button>
19:     );
20: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/DashboardSidebar.jsx
================
  1: import { Link, usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';
  2: import { ArrowRightOnRectangleIcon, ChevronRightIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  3: import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  4: import BrandLogo from '@/Components/BrandLogo';
  5: import { ADMIN_MANAGEMENT_NAV_ITEMS, ADMIN_NAV_ITEMS, SUPERADMIN_NAV_ITEMS, SUPPORT_NAV_ITEMS, USER_NAV_ITEMS } from '@/Constants/nav';
  6: 
  7: export default function DashboardSidebar({ user = {}, role = 'admin', isOpen = false, toggle, isCollapsed = false }) {
  8:     const { url } = usePage();
  9:     const initials = (user.name || 'BM').split(' ').map((segment) => segment[0]).join('').slice(0, 2).toUpperCase();
 10:     const [submenuOpenState, setSubmenuOpenState] = useState({});
 11: 
 12:     const mainNavItems = role === 'user' ? USER_NAV_ITEMS : ADMIN_NAV_ITEMS;
 13:     const managementNavItems = role.toLowerCase() === 'superadmin'
 14:         ? [...ADMIN_MANAGEMENT_NAV_ITEMS, ...SUPERADMIN_NAV_ITEMS]
 15:         : role === 'user'
 16:             ? []
 17:             : ADMIN_MANAGEMENT_NAV_ITEMS;
 18:     const homeHref = '/';
 19: 
 20:     useEffect(() => {
 21:         if (!isOpen && !isCollapsed) {
 22:             setSubmenuOpenState({});
 23:         }
 24:     }, [isOpen, isCollapsed]);
 25: 
 26:     // --- LOGIC STYLING ---
 27:     const navLinkClass = (isActive) =>
 28:         `group flex w-full items-center ${isCollapsed ? 'justify-center' : 'gap-3'} 
 29:         rounded-r-lg ${isCollapsed ? 'px-0' : 'px-4'} py-2.5 
 30:         text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-300 border-l-[5px] 
 31:         ${isActive
 32:             ? 'bg-black/[0.07] text-gray-900 border-yellow-400'
 33:             : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-black/[0.10] hover:text-gray-900 border-transparent'
 34:         }`;
 35: 
 36:     const navIconClass = (isActive) =>
 37:         `h-5 w-5 shrink-0 transition-colors duration-300 ${isActive ? 'text-yellow-600' : 'text-gray-400 group-hover:text-gray-600'
 38:         }`;
 39: 
 40:     const isItemActive = (item) => {
 41:         if (Array.isArray(item.children) && item.children.length > 0) {
 42:             return item.children.some((child) => isItemActive(child));
 43:         }
 44: 
 45:         if (item.route) {
 46:             if (item.route === 'dashboard') {
 47:                 return route().current(item.route);
 48:             }
 49: 
 50:             return route().current(`${item.route.replace('.index', '')}.*`);
 51:         }
 52: 
 53:         return item.href !== '/' && url.startsWith(item.href);
 54:     };
 55: 
 56:     const subNavLinkClass = (isActive) =>
 57:         `group flex items-center gap-2 rounded-r-lg border-l-[5px] px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium transition-all duration-300 ${
 58:             isActive
 59:                 ? 'bg-black/[0.07] text-gray-900 border-yellow-400'
 60:                 : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-black/[0.10] hover:text-gray-900 border-transparent'
 61:         }`;
 62: 
 63:     const renderNavItem = (item) => {
 64: 
 65:         const isActive = isItemActive(item);
 66: 
 67:         if (Array.isArray(item.children) && item.children.length > 0) {
 68:             const submenuKey = `sidebar-${item.label}`;
 69:             const isSubmenuOpen = submenuOpenState[submenuKey] ?? isActive;
 70: 
 71:             return (
 72:                 <div
 73:                     key={submenuKey}
 74:                     className="relative"
 75:                 >
 76:                     <button
 77:                         type="button"
 78:                         className={`${navLinkClass(isActive)} cursor-pointer`}
 79:                         title={isCollapsed ? item.label : ''}
 80:                         onClick={() =>
 81:                             setSubmenuOpenState((current) => ({
 82:                                 ...current,
 83:                                 [submenuKey]: !(current[submenuKey] ?? isActive),
 84:                             }))
 85:                         }
 86:                     >
 87:                         <item.icon className={navIconClass(isActive)} />
 88: 
 89:                         <span className={`
 90:                             transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap
 91:                             ${isCollapsed ? 'max-w-0 opacity-0' : 'max-w-[200px] opacity-100'}
 92:                             ${isActive ? 'font-bold' : ''}
 93:                         `}>
 94:                             {item.label}
 95:                         </span>
 96: 
 97:                         {!isCollapsed && <ChevronRightIcon className="ml-auto h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 transition" />}
 98:                     </button>
 99: 
100:                     <div
101:                         className={`overflow-hidden transition-all duration-200 ${
102:                             isSubmenuOpen && !isCollapsed ? 'max-h-64 opacity-100' : 'max-h-0 opacity-0 pointer-events-none'
103:                         }`}
104:                     >
105:                         <div className="mt-1 ml-6 space-y-1 border-l-2 border-gray-200 pl-3">
106:                             {item.children.map((child) => {
107:                                 const childIsActive = isItemActive(child);
108: 
109:                                 return (
110:                                     <Link
111:                                         key={`sidebar-sub-${child.label}`}
112:                                         href={child.route ? route(child.route) : child.href || '#'}
113:                                         className={subNavLinkClass(childIsActive)}
114:                                         preserveState
115:                                         preserveScroll
116:                                     >
117:                                         {child.icon && <child.icon className={`h-4 w-4 shrink-0 ${childIsActive ? 'text-yellow-600' : 'text-gray-400 group-hover:text-gray-600'}`} />}
118:                                         <span className={`${childIsActive ? 'font-bold' : ''}`}>{child.label}</span>
119:                                     </Link>
120:                                 );
121:                             })}
122:                         </div>
123:                     </div>
124:                 </div>
125:             );
126:         }
127: 
128:         return (
129:             <Link
130:                 key={`sidebar-${item.label}`}
131:                 href={item.route ? route(item.route) : item.href || '#'}
132:                 className={navLinkClass(isActive)}
133:                 title={isCollapsed ? item.label : ''}
134:                 preserveState
135:                 preserveScroll
136:             >
137:                 <item.icon className={navIconClass(isActive)} />
138: 
139:                 <span className={`
140:                     transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap
141:                     ${isCollapsed ? 'max-w-0 opacity-0' : 'max-w-[200px] opacity-100'}
142:                     ${isActive ? 'font-bold' : ''}
143:                 `}>
144:                     {item.label}
145:                 </span>
146:             </Link>
147:         );
148: 
149:     };
150: 
151:     return (
152:         <>
153:             {/* Mobile & Tablet Overlay */}
154:             <div
155:                 className={`fixed inset-0 z-40 bg-gray-900/40 backdrop-blur-sm transition-opacity md:hidden ${isOpen ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0 pointer-events-none'}`}
156:                 onClick={toggle}
157:                 aria-hidden="true"
158:             />
159: 
160:             {/* Sidebar Container */}
161:             <aside
162:                 className={`fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-50 flex flex-col bg-white border-r border-gray-200 transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out 
163:         /* 1. Atur lebar dasar untuk mobile */
164:         w-64 
165:         /* 2. Sembunyikan dengan translate penuh ke kiri jika tertutup */
166:         ${isOpen ? 'translate-x-0' : '-translate-x-full'} 
167:         /* 3. Kembalikan perilaku normal untuk desktop (md) */
168:         md:static md:translate-x-0 
169:         ${isCollapsed ? 'md:w-20' : 'md:w-72'}
170:     `}
171:             >
172:                 {/* Header Logo */}
173:                 <div className={`flex h-16 shrink-0 items-center border-b border-gray-100 transition-all duration-500 ${isCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-2' : 'px-6'}`}>
174:                     <Link href={homeHref} className="flex items-center overflow-hidden" preserveState>
175:                         <BrandLogo isCollapsed={isCollapsed} />
176:                     </Link>
177:                 </div>
178: 
179:                 {/* Navigation Area */}
180:                 <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto overflow-x-visible px-2 py-6 custom-scrollbar">
181:                     <nav className="flex flex-col gap-8">
182:                         {/* Menu Utama */}
183:                         <div className="space-y-1">
184:                             <p className={`px-4 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap ${isCollapsed ? 'max-h-0 opacity-0' : 'max-h-6 opacity-100 mb-2'}`}>
185:                                 Menu Utama
186:                             </p>
187:                             <div className="space-y-1">
188:                                 {mainNavItems.map(renderNavItem)}
189:                             </div>
190:                         </div>
191: 
192:                         {/* Administrasi */}
193:                         {managementNavItems.length > 0 && (
194:                             <div className="space-y-1">
195:                                 <p className={`px-4 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap ${isCollapsed ? 'max-h-0 opacity-0' : 'max-h-6 opacity-100 mb-2'}`}>
196:                                     Administrasi
197:                                 </p>
198:                                 <div className="space-y-1">
199:                                     {managementNavItems.map(renderNavItem)}
200:                                 </div>
201:                             </div>
202:                         )}
203: 
204:                         {/* Bantuan */}
205:                         <div className="space-y-1">
206:                             <p className={`px-4 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap ${isCollapsed ? 'max-h-0 opacity-0' : 'max-h-6 opacity-100 mb-2'}`}>
207:                                 Bantuan
208:                             </p>
209:                             <div className="space-y-1">
210:                                 {SUPPORT_NAV_ITEMS.map(renderNavItem)}
211:                             </div>
212:                         </div>
213:                     </nav>
214:                 </div>
215: 
216:                 {/* Footer Profile */}
217:                 <div className="border-t border-gray-100 p-3">
218:                     <div className={`flex items-center transition-all duration-500 ${isCollapsed ? 'justify-center' : 'gap-3 p-2 rounded-xl bg-gray-50/50'}`}>
219: 
220:                         <div className={`flex flex-col transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap ${isCollapsed ? 'max-w-0 opacity-0' : 'max-w-[150px] opacity-100'}`}>
221:                             <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">{user.name}</p>
222:                             <p className="truncate text-[10px] text-gray-500">{user.email}</p>
223:                         </div>
224: 
225:                         {!isCollapsed && (
226:                             <Link
227:                                 href={route('logout')}
228:                                 method="post"
229:                                 as="button"
230:                                 className="ml-auto p-1.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
231:                                 title="Log Out"
232:                             >
233:                                 <ArrowRightOnRectangleIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
234:                             </Link>
235:                         )}
236:                     </div>
237: 
238:                     {/* Logout Button (Collapsed Mode - Only for Desktop) */}
239:                     <div className={`transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden ${isCollapsed ? 'max-h-12 opacity-100' : 'max-h-0 opacity-0 pointer-events-none'}`}>
240:                         <Link
241:                             href={route('logout')}
242:                             method="post"
243:                             as="button"
244:                             className="flex mx-auto mt-2 p-1.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
245:                         >
246:                             <ArrowRightOnRectangleIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
247:                         </Link>
248:                     </div>
249:                 </div>
250:             </aside>
251:         </>
252:     );
253: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/DashboardStatsCard.jsx
================
 1: import { ArrowUpIcon, ArrowDownIcon } from '@heroicons/react/20/solid';
 2: 
 3: export default function DashboardStatsCard({ title, value, delta, description, icon: Icon, color = 'blue' }) {
 4:     const theme = {
 5:         blue: { bg: 'bg-blue-50', text: 'text-blue-600', ring: 'ring-blue-500/10' },
 6:         green: { bg: 'bg-emerald-50', text: 'text-emerald-600', ring: 'ring-emerald-500/10' },
 7:         purple: { bg: 'bg-purple-50', text: 'text-purple-600', ring: 'ring-purple-500/10' },
 8:         orange: { bg: 'bg-orange-50', text: 'text-orange-600', ring: 'ring-orange-500/10' },
 9:     };
10: 
11:     const currentTheme = theme[color] || theme.blue;
12:     const isPositive = delta && (delta.includes('+') || !delta.includes('-'));
13: 
14:     return (
15:         <div className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-white p-6 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-md hover:border-gray-200">
16:             <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
17:                 <div className={`rounded-lg p-2 ${currentTheme.bg} ${currentTheme.text} ring-1 ${currentTheme.ring}`}>
18:                     {Icon && <Icon className="h-6 w-6" />}
19:                 </div>
20:                 {delta && (
21:                     <div className={`flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${isPositive ? 'bg-green-50 text-green-700' : 'bg-red-50 text-red-700'}`}>
22:                         {isPositive ? <ArrowUpIcon className="h-3 w-3" /> : <ArrowDownIcon className="h-3 w-3" />}
23:                         <span>{delta}</span>
24:                     </div>
25:                 )}
26:             </div>
27: 
28:             <div className="mt-4">
29:                 <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-500">{title}</p>
30:                 <h3 className="mt-1 text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900">{value}</h3>
31:             </div>
32: 
33:             {description && (
34:                 <div className="mt-4 flex items-center gap-2 border-t border-gray-50 pt-3">
35:                     <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">
36:                         {description}
37:                     </p>
38:                 </div>
39:             )}
40:         </div>
41:     );
42: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/DashboardTable.jsx
================
 1: export default function DashboardTable({ columns = [], rows = [], renderRow, emptyState }) {
 2:     const normalizedRows = Array.isArray(rows) ? rows : [];
 3: 
 4:     return (
 5:         <div className="overflow-x-auto">
 6:             <table className="min-w-full text-sm">
 7:                 <thead className="text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500">
 8:                     <tr>
 9:                         {columns.map((column) => (
10:                             <th key={column} className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-semibold">
11:                                 {column}
12:                             </th>
13:                         ))}
14:                     </tr>
15:                 </thead>
16:                 <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100 border-t border-gray-100">
17:                     {normalizedRows.length > 0 && renderRow
18:                         ? normalizedRows.map((row) => renderRow(row))
19:                         : (
20:                             <tr>
21:                                 <td colSpan={columns.length} className="px-3 py-6 text-center text-xs text-gray-400">
22:                                     {emptyState ?? 'No entries found.'}
23:                                 </td>
24:                             </tr>
25:                         )}
26:                 </tbody>
27:             </table>
28:         </div>
29:     );
30: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/Dropdown.jsx
================
  1: import { Transition } from '@headlessui/react';
  2: import { Link } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import { createContext, useContext, useState } from 'react';
  4: 
  5: const DropDownContext = createContext();
  6: 
  7: const Dropdown = ({ children }) => {
  8:     const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  9: 
 10:     const toggleOpen = () => {
 11:         setOpen((previousState) => !previousState);
 12:     };
 13: 
 14:     return (
 15:         <DropDownContext.Provider value={{ open, setOpen, toggleOpen }}>
 16:             <div className="relative">{children}</div>
 17:         </DropDownContext.Provider>
 18:     );
 19: };
 20: 
 21: const Trigger = ({ children }) => {
 22:     const { open, setOpen, toggleOpen } = useContext(DropDownContext);
 23: 
 24:     return (
 25:         <>
 26:             <div onClick={toggleOpen}>{children}</div>
 27: 
 28:             {open && (
 29:                 <div
 30:                     className="fixed inset-0 z-40"
 31:                     onClick={() => setOpen(false)}
 32:                 ></div>
 33:             )}
 34:         </>
 35:     );
 36: };
 37: 
 38: const Content = ({
 39:     align = 'right',
 40:     width = '48',
 41:     contentClasses = 'py-1 bg-white',
 42:     children,
 43: }) => {
 44:     const { open, setOpen } = useContext(DropDownContext);
 45: 
 46:     let alignmentClasses = 'origin-top';
 47: 
 48:     if (align === 'left') {
 49:         alignmentClasses = 'ltr:origin-top-left rtl:origin-top-right start-0';
 50:     } else if (align === 'right') {
 51:         alignmentClasses = 'ltr:origin-top-right rtl:origin-top-left end-0';
 52:     }
 53: 
 54:     let widthClasses = '';
 55: 
 56:     if (width === '48') {
 57:         widthClasses = 'w-48';
 58:     }
 59: 
 60:     return (
 61:         <>
 62:             <Transition
 63:                 show={open}
 64:                 enter="transition ease-out duration-200"
 65:                 enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95"
 66:                 enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100"
 67:                 leave="transition ease-in duration-75"
 68:                 leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100"
 69:                 leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95"
 70:             >
 71:                 <div
 72:                     className={`absolute z-50 mt-2 rounded-md shadow-lg ${alignmentClasses} ${widthClasses}`}
 73:                     onClick={() => setOpen(false)}
 74:                 >
 75:                     <div
 76:                         className={
 77:                             `rounded-md ring-1 ring-black ring-opacity-5 ` +
 78:                             contentClasses
 79:                         }
 80:                     >
 81:                         {children}
 82:                     </div>
 83:                 </div>
 84:             </Transition>
 85:         </>
 86:     );
 87: };
 88: 
 89: const DropdownLink = ({ className = '', children, ...props }) => {
 90:     return (
 91:         <Link
 92:             {...props}
 93:             className={
 94:                 'block w-full px-4 py-2 text-start text-sm leading-5 text-gray-700 transition duration-150 ease-in-out hover:bg-gray-100 focus:bg-gray-100 focus:outline-none ' +
 95:                 className
 96:             }
 97:         >
 98:             {children}
 99:         </Link>
100:     );
101: };
102: 
103: Dropdown.Trigger = Trigger;
104: Dropdown.Content = Content;
105: Dropdown.Link = DropdownLink;
106: 
107: export default Dropdown;

================
File: resources/js/Components/EarthGlobe.jsx
================
  1: import { useRef, Suspense } from 'react';
  2: import { Canvas, useFrame, useLoader } from '@react-three/fiber';
  3: import { OrbitControls } from '@react-three/drei';
  4: import * as THREE from 'three';
  5: 
  6: function Earth({ lightMode }) {
  7:     const earthRef = useRef();
  8:     const cloudsRef = useRef();
  9: 
 10:     const dayMap = useLoader(THREE.TextureLoader, '/images/earth/2k_earth_daymap.jpg');
 11:     const cloudsMap = useLoader(THREE.TextureLoader, '/images/earth/2k_earth_clouds.jpg');
 12: 
 13:     useFrame(({ clock }) => {
 14:         const elapsed = clock.getElapsedTime();
 15:         if (earthRef.current) {
 16:             earthRef.current.rotation.y = elapsed * 0.05;
 17:         }
 18:         if (cloudsRef.current) {
 19:             cloudsRef.current.rotation.y = elapsed * 0.065;
 20:         }
 21:     });
 22: 
 23:     return (
 24:         <group>
 25:             {/* Earth sphere */}
 26:             <mesh ref={earthRef}>
 27:                 <sphereGeometry args={[2, 64, 64]} />
 28:                 <meshStandardMaterial
 29:                     map={dayMap}
 30:                     metalness={0.1}
 31:                     roughness={0.7}
 32:                 />
 33:             </mesh>
 34: 
 35:             {/* Cloud layer */}
 36:             <mesh ref={cloudsRef}>
 37:                 <sphereGeometry args={[2.01, 64, 64]} />
 38:                 <meshStandardMaterial
 39:                     map={cloudsMap}
 40:                     transparent
 41:                     opacity={lightMode ? 0.45 : 0.35}
 42:                     depthWrite={false}
 43:                 />
 44:             </mesh>
 45: 
 46:             {/* Atmosphere glow - Adjusted for Light Mode */}
 47:             <mesh>
 48:                 <sphereGeometry args={[2.15, 64, 64]} />
 49:                 <meshBasicMaterial
 50:                     color={lightMode ? "#3B82F6" : "#4da6ff"}
 51:                     transparent
 52:                     opacity={lightMode ? 0.05 : 0.07}
 53:                     side={THREE.BackSide}
 54:                 />
 55:             </mesh>
 56:         </group>
 57:     );
 58: }
 59: 
 60: function Stars() {
 61:     const starsRef = useRef();
 62:     const count = 800;
 63:     const positions = new Float32Array(count * 3);
 64: 
 65:     for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
 66:         const r = 15 + Math.random() * 25;
 67:         const theta = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
 68:         const phi = Math.acos(2 * Math.random() - 1);
 69:         positions[i * 3] = r * Math.sin(phi) * Math.cos(theta);
 70:         positions[i * 3 + 1] = r * Math.sin(phi) * Math.sin(theta);
 71:         positions[i * 3 + 2] = r * Math.cos(phi);
 72:     }
 73: 
 74:     return (
 75:         <points ref={starsRef}>
 76:             <bufferGeometry>
 77:                 <bufferAttribute
 78:                     attach="attributes-position"
 79:                     count={count}
 80:                     array={positions}
 81:                     itemSize={3}
 82:                 />
 83:             </bufferGeometry>
 84:             <pointsMaterial color="#ffffff" size={0.05} sizeAttenuation transparent opacity={0.6} />
 85:         </points>
 86:     );
 87: }
 88: 
 89: function Scene({ lightMode }) {
 90:     return (
 91:         <>
 92:             <ambientLight intensity={lightMode ? 0.8 : 0.15} />
 93:             <directionalLight position={[5, 3, 5]} intensity={lightMode ? 2.5 : 1.8} color="#ffffff" />
 94:             <pointLight position={[-8, -3, -5]} intensity={0.5} color={lightMode ? "#ffffff" : "#4da6ff"} />
 95:             {!lightMode && <Stars />}
 96:             <Earth lightMode={lightMode} />
 97:             <OrbitControls
 98:                 enableZoom={false}
 99:                 enablePan={false}
100:                 enableRotate={false}
101:                 autoRotate={false} // We handle rotation manually
102:             />
103:         </>
104:     );
105: }
106: 
107: export default function EarthGlobe({ className = '', lightMode = false }) {
108:     return (
109:         <div className={className}>
110:             <Suspense fallback={null}>
111:                 <Canvas
112:                     camera={{ position: [0, 0, 5], fov: 45 }}
113:                     gl={{ alpha: true, antialias: true, powerPreference: 'low-power' }}
114:                     style={{ background: 'transparent' }}
115:                     dpr={[1, 2]}
116:                 >
117:                     <Scene lightMode={lightMode} />
118:                 </Canvas>
119:             </Suspense>
120:         </div>
121:     );
122: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/ErrorBoundary.jsx
================
 1: import React from 'react';
 2: 
 3: export default class ErrorBoundary extends React.Component {
 4:     constructor(props) {
 5:         super(props);
 6:         this.state = { hasError: false, error: null };
 7:     }
 8: 
 9:     static getDerivedStateFromError(error) {
10:         return { hasError: true, error };
11:     }
12: 
13:     componentDidCatch(error, errorInfo) {
14:         console.error('Error caught by boundary:', error, errorInfo);
15:     }
16: 
17:     render() {
18:         if (this.state.hasError) {
19:             return (
20:                 <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-50 p-4">
21:                     <div className="max-w-md w-full bg-white shadow-lg rounded-xl p-8 text-center border border-red-100">
22:                         <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-red-100 text-red-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
23:                             <svg className="w-8 h-8" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
24:                                 <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M12 9v2m0 4h.01m-6.938 4h13.856c1.54 0 2.502-1.667 1.732-3L13.732 4c-.77-1.333-2.694-1.333-3.464 0L3.34 16c-.77 1.333.192 3 1.732 3z" />
25:                             </svg>
26:                         </div>
27:                         <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Terjadi Kesalahan</h1>
28:                         <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-6 break-words bg-gray-50 p-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-100 text-left">
29:                             {this.state.error?.message || "Something went unexpectedly wrong."}
30:                         </p>
31:                         <button
32:                             onClick={() => window.location.reload()}
33:                             className="w-full h-11 bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg transition-colors shadow-sm"
34:                         >
35:                             Muat Ulang Halaman (Reload)
36:                         </button>
37:                     </div>
38:                 </div>
39:             );
40:         }
41: 
42:         return this.props.children;
43:     }
44: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/FilterComponents.jsx

  1: import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from "react";
  2: import {
  3:     FunnelIcon,
  4:     CalendarIcon,
  5:     ChevronDownIcon,
  6:     XMarkIcon,
  7:     ChevronLeftIcon,
  8:     ChevronRightIcon,
  9:     BarsArrowDownIcon,
 10:     BarsArrowUpIcon,
 11: } from "@heroicons/react/24/outline";
 12: 
 13: // ─── Custom Select Dropdown ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
 14: 
 15: // Status options - tampilkan semua tapi yang aktif cuma 3 (pending, approved, rejected)
 16: const STATUS_OPTIONS = [
 17:     "Semua",
 18:     "pending",
 19:     "payment_required",
 20:     "payment_invalid",
 21:     "rejected",
 22:     "expired",
 23:     "processing",
 24:     "completed",
 25: ];
 26: 
 27: // Mapping untuk display label yang lebih user-friendly
 28: const STATUS_LABELS = {
 29:     "pending": "Menunggu",
 30:     "payment_required": "Pembayaran",
 31:     "payment_invalid": "Pembayaran Ditolak",
 32:     "rejected": "Ditolak",
 33:     "expired": "Kedaluwarsa",
 34:     "processing": "Memproses",
 35:     "completed": "Selesai",
 36: };
 37: 
 38: export function CustomSelect({ value, onChange, options: externalOptions, placeholder, containerClassName = 'relative w-full sm:w-[180px] select-none' }) {
 39:     const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
 40:     const ref = useRef(null);
 41: 
 42:     useEffect(() => {
 43:         const handler = (e) => {
 44:             if (ref.current && !ref.current.contains(e.target)) setOpen(false);
 45:         };
 46:         document.addEventListener("mousedown", handler);
 47:         return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handler);
 48:     }, []);
 49: 
 50:     // Support both external [{value, label}] options and the built-in STATUS_OPTIONS.
 51:     const resolvedOptions = externalOptions
 52:         ?? STATUS_OPTIONS.map(opt => ({ value: opt, label: STATUS_LABELS[opt] || opt }));
 53: 
 54:     const currentLabel = resolvedOptions.find(o => o.value === value)?.label
 55:         ?? placeholder
 56:         ?? value;
 57: 
 58:     return (
 59:         <div ref={ref} className={containerClassName}>
 60:             <button
 61:                 type="button"
 62:                 onClick={() => setOpen((p) => !p)}
 63:                 className={`
 64:                     w-full h-10 flex items-center gap-2 px-3 pl-10
 65:                     bg-white border rounded-xl shadow-sm text-sm font-medium
 66:                     transition-all duration-200 relative
 67:                     ${open ? "border-bmkg-accent ring-2 ring-bmkg-accent/20" : "border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300"}
 68:                 `}
 69:             >
 70:                 <FunnelIcon className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
 71:                 <span className="flex-1 text-left truncate text-gray-700">{currentLabel}</span>
 72:                 <ChevronDownIcon
 73:                     className={`h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 ${open ? "rotate-180" : ""}`}
 74:                 />
 75:             </button>
 76: 
 77:             <div className={`
 78:                 absolute z-50 top-full mt-2 left-0 w-full
 79:                 bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl shadow-gray-200/60
 80:                 overflow-hidden transition-all duration-200
 81:                 ${open ? "opacity-100 visible translate-y-0" : "opacity-0 invisible -translate-y-1"}
 82:             `}>
 83:                 <div className="px-4 pt-3 pb-2">
 84:                     <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">
 85:                         {placeholder ?? 'Filter Status'}
 86:                     </span>
 87:                 </div>
 88: 
 89:                 <div className="px-2 pb-2 space-y-0.5">
 90:                     {resolvedOptions.map((opt) => {
 91:                         const isActive = value === opt.value;
 92:                         return (
 93:                             <button
 94:                                 key={opt.value}
 95:                                 type="button"
 96:                                 onClick={() => {
 97:                                     onChange(opt.value);
 98:                                     setOpen(false);
 99:                                 }}
100:                                 className={`
101:                                     w-full text-left px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition-all duration-100
102:                                     ${isActive
103:                                         ? "border border-bmkg-accent text-gray-900 font-semibold bg-white"
104:                                         : "border border-transparent text-gray-500 font-medium hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-900"}
105:                                 `}
106:                             >
107:                                 {opt.label}
108:                             </button>
109:                         );
110:                     })}
111:                 </div>
112:             </div>
113:         </div>
114:     );
115: }
116: 
117: // ─── Calendar Utils ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
118: 
119: const MONTHS_ID = [
120:     "Januari", "Februari", "Maret", "April", "Mei", "Juni",
121:     "Juli", "Agustus", "September", "Oktober", "November", "Desember"
122: ];
123: 
124: const DAYS_ID = ["Min", "Sen", "Sel", "Rab", "Kam", "Jum", "Sab"];
125: 
126: function parseDate(str) {
127:     if (!str) return null;
128:     const [y, m, d] = str.split("-").map(Number);
129:     return new Date(y, m - 1, d);
130: }
131: 
132: function formatISO(date) {
133:     if (!date) return "";
134:     return `${date.getFullYear()}-${String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0")}-${String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, "0")}`;
135: }
136: 
137: function formatDisplay(str) {
138:     if (!str) return "";
139:     const d = parseDate(str);
140:     return `${String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, "0")}/${String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0")}/${d.getFullYear()}`;
141: }
142: 
143: function daysInMonth(y, m) {
144:     return new Date(y, m + 1, 0).getDate();
145: }
146: 
147: function firstDayOfMonth(y, m) {
148:     return new Date(y, m, 1).getDay();
149: }
150: 
151: // ─── Inline Calendar ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
152: 
153: function InlineCalendar({ value, onChange, otherDate, onClose, minDate, maxDate }) {
154:     const [viewYear, setViewYear] = useState(() => {
155:         if (value) return parseDate(value).getFullYear();
156:         return new Date().getFullYear();
157:     });
158: 
159:     const [viewMonth, setViewMonth] = useState(() => {
160:         if (value) return parseDate(value).getMonth();
161:         return new Date().getMonth();
162:     });
163: 
164:     // 'days' = normal calendar, 'years' = year grid picker
165:     const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState('days');
166: 
167:     // Year grid: 12 years starting from viewYear rounded down to nearest 12-multiple
168:     const yearGridStart = Math.floor(viewYear / 12) * 12;
169:     const yearGridYears = Array.from({ length: 12 }, (_, i) => yearGridStart + i);
170: 
171:     const prevMonth = () => {
172:         if (viewMonth === 0) {
173:             setViewMonth(11);
174:             setViewYear((y) => y - 1);
175:         } else setViewMonth((m) => m - 1);
176:     };
177: 
178:     const nextMonth = () => {
179:         if (viewMonth === 11) {
180:             setViewMonth(0);
181:             setViewYear((y) => y + 1);
182:         } else setViewMonth((m) => m + 1);
183:     };
184: 
185:     const valueParsed = parseDate(value);
186:     const otherParsed = parseDate(otherDate);
187: 
188:     // ── Year picker view ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
189:     if (viewMode === 'years') {
190:         return (
191:             <div className="w-[270px]">
192:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
193:                     <button
194:                         onClick={() => setViewYear((y) => y - 12)}
195:                         className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100"
196:                         type="button"
197:                     >
198:                         <ChevronLeftIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
199:                     </button>
200:                     <span className="text-sm font-extrabold text-gray-900">
201:                         {yearGridStart} – {yearGridStart + 11}
202:                     </span>
203:                     <button
204:                         onClick={() => setViewYear((y) => y + 12)}
205:                         className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100"
206:                         type="button"
207:                     >
208:                         <ChevronRightIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
209:                     </button>
210:                 </div>
211:                 <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-1.5">
212:                     {yearGridYears.map((yr) => {
213:                         const isSelected = yr === viewYear;
214:                         const isCurrent = yr === new Date().getFullYear();
215:                         return (
216:                             <button
217:                                 key={yr}
218:                                 type="button"
219:                                 onClick={() => { setViewYear(yr); setViewMode('days'); }}
220:                                 className={`py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all
221:                                     ${isSelected
222:                                         ? 'bg-bmkg-accent text-white'
223:                                         : isCurrent
224:                                             ? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-900 ring-1 ring-gray-300'
225:                                             : 'text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100'
226:                                     }`}
227:                             >
228:                                 {yr}
229:                             </button>
230:                         );
231:                     })}
232:                 </div>
233:                 <button
234:                     type="button"
235:                     onClick={() => setViewMode('days')}
236:                     className="mt-3 w-full text-xs font-semibold text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-700 text-center"
237:                 >
238:                     Kembali ke kalender
239:                 </button>
240:             </div>
241:         );
242:     }
243: 
244:     // ── Normal day view ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
245:     const totalDays = daysInMonth(viewYear, viewMonth);
246:     const firstDay = firstDayOfMonth(viewYear, viewMonth);
247: 
248:     const cells = [];
249:     for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) cells.push(null);
250:     for (let d = 1; d <= totalDays; d++) cells.push(new Date(viewYear, viewMonth, d));
251: 
252:     return (
253:         <div className="w-[270px]">
254:             {/* Month Nav */}
255:             <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
256:                 <button
257:                     onClick={prevMonth}
258:                     className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100"
259:                     type="button"
260:                 >
261:                     <ChevronLeftIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
262:                 </button>
263: 
264:                 <button
265:                     type="button"
266:                     onClick={() => setViewMode('years')}
267:                     className="text-sm font-extrabold text-gray-900 hover:text-bmkg-accent transition-colors px-2 py-1 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50"
268:                     title="Pilih tahun"
269:                 >
270:                     {MONTHS_ID[viewMonth]} {viewYear}
271:                 </button>
272: 
273:                 <button
274:                     onClick={nextMonth}
275:                     className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100"
276:                     type="button"
277:                 >
278:                     <ChevronRightIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
279:                 </button>
280:             </div>
281: 
282:             {/* Day Header */}
283:             <div className="grid grid-cols-7 mb-1">
284:                 {DAYS_ID.map((d) => (
285:                     <div key={d} className="text-center text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 py-1">
286:                         {d}
287:                     </div>
288:                 ))}
289:             </div>
290: 
291:             {/* Calendar Grid */}
292:             <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-y-0.5">
293:                 {cells.map((date, i) => {
294:                     if (!date) return <div key={i} />;
295: 
296:                     const selected =
297:                         valueParsed &&
298:                         date.toDateString() === valueParsed.toDateString();
299: 
300:                     const isOtherDate = otherParsed && date.toDateString() === otherParsed.toDateString();
301:                     const dateStr = formatISO(date);
302:                     const isDisabled =
303:                         (minDate && dateStr < minDate) ||
304:                         (maxDate && dateStr > maxDate);
305: 
306:                     return (
307:                         <button
308:                             key={date.toISOString()}
309:                             onClick={() => {
310:                                 if (!isDisabled) {
311:                                     onChange(formatISO(date));
312:                                     onClose();
313:                                 }
314:                             }}
315:                             disabled={isDisabled}
316:                             className={`
317:                                 h-9 text-xs font-bold transition-all duration-100
318:                                 ${isDisabled
319:                                     ? "text-gray-300 cursor-not-allowed rounded-lg"
320:                                     : selected
321:                                         ? "bg-bmkg-accent text-white rounded-full"
322:                                         : isOtherDate
323:                                             ? "bg-gray-100 text-gray-900 rounded-full"
324:                                             : "rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 text-gray-700"}
325:                             `}
326:                             type="button"
327:                         >
328:                             {date.getDate()}
329:                         </button>
330:                     );
331:                 })}
332:             </div>
333:         </div>
334:     );
335: }
336: 
337: // ─── Custom Date Range Picker (Bersandingan dalam 1 Container) ─────────────
338: 
339: export function CustomDateRangePicker({
340:     startDate,
341:     endDate,
342:     onStartChange,
343:     onEndChange,
344: }) {
345:     const [activePicker, setActivePicker] = useState(null); // 'start' atau 'end'
346:     const containerRef = useRef(null);
347:     const hasValue = Boolean(startDate || endDate);
348: 
349:     useEffect(() => {
350:         const handler = (e) => {
351:             if (containerRef.current && !containerRef.current.contains(e.target)) {
352:                 setActivePicker(null);
353:             }
354:         };
355:         document.addEventListener("mousedown", handler);
356:         return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handler);
357:     }, []);
358: 
359:     const clearAll = (e) => {
360:         e.stopPropagation();
361:         onStartChange("");
362:         onEndChange("");
363:     };
364: 
365:     return (
366:         <div
367:             ref={containerRef}
368:             className={`relative flex h-10 w-full items-center rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white pl-3 shadow-sm focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-yellow-400 sm:w-auto sm:min-w-[250px] ${
369:                 hasValue ? 'pr-8' : 'pr-3'
370:             }`}
371:         >
372:             {/* Start Date dengan Ikon */}
373:             <div className="relative flex flex-1 items-center">
374:                 <CalendarIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 mr-1 flex-shrink-0" />
375:                 <input
376:                     type="text"
377:                     value={startDate ? formatDisplay(startDate) : ''}
378:                     placeholder="DD/MM/YYYY"
379:                     onClick={() => setActivePicker('start')}
380:                     readOnly
381:                     className="w-full min-w-0 cursor-pointer border-none bg-transparent p-0 text-xs font-medium placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:ring-0 sm:text-sm"
382:                 />
383:                 {activePicker === 'start' && (
384:                     <div className="absolute z-50 top-full mt-2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-4">
385:                         <InlineCalendar
386:                             value={startDate}
387:                             onChange={onStartChange}
388:                             otherDate={endDate}
389:                             maxDate={endDate}
390:                             onClose={() => setActivePicker(null)}
391:                         />
392:                     </div>
393:                 )}
394:             </div>
395: 
396:             <span className="mx-1 text-gray-300">|</span>
397: 
398:             {/* End Date dengan Ikon */}
399:             <div className="relative flex flex-1 items-center">
400:                 <CalendarIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 mr-1 flex-shrink-0" />
401:                 <input
402:                     type="text"
403:                     value={endDate ? formatDisplay(endDate) : ''}
404:                     placeholder="DD/MM/YYYY"
405:                     onClick={() => setActivePicker('end')}
406:                     readOnly
407:                     className="w-full min-w-0 cursor-pointer border-none bg-transparent p-0 text-xs font-medium placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:ring-0 sm:text-sm"
408:                 />
409:                 {activePicker === 'end' && (
410:                     <div className="absolute z-50 top-full mt-2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-4">
411:                         <InlineCalendar
412:                             value={endDate}
413:                             onChange={onEndChange}
414:                             otherDate={startDate}
415:                             minDate={startDate}
416:                             onClose={() => setActivePicker(null)}
417:                         />
418:                     </div>
419:                 )}
420:             </div>
421: 
422:             {(startDate || endDate) && (
423:                 <button
424:                     onClick={clearAll}
425:                     className="absolute right-2 p-0.5 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-full shrink-0"
426:                     type="button"
427:                 >
428:                     <XMarkIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400" />
429:                 </button>
430:             )}
431:         </div>
432:     );
433: }
434: 
435: export function CustomSingleDatePicker({
436:     value,
437:     onChange,
438:     placeholder = "DD/MM/YYYY",
439:     minDate,
440:     maxDate,
441:     containerClassName = "relative w-full",
442: }) {
443:     const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
444:     const containerRef = useRef(null);
445: 
446:     useEffect(() => {
447:         const handler = (e) => {
448:             if (containerRef.current && !containerRef.current.contains(e.target)) {
449:                 setOpen(false);
450:             }
451:         };
452:         document.addEventListener("mousedown", handler);
453:         return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handler);
454:     }, []);
455: 
456:     const clearDate = (e) => {
457:         e.stopPropagation();
458:         onChange("");
459:         setOpen(false);
460:     };
461: 
462:     return (
463:         <div ref={containerRef} className={containerClassName}>
464:             <button
465:                 type="button"
466:                 onClick={() => setOpen((prev) => !prev)}
467:                 className={`w-full h-10 flex items-center gap-2 px-3 bg-white border rounded-xl shadow-sm text-sm font-medium transition-all ${
468:                     open ? "border-bmkg-accent ring-2 ring-bmkg-accent/20" : "border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300"
469:                 }`}
470:             >
471:                 <CalendarIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 shrink-0" />
472:                 <span className={`flex-1 text-left text-sm ${value ? "text-gray-700" : "text-gray-400"}`}>
473:                     {value ? formatDisplay(value) : placeholder}
474:                 </span>
475:                 {value ? (
476:                     <XMarkIcon
477:                         onClick={clearDate}
478:                         className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 shrink-0"
479:                     />
480:                 ) : null}
481:             </button>
482: 
483:             {open && (
484:                 <div className="absolute z-50 bottom-full mb-2 left-0 bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-4">
485:                     <InlineCalendar
486:                         value={value}
487:                         onChange={onChange}
488:                         minDate={minDate}
489:                         maxDate={maxDate}
490:                         onClose={() => setOpen(false)}
491:                     />
492:                 </div>
493:             )}
494:         </div>
495:     );
496: }
497: 
498: export function SortButton({ value, onChange }) {
499:     const isDesc = value !== 'asc';
500: 
501:     return (
502:         <button
503:             type="button"
504:             onClick={() => onChange(isDesc ? 'asc' : 'desc')}
505:             title={isDesc ? 'Terbaru ke Terlama' : 'Terlama ke Terbaru'}
506:             className="h-10 flex items-center gap-2 px-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all whitespace-nowrap shrink-0"
507:         >
508:             {isDesc
509:                 ? <BarsArrowDownIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
510:                 : <BarsArrowUpIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
511:             }
512:             <span className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-600">
513:                 {isDesc ? 'Terbaru' : 'Terlama'}
514:             </span>
515:         </button>
516:     );
517: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/FlashNotification.jsx
================
 1: import { CheckCircleIcon, XCircleIcon, XMarkIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/solid';
 2: import { Transition } from '@headlessui/react';
 3: import { useFlash } from '@/Hooks/useFlash';
 4: 
 5: /**
 6:  * FlashNotification - floating toast that reads from Inertia shared flash props.
 7:  * Mount once per page; it reacts to flash.success / flash.error automatically.
 8:  */
 9: export default function FlashNotification() {
10:     const { show, success, error, dismiss } = useFlash();
11: 
12:     const isSuccess = !!success;
13:     const message = success || error;
14: 
15:     return (
16:         <div className="fixed top-5 left-5 right-5 sm:left-auto sm:right-5 z-[100] pointer-events-none w-auto sm:w-full sm:max-w-sm">
17:             <Transition
18:                 show={show}
19:                 enter="transform transition ease-out duration-300"
20:                 enterFrom="translate-y-2 opacity-0 sm:translate-y-0 sm:translate-x-4"
21:                 enterTo="translate-y-0 opacity-100 sm:translate-x-0"
22:                 leave="transform transition ease-in duration-200"
23:                 leaveFrom="translate-y-0 opacity-100"
24:                 leaveTo="translate-y-2 opacity-0 sm:translate-y-0 sm:translate-x-4"
25:             >
26:                 <div
27:                     className={`pointer-events-auto flex items-start gap-3 rounded-xl px-4 py-3.5 shadow-lg ring-1 ${
28:                         isSuccess
29:                             ? 'bg-green-50 ring-green-200 text-green-800'
30:                             : 'bg-red-50 ring-red-200 text-red-800'
31:                     }`}
32:                 >
33:                     <div className="mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0">
34:                         {isSuccess ? (
35:                             <CheckCircleIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-green-500" />
36:                         ) : (
37:                             <XCircleIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-red-500" />
38:                         )}
39:                     </div>
40:                     <p className="flex-1 text-sm font-medium">{message}</p>
41:                     <button
42:                         onClick={dismiss}
43:                         className={`mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0 rounded p-0.5 transition hover:bg-black/5 ${
44:                             isSuccess ? 'text-green-500' : 'text-red-500'
45:                         }`}
46:                     >
47:                         <XMarkIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
48:                     </button>
49:                 </div>
50:             </Transition>
51:         </div>
52:     );
53: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/InlineStatusToggle.jsx
================
 1: export default function InlineStatusToggle({
 2:     active = false,
 3:     activeLabel = 'Aktif',
 4:     inactiveLabel = 'Tidak Aktif',
 5:     loadingLabel = 'Memproses...',
 6:     processing = false,
 7:     onToggle,
 8: }) {
 9:     // Render a toggle that mimics the yellow action‑row style used in the Data Requests page.
10:     // When active, use the same background (bg‑yellow‑300) and dark text (text‑gray‑900).
11:     // Hover effect is a subtle pop (scale up) that enlarges the whole button, including the text.
12:     return (
13:         <button
14:             type="button"
15:             onClick={onToggle}
16:             disabled={processing}
17:             // Fixed width (matching the longest label "Memproses...") to prevent column shift.
18:             // Use a subtle shadow on hover instead of scaling so the text stays static.
19:             className={`inline-flex w-[120px] items-center justify-center rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-sm font-medium overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap transition duration-150 ease-out focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 ${
20:                 active
21:                     ? 'bg-yellow-300 text-gray-900 focus:ring-yellow-300 hover:shadow-lg'
22:                     : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 focus:ring-gray-300 hover:shadow-lg border border-gray-300'
23:             } ${processing ? 'cursor-not-allowed opacity-60' : 'cursor-pointer'}`}
24:         >
25:             {processing ? loadingLabel : active ? activeLabel : inactiveLabel}
26:         </button>
27:     );
28: }

 3:         <p
 4:             {...props}
