File: resources/js/Components/Modal.jsx
================
 1: import {
 2:     Dialog,
 3:     DialogPanel,
 4:     Transition,
 5:     TransitionChild,
 6: } from '@headlessui/react';
 7: 
 8: export default function Modal({
 9:     children,
10:     show = false,
11:     maxWidth = '2xl',
12:     closeable = true,
13:     onClose = () => {},
14: }) {
15:     const close = () => {
16:         if (closeable) {
17:             onClose();
18:         }
19:     };
20: 
21:     const maxWidthClass = {
22:         sm: 'sm:max-w-sm',
23:         md: 'sm:max-w-md',
24:         lg: 'sm:max-w-lg',
25:         xl: 'sm:max-w-xl',
26:         '2xl': 'sm:max-w-2xl',
27:         '3xl': 'sm:max-w-3xl',
28:     }[maxWidth];
29: 
30:     return (
31:         <Transition show={show} leave="duration-200">
32:             <Dialog
33:                 as="div"
34:                 id="modal"
35:                 className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex transform items-center overflow-y-auto px-4 py-6 transition-all sm:px-0"
36:                 onClose={close}
37:             >
38:                 <TransitionChild
39:                     enter="ease-out duration-300"
40:                     enterFrom="opacity-0"
41:                     enterTo="opacity-100"
42:                     leave="ease-in duration-200"
43:                     leaveFrom="opacity-100"
44:                     leaveTo="opacity-0"
45:                 >
46:                     <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gray-500/75" />
47:                 </TransitionChild>
48: 
49:                 <TransitionChild
50:                     enter="ease-out duration-300"
51:                     enterFrom="opacity-0 translate-y-4 sm:translate-y-0 sm:scale-95"
52:                     enterTo="opacity-100 translate-y-0 sm:scale-100"
53:                     leave="ease-in duration-200"
54:                     leaveFrom="opacity-100 translate-y-0 sm:scale-100"
55:                     leaveTo="opacity-0 translate-y-4 sm:translate-y-0 sm:scale-95"
56:                 >
57:                     <DialogPanel
58:                         className={`mb-6 transform overflow-hidden rounded-lg bg-white shadow-xl transition-all sm:mx-auto sm:w-full ${maxWidthClass}`}
59:                     >
60:                         {children}
61:                     </DialogPanel>
62:                 </TransitionChild>
63:             </Dialog>
64:         </Transition>
65:     );
66: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/Navbar.jsx
================
  1: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  2: import { Link, usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import NavLink from '@/Components/NavLink';
  4: 
  5: export default function Navbar({ auth }) {
  6:     const [scrolled, setScrolled] = useState(false);
  7:     const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false);
  8:     const { url, props } = usePage();
  9:     const whatsapp = props.contactSettings?.cs_whatsapp || '';
 10: 
 11:     useEffect(() => {
 12:         const handleScroll = () => {
 13:             setScrolled(window.scrollY > 50);
 14:         };
 15:         window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);
 16:         return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);
 17:     }, []);
 18: 
 19:     const navClasses = (scrolled)
 20:         ? 'top-6 w-[90%] max-w-2xl rounded-full bg-white backdrop-blur-md border border-white/50 shadow-xl shadow-slate-900/5 py-3 px-6'
 21:         : 'md:top-0 md:w-full md:max-w-full md:rounded-none md:bg-transparent md:border-b md:border-white/20 md:py-5 md:px-6 sm:md:px-8 lg:md:px-12 ' +
 22:         'top-6 w-[90%] max-w-2xl rounded-full bg-white backdrop-blur-md border border-white/50 shadow-xl py-3 px-6';
 23: 
 24:     const textColor = !scrolled ? 'md:text-white text-slate-900' : 'text-slate-900';
 25:     const subTextColor = !scrolled ? 'md:text-white/70 text-slate-500' : 'text-slate-500';
 26: 
 27:     return (
 28:         <nav className={`fixed z-50 left-0 right-0 mx-auto transition-all duration-700 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.25,0.8,0.25,1)] ${navClasses}`}>

 73:                                         : 'border-green-600 text-green-600 shadow-green-500/20 hover:shadow-green-500/40'
 74:                                         }`}
 75:                                     onClick={(e) => {

================
File: resources/js/Components/NavLink.jsx
================
 1: import { Link } from '@inertiajs/react';
 2: 
 3: export default function NavLink({
 4:     active = false,
 5:     className = '',
 6:     children,
 7:     variant = 'light',
 8:     ...props
 9: }) {
10:     const baseClasses =
11:         'inline-flex items-center border-b-2 px-1 pt-1 text-sm font-medium leading-5 transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out focus:outline-none';
12: 
13:     const colors =
14:         variant === 'dark'
15:             ? active
16:                 ? 'border-bmkg-accent text-bmkg-accent'
17:                 : 'border-transparent text-white hover:!text-bmkg-accent hover:!border-bmkg-accent'
18:             : active
19:                 ? 'border-bmkg-accent text-bmkg-accent'
20:                 : 'border-transparent text-gray-600 hover:!text-bmkg-accent hover:!border-bmkg-accent';
21: 
22:     return (
23:         <Link
24:             {...props}
25:             className={`${baseClasses} ${colors} ${className}`}
26:         >
27:             {children}
28:         </Link>
29:     );
30: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/PhoneCountrySelect.jsx
================
  1: import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
  2: import { ChevronDownIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  3: import * as FlagIcons from 'country-flag-icons/react/3x2';
  4: import { getCountryCallingCode } from 'libphonenumber-js/min';
  5: 
  6: const FALLBACK_COUNTRIES = [
  7:     { value: 'ID', label: 'Indonesia', dialCode: '62' },
  8: ];
  9: 
 10: function FlagIcon({ countryCode }) {
 11:     if (!countryCode || countryCode.length !== 2) {
 12:         return <span className="inline-block w-5 h-4 shrink-0 rounded bg-gray-200" />;
 13:     }
 14: 
 15:     const FlagComponent = FlagIcons[countryCode.toUpperCase()];
 16: 
 17:     if (!FlagComponent) {
 18:         return <span className="inline-block w-5 h-4 shrink-0 rounded bg-gray-200" />;
 19:     }
 20: 
 21:     return <FlagComponent className="w-5 h-4 shrink-0 rounded-[2px] object-cover" />;
 22: }
 23: 
 24: function buildCountryOptions(locale = 'id') {
 25:     try {
 26:         const flagCountries = Object.keys(FlagIcons)
 27:             .filter((code) => /^[A-Z]{2}$/.test(code))
 28:             .filter((code) => code !== 'IL')
 29:             .sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b));
 30: 
 31:         if (flagCountries.length === 0) {
 32:             return FALLBACK_COUNTRIES;
 33:         }
 34: 
 35:         const names = Intl?.DisplayNames ? new Intl.DisplayNames([locale], { type: 'region' }) : null;
 36: 
 37:         const options = flagCountries.reduce((acc, code) => {
 38:             try {
 39:                 const dialCode = getCountryCallingCode(code);
 40: 
 41:                 acc.push({
 42:                     value: code,
 43:                     label: `${names?.of(code) || code}`,
 44:                     dialCode,
 45:                 });
 46:             } catch {
 47:                 // Skip unsupported or non-telephony territories.
 48:             }
 49: 
 50:             return acc;
 51:         }, []);
 52: 
 53:         if (options.length === 0) {
 54:             return FALLBACK_COUNTRIES;
 55:         }
 56: 
 57:         const idIndex = options.findIndex((o) => o.value === 'ID');
 58:         if (idIndex > 0) {
 59:             const [idItem] = options.splice(idIndex, 1);
 60:             options.unshift(idItem);
 61:         }
 62: 
 63:         return options;
 64:     } catch {
 65:         return FALLBACK_COUNTRIES;
 66:     }
 67: }
 68: 
 69: export default function PhoneCountrySelect({
 70:     value = 'ID',
 71:     onChange,
 72:     disabled = false,
 73:     placeholder = 'Pilih negara',
 74:     className = '',
 75:     compact = false,
 76: }) {
 77:     const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
 78:     const [query, setQuery] = useState('');
 79:     const wrapperRef = useRef(null);
 80:     const searchInputRef = useRef(null);
 81: 
 82:     const options = useMemo(() => buildCountryOptions(), []);
 83: 
 84:     const selected = useMemo(
 85:         () => options.find((option) => option.value === value) || options[0],
 86:         [options, value],
 87:     );
 88: 
 89:     const filteredOptions = useMemo(() => {
 90:         if (!query.trim()) {
 91:             return options;
 92:         }
 93: 
 94:         const keyword = query.toLowerCase();
 95: 
 96:         return options.filter((option) => {
 97:             return (
 98:                 option.label.toLowerCase().includes(keyword)
 99:                 || option.value.toLowerCase().includes(keyword)
100:                 || (`+${option.dialCode}`).includes(keyword)
101:             );
102:         });
103:     }, [options, query]);
104: 
105:     useEffect(() => {
106:         const handleClickOutside = (event) => {
107:             if (wrapperRef.current && !wrapperRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
108:                 setOpen(false);
109:             }
110:         };
111: 
112:         document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
113:         return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
114:     }, []);
115: 
116:     useEffect(() => {
117:         if (open && searchInputRef.current) {
118:             searchInputRef.current.focus();
119:         }
120:     }, [open]);
121: 
122:     return (
123:         <div ref={wrapperRef} className={`relative ${className}`}>
124:             <button
125:                 type="button"
126:                 disabled={disabled}
127:                 onClick={() => setOpen((prev) => !prev)}
128:                 className={`w-full h-10 px-3 rounded-xl border bg-white text-sm text-left flex items-center justify-between transition-all ${disabled
129:                     ? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed border-dashed border-gray-200'
130:                     : 'border-gray-300 hover:border-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-bmkg-primary/20'
131:                     }`}
132:             >
133:                 <span className="min-w-0 flex items-center gap-2">
134:                     <FlagIcon countryCode={selected?.value} />
135:                     <span className={`truncate ${compact ? 'font-semibold tabular-nums' : ''}`}>
136:                         {compact ? (selected?.dialCode ? `+${selected.dialCode}` : placeholder) : (selected ? `${selected.label} (+${selected.dialCode})` : placeholder)}
137:                     </span>
138:                 </span>
139:                 <ChevronDownIcon className={`ml-3 w-4 h-4 shrink-0 text-gray-400 transition-transform ${open ? 'rotate-180' : ''}`} />
140:             </button>
141: 
142:             {open && !disabled && (
143:                 <div className={`absolute z-50 mt-2 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white shadow-xl ${compact ? 'left-0 w-[20rem] max-w-[calc(100vw-2rem)]' : 'left-0 w-full'}`}>
144:                     <div className="p-2 border-b border-gray-100">
145:                         <div className="relative">
146:                             <MagnifyingGlassIcon className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 absolute left-2.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2" />
147:                             <input
148:                                 ref={searchInputRef}
149:                                 type="text"
150:                                 value={query}
151:                                 onChange={(event) => setQuery(event.target.value)}
152:                                 placeholder="Cari negara atau +kode"
153:                                 className="w-full h-9 pl-9 pr-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-bmkg-primary/20"
154:                             />
155:                         </div>
156:                     </div>
157: 
158:                     <div className="max-h-56 overflow-y-auto p-1.5 space-y-1">
159:                         {filteredOptions.length > 0 ? (
160:                             filteredOptions.map((option) => {
161:                                 const active = option.value === selected?.value;
162: 
163:                                 return (
164:                                     <button
165:                                         key={option.value}
166:                                         type="button"
167:                                         onClick={() => {
168:                                             onChange?.(option.value);
169:                                             setOpen(false);
170:                                             setQuery('');
171:                                         }}
172:                                         className={`w-full text-left px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition-colors ${active
173:                                             ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white'
174:                                             : 'text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100'
175:                                             }`}
176:                                     >
177:                                         <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
178:                                             <FlagIcon countryCode={option.value} />
179:                                             <span>{option.label} (+{option.dialCode})</span>
180:                                         </span>
181:                                     </button>
182:                                 );
183:                             })
184:                         ) : (
185:                             <p className="px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-400">Negara tidak ditemukan.</p>
186:                         )}
187:                     </div>
188:                 </div>
189:             )}
190:         </div>
191:     );
192: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/PrimaryButton.jsx

 1: export default function PrimaryButton({
 2:     className = '',
 3:     disabled,
 4:     children,
 5:     ...props
 6: }) {
 7:     return (
 8:         <button
 9:             {...props}
10:             className={
11:                 `inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-transparent bg-gray-800 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-white transition duration-150 ease-in-out hover:bg-gray-700 focus:bg-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:ring-offset-2 active:bg-gray-900 ${
12:                     disabled && 'opacity-25'
13:                 } ` + className
14:             }
15:             disabled={disabled}
16:         >
17:             {children}
18:         </button>
19:     );
20: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/ResponsiveNavLink.jsx
================
 1: import { Link } from '@inertiajs/react';
 2: 
 3: export default function ResponsiveNavLink({
 4:     active = false,
 5:     className = '',
 6:     children,
 7:     variant = 'light', // 'light' | 'dark'
 8:     ...props
 9: }) {
10:     const isDark = variant === 'dark';
11:     
12:     return (
13:         <Link
14:             {...props}
15:             className={`flex w-full items-start border-l-4 py-2 pe-4 ps-3 transition duration-150 ease-in-out focus:outline-none text-base font-medium ${
16:                 active
17:                     ? (isDark 
18:                         ? 'border-bmkg-accent bg-bmkg-secondary/50 text-white focus:bg-bmkg-secondary/70' 
19:                         : 'border-indigo-400 bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 focus:border-indigo-700 focus:bg-indigo-100 focus:text-indigo-800')
20:                     : (isDark
21:                         ? 'border-transparent text-blue-100 hover:border-bmkg-accent hover:bg-bmkg-secondary/50 hover:text-white' 
22:                         : 'border-transparent text-gray-600 hover:border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:text-gray-800 focus:border-gray-300 focus:bg-gray-50 focus:text-gray-800')
23:             } ${className}`}
24:         >
25:             {children}
26:         </Link>
27:     );
28: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/SearchBar.jsx
================
 1: /**
 2:  * Reusable search bar component with input and a submit button.
 3:  *
 4:  * Props:
 5:  *  - value: string – controlled input value.
 6:  *  - onChange: (event) => void – input change handler.
 7:  *  - onSearch: () => void – callback invoked when the form is submitted (button click or Enter).
 8:  *  - placeholder: string – input placeholder text (default "Search...").
 9:  *  - containerClassName: string – additional classes for the outer <form> element to control width/height.
10:  *
11:  * The component uses Tailwind utilities consistent with the existing UI.
12:  */
13: import { MagnifyingGlassIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
14: 
15: export default function SearchBar({
16:     value,
17:     onChange,
18:     onSearch,
19:     placeholder = 'Search...',
20:     containerClassName = '',
21: }) {
22:     return (
23:         <form
24:             onSubmit={(e) => {
25:                 e.preventDefault();
26:                 onSearch?.();
27:             }}
28:             className={containerClassName}
29:         >
30:             <div className="flex flex-1 items-stretch overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border-2 border-gray-300 bg-white shadow-sm focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-yellow-400 focus-within:border-yellow-400">
31:                 <input
32:                     type="text"
33:                     value={value}
34:                     onChange={onChange}
35:                     placeholder={placeholder}
36:                     className="w-full rounded-l-2xl border-0 px-3.5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-gray-800 placeholder:text-gray-400 outline-none focus:border-0 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none"
37:                 />
38:                 <button
39:                     type="submit"
40:                     className="flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-900 px-3.5 text-white transition hover:bg-black"
41:                     aria-label="Search"
42:                 >
43:                     <MagnifyingGlassIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
44:                 </button>
45:             </div>
46:         </form>
47:     );
48: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/SecondaryButton.jsx
================
 1: export default function SecondaryButton({
 2:     type = 'button',
 3:     className = '',
 4:     disabled,
 5:     children,
 6:     ...props
 7: }) {
 8:     return (
 9:         <button
10:             {...props}
11:             type={type}
12:             className={
13:                 `inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-700 shadow-sm transition duration-150 ease-in-out hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-25 ${
14:                     disabled && 'opacity-25'
15:                 } ` + className
16:             }
17:             disabled={disabled}
18:         >
19:             {children}
20:         </button>
21:     );
22: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/TableActionTextButtons.jsx
================
 1: import { PencilSquareIcon, TrashIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 2: 
 3: export default function TableActionTextButtons({
 4:     onEdit,
 5:     onDelete,
 6:     editLabel = 'Edit',
 7:     deleteLabel = 'Hapus',
 8:     align = 'left',
 9:     mode = 'inline',
10:     showIcons = true,
11:     showEdit = true,
12:     showDelete = true,
13:     fillCell = false,
14: }) {
15:     const alignmentClass = align === 'right' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start';
16:     const splitWrapperClass = fillCell
17:         ? 'absolute inset-0 grid w-full h-full bg-transparent'
18:         : 'grid w-full h-full bg-transparent';
19: 
20:     if (mode === 'split') {
21:         if (!showEdit && !showDelete) {
22:             return <div className={fillCell ? 'absolute inset-0' : 'h-full w-full'} />;
23:         }
24: 
25:         if (showEdit && !showDelete) {
26:             return (
27:                 <div className={`${splitWrapperClass} grid-cols-1`}>
28:                     <button
29:                         type="button"
30:                         onClick={onEdit}
31:                         className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center px-3 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-gray-900 transition hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white"
32:                     >
33:                         {editLabel}
34:                     </button>
35:                 </div>
36:             );
37:         }
38: 
39:         if (!showEdit && showDelete) {
40:             return (
41:                 <div className={`${splitWrapperClass} grid-cols-1`}>
42:                     <button
43:                         type="button"
44:                         onClick={onDelete}
45:                         className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center px-3 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-rose-600 transition hover:bg-rose-600 hover:text-white"
46:                     >
47:                         {deleteLabel}
48:                     </button>
49:                 </div>
50:             );
51:         }
52: 
53:         return (
54:             <div className={`${splitWrapperClass} grid-cols-2 divide-x divide-gray-300`}>
55:                 <button
56:                     type="button"
57:                     onClick={onEdit}
58:                     className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-gray-900 transition hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white"
59:                 >
60:                     {showIcons && <PencilSquareIcon className="h-4 w-4" />}
61:                     {editLabel}
62:                 </button>
63:                 <button
64:                     type="button"
65:                     onClick={onDelete}
66:                     className="inline-flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-rose-600 transition hover:bg-rose-600 hover:text-white"
67:                 >
68:                     {showIcons && <TrashIcon className="h-4 w-4" />}
69:                     {deleteLabel}
70:                 </button>
71:             </div>
72:         );
73:     }
74: 
75:     return (
76:         <div className={`inline-flex items-center gap-3 ${alignmentClass}`}>
77:             <button
78:                 type="button"
79:                 onClick={onEdit}
80:                 className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-600 transition hover:text-gray-900"
81:             >
82:                 <PencilSquareIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
83:                 {editLabel}
84:             </button>
85:             <button
86:                 type="button"
87:                 onClick={onDelete}
88:                 className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-600 transition hover:text-rose-700"
89:             >
90:                 <TrashIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
91:                 {deleteLabel}
92:             </button>
93:         </div>
94:     );
95: }

================
File: resources/js/Components/TextInput.jsx
================
 1: import { forwardRef, useEffect, useImperativeHandle, useRef } from 'react';
 2: 
 3: export default forwardRef(function TextInput(
 4:     { type = 'text', className = '', isFocused = false, ...props },
 5:     ref,
 6: ) {
 7:     const localRef = useRef(null);
 8: 
 9:     useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
10:         focus: () => localRef.current?.focus(),
11:     }));
12: 
13:     useEffect(() => {
14:         if (isFocused) {
15:             localRef.current?.focus();
16:         }
17:     }, [isFocused]);
18: 
19:     return (
20:         <input
21:             {...props}
22:             type={type}
23:             className={
24:                 'rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-indigo-500 ' +
25:                 className
26:             }
27:             ref={localRef}
28:         />
29:     );
30: });

 2: 
 3: export default function TrendChart({ data }) {
 4:     return (
 5:         <div className="h-72 w-full">
 6:             <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
 7:                 <AreaChart
 8:                     data={data}
 9:                     margin={{
10:                         top: 10,
11:                         right: 30,
12:                         left: 0,
13:                         bottom: 0,
14:                     }}
15:                 >
16:                     <defs>
17:                         <linearGradient id="colorRequests" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
18:                             <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#0EA5E9" stopOpacity={0.3}/>
19:                             <stop offset="95%" stopColor="#0EA5E9" stopOpacity={0}/>
20:                         </linearGradient>
21:                     </defs>
22:                     <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" vertical={false} stroke="#E5E7EB" />
23:                     <XAxis 
24:                         dataKey="name" 
25:                         axisLine={false} 
26:                         tickLine={false} 
27:                         tick={{fill: '#6B7280', fontSize: 12}} 
28:                         dy={10}
29:                     />
30:                     <YAxis 
31:                         axisLine={false} 
32:                         tickLine={false} 
33:                         tick={{fill: '#6B7280', fontSize: 12}} 
34:                     />
35:                     <Tooltip 
36:                         contentStyle={{ borderRadius: '8px', border: 'none', boxShadow: '0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1)' }}
37:                     />
38:                     <Area 
39:                         type="monotone" 
40:                         dataKey="requests" 
41:                         stroke="#0EA5E9" 
42:                         strokeWidth={3}
43:                         fillOpacity={1} 
44:                         fill="url(#colorRequests)" 
45:                     />
46:                 </AreaChart>
47:             </ResponsiveContainer>
48:         </div>
49:     );
50: }

================
File: resources/js/Hooks/useChatbot.js
================
  1: import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
  2: import { router } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import axios from 'axios';
  4: 
  5: /**
  6:  * Custom hook for managing chatbot state and API integration.
  7:  *
  8:  * @param {Object} options - Configuration options
  9:  * @param {string} options.apiUrl - Base URL for chatbot API (default: '/api/chatbot')
 10:  * @param {number} options.maxInputLength - Maximum input length (default: 500)
 11:  * @param {boolean} options.persistMessages - Whether to persist messages to storage (default: true)
 12:  * @returns {Object} Chatbot state and methods
 13:  */
 14: export function useChatbot(options = {}) {
 15:     const {
 16:         apiUrl = '/api/chatbot',
 17:         maxInputLength = 500,
 18:         persistMessages = true,
 19:         isAuthenticated: providedIsAuthenticated,
 20:     } = options;
 21: 
 22:     // State
 23:     const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
 24:     const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
 25:     const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
 26:     const [conversationId, setConversationId] = useState(null);
 27:     const [error, setError] = useState(null);
 28:     const [suggestedQuestions, setSuggestedQuestions] = useState([]);
 29:     const [isAuthenticated, setIsAuthenticated] = useState(providedIsAuthenticated || false);
 30:     const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0);
 31:     const inFlightRef = useRef(false);
 32: 
 33:     // Refs for auto-scroll
 34:     const messagesEndRef = useRef(null);
 35: 
 36:     // Storage keys
 37:     const STORAGE_KEY = `chatbot_messages_${conversationId || 'guest'}`;
 38:     const SESSION_KEY = 'chatbot_session_id';
 39: 
 40:     /**
 41:      * Check authentication status on mount or prop sync
 42:      */
 43:     useEffect(() => {
 44:         if (providedIsAuthenticated !== undefined) {
 45:             setIsAuthenticated(providedIsAuthenticated);
 46:         } else {
 47:             const authMeta = document.querySelector('meta[name="user-authenticated"]');
 48:             setIsAuthenticated(authMeta?.content === 'true');
 49:         }
 50:     }, [providedIsAuthenticated]);
 51: 
 52:     /**
 53:      * Load persisted messages from storage
 54:      */
 55:     useEffect(() => {
 56:         if (!persistMessages || !conversationId) return;
 57: 
 58:         try {
 59:             const storage = isAuthenticated ? localStorage : sessionStorage;
 60:             const stored = storage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
 61:             if (stored) {
 62:                 const parsed = JSON.parse(stored);
 63:                 setMessages(parsed);
 64:             }
 65:         } catch (e) {
 66:             console.warn('Failed to load chat messages:', e);
 67:         }
 68:     }, [conversationId, isAuthenticated, persistMessages]);
 69: 
 70:     /**
 71:      * Persist messages to storage
 72:      */
 73:     useEffect(() => {
 74:         if (!persistMessages || !conversationId || messages.length === 0) return;
 75: 
 76:         try {
 77:             const storage = isAuthenticated ? localStorage : sessionStorage;
 78:             storage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(messages));
 79:         } catch (e) {
 80:             console.warn('Failed to save chat messages:', e);
 81:         }
 82:     }, [messages, conversationId, isAuthenticated, persistMessages]);
 83: 
 84:     /**
 85:      * Fetch suggested questions on mount
 86:      */
 87:     useEffect(() => {
 88:         fetchSuggestedQuestions();
 89:     }, []);
 90: 
 91:     /**
 92:      * Fetch suggested questions from API
 93:      */
 94:     const fetchSuggestedQuestions = useCallback(async () => {
 95:         try {
 96:             const response = await axios.get(`${apiUrl}/suggested-questions`);
 97:             if (response.data.success) {
 98:                 setSuggestedQuestions(response.data.data.questions);
 99:             }
100:         } catch (e) {
101:             console.warn('Failed to fetch suggested questions:', e);
102:             // Fallback questions
103:             setSuggestedQuestions([
104:                 'Bagaimana cara mengajukan permohonan data?',
105:                 'Apa saja jenis data yang tersedia?',
106:                 'Berapa lama proses permohonan?',
107:             ]);
108:         }
109:     }, [apiUrl]);
110: 
111:     /**
112:      * Toggle chat window open/close
113:      */
114:     const toggleChat = useCallback(() => {
115:         setIsOpen(prev => {
116:             const newState = !prev;
117:             if (newState) {
118:                 setUnreadCount(0);
119:             }
120:             return newState;
121:         });
122:     }, []);
123: 
124:     /**
125:      * Open chat window
126:      */
127:     const openChat = useCallback(() => {
128:         setIsOpen(true);
129:         setUnreadCount(0);
130:     }, []);
131: 
132:     /**
133:      * Close chat window
134:      */
135:     const closeChat = useCallback(() => {
136:         setIsOpen(false);
137:     }, []);
138: 
139:     /**
140:      * Send a message to the chatbot
141:      *
142:      * @param {string} message - The message to send
143:      * @returns {Promise<Object>} Response data
144:      */
145:     const sendMessage = useCallback(async (message) => {
146:         if (!message.trim() || isLoading || inFlightRef.current) return null;
147:         inFlightRef.current = true;
148: 
149:         // Add user message immediately
150:         const userMessage = {
151:             id: `temp-${Date.now()}`,
152:             role: 'user',
153:             content: message.trim(),
154:             created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
155:         };
156: 
157:         setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMessage]);
158:         setIsLoading(true);
159:         setError(null);
160: 
161:         try {
162:             console.debug('[Chatbot] sending message', {
163:                 conversationId,
164:                 apiUrl,
165:                 messagePreview: message.trim().slice(0, 120),
166:             });
167: 
168:             const response = await axios.post(`${apiUrl}/message`, {
169:                 message: message.trim(),
170:                 conversation_id: conversationId,
171:             });
172: 
173:             if (response.data.success) {
174:                 const { data } = response.data;
175:                 console.debug('[Chatbot] api success', {
176:                     traceId: response.data.trace_id,
177:                     conversationId: data.conversation_id,
178:                     cached: data.cached,
179:                     sourcesCount: (data.sources || []).length,
180:                     responsePreview: (data.message || '').slice(0, 160),
181:                 });
182: 
183:                 // Update conversation ID if new
184:                 if (data.conversation_id && !conversationId) {
185:                     setConversationId(data.conversation_id);
186:                 }
187: 
188:                 // Add assistant message
189:                 const assistantMessage = {
190:                     id: `msg-${Date.now()}`,
191:                     role: 'assistant',
192:                     content: data.message,
193:                     sources: data.sources || [],
194:                     cached: data.cached || false,
195:                     created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
196:                 };
197: 
198:                 setMessages(prev => [
199:                     ...prev.filter(m => m.id !== userMessage.id),
200:                     { ...userMessage, id: `msg-${Date.now()}-user` },
201:                     assistantMessage,
202:                 ]);
203: 
204:                 return data;
205:             } else {
206:                 console.warn('[Chatbot] api returned success=false', {
207:                     traceId: response.data.trace_id,
208:                     message: response.data.message,
209:                 });
210:                 throw new Error(response.data.message || 'Failed to get response');
211:             }
212:         } catch (err) {
213:             const errorMessage = err.response?.data?.message 
214:                 || err.message 
215:                 || 'Maaf, terjadi kesalahan. Silakan coba lagi.';
216: 
217:             console.error('[Chatbot] api error', {
218:                 traceId: err.response?.data?.trace_id,
219:                 status: err.response?.status,
220:                 message: errorMessage,
221:             });
222:             
223:             setError(errorMessage);
224:             
225:             // Add error message
226:             setMessages(prev => [
227:                 ...prev,
228:                 {
229:                     id: `error-${Date.now()}`,
230:                     role: 'system',
231:                     content: errorMessage,
232:                     isError: true,
233:                     created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
234:                 },
235:             ]);
236: 
237:             throw err;
238:         } finally {
239:             setIsLoading(false);
240:             inFlightRef.current = false;
241:         }
242:     }, [apiUrl, conversationId, isLoading]);
243: 
244:     /**
245:      * Load conversation history
246:      *
247:      * @param {string} id - Conversation ID
248:      * @returns {Promise<Object>} Conversation data
249:      */
250:     const loadConversation = useCallback(async (id) => {
251:         try {
252:             const response = await axios.get(`${apiUrl}/conversations/${id}`);
253:             
254:             if (response.data.success) {
255:                 const { data } = response.data;
256:                 setConversationId(data.id);
257:                 
258:                 // Format messages
259:                 const formattedMessages = data.messages.map(msg => ({
260:                     id: msg.id,
261:                     role: msg.role,
262:                     content: msg.content,
263:                     sources: msg.sources || [],
264:                     created_at: msg.created_at,
265:                 }));
266:                 
267:                 setMessages(formattedMessages);
268:                 return data;
269:             }
270:         } catch (err) {
271:             console.error('Failed to load conversation:', err);
272:             throw err;
273:         }
274:     }, [apiUrl]);
275: 
276:     const [conversationsList, setConversationsList] = useState([]);
277:     const [isLoadingList, setIsLoadingList] = useState(false);
278: 
279:     /**
280:      * Fetch user's conversation history list
281:      */
282:     const fetchConversationsList = useCallback(async () => {
283:         if (!isAuthenticated) return;
284:         setIsLoadingList(true);
285:         try {
286:             const response = await axios.get(`${apiUrl}/conversations`);
287:             if (response.data.success) {
288:                 setConversationsList(response.data.data.conversations || []);
289:             }
290:         } catch (e) {
291:             console.error('Failed to fetch conversations list:', e);
292:         } finally {
293:             setIsLoadingList(false);
294:         }
295:     }, [apiUrl, isAuthenticated]);
296: 
297:     /**
298:      * Clear current conversation
299:      */
300:     const clearConversation = useCallback(() => {
301:         setMessages([]);
302:         setConversationId(null);
303:         setError(null);
304:         
305:         // Clear storage
306:         if (persistMessages) {
307:             try {
308:                 const storage = isAuthenticated ? localStorage : sessionStorage;
309:                 storage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);
310:             } catch (e) {
311:                 console.warn('Failed to clear chat storage:', e);
312:             }
313:         }
314:     }, [STORAGE_KEY, isAuthenticated, persistMessages]);
315: 
316:     /**
317:      * Archive conversation
318:      *
319:      * @param {string} id - Conversation ID (optional, uses current if not provided)
320:      * @returns {Promise<boolean>} Success status
321:      */
322:     const archiveConversation = useCallback(async (id = null) => {
323:         const targetId = id || conversationId;
324:         if (!targetId) return false;
325: 
326:         try {
327:             const response = await axios.post(
328:                 `${apiUrl}/conversations/${targetId}/archive`
329:             );
330:             
331:             if (response.data.success) {
332:                 clearConversation();
333:                 return true;
334:             }
335:         } catch (err) {
336:             console.error('Failed to archive conversation:', err);
337:         }
338:         
339:         return false;
340:     }, [apiUrl, conversationId, clearConversation]);
341: 
342:     /**
343:      * Check if chatbot is available
344:      *
345:      * @returns {Promise<boolean>} Availability status
346:      */
347:     const checkAvailability = useCallback(async () => {
348:         try {
349:             const response = await axios.get(`${apiUrl}/status`);
350:             return response.data.success && response.data.data.available;
351:         } catch {
352:             return false;
353:         }
354:     }, [apiUrl]);
355: 
356:     return {
357:         // State
358:         isOpen,
359:         messages,
360:         isLoading,
361:         conversationId,
362:         error,
363:         suggestedQuestions,
364:         isAuthenticated,
365:         unreadCount,
366:         maxInputLength,
367:         
368:         // Actions
369:         toggleChat,
370:         openChat,
371:         closeChat,
372:         sendMessage,
373:         loadConversation,
374:         clearConversation,
375:         archiveConversation,
376:         checkAvailability,
377:         fetchSuggestedQuestions,
378:         fetchConversationsList,
379: 
380:         // Data
381:         conversationsList,
382:         isLoadingList,
383:         
384:         // Refs
385:         messagesEndRef,
386:     };
387: }
388: 
389: export default useChatbot;

================
File: resources/js/Hooks/useFlash.js
================
 1: import { usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';
 2: import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
 3: 
 4: /**
 5:  * useFlash - reads Inertia shared flash messages and auto-dismisses.
 6:  *
 7:  * @param {number} duration - Auto-dismiss duration in ms (default 4500)
 8:  * @returns {{ success: string|null, error: string|null, dismiss: Function }}
 9:  */
10: export function useFlash(duration = 4500) {
11:     const { flash } = usePage().props;
12:     const [visible, setVisible] = useState(false);
13:     const [current, setCurrent] = useState({ success: null, error: null });
14:     const lastSeenKeyRef = useRef(null);
15: 
16:     useEffect(() => {
17:         if (!(flash?.success || flash?.error)) {
18:             return;
19:         }
20: 
21:         const nextKey = flash?.key ?? `${flash?.success ?? ''}|${flash?.error ?? ''}`;
22:         if (lastSeenKeyRef.current === nextKey) {
23:             return;
24:         }
25: 
26:         lastSeenKeyRef.current = nextKey;
27: 
28:         const nextSuccess = flash?.success ?? null;
29:         const nextError = nextSuccess ? null : (flash?.error ?? null);
30: 
31:         setCurrent({ success: nextSuccess, error: nextError });
32:         setVisible(true);
33: 
34:         const timer = setTimeout(() => setVisible(false), duration);
35:         return () => clearTimeout(timer);
36:     }, [flash?.key, flash?.success, flash?.error, duration]);
37: 
38:     const dismiss = () => {
39:         setVisible(false);
40:     };
41: 
42:     return {
43:         show: visible,
44:         success: current.success,
45:         error: current.error,
46:         dismiss,
47:     };
48: }

================
File: resources/js/Hooks/useScrollReveal.js
================
 1: import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
 2: 
 3: /**
 4:  * Custom hook that triggers scroll-reveal animations via IntersectionObserver.
 5:  * Adds the 'revealed' class to elements with 'reveal', 'reveal-left',
 6:  * 'reveal-right', or 'reveal-scale' classes when they enter the viewport.
 7:  *
 8:  * @param {Object} options
 9:  * @param {number} [options.threshold=0.1] - Visibility threshold to trigger
10:  * @param {string} [options.rootMargin='0px 0px -50px 0px'] - Root margin offset
11:  */
12: export default function useScrollReveal({ threshold = 0.1, rootMargin = '0px 0px -50px 0px' } = {}) {
13:     const containerRef = useRef(null);
14: 
15:     useEffect(() => {
16:         const container = containerRef.current;
17:         if (!container) return;
18: 
19:         const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
20:             (entries) => {
21:                 entries.forEach((entry) => {
22:                     if (entry.isIntersecting) {
23:                         entry.target.classList.add('revealed');
24:                         observer.unobserve(entry.target);
25:                     }
26:                 });
27:             },
28:             { threshold, rootMargin }
29:         );
30: 
31:         const elements = container.querySelectorAll(
32:             '.reveal, .reveal-left, .reveal-right, .reveal-scale'
33:         );
34: 
35:         elements.forEach((el) => observer.observe(el));
36: 
37:         return () => observer.disconnect();
38:     }, [threshold, rootMargin]);
39: 
40:     return containerRef;
41: }

File: resources/js/Layouts/AuthenticatedLayout.jsx
================
 1: import DashboardSidebar from '@/Components/DashboardSidebar';
 2: import BackgroundPattern from '@/Components/BackgroundPattern';
 3: import FlashNotification from '@/Components/FlashNotification';
 4: import ChatBotButton from '@/Components/ChatBotButton';
 5: import { Bars3Icon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 6: import { usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';
 7: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
 8: 
 9: export default function AuthenticatedLayout({ header, children }) {
10:     const user = usePage().props.auth.user;
11:     const shouldShowChatbot = user?.role === 'user';
12:     const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(false);
13: 
14:     const [desktopSidebarCollapsed, setDesktopSidebarCollapsed] = useState(() => {
15:         if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
16:             const saved = localStorage.getItem('sidebar_collapsed');
17:             return saved !== null ? JSON.parse(saved) : false;
18:         }
19:         return false;
20:     });
21: 
22:     useEffect(() => {
23:         localStorage.setItem('sidebar_collapsed', JSON.stringify(desktopSidebarCollapsed));
24:     }, [desktopSidebarCollapsed]);
25: 
26:     return (
27:         <div className="flex h-screen bg-gray-100">
28:             <DashboardSidebar
29:                 user={user}
30:                 role={user.role}
31:                 isOpen={sidebarOpen}
32:                 toggle={() => setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
33:                 isCollapsed={sidebarOpen ? false : desktopSidebarCollapsed}
34:             />
35: 
36:             <div className="flex flex-col flex-1 w-full overflow-hidden">
37:                 <header className="flex h-16 items-center gap-4 bg-white px-4 shadow-sm z-30 md:px-8 flex-shrink-0">
38:                     <button
39:                         onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(true)}
40:                         className="p-2 text-gray-500 md:hidden hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg"
41:                     >
42:                         <Bars3Icon className="h-6 w-6" />
43:                     </button>
44: 
45:                     <button onClick={() => setDesktopSidebarCollapsed(!desktopSidebarCollapsed)} className="hidden p-2 text-gray-500 md:block">
46:                         <Bars3Icon className="h-6 w-6" />
47:                     </button>
48: 
49:                     <div className="flex-1">
50:                         {header || <div className="font-semibold text-gray-900 md:hidden">BMKG Data</div>}
51:                     </div>
52:                 </header>
53: 
54:                 <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto bg-gray-50">
55:                     <div className="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-50 -z-10">
56:                         <BackgroundPattern variant="topography" />
57:                     </div>
58:                     <FlashNotification />
59:                     {children}
60:                 </main>
61:             </div>
62: 
63:             {/* Chatbot Widget (user-only, unified with landing/help chatbot component) */}
64:             {shouldShowChatbot && <ChatBotButton />}
65:         </div>
66:     );
67: }

File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/Catalogs/Index.jsx

  1: import AuthenticatedLayout from '@/Layouts/AuthenticatedLayout';
  2: import Modal from '@/Components/Modal';
  3: import { Head, router, useForm } from '@inertiajs/react';
  4: import { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
  5: import SecondaryButton from '@/Components/SecondaryButton';
  6: import InlineStatusToggle from '@/Components/InlineStatusToggle';
  7: import TableActionTextButtons from '@/Components/TableActionTextButtons';
  8: import AddActionButton from '@/Components/AddActionButton';
  9: import SearchBar from '@/Components/SearchBar';
 10: import CatalogForm from './Partials/CatalogForm';
 11: 
 12: function formatCurrency(value) {
 13:     if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') {
 14:         return 'Rp -';
 15:     }
 16: 
 17:     const normalized = typeof value === 'string'
 18:         ? value.replace(/[^\d-]/g, '')
 19:         : value;
 20:     const numeric = Number(normalized);
 21: 
 22:     if (!Number.isFinite(numeric)) {
 23:         return 'Rp -';
 24:     }
 25: 
 26:     return `Rp ${new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID').format(numeric)}`;
 27: }
 28: 
 29: export default function Index({ catalogItems = [], categories = [] }) {
 30:     const [showFormModal, setShowFormModal] = useState(false);
 31:     const [formMode, setFormMode] = useState('create');
 32:     const [editingCatalog, setEditingCatalog] = useState(null);
 33:     const [showDeleteModal, setShowDeleteModal] = useState(false);
 34:     const [deleteCatalog, setDeleteCatalog] = useState(null);
 35:     const [togglingCatalogId, setTogglingCatalogId] = useState(null);
 36:     const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('all');
 37:     const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
 38:     const { data, setData, post, put, processing, errors, clearErrors, reset } = useForm({
 39:         title: '',
 40:         category_id: null,
 41:         // image_path will be set server-side from category
 42:         price: '',
 43:         unit: '',
 44:         is_active: true,
 45:     });
 46: 
 47:     const orderedCatalogs = useMemo(() => {
 48:         return [...catalogItems].sort((left, right) => (left.title ?? '').localeCompare(right.title ?? ''));
 49:     }, [catalogItems]);
 50: 
 51:     const activeCount = orderedCatalogs.filter((item) => item.is_active).length;
 52:     const inactiveCount = orderedCatalogs.length - activeCount;
 53: 
 54:     const filteredCatalogs = useMemo(() => {
 55:         let list = orderedCatalogs;
 56:         if (statusFilter === 'active') {
 57:             list = list.filter((item) => Boolean(item.is_active));
 58:         } else if (statusFilter === 'inactive') {
 59:             list = list.filter((item) => !item.is_active);
 60:         }
 61:         if (search.trim() !== '') {
 62:             const term = search.trim().toLowerCase();
 63:             list = list.filter((item) => {
 64:                 const title = (item.title ?? '').toString().toLowerCase();
 65:                 const category = (item.category ?? '').toString().toLowerCase();
 66:                 return title.includes(term) || category.includes(term);
 67:             });
 68:         }
 69:         return list;
 70:     }, [orderedCatalogs, statusFilter, search]);
 71: 
 72:     const openCreateModal = () => {
 73:         setFormMode('create');
 74:         setEditingCatalog(null);
 75:         clearErrors();
 76:         reset();
 77:         setShowFormModal(true);
 78:     };
 79: 
 80:     const openEditModal = (catalog) => {
 81:         setFormMode('edit');
 82:         setEditingCatalog(catalog);
 83:         clearErrors();
 84:         setData({
 85:             title: catalog.title ?? '',
 86:             category_id: catalog.catalog_category_id ?? null,
 87:             price: catalog.price ?? '',
 88:             unit: catalog.unit ?? '',
 89:             is_active: Boolean(catalog.is_active),
 90:         });
 91:         setShowFormModal(true);
 92:     };
 93: 
 94:     const closeFormModal = () => {
 95:         setShowFormModal(false);
 96:         setEditingCatalog(null);
 97:         clearErrors();
 98:     };
 99: 
100:     const handleFormSubmit = (event) => {
101:         event.preventDefault();
102: 
103:         if (formMode === 'create') {
104:             post(route('admin.catalogs.store'), {
105:                 preserveScroll: true,
106:                 onSuccess: closeFormModal,
107:             });
108:             return;
109:         }
110: 
111:         if (editingCatalog) {
112:             put(route('admin.catalogs.update', editingCatalog.id), {
113:                 preserveScroll: true,
114:                 onSuccess: closeFormModal,
115:             });
116:         }
117:     };
118: 
119:     const openDeleteModal = (catalog) => {
120:         setDeleteCatalog(catalog);
121:         setShowDeleteModal(true);
122:     };
123: 
124:     const handleDelete = () => {
125:         if (!deleteCatalog) {
126:             return;
127:         }
128: 
129:         router.delete(route('admin.catalogs.destroy', deleteCatalog.id), {
130:             preserveScroll: true,
131:             onSuccess: () => {
132:                 setShowDeleteModal(false);
133:                 setDeleteCatalog(null);
134:             },
135:         });
136:     };
137: 
138:     const handleToggleActive = (catalog) => {
139:         setTogglingCatalogId(catalog.id);
140: 
141:         router.put(route('admin.catalogs.update', catalog.id), {
142:             title: catalog.title ?? '',
143:             category_id: catalog.catalog_category_id ?? null,
144:             price: Number(catalog.price ?? 0),
145:             unit: catalog.unit ?? '',
146:             is_active: !catalog.is_active,
147:         }, {
148:             preserveScroll: true,
149:             preserveState: true,
150:             onFinish: () => setTogglingCatalogId(null),
151:         });
152:     };
153: 
154:     return (
155:         <AuthenticatedLayout header={<h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">Sistem Manajemen Konten</h2>}>
156:             <Head title="Kelola Katalog" />
157: 
158:             <div className="min-h-screen w-full bg-gray-50/50 pb-8">
159:                 <div className="mb-6 border-b border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-8 sm:px-8">
160:                     <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-6">
161:                         <div>
162:                             <h1 className="text-2xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-gray-900">Kelola Katalog</h1>
163:                             <p className="mt-1.5 max-w-2xl text-sm text-gray-500">
164:                                 Kelola informasi data yang tampil pada landing page publik. Item yang aktif akan muncul di section katalog.

166:                         </div>

172:                                         { key: 'all', label: 'Total', value: orderedCatalogs.length },
173:                                         { key: 'active', label: 'Aktif', value: activeCount },
174:                                         { key: 'inactive', label: 'Tidak Aktif', value: inactiveCount },

180:                                                 key={stat.key}
181:                                                 type="button"

192:                                                         ? 'text-gray-200'
193:                                                         : 'text-gray-500 group-hover:-translate-y-0.5 group-hover:text-yellow-700'
194:                                                 }`}>
195:                                                     {stat.label}
196:                                                 </p>
197:                                                 <p className={`mt-1 text-sm font-extrabold tabular-nums leading-tight transform-gpu transition-transform transition-colors duration-200 ease-out ${
198:                                                     isActive
199:                                                         ? 'text-white'
200:                                                         : 'text-gray-900 group-hover:-translate-y-0.5 group-hover:text-yellow-700'
201:                                                 }`}>
202:                                                     {stat.value}
203:                                                 </p>
204:                                             </button>

206:                                     })}

226:                                 <thead className="bg-white border-b-2 border-gray-300">
227:                                     <tr>
228:                                         <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Informasi</th>

231:                                         <th className="w-36 px-6 py-3 text-center text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Status</th>
232:                                         <th className="w-44 border-l-2 border-gray-300 px-6 py-3 text-center text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Aksi</th>
233:                                     </tr>

236:                                     {filteredCatalogs.length > 0 ? filteredCatalogs.map((catalog) => (
237:                                         <tr key={catalog.id} className="transition hover:bg-gray-50/60">
238:                                             <td className="px-6 py-4 align-middle">
239:                                                 <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
240:                                                     <div className="h-14 w-14 overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 shadow-sm">
241:                                                         <img src={catalog.image_path} alt={catalog.title} className="h-full w-full object-cover" />
242:                                                     </div>
243:                                                     <div className="min-w-0">
244:                                                         <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">{catalog.title}</p>
245:                                                         <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">Path: {catalog.image_path}</p>
246:                                                     </div>
247:                                                 </div>
248:                                             </td>
249:                                             <td className="whitespace-nowrap px-6 py-4 align-middle text-center text-sm text-gray-600">{catalog.category}</td>
250:                                             <td className="whitespace-nowrap px-6 py-4 align-middle text-center text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">
251:                                                 <div>{formatCurrency(catalog.price)}</div>
252:                                                 <div className="text-xs font-normal text-gray-400">{catalog.unit}</div>
253:                                             </td>
254:                                             <td className="whitespace-nowrap px-6 py-4 align-middle text-center">
255:                                                 <div className="flex items-center justify-center">
256:                                                     <InlineStatusToggle
257:                                                         active={Boolean(catalog.is_active)}
258:                                                         activeLabel="Aktif"
259:                                                         inactiveLabel="Tidak Aktif"
260:                                                         processing={togglingCatalogId === catalog.id}
261:                                                         onToggle={() => handleToggleActive(catalog)}
262:                                                     />
263:                                                 </div>
264:                                             </td>
265:                                             <td className="relative w-44 whitespace-nowrap border-l-2 border-gray-300 p-0 align-middle text-right">
266:                                                 <TableActionTextButtons
267:                                                     align="right"
268:                                                     onEdit={() => openEditModal(catalog)}
269:                                                     onDelete={() => openDeleteModal(catalog)}
270:                                                     mode="split"
271:                                                     showIcons={false}
272:                                                     fillCell
273:                                                 />
274:                                             </td>
275:                                         </tr>
276:                                     )) : (
277:                                         <tr>
278:                                             <td colSpan={5} className="px-6 py-12 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
279:                                                 {statusFilter === 'all'
280:                                                     ? 'Belum ada item katalog.'
281:                                                     : `Belum ada item katalog dengan status ${statusFilter === 'active' ? 'aktif' : 'tidak aktif'}.`}
282:                                             </td>
283:                                         </tr>
284:                                     )}
285:                                 </tbody>
286:                             </table>
287:                         </div>
288:                     </div>
289:                 </div>
290:             </div>
291:

293:                 <CatalogForm
294:                     title={formMode === 'create' ? 'Tambah Katalog' : 'Edit Katalog'}
295:                     submitLabel={formMode === 'create' ? 'Simpan Katalog' : 'Perbarui Katalog'}
296:                     data={data}
297:                     setData={setData}
298:                     errors={errors}
299:                     processing={processing}
300:                     categories={categories}
301:                     onSubmit={handleFormSubmit}
302:                     onCancel={closeFormModal}
303:                 />
304:             </Modal>

307:                 <div className="space-y-6 p-6">

309:                         <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Hapus Katalog</h2>
310:                         <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
311:                             Tindakan ini akan menghapus katalog dari daftar landing page. Data masih bisa dipulihkan jika diperlukan.
312:                         </p>
313:                     </div>
314:

316:                         <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{deleteCatalog?.title}</p>

318:                     </div>

329:                             Hapus Katalog
330:                         </button>
331:                     </div>
332:                 </div>
333:             </Modal>
334:         </AuthenticatedLayout>

  1: import InputError from '@/Components/InputError';
  2: import PrimaryButton from '@/Components/PrimaryButton';
  3: import SecondaryButton from '@/Components/SecondaryButton';
  4: import TextInput from '@/Components/TextInput';
  5: import { useMemo } from 'react';
  6: 
  7: function normalizePriceInput(value) {
  8:     return String(value ?? '').replace(/\D/g, '');
  9: }
 10: 
 11: function formatPricePreview(value) {
 12:     const numeric = Number(normalizePriceInput(value) || 0);
 13:     return new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID').format(numeric);
 14: }
 15: 
 16: export default function CatalogForm({
 17:     title,
 18:     submitLabel,
 19:     data,
 20:     setData,
 21:     errors,
 22:     processing,
 23:     onSubmit,
 24:     onCancel,
 25:     categories = [],
 26: }) {
 27:     const selectedCategory = useMemo(
 28:         () => categories.find((c) => String(c.id) === String(data.category_id)),
 29:         [categories, data.category_id],
 30:     );
 31:     const previewImage = selectedCategory?.image_path || '/images/iklim.webp';
 32: 
 33:     return (
 34:         <>
 35:             <div className="space-y-6 rounded-2xl bg-white p-6 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-gray-100">
 36:             <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
 37:                 <div>
 38:                     <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">{title}</h2>
 39:                     <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-gray-500">
 40:                         Kelola kartu katalog yang tampil pada landing page publik.
 41:                     </p>
 42:                 </div>
 43:             </div>
 44: 
 45:             <form onSubmit={onSubmit} className="grid gap-6 lg:grid-cols-2">
 46:                 <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4">
 47:                     <div>
 48:                         <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Nama katalog</label>
 49:                         <TextInput
 50:                             value={data.title}
 51:                             onChange={(event) => setData('title', event.target.value)}
 52:                             className="mt-1 w-full focus:border-yellow-400 focus:ring-yellow-400"
 53:                             placeholder="Contoh: Peta Tingkat Kerawanan Petir"
 54:                         />
 55:                         <InputError message={errors.title} className="mt-1" />
 56:                     </div>
 57: 
 58:                     <div>
 59:                         <div>
 60:                             <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Kategori</label>
 61:                             <select
 62:                                 value={data.category_id ?? ''}
 63:                                 onChange={(event) => setData('category_id', event.target.value === '' ? null : Number(event.target.value))}
 64:                                 className="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-yellow-400 focus:ring-yellow-400"
 65:                             >
 66:                                 <option value="">Pilih kategori</option>
 67:                                 {categories.map((c) => (
 68:                                     <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</option>
 69:                                 ))}
 70:                             </select>
 71:                             <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">Kategori dikelola dari data master database.</p>
 72:                             <InputError message={errors.category_id} className="mt-1" />
 73:                         </div>
 74:                     </div>
 75: 
 76: 
 77:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
 78:                         <div>
 79:                             <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Tarif</label>
 80:                             <div className="mt-1 flex rounded-md shadow-sm">
 81:                                 <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-l-md border border-r-0 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50 px-3 text-sm text-gray-700">Rp</span>
 82:                                 <input
 83:                                     value={data.price}
 84:                                     onChange={(event) => setData('price', normalizePriceInput(event.target.value))}
 85:                                     className="block w-full min-w-0 flex-1 rounded-r-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-yellow-400 focus:ring-yellow-400"
 86:                                     placeholder="200000"
 87:                                 />
 88:                             </div>
 89:                             <InputError message={errors.price} className="mt-1" />
 90:                         </div>
 91: 
 92:                         <div>
 93:                             <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Satuan</label>
 94:                             <TextInput
 95:                                 value={data.unit}
 96:                                 onChange={(event) => setData('unit', event.target.value)}
 97:                                 className="mt-1 w-full focus:border-yellow-400 focus:ring-yellow-400"
 98:                                 placeholder="Per Lokasi/Tahun"
 99:                             />
100:                             <InputError message={errors.unit} className="mt-1" />
101:                         </div>
102:                     </div>
103: 
104:                     <div>
105:                         <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Status tampil</label>
106:                         <div className="mt-2 flex items-center gap-3">
107:                             <button
108:                                 type="button"
109:                                 onClick={() => setData('is_active', !data.is_active)}
110:                                 className={`relative inline-flex h-7 w-12 shrink-0 items-center rounded-full border p-1 transition-colors duration-200 focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-yellow-500 ${
111:                                     data.is_active ? 'border-yellow-500 bg-yellow-500' : 'border-gray-300 bg-gray-300'
112:                                 }`}
113:                                 aria-pressed={data.is_active}
114:                             >
115:                                 <span className="sr-only">{data.is_active ? 'Aktif' : 'Nonaktif'}</span>
116:                                 <span
117:                                     className={`h-5 w-5 rounded-full bg-white shadow transition-transform duration-200 ${
118:                                         data.is_active ? 'translate-x-5' : 'translate-x-0'
119:                                     }`}
120:                                 />
121:                             </button>
122:                             <span className={`text-xs font-semibold ${data.is_active ? 'text-yellow-700' : 'text-gray-500'}`}>
123:                                 {data.is_active ? 'Aktif' : 'Nonaktif'}
124:                             </span>
125:                         </div>
126:                         <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">Item aktif akan muncul di landing page publik.</p>
127:                         <InputError message={errors.is_active} className="mt-1" />
128:                     </div>
129:

131:                         <SecondaryButton type="button" onClick={onCancel}>
132:                             Batal

142:                         <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white">Preview Landing Card</p>

144:                     </div>

File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/ContactSettings/Index.jsx

  1: import AuthenticatedLayout from '@/Layouts/AuthenticatedLayout';
  2: import { Head, useForm } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: 
  4: const CONTACT_FIELDS = [
  5:     {
  6:         key: 'cs_whatsapp',
  7:         label: 'WhatsApp Customer Service',
  8:         placeholder: '6281234567890',
  9:         type: 'text',
 10:     },
 11:     {
 12:         key: 'cs_phone',
 13:         label: 'Nomor Telepon Kantor',
 14:         placeholder: '(021) 6546315',
 15:         type: 'text',
 16:     },
 17:     {
 18:         key: 'cs_email',
 19:         label: 'Email Kontak',
 20:         placeholder: 'pusat@bmkg.go.id',
 21:         type: 'email',
 22:     },
 23:     {
 24:         key: 'address',
 25:         label: 'Alamat Instansi',
 26:         placeholder: 'Masukkan alamat lengkap instansi',
 27:         type: 'textarea',
 28:     },
 29: ];
 30: 
 31: const SOCIAL_FIELDS = [
 32:     {
 33:         key: 'instagram',
 34:         label: 'Instagram',
 35:         placeholder: 'https://instagram.com/username',
 36:     },
 37:     {
 38:         key: 'twitter',
 39:         label: 'Twitter / X',
 40:         placeholder: 'https://x.com/username',
 41:     },
 42:     {
 43:         key: 'facebook',
 44:         label: 'Facebook',
 45:         placeholder: 'https://facebook.com/username',
 46:     },
 47:     {
 48:         key: 'youtube',
 49:         label: 'YouTube',
 50:         placeholder: 'https://youtube.com/@channel',
 51:     },
 52:     {
 53:         key: 'tiktok',
 54:         label: 'TikTok',
 55:         placeholder: 'https://tiktok.com/@username',
 56:     },
 57: ];
 58: 
 59: export default function Index({ contactSettings = {} }) {
 60:     const { data, setData, put, processing, errors } = useForm({
 61:         cs_whatsapp: contactSettings.cs_whatsapp ?? '',
 62:         cs_phone: contactSettings.cs_phone ?? '',
 63:         cs_email: contactSettings.cs_email ?? '',
 64:         address: contactSettings.address ?? '',
 65:         instagram: contactSettings.instagram ?? '',
 66:         twitter: contactSettings.twitter ?? '',
 67:         facebook: contactSettings.facebook ?? '',
 68:         youtube: contactSettings.youtube ?? '',
 69:         tiktok: contactSettings.tiktok ?? '',
 70:     });
 71: 
 72:     const submit = (event) => {
 73:         event.preventDefault();
 74: 
 75:         put(route('admin.contact-settings.update'), {
 76:             preserveScroll: true,
 77:         });
 78:     };
 79: 
 80:     return (
 81:         <AuthenticatedLayout header={<h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">Sistem Manajemen Konten</h2>}>
 82:             <Head title="Kontak & Sosial Media" />
 83: 
 84:             <div className="min-h-screen w-full bg-gray-50/50 pb-8">
 85:                 <div className="mb-6 border-b border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-8 sm:px-8">
 86:                     <h1 className="text-2xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-gray-900">Kontak & Sosial Media</h1>
 87:                     <p className="mt-1.5 text-sm text-gray-500">
 88:                         Kelola informasi kontak utama dan tautan media sosial yang ditampilkan pada halaman publik.
 89:                     </p>
 90:                 </div>
 91: 
 92:                 <form onSubmit={submit} className="w-full space-y-4 px-4 sm:px-8">
 93:                     <section className="overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white shadow-lg shadow-gray-200/30">
 94:                         <div className="border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/30 px-5 py-3.5 sm:px-6">
 95:                             <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">Informasi Kontak</h3>
 96:                         </div>
 97: 
 98:                         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 px-5 py-4 sm:px-6 md:grid-cols-2">
 99:                             {CONTACT_FIELDS.map((field) => (
100:                                 <div key={field.key} className={field.type === 'textarea' ? 'md:col-span-2' : ''}>
101:                                     <label className="mb-1 block text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500">
102:                                         {field.label}
103:                                     </label>
104: 
105:                                     {field.type === 'textarea' ? (
106:                                         <textarea
107:                                             value={data[field.key]}
108:                                             onChange={(event) => setData(field.key, event.target.value)}
109:                                             rows={3}
110:                                             placeholder={field.placeholder}
111:                                             className="w-full resize-none rounded-lg border-2 border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-300 transition focus:border-gray-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0"
112:                                         />
113:                                     ) : (
114:                                         <input
115:                                             type={field.type}
116:                                             value={data[field.key]}
117:                                             onChange={(event) => setData(field.key, event.target.value)}
118:                                             placeholder={field.placeholder}
119:                                             className="w-full rounded-lg border-2 border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-300 transition focus:border-gray-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0"
120:                                         />
121:                                     )}
122: 
123:                                     {errors[field.key] && (
124:                                         <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-rose-600">{errors[field.key]}</p>
125:                                     )}
126:                                 </div>
127:                             ))}
128:                         </div>
129:                     </section>
130: 
131:                     <section className="overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white shadow-lg shadow-gray-200/30">
132:                         <div className="border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/30 px-5 py-3.5 sm:px-6">
133:                             <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">Tautan Sosial Media</h3>
134:                         </div>
135: 
136:                         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 px-5 py-4 sm:px-6 md:grid-cols-2">
137:                             {SOCIAL_FIELDS.map((field) => (
138:                                 <div key={field.key}>
139:                                     <label className="mb-1 block text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500">
140:                                         {field.label}
141:                                     </label>
142:                                     <input
143:                                         type="url"
144:                                         value={data[field.key]}
145:                                         onChange={(event) => setData(field.key, event.target.value)}
146:                                         placeholder={field.placeholder}
147:                                         className="w-full rounded-lg border-2 border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-300 transition focus:border-gray-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0"
148:                                     />
149:                                     {errors[field.key] && (
150:                                         <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-rose-600">{errors[field.key]}</p>
151:                                     )}
152:                                 </div>
153:                             ))}
154:                         </div>
155:                     </section>
156: 
157:                     <div className="flex justify-end border-t border-gray-200 pt-3">
158:                         <button
159:                             type="submit"
160:                             disabled={processing}
161:                             className="rounded-xl border-2 border-black bg-gray-900 px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:border-yellow-400 hover:shadow-[0_0_0_2px_rgba(250,204,21,0.22)] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
162:                         >
163:                             {processing ? 'Menyimpan...' : 'Simpan Pengaturan'}
164:                         </button>
165:                     </div>
166:                 </form>
167:             </div>
168:         </AuthenticatedLayout>
169:     );
170: }

  1: import AuthenticatedLayout from '@/Layouts/AuthenticatedLayout';

 15:     { value: 'non_commercial_instansi', label: 'Non-Komersial (Instansi)' },
