 48: export default function Index({ dataRequests, stats, filters }) {
 49:     const [search,   setSearch]   = useState(filters?.search    ?? '');
 50:     const [status,   setStatus]   = useState(filters?.status    ?? '');
 51:     const [purpose,  setPurpose]  = useState(filters?.purpose   ?? '');
 52:     const [dateFrom, setDateFrom] = useState(filters?.date_from ?? '');
 53:     const [dateTo,   setDateTo]   = useState(filters?.date_to   ?? '');
 54:     const [sort,     setSort]     = useState(filters?.sort      ?? 'desc');
 55:     const [sortBy,   setSortBy]   = useState(filters?.sort_by   ?? 'updated_at');
 56: 
 57:     const apply = useCallback((s, st, pu, df, dt, so, sb) => {
 58:         router.get(
 59:             route('admin.data-requests.index'),
 60:             {
 61:                 search:    s  || undefined,
 62:                 status:    st || undefined,
 63:                 purpose:   pu || undefined,
 64:                 date_from: df || undefined,
 65:                 date_to:   dt || undefined,
 66:                 sort:      so || undefined,
 67:                 sort_by:   sb || undefined,
 68:             },
 69:             { preserveState: true, replace: true }
 70:         );
 71:     }, []);
 72: 
 73:     const handleReset = () => {
 74:         setSearch(''); setStatus(''); setPurpose(''); setDateFrom(''); setDateTo(''); setSort('desc'); setSortBy('updated_at');
 75:         router.get(route('admin.data-requests.index'));
 76:     };
 77: 
 78:     const handleSort = (column) => {
 79:         let nextSort;
 80: 
 81:         if (sortBy === column) {
 82:             nextSort = sort === 'desc' ? 'asc' : 'desc';
 83:         } else {
 84:             nextSort = ['created_at', 'updated_at'].includes(column) ? 'desc' : 'asc';
 85:         }
 86: 
 87:         setSortBy(column);
 88:         setSort(nextSort);
 89:         apply(search, status, purpose, dateFrom, dateTo, nextSort, column);
 90:     };
 91: 
 92:     return (
 93:         <AuthenticatedLayout
 94:             header={<h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">Pengajuan Data</h2>}
 95:         >
 96:             <Head title="Pengajuan Data — Admin" />
 97: 
 98:             <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50/50 pb-10 w-full">
 99:                 {/* Full-width white header */}
100:                 <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-4 sm:px-8 py-10 mb-8">
101:                     <h1 className="text-3xl font-extrabold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Daftar Pengajuan Data</h1>
102:                     <p className="mt-2 text-gray-500 text-base">
103:                         Kelola dan verifikasi seluruh pengajuan data yang masuk dari pengguna.
104:                     </p>
105:                 </div>
106: 
107:                 <div className="w-full px-4 sm:px-8">
108:                 {/* Stats row */}
109:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
110:                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">
111:                         Filter Status
112:                         <span className="ml-1.5 font-normal normal-case tracking-normal text-gray-300">— klik kartu untuk filter</span>
113:                     </p>
114:                 </div>
115: 
116:                 <div className="mb-8 divide-y-2 divide-gray-300 rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-300 bg-white overflow-hidden">
117:                     {STATUS_GROUPS.map((group) => (
118:                         <div key={group.key}>
119:                             {(() => {
120:                                 // Adjust column count for non‑action status group now that we removed the "Bukti Survey Ditolak" item.
121:                                 // Non‑action group now has 7 items, so use 7 columns on xl screens to avoid an empty placeholder.
122:                                 const gridColumnsClass = group.key === 'action'
123:                                     ? 'lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-6'
124:                                     : 'lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-7';
125: 
126:                                 return (
127:                             <div className="flex flex-col gap-2.5 md:flex-row md:items-stretch md:gap-0">
128:                                 <div className="px-3 py-3 md:w-48 md:shrink-0">
129:                                     <p className="text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-gray-700">{group.label}</p>
130:                                     <p className="mt-0.5 text-[10px] leading-relaxed text-gray-500">{group.hint}</p>
131:                                 </div>
132:                                 <div className="h-px bg-gray-200 md:hidden" />
133:                                 <div className="hidden md:block md:w-[2px] md:self-stretch md:bg-gray-400" />
134:                                 <div className="flex flex-1 py-0">
135:                                     <div className={`grid h-full w-full auto-rows-fr grid-cols-2 ${gridColumnsClass}`}>
136:                                         {group.items.map(({ key, label, status: statStatus }) => {
137:                                             const isActive = status === statStatus;
138:                                             const isTotal = statStatus === '';
139:                                             return (
140:                                                 <button
141:                                                     key={key}
142:                                                     type="button"
143:                                                     title={isActive && !isTotal ? 'Klik untuk reset filter' : 'Filter berdasarkan status ini'}
144:                                                     onClick={() => {
145:                                                         const next = isActive && !isTotal ? '' : statStatus;
146:                                                         setStatus(next);
147:                                                         apply(search, next, purpose, dateFrom, dateTo, sort, sortBy);
148:                                                     }}
149:                                                     className={`group relative h-full min-h-[72px] border-r border-gray-300 px-2.5 py-2 text-left transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer ${
150:                                                         isActive
151:                                                             ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white'
152:                                                             : 'bg-gray-50 text-gray-700 hover:bg-white hover:ring-1 hover:ring-inset hover:ring-yellow-400'
153:                                                     }`}
154:                                                 >
155:                                                     <p className={`text-[8px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest leading-tight line-clamp-2 origin-left transform-gpu will-change-transform transition-transform transition-colors duration-200 ease-out ${isActive ? 'text-gray-200' : 'text-gray-500 group-hover:text-yellow-700 group-hover:-translate-y-0.5'}`}>
156:                                                         {label}
157:                                                     </p>
158:                                                     <p className={`mt-0.5 text-lg font-extrabold tabular-nums leading-tight origin-left transform-gpu will-change-transform transition-transform transition-colors duration-200 ease-out ${isActive ? 'text-white' : 'text-gray-900 group-hover:text-yellow-700 group-hover:-translate-y-0.5'}`}>
159:                                                         {stats?.[key] ?? 0}
160:                                                     </p>
161:                                                     {isActive && !isTotal && (
162:                                                         <p className="mt-0.5 text-[8px] leading-tight text-gray-300">klik untuk reset</p>
163:                                                     )}
164:                                                 </button>
165:                                             );
166:                                         })}
167:                                     </div>
168:                                 </div>
169:                             </div>
170:                                 );
171:                             })()}

173:                     ))}
174:                 </div>
175:

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/DataRequests/Partials/ConfirmActionModal.jsx
================
  1: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Listbox, ListboxButton, ListboxOption, ListboxOptions, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';
  2: import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
  3: import { usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';
  4: import {
  5:     ExclamationTriangleIcon,
  6:     XMarkIcon,
  7:     ChevronUpDownIcon,
  8:     CheckIcon,
  9:     DocumentArrowUpIcon,
 10:     DocumentTextIcon,
 11: } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 12: 
 13: /**
 14:  * Confirmation modal for approve / reject actions.
 15:  *
 16:  * @param {{
 17:  *   action: 'approve' | 'reject' | null,
 18:  *   purposeType: string,
 19:  *   onConfirm: (action: string, reason?: string, vaData?: object) => void,
 20:  *   onCancel: () => void,
 21:  *   processing: boolean,
 22:  *   rejectionTemplates: Array<{ id: string, title: string, body: string }>,
 23:  *   errors: object,
 24:  * }} props
 25:  */
 26: export default function ConfirmActionModal({
 27:     action,
 28:     purposeType,
 29:     onConfirm,
 30:     onCancel,
 31:     processing,
 32:     rejectionTemplates,
 33:     errors,
 34: }) {
 35:     const { uploadLimits } = usePage().props;
 36:     const invoiceLimitKB = uploadLimits?.invoice ?? 5120;
 37: 
 38:     const show = !!action;
 39:     // Freeze the last known action so the leave animation doesn't flash the wrong layout
 40:     const [frozenAction, setFrozenAction] = useState(action);
 41:     useEffect(() => { if (action) setFrozenAction(action); }, [action]);
 42:     const isApprove = frozenAction === 'approve';
 43:     const isCommercialApprove = isApprove && purposeType === 'commercial';
 44:     const [rejectionReason, setRejectionReason] = useState('');
 45:     const [selectedTemplate, setSelectedTemplate] = useState(null);
 46:     const [vaFile, setVaFile] = useState(null);
 47:     const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);
 48:     const [fileError, setFileError] = useState('');
 49: 
 50:     const fileInputRef = useRef(null);
 51: 
 52:     useEffect(() => {
 53:         if (!show) {
 54:             setRejectionReason('');
 55:             setSelectedTemplate(null);
 56:             setVaFile(null);
 57:             setFileError('');
 58:         }
 59:     }, [show]);
 60: 
 61:     const handleSelectTemplate = (template) => {
 62:         setSelectedTemplate(template);
 63:         setRejectionReason(template ? template.body : '');
 64:     };
 65: 
 66:     const handleFileChange = (event) => {
 67:         const file = event.target.files?.[0];
 68: 
 69:         if (file) {
 70:             if (file.size > invoiceLimitKB * 1024) {
 71:                 setFileError(`Ukuran file maksimal ${invoiceLimitKB / 1024}MB.`);
 72:                 setVaFile(null);
 73:             } else if (file.type === 'application/pdf') {
 74:                 setFileError('');
 75:                 setVaFile(file);
 76:             } else {
 77:                 setFileError('File harus berupa PDF.');
 78:                 setVaFile(null);
 79:             }
 80:         }
 81: 
 82:         event.target.value = '';
 83:     };
 84: 
 85:     const openFilePicker = () => {
 86:         if (fileInputRef.current) {
 87:             fileInputRef.current.value = '';
 88:         }
 89: 
 90:         fileInputRef.current?.click();
 91:     };
 92: 
 93:     const handleDrop = (event) => {
 94:         event.preventDefault();
 95:         setIsDragging(false);
 96: 
 97:         const file = event.dataTransfer.files?.[0];
 98: 
 99:         if (file) {
100:             if (file.size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
101:                 setFileError('Ukuran file maksimal 5MB.');
102:                 setVaFile(null);
103:             } else if (file.type === 'application/pdf') {
104:                 setFileError('');
105:                 setVaFile(file);
106:             } else {
107:                 setFileError('File harus berupa PDF.');
108:                 setVaFile(null);
109:             }
110:         }
111:     };
112: 
113:     const isVaValid = !!vaFile;
114:     const submitDisabled = processing || (!isApprove && !rejectionReason.trim()) || (isCommercialApprove && !isVaValid);
115:     const rejectNeedsReason = !isApprove && !rejectionReason.trim();
116: 
117:     const handleConfirm = () => {
118:         onConfirm(action, isApprove ? undefined : rejectionReason, isCommercialApprove ? vaFile : null);
119:     };
120: 
121:     return (
122:         <Transition show={show} leave="duration-200">
123:             <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={onCancel}>
124:                 {/* Backdrop */}
125:                 <TransitionChild
126:                     enter="ease-out duration-200"
127:                     enterFrom="opacity-0"
128:                     enterTo="opacity-100"
129:                     leave="ease-in duration-150"
130:                     leaveFrom="opacity-100"
131:                     leaveTo="opacity-0"
132:                 >
133:                     <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" />
134:                 </TransitionChild>
135: 
136:                 {/* Panel */}
137:                 <div className="fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
138:                     <TransitionChild
139:                         enter="ease-out duration-200"
140:                         enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95 translate-y-2"
141:                         enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100 translate-y-0"
142:                         leave="ease-in duration-150"
143:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100 translate-y-0"
144:                         leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95 translate-y-2"
145:                     >
146:                         <DialogPanel className={`w-full overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200 ${isApprove && !isCommercialApprove ? 'max-w-sm' : 'max-w-xl'}`}>
147: 
148:                             {/* Header */}
149:                             <div className="relative border-b border-gray-100 px-6 py-5">
150:                                 {/* Close button */}
151:                                 <button
152:                                     onClick={onCancel}
153:                                     className="absolute right-4 top-4 rounded-lg p-1 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600"
154:                                 >
155:                                     <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
156:                                 </button>
157: 
158:                                 <h3 className="pr-8 text-base font-bold text-gray-900">
159:                                     {isApprove ? 'Setujui Pengajuan' : 'Tolak Pengajuan'}
160:                                 </h3>
161:                             </div>
162: 
163:                             {/* Body */}
164:                             <div className="px-6 py-5 space-y-4">
165:                                 {isApprove ? (
166:                                     isCommercialApprove ? (
167:                                         <div className="space-y-4">
168:                                             <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
169:                                                 Upload dokumen invoice (PDF) yang akan dikirimkan ke pengaju sebagai instruksi pembayaran.
170:                                             </p>
171:                                             <div>
172:                                                 <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
173:                                                     Dokumen Invoice (PDF) <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
174:                                                 </label>
175:                                                 <input
176:                                                     ref={fileInputRef}
177:                                                     type="file"
178:                                                     accept="application/pdf"
179:                                                     className="hidden"
180:                                                     onChange={handleFileChange}
181:                                                 />
182:                                                 {vaFile ? (
183:                                                     <button
184:                                                         type="button"
185:                                                         onClick={openFilePicker}
186:                                                         className="flex w-full items-center gap-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-900 bg-gray-50 px-4 py-3 text-left transition-all hover:border-gray-500 hover:scale-[1.01] active:scale-[0.99]"
187:                                                     >
188:                                                         <div className="p-2 bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 shadow-sm shrink-0">
189:                                                             <DocumentTextIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-500" />
190:                                                         </div>
191:                                                         <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
192:                                                             <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">{vaFile.name}</p>
193:                                                             <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">Klik untuk pilih ulang · {(vaFile.size / 1024).toFixed(0)} KB</p>
194:                                                         </div>
195:                                                         <div className="shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-900 p-1.5 text-white shadow-sm">
196:                                                             <CheckIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
197:                                                         </div>
198:                                                     </button>
199:                                                 ) : (
200:                                                     <>
201:                                                         <button
202:                                                             type="button"
203:                                                             onClick={openFilePicker}
204:                                                             onDragOver={(event) => { event.preventDefault(); setIsDragging(true); }}
205:                                                             onDragLeave={() => setIsDragging(false)}
206:                                                             onDrop={handleDrop}
207:                                                             className={`w-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-dashed px-6 py-8 transition ${
208:                                                                 isDragging
209:                                                                     ? 'border-gray-900 bg-gray-50'
210:                                                                     : 'border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/60 hover:border-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-50'
211:                                                             }`}
212:                                                         >
213:                                                             <DocumentArrowUpIcon className="h-8 w-8 text-gray-300" />
214:                                                             <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-500">Klik atau seret file PDF ke sini</p>
215:                                                             <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">Maks. {invoiceLimitKB / 1024} MB · hanya PDF</p>
216:                                                         </button>
217:                                                         {fileError && (
218:                                                             <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-red-500 font-bold">{fileError}</p>
219:                                                         )}
220:                                                     </>
221:                                                 )}
222:                                             </div>
223:                                         </div>
224:                                     ) : (
225:                                         <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
226:                                             Pengajuan ini akan disetujui dan pengaju akan segera mendapat
227:                                             notifikasi melalui email. Pastikan data sudah diperiksa dengan benar.
228:                                         </p>
229:                                     )
230:                                 ) : (
231:                                     <>
232:                                         {/* Template */}
233:                                         {rejectionTemplates && rejectionTemplates.length > 0 && (
234:                                             <div>
235:                                                 <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
236:                                                     Template Penolakan
237:                                                 </label>
238:                                                 <Listbox value={selectedTemplate} onChange={handleSelectTemplate}>
239:                                                     {({ open }) => (
240:                                                     <div className="relative">
241:                                                         <ListboxButton className={`relative w-full cursor-pointer rounded-xl border bg-white py-2.5 pl-4 pr-10 text-left text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 transition-all shadow-sm ${open ? 'border-bmkg-accent ring-2 ring-bmkg-accent/20' : 'border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300'}`}>
242:                                                             <span className={selectedTemplate ? 'text-gray-900 font-semibold' : 'text-gray-400'}>
243:                                                                 {selectedTemplate ? selectedTemplate.title : 'Pilih template (opsional)...'}
244:                                                             </span>
245:                                                             <span className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-y-0 right-3 flex items-center">
246:                                                                 <ChevronUpDownIcon className={`h-4 w-4 transition-transform duration-200 ${open ? 'rotate-180 text-bmkg-accent' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />
247:                                                             </span>
248:                                                         </ListboxButton>
249:                                                         <ListboxOptions className="absolute z-10 mt-2 w-full overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 bg-white shadow-2xl shadow-gray-200/60 focus:outline-none">
250:                                                             <div className="px-2 py-2 space-y-0.5">
251:                                                                 {[{ id: '__none__', title: 'Tanpa template', body: '' }, ...rejectionTemplates].map((t) => (
252:                                                                     <ListboxOption
253:                                                                         key={t.id}
254:                                                                         value={t.id === '__none__' ? null : t}
255:                                                                         className="group"
256:                                                                     >
257:                                                                         {({ selected }) => (
258:                                                                             <div className={`flex cursor-pointer items-center justify-between gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition-all duration-100 ${selected ? 'border border-bmkg-accent text-gray-900 font-semibold bg-white' : 'border border-transparent text-gray-500 font-medium hover:bg-gray-50 hover:text-gray-900'}`}>
259:                                                                                 <span>{t.title}</span>
260:                                                                                 {selected && <CheckIcon className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0 text-bmkg-accent" />}
261:                                                                             </div>
262:                                                                         )}
263:                                                                     </ListboxOption>
264:                                                                 ))}
265:                                                             </div>
266:                                                         </ListboxOptions>
267:                                                     </div>
268:                                                     )}
269:                                                 </Listbox>
270:                                             </div>
271:                                         )}
272: 
273:                                         {/* Reason textarea */}
274:                                         <div>
275:                                             <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
276:                                                 Alasan Penolakan <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
277:                                             </label>
278:                                             <textarea
279:                                                 value={rejectionReason}
280:                                                 onChange={(e) => setRejectionReason(e.target.value)}
281:                                                 rows={4}
282:                                                 placeholder="Jelaskan alasan penolakan kepada pengaju secara jelas..."
283:                                                 className="w-full resize-none rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-300 transition focus:border-gray-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0"
284:                                             />
285:                                             {errors?.rejection_reason && (
286:                                                 <p className="mt-1.5 flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-red-600">
287:                                                     <ExclamationTriangleIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
288:                                                     {errors.rejection_reason}
289:                                                 </p>
290:                                             )}
291:                                         </div>
292: 
293:                                         {/* Info */}
294:                                         <div className="border-t-2 border-gray-200 pt-4">
295:                                             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">Keterangan</p>
296:                                             <div className="mt-1 border-l-2 border-red-500 pl-3">
297:                                                 <p className="text-xs leading-relaxed text-gray-600">
298:                                                     Tindakan ini tidak dapat dibatalkan setelah dikonfirmasi, dan pengaju akan langsung menerima email penolakan.
299:                                                 </p>
300:                                             </div>
301:                                         </div>
302:                                     </>
303:                                 )}
304:                             </div>
305: 
306:                             {/* Footer buttons */}
307:                             <div className="flex justify-end gap-2.5 border-t border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/60 px-6 py-4">
308:                                 <button
309:                                     type="button"
310:                                     onClick={onCancel}
311:                                     disabled={processing}
312:                                     className="rounded-xl border-2 border-black bg-gray-400 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:border-yellow-400 hover:shadow-[0_0_0_2px_rgba(250,204,21,0.22)] disabled:opacity-50"
313:                                 >
314:                                     Batal
315:                                 </button>
316:                                 <button
317:                                     type="button"
318:                                     onClick={handleConfirm}
319:                                     disabled={submitDisabled}
320:                                     className={`inline-flex min-w-[132px] items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl border-2 px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold transition ${
321:                                         rejectNeedsReason
322:                                             ? 'cursor-not-allowed border-gray-500 bg-gray-500 text-gray-200'
323:                                             : 'border-black bg-gray-900 text-white hover:border-yellow-400 hover:shadow-[0_0_0_2px_rgba(250,204,21,0.22)]'
324:                                     } ${processing ? 'cursor-not-allowed opacity-70' : ''}`}
325:                                 >
326:                                     {processing && (
327:                                         <svg className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
328:                                             <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" />
329:                                             <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z" />
330:                                         </svg>
331:                                     )}
332:                                     {isApprove
333:                                         ? 'Setujui'
334:                                         : 'Tolak Pengajuan'}
335:                                 </button>
336:                             </div>
337: 
338:                         </DialogPanel>
339:                     </TransitionChild>
340:                 </div>
341:             </Dialog>
342:         </Transition>
343:     );
344: }

 21: const DOCUMENT_LABELS = {
 22:     form_pernyataan:          'Surat Pernyataan',
 23:     scan_ktp:                 'Scan KTP',
 24:     surat_permohonan:         'Surat Pengajuan',
 25:     proposal:                 'Proposal Penelitian',
 26:     kartu_identitas_instansi: 'Kartu Identitas Instansi',
 27: };
 28: 
 29: /**
 30:  * @param {{
 31:  *   documents: object[],
 32:  *   dataRequestId: string,
 33:  *   onPreview: (doc: object) => void,
 34:  *   headerAction?: import('react').ReactNode,
 35:  *   helperText?: string,
 36:  * }} props
 37:  */
 38: export default function DocumentList({ documents, dataRequestId, onPreview, headerAction = null, helperText = null }) {
 39:     if (!documents || documents.length === 0) return null;
 40: 
 41:     const documentOrder = {
 42:         form_pernyataan: 1,
 43:         scan_ktp: 2,
 44:         surat_permohonan: 3,
 45:         proposal: 4,
 46:         kartu_identitas_instansi: 5,
 47:     };
 48: 
 49:     const sortedDocuments = [...documents].sort((left, right) => {
 50:         const leftOrder = documentOrder[left.document_type] ?? 99;
 51:         const rightOrder = documentOrder[right.document_type] ?? 99;
 52: 
 53:         if (leftOrder !== rightOrder) {
 54:             return leftOrder - rightOrder;
 55:         }
 56: 
 57:         return String(left.original_name ?? '').localeCompare(String(right.original_name ?? ''));
 58:     });
 59: 
 60:     return (
 61:         <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-gray-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
 62:             <div className="border-b-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/30 px-6 py-4">
 63:                 <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between">
 64:                     <div>
 65:                         <h3 className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
 66:                             Dokumen Pendukung
 67:                         </h3>
 68:                         {helperText && (
 69:                             <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-400">{helperText}</p>
 70:                         )}
 71:                     </div>
 72:                     {headerAction && (
 73:                         <div className="w-full shrink-0 md:w-auto">
 74:                             {headerAction}
 75:                         </div>
 76:                     )}
 77:                 </div>
 78:             </div>
 79:             <div className="relative p-4 sm:p-4">
 80:                 <div className="hidden md:block md:absolute md:inset-y-4 md:left-1/2 md:w-[2px] md:bg-gray-200" />
 81: 
 82:                 <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2.5 md:grid-cols-2 md:gap-4">
 83:                     {sortedDocuments.map((doc) => (
 84:                         <div key={doc.id} className="flex flex-col">
 85:                             <p className="mb-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
 86:                                 {DOCUMENT_LABELS[doc.document_type] ?? doc.document_type}
 87:                             </p>
 88:                             <div className="group flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-3.5 shadow-sm transition-all hover:border-gray-400">
 89:                                 <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center gap-3 overflow-hidden text-left">
 90:                                     <PdfFileIcon />
 91:                                     <div className="min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
 92:                                         <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-gray-700">{doc.original_name}</p>
 93:                                         <p className="truncate text-[9px] font-bold uppercase text-gray-400">
 94:                                             {doc.file_size ? `${(doc.file_size / 1024).toFixed(0)} KB` : 'PDF'}
 95:                                         </p>
 96:                                     </div>
 97:                                 </div>
 98:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
 99:                                     <button
100:                                         type="button"
101:                                         onClick={() => onPreview(doc)}
102:                                         className="rounded-lg bg-gray-50 p-2 text-gray-600 shadow-sm transition-all hover:bg-gray-600 hover:text-white focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-gray-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2"
103:                                         title="Lihat Dokumen"
104:                                         aria-label={`Lihat dokumen ${doc.original_name}`}
105:                                     >
106:                                         <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" aria-hidden="true" />
107:                                     </button>
108:                                     <a
109:                                         href={route('admin.data-requests.download-document', [dataRequestId, doc.id])}
110:                                         className="rounded-lg bg-gray-50 p-2 text-gray-600 shadow-sm transition-all hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-gray-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2"
111:                                         title="Unduh Dokumen"
112:                                         aria-label={`Unduh dokumen ${doc.original_name}`}
113:                                     >
114:                                         <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" aria-hidden="true" />
115:                                     </a>
116:                                 </div>
117:                             </div>
118:                         </div>
119:                     ))}
120:                 </div>
121:             </div>
122:         </div>
123:     );
124: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/DataRequests/Partials/PaymentOcrReviewModal.jsx

  1: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';

  3: import { useForm } from '@inertiajs/react';
  4: import {
  5:     ArrowPathIcon,
  6:     CheckCircleIcon,
  7:     ChevronDownIcon,
  8:     ChevronUpIcon,
  9:     ClockIcon,
 10:     ExclamationTriangleIcon,
 11:     XMarkIcon,
 12: } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 13: import TextInput from '@/Components/TextInput';
 14: import InputError from '@/Components/InputError';
 15: import { CustomSingleDatePicker } from '@/Components/FilterComponents';
 16: 
 17: const OCR_STATUS_META = {
 18:     pending: {
 19:         label: 'Menunggu OCR',
 20:         tone: 'text-amber-600',
 21:         description: 'Invoice sudah dikirim. OCR sedang menunggu antrean proses.',
 22:     },
 23:     processing: {
 24:         label: 'OCR Diproses',
 25:         tone: 'text-blue-700',
 26:         description: 'Sistem sedang membaca data pembayaran dari file PDF invoice.',
 27:     },
 28:     completed: {
 29:         label: 'OCR Selesai',
 30:         tone: 'text-emerald-700',
 31:         description: 'Data OCR berhasil ditarik. Silakan cek dan edit jika perlu.',
 32:     },
 33:     failed: {
 34:         label: 'OCR Gagal',
 35:         tone: 'text-red-600',
 36:         description: 'OCR gagal membaca file. Isi detail pembayaran secara manual.',
 37:     },
 38:     skipped: {

 41:         description: 'OCR dilewati karena file bukan PDF.',

 44: 
 45: function toDateTimeLocal(value) {
 46:     if (!value) return '';
 47:     const parsedDate = new Date(value);
 48:     if (Number.isNaN(parsedDate.getTime())) return '';
 49: 
 50:     const pad = (num) => String(num).padStart(2, '0');
 51:     const year = parsedDate.getFullYear();
 52:     const month = pad(parsedDate.getMonth() + 1);
 53:     const date = pad(parsedDate.getDate());
 54:     const hours = pad(parsedDate.getHours());
 55:     const minutes = pad(parsedDate.getMinutes());
 56:     return `${year}-${month}-${date}T${hours}:${minutes}`;
 57: }
 58: 
 59: function normalizeAmount(value) {
 60:     if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') {
 61:         return '';
 62:     }
 63: 
 64:     const number = Number(value);
 65:     return Number.isFinite(number) ? String(number) : '';
 66: }
 67: 
 68: function getDatePart(dateTimeValue) {
 69:     if (!dateTimeValue || !dateTimeValue.includes('T')) {
 70:         return dateTimeValue || '';
 71:     }
 72: 
 73:     return dateTimeValue.split('T')[0] || '';
 74: }
 75: 
 76: function getTimePart(dateTimeValue) {
 77:     if (!dateTimeValue || !dateTimeValue.includes('T')) {
 78:         return '';
 79:     }
 80: 
 81:     const timePart = dateTimeValue.split('T')[1] || '';
 82:     return timePart.slice(0, 5);
 83: }
 84: 
 85: function composeDateTime(datePart, timePart) {
 86:     if (!datePart) {
 87:         return '';
 88:     }
 89: 
 90:     return `${datePart}T${timePart || '00:00'}`;
 91: }
 92: 
 93: function CompactWheelPicker({ label, value, items, onSelect }) {
 94:     const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
 95:     const [canScrollUp, setCanScrollUp] = useState(false);
 96:     const [canScrollDown, setCanScrollDown] = useState(false);
 97:     const rootRef = useRef(null);
 98:     const listRef = useRef(null);
 99: 
100:     const updateScrollIndicators = () => {
101:         if (!listRef.current) return;
102:         const { scrollTop, scrollHeight, clientHeight } = listRef.current;
103:         setCanScrollUp(scrollTop > 2);
104:         setCanScrollDown(scrollTop + clientHeight < scrollHeight - 2);
105:     };
106: 
107:     useEffect(() => {
108:         if (!open || !listRef.current) return;
109:         const selectedIndex = items.findIndex((item) => item === value);
110:         if (selectedIndex < 0) return;
111:         const target = selectedIndex * 28;
112:         listRef.current.scrollTo({ top: target, behavior: 'auto' });
113:         requestAnimationFrame(updateScrollIndicators);
114:     }, [items, open, value]);
115: 
116:     useEffect(() => {
117:         if (!open) return undefined;
118:         const handleOutside = (event) => {
119:             if (rootRef.current && !rootRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
120:                 setOpen(false);
121:             }
122:         };
123:         document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleOutside);
124:         return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleOutside);
125:     }, [open]);
126: 
127:     useEffect(() => {
128:         if (!open || !listRef.current) return undefined;
129:         updateScrollIndicators();
130:         const element = listRef.current;
131:         element.addEventListener('scroll', updateScrollIndicators);
132:         return () => element.removeEventListener('scroll', updateScrollIndicators);
133:     }, [open]);
134: 
135:     return (
136:         <div ref={rootRef} className="relative">
137:             <button
138:                 type="button"
139:                 onClick={() => setOpen((previous) => !previous)}
140:                 className={`h-9 w-14 rounded-lg border text-center font-mono text-lg font-black tabular-nums transition ${
141:                     open
142:                         ? 'border-yellow-500 bg-yellow-200/70 text-gray-900'
143:                         : 'border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-50'
144:                 }`}
145:             >
146:                 {value}
147:             </button>
148:             {open && (
149:                 <div className="absolute left-0 top-full mt-1 z-20 w-14 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-1 shadow-xl">
150:                     {canScrollUp ? (
151:                         <div className="pointer-events-none mb-px flex h-3 items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-gray-100/45 text-gray-500">
152:                             <ChevronUpIcon className="h-2.5 w-2.5" />
153:                         </div>
154:                     ) : (
155:                         <div className="mb-px h-3" />
156:                     )}
157:                     <div
158:                         ref={listRef}
159:                         className="max-h-[112px] overflow-y-auto rounded-lg bg-gray-50 [&::-webkit-scrollbar]:hidden"
160:                         style={{ scrollbarWidth: 'none', msOverflowStyle: 'none' }}
161:                         onMouseDown={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
162:                     >
163:                         {items.map((item) => (
164:                             <button
165:                                 key={`${label}-${item}`}
166:                                 type="button"
167:                                 onClick={(event) => {
168:                                     event.preventDefault();
169:                                     event.stopPropagation();
170:                                     onSelect(item);
171:                                     setOpen(false);
172:                                 }}
173:                                 className={`block h-7 w-full text-center font-mono text-sm font-bold tabular-nums transition ${
174:                                     item === value
175:                                         ? 'bg-yellow-200 text-gray-900'
176:                                         : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-yellow-100 hover:text-gray-900'
177:                                 }`}
178:                             >
179:                                 {item}
180:                             </button>
181:                         ))}
182:                     </div>
183:                     {canScrollDown ? (
184:                         <div className="pointer-events-none mt-px flex h-3 items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-gray-100/45 text-gray-500">
185:                             <ChevronDownIcon className="h-2.5 w-2.5" />
186:                         </div>
187:                     ) : (
188:                         <div className="mt-px h-3" />
189:                     )}
190:                 </div>
191:             )}
192:         </div>
193:     );
194: }
195: 
196: function TimePicker({ value, onChange }) {
197:     const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
198:     const [selectedHour, selectedMinute] = (value || '').split(':');
199:     const pickerRef = useRef(null);
200:     const HOURS = Array.from({ length: 24 }, (_, index) => String(index).padStart(2, '0'));
201:     const MINUTES = Array.from({ length: 60 }, (_, index) => String(index).padStart(2, '0'));
202: 
203:     useEffect(() => {
204:         if (!open) return undefined;
205: 
206:         const handleOutside = (event) => {
207:             if (pickerRef?.current && !pickerRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
208:                 setOpen(false);
209:             }
210:         };
211: 
212:         document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleOutside);
213:         return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleOutside);
214:     }, [open, pickerRef]);
215: 
216:     const handlePickHour = (hour) => {
217:         onChange(`${hour}:${(selectedMinute || '00').padStart(2, '0')}`);
218:     };
219: 
220:     const handlePickMinute = (minute) => {
221:         onChange(`${(selectedHour || '00').padStart(2, '0')}:${minute}`);
222:     };
223: 
224:     const applyNow = () => {
225:         const now = new Date();
226:         const hour = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
227:         const minute = String(Math.floor(now.getMinutes() / 5) * 5).padStart(2, '0');
228:         onChange(`${hour}:${minute}`);
229:         setOpen(false);
230:     };
231: 
232:     const hourValue = (selectedHour || '00').padStart(2, '0');
233:     const minuteValue = (selectedMinute || '00').padStart(2, '0');
234: 
235:     return (
236:         <div ref={pickerRef} className="relative w-full">
237:             <button
238:                 type="button"
239:                 onClick={() => setOpen((prev) => !prev)}
240:                 className={`w-full h-10 flex items-center gap-2 px-3 bg-white border rounded-xl shadow-sm text-sm font-medium transition-all ${
241:                     open ? 'border-bmkg-accent ring-2 ring-bmkg-accent/20' : 'border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300'
242:                 }`}
243:             >
244:                 <ClockIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 shrink-0" />
245:                 <span className={`flex-1 text-left ${value ? 'text-gray-700' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>
246:                     {value || 'Pilih waktu'}
247:                 </span>
248:                 <ChevronDownIcon className={`h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 transition-transform ${open ? 'rotate-180' : ''}`} />
249:             </button>
250: 
251:             {open && (
252:                 <div className="absolute z-50 bottom-full mb-2 right-0 w-[248px] rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-2.5 shadow-2xl">
253:                     <div className="rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-2.5">
254:                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 text-center">Waktu Dipilih</p>
255:                         <div className="mt-1.5 flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5">
256:                             <CompactWheelPicker
257:                                 label="jam"
258:                                 value={hourValue}
259:                                 items={HOURS}
260:                                 onSelect={handlePickHour}
261:                             />
262:                             <span className="font-mono text-lg font-black text-gray-700">:</span>
263:                             <CompactWheelPicker
264:                                 label="menit"
265:                                 value={minuteValue}
266:                                 items={MINUTES}
267:                                 onSelect={handlePickMinute}
268:                             />
269:                         </div>
270:                     </div>
271: 
272:                     <div className="mt-2.5 flex items-center justify-between gap-2 border-t border-gray-100 pt-2.5">
273:                         <button
274:                             type="button"
275:                             onClick={applyNow}
276:                             className="rounded-lg bg-gray-900 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-white transition hover:bg-gray-700"
277:                         >
278:                             Sekarang
279:                         </button>
280:                         <button
281:                             type="button"
282:                             onClick={() => setOpen(false)}
283:                             className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 transition hover:bg-gray-100"
284:                         >
285:                             Selesai
286:                         </button>
287:                     </div>
288:                 </div>
289:             )}
290:         </div>
291:     );
292: }

294: export default function PaymentOcrReviewModal({
295:     isOpen,
296:     onClose,
297:     dataRequestId,
298:     invoice,
299:     title = 'Review Detail Pembayaran Invoice',
300:     description = 'Periksa hasil OCR, lalu sesuaikan nominal, kode billing, dan tanggal kedaluwarsa sebelum menyimpan.',
301:     submitLabel = 'Simpan',
302:     showOcrStatus = true,
303: }) {
304:     const [ocrInvoiceState, setOcrInvoiceState] = useState(invoice ?? null);
305:     const [polling, setPolling] = useState(false);
306:     const [hasManualEdits, setHasManualEdits] = useState(false);
307:     const { data, setData, patch, processing, errors, clearErrors } = useForm({
308:         amount: normalizeAmount(invoice?.amount),
309:         billing_code: invoice?.billing_code ?? '',
310:         expires_at: toDateTimeLocal(invoice?.expires_at),
311:     });
312: 
313:     const ocrStatus = ocrInvoiceState?.ocr_status ?? invoice?.ocr_status ?? 'pending';
314:     const ocrMeta = OCR_STATUS_META[ocrStatus] ?? OCR_STATUS_META.pending;
315:     const shouldPoll = showOcrStatus && isOpen && ['pending', 'processing'].includes(ocrStatus);
316: 
317:     useEffect(() => {
318:         setOcrInvoiceState(invoice ?? null);
319:         setHasManualEdits(false);
320:         clearErrors();
321:         setData({
322:             amount: normalizeAmount(invoice?.amount),
323:             billing_code: invoice?.billing_code ?? '',
324:             expires_at: toDateTimeLocal(invoice?.expires_at),
325:         });
326:     }, [invoice, clearErrors, setData]);
327: 
328:     useEffect(() => {
329:         if (!isOpen || !ocrInvoiceState?.id || !shouldPoll) {
330:             setPolling(false);
331:             return undefined;
332:         }
333: 
334:         let isCancelled = false;
335:         const poll = async () => {
336:             if (isCancelled) return;
337: 
338:             setPolling(true);
339:             try {
340:                 const response = await window.axios.get(
341:                     route('admin.data-requests.invoices.ocr-status', [dataRequestId, ocrInvoiceState.id])
342:                 );
343:                 const latestInvoice = response?.data?.invoice;
344:                 if (!latestInvoice || isCancelled) {
345:                     return;
346:                 }
347: 
348:                 setOcrInvoiceState((current) => ({
349:                     ...(current ?? {}),
350:                     ...latestInvoice,
351:                 }));
352: 
353:                 if (!hasManualEdits) {
354:                     setData('amount', normalizeAmount(latestInvoice.amount));
355:                     setData('billing_code', latestInvoice.billing_code ?? '');
356:                     setData('expires_at', toDateTimeLocal(latestInvoice.expires_at));
357:                 }
358:             } catch (_error) {
359:                 // Silent fail, next poll will retry.
360:             } finally {
361:                 if (!isCancelled) {
362:                     setPolling(false);
363:                 }
364:             }
365:         };
366: 
367:         poll();
368:         const timer = window.setInterval(poll, 1000);
369: 
370:         return () => {
371:             isCancelled = true;
372:             window.clearInterval(timer);
373:         };
374:     }, [dataRequestId, hasManualEdits, isOpen, ocrInvoiceState?.id, setData, shouldPoll]);
375: 
376:     const handleSubmit = (event) => {
377:         event.preventDefault();
378: 
379:         patch(route('admin.data-requests.invoices.payment-details.update', [dataRequestId, ocrInvoiceState.id]), {
380:             preserveScroll: true,
381:             onSuccess: () => {
382:                 onClose();
383:             },
384:         });
385:     };
386: 
387:     return (
388:         <Transition show={isOpen} leave="duration-200">
389:             <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4" onClose={onClose}>
390:                 <TransitionChild
391:                     enter="ease-out duration-200"
392:                     enterFrom="opacity-0"
393:                     enterTo="opacity-100"
394:                     leave="ease-in duration-150"
395:                     leaveFrom="opacity-100"
396:                     leaveTo="opacity-0"
397:                 >
398:                     <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" />
399:                 </TransitionChild>
400: 
401:                 <TransitionChild
402:                     enter="ease-out duration-200"
403:                     enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95 translate-y-2"
404:                     enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100 translate-y-0"
405:                     leave="ease-in duration-150"
406:                     leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100 translate-y-0"
407:                     leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95 translate-y-2"
408:                 >
409:                     <DialogPanel className="relative w-full max-w-2xl overflow-visible rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200">
410:                         <form onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
411:                             <div className="border-b border-gray-100 px-6 py-5">
412:                                 <button
413:                                     type="button"
414:                                     onClick={onClose}
415:                                     className="absolute right-4 top-4 rounded-lg p-1 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600"
416:                                 >
417:                                     <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
418:                                 </button>
419:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
420:                                     <CheckCircleIcon className="h-7 w-7 flex-shrink-0 text-bmkg-primary" />
421:                                     <div>
422:                                         <h3 className="text-base font-bold text-gray-900">{title}</h3>
423:                                         <p className="mt-0.5 text-xs text-gray-500">
424:                                             {description}
425:                                         </p>
426:                                     </div>
427:                                 </div>
428:                             </div>
429: 
430:                             <div className="space-y-5 px-6 py-5">
431:                                 {showOcrStatus && (
432:                                     <div className="space-y-1.5">
433:                                         <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2">
434:                                             <p className={`text-sm font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] ${ocrMeta.tone}`}>
435:                                                 {ocrMeta.label}
436:                                             </p>
437:                                             {(polling || shouldPoll) && (
438:                                                 <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full bg-blue-50 px-2.5 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-blue-700">
439:                                                     <ArrowPathIcon className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
440:                                                     Sinkronisasi
441:                                                 </span>
442:                                             )}
443:                                         </div>
444:                                         {ocrStatus !== 'completed' && ocrMeta.description && (
445:                                             <p className="text-sm font-medium leading-relaxed text-gray-500">
446:                                                 {ocrMeta.description}
447:                                             </p>
448:                                         )}
449:                                         {ocrInvoiceState?.ocr_error && (
450:                                             <p className="inline-flex items-start gap-1 text-xs font-semibold text-red-700">
451:                                                 <ExclamationTriangleIcon className="mt-0.5 h-3.5 w-3.5 shrink-0" />
452:                                                 {ocrInvoiceState.ocr_error}
453:                                             </p>
454:                                         )}
455:                                     </div>
456:                                 )}
457: 
458:                                 <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
459:                                     <div>
460:                                         <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
461:                                             Nominal Tagihan
462:                                         </label>
463:                                         <div className="relative">
464:                                             <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-y-0 left-0 flex items-center pl-3">
465:                                                 <span className="text-gray-500 sm:text-sm">Rp</span>
466:                                             </div>
467:                                             <TextInput
468:                                                 type="number"
469:                                                 value={data.amount}
470:                                                 className="block w-full pl-9"
471:                                                 onChange={(event) => {
472:                                                     setHasManualEdits(true);
473:                                                     setData('amount', event.target.value);
474:                                                 }}
475:                                                 placeholder="Contoh: 150000"
476:                                             />
477:                                         </div>
478:                                         <InputError message={errors.amount} className="mt-2" />
479:                                     </div>
480: 
481:                                     <div>
482:                                         <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
483:                                             Kode Billing
484:                                         </label>
485:                                         <TextInput
486:                                             type="text"
487:                                             value={data.billing_code}
488:                                             className="block w-full"
489:                                             onChange={(event) => {
490:                                                 setHasManualEdits(true);
491:                                                 setData('billing_code', event.target.value);
492:                                             }}
493:                                             placeholder="Contoh: 820260313377792"
494:                                         />
495:                                         <InputError message={errors.billing_code} className="mt-2" />
496:                                     </div>
497:                                 </div>
498: 
499:                                 <div>
500:                                     <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
501:                                         Tanggal Kedaluwarsa
502:                                     </label>
503:                                     <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
504:                                         <CustomSingleDatePicker
505:                                             value={getDatePart(data.expires_at)}
506:                                             onChange={(dateValue) => {
507:                                                 setHasManualEdits(true);
508:                                                 setData('expires_at', composeDateTime(dateValue, getTimePart(data.expires_at)));
509:                                             }}
510:                                             placeholder="Pilih tanggal"
511:                                         />
512:                                         <TimePicker
513:                                             value={getTimePart(data.expires_at)}
514:                                             onChange={(timeValue) => {
515:                                                 setHasManualEdits(true);
516:                                                 setData('expires_at', composeDateTime(getDatePart(data.expires_at), timeValue));
517:                                             }}
518:                                         />
519:                                     </div>
520:                                     <InputError message={errors.expires_at} className="mt-2" />
521:                                 </div>
522:                             </div>
523: 
524:                             <div className="flex justify-end gap-2.5 border-t border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/60 px-6 py-4">
525:                                 <button
526:                                     type="button"
527:                                     onClick={onClose}
528:                                     disabled={processing}
529:                                     className="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 shadow-sm transition-all duration-150 hover:border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-800 hover:shadow-[0_10px_24px_-14px_rgba(17,24,39,0.45)] hover:ring-1 hover:ring-gray-200 active:shadow-sm active:ring-0 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 disabled:hover:border-gray-200 disabled:hover:bg-white disabled:hover:text-gray-600 disabled:hover:shadow-sm disabled:hover:ring-0"
530:                                 >
531:                                     Batal
532:                                 </button>
533:                                 <button

535:                                     disabled={processing}

537:                                 >

540:                             </div>
541:                         </form>
542:                     </DialogPanel>
543:                 </TransitionChild>
544:             </Dialog>
545:         </Transition>
546:     );

 21: const PAYMENT_STEP_STATUSES = new Set([
 22:     'payment_required',
 23:     'payment_verifying',
 24:     'payment_invalid',
 25:     'expired',
 26:     'processing',
 27:     'completed',
 28: ]);

 30: const INVOICE_STATUS_META = {
 31:     issued: {
 32:         label: 'Menunggu Pembayaran',
 33:         description: 'Invoice sudah diterbitkan dan menunggu pembayaran dari pengaju.',
 34:         classes: 'text-yellow-700 bg-yellow-50 border-yellow-300',
 35:     },
 36:     verifying: {
 37:         label: 'Verifikasi Pembayaran',
 38:         description: 'Bukti pembayaran sudah diterima dan sedang diverifikasi admin.',
 39:         classes: 'text-blue-700 bg-blue-50 border-blue-300',
 40:     },
 41:     paid: {
 42:         label: 'Diterima',
 43:         description: 'Pembayaran sudah dinyatakan lunas dan permohonan masuk antrian proses.',
 44:         classes: 'text-emerald-700 bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-300',
 45:     },
 46:     invalid: {
 47:         label: 'Ditolak',
 48:         description: 'Bukti pembayaran ditolak dan pengaju diminta mengunggah ulang.',

 55:     },

 58: const REQUEST_STATUS_META = {
 59:     payment_required: {
 60:         label: 'Menunggu Pembayaran',
 61:         description: 'Tagihan sudah dikirim ke pengaju dan menunggu pembayaran.',
 62:         classes: 'text-yellow-700 bg-yellow-50 border-yellow-300',
 63:     },
 64:     payment_verifying: {
 65:         label: 'Verifikasi Pembayaran',
 66:         description: 'Bukti pembayaran sudah masuk dan menunggu pengecekan admin.',
 67:         classes: 'text-yellow-700 bg-yellow-50 border-yellow-300',
 68:     },
 69:     payment_invalid: {
 70:         label: 'Pembayaran Ditolak',
 71:         description: 'Bukti pembayaran ditolak dan menunggu unggahan ulang.',
 72:         classes: 'text-red-700 bg-red-50 border-red-300',
 73:     },
 74:     expired: {
 75:         label: 'Kedaluwarsa',
 76:         description: 'Tagihan melewati batas waktu pembayaran.',
 77:         classes: 'text-orange-700 bg-orange-50 border-orange-300',
 78:     },
 79:     processing: {
 80:         label: 'Sedang Diproses',
 81:         description: 'Pembayaran sudah disetujui dan permohonan sedang diproses.',
 82:         classes: 'text-sky-700 bg-sky-50 border-sky-300',
 83:     },
 84:     completed: {
 85:         label: 'Selesai',
 86:         description: 'Permohonan telah selesai diproses.',
 87:         classes: 'text-green-700 bg-green-50 border-green-300',
 88:     },
