 91: function formatCurrency(amount) {
 92:     if (amount === null || amount === undefined || amount === '') {
 93:         return '—';
 94:     }
 95: 
 96:     return new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID', {
 97:         style: 'currency',
 98:         currency: 'IDR',
 99:         minimumFractionDigits: 0,
100:     }).format(Number(amount));
101: }
102: 
103: function formatDateTime(value) {
104:     if (!value) {
105:         return '—';
106:     }
107: 
108:     const date = new Date(value);
109:     const formatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('id-ID', {
110:         day: 'numeric',
111:         month: 'long',
112:         year: 'numeric',
113:         hour: '2-digit',
114:         minute: '2-digit',
115:         hourCycle: 'h23',
116:         timeZone: 'Asia/Jakarta',
117:     });
118: 
119:     const parts = formatter.formatToParts(date).reduce((accumulator, part) => {
120:         accumulator[part.type] = part.value;
121:         return accumulator;
122:     }, {});
123: 
124:     return `${parts.day} ${parts.month} ${parts.year}\n${parts.hour}.${parts.minute} WIB`;
125: }
126: 
127: function formatDateTimeInline(value) {
128:     return formatDateTime(value).replace('\n', ' • ');
129: }
130: 
131: function getStatusMeta(status, fallbackMeta = REQUEST_STATUS_META.payment_required) {
132:     const normalizedStatus = status === 'payment_verified' ? 'processing' : status;
133:     return normalizedStatus ? (INVOICE_STATUS_META[normalizedStatus] ?? REQUEST_STATUS_META[normalizedStatus] ?? fallbackMeta) : fallbackMeta;
134: }
135: 
136: function isPaidRequest(dataRequest) {
137:     return (dataRequest.request_category ?? 'free') === 'paid';
138: }
139: 
140: function getFileMeta(filePath, fallbackLabel = 'PDF') {
141:     const extension = (filePath?.split('.').pop() || '').toLowerCase();
142: 
143:     if (['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'webp', 'gif', 'bmp'].includes(extension)) {
144:         return {
145:             label: extension.toUpperCase(),
146:             description: 'Gambar',
147:             badgeColor: 'bg-indigo-600',
148:         };
149:     }
150: 
151:     if (extension === 'pdf') {
152:         return {
153:             label: 'PDF',
154:             description: 'Dokumen',
155:             badgeColor: 'bg-red-600',
156:         };
157:     }
158: 
159:     return {
160:         label: fallbackLabel,
161:         description: 'File',
162:         badgeColor: 'bg-gray-700',
163:     };
164: }
165: 
166: /**
167:  * PaymentPanel — shown on the admin detail page.
168:  */
169: export default function PaymentPanel({ dataRequest }) {
170:     const status = dataRequest.status;
171:     const latestInvoice = dataRequest.active_invoice || dataRequest.activeInvoice || dataRequest.invoices?.[0] || null;
172:     const paidRequest = isPaidRequest(dataRequest);
173:     const invoices = dataRequest.invoices ?? [];
174: 
175:     if (!paidRequest && !PAYMENT_STEP_STATUSES.has(status) && !latestInvoice) {
176:         return null;
177:     }
178: 
179:     return paidRequest
180:         ? <PaidPanel dataRequest={dataRequest} status={status} latestInvoice={latestInvoice} invoices={invoices} />
181:         : <FreePanel dataRequest={dataRequest} status={status} />;
182: }
183: 
184: function FreePanel({ dataRequest, status }) {
185:     const handleProcess = () => {
186:         router.post(route('admin.data-requests.process', dataRequest.id));
187:     };
188: 
189:     return (
190:         <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-gray-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
191:             <div className="flex w-full items-center justify-between border-b-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/30 px-8 py-6">
192:                 <h3 className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Informasi Pembayaran</h3>
193:             </div>
194:             <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 px-8 py-6">
195:                 <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
196:                     <CheckCircleSolid className="h-5 w-5 text-emerald-500 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
197:                     <div>
198:                         <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">Tidak Ada Biaya</p>
199:                         <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">
200:                             Pengajuan ini tidak memerlukan pembayaran.
201:                         </p>
202:                     </div>
203:                 </div>
204:             </div>
205:         </div>
206:     );
207: }
208: 
209: function PaidPanel({ dataRequest, status, latestInvoice }) {
210:     const [previewContent, setPreviewContent] = useState(null);
211:     const [isUploadInvoiceOpen, setIsUploadInvoiceOpen] = useState(false);
212:     const [isEditPaymentOpen, setIsEditPaymentOpen] = useState(false);
213:     const [verificationModal, setVerificationModal] = useState({ isOpen: false, actionType: 'reject' });
214:     const [processing, setProcessing] = useState(false);
215:     const [copiedField, setCopiedField] = useState(null);
216:     // Hover side state for payment verification buttons ("accept" or "reject")
217: 
218:     const invoiceDocument = latestInvoice?.invoice_path
219:         ? route('admin.data-requests.payment-invoice.download', dataRequest.id)
220:         : null;
221:     const invoicePreview = latestInvoice?.invoice_path
222:         ? route('admin.data-requests.payment-invoice.preview', dataRequest.id)
223:         : null;
224:     const paymentProof = latestInvoice?.proof_path
225:         ? route('admin.data-requests.payment-proof.download', dataRequest.id)
226:         : null;
227:     const proofPreview = latestInvoice?.proof_path
228:         ? route('admin.data-requests.payment-proof.preview', dataRequest.id)
229:         : null;
230: 
231:     const invoiceFileMeta = getFileMeta(latestInvoice?.invoice_path, 'PDF');
232:     const proofFileMeta = getFileMeta(latestInvoice?.proof_path, 'PDF');
233: 
234:     const invoiceFilename = latestInvoice?.invoice_path
235:         ? `invoice-${dataRequest.request_code}.${latestInvoice.invoice_path.split('.').pop().toLowerCase()}`
236:         : 'Invoice_Tagihan.pdf';
237:     const proofFilename = latestInvoice?.proof_path
238:         ? `bukti-bayar-${dataRequest.request_code}.${latestInvoice.proof_path.split('.').pop().toLowerCase()}`
239:         : 'Bukti_Pembayaran';
240: 
241:     const isInvoiceReRequestPending = status === 'payment_required' && latestInvoice?.status === 'expired';
242:     const canUploadInvoice = status === 'payment_required';
243:     const hasOcrFinalResult = Boolean(
244:         latestInvoice?.ocr_extracted_at
245:         || ['completed', 'failed', 'skipped'].includes(latestInvoice?.ocr_status)
246:     );
247:     const missingAmount = latestInvoice && (latestInvoice.amount === null || latestInvoice.amount === undefined || latestInvoice.amount === '');
248:     const missingBillingCode = latestInvoice && !latestInvoice.billing_code;
249:     const missingExpiry = latestInvoice && !latestInvoice.expires_at;
250:     const hasMissingPaymentDetails = hasOcrFinalResult && (missingAmount || missingBillingCode || missingExpiry);
251: 
252:     const amountDisplay = missingAmount
253:         ? (hasOcrFinalResult ? 'Mohon input nominal tagihan' : 'Menunggu hasil OCR')
254:         : formatCurrency(latestInvoice?.amount);
255:     const issuedAtDisplay = formatDateTimeInline(latestInvoice?.created_at);
256:     const billingCodeDisplay = missingBillingCode
257:         ? (hasOcrFinalResult ? 'Mohon input kode billing' : 'Menunggu hasil OCR')
258:         : latestInvoice?.billing_code;
259:     const expiresAtDisplay = missingExpiry
260:         ? (hasOcrFinalResult ? 'Mohon input tanggal kedaluwarsa' : 'Menunggu hasil OCR')
261:         : formatDateTimeInline(latestInvoice?.expires_at);
262:     const billingCodeCopyValue = missingBillingCode ? null : latestInvoice?.billing_code;
263: 
264:     const handleCopy = async (key, value) => {
265:         if (!value || !navigator?.clipboard) return;
266: 
267:         try {
268:             await navigator.clipboard.writeText(String(value));
269:             setCopiedField(key);
270:             window.setTimeout(() => setCopiedField(null), 1500);
271:         } catch (_error) {
272:             // Ignore clipboard errors silently.
273:         }
274:     };
275: 
276:     return (
277:         <>
278:             <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-gray-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
279:                 <div className="border-b-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/30 px-8 py-6">
280:                     <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
281:                         <div className="min-w-0">
282:                             <p className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
283:                                 Informasi Pembayaran
284:                             </p>
285:                         </div>
286:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
287:                             {latestInvoice && !isInvoiceReRequestPending && (
288:                                 <button
289:                                     type="button"
290:                                     onClick={() => setIsEditPaymentOpen(true)}
291:                                     className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 shadow-sm transition hover:border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50"
292:                                 >
293:                                     <PencilSquareIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
294:                                     Edit
295:                                 </button>
296:                             )}
297:                         </div>
298:                     </div>
299:                 </div>
300: 
301:                 <div className="space-y-4 px-6 pb-5 pt-2 sm:px-7 sm:pb-6 sm:pt-2">
302: 
303:                     {latestInvoice && (
304:                         <div className="space-y-2.5">
305:                             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-5">
306:                                 <PaymentDetail
307:                                     label="Nominal Tagihan"
308:                                     value={amountDisplay}
309:                                     valueClassName={missingAmount ? 'text-amber-700' : 'text-gray-900'}
310:                                     compact
311:                                 />
312:                                 <PaymentDetail
313:                                     label="Kode Billing"
314:                                     value={billingCodeDisplay}
315:                                     valueClassName={missingBillingCode ? 'text-amber-700' : 'text-gray-900'}
316:                                     copyValue={billingCodeCopyValue}
317:                                     copied={copiedField === 'billing_code'}
318:                                     onCopy={() => handleCopy('billing_code', billingCodeCopyValue)}
319:                                     compact
320:                                 />
321:                                 <PaymentDetail label="Diterbitkan" value={issuedAtDisplay} compact />
322:                                 <PaymentDetail label="Kedaluwarsa" value={expiresAtDisplay} valueClassName={missingExpiry ? 'text-amber-700' : 'text-gray-900'} compact />
323:                                 <PaymentDetail label="Terverifikasi" value={formatDateTimeInline(latestInvoice.verified_at)} compact />
324:                             </div>
325: 
326:                             {latestInvoice.rejection_reason && (
327:                                 <div className="max-w-3xl pl-1 pr-1 py-1">
328:                                     <div className="border-l-2 border-red-300 pl-3">
329:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-gray-500">Alasan Penolakan</p>
330:                                         <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-semibold text-red-700 leading-relaxed">
331:                                             {latestInvoice.rejection_reason}
332:                                         </p>
333:                                     </div>
334:                                 </div>
335:                             )}
336:                         </div>
337:                     )}
338: 
339:                     {hasMissingPaymentDetails && (
340:                         <div className="flex items-start gap-3 rounded-xl border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 px-3.5 py-2.5">
341:                             <ExclamationTriangleIcon className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0 text-amber-600 mt-0.5" />
342:                             <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-amber-800">
343:                                 Beberapa detail pembayaran belum lengkap. Mohon cek invoice dan lengkapi data pembayaran.
344:                             </p>
345:                         </div>
346:                     )}
347: 
348:                     <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/30">
349:                         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-2 xl:divide-x xl:divide-gray-200">
350:                             {/* Invoice Document */}
351:                             <div className="space-y-1.5 px-3.5 pb-3.5 pt-2 sm:px-4 sm:pb-4 sm:pt-2.5">
352:                                 <div className="flex h-8 items-center justify-between gap-2">
353:                                     <p className="text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-600">Dokumen Tagihan (Invoice)</p>
354:                                     {isInvoiceReRequestPending && (
355:                                         <button
356:                                             type="button"
357:                                             onClick={() => setIsUploadInvoiceOpen(true)}
358:                                             className="inline-flex h-8 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-700 transition hover:border-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-50"
359:                                         >
360:                                             <DocumentArrowUpIcon className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0 text-gray-500" />
361:                                             Unggah Invoice Baru
362:                                         </button>
363:                                     )}
364:                                 </div>
365:                                 {invoiceDocument ? (
366:                                     <div className="space-y-2.5">
367:                                         <div className="group flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-3.5 shadow-sm transition-all hover:border-gray-400">
368:                                             <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center gap-3 overflow-hidden">
369:                                                 <DocFileIcon label={invoiceFileMeta.label} color={invoiceFileMeta.badgeColor} />
370:                                                 <div className="overflow-hidden">
371:                                                     <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-gray-700">{invoiceFilename}</p>
372:                                                     <p className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase text-gray-400">{invoiceFileMeta.description}</p>
373:                                                 </div>
374:                                             </div>
375:                                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
376:                                                 <button
377:                                                     type="button"
378:                                                     onClick={() => setPreviewContent({ url: invoicePreview, title: invoiceFilename, downloadUrl: invoiceDocument })}
379:                                                     className="rounded-lg bg-gray-50 p-2 text-gray-600 shadow-sm transition-all hover:bg-gray-600 hover:text-white"
380:                                                     title="Lihat Dokumen"
381:                                                 >
382:                                                     <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
383:                                                 </button>
384:                                                 <a
385:                                                     href={invoiceDocument}
386:                                                     download
387:                                                     className="rounded-lg bg-gray-50 p-2 text-gray-600 shadow-sm transition-all hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white"
388:                                                     title="Unduh Dokumen"
389:                                                 >
390:                                                     <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
391:                                                 </a>
392:                                             </div>
393:                                         </div>
394:                                     </div>
395:                                 ) : (
396:                                     <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2.5 rounded-xl border-2 border-dashed border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-5 text-center">
397:                                         <DocumentArrowUpIcon className="h-8 w-8 text-gray-300" />
398:                                         <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-400">Invoice belum diunggah</p>
399:                                         {canUploadInvoice && (
400:                                             <button
401:                                                 type="button"
402:                                                 onClick={() => setIsUploadInvoiceOpen(true)}
403:                                                 className="mt-2 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-bmkg-primary px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold text-white shadow-sm transition hover:bg-bmkg-primary/90"
404:                                             >
405:                                                 <DocumentArrowUpIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
406:                                                 Unggah Invoice
407:                                             </button>
408:                                         )}
409:                                     </div>
410:                                 )}
411:                             </div>
412: 
413:                             {/* Proof viewer */}
414:                             <div className="space-y-1.5 px-3.5 pb-3.5 pt-2 sm:px-4 sm:pb-4 sm:pt-2.5">
415:                                 <div className="flex h-8 items-center justify-between gap-2">
416:                                     <p className="text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-600">Bukti Pembayaran</p>
417:                                     {status === 'payment_verifying' && paymentProof && (
418:                                         <VerificationDecisionButtons
419:                                             onApprove={() => setVerificationModal({ isOpen: true, actionType: 'accept' })}
420:                                             onReject={() => setVerificationModal({ isOpen: true, actionType: 'reject' })}
421:                                             disabled={processing}
422:                                             size="sm"
423:                                             className="shrink-0"
424:                                         />
425:                                     )}
426:                                 </div>
427:                                 {paymentProof ? (
428:                                     <div className="space-y-3">
429:                                         <div className="group flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-3.5 shadow-sm transition-all hover:border-gray-400">
430:                                             <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center gap-3 overflow-hidden">
431:                                                 <DocFileIcon label={proofFileMeta.label} color={proofFileMeta.badgeColor} />
432:                                                 <div className="overflow-hidden">
433:                                                     <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-gray-700">{proofFilename}</p>
434:                                                     <p className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase text-gray-400">{proofFileMeta.description}</p>
435:                                                 </div>
436:                                             </div>
437:                                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
438:                                                 <button
439:                                                     type="button"
440:                                                     onClick={() => setPreviewContent({ url: proofPreview, title: proofFilename, downloadUrl: paymentProof })}
441:                                                     className="rounded-lg bg-gray-50 p-2 text-gray-600 shadow-sm transition-all hover:bg-gray-600 hover:text-white"
442:                                                     title="Lihat Dokumen"
443:                                                 >
444:                                                     <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
445:                                                 </button>
446:                                                 <a
447:                                                     href={paymentProof}
448:                                                     download
449:                                                     className="rounded-lg bg-gray-50 p-2 text-gray-600 shadow-sm transition-all hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white"
450:                                                     title="Unduh Bukti"
451:                                                 >
452:                                                     <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
453:                                                 </a>
454:                                             </div>
455:                                         </div>
456:                                     </div>
457:                                 ) : (
458:                                     <EmptyProof status={status} />
459:                                 )}
460:                             </div>
461:                         </div>
462:                     </div>
463:                 </div>
464:             </div>
465: 
466:             <Transition show={!!previewContent} leave="duration-200">
467:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={() => setPreviewContent(null)}>
468:                     <TransitionChild
469:                         enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0" enterTo="opacity-100"
470:                         leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100" leaveTo="opacity-0"
471:                     >
472:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" />
473:                     </TransitionChild>
474:                     <TransitionChild
475:                         enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95" enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100"
476:                         leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100" leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95"
477:                     >
478:                         <div className="fixed inset-4 sm:inset-8 flex items-stretch justify-center">
479:                             <DialogPanel className="flex w-full max-w-5xl flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200">
480:                                 <div className="flex flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-200 px-5 py-3.5">
481:                                     <div className="min-w-0">
482:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Pratinjau</p>
483:                                         <p className="mt-0.5 truncate font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm">{previewContent?.title}</p>
484:                                     </div>
485:                                     <div className="ml-4 flex items-center gap-2">
486:                                         <a
487:                                             href={previewContent?.downloadUrl || previewContent?.url}
488:                                             target="_blank"
489:                                             rel="noopener noreferrer"
490:                                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-gray-600 shadow-sm transition hover:bg-gray-50"
491:                                             title="Unduh"
492:                                         >
493:                                             <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
494:                                             Unduh
495:                                         </a>
496:                                         <button
497:                                             onClick={() => setPreviewContent(null)}
498:                                             className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600"
499:                                         >
500:                                             <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
501:                                         </button>
502:                                     </div>
503:                                 </div>
504:                                 <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
505:                                     {previewContent?.url && (
506:                                         <iframe src={previewContent.url} className="h-full w-full border-0 bg-white rounded shadow-sm" title="Pratinjau Dokumen" />
507:                                     )}
508:                                 </div>
509:                             </DialogPanel>
510:                         </div>
511:                     </TransitionChild>
512:                 </Dialog>
513:             </Transition>
514: 
515:             <UploadInvoiceModal
516:                 isOpen={isUploadInvoiceOpen}
517:                 onClose={() => setIsUploadInvoiceOpen(false)}
518:                 dataRequestId={dataRequest.id}
519:             />
520: 
521:             <PaymentVerificationModal
522:                 isOpen={verificationModal.isOpen}
523:                 actionType={verificationModal.actionType}
524:                 onClose={() => setVerificationModal({ isOpen: false, actionType: 'reject' })}
525:                 dataRequestId={dataRequest.id}
526:             />
527: 
528:             {latestInvoice && (
529:                 <PaymentOcrReviewModal
530:                     isOpen={isEditPaymentOpen}
531:                     onClose={() => setIsEditPaymentOpen(false)}
532:                     dataRequestId={dataRequest.id}
533:                     invoice={latestInvoice}
534:                     title="Edit Informasi Pembayaran"
535:                     description="Perbarui nominal, kode billing, dan tanggal kedaluwarsa invoice aktif."
536:                     submitLabel="Simpan Perubahan"
537:                     showOcrStatus={false}
538:                 />
539:             )}
540:         </>
541:     );
542: }
543: 
544: function PaymentDetail({
545:     label,
546:     value,
547:     valueClassName = 'text-gray-900',
548:     copyValue = null,
549:     copied = false,
550:     onCopy = null,
551:     compact = false,
552:     className = '',
553: }) {
554:     return (
555:         <div
556:             className={`rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 shadow-sm sm:px-3.5 ${compact ? 'min-h-[64px] py-2 sm:min-h-[70px] sm:py-2.5' : 'min-h-[74px] py-2.5 sm:min-h-[86px] sm:py-3.5'
557:                 } ${className}`}
558:         >
559:             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-gray-400 leading-tight">{label}</p>
560:             <div className={`w-9 border-t border-gray-300 sm:w-12 ${compact ? 'mt-1' : 'mt-1.5'}`} />
561:             <div className={`inline-flex max-w-full items-center gap-1.5 ${compact ? 'mt-2' : 'mt-2.5'}`}>
562:                 <p className={`text-xs font-semibold leading-relaxed break-words whitespace-pre-line sm:text-sm ${valueClassName}`}>{value || '—'}</p>
563:                 {copyValue && onCopy && (
564:                     <button
565:                         type="button"
566:                         onClick={onCopy}
567:                         className="shrink-0 rounded-md p-1 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-700"
568:                         title={`Salin ${label.toLowerCase()}`}
569:                     >
570:                         {copied
571:                             ? <CheckIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-emerald-600" />
572:                             : <ClipboardIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
573:                         }
574:                     </button>
575:                 )}
576:             </div>
577:         </div>
578:     );
579: }
580: export function PaymentHistorySection({ invoices, currentInvoiceId }) {
581:     const history = (invoices ?? []).slice().sort((left, right) => new Date(right.created_at) - new Date(left.created_at));
582: 
583:     if (history.length === 0) {
584:         return null;
585:     }
586: 
587:     return (
588:         <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40 border border-gray-200">
589:             <div className="border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 bg-gray-50/30 flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
590:                 <div>
591:                     <p className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Histori Pembayaran</p>
592:                     <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-400">Riwayat invoice, status, dan kejadian pembayaran terbaru.</p>
593:                 </div>
594:                 <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-300">{history.length} item</p>
595:             </div>
596: 
597:             <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[24rem] overflow-auto p-5 sm:p-6">
598:                 {history.map((invoice) => {
599:                     const meta = getStatusMeta(invoice.status, REQUEST_STATUS_META.payment_required);
600:                     const isCurrent = invoice.id === currentInvoiceId;
601: 
602:                     return (
603:                         <div key={invoice.id} className={`rounded-2xl border p-5 transition ${isCurrent ? 'border-gray-900 bg-gray-50' : 'border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/30'}`}>
604:                             <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-start sm:justify-between">
605:                                 <div className="space-y-1">
606:                                     <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
607:                                         <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest ${meta.classes}`}>
608:                                             {meta.label}
609:                                         </span>
610:                                         {isCurrent && (
611:                                             <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-gray-200 bg-white px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
612:                                                 Terbaru
613:                                             </span>
614:                                         )}
615:                                     </div>
616:                                     <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{formatCurrency(invoice.amount)}</p>
617:                                     <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 whitespace-pre-line">Diterbitkan {formatDateTime(invoice.created_at)}</p>
618:                                 </div>
619:                                 <div className="text-right space-y-1">
620:                                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">Batas Bayar</p>
621:                                     <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 whitespace-pre-line">{formatDateTime(invoice.expires_at)}</p>
622:                                 </div>
623:                             </div>
624: 
625:                             <div className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
626:                                 <HistoryChip label="Billing" value={invoice.billing_code || 'Mohon input kode billing'} />
627:                                 <HistoryChip label="Terverifikasi" value={formatDateTime(invoice.verified_at)} />
628:                             </div>
629: 
630:                             {invoice.rejection_reason && (
631:                                 <div className="mt-3 px-1">
632:                                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Catatan</p>
633:                                     <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-semibold text-red-700 leading-relaxed">{invoice.rejection_reason}</p>
634:                                 </div>
635:                             )}
636: 
637:                             {invoice.status === 'expired' && (
638:                                 <p className="mt-3 text-xs text-orange-600">
639:                                     Invoice ini sudah kedaluwarsa. Pengaju dapat meminta invoice ulang.
640:                                 </p>
641:                             )}
642:                             {invoice.status === 'invalid' && (
643:                                 <p className="mt-3 text-xs text-red-600">
644:                                     Bukti pembayaran ditolak. Pengaju dapat mengirim bukti ulang.
645:                                 </p>
646:                             )}
647:                             {invoice.status === 'paid' && (
648:                                 <p className="mt-3 text-xs text-emerald-600">
649:                                     Pembayaran valid dan request sudah masuk pemrosesan.
650:                                 </p>
651:                             )}
652:                         </div>
653:                     );
654:                 })}
655:             </div>
656:         </div>
657:     );
658: }
659: 
660: function HistoryChip({ label, value }) {
661:     return (
662:         <div className="rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/70 px-3 py-2">
663:             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">{label}</p>
664:             <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700">{value || '—'}</p>
665:         </div>
666:     );
667: }
668: 
669: function EmptyProof({ status }) {
670:     const emptyMessage = status === 'expired'
671:         ? 'Tagihan sudah kedaluwarsa sehingga tidak ada bukti pembayaran yang aktif.'
672:         : status === 'payment_invalid'
673:             ? 'Bukti sebelumnya ditolak. Pengaju perlu mengunggah ulang bukti pembayaran.'
674:             : 'Pengaju belum mengunggah bukti pembayaran.';
675: 
676:     if (status === 'expired') {
677:         return (
678:             <div className="flex min-h-[64px] items-start gap-2 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 px-3 py-2 text-left sm:px-4 sm:py-2">
679:                 <ClockIcon className="mt-3 h-5 w-5 shrink-0 text-gray-400" />
680:                 <div className="min-w-0 flex-1 space-y-0.5 py-0.5">
681:                     <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">Bukti Pembayaran</p>
682:                     <p className="text-xs leading-relaxed text-gray-500">
683:                         {emptyMessage}
684:                     </p>
685:                 </div>
686:             </div>
687:         );
688:     }
689: 
690:     return (
691:         <div className="flex min-h-[64px] items-center gap-2.5 rounded-xl bg-gray-100/60 px-3.5 py-3 text-left sm:px-4 sm:py-3.5">
692:             <ClockIcon className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0 text-gray-400" />
693:             <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
694:                 <p className="text-base font-medium leading-relaxed text-gray-600">
695:                     {emptyMessage}
696:                 </p>
697:             </div>
698:         </div>
699:     );
700: }
701: 
702: function DocFileIcon({ label = 'PDF', color = 'bg-red-600' }) {
703:     return (
704:         <div className="relative w-6 h-8 flex-shrink-0">
705:             <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-white rounded-md shadow-sm border border-gray-200" />
706:             <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-3 h-3 bg-gray-100 rounded-bl-md border-l border-b border-gray-200" />
707:             <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-center">
708:                 <div className={`${color} px-1 py-0.5 rounded-sm shadow-sm`}>
709:                     <span className="text-[8px] font-bold text-white tracking-tight leading-none block">{label}</span>
710:                 </div>
711:             </div>
712:             <div className="absolute bottom-1.5 left-1.5 right-1.5">
713:                 <div className="h-0.5 bg-gray-200 rounded mb-0.5" />
714:                 <div className="h-0.5 bg-gray-200 rounded w-2/3" />
715:             </div>
716:         </div>
717:     );
718: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/DataRequests/Partials/PaymentVerificationModal.jsx
================
  1: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';
  2: import { useForm } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import { useEffect } from 'react';
  4: import { XMarkIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  5: import InputError from '@/Components/InputError';
  6: 
  7: export default function PaymentVerificationModal({ isOpen, onClose, dataRequestId, actionType = 'reject' }) {
  8:     const { data, setData, post, processing, errors, reset, clearErrors } = useForm({
  9:         action: 'reject',
 10:         rejection_reason: '',
 11:     });
 12: 
 13:     useEffect(() => {
 14:         if (isOpen) {
 15:             setData('action', actionType);
 16:         }
 17:     }, [isOpen, actionType]);
 18: 
 19:     const isApprove = actionType === 'accept';
 20: 
 21:     const handleClose = () => {
 22:         reset();
 23:         clearErrors();
 24:         onClose();
 25:     };
 26: 
 27:     const submit = (e) => {
 28:         e.preventDefault();
 29:         post(route('admin.data-requests.verify-payment', dataRequestId), {
 30:             preserveScroll: true,
 31:             onSuccess: () => handleClose(),
 32:         });
 33:     };
 34: 
 35:     return (
 36:         <Transition show={isOpen} leave="duration-200">
 37:             <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4" onClose={handleClose}>
 38:                 <TransitionChild
 39:                     enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0" enterTo="opacity-100"
 40:                     leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100" leaveTo="opacity-0"
 41:                 >
 42:                     <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" />
 43:                 </TransitionChild>
 44: 
 45:                 <TransitionChild
 46:                     enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95 translate-y-2" enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100 translate-y-0"
 47:                     leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100 translate-y-0" leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95 translate-y-2"
 48:                 >
 49:                     <DialogPanel className="w-full max-w-lg overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200 relative">
 50:                         <form onSubmit={submit}>
 51:                             {/* Header */}
 52:                             <div className="border-b border-gray-100 px-6 py-5">
 53:                                 <button
 54:                                     type="button"
 55:                                     onClick={handleClose}
 56:                                     className="absolute right-4 top-4 rounded-lg p-1 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600"
 57:                                 >
 58:                                     <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
 59:                                 </button>
 60:                                 <h3 className="pr-8 text-base font-bold text-gray-900">Persetujuan Bukti Pembayaran</h3>
 61:                             </div>
 62: 
 63:                             {/* Body */}
 64:                             <div className="px-6 py-5 space-y-5">
 65:                                 {isApprove ? (
 66:                                     <div className="space-y-2">
 67:                                         <p className="text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-gray-900">
 68:                                             Apakah Anda yakin bukti pembayaran ini valid dan siap disetujui?
 69:                                         </p>
 70:                                         <p className="text-[12px] leading-relaxed text-gray-500">
 71:                                             Setelah disetujui, pengajuan langsung lanjut ke tahap pemrosesan data.
 72:                                         </p>
 73:                                     </div>
 74:                                 ) : (
 75:                                     <>
 76:                                         <div>
 77:                                             <p className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Pertanyaan Konfirmasi</p>
 78:                                             <p className="mb-3 text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-gray-900">
 79:                                                 Yakin ingin menolak bukti pembayaran ini?
 80:                                             </p>
 81:                                             <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
 82:                                                 Alasan Penolakan <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
 83:                                             </label>
 84:                                             <textarea
 85:                                                 value={data.rejection_reason}
 86:                                                 onChange={(e) => setData('rejection_reason', e.target.value)}
 87:                                                 rows={4}
 88:                                                 placeholder="Jelaskan alasan bukti pembayaran ditolak..."
 89:                                                 className="w-full resize-none rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-300 transition focus:border-gray-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0"
 90:                                             />
 91:                                             <InputError message={errors.rejection_reason} className="mt-2" />
 92:                                         </div>
 93: 
 94:                                         {/* Warning */}
 95:                                         <div className="rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 px-4 py-2">
 96:                                             <p className="text-[11px] leading-relaxed text-gray-500">
 97:                                                 Catatan: Pengaju akan diminta mengunggah ulang bukti pembayaran.
 98:                                             </p>
 99:                                         </div>
100:                                     </>
101:                                 )}
102:                             </div>
103: 
104:                             {/* Footer */}
105:                             <div className="flex justify-end gap-2.5 border-t border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/60 px-6 py-4">
106:                                 <button
107:                                     type="button"
108:                                     onClick={handleClose}
109:                                     disabled={processing}
110:                                     className="rounded-xl border border-black bg-gray-400 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:border-yellow-500 disabled:opacity-50"
111:                                 >
112:                                     Batal
113:                                 </button>
114:                                 <button
115:                                     type="submit"
116:                                     disabled={processing || (!isApprove && !data.rejection_reason.trim())}
117:                                     className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-xl border border-black px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:border-yellow-500 disabled:opacity-50 ${
118:                                         isApprove ? 'bg-gray-900' : 'bg-gray-400'
119:                                     }`}
120:                                 >
121:                                     {processing ? 'Menyimpan...' : (isApprove ? 'Setujui Bukti' : 'Tolak Bukti')}
122:                                 </button>
123:                             </div>
124:                         </form>
125:                     </DialogPanel>
126:                 </TransitionChild>
127:             </Dialog>
128:         </Transition>
129:     );
130: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/DataRequests/Partials/ProcessedDataPanel.jsx
