   1: import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
   2: import { router, usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';
   3: import { ArrowDownTrayIcon, ArrowPathIcon, ArrowUpTrayIcon, CheckIcon, EyeIcon, TrashIcon, XMarkIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
   4: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';
   5: 
   6: export default function ProcessedDataPanel({ dataRequest, onPreview }) {
   7:     const [pendingFiles, setPendingFiles] = useState([]);
   8:     const [isDragActive, setIsDragActive] = useState(false);
   9:     const [uploadingProcessedFile, setUploadingProcessedFile] = useState(false);
  10:     const [deletingDocumentId, setDeletingDocumentId] = useState(null);
  11:     const [markingComplaintResolved, setMarkingComplaintResolved] = useState(false);
  12:     const [isBulkDeleteMode, setIsBulkDeleteMode] = useState(false);
  13:     const [selectedDocumentIds, setSelectedDocumentIds] = useState([]);
  14:     const [fileError, setFileError] = useState('');
  15:     const [confirmModal, setConfirmModal] = useState({
  16:         isOpen: false,
  17:         action: null, // 'delete-selected' | 'upload'
  18:     });
  19:     const { uploadLimits } = usePage().props;
  20:     const processedLimitKB = uploadLimits?.processed_data ?? 102400;
  21:     const [confirmPreview, setConfirmPreview] = useState({
  22:         isOpen: false,
  23:         title: '',
  24:         url: null,
  25:         downloadUrl: null,
  26:         extension: '',
  27:         isObjectUrl: false,
  28:     });
  29:     const [pendingPreview, setPendingPreview] = useState({
  30:         isOpen: false,
  31:         fileName: '',
  32:         objectUrl: null,
  33:         mimeType: '',
  34:         extension: '',
  35:         tableRows: null,
  36:         fileSize: 0,
  37:         rowCount: null,
  38:         columnCount: null,
  39:     });
  40:     const [confirmListScroll, setConfirmListScroll] = useState({
  41:         canScroll: false,
  42:         progress: 0,
  43:     });
  44:     const dragCounterRef = useRef(0);
  45:     const processedFileInputRef = useRef(null);
  46:     const confirmListRef = useRef(null);
  47:     const processedDocuments = dataRequest.processed_documents ?? [];
  48:     const existingDocumentsForDelivery = processedDocuments.map((doc) => ({
  49:         id: doc.id,
  50:         name: doc.original_name,
  51:         size: doc.file_size ?? 0,
  52:         document: doc,
  53:     }));
  54:     const pendingDocumentsForDelivery = pendingFiles.map((file, index) => ({
  55:         id: `pending-${index}-${file.name}`,
  56:         name: file.name,
  57:         size: file.size ?? 0,
  58:         file,
  59:     }));
  60:     const totalDocumentsAfterSend = existingDocumentsForDelivery.length + pendingDocumentsForDelivery.length;
  61:     const documentsForConfirmation = [
  62:         ...existingDocumentsForDelivery.map((doc) => ({
  63:             ...doc,
  64:             source: 'existing',
  65:         })),
  66:         ...pendingDocumentsForDelivery.map((doc) => ({
  67:             ...doc,
  68:             source: 'pending',
  69:         })),
  70:     ];
  71:     const complaintActivityLogs = dataRequest.complaint_activity_logs ?? [];
  72:     const complaintAlreadyResolved = complaintActivityLogs.some((entry) => entry.event === 'complaint_marked_resolved');
  73:     const hasUploadedComplaintRevision = complaintActivityLogs.some((entry) => entry.event === 'feedback_revision_uploaded');
  74:     const shouldShowComplaintResolvedAction = dataRequest.admin_status_key === 'complaint' && !hasUploadedComplaintRevision;
  75:     const hasPendingComplaintRevision = pendingFiles.length > 0;
  76:     const status = dataRequest.status;
  77:     const isDeletingBulk = deletingDocumentId === 'bulk';
  78: 
  79:     const handleUploadProcessedDocument = () => {
  80:         if (pendingFiles.length === 0 || uploadingProcessedFile) {
  81:             return;
  82:         }
  83: 
  84:         router.post(
  85:             route('admin.data-requests.processed-documents.store', dataRequest.id),
  86:             { files: pendingFiles },
  87:             {
  88:                 forceFormData: true,
  89:                 preserveScroll: true,
  90:                 onStart: () => setUploadingProcessedFile(true),
  91:                 onFinish: () => setUploadingProcessedFile(false),
  92:                 onSuccess: () => setPendingFiles([]),
  93:             }
  94:         );
  95:     };
  96: 
  97:     const handlePreviewPendingFile = async (file) => {
  98:         if (!file) {
  99:             return;
 100:         }
 101: 
 102:         if (pendingPreview.objectUrl) {
 103:             URL.revokeObjectURL(pendingPreview.objectUrl);
 104:         }
 105: 
 106:         const extension = getFileExtension(file.name);
 107:         const mimeType = file.type || '';
 108:         let tableRows = null;
 109:         let rowCount = null;
 110:         let columnCount = null;
 111: 
 112:         if (isDelimitedTextSpreadsheet(mimeType, extension)) {
 113:             try {
 114:                 const text = await file.text();
 115:                 const delimiter = extension === 'tsv' ? '\t' : ',';
 116:                 tableRows = parseDelimitedRows(text, delimiter);
 117:                 rowCount = countDelimitedRows(text);
 118:                 columnCount = countDelimitedColumns(text, delimiter);
 119:             } catch (_error) {
 120:                 tableRows = null;
 121:             }
 122:         }
 123: 
 124:         const objectUrl = URL.createObjectURL(file);
 125:         setPendingPreview({
 126:             isOpen: true,
 127:             fileName: file.name,
 128:             objectUrl,
 129:             mimeType,
 130:             extension,
 131:             tableRows,
 132:             fileSize: file.size || 0,
 133:             rowCount,
 134:             columnCount,
 135:         });
 136:     };
 137: 
 138:     const closePendingPreviewModal = () => {
 139:         if (pendingPreview.objectUrl) {
 140:             URL.revokeObjectURL(pendingPreview.objectUrl);
 141:         }
 142: 
 143:         setPendingPreview({
 144:             isOpen: false,
 145:             fileName: '',
 146:             objectUrl: null,
 147:             mimeType: '',
 148:             extension: '',
 149:             tableRows: null,
 150:             fileSize: 0,
 151:             rowCount: null,
 152:             columnCount: null,
 153:         });
 154:     };
 155: 
 156:     const handlePickProcessedFiles = (selectedFiles) => {
 157:         if (!selectedFiles?.length) {
 158:             return;
 159:         }
 160: 
 161:         const validFiles = [];
 162:         const invalidFiles = [];
 163: 
 164:         selectedFiles.forEach(file => {
 165:             if (file.size > processedLimitKB * 1024) {
 166:                 invalidFiles.push(file.name);
 167:             } else {
 168:                 validFiles.push(file);
 169:             }
 170:         });
 171: 
 172:         if (invalidFiles.length > 0) {
 173:             setFileError(`File berikut melebihi batas ${processedLimitKB / 1024}MB: ${invalidFiles.join(', ')}`);
 174:         } else {
 175:             setFileError('');
 176:         }
 177: 
 178:         if (validFiles.length > 0) {
 179:             setPendingFiles((current) => {
 180:                 const merged = [...current, ...validFiles];
 181:                 return merged.slice(0, 10);
 182:             });
 183:         }
 184:     };
 185: 
 186:     const handleRemovePendingFile = (index) => {
 187:         setPendingFiles((current) => current.filter((_, currentIndex) => currentIndex !== index));
 188:     };
 189: 
 190:     const openProcessedFilePicker = () => {
 191:         if (pendingFiles.length >= 10) {
 192:             return;
 193:         }
 194: 
 195:         processedFileInputRef.current?.click();
 196:     };
 197: 
 198:     const isFileDragEvent = (event) => Array.from(event.dataTransfer?.types || []).includes('Files');
 199: 
 200:     const handleDragEnter = (event) => {
 201:         if (!isFileDragEvent(event)) {
 202:             return;
 203:         }
 204: 
 205:         event.preventDefault();
 206:         event.stopPropagation();
 207:         dragCounterRef.current += 1;
 208:         setIsDragActive(true);
 209:     };
 210: 
 211:     const handleDragOver = (event) => {
 212:         if (!isFileDragEvent(event)) {
 213:             return;
 214:         }
 215: 
 216:         event.preventDefault();
 217:         event.stopPropagation();
 218:         event.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'copy';
 219:         setIsDragActive(true);
 220:     };
 221: 
 222:     const handleDragLeave = (event) => {
 223:         if (!isFileDragEvent(event)) {
 224:             return;
 225:         }
 226: 
 227:         event.preventDefault();
 228:         event.stopPropagation();
 229:         dragCounterRef.current = Math.max(0, dragCounterRef.current - 1);
 230: 
 231:         if (dragCounterRef.current === 0) {
 232:             setIsDragActive(false);
 233:         }
 234:     };
 235: 
 236:     const handleDrop = (event) => {
 237:         if (!isFileDragEvent(event)) {
 238:             return;
 239:         }
 240: 
 241:         event.preventDefault();
 242:         event.stopPropagation();
 243:         dragCounterRef.current = 0;
 244:         setIsDragActive(false);
 245: 
 246:         const droppedFiles = Array.from(event.dataTransfer?.files || []);
 247:         if (!droppedFiles.length) {
 248:             return;
 249:         }
 250: 
 251:         handlePickProcessedFiles(droppedFiles);
 252:     };
 253: 
 254:     useEffect(() => {
 255:         const handleWindowDragEnter = (event) => {
 256:             if (!isFileDragEvent(event)) {
 257:                 return;
 258:             }
 259: 
 260:             event.preventDefault();
 261:             dragCounterRef.current += 1;
 262:             setIsDragActive(true);
 263:         };
 264: 
 265:         const handleWindowDragOver = (event) => {
 266:             if (!isFileDragEvent(event)) {
 267:                 return;
 268:             }
 269: 
 270:             event.preventDefault();
 271:             event.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'copy';
 272:             setIsDragActive(true);
 273:         };
 274: 
 275:         const handleWindowDragLeave = (event) => {
 276:             if (!isFileDragEvent(event)) {
 277:                 return;
 278:             }
 279: 
 280:             event.preventDefault();
 281:             dragCounterRef.current = Math.max(0, dragCounterRef.current - 1);
 282:             if (dragCounterRef.current === 0) {
 283:                 setIsDragActive(false);
 284:             }
 285:         };
 286: 
 287:         const handleWindowDrop = (event) => {
 288:             if (!isFileDragEvent(event)) {
 289:                 return;
 290:             }
 291: 
 292:             event.preventDefault();
 293:             dragCounterRef.current = 0;
 294:             setIsDragActive(false);
 295: 
 296:             const droppedFiles = Array.from(event.dataTransfer?.files || []);
 297:             if (!droppedFiles.length) {
 298:                 return;
 299:             }
 300: 
 301:             handlePickProcessedFiles(droppedFiles);
 302:         };
 303: 
 304:         const handleWindowDragEnd = () => {
 305:             dragCounterRef.current = 0;
 306:             setIsDragActive(false);
 307:         };
 308: 
 309:         window.addEventListener('dragenter', handleWindowDragEnter);
 310:         window.addEventListener('dragover', handleWindowDragOver);
 311:         window.addEventListener('dragleave', handleWindowDragLeave);
 312:         window.addEventListener('drop', handleWindowDrop);
 313:         window.addEventListener('dragend', handleWindowDragEnd);
 314: 
 315:         return () => {
 316:             window.removeEventListener('dragenter', handleWindowDragEnter);
 317:             window.removeEventListener('dragover', handleWindowDragOver);
 318:             window.removeEventListener('dragleave', handleWindowDragLeave);
 319:             window.removeEventListener('drop', handleWindowDrop);
 320:             window.removeEventListener('dragend', handleWindowDragEnd);
 321:         };
 322:     }, []);
 323: 
 324:     const toggleBulkDeleteMode = () => {
 325:         if (isDeletingBulk) {
 326:             return;
 327:         }
 328:         setIsBulkDeleteMode((current) => !current);
 329:         setSelectedDocumentIds([]);
 330:     };
 331: 
 332:     const toggleDocumentSelection = (documentId) => {
 333:         setSelectedDocumentIds((current) => (
 334:             current.includes(documentId)
 335:                 ? current.filter((id) => id !== documentId)
 336:                 : [...current, documentId]
 337:         ));
 338:     };
 339: 
 340:     const closeConfirmModal = () => {
 341:         setConfirmModal((current) => ({
 342:             ...current,
 343:             isOpen: false,
 344:         }));
 345:     };
 346: 
 347:     const closeConfirmPreview = () => {
 348:         if (confirmPreview.isObjectUrl && confirmPreview.url) {
 349:             URL.revokeObjectURL(confirmPreview.url);
 350:         }
 351: 
 352:         setConfirmPreview({
 353:             isOpen: false,
 354:             title: '',
 355:             url: null,
 356:             downloadUrl: null,
 357:             extension: '',
 358:             isObjectUrl: false,
 359:         });
 360:     };
 361: 
 362:     const updateConfirmListScrollState = () => {
 363:         const container = confirmListRef.current;
 364:         if (!container) {
 365:             return;
 366:         }
 367: 
 368:         const canScroll = container.scrollHeight > container.clientHeight + 1;
 369:         const maxScrollTop = Math.max(container.scrollHeight - container.clientHeight, 1);
 370:         const progress = Math.min(Math.max(container.scrollTop / maxScrollTop, 0), 1);
 371: 
 372:         setConfirmListScroll({ canScroll, progress });
 373:     };
 374: 
 375:     const handlePreviewFromConfirmModal = (doc) => {
 376:         if (!doc) {
 377:             return;
 378:         }
 379: 
 380:         if (doc.source === 'existing' && doc.document) {
 381:             setConfirmPreview({
 382:                 isOpen: true,
 383:                 title: doc.name,
 384:                 url: route('admin.data-requests.preview-document', [dataRequest.id, doc.document.id]),
 385:                 downloadUrl: route('admin.data-requests.download-document', [dataRequest.id, doc.document.id]),
 386:                 extension: getFileExtension(doc.name),
 387:                 isObjectUrl: false,
 388:             });
 389:             return;
 390:         }
 391: 
 392:         if (doc.source === 'pending' && doc.file) {
 393:             const objectUrl = URL.createObjectURL(doc.file);
 394:             setConfirmPreview({
 395:                 isOpen: true,
 396:                 title: doc.name,
 397:                 url: objectUrl,
 398:                 downloadUrl: objectUrl,
 399:                 extension: getFileExtension(doc.name),
 400:                 isObjectUrl: true,
 401:             });
 402:         }
 403:     };
 404: 
 405:     useEffect(() => {
 406:         if (!(confirmModal.isOpen && confirmModal.action === 'upload')) {
 407:             return;
 408:         }
 409: 
 410:         const frameId = window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
 411:             updateConfirmListScrollState();
 412:         });
 413: 
 414:         return () => window.cancelAnimationFrame(frameId);
 415:     }, [confirmModal.isOpen, confirmModal.action, documentsForConfirmation.length]);
 416: 
 417:     const handleConfirmAction = () => {
 418:         if (!confirmModal.action) {
 419:             closeConfirmModal();
 420:             return;
 421:         }
 422: 
 423:         if (confirmModal.action === 'upload') {
 424:             closeConfirmModal();
 425:             handleUploadProcessedDocument();
 426:             return;
 427:         }
 428: 
 429:         if (confirmModal.action === 'delete-selected') {
 430:             router.delete(
 431:                 route('admin.data-requests.processed-documents.bulk-destroy', dataRequest.id),
 432:                 {
 433:                     data: { document_ids: selectedDocumentIds },
 434:                     preserveScroll: true,
 435:                     onStart: () => setDeletingDocumentId('bulk'),
 436:                     onFinish: () => {
 437:                         setDeletingDocumentId(null);
 438:                         setSelectedDocumentIds([]);
 439:                         setIsBulkDeleteMode(false);
 440:                         closeConfirmModal();
 441:                     },
 442:                 }
 443:             );
 444:         }
 445:     };
 446: 
 447:     const handleMarkComplaintResolved = () => {
 448:         if (markingComplaintResolved) {
 449:             return;
 450:         }
 451: 
 452:         router.post(
 453:             route('admin.data-requests.complaint-resolved', dataRequest.id),
 454:             {},
 455:             {
 456:                 preserveScroll: true,
 457:                 onStart: () => setMarkingComplaintResolved(true),
 458:                 onFinish: () => setMarkingComplaintResolved(false),
 459:             }
 460:         );
 461:     };
 462: 
 463:     return (
 464:         <div className="relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-gray-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
 465:             {isDragActive && (
 466:                 <div className="pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-[70] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/30 px-4 backdrop-blur-sm">
 467:                     <div className="w-full max-w-2xl rounded-2xl border-2 border-dashed border-yellow-400 bg-white px-6 py-8 text-center shadow-2xl shadow-gray-900/20">
 468:                         <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-800">Lepas file di mana saja untuk menambah data unggahan.</p>
 469:                     </div>
 470:                 </div>
 471:             )}
 472:             <div className="border-b-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/30 px-4 py-3 sm:px-6 sm:py-4">
 473:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
 474:                     <h3 className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Unggah Data</h3>
 475: 
 476:                     {processedDocuments.length > 0 && (
 477:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 478:                             {isBulkDeleteMode ? (
 479:                                 <>
 480:                                     <button
 481:                                         type="button"
 482:                                         onClick={toggleBulkDeleteMode}
 483:                                         disabled={isDeletingBulk}
 484:                                         className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-2 py-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-600 transition hover:bg-gray-50"
 485:                                     >
 486:                                         Batal
 487:                                     </button>
 488:                                     <button
 489:                                         type="button"
 490:                                         disabled={selectedDocumentIds.length === 0 || !!deletingDocumentId}
 491:                                         onClick={() => setConfirmModal({ isOpen: true, action: 'delete-selected' })}
 492:                                         className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-lg px-2 py-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-red-600 transition hover:bg-red-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50"
 493:                                     >
 494:                                         {isDeletingBulk ? (
 495:                                             <>
 496:                                                 <ArrowPathIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin" />
 497:                                                 Menghapus...
 498:                                             </>
 499:                                         ) : (
 500:                                             <>
 501:                                                 <TrashIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
 502:                                                 Hapus ({selectedDocumentIds.length})
 503:                                             </>
 504:                                         )}
 505:                                     </button>
 506:                                 </>
 507:                             ) : (
 508:                                 <button
 509:                                     type="button"
 510:                                     onClick={toggleBulkDeleteMode}
 511:                                     disabled={isDeletingBulk}
 512:                                     className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-lg px-2 py-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-600 transition hover:bg-gray-100"
 513:                                     title="Pilih banyak data untuk dihapus"
 514:                                 >
 515:                                     <TrashIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
 516:                                     Hapus Data
 517:                                 </button>
 518:                             )}
 519:                         </div>
 520:                     )}
 521:                 </div>
 522:             </div>
 523: 
 524:             <div className="space-y-2 px-3 pb-3 pt-2 sm:px-3.5 sm:pb-3.5 sm:pt-2.5">
 525:                 <input
 526:                     ref={processedFileInputRef}
 527:                     type="file"
 528:                     multiple
 529:                     onChange={(event) => {
 530:                         const selectedFiles = Array.from(event.target.files || []);
 531:                         handlePickProcessedFiles(selectedFiles);
 532:                         event.target.value = '';
 533:                     }}
 534:                     className="hidden"
 535:                 />
 536: 
 537:                 {dataRequest.has_submitted_feedback && (
 538:                     <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white shadow-sm">
 539:                         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 divide-y divide-gray-200 xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,2.2fr)_minmax(0,1fr)] xl:divide-x xl:divide-y-0 xl:divide-gray-200">
 540:                             <div className="p-3 sm:p-3.5">
 541:                                 <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
 542:                                     <p className="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-gray-700">Keluhan Pengaju</p>
 543:                                     {dataRequest.user_feedback_at && (
 544:                                         <p className="shrink-0 text-[11px] text-gray-500">{new Date(dataRequest.user_feedback_at).toLocaleString('id-ID')}</p>
 545:                                     )}
 546:                                 </div>
 547:                                 <div className="mt-2.5 border-t border-gray-200 pt-2.5">
 548:                                     <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-800 leading-relaxed">{dataRequest.user_feedback}</p>
 549:                                 </div>
 550:                             </div>
 551: 
 552:                             <div className="overflow-hidden bg-gray-50/60">
 553:                                 <div className="p-3 sm:p-3.5">
 554:                                     <p className="text-xs font-medium leading-relaxed text-gray-600">
 555:                                         Gunakan tombol dibawah ini jika data yang dikirim dirasa sudah sesuai.
 556:                                     </p>
 557:                                 </div>
 558:                                 {shouldShowComplaintResolvedAction && (
 559:                                     <button
 560:                                         type="button"
 561:                                         onClick={handleMarkComplaintResolved}
 562:                                         disabled={markingComplaintResolved || complaintAlreadyResolved || hasPendingComplaintRevision}
 563:                                         className="inline-flex w-full items-center justify-center border-t border-gray-200 bg-gray-900 px-3.5 py-3.5 text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-white shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.08),0_6px_14px_rgba(17,24,39,0.2)] transition-all hover:bg-gray-800 hover:shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.12),0_8px_18px_rgba(17,24,39,0.28)] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-gray-300 disabled:text-gray-600 disabled:shadow-none sm:px-4 sm:py-4"
 564:                                     >
 565:                                         {markingComplaintResolved ? 'Menyimpan...' : complaintAlreadyResolved ? 'Sudah Ditandai Sesuai' : 'Data Sudah Sesuai'}
 566:                                     </button>
 567:                                 )}
 568:                                 {(complaintAlreadyResolved || hasUploadedComplaintRevision) && (
 569:                                     <div className="border-t border-gray-200 px-3.5 py-3 sm:px-4 sm:py-3.5">
 570:                                         <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">
 571:                                             {complaintAlreadyResolved
 572:                                                 ? 'Keluhan sudah ditandai selesai. Pengaju sudah menerima arahan komplain lanjutan melalui WhatsApp.'
 573:                                                 : hasUploadedComplaintRevision
 574:                                                     ? 'Revisi data  dan notifikasinya sudah dikirim ke pengaju.'
 575:                                                     : ''}
 576:                                         </p>
 577:                                     </div>
 578:                                 )}
 579:                             </div>
 580:                         </div>
 581:                     </div>
 582:                 )}
 583: 
 584:                 {processedDocuments.length > 0 && (
 585:                     <div className="space-y-2">
 586:                         {processedDocuments.map((doc) => (
 587:                             <div
 588:                                 key={doc.id}
 589:                                 className={`flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-3.5 shadow-sm transition-all hover:border-gray-400 ${
 590:                                     isDeletingBulk && selectedDocumentIds.includes(doc.id) ? 'opacity-60 animate-pulse' : ''
 591:                                 }`}
 592:                             >
 593:                                 <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center gap-2.5">
 594:                                     <DocFileIcon label={getFileMeta(doc.original_name).label} color={getFileMeta(doc.original_name).badgeColor} />
 595:                                     <div className="min-w-0">
 596:                                         <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-gray-700">{doc.original_name}</p>
 597:                                         <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">
 598:                                             {doc.file_size ? `${(doc.file_size / 1024).toFixed(0)} KB` : 'Data'}
 599:                                         </p>
 600:                                     </div>
 601:                                 </div>
 602:                                 <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center gap-1.5">
 603:                                     <ActionButton
 604:                                         title="Lihat data"
 605:                                         className="p-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-600 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm"
 606:                                         onClick={() => onPreview(doc)}
 607:                                     >
 608:                                         <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
 609:                                     </ActionButton>
 610:                                     <ActionLink
 611:                                         title="Unduh data"
 612:                                         className="p-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm"
 613:                                         href={route('admin.data-requests.download-document', [dataRequest.id, doc.id])}
 614:                                     >
 615:                                         <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
 616:                                     </ActionLink>
 617:                                     {isBulkDeleteMode && (
 618:                                         <input
 619:                                             type="checkbox"
 620:                                             checked={selectedDocumentIds.includes(doc.id)}
 621:                                             onChange={() => toggleDocumentSelection(doc.id)}
 622:                                             disabled={isDeletingBulk}
 623:                                             className="h-4 w-4 rounded border-gray-300 text-red-600 focus:ring-red-500"
 624:                                         />
 625:                                     )}
 626:                                 </div>
 627:                             </div>
 628:                         ))}
 629:                     </div>
 630:                 )}
 631: 
 632:                 {processedDocuments.length > 0 && (
 633:                     <div className="px-1 py-0.5">
 634:                         <div className="border-t-2 border-dashed border-gray-400" />
 635:                     </div>
 636:                 )}
 637: 
 638:                 <div
 639:                     onClick={openProcessedFilePicker}
 640:                     onDragEnter={handleDragEnter}
 641:                     onDragOver={handleDragOver}
 642:                     onDragLeave={handleDragLeave}
 643:                     onDrop={handleDrop}
 644:                     onKeyDown={(event) => {
 645:                         if (event.key === 'Enter' || event.key === ' ') {
 646:                             event.preventDefault();
 647:                             openProcessedFilePicker();
 648:                         }
 649:                     }}
 650:                     role="button"
 651:                     tabIndex={pendingFiles.length >= 10 ? -1 : 0}
 652:                     className={`group relative cursor-pointer overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border-2 border-dashed bg-white px-4 py-4 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 sm:px-5 ${isDragActive ? 'border-yellow-400 bg-gray-50 shadow-[0_16px_36px_rgba(234,179,8,0.18)]' : 'border-gray-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-gray-500 hover:shadow-[0_14px_28px_rgba(17,24,39,0.12)]'}`}
 653:                 >
 654:                     {isDragActive ? (
 655:                         <div className="flex min-h-[148px] items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-white px-4 text-center">
 656:                             <div>
 657:                                 <ArrowUpTrayIcon className="mx-auto h-9 w-9 text-gray-900" />
 658:                                 <p className="mt-3 text-sm font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-gray-900">Lepas File Di Sini</p>
 659:                                 <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-medium text-gray-600">File akan langsung masuk ke daftar data siap kirim.</p>
 660:                             </div>
 661:                         </div>
 662:                     ) : (
 663:                         <>
 664:                             <div className="rounded-xl bg-gray-50 px-4 py-5 text-center">
 665:                                 <ArrowUpTrayIcon className="mx-auto h-9 w-9 text-gray-900" />
 666:                                 <p className="mt-3 text-sm font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-gray-900">
 667:                                     {pendingFiles.length >= 10 ? 'Maksimal 10 Data Per Kirim' : 'Klik Atau Drag & Drop File'}
 668:                                 </p>
 669:                                 <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-medium text-gray-600">
 670:                                     Area ini sepenuhnya bisa diklik. Anda juga bisa jatuhkan file di mana saja pada halaman ini.
 671:                                 </p>
 672:                             </div>
 673:                         </>
 674:                     )}
 675:                 </div>
 676:                 {fileError && (
 677:                     <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-red-500 font-bold">{fileError}</p>
 678:                 )}
 679: 
 680:                 {pendingFiles.length > 0 && (
 681:                     <div className="mt-2 space-y-2">
 682:                             {pendingFiles.map((file, index) => (
 683:                                 <div key={`${file.name}-${file.lastModified}-${index}`} className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-3.5 shadow-sm transition-all hover:border-gray-400">
 684:                                     <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center gap-3 overflow-hidden text-left">
 685:                                         <DocFileIcon label={getFileMeta(file.name).label} color={getFileMeta(file.name).badgeColor} />
 686:                                         <div className="overflow-hidden">
 687:                                             <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-gray-700">{file.name}</p>
 688:                                             <p className="truncate text-[9px] font-bold uppercase text-gray-400">{formatFileSize(file.size)}</p>
 689:                                         </div>
 690:                                     </div>
 691: 
 692:                                     <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center gap-2">
 693:                                         <button
 694:                                             type="button"
 695:                                             onClick={() => handlePreviewPendingFile(file)}
 696:                                             className="p-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-600 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm"
 697:                                             title="Lihat Data"
 698:                                         >
 699:                                             <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
 700:                                         </button>
 701:                                         <button
 702:                                             type="button"
 703:                                             onClick={() => handleRemovePendingFile(index)}
 704:                                             className="rounded-lg p-2 text-red-600 transition-transform duration-150 hover:scale-110"
 705:                                             title="Hapus Data"
 706:                                         >
 707:                                             <TrashIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
 708:                                         </button>
 709:                                     </div>
 710:                                 </div>
 711:                             ))}
 712: 
 713:                             <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-2">
 714:                                 <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-700">
 715:                                     {pendingFiles.length} data siap dikirim
 716:                                 </p>
 717:                                 <button
 718:                                     type="button"
 719:                                     onClick={() => setConfirmModal({
 720:                                         isOpen: true,
 721:                                         action: 'upload',
 722:                                         documentId: null,
 723:                                         documentName: '',
 724:                                         file: null,
 725:                                     })}
 726:                                     disabled={uploadingProcessedFile}
 727:                                     className="inline-flex shrink-0 items-center gap-2 rounded-md bg-gray-900 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[11px] font-semibold text-white transition hover:bg-gray-800 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50"
 728:                                 >
 729:                                     {uploadingProcessedFile ? (
 730:                                         <>
 731:                                             <svg className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
 732:                                                 <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" />
 733:                                                 <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z" />
 734:                                             </svg>
 735:                                             Mengunggah...
 736:                                         </>
 737:                                     ) : (
 738:                                         <>
 739:                                             <CheckIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
 740:                                             Kirim
 741:                                         </>
 742:                                     )}
 743:                                 </button>
 744:                             </div>
 745: 
 746:                             {dataRequest.has_submitted_feedback && hasPendingComplaintRevision && (
 747:                                 <p className="px-1 text-[11px] text-gray-500">
 748:                                     Kirim data sesuai keluhan pengaju, pengaju akan menerima pemberitahuan revisi data.
 749:                                 </p>
 750:                             )}
 751:                                 </div>
 752:                             )}
 753: 
 754:                 <p className="mt-2 text-[11px] text-gray-500">
 755:                     {status === 'processing'
 756:                         ? `Pilih satu data atau beberapa sekaligus, periksa pratinjau, lalu kirim ketika sudah sesuai. Maksimal 10 data dan ${processedLimitKB / 1024} MB per data.`
 757:                         : `Anda dapat menambahkan data baru. Jika ada data yang salah, hapus lalu unggah ulang. Maksimal 10 data dan ${processedLimitKB / 1024} MB per data.`}
 758:                 </p>
 759:             </div>
 760: 
 761:             <Transition
 762:                 show={confirmModal.isOpen}
 763:                 leave="duration-200"
 764:                 afterLeave={() => {
 765:                     setConfirmModal((current) => (
 766:                         current.isOpen
 767:                             ? current
 768:                             : { isOpen: false, action: null }
 769:                     ));
 770:                 }}
 771:             >
 772:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={closeConfirmModal}>
 773:                     <TransitionChild
 774:                         enter="ease-out duration-200"
 775:                         enterFrom="opacity-0"
 776:                         enterTo="opacity-100"
 777:                         leave="ease-in duration-150"
 778:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100"
 779:                         leaveTo="opacity-0"
 780:                     >
 781:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" />
 782:                     </TransitionChild>
 783: 
 784:                     <TransitionChild
 785:                         enter="ease-out duration-200"
 786:                         enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95"
 787:                         enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100"
 788:                         leave="ease-in duration-150"
 789:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100"
 790:                         leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95"
 791:                     >
 792:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
 793:                             <DialogPanel className="w-full max-w-lg overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-100">
 794:                                 {confirmModal.action === 'upload' ? (
 795:                                     <>
 796:                                         <div className="flex items-start justify-between px-6 pt-6 pb-4">
 797:                                             <div>
 798:                                                 <h2 className="text-base font-extrabold text-gray-900">Konfirmasi Kirim Data</h2>
 799:                                                 <p className="mt-0.5 text-xs text-gray-400">Pastikan semua data sudah benar sebelum dikirim</p>
 800:                                             </div>
 801:                                             <button
 802:                                                 type="button"
 803:                                                 onClick={closeConfirmModal}
 804:                                                 className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600"
 805:                                             >
 806:                                                 <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
 807:                                             </button>
 808:                                         </div>
 809: 
 810:                                         <div className="mx-6 mb-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3">
 811:                                             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 divide-y divide-gray-200 sm:grid-cols-2 sm:divide-x sm:divide-y-0">
 812:                                                 <div className="px-3 py-2">
 813:                                                     <p className="mb-0.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">Ringkasan Pengiriman</p>
 814:                                                     <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">
 815:                                                         {pendingDocumentsForDelivery.length} data baru akan dikirim
 816:                                                     </p>
 817:                                                 </div>
 818:                                                 <div className="px-3 py-2">
 819:                                                     <p className="mb-0.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">Total Data Setelah Kirim</p>
 820:                                                     <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">
 821:                                                         {totalDocumentsAfterSend} data
 822:                                                     </p>
 823:                                                 </div>
 824:                                             </div>
 825:                                         </div>
 826: 
 827:                                         <div className="px-6 pb-5">
 828:                                             <p className="mb-3 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">Dokumen Yang Akan Dikirim</p>
 829:                                             <div className="relative">
 830:                                                 <div
 831:                                                     ref={confirmListRef}
 832:                                                     onScroll={updateConfirmListScrollState}
 833:                                                     className="max-h-[358px] space-y-2 overflow-y-auto pr-6"
 834:                                                 >
 835:                                                     {documentsForConfirmation.map((doc) => (
 836:                                                         <div
 837:                                                             key={`${doc.source}-${doc.id}`}
 838:                                                             className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 bg-white px-4 py-3 shadow-sm"
 839:                                                         >
 840:                                                             <div className="flex min-w-0 flex-1 items-start gap-3">
 841:                                                                 <DocFileIcon label={getFileMeta(doc.name).label} color={getFileMeta(doc.name).badgeColor} />
 842:                                                                 <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
 843:                                                                     <p className="truncate pr-1 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-800">{doc.name}</p>
 844:                                                                     <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">{formatFileSize(doc.size)}</p>
 845:                                                                 </div>
 846:                                                             </div>
 847:                                                             <div className="ml-2 flex shrink-0 items-center gap-2">
 848:                                                                 <span className={`px-1 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider ${
 849:                                                                     doc.source === 'pending'
 850:                                                                         ? 'text-blue-700'
 851:                                                                         : 'text-gray-600'
 852:                                                                 }`}>
 853:                                                                     {doc.source === 'pending' ? 'Akan Dikirim' : 'Sudah Terkirim'}
 854:                                                                 </span>
 855:                                                                 <button
 856:                                                                     type="button"
 857:                                                                     onClick={() => handlePreviewFromConfirmModal(doc)}
 858:                                                                     className="inline-flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500 transition-colors hover:border-yellow-500 hover:text-yellow-600"
 859:                                                                     title={`Preview ${doc.name}`}
 860:                                                                 >
 861:                                                                     <EyeIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
 862:                                                                 </button>
 863:                                                             </div>
 864:                                                         </div>
 865:                                                     ))}
 866:                                                 </div>
 867:                                                 {confirmListScroll.canScroll && (
 868:                                                     <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex w-4 flex-col items-center justify-between py-2">
 869:                                                         <span className="text-[9px] font-black text-gray-400">^</span>
 870:                                                         <div className="relative h-full w-1 rounded-full bg-gray-200/80">
 871:                                                             <div
 872:                                                                 className="absolute left-0 w-1 rounded-full bg-gray-500 transition-all duration-150"
 873:                                                                 style={{
 874:                                                                     height: '26%',
 875:                                                                     top: `${confirmListScroll.progress * 74}%`,
 876:                                                                 }}
 877:                                                             />
 878:                                                         </div>
 879:                                                         <span className="text-[9px] font-black text-gray-400">v</span>
 880:                                                     </div>
 881:                                                 )}
 882:                                                 {documentsForConfirmation.length > 5 && (
 883:                                                     <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 h-10 bg-gradient-to-t from-white to-transparent" />
 884:                                                 )}
 885:                                             </div>
 886:                                         </div>
 887: 
 888:                                         <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3 border-t border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/50 px-6 py-4">
 889:                                             <button
 890:                                                 type="button"
 891:                                                 onClick={closeConfirmModal}
 892:                                                 className="rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-gray-600 transition-all hover:bg-gray-100"
 893:                                             >
 894:                                                 Batal
 895:                                             </button>
 896:                                             <button
 897:                                                 type="button"
 898:                                                 onClick={handleConfirmAction}
 899:                                                 className="rounded-xl bg-gray-900 px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-all hover:bg-black"
 900:                                             >
 901:                                                 Kirim
 902:                                             </button>
 903:                                         </div>
 904:                                     </>
 905:                                 ) : (
 906:                                     <div className="p-5">
 907:                                         <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">Konfirmasi Hapus Data</p>
 908:                                         <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
 909:                                             Hapus {selectedDocumentIds.length} data yang dipilih dari daftar data unggahan?
 910:                                         </p>
 911: 
 912:                                         <div className="mt-4 flex justify-end gap-2">
 913:                                             <button

 915:                                                 onClick={closeConfirmModal}
 916:                                                 disabled={isDeletingBulk}
 917:                                                 className="rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 transition hover:bg-gray-50"
 918:                                             >
 919:                                                 Batal
 920:                                             </button>
 921:                                             <button
 922:                                                 type="button"
 923:                                                 onClick={handleConfirmAction}
 924:                                                 disabled={isDeletingBulk}
 925:                                                 className="rounded-lg bg-red-600 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-white transition hover:bg-red-700 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
 926:                                             >
 927:                                                 {isDeletingBulk ? 'Menghapus...' : 'Hapus'}
 928:                                             </button>
 929:                                         </div>
 930:                                     </div>
 931:                                 )}
 932: 
 933:                             </DialogPanel>
 934:                         </div>
 935:                     </TransitionChild>
 936:                 </Dialog>
 937:             </Transition>
 938: 
 939:             <Transition show={confirmPreview.isOpen} leave="duration-150">
 940:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-[60]" onClose={closeConfirmPreview}>
 941:                     <TransitionChild
 942:                         enter="ease-out duration-150"

 948:                     >

 950:                     </TransitionChild>

 984:                                         </div>

 989:                                             title={`Pratinjau ${confirmPreview.title}`}
 990:                                         />
 991:                                     ) : null}
 992:                                 </div>

 994:                         </div>
 995:                     </TransitionChild>
 996:                 </Dialog>

 998:

1000:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={closePendingPreviewModal}>
1001:                     <TransitionChild
1002:                         enter="ease-out duration-200"
1003:                         enterFrom="opacity-0"
1004:                         enterTo="opacity-100"
1005:                         leave="ease-in duration-150"
1006:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100"
1007:                         leaveTo="opacity-0"
1008:                     >
1009:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/55 backdrop-blur-sm" />
1010:                     </TransitionChild>
1011: 
1012:                     <TransitionChild
1013:                         enter="ease-out duration-200"
1014:                         enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95"
1015:                         enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100"
1016:                         leave="ease-in duration-150"
1017:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100"
1018:                         leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95"
1019:                     >

1032:                                                 Unduh Data
1033:                                             </a>
1034:                                         )}

1036:                                             type="button"
1037:                                             onClick={closePendingPreviewModal}
1038:                                             className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-500 transition hover:bg-gray-100"
1039:                                         >
1040:                                             <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
1041:                                         </button>
1042:                                     </div>
1043:                                 </div>
1044:

1046:                                     {pendingPreview.objectUrl && pendingPreview.mimeType.startsWith('image/') ? (
1047:                                         <img
1048:                                             src={pendingPreview.objectUrl}
1049:                                             alt={pendingPreview.fileName}
1050:                                             className="h-full w-full object-contain"
1051:                                         />
1052:                                     ) : pendingPreview.objectUrl && pendingPreview.mimeType === 'application/pdf' ? (
1053:                                         <iframe
1054:                                             src={pendingPreview.objectUrl}
1055:                                             title={pendingPreview.fileName}
1056:                                             className="h-full w-full border-0"
1057:                                         />
1058:                                     ) : pendingPreview.tableRows?.length ? (
1059:                                         <div className="h-full overflow-auto p-4">
1060:                                             <SpreadsheetInfoBanner pendingPreview={pendingPreview} />
1061:                                             <div className="mb-3 rounded-lg border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-blue-700">
1062:                                                 Pratinjau spreadsheet ditampilkan sebagian. Periksa kembali data penuh setelah diunggah jika diperlukan.
1063:                                             </div>
1064:                                             <div className="overflow-auto rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white">
1065:                                                 <table className="min-w-full text-xs">
1066:                                                     <tbody>
1067:                                                         {pendingPreview.tableRows.map((row, rowIndex) => (
1068:                                                             <tr key={`row-${rowIndex}`} className={rowIndex === 0 ? 'bg-gray-50' : 'bg-white'}>
1069:                                                                 {row.map((cell, cellIndex) => (
1070:                                                                     <td key={`cell-${rowIndex}-${cellIndex}`} className="border-b border-r border-gray-100 px-2 py-1.5 align-top text-gray-700">
1071:                                                                         {cell || ' '}
1072:                                                                     </td>
1073:                                                                 ))}
1074:                                                             </tr>
1075:                                                         ))}
1076:                                                     </tbody>
1077:                                                 </table>
1078:                                             </div>
1079:                                         </div>
1080:                                     ) : pendingPreview.objectUrl && isSpreadsheetFile(pendingPreview.mimeType, pendingPreview.extension) ? (
1081:                                         <div className="h-full">
1082:                                             <div className="px-4 pt-4">
1083:                                                 <SpreadsheetInfoBanner pendingPreview={pendingPreview} />
1084:                                             </div>
1085:                                             <div className="border-b border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 px-4 py-2 text-xs text-amber-700">
1086:                                                 Pratinjau data spreadsheet bergantung pada dukungan browser. Jika tidak tampil, silakan unggah lalu tinjau dengan unduh data.
1087:                                             </div>
1088:                                             <iframe
1089:                                                 src={pendingPreview.objectUrl}
1090:                                                 title={pendingPreview.fileName}
1091:                                                 className="h-[calc(70vh-41px)] w-full border-0"
1092:                                             />
1093:                                         </div>
1094:                                     ) : isWordDocument(pendingPreview.mimeType, pendingPreview.extension) || isHtmlDocument(pendingPreview.mimeType, pendingPreview.extension) ? (
1095:                                         <div className="flex h-full items-center justify-center px-6">
1096:                                             <div className="w-full max-w-xl rounded-xl border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 px-4 py-4 text-left">
1097:                                                 <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-blue-900">Pratinjau format file ini terbatas di browser</p>
1098:                                                 <p className="mt-1 text-xs leading-relaxed text-blue-800">
1099:                                                     Format {pendingPreview.extension?.toUpperCase() || 'dokumen'} biasanya tidak dapat ditampilkan stabil dari file lokal. Gunakan tombol Unduh Data untuk mengecek isi lengkap, atau unggah versi PDF untuk pratinjau langsung.
1100:                                                 </p>
1101:                                             </div>
1102:                                         </div>
1103:                                     ) : (
1104:                                         <div className="flex h-full items-center justify-center px-6 text-center">
1105:                                             <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
1106:                                                 Pratinjau untuk tipe file ini belum didukung di modal. Silakan lanjutkan upload untuk meninjau dari preview dokumen.
1107:                                             </p>
1108:                                         </div>
1109:                                     )}
1110:                                 </div>
1111:                             </DialogPanel>
1112:                         </div>
1113:                     </TransitionChild>
1114:                 </Dialog>
1115:             </Transition>
1116:         </div>
1117:     );
1118: }
1119: 
1120: function SpreadsheetInfoBanner({ pendingPreview }) {
1121:     return (
1122:         <div className="mb-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-2">
1123:             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Detail Data</p>
1124:             <div className="mt-1 grid grid-cols-1 gap-1 text-xs text-gray-700 sm:grid-cols-3">
1125:                 <span>Format: {pendingPreview.extension ? pendingPreview.extension.toUpperCase() : 'Spreadsheet'}</span>
1126:                 <span>Ukuran: {formatFileSize(pendingPreview.fileSize || 0)}</span>
1127:                 <span>
1128:                     Jumlah Baris: {pendingPreview.rowCount !== null ? pendingPreview.rowCount : 'Tidak dapat dihitung otomatis'}
1129:                 </span>
1130:                 <span>
1131:                     Jumlah Kolom: {pendingPreview.columnCount !== null ? pendingPreview.columnCount : 'Tidak dapat dihitung otomatis'}
1132:                 </span>
1133:             </div>
1134:         </div>
1135:     );
1136: }
1137: 
1138: function getFileExtension(fileName = '') {
1139:     return (fileName.split('.').pop() || '').toLowerCase();
1140: }
1141: 
1142: function isDelimitedTextSpreadsheet(mimeType = '', extension = '') {
1143:     if (['csv', 'tsv'].includes(extension)) {
1144:         return true;
1145:     }
1146: 
1147:     return ['text/csv', 'text/tab-separated-values'].includes(mimeType);
1148: }
1149: 
1150: function isSpreadsheetFile(mimeType = '', extension = '') {
1151:     if (['xls', 'xlsx', 'ods', 'csv', 'tsv'].includes(extension)) {
1152:         return true;
1153:     }
1154: 
1155:     return [
1156:         'text/csv',
1157:         'text/tab-separated-values',
1158:         'application/vnd.ms-excel',
1159:         'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
1160:         'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.spreadsheet',
1161:     ].includes(mimeType);
1162: }
1163: 
1164: function isWordDocument(mimeType = '', extension = '') {
1165:     if (['doc', 'docx'].includes(extension)) {
1166:         return true;
1167:     }
1168: 
1169:     return [
1170:         'application/msword',
1171:         'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
1172:     ].includes(mimeType);
1173: }
1174: 
1175: function isHtmlDocument(mimeType = '', extension = '') {
1176:     if (['html', 'htm'].includes(extension)) {
1177:         return true;
1178:     }
1179: 
1180:     return ['text/html', 'application/xhtml+xml'].includes(mimeType);
1181: }
1182: 
1183: function isInlinePreviewSupported(extension = '') {
1184:     return ['pdf', 'png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'webp', 'gif', 'bmp', 'svg'].includes((extension || '').toLowerCase());
1185: }
1186: 
1187: function parseDelimitedRows(text = '', delimiter = ',') {
1188:     return text
1189:         .split(/\r?\n/)
1190:         .filter((line) => line.trim() !== '')
1191:         .slice(0, 30)
1192:         .map((line) => line.split(delimiter).map((cell) => cell.trim()).slice(0, 12));
1193: }
1194: 
1195: function countDelimitedRows(text = '') {
1196:     return text.split(/\r?\n/).filter((line) => line.trim() !== '').length;
1197: }
1198: 
1199: function countDelimitedColumns(text = '', delimiter = ',') {
1200:     const lines = text.split(/\r?\n/).filter((line) => line.trim() !== '');
1201: 
1202:     if (!lines.length) {
1203:         return null;
1204:     }
1205: 
1206:     return lines.reduce((maxCount, line) => {
1207:         return Math.max(maxCount, line.split(delimiter).length);
1208:     }, 0);
1209: }
1210: 
1211: function formatFileSize(size = 0) {
1212:     if (size < 1024) {
1213:         return `${size} B`;
1214:     }
1215: 
1216:     if (size < 1024 * 1024) {
1217:         return `${(size / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB`;
1218:     }
1219: 
1220:     return `${(size / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1)} MB`;
1221: }
1222: 
1223: function ActionButton({ title, className, children, onClick, disabled = false }) {
1224:     return (
1225:         <button
1226:             type="button"
1227:             onClick={onClick}
1228:             disabled={disabled}
1229:             className={`group relative ${className}`}
1230:             title={title}
1231:         >
1232:             {children}
1233:             <span className="pointer-events-none absolute -top-7 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 whitespace-nowrap rounded bg-gray-900 px-2 py-1 text-[10px] font-medium text-white opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-75 group-hover:opacity-100">
1234:                 {title}
1235:             </span>
1236:         </button>
1237:     );
1238: }
1239: 
1240: function ActionLink({ title, className, children, href }) {
1241:     return (
1242:         <a href={href} className={`group relative ${className}`} title={title}>
1243:             {children}
1244:             <span className="pointer-events-none absolute -top-7 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 whitespace-nowrap rounded bg-gray-900 px-2 py-1 text-[10px] font-medium text-white opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-75 group-hover:opacity-100">
1245:                 {title}
1246:             </span>
1247:         </a>
1248:     );
1249: }
1250: 
1251: function getFileMeta(fileName, fallbackLabel = 'DOC') {
1252:     const extension = (fileName?.split('.').pop() || '').toLowerCase();
1253:     const extensionLabels = {
1254:         html: 'HTML',
1255:         htm: 'HTML',
1256:         json: 'JSON',
1257:         txt: 'TXT',
1258:         xml: 'XML',
1259:     };
1260:     const displayExt = extensionLabels[extension] ?? (extension.length > 4 ? extension.substring(0, 4).toUpperCase() : extension.toUpperCase());
1261: 
1262:     if (['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'webp', 'gif', 'bmp'].includes(extension)) {
1263:         return {
1264:             label: displayExt,
1265:             badgeColor: 'bg-indigo-600',
1266:         };
1267:     }
1268: 
1269:     if (extension === 'pdf') {
1270:         return {
1271:             label: 'PDF',
1272:             badgeColor: 'bg-red-600',
1273:         };
1274:     }
1275: 
1276:     if (['doc', 'docx'].includes(extension)) {
1277:         return {
1278:             label: 'DOC',
1279:             badgeColor: 'bg-blue-600',
1280:         };
1281:     }
1282: 
1283:     if (['xls', 'xlsx', 'csv'].includes(extension)) {
1284:         return {
1285:             label: displayExt,
1286:             badgeColor: 'bg-green-600',
1287:         };
1288:     }
1289: 
1290:     if (['zip', 'rar', '7z'].includes(extension)) {
1291:         return {
1292:             label: displayExt,
1293:             badgeColor: 'bg-amber-600',
1294:         };
1295:     }
1296: 
1297:     return {
1298:         label: displayExt || fallbackLabel,
1299:         badgeColor: 'bg-gray-700',
1300:     };
1301: }
1302: 
1303: function DocFileIcon({ label = 'FILE', color = 'bg-gray-700' }) {
1304:     return (
1305:         <div className="relative w-6 h-8 flex-shrink-0">
1306:             <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-white rounded-md shadow-sm border border-gray-200" />
1307:             <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-3 h-3 bg-gray-100 rounded-bl-md border-l border-b border-gray-200" />
1308:             <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-center">
1309:                 <div className={`${color} px-1 py-0.5 rounded-sm shadow-sm`}>
1310:                     <span className="text-[8px] font-bold text-white tracking-tight leading-none block">{label}</span>
1311:                 </div>
1312:             </div>
1313:         </div>
1314:     );
1315: }

File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/DataRequests/Partials/RequesterCard.jsx

 1: import { EnvelopeIcon, PhoneIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 2: 
 3: function ContactRow({ icon: Icon, value }) {
 4:     if (!value) return null;
 5:     return (
 6:         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
 7:             <Icon className="h-4 w-4 flex-shrink-0 text-gray-400" />
 8:             <span className="truncate">{value}</span>
 9:         </div>
10:     );
11: }
12: 
13: /**
14:  * @param {{ user: { name: string, email: string, phone?: string } }} props
15:  */
16: export default function RequesterCard({ user }) {
17:     if (!user) return null;
18: 
19:     const words = (user.name ?? '').trim().split(/\s+/);
20:     const initials = words
21:         .slice(0, 2)
22:         .map((w) => w[0]?.toUpperCase() ?? '')
23:         .join('');
24: 
25:     // Generate a stable hue from the name for avatar color
26:     const hue = [...(user.name ?? '')].reduce((acc, c) => acc + c.charCodeAt(0), 0) % 360;
27: 
28:     return (
29:         <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-sm border border-gray-100">
30:             <div className="border-b border-gray-100 px-6 py-4">
31:                 <h3 className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-700">Data Pengaju</h3>
32:             </div>
33:             <div className="flex items-center gap-4 px-6 py-5">
34:                 {/* Avatar */}
35:                 <div
36:                     className="flex h-14 w-14 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl text-base font-bold text-white shadow-sm"
37:                     style={{ background: `hsl(${hue},55%,50%)` }}
38:                 >
39:                     {initials || '?'}
40:                 </div>
41: 
42:                 {/* Info */}
43:                 <div className="min-w-0 space-y-1.5">
44:                     <p className="truncate text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{user.name}</p>
45:                     <ContactRow icon={EnvelopeIcon} value={user.email} />
46:                     <ContactRow icon={PhoneIcon} value={user.phone} />
47:                 </div>
48:             </div>
49:         </div>
50:     );
51: }

File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/DataRequests/Partials/RequestFilters.jsx

 1: import { router } from '@inertiajs/react';
 2: import { useCallback, useState } from 'react';
 3: import { MagnifyingGlassIcon, AdjustmentsHorizontalIcon, XMarkIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 4: 
 5: const STATUS_OPTIONS = [
 6:     { value: '', label: 'Semua Status' },
 7:     { value: 'pending',  label: 'Verifikasi Pengajuan' },
 8:     { value: 'payment_verifying', label: 'Verifikasi Pembayaran' },
 9:     { value: 'approved', label: 'Disetujui' },
10:     { value: 'rejected', label: 'Pengajuan Ditolak' },
11: ];
12: 
13: /**
14:  * @param {{ filters: { status?: string, search?: string } }} props
15:  */
16: export default function RequestFilters({ filters }) {
17:     const [search, setSearch] = useState(filters?.search ?? '');
18:     const [status, setStatus] = useState(filters?.status ?? '');
19: 
20:     const apply = useCallback(
21:         (newSearch, newStatus) => {
22:             router.get(
23:                 route('admin.data-requests.index'),
24:                 { search: newSearch || undefined, status: newStatus || undefined },
25:                 { preserveState: true, replace: true }
26:             );
27:         },
28:         []
29:     );
30: 
31:     const handleSearchKeyDown = (e) => {
32:         if (e.key === 'Enter') apply(search, status);
33:     };
34: 
35:     const handleStatusChange = (e) => {
36:         const val = e.target.value;
37:         setStatus(val);
38:         apply(search, val);
39:     };
40: 
41:     const clearFilters = () => {
42:         setSearch('');
43:         setStatus('');
44:         apply('', '');
45:     };
46: 
47:     const hasActiveFilters = search || status;
48: 
49:     return (
50:         <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
51:             {/* Search */}
52:             <div className="relative flex-1 min-w-52">
53:                 <MagnifyingGlassIcon className="pointer-events-none absolute left-3 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" />
54:                 <input
55:                     type="text"
56:                     value={search}
57:                     onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
58:                     onKeyDown={handleSearchKeyDown}
59:                     placeholder="Cari kode, nama, atau email..."
60:                     className="w-full rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white py-2 pl-9 pr-4 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 placeholder-gray-400 shadow-sm transition focus:border-yellow-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-yellow-100"
61:                 />
62:             </div>
63: 
64:             {/* Status filter */}
65:             <div className="relative">
66:                 <AdjustmentsHorizontalIcon className="pointer-events-none absolute left-3 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" />
67:                 <select
68:                     value={status}
69:                     onChange={handleStatusChange}
70:                     className="appearance-none rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white py-2 pl-9 pr-8 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 shadow-sm transition focus:border-yellow-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-yellow-100"
71:                 >
72:                     {STATUS_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
73:                         <option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>
74:                             {opt.label}
75:                         </option>
76:                     ))}
77:                 </select>
78:             </div>
79: 
80:             {/* Clear */}
81:             {hasActiveFilters && (
82:                 <button
83:                     onClick={clearFilters}
84:                     className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-500 shadow-sm transition hover:bg-gray-50 hover:text-gray-700"
85:                 >
86:                     <XMarkIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
87:                     Hapus Filter
88:                 </button>
89:             )}
90:         </div>
91:     );
92: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/DataRequests/Partials/RequestInfoCard.jsx
