  1: import { useState } from 'react';
  2: import { formatDate } from '@/Utils/formatters';
  3: import { EnvelopeIcon, PhoneIcon, ClipboardIcon, CheckIcon, BuildingOffice2Icon, UserIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  4: 
  5: const PURPOSE_LABELS = {
  6:     commercial: 'Komersial',
  7:     non_commercial_individu: 'Non-Komersial (Individu)',
  8:     non_commercial_instansi: 'Non-Komersial (Instansi)',
  9: };
 10: 
 11: const STATUS_CONFIG = {
 12:     pending: {
 13:         label: 'Verifikasi Pengajuan',
 14:         classes: 'text-amber-700 border-amber-200',
 15:     },
 16:     rejected: {
 17:         label: 'Pengajuan Ditolak',
 18:         classes: 'text-red-700 border-red-200',
 19:     },
 20:     payment_required: {
 21:         label: 'Menunggu Pembayaran',
 22:         classes: 'text-yellow-700 border-yellow-200',
 23:     },
 24:     invoice_reissue_requested: {
 25:         label: 'Minta Invoice Baru',
 26:         classes: 'text-yellow-700 border-yellow-300',
 27:     },
 28:     payment_verifying: {
 29:         label: 'Verifikasi Pembayaran',
 30:         classes: 'text-yellow-700 border-yellow-200',
 31:     },
 32:     payment_invalid: {
 33:         label: 'Pembayaran Ditolak',
 34:         classes: 'text-orange-700 border-orange-200',
 35:     },
 36:     expired: {
 37:         label: 'Kedaluwarsa',
 38:         classes: 'text-gray-500 border-gray-200',
 39:     },
 40:     data_processing: {
 41:         label: 'Pemrosesan Data',
 42:         classes: 'text-sky-700 border-sky-200',
 43:     },
 44:     complaint: {
 45:         label: 'Keluhan',
 46:         classes: 'text-amber-700 border-amber-200',
 47:     },
 48:     survey_waiting_input: {
 49:         label: 'Menunggu Isi Survey',
 50:         classes: 'text-indigo-700 border-indigo-200',
 51:     },
 52:     survey_verification: {
 53:         label: 'Verifikasi Survey',
 54:         classes: 'text-cyan-700 border-cyan-200',
 55:     },
 56:     survey_rejected: {
 57:         label: 'Bukti Survey Ditolak',
 58:         classes: 'text-rose-700 border-rose-200',
 59:     },
 60:     processing: {
 61:         label: 'Pemrosesan Data',
 62:         classes: 'text-sky-700 border-sky-200',
 63:     },
 64:     completed: {
 65:         label: 'Selesai',
 66:         classes: 'text-green-700 border-green-200',
 67:     },
 68: };
 69: 
 70: function InfoRow({ label, value }) {
 71:     return (
 72:         <div>
 73:             <dt className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">{label}</dt>
 74:             <dd className="mt-0.5 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-800">{value || '—'}</dd>
 75:         </div>
 76:     );
 77: }
 78: 
 79: /**
 80:  * @param {{ dataRequest: object }} props
 81:  */
 82: export default function RequestInfoCard({ dataRequest }) {
 83:     const user = dataRequest.user;
 84:     const isInstitution = dataRequest.applicant_type === 'instansi'
 85:         || dataRequest.purpose_type === 'non_commercial_instansi';
 86:     const applicantName = isInstitution
 87:         ? (dataRequest.company_name || user?.company_name)
 88:         : user?.name;
 89:     const applicantOwnerName = isInstitution ? user?.name : applicantName;
 90:     const [copiedCode, setCopiedCode] = useState(false);
 91:     const rawStatus = dataRequest.admin_status_key || dataRequest.status;
 92:     const normalizedStatus = rawStatus === 'payment_verified' ? 'processing' : rawStatus;
 93:     const status = STATUS_CONFIG[normalizedStatus] ?? {
 94:         label: rawStatus,
 95:         classes: 'text-gray-600 border-gray-200',
 96:     };
 97:     const hasSubmittedFeedback = !!dataRequest.has_submitted_feedback;
 98:     const followUp = (() => {
 99:         if (normalizedStatus === 'invoice_reissue_requested') {
100:             return { tone: 'amber', message: 'Pengaju meminta invoice baru. Unggah invoice terbaru pada section Informasi Pembayaran.' };
101:         }
102:         if (normalizedStatus === 'payment_required') {
103:             return { tone: 'yellow', message: 'Pastikan invoice aktif tersedia dan pantau pembayaran dari pengaju.' };
104:         }
105:         if (normalizedStatus === 'payment_verifying') {
106:             return { tone: 'sky', message: 'Bukti pembayaran sudah masuk. Lakukan verifikasi pembayaran pada section Informasi Pembayaran.' };
107:         }
108:         if (normalizedStatus === 'payment_invalid') {
109:             return { tone: 'red', message: 'Bukti pembayaran ditolak. Menunggu pengaju mengirim ulang bukti pembayaran.' };
110:         }
111:         if (normalizedStatus === 'expired') {
112:             return { tone: 'orange', message: 'Invoice kedaluwarsa. Menunggu pengaju mengajukan permintaan invoice baru.' };
113:         }
114:         if (normalizedStatus === 'data_processing' || normalizedStatus === 'processing') {
115:             if (hasSubmittedFeedback) {
116:                 return {
117:                     tone: 'amber',
118:                     message: 'Pengaju telah mengirim feedback. Lakukan revisi data lalu unggah hasil pembaruan sebelum menutup proses.',
119:                 };
120:             }
121: 
122:             if (dataRequest.request_category === 'free') {
123:                 return {
124:                     tone: 'sky',
125:                     messagePrefix: 'Siapkan dan unggah data pada bagian',
126:                     messageHighlight: 'Unggah Data',
127:                     messageSuffix: 'di bawah.',
128:                 };
129:             }
130: 
131:             return {
132:                 tone: 'sky',
133:                 messagePrefix: 'Pembayaran terverifikasi. Lanjutkan pemrosesan dan unggah data pada bagian',
134:                 messageHighlight: 'Unggah Data',
135:                 messageSuffix: 'dibawah.',
136:             };
137:         }
138:         if (normalizedStatus === 'complaint') {
139:             return {
140:                 tone: 'amber',
141:                 message: 'Pengaju telah mengirim keluhan. Tindak lanjuti revisi data lalu unggah pembaruan hasil.',
142:             };
143:         }
144:         if (normalizedStatus === 'survey_waiting_input') {
145:             return {
146:                 tone: 'indigo',
147:                 message: 'Data sudah diunggah. Menunggu pengaju mengisi survey dan mengunggah bukti survey.',
148:             };
149:         }
150:         if (normalizedStatus === 'survey_verification') {
151:             return {
152:                 tone: 'cyan',
153:                 message: 'Bukti survey sudah diunggah. Lanjutkan verifikasi survey pada section Verifikasi Bukti Survey.',
154:             };
155:         }
156:         if (normalizedStatus === 'survey_rejected') {
157:             return {
158:                 tone: 'red',
159:                 message: 'Bukti survey ditolak. Menunggu pengaju mengunggah ulang bukti survey untuk diverifikasi kembali.',
160:             };
161:         }
162:         if (normalizedStatus === 'completed') {
163:             if (hasSubmittedFeedback) {
164:                 return {
165:                     tone: 'green',
166:                     message: 'Revisi atas feedback pengaju sudah tersedia. Jika masih ada keluhan lanjutan, pengaju akan diarahkan ke CS melalui WhatsApp.',
167:                 };
168:             }
169: 
170:             return { tone: 'green', message: 'Data sudah tersedia untuk pengaju. Perbarui file di section Unggah Data bila dibutuhkan.' };
171:         }
172:         if (normalizedStatus === 'pending') {
173:             return { tone: 'amber', message: 'Review dokumen pengajuan lalu setujui atau tolak sesuai hasil verifikasi.' };
174:         }
175:         if (normalizedStatus === 'rejected') {
176:             return { tone: 'red', message: 'Pengajuan telah ditolak. Tidak ada tindak lanjut pembayaran untuk status ini.' };
177:         }
178: 
179:         return { tone: 'yellow', message: 'Lanjutkan proses sesuai status pengajuan saat ini.' };
180:     })();
181: 
182:     const copyRequestCode = async () => {
183:         if (!dataRequest.request_code || !navigator?.clipboard) {
184:             return;
185:         }
186: 
187:         try {
188:             await navigator.clipboard.writeText(dataRequest.request_code);
189:             setCopiedCode(true);
190:             window.setTimeout(() => setCopiedCode(false), 1500);
191:         } catch (_error) {
192:             // Ignore clipboard errors silently.
193:         }
194:     };
195: 
196:     return (
197:         <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-gray-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
198:             {/* Card header */}
199:             <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 border-b-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/30 px-8 py-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between">
200:                 <div>
201:                     <span className={`mb-2 inline-flex w-fit max-w-full self-start whitespace-normal break-words rounded-lg border bg-transparent px-2.5 py-1 text-center text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase leading-tight tracking-widest sm:hidden ${status.classes}`}>
202:                         {status.label}
203:                     </span>
204:                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">Kode Pengajuan</p>
205:                     <div className="mt-0.5 flex items-center gap-2">
206:                         <p className="font-mono text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">{dataRequest.request_code}</p>
207:                         <button
208:                             type="button"
209:                             onClick={copyRequestCode}
210:                             className="rounded-md p-1 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-700"
211:                             title="Salin kode pengajuan"
212:                         >
213:                             {copiedCode
214:                                 ? <CheckIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-emerald-600" />
215:                                 : <ClipboardIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
216:                             }
217:                         </button>
218:                     </div>
219:                 </div>
220:                 <span className={`hidden w-fit max-w-full whitespace-normal break-words rounded-lg border bg-transparent px-2.5 py-1 text-center text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase leading-tight tracking-widest sm:inline-flex sm:self-center sm:px-3 sm:py-1.5 ${status.classes}`}>
221:                     {status.label}
222:                 </span>
223:             </div>
224: 
225:             {/* Three-column summary on desktop: request details, requester data, and admin follow-up */}
226:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 divide-y-2 divide-gray-200 lg:grid-cols-3 lg:divide-x-2 lg:divide-y-0">
227:                 {/* Left: request details */}
228:                 <dl className="space-y-5 px-8 py-6">
229:                     <InfoRow
230:                         label="Tujuan Penggunaan"
231:                         value={PURPOSE_LABELS[dataRequest.purpose_type] ?? dataRequest.purpose_type}
232:                     />
233:                     <InfoRow
234:                         label="Tanggal Pengajuan"
235:                         value={formatDate(dataRequest.created_at, 'long')}
236:                     />
237:                     {dataRequest.research_target_date && (
238:                         <InfoRow
239:                             label="Target Unggah Hasil"
240:                             value={formatDate(dataRequest.research_target_date, 'long')}
241:                         />
242:                     )}
243:                 </dl>
244: 
245:                 {/* Middle: requester */}
246:                 <div className="px-8 pt-4 pb-6">
247:                     <p className="mb-3 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">Data Pengaju</p>
248:                     <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
249:                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-900">
250:                             Atas nama ({isInstitution ? 'Instansi' : 'Individu'})
251:                         </p>
252:                         <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{applicantName || '—'}</p>
253:                         <div className="-mx-8 my-3 border-t-2 border-dashed border-gray-300" />
254:                         {isInstitution && (
255:                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
256:                                 <UserIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5 flex-shrink-0 text-gray-400" />
257:                                 <span className="min-w-0 truncate">{applicantOwnerName || '—'}</span>
258:                             </div>
259:                         )}
260:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
261:                             <EnvelopeIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5 flex-shrink-0 text-gray-400" />
262:                             {user?.email || '—'}
263:                         </div>
264:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
265:                             <PhoneIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5 flex-shrink-0 text-gray-400" />
266:                             {user?.phone || '—'}
267:                         </div>
268:                     </div>
269:                 </div>
270: 
271:                 {/* Right: admin follow-up */}
272:                 <div className="px-8 py-6">
273:                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">Tindak Lanjut Admin</p>
274:                     <p className="mt-1.5 text-sm font-semibold leading-relaxed text-gray-900">
275:                         {followUp ? (
276:                             followUp.messagePrefix ? (
277:                                 <>
278:                                     {followUp.messagePrefix}{' '}
279:                                     <span className="text-blue-600">{followUp.messageHighlight}</span>{' '}
280:                                     {followUp.messageSuffix}
281:                                 </>
282:                             ) : (
283:                                 followUp.message
284:                             )
285:                         ) : '—'}
286:                     </p>
287:                 </div>
288:             </div>
289:         </div>
290:     );

File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/DataRequests/Partials/RequestStatsBar.jsx

 1: import { ClipboardDocumentListIcon, ClockIcon, CheckCircleIcon, XCircleIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 2: 
 3: const cards = [
 4:     {
 5:         key: 'total',
 6:         label: 'Total Permohonan',
 7:         icon: ClipboardDocumentListIcon,
 8:         numColor: 'text-gray-900',
 9:         iconColor: 'text-gray-400',
10:         accent: 'border-gray-300',
11:     },
12:     {
13:         key: 'pending',
14:         label: 'Verifikasi Pengajuan',
15:         icon: ClockIcon,
16:         numColor: 'text-amber-600',
17:         iconColor: 'text-amber-400',
18:         accent: 'border-amber-400',
19:     },
20:     {
21:         key: 'payment_verifying',
22:         label: 'Verifikasi Pembayaran',
23:         icon: ClockIcon,
24:         numColor: 'text-yellow-600',
25:         iconColor: 'text-yellow-400',
26:         accent: 'border-yellow-400',
27:     },
28:     {
29:         key: 'approved',
30:         label: 'Disetujui',
31:         icon: CheckCircleIcon,
32:         numColor: 'text-emerald-600',
33:         iconColor: 'text-emerald-400',
34:         accent: 'border-emerald-400',
35:     },
36:     {
37:         key: 'rejected',
38:         label: 'Pengajuan Ditolak',
39:         icon: XCircleIcon,
40:         numColor: 'text-red-500',
41:         iconColor: 'text-red-400',
42:         accent: 'border-red-400',
43:     },
44: ];
45: 
46: /**
47:  * @param {{ stats: { total: number, pending: number, approved: number, rejected: number } }} props
48:  */
49: export default function RequestStatsBar({ stats }) {
50:     return (
51:         <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-4">
52:             {cards.map(({ key, label, icon: Icon, numColor, iconColor, accent }) => (
53:                 <div
54:                     key={key}
55:                     className={`flex items-center gap-4 rounded-2xl border-l-4 ${accent} bg-white px-4 py-4 shadow-sm border border-gray-100`}
56:                 >
57:                     <Icon className={`h-6 w-6 flex-shrink-0 ${iconColor}`} />
58:                     <div className="min-w-0">
59:                         <p className={`text-2xl font-bold leading-none ${numColor}`}>
60:                             {stats?.[key] ?? 0}
61:                         </p>
62:                         <p className="mt-0.5 truncate text-xs text-gray-500">{label}</p>
63:                     </div>
64:                 </div>
65:             ))}
66:         </div>
67:     );
68: }

================

  1: import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
  2: import { Link, router } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import { formatDate } from '@/Utils/formatters';
  4: import { ChevronLeftIcon, ChevronRightIcon, CheckIcon, ClipboardIcon, BarsArrowUpIcon, BarsArrowDownIcon, QuestionMarkCircleIcon, XMarkIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  5: 
  6: const STATUS_BADGE = {
  7:     pending:          { label: 'Verifikasi Pengajuan', classes: 'text-amber-900 border-amber-700 bg-white'  },
  8:     rejected:         { label: 'Pengajuan Ditolak',   classes: 'text-red-700 border-red-200'        },
  9:     invoice_reissue_requested: { label: 'Minta Invoice Baru', classes: 'text-yellow-900 border-yellow-700 bg-white' },
 10:     payment_required: { label: 'Menunggu Pembayaran', classes: 'text-yellow-700 border-yellow-200'  },
 11:     payment_verifying:{ label: 'Verifikasi Pembayaran', classes: 'text-yellow-900 border-yellow-700 bg-white'  },
 12:     payment_invalid:  { label: 'Pembayaran Ditolak',  classes: 'text-orange-700 border-orange-200'  },
 13:     expired:          { label: 'Kedaluwarsa',         classes: 'text-gray-500 border-gray-200'      },
 14:     data_processing:  { label: 'Pemrosesan Data',     classes: 'text-sky-700 border-sky-200'        },
 15:     complaint:        { label: 'Keluhan',             classes: 'text-amber-700 border-amber-200'    },
 16:     survey_waiting_input: { label: 'Menunggu Isi Survey', classes: 'text-indigo-700 border-indigo-200' },
 17:     survey_verification: { label: 'Verifikasi Survey', classes: 'text-cyan-700 border-cyan-200' },
 18:     survey_rejected:  { label: 'Bukti Survey Ditolak', classes: 'text-rose-700 border-rose-200'     },
 19:     processing:       { label: 'Pemrosesan Data',     classes: 'text-sky-700 border-sky-200'        },
 20:     completed:        { label: 'Selesai',              classes: 'text-green-700 border-green-200'   },
 21: };
 22: 
 23: function getStatusBadge(status) {
 24:     return STATUS_BADGE[status] ?? STATUS_BADGE.data_processing;
 25: }
 26: 
 27: function resolveAdminStatusKey(requestItem) {
 28:     const activeInvoiceStatus = requestItem?.active_invoice?.status ?? requestItem?.activeInvoice?.status ?? null;
 29:     const requestStatus = requestItem?.status ?? null;
 30: 
 31:     if (requestStatus === 'payment_required' && activeInvoiceStatus === 'expired') {
 32:         return 'invoice_reissue_requested';
 33:     }
 34: 
 35:     return requestItem?.admin_status_key || requestStatus;
 36: }
 37: 
 38: function resolveApplicantName(requestItem) {
 39:     const isInstitution = requestItem?.applicant_type === 'instansi'
 40:         || requestItem?.purpose_type === 'non_commercial_instansi';
 41: 
 42:     if (isInstitution) {
 43:         return requestItem?.company_name
 44:             || requestItem?.user?.company_name
 45:             || null;
 46:     }
 47: 
 48:     return requestItem?.user?.name || null;
 49: }
 50: 
 51: const PURPOSE_LABELS = {
 52:     commercial:              'Komersial',
 53:     non_commercial_individu: 'Non-Komersial (Individu)',
 54:     non_commercial_instansi: 'Non-Komersial (Instansi)',
 55: };
 56: 
 57: const SORT_HELP_COPY = {
 58:     updated_at: {
 59:         title: 'aktivitas terakhir',
 60:         asc: 'aktivitas terlama ke terbaru',
 61:         desc: 'aktivitas terbaru ke terlama',
 62:     },
 63:     request_code: {
 64:         title: 'kode',
 65:         asc: 'kode setelah BMKG dari 0 (nol) ke Z',
 66:         desc: 'kode setelah BMKG dari Z ke 0 (nol)',
 67:     },
 68:     user_name: {
 69:         title: 'pengaju',
 70:         asc: 'nama pengaju dari A ke Z',
 71:         desc: 'nama pengaju dari Z ke A',
 72:     },
 73: };
 74: 
 75: function SortBars({ column, sortBy, sortOrder }) {
 76:     const isActive = sortBy === column;
 77:     const isDesc = isActive && sortOrder === 'desc';
 78: 
 79:     const cls = `h-4 w-4 ml-1.5 transition-colors duration-150 shrink-0 ${isActive ? 'text-gray-900' : 'text-gray-300 group-hover:text-gray-500'}`;
 80: 
 81:     return isDesc
 82:         ? <BarsArrowDownIcon className={cls} />
 83:         : <BarsArrowUpIcon className={cls} />;
 84: }
 85: 
 86: function SortHelp({ column }) {
 87:     const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
 88:     const ref = useRef(null);
 89:     const copy = SORT_HELP_COPY[column] ?? SORT_HELP_COPY.updated_at;
 90: 
 91:     useEffect(() => {
 92:         const handleOutsideClick = (event) => {
 93:             if (ref.current && !ref.current.contains(event.target)) {
 94:                 setOpen(false);
 95:             }
 96:         };
 97: 
 98:         document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleOutsideClick);
 99:         return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleOutsideClick);
100:     }, []);
101: 
102:     return (
103:         <div ref={ref} className="relative shrink-0">
104:             <button
105:                 type="button"
106:                 onClick={(event) => {
107:                     event.stopPropagation();
108:                     setOpen((value) => !value);
109:                 }}
110:                 className="inline-flex items-center justify-center text-gray-300 hover:text-gray-700 transition-colors"
111:                 aria-label={`penjelasan sort untuk ${copy.title}`}
112:                 title={`penjelasan sort untuk ${copy.title}`}
113:             >
114:                 <QuestionMarkCircleIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
115:             </button>
116: 
117:             {open && (
118:                 <div className="absolute left-full top-0 z-30 ml-2 w-52 rounded-2xl border border-gray-300 bg-white p-2 text-left shadow-xl shadow-gray-300/60 ring-1 ring-gray-200/70">
119:                     <div className="mb-2 flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
120:                         <p className="text-[10px] font-semibold tracking-normal text-gray-500">petunjuk sort</p>
121:                         <button
122:                             type="button"
123:                             onClick={() => setOpen(false)}
124:                             className="text-gray-300 hover:text-gray-700"
125:                             aria-label="tutup penjelasan sort"
126:                         >
127:                             <XMarkIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
128:                         </button>
129:                     </div>
130:                     <div className="space-y-1.5">
131:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-gray-50 px-2 py-1.5">
132:                             <BarsArrowUpIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5 shrink-0 text-gray-700" />
133:                             <span className="text-[11px] leading-4 text-gray-700">{copy.asc}</span>
134:                         </div>
135:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-gray-50 px-2 py-1.5">
136:                             <BarsArrowDownIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5 shrink-0 text-gray-700" />
137:                             <span className="text-[11px] leading-4 text-gray-700">{copy.desc}</span>
138:                         </div>
139:                     </div>
140:                 </div>
141:             )}
142:         </div>
143:     );
144: }

180:                                         {badge.label}
181:                                     </span>
182:                                 </div>

194:                                     </div>

304:                                             <p className={`truncate text-xs max-w-[160px] ${isAttention ? 'text-gray-900' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>{req.user?.email ?? ''}</p>

317:                         )}

334:                                   </span>
335:                         )}
336:

340:                                     key={i}
341:                                     href={link.url ?? '#'}
342:                                     preserveState

346:                                             : link.url

364:                                   </span>
365:                         )}
366:                     </div>
367:                 </div>
368:             )}
369:         </div>
370:     );

File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/DataRequests/Partials/RequestTimeline.jsx

  1: import { Fragment, useState } from 'react';
  2: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';
  3: import { formatDateTime } from '@/Utils/formatters';
  4: import { ArrowDownTrayIcon, CheckCircleIcon, ChevronDoubleUpIcon, ChevronDownIcon, ChevronUpIcon, EyeIcon, XMarkIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  5: 
  6: /**
  7:  * Returns Tailwind classes for each step state — mirrors user-side stepper colours.
  8:  *
  9:  * done     → dark filled  (steps already passed)
 10:  * current  → yellow ring  (the active/current step)
 11:  * approved → emerald      (verifikasi disetujui)
 12:  * rejected → red          (verifikasi ditolak)
 13:  * waiting  → ghost        (future steps)
 14:  */
 15: function dotClass(state) {
 16:     switch (state) {
 17:         case 'done':     return 'bg-gray-900 border-gray-900 text-white';
 18:         case 'current':  return 'ring-4 ring-yellow-100 border-yellow-400 bg-yellow-400 text-gray-900 shadow-lg';
 19:         case 'rejected': return 'bg-red-500 border-red-500 text-white';
 20:         case 'expired':  return 'bg-orange-500 border-orange-500 text-white';
 21:         default:         return 'bg-white border-gray-200 text-gray-300';
 22:     }
 23: }
 24: 
 25: function labelClass(state) {
 26:     switch (state) {
 27:         case 'done':     return 'text-gray-500';
 28:         case 'current':  return 'text-gray-900 font-bold';
 29:         case 'rejected': return 'text-red-600 font-bold';
 30:         case 'expired':  return 'text-orange-600 font-bold';
 31:         default:         return 'text-gray-300';
 32:     }
 33: }
 34: 
 35: function timeClass(state) {
 36:     switch (state) {
 37:         case 'done':     return 'text-gray-400';
 38:         case 'current':  return 'text-yellow-600';
 39:         case 'rejected': return 'text-red-400';
 40:         case 'expired':  return 'text-orange-400';
 41:         default:         return 'text-gray-200';
 42:     }
 43: }
 44: 
 45: function lineClass(state) {
 46:     switch (state) {
 47:         case 'done':     return 'bg-yellow-400';
 48:         case 'rejected': return 'bg-red-300';
 49:         case 'expired':  return 'bg-orange-300';
 50:         default:         return 'bg-gray-100';
 51:     }
 52: }
 53: 
 54: const INVOICE_STATUS_META = {
 55:     issued: { label: 'Menunggu Pembayaran', tone: 'current' },
 56:     verifying: { label: 'Verifikasi Pembayaran', tone: 'current' },
 57:     paid: { label: 'Disetujui', tone: 'done' },
 58:     invalid: { label: 'Ditolak', tone: 'rejected' },
 59:     expired: { label: 'Kedaluwarsa', tone: 'expired' },
 60: };
 61: 
 62: function formatCurrency(amount) {
 63:     if (amount === null || amount === undefined || amount === '') {
 64:         return '—';
 65:     }
 66: 
 67:     return new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID', {
 68:         style: 'currency',
 69:         currency: 'IDR',
 70:         minimumFractionDigits: 0,
 71:     }).format(Number(amount));
 72: }
 73: 
 74: function getInvoiceMeta(status) {
 75:     return INVOICE_STATUS_META[status] ?? { label: status ?? '—', tone: 'current' };
 76: }
 77: 
 78: function StepCircle({ number, state, onClick, title, isLocked = false }) {
 79:     const circleClass = `flex h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 transition-all text-sm font-bold ${dotClass(state)} ${onClick && !isLocked ? 'cursor-pointer hover:scale-[1.03]' : ''} ${isLocked ? 'cursor-not-allowed' : ''}`;
 80: 
 81:     if (onClick) {
 82:         return (
 83:             <button
 84:                 type="button"
 85:                 onClick={onClick}
 86:                 title={title}
 87:                 aria-label={title ?? `Buka detail langkah ${number}`}
 88:                 className={circleClass}
 89:                 disabled={isLocked}
 90:             >
 91:                 {state === 'done' ? <CheckCircleIcon className="h-6 w-6" /> : number}
 92:             </button>
 93:         );
 94:     }
 95: 
 96:     return (
 97:         <div className={circleClass}>
 98:             {state === 'done' ? <CheckCircleIcon className="h-6 w-6" /> : number}
 99:         </div>
100:     );
101: }
102: 
103: // ─── Desktop step ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
104: function DesktopStep({ number, label, sublabel, time, time2, time2Color, state, onClick, isLocked }) {
105: 
106:     return (
107:         <div className="relative flex flex-col items-center shrink-0 w-12">
108:             <StepCircle
109:                 number={number}
110:                 state={state}
111:                 onClick={onClick}
112:                 isLocked={isLocked}
113:                 title={onClick && !isLocked ? 'Lihat detail step' : undefined}
114:             />
115:             <div className="absolute top-14 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-max max-w-[140px] text-center">
116:                 <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest block leading-tight ${labelClass(state)}`}>
117:                     {label}
118:                 </span>
119:                 {sublabel && (
120:                     <span className={`mt-0.5 text-[9px] block leading-tight ${timeClass(state)}`}>
121:                         {sublabel}
122:                     </span>
123:                 )}
124:                 {time && (
125:                     <span className={`mt-0.5 text-[9px] block leading-tight ${timeClass(state)}`}>
126:                         {time}
127:                     </span>
128:                 )}
129:                 {time2 && (
130:                     <span className={`mt-0.5 text-[9px] block leading-tight font-bold ${time2Color ?? timeClass(state)}`}>
131:                         {time2}
132:                     </span>
133:                 )}
134:             </div>
135:         </div>
136:     );
137: }
138: 
139: // ─── Mobile step ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
140: function MobileStep({ number, label, sublabel, time, time2, time2Color, state, isLast, onClick, isLocked }) {
141:     return (
142:         <div className="flex flex-col items-start">
143:             <div className="flex flex-row items-center gap-4 w-full">
144:                 <StepCircle
145:                     number={number}
146:                     state={state}
147:                     onClick={onClick}
148:                     isLocked={isLocked}
149:                     title={onClick && !isLocked ? 'Lihat detail step' : undefined}
150:                 />
151:                 <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
152:                     <span className={`text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest block ${labelClass(state)}`}>
153:                         {label}
154:                     </span>
155:                     {sublabel && (
156:                         <span className={`text-[10px] block ${timeClass(state)}`}>{sublabel}</span>
157:                     )}
158:                     {time && (
159:                         <span className={`text-[10px] block ${timeClass(state)}`}>{time}</span>
160:                     )}
161:                     {time2 && (
162:                         <span className={`text-[10px] block font-bold ${time2Color ?? timeClass(state)}`}>{time2}</span>
163:                     )}
164:                 </div>
165:             </div>
166:             {!isLast && (
167:                 <div className="ml-[19px] my-1">
168:                     <div className={`w-[2px] h-7 rounded-full ${lineClass(state)}`} />
169:                 </div>
170:             )}
171:         </div>
172:     );
173: }
174: 
175: // ─── Main component ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
176: 
177: export default function RequestTimeline({ dataRequest, maxReachedStep = 0, onTabChange = null }) {
178:     const [paymentHistoryOpen, setPaymentHistoryOpen] = useState(false);
179:     const s = dataRequest.status;
180:     const adminStatusKey = dataRequest.admin_status_key ?? s;
181:     const paymentHistory = [...(dataRequest.invoices ?? [])].sort((left, right) => new Date(right.created_at) - new Date(left.created_at));
182:     const latestInvoice = paymentHistory[0] ?? (dataRequest.active_invoice || dataRequest.activeInvoice || null);
183:     const isPending         = s === 'pending';
184:     const isRejected        = s === 'rejected';
185:     const isPaymentRequired = s === 'payment_required';
186:     const isPaymentInvalid  = s === 'payment_invalid';
187:     const isPaymentVerifying = s === 'payment_verifying';
188:     const isExpired         = s === 'expired';
189:     const isProcessing      = s === 'processing';
190:     const isCompleted       = s === 'completed';
191:     const isSurveyFollowupStatus = ['survey_waiting_input', 'survey_verification', 'survey_rejected'].includes(adminStatusKey);
192:     const isInvoiceReRequestPending = isPaymentRequired && latestInvoice?.status === 'expired';
193:     const complaintActivityLogs = (dataRequest.complaint_activity_logs ?? []).sort((left, right) => new Date(left.logged_at) - new Date(right.logged_at));
194:     const complaintSubmittedLogs = complaintActivityLogs.filter((entry) => entry.event === 'user_feedback_submitted');
195:     const processingStartedLogs = complaintActivityLogs.filter((entry) => entry.event === 'processing_started');
196:     const latestComplaintSubmittedLog = complaintSubmittedLogs[complaintSubmittedLogs.length - 1] ?? null;
197:     const latestProcessingStartedLog = processingStartedLogs[processingStartedLogs.length - 1] ?? null;
198:     const complaintSubmittedAt = latestComplaintSubmittedLog?.logged_at || dataRequest.user_feedback_at || null;
199:     const hasComplaintFlow = Boolean(dataRequest.has_submitted_feedback || dataRequest.user_feedback || complaintSubmittedAt);
200: 
201:     const step1State = isPending ? 'current'
202:         : isRejected  ? 'rejected'
203:         : 'done';
204:     const step2State = (isPending || isRejected) ? 'waiting'
205:         : isExpired ? 'expired'
206:         : isPaymentInvalid ? 'rejected'
207:         : isPaymentRequired ? 'current'
208:         : isPaymentVerifying ? 'current'
209:         : (isProcessing || isCompleted) ? 'done'
210:         : 'waiting';
211:     const step3State = (isProcessing || isSurveyFollowupStatus) ? 'current'
212:         : isCompleted ? 'done'
213:         : 'waiting';
214: 
215:     const isFree = dataRequest.request_category === 'free';
216:     const invoiceIssuedAt = latestInvoice?.created_at || dataRequest.reviewed_at || dataRequest.created_at;
217:     const requestNewInvoiceStamp = isInvoiceReRequestPending
218:         ? `Pengaju meminta invoice baru - ${formatDateTime(dataRequest.updated_at || latestInvoice?.updated_at || latestInvoice?.expires_at)}`
219:         : null;
220:     const paymentLatestStamp = latestInvoice
221:         ? latestInvoice.status === 'paid'
222:             ? `Pembayaran diverifikasi · ${latestInvoice.verified_at ? formatDateTime(latestInvoice.verified_at) : formatDateTime(latestInvoice.updated_at || latestInvoice.created_at)}`
223:             : latestInvoice.status === 'invalid'
224:                 ? `Bukti ditolak · ${formatDateTime(latestInvoice.updated_at || latestInvoice.created_at)}`
225:                 : latestInvoice.status === 'expired'
226:                     ? `Tagihan kedaluwarsa · ${formatDateTime(latestInvoice.expires_at || latestInvoice.updated_at || latestInvoice.created_at)}`
227:                     : latestInvoice.proof_path
228:                         ? 'Verifikasi pembayaran'
229:                         : 'Menunggu pembayaran'
230:         : null;
231:     const paymentStampDisplay = requestNewInvoiceStamp ?? paymentLatestStamp;
232:     const freeStep2Time = null;
233:     const processingStartedAt = latestInvoice?.verified_at || dataRequest.updated_at || dataRequest.created_at;
234:     const processingCompletedAt = dataRequest.completed_at || dataRequest.updated_at || null;
235:     const complaintProcessingAt = latestProcessingStartedLog?.logged_at || processingStartedAt;
236: 
237:     const steps = [
238:         {
239:             number:  1,
240:             label:   'Pengajuan Data',
241:             time:    formatDateTime(dataRequest.created_at),
242:             time2:   dataRequest.reviewed_at
243:                 ? (
244:                     <>
245:                         {isRejected ? 'Ditolak ' : 'Disetujui '}
246:                         {dataRequest.reviewer ? `oleh ${dataRequest.reviewer.name}` : ''}
247:                         <br />
248:                         {formatDateTime(dataRequest.reviewed_at)}
249:                     </>
250:                   )
251:                 : null,
252:             time2Color: isRejected ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-emerald-500',
253:             state:   step1State,
254:             isLocked: 0 > maxReachedStep,
255:             onClick: onTabChange ? () => onTabChange(0) : null,
256:         },
257:         {
258:             number:  2,
259:             label:   'Pembayaran',
260:             sublabel: null,
261:             time: isFree
262:                 ? 'Pembayaran tidak diperlukan'
263:                 : (latestInvoice ? `Invoice dikirim · ${formatDateTime(invoiceIssuedAt)}` : null),
264:             time2:   isFree ? null : paymentStampDisplay,
265:             time2Color: latestInvoice?.status === 'paid'
266:                 ? 'text-emerald-500'
267:                 : latestInvoice?.status === 'invalid'
268:                     ? 'text-red-400'
269:                     : isInvoiceReRequestPending
270:                         ? 'text-amber-600'
271:                     : latestInvoice?.status === 'expired'
272:                         ? 'text-orange-400'
273:                         : 'text-gray-500',
274:             state:   step2State,
275:             isLocked: 1 > maxReachedStep,
276:             onClick: onTabChange ? () => onTabChange(1) : null,
277:         },
278:         {
279:             number:  3,
280:             label:   'Pemrosesan Data',
281:             sublabel: null,
282:             time: hasComplaintFlow
283:                 ? `Keluhan diajukan · ${formatDateTime(complaintSubmittedAt)}`
284:                 : (isProcessing || isCompleted)
285:                     ? `Mulai pemrosesan · ${formatDateTime(processingStartedAt)}`
286:                     : null,
287:             time2: hasComplaintFlow
288:                 ? `Sedang diproses admin · ${formatDateTime(complaintProcessingAt)}`
289:                 : isCompleted
290:                     ? `Data diunggah dan siap diunduh · ${formatDateTime(processingCompletedAt)}`
291:                     : null,
292:             time2Color: isCompleted ? 'text-emerald-500' : null,
293:             state:   step3State,
294:             isLocked: 2 > maxReachedStep,
295:             onClick: onTabChange ? () => onTabChange(2) : null,
296:         },
297:     ];
298: 
299:     return (
300:         <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-gray-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
301:             <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4 border-b-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/30 px-6 py-4">
302:                 <h3 className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Linimasa Pengajuan</h3>
303:                 <button
304:                     type="button"
305:                     onClick={() => setPaymentHistoryOpen(true)}
306:                     className="inline-flex items-center rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-600 transition hover:bg-gray-50"
307:                 >
308:                     Lihat Detail
309:                 </button>
310:             </div>
311: 
312:             {/* Desktop: horizontal stepper */}
313:             <div className="hidden md:flex items-center px-16 lg:px-24 pt-8 pb-24">
314:                 {steps.map((step, i) => (
315:                     <div key={i} className="flex flex-1 items-center last:flex-none">
316:                         <DesktopStep {...step} />
317:                         {i < steps.length - 1 && (
318:                             <div className={`h-[2px] flex-1 mx-4 rounded-full ${lineClass(step.state)}`} />
319:                         )}
320:                     </div>
321:                 ))}
322:             </div>
323: 
324:             {/* Mobile: vertical stepper */}
325:             <div className="md:hidden px-6 py-6">
326:                 {steps.map((step, i) => (
327:                     <MobileStep key={i} {...step} isLast={i === steps.length - 1} />
328:                 ))}
329:             </div>
330: 
331:             <PaymentHistoryModal
332:                 show={paymentHistoryOpen}
333:                 dataRequest={dataRequest}
334:                 invoices={paymentHistory}
335:                 step1State={step1State}
336:                 step2State={step2State}
337:                 step3State={step3State}
338:                 onClose={() => setPaymentHistoryOpen(false)}
339:             />
340:         </div>
341:     );
342: }
343: 
344: function PaymentHistoryModal({ show, dataRequest, invoices, step1State, step2State, step3State, onClose }) {
345:     const [invoicePreview, setInvoicePreview] = useState(null);
346:     const [isComplaintExpanded, setIsComplaintExpanded] = useState(false);
347:     const isFree = dataRequest.request_category === 'free';
348:     const adminStatusKey = dataRequest.admin_status_key ?? dataRequest.status;
349:     const isSurveyFollowupStatus = ['survey_waiting_input', 'survey_verification', 'survey_rejected'].includes(adminStatusKey);
350:     const isSurveyWaitingInput = adminStatusKey === 'survey_waiting_input';
351:     const showPaymentSection = ['payment_required', 'payment_verifying', 'payment_invalid', 'expired', 'processing', 'completed'].includes(dataRequest.status) || invoices.length > 0;
352:     const showDownloadSection = ['processing', 'completed'].includes(dataRequest.status);
353:     const paymentActivityLogs = dataRequest.payment_activity_logs ?? [];
354:     const complaintActivityLogs = (dataRequest.complaint_activity_logs ?? []).sort((left, right) => new Date(left.logged_at) - new Date(right.logged_at));
355:     const processedDocuments = [...(dataRequest.processed_documents ?? [])].sort((left, right) => new Date(right.created_at) - new Date(left.created_at));
356:     const latestProcessedDocument = processedDocuments[0] ?? null;
357:     const processedByName = dataRequest.reviewer?.name || 'Admin';
358:     const orderedInvoices = [...invoices].sort((left, right) => new Date(right.created_at) - new Date(left.created_at));
359:     const latestOrderedInvoice = orderedInvoices[0] ?? null;
360:     const feedbackSubmittedLog = complaintActivityLogs.find((entry) => entry.event === 'user_feedback_submitted');
361:     const processedUploadedLogs = complaintActivityLogs.filter((entry) => entry.event === 'processed_data_uploaded');
362:     const feedbackRevisionLogs = complaintActivityLogs.filter((entry) => entry.event === 'feedback_revision_uploaded');
363:     const complaintResolvedLogs = complaintActivityLogs.filter((entry) => entry.event === 'complaint_marked_resolved');
364:     const processingStartedLogs = complaintActivityLogs.filter((entry) => entry.event === 'processing_started');
365:     const latestProcessedUploadedLog = processedUploadedLogs[processedUploadedLogs.length - 1] ?? null;
366:     const latestFeedbackRevisionLog = feedbackRevisionLogs[feedbackRevisionLogs.length - 1] ?? null;
367:     const latestComplaintResolvedLog = complaintResolvedLogs[complaintResolvedLogs.length - 1] ?? null;
368:     const latestProcessingStartedLog = processingStartedLogs[processingStartedLogs.length - 1] ?? null;
369:     const processedUploadedAt = latestProcessedUploadedLog?.logged_at
370:         || latestFeedbackRevisionLog?.logged_at
371:         || latestProcessedDocument?.updated_at
372:         || latestProcessedDocument?.created_at
373:         || dataRequest.completed_at
374:         || null;
375:     const processedUploadedBy = latestProcessedUploadedLog?.causer_name
376:         || latestFeedbackRevisionLog?.causer_name
377:         || processedByName;
378:     const hasProcessedUploadEvent = Boolean(processedUploadedAt);
379:     const hasComplaintFlow = Boolean(feedbackSubmittedLog || dataRequest.user_feedback || dataRequest.user_feedback_at);
380:     const hasRequestNewInvoiceCard = dataRequest.status === 'payment_required' && latestOrderedInvoice?.status === 'expired';
381:     const parseTime = (value) => {
382:         if (!value) {
383:             return 0;
384:         }
385: 
386:         const parsed = new Date(value).getTime();
387:         return Number.isNaN(parsed) ? 0 : parsed;
388:     };
389: 
390:     const processingEventPriority = {
391:         complaint_marked_resolved: 60,
392:         feedback_revision_uploaded: 50,
393:         user_feedback_submitted: 40,
394:         processing_started: 35,
395:         survey_waiting_input: 35,
396:         data_uploaded_ready: 30,
397:         data_ready_to_upload: 10,
398:     };
399: 
400:     const processingEvents = [
401:         ...(hasComplaintFlow
402:             ? [{
403:                 key: 'user_feedback_submitted',
404:                 label: 'Pengaju Mengajukan Keluhan',
405:                 value: `oleh Pengaju · ${formatDateTime(feedbackSubmittedLog?.logged_at || dataRequest.user_feedback_at)}`,
406:                 action: dataRequest.user_feedback
407:                     ? (
408:                         <div className="mt-2">
409:                             <button
410:                                 type="button"
411:                                 onClick={() => setIsComplaintExpanded((prev) => !prev)}
412:                                 className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-amber-800 transition hover:text-amber-900"
413:                             >
414:                                 Lihat Keluhan
415:                                 <ChevronDownIcon className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 transition-transform ${isComplaintExpanded ? 'rotate-180' : ''}`} />
416:                             </button>
417:                             {isComplaintExpanded && (
418:                                 <div className="mt-2 flex items-stretch gap-2">
419:                                     <div className="relative w-4 shrink-0">
420:                                         <span className="absolute inset-y-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-px bg-amber-300" />
421:                                     </div>
422:                                     <div className="flex-1 px-1 py-1">
423:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-amber-700">Keluhan</p>
424:                                         <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-semibold leading-relaxed text-gray-800">{dataRequest.user_feedback}</p>
425:                                     </div>
426:                                 </div>
427:                             )}
428:                         </div>
429:                     )
430:                     : null,
431:                 tone: 'text-amber-700',
432:                 occurredAt: feedbackSubmittedLog?.logged_at || dataRequest.user_feedback_at || dataRequest.updated_at || dataRequest.created_at,
433:             }]
434:             : []),
435:         ...(latestFeedbackRevisionLog
436:             ? [{
437:                 key: 'feedback_revision_uploaded',
438:                 label: 'Unggah Ulang Data Sesuai Keluhan',
439:                 value: `oleh ${latestFeedbackRevisionLog.causer_name || 'Admin'} · ${formatDateTime(latestFeedbackRevisionLog.logged_at)}`,
440:                 tone: 'text-emerald-600',
441:                 occurredAt: latestFeedbackRevisionLog.logged_at,
442:             }]
443:             : []),
444:         ...(latestComplaintResolvedLog
445:             ? [{
446:                 key: 'complaint_marked_resolved',
447:                 label: 'Data Dirasa Sudah Sesuai',
448:                 value: `oleh ${latestComplaintResolvedLog.causer_name || 'Admin'} · ${formatDateTime(latestComplaintResolvedLog.logged_at)}`,
449:                 tone: 'text-emerald-600',
450:                 occurredAt: latestComplaintResolvedLog.logged_at,
451:             }]
452:             : []),
453:         ...(!hasComplaintFlow && isSurveyFollowupStatus
454:             ? [{
455:                 key: 'survey_waiting_input',
456:                 label: isSurveyWaitingInput ? 'Menunggu Isi Survey' : 'Tindak Lanjut Survey',
457:                 value: isSurveyWaitingInput
458:                     ? 'Pengaju belum mengisi survey. Menunggu pengisian survey dari pengaju.'
459:                     : 'Survey sedang dalam tindak lanjut setelah data hasil dikirim.',
460:                 tone: 'text-gray-600',
461:                 occurredAt: dataRequest.updated_at || processedUploadedAt,
462:             }]
463:             : []),
464:         ...(!hasProcessedUploadEvent
465:             ? [{
466:                 key: 'data_ready_to_upload',
467:                 label: 'Data Siap Diunggah',
468:                 value: 'Siapkan data permintaan lalu unggah data untuk pengaju.',
469:                 tone: 'text-gray-600',
470:                 occurredAt: null,
471:             }]
472:             : []),
473:         ...(hasProcessedUploadEvent
474:             ? [{
475:                 key: 'data_uploaded_ready',
476:                 label: 'Data Diunggah Dan Siap Unduh',
477:                 value: `oleh ${processedUploadedBy} · ${formatDateTime(processedUploadedAt)}`,
478:                 tone: 'text-emerald-600',
479:                 occurredAt: processedUploadedAt,
480:             }]
481:             : []),
482:         {
483:             key: 'processing_started',
484:             label: 'Mulai Pemrosesan Data',
485:             value: latestProcessingStartedLog
486:                 ? `oleh ${latestProcessingStartedLog.causer_name || 'Admin'} · ${formatDateTime(latestProcessingStartedLog.logged_at)}`
487:                 : formatDateTime(latestOrderedInvoice?.verified_at || dataRequest.updated_at || dataRequest.created_at),
488:             tone: 'text-gray-600',
489:             occurredAt: latestProcessingStartedLog?.logged_at || latestOrderedInvoice?.verified_at || dataRequest.reviewed_at || dataRequest.created_at,
490:         },
491:     ].sort((left, right) => {
492:         const priorityDiff = (processingEventPriority[right.key] ?? 0) - (processingEventPriority[left.key] ?? 0);
493:         if (priorityDiff !== 0) {
494:             return priorityDiff;
495:         }
496: 
497:         return parseTime(right.occurredAt) - parseTime(left.occurredAt);
498:     });
499:     const paymentCards = hasRequestNewInvoiceCard
500:         ? [{ id: 'request-new-invoice', type: 'request-new-invoice' }, ...orderedInvoices]
501:         : orderedInvoices;
502:     const sections = [
503:         {
504:             key: 'request',
505:             node: (
506:                 <section className="rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-gray-100">
507:                     <div className="border-b border-gray-200 pb-3">
508:                         <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">Pengajuan Data</p>
509:                     </div>
510:                     <div className="mt-4 space-y-1">
511:                         {[ 
512:                             {
513:                                 label: 'Pengajuan dibuat',
514:                                 value: formatDateTime(dataRequest.created_at),
515:                                 tone: 'text-gray-600',
516:                             },
517:                             dataRequest.reviewed_at && {
518:                                 label: dataRequest.status === 'rejected' ? 'Ditolak' : 'Disetujui',
519:                                 value: `${dataRequest.reviewer ? `oleh ${dataRequest.reviewer.name} · ` : ''}${formatDateTime(dataRequest.reviewed_at)}`,
520:                                 tone: dataRequest.status === 'rejected' ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-emerald-600',
521:                             },
522:                         ].filter(Boolean).reverse().map((event, index, array) => (
523:                             <TrackLine key={`${event.label}-${index}`} {...event} isLast={index === array.length - 1} />
524:                         ))}
525:                     </div>
526:                 </section>
527:             ),
528:         },
529:         showPaymentSection && {
530:             key: 'payment',
531:             node: (
532:                 <section className="rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-gray-100">
533:                     <div className="border-b border-gray-200 pb-3">
534:                         <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">Pembayaran</p>
535:                     </div>
536: 
537:                     <div className="mt-4 space-y-0">
538:                         {isFree ? (
539:                             <div className="rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white px-6 py-8 text-center">
540:                                 <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-800">Pembayaran tidak diperlukan untuk pengajuan non-komersil.</p>
541:                             </div>
542:                         ) : paymentCards.length > 0 ? paymentCards.map((entry, index) => {
543:                             if (entry?.type === 'request-new-invoice') {
544:                                 return (
545:                                     <Fragment key={entry.id}>
546:                                         <div className="rounded-2xl border-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/50 p-4 shadow-sm">
547:                                             <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
548:                                                 <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest text-amber-700">
549:                                                     Permintaan Invoice Baru
550:                                                 </span>
551:                                                 <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-gray-200 bg-white px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
552:                                                     Terbaru
553:                                                 </span>
554:                                             </div>
555: 
556:                                             <div className="mt-4 border-t border-gray-200 pt-4">
557:                                                 <TrackLine
558:                                                     label="Pengaju meminta invoice baru"
559:                                                     value={formatDateTime(dataRequest.updated_at || latestOrderedInvoice?.updated_at || latestOrderedInvoice?.expires_at)}
560:                                                     tone="text-gray-600"
561:                                                     isLast
562:                                                 />
563:                                             </div>
564:                                         </div>
565:                                         {index < paymentCards.length - 1 && <PaymentCardConnector />}
566:                                     </Fragment>
567:                                 );
568:                             }
569: 
570:                             const invoice = entry;
571:                             const meta = getInvoiceMeta(invoice.status);
572:                             const isLatestInvoiceCard = index === (hasRequestNewInvoiceCard ? 1 : 0);
573:                             const shouldShowLatestTag = !hasRequestNewInvoiceCard && isLatestInvoiceCard && latestOrderedInvoice?.status !== 'paid';
574:                             const invoiceIssuedAt = dataRequest.reviewed_at || invoice.created_at;
575:                             const approvalTime = invoice.status === 'paid' && invoice.verified_at ? formatDateTime(invoice.verified_at) : formatDateTime(invoice.updated_at || invoice.created_at);
576:                             const proofTime = invoice.proof_path ? formatDateTime(invoice.updated_at || invoice.created_at) : null;
577:                             const expiredTime = formatDateTime(invoice.expires_at || invoice.updated_at || invoice.created_at);
578:                             const invoiceActivityLogs = paymentActivityLogs
579:                                 .filter((log) => log.invoice_id === invoice.id)
580:                                 .sort((left, right) => new Date(left.logged_at) - new Date(right.logged_at));
581:                             const invoiceUploadLog = invoiceActivityLogs.find((log) => log.event === 'invoice_uploaded');
582:                             const invoiceSenderName = invoiceUploadLog?.causer_name || dataRequest.reviewer?.name || null;
583:                             const invoiceSentAt = invoiceUploadLog?.logged_at || invoiceIssuedAt;
584:                             const invoiceSentValue = `${invoiceSenderName ? `oleh ${invoiceSenderName} · ` : ''}${formatDateTime(invoiceSentAt)}`;
585: 
586:                             const invoiceEvents = [
587:                                 { label: 'Invoice dikirim', value: invoiceSentValue, tone: 'text-gray-600' },
588:                             ];
589: 
590:                             if (invoiceActivityLogs.length > 0) {
591:                                 invoiceActivityLogs.forEach((log) => {
592:                                     if (log.event === 'payment_proof_submitted') {
593:                                         invoiceEvents.push({
594:                                             label: 'Bukti bayar dikirim',
595:                                             value: formatDateTime(log.logged_at),
596:                                             tone: 'text-gray-600',
597:                                         });
598:                                     } else if (log.event === 'payment_proof_resubmitted') {
599:                                         invoiceEvents.push({
600:                                             label: 'Pengaju mengirim ulang bukti bayar',
601:                                             value: formatDateTime(log.logged_at),
602:                                             tone: 'text-gray-600',
603:                                         });
604:                                     } else if (log.event === 'payment_proof_rejected') {
605:                                         invoiceEvents.push({
606:                                             label: 'Bukti pembayaran ditolak',
607:                                             value: `oleh ${log.causer_name || 'Admin'} · ${formatDateTime(log.logged_at)}`,
608:                                             tone: 'text-red-600',
609:                                         });
610:                                     } else if (log.event === 'payment_proof_verified') {
611:                                         invoiceEvents.push({
612:                                             label: 'Verifikasi pembayaran',
613:                                             value: `oleh ${log.causer_name || 'Admin'} · ${formatDateTime(log.logged_at)}`,
614:                                             tone: 'text-emerald-600',
615:                                         });
616:                                     }
617:                                 });
618: 
619:                                 const lastEvent = invoiceActivityLogs[invoiceActivityLogs.length - 1]?.event;
620:                                 if (invoice.status === 'verifying' && ['payment_proof_submitted', 'payment_proof_resubmitted'].includes(lastEvent)) {
621:                                     invoiceEvents.push({
622:                                         label: 'Verifikasi pembayaran',
623:                                         value: 'Bukti sedang diperiksa admin',
624:                                         tone: 'text-gray-600',
625:                                     });
626:                                 }
627:                             } else if (invoice.proof_path) {
628:                                 invoiceEvents.push({
629:                                     label: 'Bukti bayar dikirim',
630:                                     value: proofTime,
631:                                     tone: 'text-gray-600',
632:                                 });
633: 
634:                                 if (invoice.status === 'invalid') {
635:                                     invoiceEvents.push({
636:                                         label: 'Bukti pembayaran ditolak',
637:                                         value: `oleh ${dataRequest.reviewer?.name || 'Admin'} · ${approvalTime}`,
638:                                         tone: 'text-red-600',
639:                                     });
640:                                 } else if (invoice.status === 'paid') {
641:                                     invoiceEvents.push({
642:                                         label: 'Verifikasi pembayaran',
643:                                         value: `oleh ${dataRequest.reviewer?.name || 'Admin'} · ${approvalTime}`,
644:                                         tone: 'text-emerald-600',
645:                                     });
646:                                 } else if (invoice.status === 'expired') {
647:                                     invoiceEvents.push({
648:                                         label: 'Invoice kedaluwarsa',
649:                                         value: expiredTime,
650:                                         tone: 'text-gray-600',
651:                                     });
652:                                 } else {
653:                                     invoiceEvents.push({
654:                                         label: 'Verifikasi pembayaran',
655:                                         value: 'Bukti sedang diperiksa admin',
656:                                         tone: 'text-gray-600',
657:                                     });
658:                                 }
659:                             } else {
660:                                 if (invoice.status === 'expired') {
661:                                     invoiceEvents.push({
662:                                         label: 'Invoice kedaluwarsa',
663:                                         value: expiredTime,
664:                                         tone: 'text-gray-600',
665:                                     });
666:                                 } else {
667:                                     invoiceEvents.push({
668:                                         label: 'Menunggu pembayaran',
669:                                         value: 'Menunggu bukti bayar',
670:                                         tone: 'text-gray-600',
671:                                     });
672:                                 }
673:                             }
674: 
675:                             if (invoice.status === 'expired' && !invoiceEvents.some((event) => event.label === 'Invoice kedaluwarsa')) {
676:                                 invoiceEvents.push({
677:                                     label: 'Invoice kedaluwarsa',
678:                                     value: expiredTime,
679:                                     tone: 'text-gray-600',
680:                                 });
681:                             }
682: 
683:                             return (
684:                                 <Fragment key={invoice.id}>
685:                                     <div className="rounded-2xl border-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/50 p-4 shadow-sm">
686:                                         <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-start sm:justify-between">
687:                                             <div className="space-y-1">
688:                                                 <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
689:                                                     <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-md border px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest ${
690:                                                         meta.tone === 'done'
691:                                                             ? 'text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50'
692:                                                             : meta.tone === 'rejected'
693:                                                                 ? 'text-red-700 border-red-200 bg-red-50'
694:                                                                 : meta.tone === 'expired'
695:                                                                     ? 'text-orange-700 border-orange-200 bg-orange-50'
696:                                                                     : 'text-yellow-700 border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50'
697:                                                     }`}>
698:                                                         {meta.label}
699:                                                     </span>
700:                                                     {shouldShowLatestTag && (
701:                                                         <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-gray-200 bg-white px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
702:                                                             Terbaru
703:                                                         </span>
704:                                                     )}
705:                                                 </div>
706:                                                 <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{formatCurrency(invoice.amount)}</p>
707:                                             </div>
708:                                         </div>
709: 
710:                                         <div className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 sm:grid-cols-2">
711:                                             <HistoryChip label="Billing" value={invoice.billing_code || 'Belum terdeteksi'} />
712:                                             <HistoryChip label="Batas Bayar" value={formatDateTime(invoice.expires_at)} />
713:                                         </div>
714: 
715:                                         <div className="mt-3">
716:                                             <p className="mb-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Dokumen Invoice</p>
717:                                             {invoice.invoice_path ? (
718:                                                 <div className="group flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-3.5 shadow-sm transition-all hover:border-gray-400">
719:                                                     <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center gap-3 overflow-hidden text-left">
720:                                                         <DocFileIcon />
721:                                                         <div className="min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
722:                                                             <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-gray-700">
723:                                                                 {`invoice-${dataRequest.request_code}.${invoice.invoice_path.split('.').pop().toLowerCase()}`}
724:                                                             </p>
725:                                                             <p className="truncate text-[9px] font-bold uppercase text-gray-400">Dokumen</p>
726:                                                         </div>
727:                                                     </div>
728:                                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
729:                                                         <button
730:                                                             type="button"
731:                                                             onClick={() =>
732:                                                                 setInvoicePreview({
733:                                                                     url: route('admin.data-requests.invoices.preview', [dataRequest.id, invoice.id]),
734:                                                                     title: `invoice-${dataRequest.request_code}.${invoice.invoice_path.split('.').pop().toLowerCase()}`,
735:                                                                     downloadUrl: route('admin.data-requests.invoices.download', [dataRequest.id, invoice.id]),
736:                                                                 })
737:                                                             }
738:                                                             className="rounded-lg bg-gray-50 p-2 text-gray-600 shadow-sm transition-all hover:bg-gray-600 hover:text-white"
739:                                                             title="Lihat Invoice"
740:                                                         >
741:                                                             <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
742:                                                         </button>
743:                                                         <a
744:                                                             href={route('admin.data-requests.invoices.download', [dataRequest.id, invoice.id])}
745:                                                             className="rounded-lg bg-gray-50 p-2 text-gray-600 shadow-sm transition-all hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white"
746:                                                             title="Unduh Invoice"
747:                                                         >
748:                                                             <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
749:                                                         </a>
750:                                                     </div>
751:                                                 </div>
752:                                             ) : (
753:                                                 <div className="rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3">
754:                                                     <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">Invoice belum tersedia.</p>
755:                                                 </div>
756:                                             )}
757:                                         </div>
758: 
759:                                         <div className="mt-4 border-t border-gray-200 pt-4 space-y-1">
760:                                             {[...invoiceEvents].reverse().map((event, eventIndex) => (
761:                                                 <TrackLine
762:                                                     key={`${invoice.id}-${event.label}-${eventIndex}`}
763:                                                     {...event}
764:                                                     isLast={eventIndex === invoiceEvents.length - 1}
765:                                                 />
766:                                             ))}
767:                                         </div>
768:                                     </div>
769:                                     {index < paymentCards.length - 1 && <PaymentCardConnector />}
770:                                 </Fragment>
771:                             );
772:                         }) : (
773:                             <div className="rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-gray-200 bg-white px-6 py-10 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">
774:                                 Belum ada histori pembayaran untuk ditampilkan.
775:                             </div>
776:                         )}
777:                     </div>
778:                 </section>
779:             ),
780:         },
781:         showDownloadSection && {
782:             key: 'download',
783:             node: (
784:                 <section className="rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-gray-100">
785:                     <div className="border-b border-gray-200 pb-3">
786:                         <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">Pemrosesan Data</p>
787:                     </div>
788:                     <div className="mt-4 space-y-1">
789:                         {processingEvents.map((event, index, array) => (
790:                             <TrackLine key={`download-${event.label}-${index}`} {...event} isLast={index === array.length - 1} />
791:                         ))}
792:                     </div>
793:                 </section>
794:             ),
795:         },
796:     ].filter(Boolean).reverse();
797: 
798:     return (
799:         <>
800:             <Transition show={show} leave="duration-200">
801:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={onClose}>
802:                     <TransitionChild
803:                         enter="ease-out duration-200"
804:                         enterFrom="opacity-0"
805:                         enterTo="opacity-100"
806:                         leave="ease-in duration-150"
807:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100"
808:                         leaveTo="opacity-0"
809:                     >
810:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" />
811:                     </TransitionChild>
812: 
813:                     <TransitionChild
814:                         enter="ease-out duration-200"
815:                         enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95 translate-y-2"
816:                         enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100 translate-y-0"
817:                         leave="ease-in duration-150"
818:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100 translate-y-0"
819:                         leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95 translate-y-2"
820:                     >
821:                         <div className="fixed inset-4 sm:inset-8 flex items-stretch justify-center">
822:                             <DialogPanel className="flex w-full max-w-5xl flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200">
823:                                 <div className="flex flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-200 px-5 py-3.5">
824:                                     <div className="min-w-0">
825:                                         <p className="text-sm font-bold tracking-wide text-gray-900">Linimasa Pengajuan</p>
826:                                     </div>
827:                                     <button
828:                                         type="button"
829:                                         onClick={onClose}
830:                                         aria-label="Tutup detail linimasa"
831:                                         className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600"
832:                                     >
833:                                         <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
834:                                     </button>
835:                                 </div>
836: 
837:                                 <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto bg-gray-50/40 p-4 sm:p-6">
838:                                     <div className="space-y-2">
839:                                         {sections.map((section, index) => (
840:                                             <Fragment key={section.key}>
841:                                                 {section.node}
842:                                                 {index < sections.length - 1 && <TimelineSeparator />}

848:                         </div>

851:             </Transition>
852: 
853:             <Transition show={!!invoicePreview} leave="duration-200">
854:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-[60]" onClose={() => setInvoicePreview(null)}>
855:                     <TransitionChild
856:                         enter="ease-out duration-200"
857:                         enterFrom="opacity-0"
858:                         enterTo="opacity-100"
859:                         leave="ease-in duration-150"
860:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100"
861:                         leaveTo="opacity-0"
862:                     >
863:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" />
864:                     </TransitionChild>
865: 
866:                     <TransitionChild
867:                         enter="ease-out duration-200"
868:                         enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95"
869:                         enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100"
870:                         leave="ease-in duration-150"
871:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100"
872:                         leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95"
873:                     >
874:                         <div className="fixed inset-4 sm:inset-8 flex items-stretch justify-center">
875:                             <DialogPanel className="flex w-full max-w-5xl flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200">
876:                                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-200 px-5 py-3.5">
