878:                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
879:                                         <a
880:                                             href={invoicePreview?.downloadUrl || invoicePreview?.url}
881:                                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-md border border-gray-200 bg-white px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 transition hover:bg-gray-50"

914: 
915: function PaymentCardConnector() {
916:     return (
917:         <div className="flex justify-center -my-px">
918:             <div className="flex w-5 shrink-0 flex-col items-center">
919:                 <div className="h-4 w-px bg-gray-300" />
920:                 <ChevronUpIcon className="-my-0.5 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
921:                 <div className="h-4 w-px bg-gray-300" />
922:             </div>
923:         </div>
924:     );
925: }
926: 
927: function TimelineSeparator() {
928:     return (
929:         <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-0">
930:             <div className="flex items-center">
931:                 <div className="h-px w-24 bg-gray-300" />
932:                 <ChevronDoubleUpIcon className="mx-3 h-8 w-10 text-gray-500" />
933:                 <div className="h-px w-24 bg-gray-300" />
934:             </div>
935:         </div>
936:     );
937: }
938: 
939: function TrackLine({ label, value, tone = 'text-gray-600', action = null, isLast = false }) {
940:     return (
941:         <div className="flex items-stretch gap-3">
942:             <div className="relative flex w-5 shrink-0 justify-center pt-1">
943:                 <span className="relative z-10 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-gray-400 ring-4 ring-gray-50" />
944:                 {!isLast && <span className="absolute left-1/2 top-4 bottom-0 -translate-x-1/2 w-px bg-gray-300" />}
945:             </div>
946:             <div className="min-w-0 pb-2.5">
947:                 <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">{label}</p>
948:                 <div className={`mt-0.5 text-xs font-semibold leading-relaxed ${tone}`}>{value}</div>
949:                 {action}
950:             </div>
951:         </div>
952:     );
953: }
954: 
955: function DocFileIcon({ label = 'PDF', color = 'bg-red-600' }) {
956:     return (
957:         <div className="relative w-6 h-8 flex-shrink-0">
958:             <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-white rounded-md shadow-sm border border-gray-200" />
959:             <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-3 h-3 bg-gray-100 rounded-bl-md border-l border-b border-gray-200" />
960:             <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-center">
961:                 <div className={`${color} px-1 py-0.5 rounded-sm shadow-sm`}>
962:                     <span className="text-[8px] font-bold text-white tracking-tight leading-none block">{label}</span>
963:                 </div>
964:             </div>
965:             <div className="absolute bottom-1.5 left-1.5 right-1.5">
966:                 <div className="h-0.5 bg-gray-200 rounded mb-0.5" />
967:                 <div className="h-0.5 bg-gray-200 rounded w-2/3" />
968:             </div>
969:         </div>
970:     );
971: }
972: 
973: function HistoryChip({ label, value }) {
974:     return (
975:         <div className="rounded-xl border border-gray-300 bg-gray-100 px-3 py-2">
976:             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">{label}</p>
977:             <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-800">{value || '—'}</p>
978:         </div>
979:     );
980: }

  1: import { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
  2: import { useForm } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';
  4: import {
  5:     ArrowDownTrayIcon,
  6:     EyeIcon,
  7:     XMarkIcon,
  8: } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  9: import VerificationDecisionButtons from './VerificationDecisionButtons';
 10: 
 11: const STATUS_META = {
 12:     not_submitted: {
 13:         label: 'Belum Diunggah',
 14:         classes: 'text-white border-gray-900 bg-gray-900',
 15:         description: '',
 16:     },
 17:     pending: {
 18:         label: 'Menunggu Verifikasi',
 19:         classes: 'text-amber-700 border-amber-200 bg-amber-50',
 20:         description: 'Bukti survey sudah diunggah dan menunggu verifikasi admin.',
 21:     },
 22:     approved: {
 23:         label: 'Disetujui',
 24:         classes: 'text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50',
 25:         description: 'Bukti survey valid dan sudah disetujui.',
 26:     },
 27:     rejected: {
 28:         label: 'Ditolak',
 29:         classes: 'text-rose-700 border-rose-200 bg-rose-50',
 30:         description: 'Bukti survey ditolak. Pengaju bisa unggah ulang bukti survey.',
 31:     },
 32: };
 33: 
 34: function formatDateTime(value) {
 35:     if (!value) return '-';
 36: 
 37:     return new Date(value).toLocaleString('id-ID', {
 38:         day: '2-digit',
 39:         month: 'short',
 40:         year: 'numeric',
 41:         hour: '2-digit',
 42:         minute: '2-digit',
 43:     });
 44: }
 45: 
 46: function isPdfFile(url = '') {
 47:     if (!url) return false;
 48: 
 49:     const normalizedUrl = url.split('?')[0].toLowerCase();
 50:     return normalizedUrl.endsWith('.pdf');
 51: }
 52: 
 53: export default function SurveyVerificationPanel({ dataRequest, surveys = [], availableSurveys = [] }) {
 54:     const [modalState, setModalState] = useState({ isOpen: false, survey: null, action: 'approve' });
 55:     const [previewState, setPreviewState] = useState({ isOpen: false, url: '', downloadUrl: '', title: '' });
 56:     const { data, setData, post, processing, errors, reset, clearErrors } = useForm({
 57:         action: 'approve',
 58:         rejection_reason: '',
 59:     });
 60: 
 61:     const surveyMap = useMemo(() => {
 62:         const map = new Map();
 63:         surveys.forEach((survey) => map.set(survey.survey_type, survey));
 64:         return map;
 65:     }, [surveys]);
 66: 
 67:     const availableMap = useMemo(() => {
 68:         const map = new Map();
 69:         availableSurveys.forEach((survey) => map.set(survey.value, survey));
 70:         return map;
 71:     }, [availableSurveys]);
 72: 
 73:     const requestRequiredSurveyTypes = dataRequest.effective_required_surveys ?? dataRequest.required_surveys ?? [];
 74:     const activeSurveyTypes = availableSurveys
 75:         .filter((survey) => survey.is_active)
 76:         .map((survey) => survey.value);
 77:     const hasSnapshot = dataRequest.required_surveys !== null && dataRequest.required_surveys !== undefined;
 78:     const requiredSurveyTypes = hasSnapshot
 79:         ? requestRequiredSurveyTypes
 80:         : Array.from(new Set([...requestRequiredSurveyTypes, ...activeSurveyTypes]));
 81:     const additionalSurveyTypes = surveys
 82:         .map((survey) => survey.survey_type)
 83:         .filter((surveyType) => !requiredSurveyTypes.includes(surveyType));
 84: 
 85:     const orderedSurveyTypes = [...requiredSurveyTypes, ...additionalSurveyTypes];
 86: 
 87:     if (orderedSurveyTypes.length === 0) {
 88:         return null;
 89:     }
 90: 
 91:     const closeModal = () => {
 92:         reset();
 93:         clearErrors();
 94:         setModalState({ isOpen: false, survey: null, action: 'approve' });
 95:         // No hover state needed for verification buttons anymore
 96:     };
 97: 
 98:     const openModal = (survey, action) => {
 99:         setData('action', action);
100:         setData('rejection_reason', '');
101:         setModalState({ isOpen: true, survey, action });
102:     };
103: 
104:     const openPreview = ({ url, downloadUrl, title }) => {
105:         setPreviewState({
106:             isOpen: true,
107:             url: url || downloadUrl || '',
108:             downloadUrl: downloadUrl || url || '',
109:             title: title || 'Bukti Survey',
110:         });
111:     };
112: 
113:     const closePreview = () => {
114:         setPreviewState({ isOpen: false, url: '', downloadUrl: '', title: '' });
115:     };
116: 
117:     const handleSubmit = (event) => {
118:         event.preventDefault();
119: 
120:         const survey = modalState.survey;
121:         if (!survey) return;
122: 
123:         post(
124:             route('admin.data-requests.surveys.verify', [dataRequest.id, survey.id]),
125:             {
126:                 preserveScroll: true,
127:                 onSuccess: () => closeModal(),
128:             }
129:         );
130:     };
131: 
132:     const rejectNeedsReason = modalState.action === 'reject' && !data.rejection_reason.trim();
133:     const submitDisabled = processing || rejectNeedsReason;
134: 
135:     // hover state for each survey button group (track which side is hovered)
136: 
137:     return (
138:         <>
139:             <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-gray-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
140:                 <div className="border-b-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/30 px-6 py-4 sm:px-7">
141:                     <h3 className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Verifikasi Bukti Survey</h3>
142:                 </div>
143: 
144:                 <div className="divide-y divide-gray-200 py-4 sm:py-5">
145:                     {orderedSurveyTypes.map((surveyType) => {
146:                         const survey = surveyMap.get(surveyType) ?? null;
147:                         const available = availableMap.get(surveyType);
148:                         const statusKey = survey?.status ?? 'not_submitted';
149:                         const meta = STATUS_META[statusKey] ?? STATUS_META.not_submitted;
150:                         const previewUrl = survey?.proof_preview_path || survey?.proof_download_path;
151:                         const downloadUrl = survey?.proof_download_path;
152: 
153:                         return (
154:                             <div key={surveyType} className={`${statusKey === 'not_submitted' ? 'px-6 py-3 first:pt-0 last:pb-0 sm:px-7' : 'px-6 py-3.5 first:pt-0 last:pb-0 sm:px-7'}`}>
155:                                 <div className={`flex flex-wrap justify-between gap-3 ${statusKey === 'not_submitted' ? 'items-center' : 'items-start'}`}>
156:                                     <div className={`min-w-0 flex-1 ${statusKey === 'not_submitted' ? '' : 'space-y-1'}`}>
157:                                         <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900 truncate">
158:                                             {available?.label ?? surveyType.toUpperCase()}
159:                                         </p>
160:                                         {meta.description && <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 line-clamp-2">{meta.description}</p>}
161:                                         {survey?.reviewed_at && (
162:                                             <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">
163:                                                 Ditinjau: {formatDateTime(survey.reviewed_at)}
164:                                             </p>
165:                                         )}
166:                                     </div>
167: 
168:                                     <div className="flex flex-col items-end gap-2">
169:                                         {statusKey !== 'pending' && (
170:                                             statusKey === 'approved' || statusKey === 'rejected'
171:                                                 ? (
172:                                                     <span
173:                                                         className={`inline-flex items-center text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest ${
174:                                                             statusKey === 'approved' ? 'text-emerald-700' : 'text-rose-700'
175:                                                         }`}
176:                                                     >
177:                                                         {meta.label}
178:                                                     </span>
179:                                                 )
180:                                                 : (
181:                                                     <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-md border px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest ${meta.classes}`}>
182:                                                         {meta.label}
183:                                                     </span>
184:                                                 )
185:                                         )}
186: 
187:                                         {(previewUrl || downloadUrl) && (
188:                                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
189:                                                 {previewUrl && (
190:                                                     <button
191:                                                         type="button"
192:                                                         onClick={() => openPreview({
193:                                                             url: previewUrl,
194:                                                             downloadUrl,
195:                                                             title: available?.label ?? surveyType.toUpperCase(),
196:                                                         })}
197:                                                         className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 transition hover:bg-gray-50"
198:                                                     >
199:                                                         <EyeIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
200:                                                         Lihat
201:                                                     </button>
202:                                                 )}
203:                                                 {downloadUrl && (
204:                                                     <a
205:                                                         href={downloadUrl}
206:                                                         className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 transition hover:bg-gray-50"
207:                                                     >
208:                                                         <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
209:                                                         Unduh
210:                                                     </a>
211:                                                 )}
212:                                             </div>
213:                                         )}
214:                                     </div>
215:                                 </div>
216: 
217:                                 {survey?.rejection_reason && (
218:                                     <div className="mt-3 rounded-xl border border-rose-200 bg-rose-50 px-3 py-2.5">
219:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-rose-500">Alasan Penolakan</p>
220:                                         <p className="mt-1 text-xs font-semibold text-rose-800">{survey.rejection_reason}</p>
221:                                     </div>
222:                                 )}
223: 
224:                                     {statusKey === 'pending' && survey && (
225:                                         <VerificationDecisionButtons
226:                                             approveLabel="Setujui Bukti"
227:                                             rejectLabel="Tolak Bukti"
228:                                             onApprove={() => openModal(survey, 'approve')}
229:                                             onReject={() => openModal(survey, 'reject')}
230:                                             className="mt-2.5"
231:                                         />
232:                                     )}
233:                             </div>
234:                         );
235:                     })}
236:                 </div>
237:             </div>
238: 
239:             <Transition show={modalState.isOpen} leave="duration-200">
240:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={closeModal}>
241:                     <TransitionChild
242:                         enter="ease-out duration-200"
243:                         enterFrom="opacity-0"
244:                         enterTo="opacity-100"
245:                         leave="ease-in duration-150"
246:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100"
247:                         leaveTo="opacity-0"
248:                     >
249:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" />
250:                     </TransitionChild>
251:                     <TransitionChild
252:                         enter="ease-out duration-200"
253:                         enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95 translate-y-2"
254:                         enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100 translate-y-0"
255:                         leave="ease-in duration-150"
256:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100 translate-y-0"
257:                         leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95 translate-y-2"
258:                     >
259:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
260:                             <DialogPanel className="relative w-full max-w-lg overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200">
261:                                 <form onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
262:                                     <div className="border-b border-gray-100 px-6 py-5">
263:                                         <button
264:                                             type="button"
265:                                             onClick={closeModal}
266:                                             className="absolute right-8 top-8 rounded-lg p-1 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600"
267:                                         >
268:                                             <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
269:                                         </button>
270:                                         <h3 className="pr-8 text-base font-bold text-gray-900">
271:                                             {modalState.action === 'approve' ? 'Setujui Bukti Survey' : 'Tolak Bukti Survey'}
272:                                         </h3>
273:                                     </div>
274: 
275:                                     <div className="space-y-4 px-6 py-5">
276:                                         {modalState.action === 'approve' && (
277:                                             <p className="text-sm leading-relaxed text-gray-600">
278:                                                 Apakah Anda yakin bukti survey ini valid dan sesuai? Pengaju akan langsung menerima hasil verifikasi setelah Anda melanjutkan.
279:                                             </p>
280:                                         )}
281: 
282:                                         {modalState.action === 'reject' && (
283:                                             <div>
284:                                                 <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
285:                                                     Alasan Penolakan <span className="text-rose-500">*</span>
286:                                                 </label>
287:                                                 <textarea
288:                                                     value={data.rejection_reason}
289:                                                     onChange={(event) => setData('rejection_reason', event.target.value)}
290:                                                     rows={4}
291:                                                     placeholder="Jelaskan alasan bukti survey ditolak..."
292:                                                     className="w-full resize-none rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-300 transition focus:border-gray-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0"
293:                                                 />
294:                                                 {errors.rejection_reason && (
295:                                                     <p className="mt-1.5 text-xs text-rose-600">{errors.rejection_reason}</p>
296:                                                 )}
297:                                             </div>
298:                                         )}
299: 
300:                                         {modalState.action === 'reject' && (
301:                                             <div className="border-t-2 border-gray-200 pt-4">
302:                                                 <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">Keterangan</p>
303:                                                 <div className="mt-1 border-l-2 border-red-500 pl-3">

305:                                                         Pengaju dapat mengirim ulang bukti survey setelah menerima alasan penolakan, dan pengaju akan langsung menerima notifikasi email penolakan.
306:                                                     </p>
307:                                                 </div>

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/DataRequests/Partials/UploadInvoiceModal.jsx
================
  1: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';
  2: import { useRef, useState } from 'react';
  3: import { useForm, usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';
  4: import {
  5:     DocumentArrowUpIcon,
  6:     DocumentTextIcon,
  7:     XMarkIcon,
  8:     CheckIcon,
  9: } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 10: import InputError from '@/Components/InputError';
 11: 
 12: export default function UploadInvoiceModal({ isOpen, onClose, dataRequestId }) {
 13:     const { uploadLimits } = usePage().props;
 14:     const invoiceLimitKB = uploadLimits?.invoice ?? 5120;
 15: 
 16:     const { data, setData, post, processing, errors, reset, clearErrors, setError } = useForm({
 17:         file: null,
 18:     });
 19: 
 20:     const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);
 21:     const fileInputRef = useRef(null);
 22: 
 23:     const handleClose = () => {
 24:         reset();
 25:         clearErrors();
 26:         onClose();
 27:     };
 28: 
 29:     const handleFileChange = (e) => {
 30:         const file = e.target.files?.[0];
 31:         if (file) {
 32:             if (file.size > invoiceLimitKB * 1024) {
 33:                 setError('file', `Ukuran file maksimal ${invoiceLimitKB / 1024}MB.`);
 34:                 setData('file', null);
 35:             } else {
 36:                 clearErrors('file');
 37:                 setData('file', file);
 38:             }
 39:         }
 40:     };
 41: 
 42:     const openFilePicker = () => {
 43:         if (fileInputRef.current) {
 44:             fileInputRef.current.value = '';
 45:         }
 46:         fileInputRef.current?.click();
 47:     };
 48: 
 49:     const handleDrop = (e) => {
 50:         e.preventDefault();
 51:         setIsDragging(false);
 52:         const file = e.dataTransfer.files?.[0];
 53:         if (file) {
 54:             if (file.size > invoiceLimitKB * 1024) {
 55:                 setError('file', `Ukuran file maksimal ${invoiceLimitKB / 1024}MB.`);
 56:                 setData('file', null);
 57:             } else {
 58:                 clearErrors('file');
 59:                 setData('file', file);
 60:             }
 61:         }
 62:     };
 63: 
 64:     const submit = (e) => {
 65:         e.preventDefault();
 66:         post(route('admin.data-requests.payment-invoice.store', dataRequestId), {
 67:             forceFormData: true,
 68:             preserveScroll: true,
 69:             onSuccess: () => handleClose(),
 70:         });
 71:     };
 72: 
 73:     return (
 74:         <Transition show={isOpen} leave="duration-200">
 75:             <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4" onClose={handleClose}>
 76:                 <TransitionChild
 77:                     enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0" enterTo="opacity-100"
 78:                     leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100" leaveTo="opacity-0"
 79:                 >
 80:                     <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" />
 81:                 </TransitionChild>
 82: 
 83:                 <TransitionChild
 84:                     enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95 translate-y-2" enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100 translate-y-0"
 85:                     leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100 translate-y-0" leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95 translate-y-2"
 86:                 >
 87:                     <DialogPanel className="w-full max-w-xl overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200 relative">
 88:                         <form onSubmit={submit}>
 89:                             {/* Header */}
 90:                             <div className="border-b border-gray-100 px-6 py-5">
 91:                                 <button
 92:                                     type="button"
 93:                                     onClick={handleClose}
 94:                                     className="absolute right-4 top-4 rounded-lg p-1 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600"
 95:                                 >
 96:                                     <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
 97:                                 </button>
 98:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 99:                                     <DocumentArrowUpIcon className="h-7 w-7 flex-shrink-0 text-gray-500" />
100:                                     <div>
101:                                         <h3 className="text-base font-bold text-gray-900">Unggah Dokumen Invoice / VA</h3>
102:                                         <p className="mt-0.5 text-xs text-gray-500">
103:                                             Kirimkan invoice pembayaran ke pengaju data.
104:                                         </p>
105:                                     </div>
106:                                 </div>
107:                             </div>
108: 
109:                             {/* Body */}
110:                             <div className="px-6 py-5 space-y-5">
111:                                 <div>
112:                                     <label className="mb-2 block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
113:                                         File Invoice/VA <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
114:                                     </label>
115:                                     <input
116:                                         ref={fileInputRef}
117:                                         type="file"
118:                                         accept=".pdf,image/*"
119:                                         className="hidden"
120:                                         onChange={handleFileChange}
121:                                     />
122:                                     {data.file ? (
123:                                         <label
124:                                             onClick={openFilePicker}
125:                                             className="flex w-full items-center gap-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-900 bg-gray-50 px-4 py-3 text-left transition-all hover:border-gray-500 hover:scale-[1.01] active:scale-[0.99]"
126:                                         >
127:                                             <div className="p-2 bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 shadow-sm shrink-0">
128:                                                 <DocumentTextIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-500" />
129:                                             </div>
130:                                             <div className="min-w-0 flex-1 text-left">
131:                                                 <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">{data.file.name}</p>
132:                                                 <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">Klik untuk pilih ulang · {(data.file.size / 1024).toFixed(0)} KB</p>
133:                                             </div>
134:                                             <div className="shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-900 p-1.5 text-white shadow-sm">
135:                                                 <CheckIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
136:                                             </div>
137:                                         </label>
138:                                     ) : (
139:                                         <button
140:                                             type="button"
141:                                             onClick={openFilePicker}
142:                                             onDragOver={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); setIsDragging(true); }}
143:                                             onDragLeave={() => setIsDragging(false)}
144:                                             onDrop={handleDrop}
145:                                             className={`w-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl border-2 border-dashed px-6 py-8 transition ${
146:                                                 isDragging
147:                                                     ? 'border-gray-900 bg-gray-50'
148:                                                     : 'border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/60 hover:border-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-50'
149:                                             }`}
150:                                         >
151:                                             <DocumentArrowUpIcon className="h-8 w-8 text-gray-300" />
152:                                             <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-500">Klik atau seret file PDF/Gambar ke sini</p>
153:                                             <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">Maks. {invoiceLimitKB / 1024} MB · PDF akan diekstrak otomatis</p>
154:                                         </button>
155:                                     )}
156:                                     <InputError message={errors.file} className="mt-2" />
157:                                 </div>
158:                             </div>
159: 
160:                             {/* Footer */}
161:                             <div className="flex justify-end gap-2.5 border-t border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/60 px-6 py-4">
162:                                 <button
163:                                     type="button"
164:                                     onClick={handleClose}
165:                                     disabled={processing}
166:                                     className="rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 shadow-sm transition hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:opacity-50"
167:                                 >
168:                                     Batal
169:                                 </button>
170:                                 <button
171:                                     type="submit"
172:                                     disabled={processing || !data.file}
173:                                     className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-bmkg-primary px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-white shadow-sm transition hover:bg-bmkg-primary/90 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 disabled:hover:bg-bmkg-primary"
174:                                 >
175:                                     {processing ? 'Menyimpan...' : 'Unggah Invoice'}
176:                                 </button>
177:                             </div>
178:                         </form>
179:                     </DialogPanel>
180:                 </TransitionChild>
181:             </Dialog>
182:         </Transition>
183:     );
184: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/DataRequests/Partials/UserProductUploadsPanel.jsx
================
 1: import { ArrowDownTrayIcon, EyeIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 2: 
 3: function formatDateTime(value) {
 4:     if (!value) {
 5:         return '-';
 6:     }
 7: 
 8:     return new Date(value).toLocaleString('id-ID', {
 9:         day: '2-digit',
10:         month: 'short',
11:         year: 'numeric',
12:         hour: '2-digit',
13:         minute: '2-digit',
14:     });
15: }
16: 
17: function formatFileSize(bytes = 0) {
18:     if (!bytes) {
19:         return '0 KB';
20:     }
21: 
22:     const kb = bytes / 1024;
23:     if (kb < 1024) {
24:         return `${Math.max(1, Math.round(kb))} KB`;
25:     }
26: 
27:     return `${(kb / 1024).toFixed(2)} MB`;
28: }
29: 
30: export default function UserProductUploadsPanel({ purposeType, productUploads = [] }) {
31:     const isNonCommercial = ['non_commercial_individu', 'non_commercial_instansi'].includes(purposeType);
32: 
33:     if (!isNonCommercial) {
34:         return null;
35:     }
36: 
37:     return (
38:         <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-gray-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
39:             <div className="border-b-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/30 px-7 py-4">
40:                 <h3 className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Hasil Produk/Penelitian</h3>
41:             </div>
42: 
43:             <div className="px-5 py-4 sm:px-6 sm:py-4">
44:                 {productUploads.length === 0 && (
45:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-3 py-1">
46:                         <p className="flex-1 pr-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
47:                             Dokumen akan tampil di sini setelah pengaju mengunggah hasil produk/penelitian.
48:                         </p>
49:                         <span className="ml-auto inline-flex shrink-0 items-center rounded-md border border-gray-900 bg-gray-900 px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest text-white">
50:                             Belum Diunggah
51:                         </span>
52:                     </div>
53:                 )}
54: 
55:                 {productUploads.length > 0 && (
56:                     <div className="divide-y divide-gray-200">
57:                         {productUploads.map((upload) => (
58:                             <div key={upload.id} className="py-3 first:pt-0 last:pb-0">
59:                                 <div className="flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-2.5">
60:                                     <div className="min-w-0 space-y-1">
61:                                         <p className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">{upload.original_name}</p>
62:                                         <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-x-4 gap-y-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
63:                                             <span>{formatFileSize(upload.file_size)}</span>
64:                                             <span>Diunggah: {formatDateTime(upload.created_at)}</span>
65:                                         </div>
66:                                     </div>
67: 
68:                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
69:                                         <a
70:                                             href={upload.preview_path}
71:                                             target="_blank"
72:                                             rel="noopener noreferrer"
73:                                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 transition hover:bg-gray-50"
74:                                         >
75:                                             <EyeIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
76:                                             Lihat
77:                                         </a>
78:                                         <a
79:                                             href={upload.download_path}
80:                                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 transition hover:bg-gray-50"
81:                                         >
82:                                             <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
83:                                             Unduh
84:                                         </a>
85:                                     </div>
86:                                 </div>
87:                             </div>
88:                         ))}
89:                     </div>
90:                 )}
91:             </div>
92:         </div>
93:     );
94: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/DataRequests/Partials/VerificationDecisionButtons.jsx
================
 1: export default function VerificationDecisionButtons({
 2:     approveLabel = 'Setujui',
 3:     rejectLabel = 'Tolak',
 4:     onApprove,
 5:     onReject,
 6:     disabled = false,
 7:     size = 'md',
 8:     className = '',
 9: }) {
10:     const sizeClassMap = {
11:         sm: {
12:             wrapper: 'h-8',
13:             approve: 'rounded-l-lg border px-3 text-[11px]',
14:             reject: 'rounded-r-lg border px-3 text-[11px]',
15:         },
16:         md: {
17:             wrapper: '',
18:             approve: 'rounded-l-xl border-2 py-2.5 text-sm',
19:             reject: 'rounded-r-xl border-2 py-2.5 text-sm',
20:         },
21:     };
22: 
23:     const sizeClass = sizeClassMap[size] ?? sizeClassMap.md;
24: 
25:     return (
26:         <div className={`flex ${sizeClass.wrapper} ${className}`}>
27:             <button
28:                 type="button"
29:                 onClick={onApprove}
30:                 disabled={disabled}
31:                 className={`relative z-0 -mr-[2px] flex flex-1 items-center justify-center ${sizeClass.approve} border-black bg-gray-900 font-semibold text-white transition-colors hover:z-10 hover:border-yellow-500 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50`}
32:             >
33:                 {approveLabel}
34:             </button>
35:             <button
36:                 type="button"
37:                 onClick={onReject}
38:                 disabled={disabled}
39:                 className={`relative z-0 flex flex-1 items-center justify-center ${sizeClass.reject} border-black bg-gray-400 font-semibold text-white transition-colors hover:z-10 hover:border-yellow-500 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50`}
40:             >
41:                 {rejectLabel}
42:             </button>
43:         </div>
44:     );
45: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/DataRequests/Partials/VerificationPanel.jsx
================
 1: import { useState } from 'react';
 2: import { router } from '@inertiajs/react';
 3: import ConfirmActionModal from './ConfirmActionModal';
 4: import VerificationDecisionButtons from './VerificationDecisionButtons';
 5: 
 6: /**
 7:  * @param {{
 8:  *   dataRequest: object,
 9:  *   rejectionTemplates: Array<{ id: string, title: string, body: string }>,
10:  *   mode?: 'card' | 'inline',
11:  * }} props
12:  */
13: export default function VerificationPanel({ dataRequest, rejectionTemplates, mode = 'card' }) {
14:     const [pendingAction, setPendingAction] = useState(null); // 'approve' | 'reject' | null
15:     const [processing, setProcessing] = useState(false);
16:     const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
17:     // Hover side state for verification action buttons ("approve" or "reject")
18: 
19:     const isPending = dataRequest.status === 'pending';
20: 
21:     if (!isPending) return null;
22: 
23:     const handleConfirm = (action, rejectionReason, vaData) => {
24:         setProcessing(true);
25:         setErrors({});
26: 
27:         const payload = {
28:             _method: 'put',
29:             action,
30:             ...(rejectionReason ? { rejection_reason: rejectionReason } : {}),
31:             ...(vaData ? { invoice_file: vaData } : {}),
32:         };
33: 
34:         router.post(
35:             route('admin.data-requests.verify', dataRequest.id),
36:             payload,
37:             {
38:                 onSuccess: () => {
39:                     setPendingAction(null);
40:                 },
41:                 onError: (errs) => {
42:                     setErrors(errs);
43:                     // Keep modal open on validation error
44:                 },
45:                 onFinish: () => setProcessing(false),
46:             }
47:         );
48:     };
49: 
50:     const isInline = mode === 'inline';
51:     const actionButtons = (
52:         <VerificationDecisionButtons
53:             onApprove={() => setPendingAction('approve')}
54:             onReject={() => setPendingAction('reject')}
55:             size={isInline ? 'sm' : 'md'}
56:             className={isInline ? 'w-full md:w-auto md:min-w-[264px]' : 'mt-2.5'}
57:         />
58:     );
59: 
60:     return (
61:         <>
62:             {mode === 'inline' ? actionButtons : (
63:                 <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-gray-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
64:                     <div className="border-b-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/30 px-8 pb-3 pt-5">
65:                         <h3 className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Aksi Verifikasi</h3>
66:                         <p className="mt-0.5 text-xs text-gray-400">
67:                             Tinjau seluruh dokumen sebelum membuat keputusan.
68:                         </p>
69:                     </div>
70:                     {actionButtons}
71:                 </div>
72:             )}
73: 
74:             {/* Confirmation modal */}
75:             <ConfirmActionModal
76:                 action={pendingAction}
77:                 purposeType={dataRequest.purpose_type}
78:                 onConfirm={handleConfirm}
79:                 onCancel={() => {
80:                     if (!processing) setPendingAction(null);
81:                 }}
82:                 processing={processing}
83:                 rejectionTemplates={rejectionTemplates}
84:                 errors={errors}
85:             />
86:         </>
87:     );
88: }

  1: import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  2: import { Head, Link } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import { ChevronLeftIcon, XCircleIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  4: 
  5: import AuthenticatedLayout from '@/Layouts/AuthenticatedLayout';
  6:

 18: export default function Show({ dataRequest, rejectionTemplates, ocrReviewInvoiceId = null, surveys = [], availableSurveys = [], productUploads = [] }) {
 19:     const [previewDoc, setPreviewDoc] = useState(null);
 20:     const [isOcrReviewOpen, setIsOcrReviewOpen] = useState(!!ocrReviewInvoiceId);
 21:     const normalizedStatusKey = dataRequest.admin_status_key ?? dataRequest.status;
 22:     const statusMap = {
 23:         pending: 0,
 24:         rejected: 0,
 25:         payment_required: 1,
 26:         payment_verifying: 1,
 27:         payment_invalid: 1,
 28:         expired: 1,
 29:         invoice_reissue_requested: 1,
 30:         payment_verified: 2,
 31:         data_processing: 2,
 32:         complaint: 2,
 33:         survey_waiting_input: 2,
 34:         survey_verification: 2,
 35:         survey_rejected: 2,
 36:         processing: 2,
 37:         completed: 2,
 38:     };
 39:     const isPending     = dataRequest.status === 'pending';
 40:     const isRejected    = dataRequest.status === 'rejected';
 41:     const maxReachedStep = statusMap[normalizedStatusKey] ?? 0;
 42:     const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(maxReachedStep);
 43:     const hasSubmissionDocuments = (dataRequest.documents?.length ?? 0) > 0;
 44:     const isPaymentContext = [
 45:         'payment_required',
 46:         'payment_verifying',
 47:         'payment_invalid',
 48:         'expired',
 49:         'invoice_reissue_requested',
 50:         'payment_verified',
 51:         'data_processing',
 52:         'complaint',
 53:         'survey_waiting_input',
 54:         'survey_verification',
 55:         'survey_rejected',
 56:         'processing',
 57:         'completed',
 58:     ].includes(normalizedStatusKey)
 59:         || !!dataRequest.activeInvoice
 60:         || !!dataRequest.active_invoice;
 61:     const effectiveRequiredSurveys = dataRequest.effective_required_surveys ?? dataRequest.required_surveys ?? [];
 62:     const hasSurveyWorkflow = effectiveRequiredSurveys.length > 0 || surveys.length > 0;
 63:     const isProcessingContext = [
 64:         'payment_verified',
 65:         'data_processing',
 66:         'complaint',
 67:         'survey_waiting_input',
 68:         'survey_verification',
 69:         'survey_rejected',
 70:         'processing',
 71:         'completed',
 72:     ].includes(normalizedStatusKey);
 73:     const reviewInvoice = (dataRequest.invoices ?? []).find((invoice) => invoice.id === ocrReviewInvoiceId)
 74:         ?? dataRequest.activeInvoice
 75:         ?? dataRequest.active_invoice
 76:         ?? null;
 77: 
 78:     useEffect(() => {
 79:         if (ocrReviewInvoiceId) {
 80:             setIsOcrReviewOpen(true);
 81:         }
 82:     }, [ocrReviewInvoiceId]);
 83: 
 84:     useEffect(() => {
 85:         // Keep visible tab aligned with latest verified status after an admin action.
 86:         setActiveTab((previousTab) => {
 87:             if (previousTab === maxReachedStep) {
 88:                 return previousTab;
 89:             }
 90: 
 91:             return maxReachedStep;
 92:         });
 93:     }, [maxReachedStep]);
 94: 
 95:     return (
 96:         <AuthenticatedLayout
 97:             header={<h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">Detail Pengajuan</h2>}
 98:         >
 99:             <Head title={`Detail ${dataRequest.request_code}`} />
100: 
101:             <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50/50 pb-10 w-full">
102:                 {/* Full-width white header */}
103:                 <div className="mb-8 border-b-2 border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-10 sm:px-8">
104:                     <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-6">
105:                         <div>
106:                             <h1 className="text-3xl font-extrabold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Detail Pengajuan</h1>
107:                             <p className="mt-2 text-gray-500 text-base font-mono">{dataRequest.request_code}</p>
108:                         </div>
109:                         <Link
110:                             href={route('admin.data-requests.index')}
111:                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm shrink-0 w-fit self-start md:self-auto"
112:                         >
113:                             <ChevronLeftIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
114:                             Kembali
115:                         </Link>
116:                     </div>
117:                 </div>
118: 
119:                 <div className="w-full px-4 sm:px-8 space-y-6">
120:                     <RequestInfoCard dataRequest={dataRequest} />
121:                     <RequestTimeline
122:                         dataRequest={dataRequest}
123:                         maxReachedStep={maxReachedStep}
124:                         onTabChange={setActiveTab}
125:                     />
126: 
127:                     {activeTab === 0 && (
128:                         <div className="space-y-6">
129:                             {hasSubmissionDocuments ? (
130:                                 <DocumentList
131:                                     documents={dataRequest.documents}
132:                                     dataRequestId={dataRequest.id}
133:                                     onPreview={setPreviewDoc}
134:                                     helperText={isPending ? 'Periksa dokumen pendukung lalu ambil keputusan verifikasi.' : null}
135:                                     headerAction={isPending ? (
136:                                         <VerificationPanel
137:                                             dataRequest={dataRequest}
138:                                             rejectionTemplates={rejectionTemplates}
139:                                             mode="inline"
140:                                         />
141:                                     ) : null}
142:                                 />
143:                             ) : (
144:                                 <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-gray-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
145:                                     <div className="border-b-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/30 px-8 py-5">
146:                                         <h3 className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Dokumen Pendukung</h3>
147:                                         <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-400">Belum ada dokumen pendukung yang tersedia pada pengajuan ini.</p>
148:                                     </div>
149:                                 </div>
150:                             )}
151: 
152:                             {isPending && !hasSubmissionDocuments && (
153:                                 <VerificationPanel
154:                                     dataRequest={dataRequest}
155:                                     rejectionTemplates={rejectionTemplates}
156:                                 />
157:                             )}
158: 
159:                             {isRejected && dataRequest.rejection_reason && (
160:                                 <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-gray-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
161:                                     <div className="border-b-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/30 px-8 py-6">
162:                                         <h3 className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Alasan Penolakan</h3>
163:                                     </div>
164:                                     <div className="px-8 py-6 flex gap-4 items-start">
165:                                         <XCircleIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-red-500 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
166:                                         <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 leading-relaxed">
167:                                             {dataRequest.rejection_reason}
168:                                         </p>
169:                                     </div>
170:                                 </div>
171:                             )}
172:                         </div>
173:                     )}
174: 
175:                     {activeTab === 1 && isPaymentContext && (
176:                         <PaymentPanel dataRequest={dataRequest} />
177:                     )}
178: 
179:                     {activeTab === 2 && isProcessingContext && (
180:                         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 xl:grid-cols-2 xl:items-start">
181:                             <div>
182:                                 <ProcessedDataPanel
183:                                     dataRequest={dataRequest}
184:                                     onPreview={setPreviewDoc}
185:                                 />
186:                             </div>
187:                             <div className="space-y-6">

190:                                         dataRequest={dataRequest}
191:                                         surveys={surveys}
192:                                         availableSurveys={availableSurveys}
193:                                     />
194:                                 ) : (
195:                                     <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-gray-300 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
196:                                         <div className="border-b-2 border-gray-300 bg-gray-50/30 px-8 py-5">
197:                                             <h3 className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">Bukti Isi Survey</h3>
198:                                             <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-400">Belum ada survei yang harus diverifikasi pada tahap ini.</p>
199:                                         </div>
200:                                         <div className="px-8 py-5">
201:                                             <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 leading-relaxed">
202:                                                 Kolom ini akan terisi otomatis ketika pengaju mengirim bukti survey atau ketika survei wajib sudah ditetapkan.
203:                                             </p>
204:                                         </div>
205:                                     </div>
206:                                 )}
207: 
208:                                 <UserProductUploadsPanel
209:                                     purposeType={dataRequest.purpose_type}
210:                                     productUploads={productUploads}
211:                                 />
212:                             </div>
213:                         </div>
214:                     )}
215:                 </div>
216:             </div>
217: 
218:             {/* PDF Preview Modal */}
219:             <DocumentPreviewModal
220:                 document={previewDoc}
221:                 dataRequestId={dataRequest.id}
222:                 onClose={() => setPreviewDoc(null)}
223:             />
224: 
225:             {reviewInvoice && (

228:                     onClose={() => setIsOcrReviewOpen(false)}

234:     );

 1: import AuthenticatedLayout from '@/Layouts/AuthenticatedLayout';
 2: import { Head, Link, useForm } from '@inertiajs/react';

 5: 
 6: export default function Edit({ faq }) {
 7:     const { data, setData, post, processing, errors, reset } = useForm({
 8:         _method: 'PUT',
 9:         question: faq.question ?? '',
10:         answer: faq.answer ?? '',
11:         is_active: faq.is_active ?? true,
12:         order: faq.order ?? 1,
13:         file: null,
14:     });
15: 
16:     const handleSubmit = (e) => {
17:         e.preventDefault();
18:         post(route('admin.faqs.update', faq.id), { forceFormData: true });
19:     };
20: 
21:     return (
22:         <AuthenticatedLayout header={<h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">Edit FAQ</h2>}>
23:             <Head title="Edit FAQ — Admin" />
24: 
25:             <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50/50 pb-12">
26:                 <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-4 sm:px-8 py-10 mb-8">
27:                     <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-6">
28:                         <div>
29:                             <h1 className="text-3xl font-extrabold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Ubah FAQ</h1>
30:                             <p className="mt-2 text-gray-500 text-base">
31:                                 Perbarui pertanyaan, jawaban, atau berkas terkait.
32:                             </p>
33:                         </div>
34:                         <Link
35:                             href={route('admin.faqs.index')}
36:                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600 shadow-sm hover:bg-gray-50"
37:                         >

39:                             Kembali ke daftar
40:                         </Link>
41:                     </div>
42:                 </div>

44:                 <div className="w-full px-4 sm:px-8">
45:                     <FaqForm
46:                         title="Formulir FAQ"
47:                         submitLabel="Perbarui FAQ"
48:                         isCreateMode={false}
49:                         data={data}
50:                         setData={setData}
51:                         errors={errors}
52:                         processing={processing}
53:                         existingFile={faq.original_filename}
54:                         onRemoveFile={() => setData('file', null)}
55:                         onSubmit={handleSubmit}
56:                         onCancel={() => reset()}
57:                     />
58:                 </div>
59:             </div>
