 32: 
 33: export default function Index({ faqs = [] }) {
 34:     const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
 35:     const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('all');
 36:     const [searchScope, setSearchScope] = useState('all');
 37:     const [draggingFaqId, setDraggingFaqId] = useState(null);
 38:     const [dragOverFaqId, setDragOverFaqId] = useState(null);
 39:     const [activeWheelFaqId, setActiveWheelFaqId] = useState(null);
 40:     const [wheelPanelPos, setWheelPanelPos] = useState({ top: 0, left: 0 });
 41:     const [togglingFaqId, setTogglingFaqId] = useState(null);
 42:     const wheelRefs = useRef({});
 43:     const wheelPanelRef = useRef(null);
 44:     const wheelTriggerRefs = useRef({});
 45: 
 46:     const [showFormModal, setShowFormModal] = useState(false);
 47:     const [formMode, setFormMode] = useState('create'); // 'create' | 'edit'
 48:     const [editingFaq, setEditingFaq] = useState(null);
 49: 
 50:     const [showDeleteModal, setShowDeleteModal] = useState(false);
 51:     const [deleteFaq, setDeleteFaq] = useState(null);
 52: 
 53:     const [orderedFaqs, setOrderedFaqs] = useState(() =>
 54:         [...faqs].sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order)
 55:     );
 56: 
 57:     // Keep local state in sync when faqs prop changes (e.g., after reload)
 58:     useEffect(() => {
 59:         setOrderedFaqs([...faqs].sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order));
 60:     }, [faqs]);
 61: 
 62:     const positionWheelPanel = (faqId) => {
 63:         const triggerEl = wheelTriggerRefs.current[faqId];
 64:         if (!triggerEl) {
 65:             return;
 66:         }
 67: 
 68:         const rect = triggerEl.getBoundingClientRect();
 69:         const panelWidth = 56;
 70:         const gap = 8;
 71: 
 72:         let left = rect.right + gap;
 73:         if (left + panelWidth > window.innerWidth - 8) {
 74:             left = rect.left - panelWidth - gap;
 75:         }
 76: 
 77:         const top = rect.top + rect.height / 2;
 78: 
 79:         setWheelPanelPos({ top, left });
 80:     };
 81: 
 82:     const toggleWheel = (faqId) => {
 83:         setActiveWheelFaqId((prev) => {
 84:             if (prev === faqId) {
 85:                 return null;
 86:             }
 87: 
 88:             positionWheelPanel(faqId);
 89:             return faqId;
 90:         });
 91:     };
 92: 
 93:     useEffect(() => {
 94:         if (!activeWheelFaqId) return;
 95: 
 96:         const wheelEl = wheelRefs.current[activeWheelFaqId];
 97:         wheelEl?.focus();
 98:     }, [activeWheelFaqId]);
 99: 
100:     useEffect(() => {
101:         if (!activeWheelFaqId) return;
102: 
103:         const handleClickOutside = (event) => {
104:             const panelEl = wheelPanelRef.current;
105:             const triggerEl = wheelTriggerRefs.current[activeWheelFaqId];
106: 
107:             if (panelEl?.contains(event.target) || triggerEl?.contains(event.target)) {
108:                 return;
109:             }
110: 
111:             setActiveWheelFaqId(null);
112:         };
113: 
114:         document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
115: 
116:         return () => {
117:             document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
118:         };
119:     }, [activeWheelFaqId]);
120: 
121:     useEffect(() => {
122:         if (!activeWheelFaqId) return;
123: 
124:         const panelEl = wheelPanelRef.current;
125:         const selectedEl = panelEl?.querySelector('[data-selected="true"]');
126:         selectedEl?.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' });
127:     }, [activeWheelFaqId, orderedFaqs]);
128: 
129:     useEffect(() => {
130:         if (!activeWheelFaqId) return;
131: 
132:         const handleViewportChange = () => {
133:             positionWheelPanel(activeWheelFaqId);
134:         };
135: 
136:         window.addEventListener('resize', handleViewportChange);
137:         window.addEventListener('scroll', handleViewportChange, true);
138: 
139:         return () => {
140:             window.removeEventListener('resize', handleViewportChange);
141:             window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleViewportChange, true);
142:         };
143:     }, [activeWheelFaqId]);
144: 
145:     const { data, setData, post, processing, errors, clearErrors } = useForm({
146:         _method: 'POST',
147:         question: '',
148:         answer: '',
149:         is_active: true,
150:         is_featured: false,
151:         order: null,
152:         file: null,
153:     });
154: 
155:     const filteredFaqs = useMemo(() => {
156:         const normalizedSearch = search.trim().toLowerCase();
157:         return orderedFaqs
158:             .filter((faq) => {
159:                 if (statusFilter === 'active') return faq.is_active;
160:                 if (statusFilter === 'inactive') return !faq.is_active;
161:                 return true;
162:             })
163:             .filter((faq) => {
164:                 if (!normalizedSearch) return true;
165: 
166:                 const inQuestion = faq.question.toLowerCase().includes(normalizedSearch);
167:                 const plainAnswer = (faq.answer || '').replace(/<[^>]*>?/gm, '');
168:                 const inAnswer = plainAnswer.toLowerCase().includes(normalizedSearch);
169:                 const inAttachment = (faq.original_filename ?? '').toLowerCase().includes(normalizedSearch);
170: 
171:                 if (searchScope === 'question') return inQuestion;
172:                 if (searchScope === 'answer') return inAnswer;
173:                 if (searchScope === 'attachment') return inAttachment;
174: 
175:                 return (
176:                     inQuestion || inAnswer || inAttachment
177:                 );
178:             });
179:     }, [orderedFaqs, search, statusFilter, searchScope]);
180: 
181:     const hasPendingOrderChanges = useMemo(() => {
182:         const initialOrderIds = [...faqs]
183:             .sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order)
184:             .map((faq) => faq.id);
185:         const currentOrderIds = orderedFaqs.map((faq) => faq.id);
186: 
187:         if (initialOrderIds.length !== currentOrderIds.length) {
188:             return true;
189:         }
190: 
191:         return currentOrderIds.some((id, index) => id !== initialOrderIds[index]);
192:     }, [faqs, orderedFaqs]);
193: 
194:     const openCreateModal = () => {
195:         setFormMode('create');
196:         setEditingFaq(null);
197:         clearErrors();
198:         setData({
199:             _method: 'POST',
200:             question: '',
201:             answer: '',
202:             is_active: true,
203:             is_featured: false,
204:             order: null,
205:             file: null,
206:         });
207:         setShowFormModal(true);
208:     };
209: 
210:     const openEditModal = (faq) => {
211:         setFormMode('edit');
212:         setEditingFaq(faq);
213:         clearErrors();
214:         setData({
215:             _method: 'PUT',
216:             question: faq.question ?? '',
217:             answer: faq.answer ?? '',
218:             is_active: Boolean(faq.is_active),
219:             is_featured: Boolean(faq.is_featured),
220:             order: faq.order ?? 1,
221:             file: null,
222:         });
223:         setShowFormModal(true);
224:     };
225: 
226:     const handleFormSubmit = (e) => {
227:         e.preventDefault();
228: 
229:         if (formMode === 'create') {
230:             post(route('admin.faqs.store'), {
231:                 forceFormData: true,
232:                 onSuccess: () => setShowFormModal(false),
233:             });
234:             return;
235:         }
236: 
237:         if (formMode === 'edit' && editingFaq) {
238:             post(route('admin.faqs.update', editingFaq.id), {
239:                 forceFormData: true,
240:                 onSuccess: () => setShowFormModal(false),
241:             });
242:         }
243:     };
244: 
245:     const openDeleteModal = (faq) => {
246:         setDeleteFaq(faq);
247:         setShowDeleteModal(true);
248:     };
249: 
250:     const handleDelete = () => {
251:         if (!deleteFaq) return;
252: 
253:         router.delete(route('admin.faqs.destroy', deleteFaq.id), {
254:             onSuccess: () => {
255:                 setShowDeleteModal(false);
256:                 setDeleteFaq(null);
257:             },
258:         });
259:     };
260: 
261:     const postReorder = (onSuccess, preserveState = false) => {
262:         const orders = {};
263:         orderedFaqs.forEach((orderedFaq, idx) => {
264:             orders[orderedFaq.id] = idx + 1;
265:         });
266: 
267:         router.post(route('admin.faqs.reorder'), { orders }, {
268:             preserveScroll: true,
269:             preserveState,
270:             onSuccess,
271:         });
272:     };
273: 
274:     const performToggleActive = (faq) => {
275:         setTogglingFaqId(faq.id);
276: 
277:         router.post(route('admin.faqs.update', faq.id), {
278:             _method: 'PUT',
279:             is_active: !faq.is_active,
280:         }, {
281:             preserveScroll: true,
282:             preserveState: true,
283:             onFinish: () => setTogglingFaqId(null),
284:         });
285:     };
286: 
287:     const handleToggleActive = (faq) => {
288:         if (hasPendingOrderChanges) {
289:             postReorder(() => {
290:                 performToggleActive(faq);
291:             }, true);
292:             return;
293:         }
294: 
295:         performToggleActive(faq);
296:     };
297: 
298:     const clampOrder = (value, maxOrder) => {
299:         if (!Number.isFinite(value)) {
300:             return 1;
301:         }
302: 
303:         return Math.min(maxOrder, Math.max(1, value));
304:     };
305: 
306:     const getFaqOrder = (faqId) => {
307:         const index = orderedFaqs.findIndex((faq) => faq.id === faqId);
308:         return index >= 0 ? index + 1 : 1;
309:     };
310: 
311:     const moveFaqToOrder = (faqId, requestedOrder) => {
312:         setOrderedFaqs((prev) => {
313:             const sourceIndex = prev.findIndex((faq) => faq.id === faqId);
314:             if (sourceIndex < 0) {
315:                 return prev;
316:             }
317: 
318:             const maxOrder = prev.length;
319:             const safeOrder = clampOrder(
320:                 requestedOrder,
321:                 maxOrder,
322:             );
323:             const targetIndex = safeOrder - 1;
324: 
325:             if (targetIndex === sourceIndex) {
326:                 return prev;
327:             }
328: 
329:             const next = [...prev];
330:             const [movedFaq] = next.splice(sourceIndex, 1);
331:             next.splice(targetIndex, 0, movedFaq);
332: 
333:             return next;
334:         });
335:     };
336: 
337:     const handleOrderStep = (faqId, delta) => {
338:         const currentOrder = getFaqOrder(faqId);
339:         moveFaqToOrder(faqId, currentOrder + delta);
340:     };
341: 
342:     const handleRowDragStart = (faqId) => {
343:         setDraggingFaqId(faqId);
344:     };
345: 
346:     const handleRowDragOver = (event, faqId) => {
347:         event.preventDefault();
348:         if (dragOverFaqId !== faqId) {
349:             setDragOverFaqId(faqId);
350:         }
351:     };
352: 
353:     const handleRowDrop = (event, targetFaqId) => {
354:         event.preventDefault();
355: 
356:         if (!draggingFaqId || draggingFaqId === targetFaqId) {
357:             setDraggingFaqId(null);
358:             setDragOverFaqId(null);
359:             return;
360:         }
361: 
362:         setOrderedFaqs((prev) => {
363:             const sourceIndex = prev.findIndex((faq) => faq.id === draggingFaqId);
364:             const targetIndex = prev.findIndex((faq) => faq.id === targetFaqId);
365: 
366:             if (sourceIndex < 0 || targetIndex < 0) {
367:                 return prev;
368:             }
369: 
370:             const next = [...prev];
371:             const [movedFaq] = next.splice(sourceIndex, 1);
372:             next.splice(targetIndex, 0, movedFaq);
373:             return next;
374:         });
375: 
376:         setDraggingFaqId(null);
377:         setDragOverFaqId(null);
378:     };
379: 
380:     const handleRowDragEnd = () => {
381:         setDraggingFaqId(null);
382:         setDragOverFaqId(null);
383:     };
384: 
385:     const saveOrder = () => {
386:         postReorder(() => {
387:             // keep ordering consistent with server
388:         });
389:     };
390: 
391:     return (
392:         <AuthenticatedLayout header={<h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">Kelola FAQ</h2>}>
393:             <Head title="FAQ — Admin" />
394: 
395:             <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50/50 pb-12">
396:                 <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-4 sm:px-8 py-10 mb-8">
397:                     <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-6">
398:                         <div>
399:                             <h1 className="text-3xl font-extrabold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Kelola FAQ</h1>
400:                             <p className="mt-2 text-gray-500 text-base">
401:                                 Tambahkan, ubah, atau urutkan FAQ yang ditampilkan di halaman publik.
402:                             </p>
403:                         </div>
404:                         <AddActionButton label="Tambah FAQ" onClick={openCreateModal} />
405:                     </div>
406:                 </div>
407: 
408:                 <div className="w-full px-4 sm:px-8">
409:                     <div className="rounded-2xl bg-white p-5 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-gray-100 mb-6">
410:                         <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-4">
411:                             <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:items-center">
412:                                 <SearchBar
413:                                     value={search}
414:                                     onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
415:                                     onSearch={() => {}}
416:                                     placeholder="Cari FAQ..."
417:                                     containerClassName="flex-1"
418:                                 />
419: 
420:                                 <CustomSelect
421:                                     value={statusFilter}
422:                                     onChange={(value) => setStatusFilter(value)}
423:                                     options={[
424:                                         { value: 'all', label: 'Semua Status' },
425:                                         { value: 'active', label: 'Aktif' },
426:                                         { value: 'inactive', label: 'Tidak Aktif' },
427:                                     ]}
428:                                     placeholder="Semua Status"
429:                                     containerClassName="relative w-full sm:w-[200px] select-none"
430:                                 />
431: 
432:                                 <CustomSelect
433:                                     value={searchScope}
434:                                     onChange={(value) => setSearchScope(value)}
435:                                     options={[
436:                                         { value: 'all', label: 'Cari Semua Field' },
437:                                         { value: 'question', label: 'Hanya Pertanyaan' },
438:                                         { value: 'answer', label: 'Hanya Jawaban' },
439:                                         { value: 'attachment', label: 'Nama Lampiran' },
440:                                     ]}
441:                                     placeholder="Cari Semua Field"
442:                                     containerClassName="relative w-full sm:w-[220px] select-none"
443:                                 />
444:                             </div>
445: 
446:                             <button
447:                                 type="button"
448:                                 onClick={saveOrder}
449:                                 className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-yellow-300 bg-yellow-400 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 shadow-sm hover:bg-yellow-300"
450:                             >
451:                                 Simpan Urutan
452:                             </button>
453:                         </div>
454:                     </div>
455: 
456:                     <p className="mb-4 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500">
457:                         Gunakan drag-and-drop untuk urut cepat, atau klik angka urutan untuk membuka wheel. Lalu klik Simpan Urutan.
458:                     </p>
459: 
460:                     <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-sm border-2 border-gray-300">
461:                         <table className="min-w-full table-fixed border-collapse text-sm">
462:                             <thead className="bg-gray-50 border-b-2 border-gray-300 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500">
463:                                 <tr>
464:                                     <th className="w-32 px-4 py-3 text-center">Urutan</th>
465:                                     <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left">Pertanyaan</th>
466:                                     <th className="w-32 px-4 py-3 text-center">Status</th>
467:                                     <th className="w-24 px-4 py-3 text-center">Lampiran</th>
468:                                     <th className="w-44 border-l-2 border-gray-300 px-4 py-3 text-center">Aksi</th>
469:                                 </tr>
470:                             </thead>
471:                             <tbody className="divide-y-2 divide-gray-300">
472:                                 {filteredFaqs.length === 0 ? (
473:                                     <tr>
474:                                         <td colSpan={5} className="px-4 py-6 text-center text-sm text-gray-400">
475:                                             Tidak ada FAQ yang cocok.
476:                                         </td>
477:                                     </tr>
478:                                 ) : (
479:                                     filteredFaqs.map((faq) => {
480:                                         const currentOrder = getFaqOrder(faq.id);
481:                                         const isDragOver = dragOverFaqId === faq.id;
482:                                         return (
483:                                             <tr
484:                                                 key={faq.id}
485:                                                 draggable={activeWheelFaqId !== faq.id}
486:                                                 onDragStart={() => handleRowDragStart(faq.id)}
487:                                                 onDragOver={(event) => handleRowDragOver(event, faq.id)}
488:                                                 onDrop={(event) => handleRowDrop(event, faq.id)}
489:                                                 onDragEnd={handleRowDragEnd}
490:                                                 className={`transition-colors ${isDragOver ? 'bg-yellow-100' : 'hover:bg-yellow-50'} ${draggingFaqId === faq.id ? 'opacity-70 ring-1 ring-inset ring-yellow-300 cursor-grabbing' : ''}`}
491:                                             >
492:                                                 <td className="px-4 py-4 text-center font-medium text-gray-700">
493:                                                     <div className="relative inline-flex items-center overflow-visible">
494:                                                         <button
495:                                                             type="button"
496:                                                             ref={(el) => {
497:                                                                 wheelTriggerRefs.current[faq.id] = el;
498:                                                                 wheelRefs.current[faq.id] = el;
499:                                                             }}
500:                                                             onClick={() => toggleWheel(faq.id)}
501:                                                             onKeyDown={(event) => {
502:                                                                 if (event.key === 'ArrowUp') {
503:                                                                     event.preventDefault();
504:                                                                     setActiveWheelFaqId(null);
505:                                                                     handleOrderStep(faq.id, -1);
506:                                                                 }
507: 
508:                                                                 if (event.key === 'ArrowDown') {
509:                                                                     event.preventDefault();
510:                                                                     setActiveWheelFaqId(null);
511:                                                                     handleOrderStep(faq.id, 1);
512:                                                                 }
513: 
514:                                                                 if (event.key === 'Escape') {
515:                                                                     event.preventDefault();
516:                                                                     setActiveWheelFaqId(null);
517:                                                                 }
518:                                                             }}
519:                                                             className={`inline-flex h-9 w-12 items-center justify-center gap-0.5 rounded-lg border bg-white text-sm font-semibold text-gray-800 transition ${activeWheelFaqId === faq.id ? 'border-yellow-400 ring-2 ring-yellow-300' : 'border-gray-300 hover:border-yellow-300 hover:bg-yellow-50'}`}
520:                                                         >
521:                                                             <span>{currentOrder}</span>
522:                                                             <ChevronUpDownIcon className="h-3 w-3 text-gray-400" />
523:                                                         </button>
524:                                                     </div>
525:                                                 </td>
526:                                                 <td className="px-4 py-4">
527:                                                     <div className="font-semibold text-gray-900 line-clamp-2">{faq.question}</div>
528:                                                     <div className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500 line-clamp-2">{(faq.answer || '').replace(/<[^>]*>?/gm, '')}</div>
529:                                                 </td>
530:                                                 <td className="px-4 py-4 text-center">
531:                                                     <InlineStatusToggle
532:                                                         active={Boolean(faq.is_active)}
533:                                                         activeLabel="Aktif"
534:                                                         inactiveLabel="Tidak Aktif"
535:                                                         processing={togglingFaqId === faq.id}
536:                                                         onToggle={() => handleToggleActive(faq)}
537:                                                     />
538:                                                 </td>
539:                                                 <td className="px-4 py-4 text-center">
540:                                                     {faq.file_path ? (
541:                                                         <div className="group relative inline-flex items-center justify-center">
542:                                                             <a
543:                                                                 href={route('faqs.download-document', faq.id)}
544:                                                                 target="_blank"
545:                                                                 rel="noopener noreferrer"
546:                                                                 className="inline-flex rounded-lg p-1.5 transition-colors hover:bg-gray-100"
547:                                                                 aria-label={faq.original_filename || 'Lampiran PDF'}
548:                                                             >
549:                                                                 <FaqPdfIcon />
550:                                                             </a>
551:                                                             <div className="pointer-events-none absolute -top-8 left-1/2 z-20 w-max max-w-[220px] -translate-x-1/2 rounded-md bg-gray-900 px-2 py-1 text-[11px] font-medium text-white opacity-0 shadow-lg transition-opacity duration-150 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100">
552:                                                                 {faq.original_filename || 'Lampiran PDF'}
553:                                                             </div>
554:                                                         </div>
555:                                                     ) : (
556:                                                         <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">-</span>
557:                                                     )}
558:                                                 </td>
559:                                                 <td className="relative border-l-2 border-gray-300 p-0">
560:                                                     <TableActionTextButtons
561:                                                         onEdit={() => openEditModal(faq)}
562:                                                         onDelete={() => openDeleteModal(faq)}
563:                                                         editLabel="Ubah"
564:                                                         deleteLabel="Hapus"
565:                                                         mode="split"
566:                                                         showIcons={false}
567:                                                         fillCell
568:                                                     />
569:                                                 </td>
570:                                             </tr>
571:                                         );
572:                                     })
573:                                 )}
574:                             </tbody>
575:                         </table>
576:                     </div>
577:                 </div>
578: 
579:                 {activeWheelFaqId && (
580:                     <div
581:                         ref={wheelPanelRef}
582:                         className="fixed z-50 h-32 w-14 -translate-y-1/2 overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white shadow-2xl"
583:                         style={{ top: `${wheelPanelPos.top}px`, left: `${wheelPanelPos.left}px` }}
584:                         onMouseDown={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
585:                     >
586:                         <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 top-0 z-10 h-6 bg-gradient-to-b from-white via-white/90 to-transparent" />
587:                         <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 z-10 h-6 bg-gradient-to-t from-white via-white/90 to-transparent" />
588:                         <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 top-1/2 z-10 h-px -translate-y-1/2 bg-yellow-200/80" />
589:                         <div className="relative h-full overflow-y-auto">
590:                             <div className="h-12" />
591:                             {Array.from({ length: orderedFaqs.length }, (_, i) => i + 1).map((orderNumber) => {
592:                                 const currentOrder = getFaqOrder(activeWheelFaqId);
593:                                 const isSelected = orderNumber === currentOrder;
594: 
595:                                 return (
596:                                     <button
597:                                         key={`floating-wheel-${orderNumber}`}
598:                                         type="button"
599:                                         data-selected={isSelected}
600:                                         draggable={false}
601:                                         onClick={() => {
602:                                             moveFaqToOrder(activeWheelFaqId, orderNumber);
603:                                             setActiveWheelFaqId(null);
604:                                         }}
605:                                         className={`block h-8 w-full text-center text-sm font-semibold transition-colors ${isSelected ? 'bg-yellow-100 text-gray-900' : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:text-gray-800'}`}
606:                                     >
607:                                         {orderNumber}
608:                                     </button>
609:                                 );
610:                             })}
611:                             <div className="h-12" />
612:                         </div>
613:                     </div>
614:                 )}
615: 
616:                 {/* Create / Edit Modal */}
617:                 <Modal show={showFormModal} onClose={() => setShowFormModal(false)} maxWidth="lg">
618:                     <div className="flex max-h-[calc(100vh-6rem)] flex-col">
619:                         <div className="border-b border-gray-200 px-5 py-4 sm:px-6">
620:                             <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">
621:                                 {formMode === 'create' ? 'Tambah FAQ Baru' : 'Edit FAQ'}
622:                             </h2>
623:                             <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-gray-500">
624:                                 Isi form di bawah. Panel akan scroll jika kontennya panjang.
625:                             </p>
626:                         </div>
627:                         <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-4 sm:px-6 sm:py-5">
628:                             <FaqForm
629:                                 title={formMode === 'create' ? 'Formulir FAQ Baru' : 'Formulir Edit FAQ'}
630:                                 submitLabel={formMode === 'create' ? 'Simpan FAQ' : 'Perbarui FAQ'}
631:                                 isCreateMode={formMode === 'create'}
632:                                 data={data}
633:                                 setData={setData}
634:                                 errors={errors}
635:                                 processing={processing}
636:                                 existingFile={editingFaq?.original_filename}
637:                                 onRemoveFile={() => setData('file', null)}
638:                                 onCancel={() => setShowFormModal(false)}
639:                                 onSubmit={handleFormSubmit}
640:                             />
641:                         </div>
642:                     </div>
643:                 </Modal>
644: 
645:                 {/* Delete Confirmation */}
646:                 <Modal show={showDeleteModal} onClose={() => setShowDeleteModal(false)}>
647:                     <div className="p-6">
648:                         <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">Konfirmasi Hapus</h2>
649:                         <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
650:                             Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus FAQ berikut?
651:                         </p>
652:                         <p className="mt-4 font-semibold text-gray-900">{deleteFaq?.question}</p>
653:                         <div className="mt-6 flex justify-end gap-3">
654:                             <SecondaryButton type="button" onClick={() => setShowDeleteModal(false)}>
655:                                 Batal
656:                             </SecondaryButton>
657:                             <PrimaryButton
658:                                 type="button"
659:                                 onClick={handleDelete}
660:                                 className="!bg-red-600 hover:!bg-red-700 focus:!bg-red-700 focus:!ring-red-500 active:!bg-red-800"
661:                             >
662:                                 Hapus FAQ
663:                             </PrimaryButton>
664:                         </div>
665:                     </div>
666:                 </Modal>
667:             </div>
668:         </AuthenticatedLayout>
669:     );
670: }

File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/Faqs/Partials/FaqForm.jsx
================
  1: import InputError from '@/Components/InputError';
  2: import TextInput from '@/Components/TextInput';
  3: import PrimaryButton from '@/Components/PrimaryButton';
  4: import SecondaryButton from '@/Components/SecondaryButton';
  5: import { CustomSelect } from '@/Components/FilterComponents';
  6: import { useRef } from 'react';
  7: 
  8: export default function FaqForm({
  9:     title,
 10:     submitLabel,
 11:     isCreateMode = false,
 12:     data,
 13:     setData,
 14:     errors,
 15:     processing,
 16:     onSubmit,
 17:     onCancel,
 18:     existingFile,
 19:     onRemoveFile,
 20: }) {
 21:     const answerRef = useRef(null);
 22: 
 23:     const insertMarkdown = (prefix, suffix = '', placeholder = '') => {
 24:         const el = answerRef.current;
 25:         if (!el) return;
 26: 
 27:         const start = el.selectionStart ?? 0;
 28:         const end = el.selectionEnd ?? 0;
 29:         const current = data.answer ?? '';
 30:         const selected = current.slice(start, end) || placeholder;
 31:         const next = `${current.slice(0, start)}${prefix}${selected}${suffix}${current.slice(end)}`;
 32: 
 33:         setData('answer', next);
 34: 
 35:         requestAnimationFrame(() => {
 36:             el.focus();
 37:             const caret = start + prefix.length + selected.length + suffix.length;
 38:             el.setSelectionRange(caret, caret);
 39:         });
 40:     };
 41: 
 42:     const insertList = (ordered = false) => {
 43:         const el = answerRef.current;
 44:         if (!el) return;
 45: 
 46:         const start = el.selectionStart ?? 0;
 47:         const end = el.selectionEnd ?? 0;
 48:         const current = data.answer ?? '';
 49:         const selected = current.slice(start, end).trim();
 50: 
 51:         const lines = selected
 52:             ? selected.split('\n').map((line, idx) => (ordered ? `${idx + 1}. ${line.replace(/^[-*]\s+|^\d+\.\s+/, '')}` : `- ${line.replace(/^[-*]\s+|^\d+\.\s+/, '')}`))
 53:             : [ordered ? '1. Item' : '- Item'];
 54: 
 55:         const block = lines.join('\n');
 56:         const next = `${current.slice(0, start)}${block}${current.slice(end)}`;
 57:         setData('answer', next);
 58: 
 59:         requestAnimationFrame(() => {
 60:             el.focus();
 61:             const caret = start + block.length;
 62:             el.setSelectionRange(caret, caret);
 63:         });
 64:     };
 65: 
 66:     const insertLink = () => {
 67:         insertMarkdown('[', '](https://...)', 'teks-link');
 68:     };
 69: 
 70:     return (
 71:         <div className="space-y-4 rounded-2xl bg-white p-5 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-gray-100">
 72:             <div>
 73:                 <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">{title}</h2>
 74:                 <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-gray-500">
 75:                     Gunakan formulir ini untuk menambahkan atau memperbarui FAQ.
 76:                 </p>
 77:             </div>
 78: 
 79:             <form onSubmit={onSubmit}>
 80:                 <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4">
 81:                     <div>
 82:                         <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Pertanyaan</label>
 83:                         <TextInput
 84:                             value={data.question}
 85:                             onChange={(e) => setData('question', e.target.value)}
 86:                             className="mt-1 w-full focus:border-yellow-400 focus:ring-yellow-400"
 87:                             placeholder="Contoh: Bagaimana cara mengajukan permintaan data?"
 88:                         />
 89:                         <InputError message={errors.question} className="mt-1" />
 90:                     </div>
 91: 
 92:                     <div>
 93:                         <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Jawaban</label>
 94:                         <div className="mt-2 mb-2 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
 95:                             <button
 96:                                 type="button"
 97:                                 onClick={() => insertMarkdown('**', '**', 'teks tebal')}
 98:                                 className="rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-2 py-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
 99:                             >
100:                                 Bold
101:                             </button>
102:                             <button
103:                                 type="button"
104:                                 onClick={() => insertMarkdown('*', '*', 'teks miring')}
105:                                 className="rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-2 py-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
106:                             >
107:                                 Italic
108:                             </button>
109:                             <button
110:                                 type="button"
111:                                 onClick={() => insertList(false)}
112:                                 className="rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-2 py-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
113:                             >
114:                                 Bullet List
115:                             </button>
116:                             <button
117:                                 type="button"
118:                                 onClick={() => insertList(true)}
119:                                 className="rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-2 py-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
120:                             >
121:                                 Numbered List
122:                             </button>
123:                             <button
124:                                 type="button"
125:                                 onClick={insertLink}
126:                                 className="rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-2 py-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
127:                             >
128:                                 Link
129:                             </button>
130:                         </div>
131:                         <div className="mt-1">
132:                             <textarea
133:                                 ref={answerRef}
134:                                 value={data.answer}
135:                                 onChange={(e) => setData('answer', e.target.value)}
136:                                 rows={6}
137:                                 placeholder="Tulis jawaban FAQ dalam Markdown. Contoh:\n- Langkah 1\n- Langkah 2\n\nLihat [panduan](https://...)"
138:                                 className="w-full rounded-xl border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 focus:border-yellow-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-yellow-200"
139:                             />
140:                             <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
141:                                 Mendukung format Markdown (list, link, bold, italic).
142:                             </p>
143:                         </div>
144:                         <InputError message={errors.answer} className="mt-1" />
145:                     </div>
146: 
147:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
148:                         <div>
149:                             <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Status FAQ</label>
150:                             <div className="mt-1">
151:                                 <CustomSelect
152:                                     value={data.is_active ? 'active' : 'inactive'}
153:                                     onChange={(value) => setData('is_active', value === 'active')}
154:                                     options={[
155:                                         { value: 'active', label: 'Aktif' },
156:                                         { value: 'inactive', label: 'Tidak Aktif' },
157:                                     ]}
158:                                     placeholder="Status FAQ"
159:                                     containerClassName="relative w-full select-none"
160:                                 />
161:                             </div>
162:                             <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
163:                                 Status aktif akan menampilkan FAQ di halaman publik.
164:                             </p>
165:                             <InputError message={errors.is_active} className="mt-1" />
166:                         </div>
167: 
168:                         <div>
169:                             <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Tampilkan di Landing Page</label>
170:                             <div className="mt-1">
171:                                 <CustomSelect
172:                                     value={data.is_featured ? 'featured' : 'dashboard_only'}
173:                                     onChange={(value) => setData('is_featured', value === 'featured')}
174:                                     options={[
175:                                         { value: 'dashboard_only', label: 'Hanya Dashboard' },
176:                                         { value: 'featured', label: 'Tampil di Landing Page' },
177:                                     ]}
178:                                     placeholder="Pilih visibilitas"
179:                                     containerClassName="relative w-full select-none"
180:                                 />
181:                             </div>
182:                             <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
183:                                 FAQ hanya tampil di landing page jika status aktif dan featured.
184:                             </p>
185:                             <InputError message={errors.is_featured} className="mt-1" />
186:                         </div>
187: 
188:                         <div>
189:                             <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Urutan tampil</label>
190:                             <TextInput
191:                                 type="number"
192:                                 value={data.order ?? ''}
193:                                 onChange={(e) => setData('order', e.target.value === '' ? null : Number(e.target.value))}
194:                                 className="mt-1 w-full focus:border-yellow-400 focus:ring-yellow-400"
195:                                 min={1}
196:                                 placeholder={isCreateMode ? 'Kosongkan untuk urutan otomatis' : 'Contoh: 1'}
197:                             />
198:                             <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
199:                                 Mengubah urutan akan menggeser posisi FAQ lainnya.
200:                             </p>
201:                             {isCreateMode && (
202:                                 <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
203:                                     Jika dikosongkan, sistem akan menempatkan FAQ ini pada urutan terakhir terbaru saat disimpan.
204:                                 </p>
205:                             )}
206:                             <InputError message={errors.order} className="mt-1" />
207:                         </div>
208:                     </div>
209: 
210:                     <div>
211:                         <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Lampiran PDF (opsional)</label>
212:                         <input
213:                             type="file"
214:                             accept="application/pdf"
215:                             onChange={(e) => setData('file', e.target.files?.[0] ?? null)}
216:                             className="mt-1 block w-full text-sm text-gray-500 file:mr-4 file:rounded-md file:border-0 file:bg-gray-100 file:px-3 file:py-2 file:text-sm file:font-semibold file:text-gray-700 hover:file:bg-gray-200"
217:                         />
218:                         {existingFile && (
219:                             <div className="mt-2 flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg bg-gray-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm">
220:                                 <span className="truncate">{existingFile}</span>
221:                                 <button
222:                                     type="button"
223:                                     onClick={onRemoveFile}
224:                                     className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 hover:text-gray-900"
225:                                 >
226:                                     Hapus berkas
227:                                 </button>
228:                             </div>
229:                         )}
230:                         <InputError message={errors.file} className="mt-1" />
231:                     </div>
232: 
233:                     <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3">
234:                         <SecondaryButton type="button" onClick={onCancel}>
235:                             Batal
236:                         </SecondaryButton>
237:                         <PrimaryButton type="submit" disabled={processing}>
238:                             {processing ? 'Menyimpan...' : submitLabel}
239:                         </PrimaryButton>
240:                     </div>
241:                 </div>
242:             </form>
243:         </div>
244:     );

File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/Reports/DataRequestExport.jsx

  1: import AuthenticatedLayout from '@/Layouts/AuthenticatedLayout';
  2: import { Head, router } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
  4: import { ArrowDownTrayIcon, ArrowPathIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  5: import { CustomDateRangePicker, CustomSelect } from '@/Components/FilterComponents';
  6: 
  7: function formatDateLabel(value) {
  8:     if (!value) return '-';
  9: 
 10:     const parsed = new Date(`${value}T00:00:00`);
 11:     if (Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime())) return value;
 12: 
 13:     return parsed.toLocaleDateString('id-ID', {
 14:         day: '2-digit',
 15:         month: 'short',
 16:         year: 'numeric',
 17:     });
 18: }
 19: 
 20: function todayIso() {
 21:     return new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
 22: }
 23: 
 24: function shiftDaysIso(totalDays) {
 25:     const date = new Date();
 26:     date.setDate(date.getDate() - totalDays);
 27:     return date.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
 28: }
 29: 
 30: function startOfCurrentMonthIso() {
 31:     const date = new Date();
 32:     date.setDate(1);
 33:     return date.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
 34: }
 35: 
 36: function formatCellValue(value, heading) {
 37:     if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') {
 38:         return '-';
 39:     }
 40: 
 41:     if (heading === 'Nominal (Rp.)' && typeof value === 'number') {
 42:         return new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID').format(value);
 43:     }
 44: 
 45:     return String(value);
 46: }
 47: 
 48: export default function DataRequestExport({ filters = {}, statusOptions = [], headings = [], previewRows = [], previewMeta = { limit: 25, total: 0 } }) {
 49:     const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(filters?.start_date ?? '');
 50:     const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState(filters?.end_date ?? '');
 51:     const [status, setStatus] = useState(filters?.status ?? '');
 52:     const [userStartDate, setUserStartDate] = useState('');
 53:     const [userEndDate, setUserEndDate] = useState('');
 54:     const [mode, setMode] = useState('requests'); // 'requests' | 'users'
 55: 
 56:     const statusSelectOptions = useMemo(() => ([
 57:         { value: '', label: 'Semua Status' },
 58:         ...statusOptions,
 59:     ]), [statusOptions]);
 60: 
 61:     const selectedStatusLabel = useMemo(() => {
 62:         return statusSelectOptions.find((option) => option.value === status)?.label || 'Semua Status';
 63:     }, [status, statusSelectOptions]);
 64: 
 65:     const hasInvalidDateRange = useMemo(() => {
 66:         if (!startDate || !endDate) return false;
 67: 
 68:         return new Date(startDate) > new Date(endDate);
 69:     }, [startDate, endDate]);
 70: 
 71:     const hasInvalidUserDateRange = useMemo(() => {
 72:         if (!userStartDate || !userEndDate) return false;
 73: 
 74:         return new Date(userStartDate) > new Date(userEndDate);
 75:     }, [userStartDate, userEndDate]);
 76:     const applyQuickRange = (nextStart, nextEnd) => {
 77:         setStartDate(nextStart);
 78:         setEndDate(nextEnd);
 79:     };
 80: 
 81:     const applyUserQuickRange = (nextStart, nextEnd) => {
 82:         setUserStartDate(nextStart);
 83:         setUserEndDate(nextEnd);
 84:     };
 85:     const buildFilterPayload = (withPreview = false) => {
 86:         if (mode === 'users') {
 87:             return {
 88:                 start_date: userStartDate || undefined,
 89:                 end_date: userEndDate || undefined,
 90:                 report: 'users',
 91:                 preview: withPreview ? 1 : undefined,
 92:             };
 93:         }
 94: 
 95:         return {
 96:             start_date: startDate || undefined,
 97:             end_date: endDate || undefined,
 98:             status: status || undefined,
 99:             report: 'requests',
100:             preview: withPreview ? 1 : undefined,
101:         };
102:     };
103: 
104:     const handleApplyPreview = () => {
105:         if (hasInvalidDateRange) {
106:             return;
107:         }
108: 
109:         router.get(route('admin.reports.data-requests.index'), buildFilterPayload(true), {
110:             preserveState: true,
111:             preserveScroll: true,
112:             replace: true,
113:         });
114:     };
115: 
116:     const handleApplyPreviewUser = () => {
117:         if (hasInvalidUserDateRange) {
118:             return;
119:         }
120: 
121:         const params = {
122:             start_date: userStartDate || undefined,
123:             end_date: userEndDate || undefined,
124:             report: 'users',
125:             preview: 1,
126:         };
127: 
128:         router.get(route('admin.reports.data-requests.index'), params, {
129:             preserveState: true,
130:             preserveScroll: true,
131:             replace: true,
132:         });
133:     };
134: 
135:     const handleDownload = () => {
136:         if (hasInvalidDateRange) {
137:             return;
138:         }
139: 
140:         const params = new URLSearchParams();
141: 
142:         if (startDate) params.append('start_date', startDate);
143:         if (endDate) params.append('end_date', endDate);
144:         if (status) params.append('status', status);
145: 
146:         const queryString = params.toString();
147:         const exportUrl = queryString
148:             ? `${route('admin.data-requests.export')}?${queryString}`
149:             : route('admin.data-requests.export');
150: 
151:         window.open(exportUrl, '_blank');
152:     };
153: 
154:     const handleDownloadUser = () => {
155:         if (hasInvalidUserDateRange) {
156:             return;
157:         }
158: 
159:         const params = new URLSearchParams();
160: 
161:         if (userStartDate) params.append('start_date', userStartDate);
162:         if (userEndDate) params.append('end_date', userEndDate);
163: 
164:         const queryString = params.toString();
165:         const exportUrl = queryString
166:             ? `${route('admin.users.export')}?${queryString}`
167:             : route('admin.users.export');
168: 
169:         window.open(exportUrl, '_blank');
170:     };
171:     const handleReset = () => {
172:         setStartDate('');
173:         setEndDate('');
174:         setStatus('');
175: 
176:         router.get(route('admin.reports.data-requests.index'), {}, {
177:             preserveState: true,
178:             preserveScroll: true,
179:             replace: true,
180:         });
181:     };
182: 
183:     const handleUserReset = () => {
184:         setUserStartDate('');
185:         setUserEndDate('');
186:     };
187:     return (
188:         <AuthenticatedLayout header={<h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">Laporan</h2>}>
189:             <Head title="Laporan Data Request" />
190: 
191:             <div className="min-h-screen w-full bg-gray-50/50 pb-10">
192:                 <div className="mb-8 border-b border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-10 sm:px-8">
193:                     <h1 className="text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-gray-900">Laporan Data Request</h1>
194:                     <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
195:                         Halaman ini dipakai untuk membuat file Excel laporan dari data pengajuan. Pilih filter, tampilkan preview, lalu unduh.
196:                     </p>
197:                 </div>
198: 
199:                 <div className="w-full space-y-6 px-4 sm:px-8">
200:                     <section className="relative z-20 overflow-visible rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
201:                         <div className="border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/30 px-6 py-5 sm:px-8">
202:                             <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">Filter Laporan</h3>
203:                             <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
204:                                 Jika tidak memilih filter, sistem akan mengunduh semua data.
205:                             </p>
206:                         </div>
207: 
208:                         <div className="space-y-5 px-6 py-5 sm:px-8">
209:                             <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full border border-amber-100 bg-amber-50 p-1">
210:                                 <button
211:                                     type="button"
212:                                     onClick={() => setMode('requests')}
213:                                     className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold rounded-lg transition-all duration-300 ${
214:                                         mode === 'requests'
215:                                             ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow'
216:                                             : 'text-gray-700'
217:                                     }`}
218:                                 >
219:                                     Laporan Pengajuan
220:                                 </button>
221:                                 <button
222:                                     type="button"
223:                                     onClick={() => setMode('users')}
224:                                     className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold rounded-lg transition-all duration-300 ${
225:                                         mode === 'users'
226:                                             ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow'
227:                                             : 'text-gray-700'
228:                                     }`}
229:                                 >
230:                                     Laporan Pengguna
231:                                 </button>
232:                             </div>
233: 
234:                             {mode === 'requests' ? (
235:                                 <>
236:                                     <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
237:                                         <button
238:                                             type="button"
239:                                             onClick={() => applyQuickRange(shiftDaysIso(7), todayIso())}
240:                                             className="rounded-full border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-600 transition hover:bg-gray-50"

283:                                     {hasInvalidDateRange && (
284:                                         <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-rose-600">
285:                                             Tanggal akhir tidak boleh lebih kecil dari tanggal awal.
286:                                         </p>
287:                                     )}
288: 
289:                                     <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-end gap-2 border-t border-gray-100 pt-4">
290:                                         <button
291:                                             type="button"
292:                                             onClick={handleReset}
293:                                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-600 transition hover:bg-gray-50"
294:                                         >
295:                                             <ArrowPathIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
296:                                             Reset
297:                                         </button>
298: 
299:                                         <button
300:                                             type="button"
301:                                             onClick={handleApplyPreview}
302:                                             disabled={hasInvalidDateRange}
303:                                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-700 transition hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50"
304:                                         >
305:                                             Tampilkan Preview
306:                                         </button>
307: 
308:                                         <button
309:                                             type="button"
310:                                             onClick={handleDownload}
311:                                             disabled={hasInvalidDateRange}
312:                                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-gray-900 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-white transition hover:bg-black disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 disabled:hover:bg-gray-900"
313:                                         >
314:                                             <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
315:                                             Unduh Excel
316:                                         </button>
317:                                     </div>
318:                                 </>
319:                             ) : (
320:                                 <>
321:                                     <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
322:                                         <button
323:                                             type="button"
324:                                             onClick={() => applyUserQuickRange(shiftDaysIso(7), todayIso())}
325:                                             className="rounded-full border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-600 transition hover:bg-gray-50"
326:                                         >
327:                                             7 Hari Terakhir
328:                                         </button>
329:                                         <button
330:                                             type="button"
331:                                             onClick={() => applyUserQuickRange(shiftDaysIso(30), todayIso())}
332:                                             className="rounded-full border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-600 transition hover:bg-gray-50"
333:                                         >
334:                                             30 Hari Terakhir
335:                                         </button>
336:                                         <button
337:                                             type="button"
338:                                             onClick={() => applyUserQuickRange(startOfCurrentMonthIso(), todayIso())}
339:                                             className="rounded-full border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-600 transition hover:bg-gray-50"
340:                                         >
341:                                             Bulan Berjalan
342:                                         </button>
343:                                     </div>
344: 
345:                                     <div className="relative z-30">
346:                                         <div className="space-y-1.5">
347:                                             <p className="px-1 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">Rentang Tanggal Pendaftaran</p>
348:                                             <CustomDateRangePicker
349:                                                 startDate={userStartDate}
350:                                                 endDate={userEndDate}
351:                                                 onStartChange={setUserStartDate}
352:                                                 onEndChange={setUserEndDate}
353:                                             />
354:                                         </div>
355:                                     </div>
356: 
357:                                     {hasInvalidUserDateRange && (
358:                                         <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-rose-600">
359:                                             Tanggal akhir tidak boleh lebih kecil dari tanggal awal.
360:                                         </p>
361:                                     )}
362: 
363:                                     <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-end gap-2 border-t border-gray-100 pt-4">
364:                                         <button
365:                                             type="button"
366:                                             onClick={handleUserReset}
367:                                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-600 transition hover:bg-gray-50"
368:                                         >
369:                                             <ArrowPathIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
370:                                             Reset
371:                                         </button>
372:

374:                                             type="button"
375:                                             onClick={handleApplyPreviewUser}
376:                                             disabled={hasInvalidUserDateRange}
377:                                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-700 transition hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50"
378:                                         >
379:                                             Tampilkan Preview
380:                                         </button>
381: 
382:                                         <button
383:                                             type="button"
384:                                             onClick={handleDownloadUser}
385:                                             disabled={hasInvalidUserDateRange}
386:                                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-gray-900 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-white transition hover:bg-black disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 disabled:hover:bg-gray-900"
387:                                         >
388:                                             <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
389:                                             Unduh Excel
390:                                         </button>
391:                                     </div>
392:                                 </>
393:                             )}
394:                         </div>
395:                     </section>
396: 
397:                     <section className="relative z-10 overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40">
398:                         <div className="border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/30 px-6 py-5 sm:px-8">
399:                             <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">Preview Data Laporan</h3>
400:                             <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
401:                                 {previewMeta?.is_requested
402:                                     ? `Menampilkan ${previewRows.length} dari ${previewMeta?.total ?? 0} baris yang akan diunduh.`
403:                                     : 'Preview belum ditampilkan. Klik tombol Tampilkan Preview untuk memuat data.'}
404:                             </p>
405:                         </div>
406: 
407:                         <div className="overflow-x-auto">
408:                             <table className="min-w-full divide-y divide-gray-200">
409:                                 <thead className="bg-gray-50">
410:                                     <tr>
411:                                         {headings.map((heading) => (
412:                                             <th
413:                                                 key={heading}
414:                                                 className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500"
415:                                             >
416:                                                 {heading}
417:                                             </th>
418:                                         ))}
419:                                     </tr>
420:                                 </thead>
421:                                 <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100 bg-white">
422:                                     {previewRows.length > 0 ? (
423:                                         previewRows.map((row, rowIndex) => (
424:                                             <tr key={`preview-row-${rowIndex}`} className="hover:bg-gray-50/70">
425:                                                 {row.map((value, valueIndex) => (
426:                                                     <td key={`preview-cell-${rowIndex}-${valueIndex}`} className="px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-gray-700">
427:                                                         {formatCellValue(value, headings[valueIndex])}
428:                                                     </td>
429:                                                 ))}
430:                                             </tr>
431:                                         ))
432:                                     ) : (
433:                                         <tr>
434:                                             <td colSpan={headings.length || 1} className="px-4 py-8 text-center text-sm font-medium text-gray-500">
435:                                                 {previewMeta?.is_requested ? 'Tidak ada data sesuai filter saat ini.' : 'Belum ada preview untuk ditampilkan.'}
436:                                             </td>
437:                                         </tr>
438:                                     )}
439:                                 </tbody>
440:                             </table>
441:                         </div>
442: 
443:                         {previewMeta?.is_requested && (previewMeta?.total ?? 0) > (previewMeta?.limit ?? 25) && (
444:                             <div className="border-t border-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 sm:px-8">
445:                                 Preview dibatasi {previewMeta.limit} baris pertama. File Excel tetap memuat semua {previewMeta.total} baris hasil filter.
446:                             </div>
447:                         )}
448:                     </section>
449:                 </div>
450:             </div>
451:         </AuthenticatedLayout>
452:     );
453: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Admin/SurveySettings/Index.jsx
================
  1: import AuthenticatedLayout from '@/Layouts/AuthenticatedLayout';
  2: import { Head, router } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import { useState } from 'react';
  4: 
  5: export default function Index({ surveySettings = [] }) {
  6:     const initialSurveys = surveySettings.reduce((accumulator, survey) => {
  7:         accumulator[survey.value] = {
  8:             url: survey.url || '',
  9:             is_active: Boolean(survey.is_active),
 10:         };
 11: 
 12:         return accumulator;
 13:     }, {});
 14: 
 15:     const [surveysData, setSurveysData] = useState(initialSurveys);
 16:     const [savedSurveys, setSavedSurveys] = useState(initialSurveys);
 17:     const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
 18:     const [savingMap, setSavingMap] = useState({});
 19: 
 20:     const persistSurvey = (surveyType, nextSurveys) => {
 21:         setSurveysData(nextSurveys);
 22:         setSavingMap((current) => ({ ...current, [surveyType]: true }));
 23: 
 24:         router.put(
 25:             route('admin.survey-settings.update'),
 26:             { surveys: nextSurveys },
 27:             {
 28:                 preserveScroll: true,
 29:                 preserveState: true,
 30:                 onSuccess: () => {
 31:                     setSavedSurveys(nextSurveys);
 32:                     setErrors({});
 33:                 },
 34:                 onError: (incomingErrors) => {
 35:                     setErrors(incomingErrors || {});
 36:                 },
 37:                 onFinish: () => {
 38:                     setSavingMap((current) => ({ ...current, [surveyType]: false }));
 39:                 },
 40:             }
 41:         );
 42:     };
 43: 
 44:     const handleToggle = (surveyType) => {
 45:         const nextSurveys = {
 46:             ...surveysData,
 47:             [surveyType]: {
 48:                 ...surveysData[surveyType],
 49:                 is_active: !surveysData[surveyType]?.is_active,
 50:             },
 51:         };
 52: 
 53:         persistSurvey(surveyType, nextSurveys);
 54:     };
 55: 
 56:     const handleUrlChange = (surveyType, value) => {
 57:         setSurveysData({
 58:             ...surveysData,
 59:             [surveyType]: {
 60:                 ...surveysData[surveyType],
 61:                 url: value,
 62:             },
 63:         });
 64:     };
 65: 
 66:     const handleUrlBlur = (surveyType) => {
 67:         const currentSurvey = surveysData[surveyType] || { url: '', is_active: false };
 68:         const savedSurvey = savedSurveys[surveyType] || { url: '', is_active: false };
 69: 
 70:         if (
 71:             currentSurvey.url === savedSurvey.url
 72:             && currentSurvey.is_active === savedSurvey.is_active
 73:         ) {
 74:             return;
 75:         }
 76: 
 77:         persistSurvey(surveyType, {
 78:             ...surveysData,
 79:             [surveyType]: currentSurvey,
 80:         });
 81:     };
 82: 
 83:     return (
 84:         <AuthenticatedLayout header={<h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">Sistem Manajemen Konten</h2>}>
 85:             <Head title="Pengaturan Survey" />
 86: 
 87:             <div className="min-h-screen w-full bg-gray-50/50 pb-8">
 88:                 <div className="mb-6 border-b border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-8 sm:px-8">
 89:                     <h1 className="text-2xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-gray-900">Pengaturan Survey</h1>
 90:                     <p className="mt-1.5 text-sm text-gray-500">
 91:                         Atur ON/OFF survey untuk kontrol periode aktif. Gunakan toggle IKM saat survey dibuka pada waktu tertentu.
 92:                     </p>
 93:                 </div>
 94: 
 95:                 <div className="w-full space-y-4 px-4 sm:px-8">
 96:                     <div className="space-y-4">
 97:                         {surveySettings.map((survey) => {
 98:                             const surveyType = survey.value;
 99:                             const formValue = surveysData[surveyType] || { url: '', is_active: false };
100:                             const urlError = errors[`surveys.${surveyType}.url`];
101:                             const isSaving = Boolean(savingMap[surveyType]);
102: 
103:                             return (
104:                                 <section key={surveyType} className="overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 bg-white shadow-lg shadow-gray-200/30">
105:                                     <div className="border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/30 px-5 py-3.5 sm:px-6">
106:                                         <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
107:                                             <div className="min-w-0 flex-1 pr-2">
108:                                                 <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">{survey.label}</h3>
109:                                             </div>
110:                                             <button
111:                                                 type="button"
112:                                                 onClick={() => handleToggle(surveyType)}
113:                                                 disabled={isSaving}
114:                                                 className={`relative inline-flex h-7 w-12 shrink-0 items-center self-start rounded-full border p-1 transition-colors duration-200 focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-gray-400 ${formValue.is_active ? 'border-emerald-500 bg-emerald-500' : 'border-gray-300 bg-gray-300'}`}
115:                                                 aria-label={`Toggle ${survey.label}`}
116:                                                 aria-pressed={formValue.is_active}
117:                                             >
118:                                                 <span className="sr-only">{formValue.is_active ? 'Aktif' : 'Nonaktif'}</span>
119:                                                 <span
120:                                                     className={`h-5 w-5 rounded-full bg-white shadow transition-transform duration-200 ${formValue.is_active ? 'translate-x-5' : 'translate-x-0'}`}
121:                                                 />
122:                                             </button>
123:                                         </div>
124:                                     </div>
125: 
126:                                     <div className="space-y-1.5 px-5 py-3.5 sm:px-6">
127:                                         <label className="block text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
128:                                             Link Survey
129:                                         </label>
130:                                         <input
131:                                             type="url"
132:                                             value={formValue.url}
133:                                             onChange={(event) => handleUrlChange(surveyType, event.target.value)}
134:                                             onBlur={() => handleUrlBlur(surveyType)}
135:                                             placeholder="https://example.com/survey"
136:                                             disabled={isSaving}
137:                                             className="w-full rounded-lg border-2 border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-300 transition focus:border-gray-900 focus:outline-none disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-gray-50"
138:                                         />
139:                                         {urlError && <p className="text-xs text-rose-600">{urlError}</p>}
140:                                         {!urlError && isSaving && <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Menyimpan...</p>}
141:                                     </div>
142:                                 </section>
143:                             );
144:                         })}
145:                     </div>
146:                 </div>
147:             </div>
148:         </AuthenticatedLayout>
149:     );
150: }

304:                                             High
305:                                         </span>
306:                                     ) : (

308:                                     )}

311:                         )}
312:                         emptyState="Tidak ada permintaan terbaru saat ini."

314:                 </div>

316:         </AuthenticatedLayout>
