 55: export default function CompleteProfile({ user }) {
 56:     const { data, setData, put, processing, errors } = useForm({
 57:         name: user.name || '',
 58:         phone_country: user.phone_country || 'ID',
 59:         phone: user.phone || '', // Starts empty based on Controller
 60:     });
 61: 
 62:     const submit = (e) => {
 63:         e.preventDefault();
 64:         // Uses PUT because we are updating the existing user record that was just created
 65:         put(route('profile.complete.update'));
 66:     };
 67: 
 68:     return (
 69:         <>
 70:             <Head title="Lengkapi Profil" />
 71:             <BackgroundPattern variant="topography" />
 72: 
 73:             <div className="relative min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8">
 74:                 <div className="relative z-10 w-full max-w-lg bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-[0_4px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06),0_24px_72px_rgba(0,0,0,0.20)] ring-1 ring-black/[0.04] overflow-hidden flex flex-col animate-fade-in-up">
 75: 
 76:                     {/* Header */}
 77:                     <div className="p-8 lg:p-10 pb-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-100/50 to-slate-200/30 border-b border-slate-200 relative overflow-hidden">
 78:                         <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full opacity-10 pointer-events-none select-none">
 79:                             <img src="/images/meteorologi.webp" alt="Background" className="w-full h-full object-cover mix-blend-overlay opacity-80" />
 80:                         </div>
 81:                         <div className="relative z-10 text-center">
 82:                             <img src="/images/bmkg-logo.png" alt="BMKG" className="w-14 h-14 mx-auto mb-4 object-contain" onError={(e) => { e.target.style.display = 'none'; }} />
 83:                             <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-bmkg-dark tracking-tight mb-2">
 84:                                 Lengkapi Profil Anda
 85:                             </h2>
 86:                             <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">
 87:                                 Sebelum melanjutkan, silakan lengkapi informasi identitas Anda untuk layanan BMKG.
 88:                             </p>
 89:                         </div>
 90:                     </div>
 91: 
 92:                     {/* Form Section */}
 93:                     <div className="p-8 lg:p-10 pt-8 bg-neutral-50/80 flex-grow">
 94:                         <form onSubmit={submit} className="space-y-5">
 95:                             <Field label="Nama Lengkap" error={errors.name}>
 96:                                 <TextFieldInput
 97:                                     type="text"
 98:                                     value={data.name}
 99:                                     onChange={(e) => setData('name', e.target.value)}
100:                                     placeholder="Nama Lengkap Anda"
101:                                     autoComplete="name"
102:                                     error={errors.name}
103:                                 />
104:                                 <p className="text-[11px] text-slate-500 mt-1">Nama ini diambil dari akun Google Anda, silakan sesuaikan jika perlu.</p>
105:                             </Field>
106: 
107:                             <Field label="Nomor Telepon (Wajib)" error={errors.phone}>
108:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
109:                                     <PhoneCountrySelect
110:                                         value={data.phone_country}
111:                                         onChange={(country) => setData('phone_country', country)}
112:                                         compact
113:                                         className="w-32 shrink-0"
114:                                     />
115:                                     <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
116:                                         <TextFieldInput
117:                                             type="tel"
118:                                             value={data.phone}
119:                                             onChange={(e) => {
120:                                                 const rawValue = e.target.value.replace(/[^\d+]/g, '');
121:                                                 const digitsOnly = rawValue.replace(/\D/g, '');
122:                                                 const normalizedValue = rawValue.startsWith('+') ? `+${digitsOnly}` : digitsOnly;
123:                                                 setData('phone', normalizedValue);
124:                                             }}
125:                                             placeholder="08xxxxxxxxxx"
126:                                             autoComplete="tel"
127:                                             error={errors.phone}
128:                                         />
129:                                     </div>
130:                                 </div>
131:                                 {errors.phone_country && <InputError message={errors.phone_country} className="!mt-1 text-xs" />}
132:                                 <p className="text-[11px] text-slate-500 mt-1">Tidak perlu isi kode negara (+), pilih negara di sebelah kiri.</p>
133:                             </Field>
134: 
135:                             <div className="pt-2">
136:                                 <SubmitButton processing={processing} label="Simpan Profil" loadingLabel="Menyimpan..." />
137: 
138:                                 <div className="mt-4 text-center">
139:                                     <Link
140:                                         href={route('logout')}
141:                                         method="post"
142:                                         as="button"
143:                                         className="text-xs font-semibold text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 transition"
144:                                     >
145:                                         Batal & Keluar
146:                                     </Link>
147:                                 </div>
148:                             </div>
149:                         </form>
150:                     </div>
151:                 </div>
152:             </div>
153:         </>
154:     );
155: }

 48:                             <div className="space-y-1">
 49:                                 <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-bmkg-dark tracking-tighter leading-tight">
 50:                                     Reset Password
 51:                                 </h2>
 52:                                 <p className="text-slate-500 leading-relaxed text-xs lg:text-sm max-w-lg">
 53:                                     Masukkan email terdaftar untuk menerima tautan pemulihan akses ke portal layanan data.
 54:                                 </p>
 55:                             </div>
 56:                         </div>

 58:                         <div className="relative z-10">
 59:                             <Link
 60:                                 href={route('login')}
 61:                                 className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 hover:text-bmkg-primary transition-colors"
 62:                             >
 63:                                 <svg className="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
 64:                                     <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18" />
 65:                                 </svg>
 66:                                 Kembali ke Login
 67:                             </Link>
 68:                         </div>
 69:                     </div>
 70: 
 71:                     <div className="w-full p-6 lg:p-8 flex flex-col justify-center bg-neutral-50/80">
 72:                         <div className="w-full space-y-5">
 73:                             {status && (
 74:                                 <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 bg-green-50 border border-green-200 text-green-700 text-xs rounded-lg">
 75:                                     <svg className="mt-0.5 shrink-0" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2.5" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round">
 76:                                         <polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12" />
 77:                                     </svg>
 78:                                     <span>{status}</span>
 79:                                 </div>
 80:                             )}
 81:

 83:                                 <div className="space-y-1.5">
 84:                                     <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-slate-600 uppercase tracking-wider">
 85:                                         Alamat Email
 86:                                     </label>
 87:                                     <input
 88:                                         type="email"
 89:                                         value={data.email}
 90:                                         onChange={(e) => setData('email', e.target.value)}
 91:                                         placeholder="user@example.com"
 92:                                         autoFocus
 93:                                         className={`w-full h-11 pl-4 pr-4 bg-white border rounded-xl text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 transition-all text-sm shadow-sm
 94:                                             ${errors.email ? 'border-red-400 focus:border-red-500 focus:ring-red-500/20' : 'border-slate-300 focus:border-bmkg-primary focus:ring-bmkg-primary/20 hover:border-slate-400'}`}
 95:                                     />
 96:                                     <InputError message={errors.email} className="!mt-1 text-xs" />
 97:                                 </div>
 98: 
 99:                                 <button
100:                                     type="submit"
101:                                     disabled={processing}
102:                                     className="w-[calc(100%-8px)] mx-auto h-11 bg-black text-white font-bold rounded-xl hover:shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(0,0,0,0.22)] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mt-2 disabled:opacity-70 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
103:                                 >
104:                                     {processing ? (
105:                                         <><SpinnerIcon /> <span>Mengirim email...</span></>
106:                                     ) : 'Kirim Tautan Reset'}
107:                                 </button>
108:                             </form>
109: 
110:                         </div>
111:                     </div>
112: 
113:                 </div>
114:             </div>
115:         </>
116:     );
117: }

 62:         <div className="relative group">

 64:                 {...props}

 66:                     ${error ? 'border-red-400 focus:border-red-500 focus:ring-red-500/20' : 'border-slate-300 focus:border-bmkg-primary focus:ring-bmkg-primary/20 hover:border-slate-400'}`}
 67:             />

 95: // ─── Login Form ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 96: function LoginForm({ status, canResetPassword }) {
 97:     const { data, setData, post, processing, errors, reset } = useForm({
 98:         email: '',
 99:         password: '',
100:         remember: false,
101:     });
102:     const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
103: 
104:     const submit = (e) => {
105:         e.preventDefault();
106:         post(route('login'), { onFinish: () => reset('password') });
107:     };
108: 
109:     return (
110:         <form onSubmit={submit} className="space-y-3">
111:             {status && (
112:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-3 bg-green-50 border border-green-200 text-green-700 text-sm rounded-xl">
113:                     <CheckIcon />
114:                     <span>{status}</span>
115:                 </div>
116:             )}
117: 
118:             <Field label="Email Anda" error={errors.email}>
119:                 <TextFieldInput
120:                     type="email"
121:                     value={data.email}
122:                     onChange={(e) => setData('email', e.target.value)}
123:                     placeholder="user@example.com"
124:                     autoComplete="username"
125:                     autoFocus
126:                     error={errors.email}
127:                 />
128:             </Field>
129: 
130:             <Field label="Password" error={errors.password}>
131:                 <TextFieldInput
132:                     type={showPassword ? 'text' : 'password'}
133:                     value={data.password}
134:                     onChange={(e) => setData('password', e.target.value)}
135:                     placeholder="Masukkan password"
136:                     autoComplete="current-password"
137:                     error={errors.password}
138:                     rightSlot={
139:                         <button
140:                             type="button"
141:                             onClick={() => setShowPassword((v) => !v)}
142:                             className="text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-700 transition-colors p-1"
143:                             tabIndex={-1}
144:                         >
145:                             {showPassword ? <EyeClosedIcon /> : <EyeOpenIcon />}
146:                         </button>
147:                     }
148:                 />
149:             </Field>
150: 
151:             <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-1">
152:                 <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer group" onClick={() => setData('remember', !data.remember)}>
153:                     <div
154:                         className={`w-4 h-4 rounded border flex items-center justify-center transition-colors ${data.remember ? 'bg-bmkg-primary border-bmkg-primary' : 'border-slate-300 bg-white group-hover:border-slate-400'
155:                             }`}
156:                     >
157:                         {data.remember && (
158:                             <svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" strokeWidth="3" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round">
159:                                 <polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12" />
160:                             </svg>
161:                         )}
162:                     </div>
163:                     <span className="text-xs text-slate-500 select-none">Ingat saya</span>
164:                 </label>
165: 
166:                 {canResetPassword && (
167:                     <Link
168:                         href={route('password.request')}
169:                         className="text-xs font-semibold text-bmkg-accent hover:text-yellow-500"
170:                     >
171:                         Lupa password?
172:                     </Link>
173:                 )}
174:             </div>
175: 
176:             <div className="pt-1">
177:                 <SubmitButton processing={processing} label="Masuk" loadingLabel="Memverifikasi..." />
178: 
179:                 <div className="relative my-4 flex items-center px-1">
180:                     <div className="flex-grow border-t border-slate-200"></div>
181:                     <span className="flex-shrink-0 mx-4 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest">
182:                         ATAU
183:                     </span>
184:                     <div className="flex-grow border-t border-slate-200"></div>
185:                 </div>
186: 
187:                 <a
188:                     href={route('google.redirect')}
189:                     className="w-[calc(100%-8px)] mx-auto h-10 bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 font-bold rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 active:scale-[0.98] transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-3 mt-1.5 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden group"
190:                 >

193:                         <GoogleIcon />
194:                         Masuk dengan Google
195:                     </span>
196:                 </a>
197:             </div>
198:         </form>

202: // ─── Register Form ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
203: function RegisterForm() {
204:     const { data, setData, post, processing, errors, reset } = useForm({
205:         name: '',
206:         company_name: '',
207:         email: '',
208:         phone_country: 'ID',
209:         phone: '',
210:         password: '',
211:         password_confirmation: '',
212:     });
213:     const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
214:     const [showConfirm, setShowConfirm] = useState(false);
215: 
216:     // Password validation state
217:     const passwordChecks = {
218:         length: data.password.length >= 8,
219:         mixedCase: /[A-Z]/.test(data.password) && /[a-z]/.test(data.password),
220:         number: /[0-9]/.test(data.password),
221:         symbol: /[!@#$%^&*()_+\-=\[\]{};':"\\|,.<>\/?]+/.test(data.password),
222:     };
223: 
224:     const allChecksPass = Object.values(passwordChecks).every(Boolean);
225: 
226:     const submit = (e) => {
227:         e.preventDefault();
228:         post(route('register'), {
229:             onFinish: () => reset('password', 'password_confirmation'),
230:         });
231:     };
232: 
233:     return (
234:         <form onSubmit={submit} className="space-y-3">
235:             <Field label="Nama Lengkap" error={errors.name}>
236:                 <TextFieldInput
237:                     type="text"
238:                     value={data.name}
239:                     onChange={(e) => setData('name', e.target.value)}
240:                     placeholder="Nama Lengkap Anda"
241:                     autoComplete="name"
242:                     error={errors.name}
243:                 />
244:             </Field>
245: 
246:             <Field label="Email Anda" error={errors.email}>
247:                 <TextFieldInput
248:                     type="email"
249:                     value={data.email}
250:                     onChange={(e) => setData('email', e.target.value)}
251:                     placeholder="user@example.com"
252:                     autoComplete="email"
253:                     error={errors.email}
254:                 />
255:             </Field>
256: 
257:             <Field label="Nama Perusahaan/Instansi (Opsional)" error={errors.company_name}>
258:                 <TextFieldInput
259:                     type="text"
260:                     value={data.company_name}
261:                     onChange={(e) => setData('company_name', e.target.value)}
262:                     placeholder="Masukkan nama perusahaan/instansi"
263:                     autoComplete="organization"
264:                     error={errors.company_name}
265:                 />
266:             </Field>
267: 
268:             <Field label="Nomor Telepon" error={errors.phone}>
269:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
270:                     <PhoneCountrySelect
271:                         value={data.phone_country}
272:                         onChange={(country) => setData('phone_country', country)}
273:                         compact
274:                         className="w-32 shrink-0"
275:                     />
276:                     <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
277:                         <TextFieldInput
278:                             type="tel"
279:                             value={data.phone}
280:                             onChange={(e) => {
281:                                 const rawValue = e.target.value.replace(/[^\d+]/g, '');
282:                                 const digitsOnly = rawValue.replace(/\D/g, '');
283:                                 const normalizedValue = rawValue.startsWith('+') ? `+${digitsOnly}` : digitsOnly;
284:                                 setData('phone', normalizedValue);
285:                             }}
286:                             placeholder="08xxxxxxxxxx"
287:                             autoComplete="tel"
288:                             error={errors.phone}
289:                         />
290:                     </div>
291:                 </div>
292:                 {errors.phone_country && <InputError message={errors.phone_country} className="!mt-1 text-xs" />}
293:                 <p className="text-[11px] text-slate-500 mt-1">Tidak perlu isi kode negara (+), pilih negara di sebelah kiri.</p>
294:             </Field>
295: 
296:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
297:                 <Field label="Password" error={errors.password}>
298:                     <TextFieldInput
299:                         type={showPassword ? 'text' : 'password'}
300:                         value={data.password}
301:                         onChange={(e) => setData('password', e.target.value)}
302:                         placeholder="Minimal 8 karakter"
303:                         autoComplete="new-password"
304:                         error={errors.password}
305:                         rightSlot={
306:                             <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowPassword((v) => !v)} className="text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-700 transition-colors p-1" tabIndex={-1}>
307:                                 {showPassword ? <EyeClosedIcon /> : <EyeOpenIcon />}
308:                             </button>
309:                         }
310:                     />
311:                 </Field>
312: 
313:                 <Field label="Konfirmasi Password" error={errors.password_confirmation}>
314:                     <TextFieldInput
315:                         type={showConfirm ? 'text' : 'password'}
316:                         value={data.password_confirmation}
317:                         onChange={(e) => setData('password_confirmation', e.target.value)}
318:                         placeholder="Ulangi password"
319:                         autoComplete="new-password"
320:                         error={errors.password_confirmation}
321:                         rightSlot={
322:                             <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowConfirm((v) => !v)} className="text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-700 transition-colors p-1" tabIndex={-1}>
323:                                 {showConfirm ? <EyeClosedIcon /> : <EyeOpenIcon />}
324:                             </button>
325:                         }
326:                     />
327:                 </Field>
328:             </div>
329: 
330:             {/* Real-time password checker */}
331:             <div className={`mt-2 p-3 rounded-lg border text-xs transition-colors duration-300 ${allChecksPass && data.password.length > 0 ? 'bg-green-50 border-green-200' : 'bg-slate-50 border-slate-200'}`}>
332:                 <p className="font-semibold text-slate-700 mb-2">Password harus mengandung:</p>
333:                 <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
334:                     <div className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 transition-colors ${passwordChecks.length ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-slate-500'}`}>
335:                         {passwordChecks.length ? <CheckIcon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> : <div className="w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded-full border border-slate-300" />}
336:                         <span>Minimal 8 karakter</span>
337:                     </div>
338:                     <div className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 transition-colors ${passwordChecks.mixedCase ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-slate-500'}`}>
339:                         {passwordChecks.mixedCase ? <CheckIcon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> : <div className="w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded-full border border-slate-300" />}
340:                         <span>Huruf besar & kecil</span>
341:                     </div>
342:                     <div className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 transition-colors ${passwordChecks.number ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-slate-500'}`}>
343:                         {passwordChecks.number ? <CheckIcon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> : <div className="w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded-full border border-slate-300" />}
344:                         <span>Minimal 1 angka</span>
345:                     </div>
346:                     <div className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 transition-colors ${passwordChecks.symbol ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-slate-500'}`}>
347:                         {passwordChecks.symbol ? <CheckIcon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> : <div className="w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded-full border border-slate-300" />}
348:                         <span>Minimal 1 simbol</span>
349:                     </div>
350:                 </div>
351:             </div>
352: 
353:             <div className="pt-1">
354:                 <SubmitButton processing={processing} label="Buat Akun" loadingLabel="Mendaftarkan..." />
355: 
356:                 <div className="relative my-4 flex items-center px-1">
357:                     <div className="flex-grow border-t border-slate-200"></div>
358:                     <span className="flex-shrink-0 mx-4 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest">
359:                         ATAU
360:                     </span>
361:                     <div className="flex-grow border-t border-slate-200"></div>
362:                 </div>
363: 
364:                 <a
365:                     href={route('google.redirect')}
366:                     className="w-[calc(100%-8px)] mx-auto h-10 bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 font-bold rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 active:scale-[0.98] transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-3 mt-1.5 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden group"
367:                 >
368:                     <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-slate-50 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"></div>
369:                     <span className="relative z-10 flex items-center gap-3">
370:                         <GoogleIcon />
371:                         Daftar dengan Google
372:                     </span>
373:                 </a>
374:             </div>
375:         </form>
376:     );
377: }
378: 
379: // ─── Auth Panel (Main Export) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
380: export default function AuthPanel({ mode = 'login', status, canResetPassword }) {
381:     const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(mode);
382:     const isLogin = activeTab === 'login';
383: 
384:     const loginPanelRef = useRef(null);
385:     const registerPanelRef = useRef(null);
386:     const [formHeights, setFormHeights] = useState({ login: null, register: null });
387:     const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false);
388: 
389:     const measureAll = () => {
390:         setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 1024);
391:         setFormHeights({
392:             login: loginPanelRef.current?.scrollHeight ?? null,
393:             register: registerPanelRef.current?.scrollHeight ?? null,
394:         });
395:     };
396: 
397:     useLayoutEffect(() => {
398:         measureAll();
399:         window.addEventListener('resize', measureAll);
400:         return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', measureAll);
401:     }, [activeTab]);
402:

 34: export default function ResetPassword({ token, email }) {

 37:         email: email,
 38:         password: '',

 46:         length: data.password.length >= 8,
 47:         mixedCase: /[A-Z]/.test(data.password) && /[a-z]/.test(data.password),
 48:         number: /[0-9]/.test(data.password),
 49:         symbol: /[!@#$%^&*()_+\-=\[\]{};':"\\|,.<>\/?]+/.test(data.password),
 50:     };
 51:     const allChecksPass = Object.values(passwordChecks).every(Boolean);
 52:

 54:         e.preventDefault();
 55:         post(route('password.store'), {
 56:             onFinish: () => reset('password', 'password_confirmation'),
 57:         });
 58:     };
 59:

171:                                                 <span>Huruf besar & kecil</span>
172:                                             </div>

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Auth/VerifyEmail.jsx
================
  1: import { Head, Link, useForm, usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';
  2: import BackgroundPattern from '@/Components/BackgroundPattern';
  3: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  4: 
  5: const SpinnerIcon = () => (
  6:     <svg className="animate-spin" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
  7:         <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" />
  8:         <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z" />
  9:     </svg>
 10: );
 11: 
 12: export default function VerifyEmail({ status }) {
 13:     const { post, processing } = useForm({});
 14:     const { auth } = usePage().props;
 15:     const userEmail = auth?.user?.email;
 16: 
 17:     const [countdown, setCountdown] = useState(0);
 18: 
 19:     // 1. Fungsi untuk memulai timer dan simpan ke localStorage
 20:     const startTimer = (seconds) => {
 21:         const expiryTime = Date.now() + seconds * 1000;
 22:         localStorage.setItem('verification_expiry', expiryTime.toString());
 23:         setCountdown(seconds);
 24:     };
 25: 
 26:     // 2. Cek apakah ada timer yang tersisa saat pertama kali load (Refresh Safety)
 27:     useEffect(() => {
 28:         const checkExpiry = () => {
 29:             const expiry = localStorage.getItem('verification_expiry');
 30:             if (expiry) {
 31:                 const remaining = Math.round((parseInt(expiry) - Date.now()) / 1000);
 32:                 if (remaining > 0) {
 33:                     setCountdown(remaining);
 34:                 } else {
 35:                     localStorage.removeItem('verification_expiry');
 36:                     setCountdown(0);
 37:                 }
 38:             }
 39:         };
 40: 
 41:         checkExpiry();
 42:         window.addEventListener('focus', checkExpiry);
 43:         return () => window.removeEventListener('focus', checkExpiry);
 44:     }, []);
 45: 
 46:     // 3. AUTO-START TIMER: Mulai countdown di awal landing tanpa bergantung status
 47:     useEffect(() => {
 48:         const expiry = localStorage.getItem('verification_expiry');
 49:         const hasStarted = localStorage.getItem('timer_started');
 50: 
 51:         // Jika belum ada timer berjalan atau timer lama sudah habis, mulai yang baru
 52:         if (!expiry || parseInt(expiry) < Date.now()) {
 53:             startTimer(20);
 54:             localStorage.setItem('timer_started', 'true');
 55:         }
 56:     }, []); // Empty dependency - hanya jalankan sekali saat mount
 57: 
 58:     // 4. Logika hitung mundur per detik
 59:     useEffect(() => {
 60:         let timer;
 61:         if (countdown > 0) {
 62:             timer = setInterval(() => {
 63:                 setCountdown((prev) => {
 64:                     const newValue = prev - 1;
 65:                     if (newValue <= 0) {
 66:                         localStorage.removeItem('verification_expiry');
 67:                         localStorage.removeItem('timer_started');
 68:                         return 0;
 69:                     }
 70:                     return newValue;
 71:                 });
 72:             }, 1000);
 73:         }
 74:         return () => clearInterval(timer);
 75:     }, [countdown > 0]);
 76: 
 77:     const submit = (e) => {
 78:         e.preventDefault();
 79:         post(route('verification.send'), {
 80:             onSuccess: () => startTimer(20),
 81:         });
 82:     };
 83: 
 84:     return (
 85:         <>
 86:             <Head title="Verifikasi Email" />
 87: 
 88:             <BackgroundPattern variant="topography" />
 89:

136:                                 <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-bmkg-primary/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-3">

139:                                     </svg>
140:                                 </div>

142:                                 {userEmail && (
143:                                     <>
144:                                         <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mb-1">Email verifikasi dikirim ke:</p>
145:                                         <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg mb-2">
146:                                             <svg className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-bmkg-primary shrink-0" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
147:                                                 <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M3 8l7.89 5.26a2 2 0 002.22 0L21 8M5 19h14a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z" />
148:                                             </svg>
149:                                             <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-800">{userEmail}</span>
150:                                         </div>
151:                                     </>
152:                                 )}
153:                                 <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">
154:                                     Belum menerima email? Klik tombol di bawah untuk mengirim ulang tautan verifikasi.
155:                                 </p>
156:                             </div>
157: 
158:                             {status === 'verification-link-sent' && (
159:                                 <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 bg-green-50 border border-green-200 text-green-700 text-xs rounded-lg animate-fade-in-up">
160:                                     <svg className="mt-0.5 shrink-0" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2.5" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round">
161:                                         <polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12" />
162:                                     </svg>
163:                                     <span>Tautan verifikasi baru telah dikirim ke alamat email Anda.</span>
164:                                 </div>
165:                             )}
166: 
167:                             <form onSubmit={submit}>
168:                                 <button
169:                                     type="submit"
170:                                     disabled={processing || countdown > 0}
171:                                     className="w-[calc(100%-8px)] mx-auto h-11 bg-black text-white font-bold rounded-xl hover:shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(0,0,0,0.22)] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-70 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
172:                                 >
173:                                     {processing ? (
174:                                         <><SpinnerIcon /> <span>Mengirim...</span></>
175:                                     ) : (
176:                                         countdown > 0 ? `Kirim Ulang (${countdown}s)` : 'Kirim Ulang Email Verifikasi'
177:                                     )}
178:                                 </button>
179:                             </form>
180:                         </div>
181:                     </div>
182:                 </div>
183:             </div>
184:         </>
185:     );
186: }

 1: import AdminDashboard from '@/Pages/AdminDashboard';

 3: 
 4: export default function Dashboard() {

 6:     const userRole = auth.user.role;
 7: 
 8:     if (userRole === 'admin' || userRole === 'superadmin') {
 9:         return <AdminDashboard />;
10:     }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/DataRequests/Create.jsx
================
 1: import AuthenticatedLayout from '@/Layouts/AuthenticatedLayout';
 2: import { Head, Link, useForm } from '@inertiajs/react';
 3: import { useState } from 'react';
 4: import { ChevronLeftIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 5: import SelectPurposeStep from './Partials/SelectPurposeStep';
 6: import UploadDocumentStep from './Partials/UploadDocumentStep';
 7: import ConsultationStep from './Partials/ConsultationStep';
 8: 
 9: export default function Create({ purposeTypes }) {
10:     const [step, setStep] = useState(1);
11: 
12:     const { data, setData, post, processing, errors } = useForm({
13:         title: '',
14:         purpose_type: '',
15:         applicant_type: 'individu',
16:         company_name: '',
17:         research_target_date: '',
18:         form_pernyataan: null,
19:         scan_ktp: null,
20:         surat_pengajuan: null,
21:         proposal: null,
22:         kartu_identitas_instansi: null,
23:     });
24: 
25:     const currentPurpose = purposeTypes.find((p) => p.value === data.purpose_type);
26: 
27:     const handleSelectPurpose = (value) => {
28:         setData('purpose_type', value);
29:         setStep(3);
30:     };
31: 
32:     const handleSubmit = () => {
33:         post(route('data-requests.store'), { forceFormData: true });
34:     };
35: 
36:     return (
37:         <AuthenticatedLayout header={<h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800">Ajukan Pengajuan</h2>}>
38:             <Head title="Ajukan Pengajuan" />
39: 
40:             <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50/50 pb-20 text-left">
41:                 <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-4 sm:px-8 py-10 mb-8">
42:                     <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-6">
43:                         <div>
44:                             <h1 className="text-3xl font-extrabold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Ajukan Pengajuan</h1>
45:                             <p className="mt-2 text-gray-500 text-lg">Silakan pilih jenis pengajuan yang sesuai dengan kebutuhan Anda.</p>
46:                         </div>
47:                         {step === 1 ? (
48:                             <Link
49:                                 href={route('data-requests.index')}
50:                                 className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm shrink-0 w-fit"
51:                             >
52:                                 <ChevronLeftIcon className="h-4 w-4" /> Kembali
53:                             </Link>
54:                         ) : (
55:                             <button
56:                                 type="button"
57:                                 onClick={() => setStep(step - 1)}
58:                                 className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm shrink-0 w-fit"
59:                             >
60:                                 <ChevronLeftIcon className="h-4 w-4" /> Kembali
61:                             </button>
62:                         )}
63:                     </div>
64:                 </div>
65: 
66:                 <div className="w-full px-4 sm:px-8">
67:                     {step === 1 && (
68:                         <ConsultationStep onNext={() => setStep(2)} />
69:                     )}
70: 
71:                     {step === 2 && (
72:                         <SelectPurposeStep onSelect={handleSelectPurpose} />
73:                     )}
74: 
75:                     {step === 3 && (
76:                         <form>
77:                             <UploadDocumentStep
78:                                 data={data}
79:                                 setData={setData}
80:                                 errors={errors}
81:                                 processing={processing}
82:                                 currentPurpose={currentPurpose}
83:                                 onBack={() => setStep(2)}
84:                                 onSubmit={handleSubmit}
85:                             />
86:                         </form>
87:                     )}
88:                 </div>
89:             </div>
90:         </AuthenticatedLayout>
91:     );
92: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/DataRequests/Index.jsx
================
  1: import AuthenticatedLayout from '@/Layouts/AuthenticatedLayout';
  2: import { Head, Link, router } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import { useState } from 'react';
  4: import {
  5:     CheckIcon,
  6:     ClipboardIcon,
  7:     MagnifyingGlassIcon,
  8:     ChevronRightIcon,
  9:     ChevronLeftIcon,
 10:     InboxIcon,
 11:     ArrowPathIcon,
 12:     BarsArrowUpIcon,
 13:     BarsArrowDownIcon,
 14: } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 15: import { CustomSelect, CustomDateRangePicker } from '@/Components/FilterComponents';
 16: 
 17: const statusConfig = [
 18:     { key: 'pending', label: 'Menunggu Verifikasi', color: 'text-yellow-700 border-yellow-200' },
 19:     { key: 'payment_required', label: 'Pembayaran', color: 'text-blue-700 border-blue-200' },
 20:     { key: 'payment_verifying', label: 'Pembayaran', color: 'text-blue-700 border-blue-200' },
 21:     { key: 'payment_verified', label: 'Pembayaran', color: 'text-green-700 border-green-200' },
 22:     { key: 'payment_invalid', label: 'Pembayaran', color: 'text-red-700 border-red-200' },
 23:     { key: 'expired', label: 'Kedaluwarsa', color: 'text-gray-500 border-gray-300' },
 24:     { key: 'processing', label: 'Sedang Diproses', color: 'text-indigo-700 border-indigo-200' },
 25:     { key: 'completed', label: 'Selesai', color: 'text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200' },
 26:     { key: 'rejected', label: 'Pengajuan Ditolak', color: 'text-red-700 border-red-200' },
 27: ];
 28: 
 29: const getStatusLabel = (status) => {
 30:     const config = statusConfig.find(s => s.key === status);
 31:     return config ? config.label : status;
 32: };
 33: 
 34: const getStatusColor = (status) => {
 35:     const config = statusConfig.find(s => s.key === status);
 36:     return config ? config.color : 'border-gray-200 text-gray-600';
 37: };
 38: 
 39: /**
 40:  * Ikon sort pakai BarsArrowUp / BarsArrowDown dari heroicons:
 41:  * - Idle  : BarsArrowUp, abu-abu
 42:  * - Asc   : BarsArrowUp, hitam
 43:  * - Desc  : BarsArrowDown, hitam
 44:  */
 45: function SortBars({ column, sortBy, sortOrder }) {
 46:     const isActive = sortBy === column;
 47:     const isDesc = isActive && sortOrder === 'desc';
 48: 
 49:     const cls = `h-4 w-4 ml-1.5 transition-colors duration-150 shrink-0 ${isActive ? 'text-gray-900' : 'text-gray-300 group-hover:text-gray-500'
 50:         }`;
 51: 
 52:     return isDesc
 53:         ? <BarsArrowDownIcon className={cls} />
 54:         : <BarsArrowUpIcon className={cls} />;
 55: }
 56: 
 57: export default function Index({ dataRequests, filters }) {
 58:     if (!dataRequests) return null;
 59: 
 60:     const data = dataRequests.data ?? [];
 61:     const current_page = dataRequests.current_page;
 62:     const last_page = dataRequests.last_page;
 63:     const from = dataRequests.from;
 64:     const links = Array.isArray(dataRequests.links) ? dataRequests.links : [];
 65: 
 66:     const safeFilters = filters ?? {};
 67: 
 68:     const [search, setSearch] = useState(safeFilters.search ?? '');
 69:     const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState(safeFilters.status ?? 'Semua');
 70:     const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(safeFilters.start_date ?? '');
 71:     const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState(safeFilters.end_date ?? '');
 72:     const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState(safeFilters.sort_by ?? 'updated_at');
 73:     const [sortOrder, setSortOrder] = useState(safeFilters.sort ?? 'desc');
 74:     const [copiedId, setCopiedId] = useState(null);
 75: 
 76:     const purposeLabels = {
 77:         commercial: 'Komersial',
 78:         non_commercial_individu: 'Non-Komersial (Individu)',
 79:         non_commercial_instansi: 'Non-Komersial (Instansi)',
 80:     };
 81: 
 82:     const performQuery = (params = {}) => {
 83:         const queryParams = {
 84:             search,
 85:             status: filterStatus,
 86:             start_date: startDate,
 87:             end_date: endDate,
 88:             sort: sortOrder,
 89:             sort_by: sortBy,
 90:             ...params,
 91:         };
 92:         router.get(route('data-requests.index'), queryParams, {
 93:             preserveState: true,
 94:             replace: true,
 95:         });
 96:     };
 97: 
 98:     const handleSort = (column) => {
 99:         let newOrder;
100:         if (sortBy === column) {
101:             newOrder = sortOrder === 'desc' ? 'asc' : 'desc';
102:         } else {
103:             newOrder = column === 'created_at' ? 'desc' : 'asc';
104:         }
105:         setSortBy(column);
106:         setSortOrder(newOrder);
107:         performQuery({ sort_by: column, sort: newOrder });
108:     };
109: 
110:     const handleReset = () => {
111:         setSearch('');
112:         setFilterStatus('Semua');
113:         setStartDate('');
114:         setEndDate('');
115:         setSortBy('created_at');
116:         setSortOrder('desc');
117:         router.get(route('data-requests.index'));
118:     };
119: 
120:     const handlePageChange = (url) => {
121:         if (!url) return;
122:         router.get(url, {
123:             search,
124:             status: filterStatus,
125:             start_date: startDate,
126:             end_date: endDate,
127:             sort: sortOrder,
128:             sort_by: sortBy,
129:         }, { preserveState: true });
130:     };
131: 
132:     const copyToClipboard = (text, id) => {
133:         navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
134:         setCopiedId(id);
135:         setTimeout(() => setCopiedId(null), 1500);
136:     };
137: 
138:     const thClass =
139:         'group px-6 py-5 text-xs font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest cursor-pointer select-none hover:text-gray-700 transition-colors';
140: 
141:     return (
142:         <AuthenticatedLayout
143:             header={<h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800">Pengajuan Saya</h2>}
144:         >
145:             <Head title="Pengajuan Saya" />
146: 
147:             <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50/50 pb-10 w-full">
148:                 {/* Header */}
149:                 <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-4 sm:px-8 py-10 mb-8">
150:                     <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-6">
151:                         <div>
152:                             <h1 className="text-3xl font-extrabold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Daftar Pengajuan</h1>
153:                             <p className="mt-2 text-gray-500 text-lg">Kelola dan pantau status permohonan layanan Anda.</p>
154:                         </div>
155:                         <Link
156:                             href={route('data-requests.create')}
157:                             className="bg-gray-900 text-white hover:bg-black px-8 py-3.5 rounded-2xl font-bold text-base transition-all shadow-xl text-center shrink-0 active:scale-95"
158:                         >
159:                             + Ajukan Baru
160:                         </Link>
161:                     </div>
162:                 </div>
163: 
164:                 {/* Toolbar */}
165:                 <div className="w-full px-4 sm:px-8">
166:                     <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row items-stretch lg:items-center justify-between gap-4 mb-8">
167: 
168:                         {/* Kiri: Filter Status + Date Range */}
169:                         <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-stretch sm:items-center gap-3 w-full lg:w-auto">
170:                             <CustomSelect
171:                                 value={filterStatus}
172:                                 onChange={(val) => {
173:                                     setFilterStatus(val);
174:                                     performQuery({ status: val });
175:                                 }}
176:                             />
177:                             <CustomDateRangePicker
178:                                 startDate={startDate}
179:                                 endDate={endDate}
180:                                 onStartChange={(val) => { setStartDate(val); performQuery({ start_date: val }); }}
181:                                 onEndChange={(val) => { setEndDate(val); performQuery({ end_date: val }); }}
182:                             />
183:                         </div>
184: 
185:                         {/* Kanan: Search + Reset */}
186:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 w-full lg:w-auto">
187:                             <form
188:                                 onSubmit={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); performQuery(); }}
189:                                 className="relative flex-grow lg:w-80"
190:                             >
191:                                 <MagnifyingGlassIcon className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
192:                                 <input
193:                                     type="text"
194:                                     value={search}
195:                                     onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
196:                                     placeholder="Cari berdasarkan kode atau judul..."
197:                                     className="w-full h-10 pl-10 pr-4 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-bmkg-accent focus:border-bmkg-accent shadow-sm font-medium"
198:                                 />
199:                             </form>
200:                             <button
201:                                 onClick={handleReset}
202:                                 className="h-10 w-10 flex items-center justify-center bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-900 transition-all shadow-sm active:rotate-180 duration-500 shrink-0"
203:                                 title="Reset Filter"
204:                             >
205:                                 <ArrowPathIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
206:                             </button>
207:                         </div>
208:                     </div>
209: 
210:                     {/* Content */}
211:                     <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40 border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden min-h-[600px] flex flex-col w-full">
212: 
213:                         {data.length === 0 ? (
214:                             <div className="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-20 px-6 text-center">
215:                                 <InboxIcon className="h-16 w-16 text-gray-200 mb-4" />
216:                                 <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Tidak ada pengajuan ditemukan</h3>
217:                                 <p className="text-gray-500 mt-2 text-sm">Sesuaikan filter atau pencarian Anda.</p>
218:                             </div>
219:                         ) : (
220:                             <div className="flex-grow">
221:                                 {/* Desktop Table */}
222:                                 <div className="hidden md:block overflow-x-auto">
223:                                     <table className="w-full border-collapse">
224:                                         <thead className="bg-gray-50/50 border-b border-gray-100 text-left">
225:                                             <tr>
226:                                                 <th className="px-6 py-5 text-xs font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest text-center">No</th>
227: 
228:                                                 <th className={thClass} onClick={() => handleSort('updated_at')}>
229:                                                     <span className="inline-flex items-center">
230:                                                         Tanggal
231:                                                         <SortBars column="updated_at" sortBy={sortBy} sortOrder={sortOrder} />
232:                                                     </span>
233:                                                 </th>
234: 
235:                                                 <th className={thClass} onClick={() => handleSort('request_code')}>
236:                                                     <span className="inline-flex items-center">
237:                                                         Kode
238:                                                         <SortBars column="request_code" sortBy={sortBy} sortOrder={sortOrder} />
239:                                                     </span>
240:                                                 </th>
241: 
242:                                                 <th className={thClass} onClick={() => handleSort('title')}>
243:                                                     <span className="inline-flex items-center">
244:                                                         Judul
245:                                                         <SortBars column="title" sortBy={sortBy} sortOrder={sortOrder} />
246:                                                     </span>
247:                                                 </th>
248:

250:                                                     <span className="inline-flex items-center">

253:                                                     </span>
254:                                                 </th>
255: 
256:                                                 <th className={`${thClass} text-center`} onClick={() => handleSort('status')}>
257:                                                     <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-full">
258:                                                         Status
259:                                                         <SortBars column="status" sortBy={sortBy} sortOrder={sortOrder} />
260:                                                     </span>
261:                                                 </th>
262:

264:                                             </tr>
265:                                         </thead>
266:                                         <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-50">
267:                                             {data.map((req, index) => (

269:                                                     <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-gray-400 text-center">{(from || 1) + index}</td>
270:                                                     <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-gray-900 font-bold">
271:                                                         {new Date(req.created_at).toLocaleDateString('id-ID')}
272:                                                     </td>
273:                                                     <td className="px-6 py-5">
274:                                                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 font-mono text-xs">
275:                                                             <span className="bg-gray-100 px-3 py-1 rounded-lg uppercase tracking-wider">{req.request_code}</span>
276:                                                             <button
277:                                                                 onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); copyToClipboard(req.request_code, req.id); }}
278:                                                                 className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-900"
279:                                                             >
280:                                                                 {copiedId === req.id
281:                                                                     ? <CheckIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
282:                                                                     : <ClipboardIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
283:                                                                 }
284:                                                             </button>
285:                                                         </div>
286:                                                     </td>
287:                                                     <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">{req.title || '-'}</td>
288:                                                     <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-gray-600">{purposeLabels[req.purpose_type] || '-'}</td>
289:                                                     <td className="px-6 py-5 text-center">
290:                                                         <span className={`inline-block w-32 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-wider border bg-transparent text-center ${getStatusColor(req.status) || 'border-gray-200 text-gray-600'}`}>
291:                                                             {getStatusLabel(req.status)}
292:                                                         </span>
293:                                                     </td>
294:                                                     <td className="px-6 py-5 text-center">
295:                                                         <Link
296:                                                             href={route('data-requests.show', req.id)}
297:                                                             onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
298:                                                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-4 py-2 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm"
299:                                                         >
300:                                                             Detail <ChevronRightIcon className="h-3 w-3" />
301:                                                         </Link>
302:                                                     </td>
303:                                                 </tr>
304:                                             ))}
305:                                         </tbody>
306:                                     </table>
307:                                 </div>
308: 
309:                                 {/* Mobile Card View */}
310:                                 <div className="md:hidden divide-y divide-gray-100">
311:                                     {data.map((req) => (
312:                                         <div key={req.id} onClick={() => router.visit(route('data-requests.show', req.id))} className="p-5 space-y-4 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors">
313:                                             <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-50 pb-3">
314:                                                 <div className="flex flex-col">
315:                                                     <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest leading-none mb-1">Tanggal</span>
316:                                                     <p className="text-xs font-extrabold text-gray-900">
317:                                                         {new Date(req.created_at).toLocaleDateString('id-ID', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' })}
318:                                                     </p>
319:                                                 </div>
320:                                                 <span className={`inline-block w-28 py-1.5 rounded-md text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-tighter border bg-transparent text-center flex-shrink-0 ${getStatusColor(req.status) || 'border-gray-200 text-gray-600'}`}>
321:                                                     {getStatusLabel(req.status)}
322:                                                 </span>
323:                                             </div>
324:                                             <div className="space-y-1">
325:                                                 <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900 uppercase tracking-tight line-clamp-2">{req.title || '-'}</h3>
326:                                                 <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">{purposeLabels[req.purpose_type] || '-'}</p>
327:                                             </div>
328:                                             <div className="flex items-center justify-between bg-gray-50/50 p-2.5 rounded-xl border border-gray-100">
329:                                                 <div className="flex flex-col">
330:                                                     <span className="text-[9px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase mb-1 leading-none">Kode Unik</span>
331:                                                     <span className="text-xs font-mono font-bold text-gray-700 uppercase">{req.request_code}</span>
332:                                                 </div>
333:                                                 <button
334:                                                     onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); copyToClipboard(req.request_code, req.id); }}
335:                                                     className="p-2 bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-900 transition-colors"
336:                                                 >
337:                                                     {copiedId === req.id
338:                                                         ? <CheckIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
339:                                                         : <ClipboardIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
340:                                                     }
341:                                                 </button>
342:                                             </div>
343:                                             <Link
344:                                                 href={route('data-requests.show', req.id)}
345:                                                 onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
346:                                                 className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-3.5 bg-gray-900 rounded-2xl text-xs font-bold text-white shadow-md active:scale-[0.98]"
347:                                             >
348:                                                 Detail <ChevronRightIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
349:                                             </Link>
350:                                         </div>
351:                                     ))}
352:                                 </div>
353:                             </div>
354:                         )}
355: 
356:                         {/* Pagination */}
357:                         {last_page > 1 && links.length > 0 && (
358:                             <div className="mt-auto flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-8 border-t border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/30">
359:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
360:                                     <button
361:                                         type="button"
362:                                         onClick={() => handlePageChange(dataRequests.prev_page_url)}
363:                                         disabled={current_page === 1}
364:                                         className="p-2.5 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-all"
365:                                     >
366:                                         <ChevronLeftIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
367:                                     </button>
368: 
369:                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2">
370:                                         {links.slice(1, -1).map((link, i) => (
371:                                             <button
372:                                                 key={i}
373:                                                 type="button"
374:                                                 onClick={() => handlePageChange(link.url)}
375:                                                 className={`min-w-[38px] h-10 px-3 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold border transition-all
376:                                                     ${link.active ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white border-gray-900 shadow-lg' : 'bg-white text-gray-500 border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50'}`}
377:                                                 dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: link.label }}
378:                                             />
379:                                         ))}
380:                                     </div>
381: 
382:                                     <button
383:                                         type="button"
384:                                         onClick={() => handlePageChange(dataRequests.next_page_url)}
385:                                         disabled={current_page === last_page}
386:                                         className="p-2.5 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-all"
387:                                     >
388:                                         <ChevronRightIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
389:                                     </button>
390:                                 </div>
391:                             </div>
392:                         )}
393:                     </div>
394:                 </div>
395:             </div>
396:         </AuthenticatedLayout>
397:     );
398: }

  1: import { ArrowDownTrayIcon, EyeIcon, ExclamationTriangleIcon, XCircleIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  2: import FileIcon from './FileIcon';
  3: 
  4: const invoiceStatusLabels = {
  5:     issued: 'Diterbitkan', verifying: 'Menunggu Verifikasi', verified: 'Terverifikasi',
  6:     paid: 'Terbayar', invalid: 'Ditolak', expired: 'Kedaluwarsa',
  7: };
  8: 
  9: const invoiceStatusColors = {
 10:     issued: 'text-blue-700 bg-blue-50 border-blue-200',
 11:     verifying: 'text-yellow-700 bg-yellow-50 border-yellow-200',
 12:     verified: 'text-green-700 bg-green-50 border-green-200',
 13:     paid: 'text-green-700 bg-green-50 border-green-200',
 14:     invalid: 'text-red-700 bg-red-50 border-red-200',
 15:     expired: 'text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 border-gray-200',
 16: };
 17: 
 18: const formatCurrency = (amount) =>
 19:     new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID', { style: 'currency', currency: 'IDR', minimumFractionDigits: 0 }).format(amount);
 20: 
 21: const formatDate = (dateString) =>
 22:     dateString
 23:         ? new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('id-ID', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
 24:         : null;
 25: 
 26: export default function BillingHistorySection({ billingHistory, activeInvoiceId, onPreview }) {
 27:     const getExt = (filename = '') => filename.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
 28:     const pastInvoices = (billingHistory || []).filter(inv => inv.id !== activeInvoiceId);
 29:     if (pastInvoices.length === 0) return null;
 30: 
 31:     return (
 32:         <div className="border-t border-gray-100 pt-5 flex flex-col flex-1 min-h-0">
 33:             <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3 shrink-0">
 34:                 <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">Riwayat Billing</p>
 35:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 36:                     {pastInvoices.length > 2 && (
 37:                         <span className="text-[9px] font-bold text-gray-400">{pastInvoices.length} item</span>
 38:                     )}
 39:                     <span className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase text-gray-400 bg-gray-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md">Arsip</span>
 40:                 </div>
 41:             </div>
 42:             <div className="space-y-3 overflow-y-auto billing-scroll flex-1 min-h-0">
 43:                 {pastInvoices.map((invoice, idx) => {
 44:                     const isExpiredOrInvalid = ['expired', 'invalid'].includes(invoice.status);
 45:                     const invoiceExt = getExt(invoice.invoice_original_name || '.pdf');
 46:                     const proofExt = getExt(invoice.proof_original_name || '.pdf');
 47: 
 48:                     return (
 49:                         <div
 50:                             key={invoice.id || idx}
 51:                             className={['rounded-2xl border p-4 space-y-3', isExpiredOrInvalid ? 'border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/80' : 'border-gray-100 bg-white shadow-sm'].join(' ')}
 52:                         >
 53:                             <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
 54:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
 55:                                     <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold uppercase px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md border ${invoiceStatusColors[invoice.status] || invoiceStatusColors.expired}`}>
 56:                                         {invoiceStatusLabels[invoice.status] || invoice.status}
 57:                                     </span>
 58:                                     {invoice.amount && (
 59:                                         <span className={['text-xs font-bold', isExpiredOrInvalid ? 'text-gray-400 line-through' : 'text-gray-700'].join(' ')}>
 60:                                             {formatCurrency(invoice.amount)}
 61:                                         </span>
 62:                                     )}
 63:                                 </div>
 64:                             </div>
 65:                             <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{formatDate(invoice.created_at)}</p>
 66: 
 67:                             {invoice.status === 'expired' && (
 68:                                 <div className="flex items-start gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg bg-gray-100/80">
 69:                                     <ExclamationTriangleIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
 70:                                     <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">
 71:                                         Invoice ini sudah melewati batas waktu dan tidak dapat digunakan untuk pembayaran.
 72:                                     </p>
 73:                                 </div>
 74:                             )}
 75:                             {invoice.status === 'invalid' && invoice.rejection_reason && (
 76:                                 <div className="flex items-start gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg bg-red-50/50">
 77:                                     <XCircleIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-400 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
 78:                                     <p className="text-[10px] text-red-500 italic leading-relaxed">"{invoice.rejection_reason}"</p>
 79:                                 </div>
 80:                             )}
 81: 
 82:                             <div className={isExpiredOrInvalid ? 'space-y-3' : 'grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3'}>
 83:                                 {invoice.invoice_preview_path && (
 84:                                     <div>
 85:                                         <p className={['text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest mb-2', isExpiredOrInvalid ? 'text-gray-400' : 'text-gray-500'].join(' ')}>Invoice Admin</p>
 86:                                         <div className={['flex items-center justify-between p-4 rounded-2xl border transition-all', isExpiredOrInvalid ? 'border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/80' : 'border-gray-100 bg-white shadow-sm hover:border-gray-300'].join(' ')}>
 87:                                             <div className="flex items-start gap-3 overflow-hidden">
 88:                                                 <FileIcon extension={invoiceExt} />
 89:                                                 <div className="overflow-hidden min-w-0">
 90:                                                     <p className={['text-sm font-bold break-words whitespace-normal', isExpiredOrInvalid ? 'text-gray-500' : 'text-gray-700'].join(' ')}>{invoice.invoice_original_name || 'Dokumen VA'}</p>
 91:                                                     <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase">{invoice.invoice_file_size ? `${(invoice.invoice_file_size / 1024).toFixed(0)} KB` : 'Dokumen VA'}</p>
 92:                                                 </div>
 93:                                             </div>
 94:                                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
 95:                                                 <button onClick={() => onPreview(invoice.invoice_preview_path)} className="p-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-600 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm" title="Lihat">
 96:                                                     <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
 97:                                                 </button>
 98:                                                 {!isExpiredOrInvalid && invoice.invoice_download_path && (
 99:                                                     <a href={invoice.invoice_download_path} download className="p-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm" title="Unduh">
100:                                                         <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
101:                                                     </a>
102:                                                 )}
103:                                             </div>
104:                                         </div>
105:                                     </div>
106:                                 )}
107:                                 {invoice.proof_preview_path && (
108:                                     <div>
109:                                         <p className={['text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest mb-2', isExpiredOrInvalid ? 'text-gray-400' : 'text-gray-500'].join(' ')}>Bukti Pembayaran</p>
110:                                         <div className={['flex items-center justify-between p-4 rounded-2xl border transition-all', isExpiredOrInvalid ? 'border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/80' : 'border-gray-100 bg-white shadow-sm hover:border-gray-300'].join(' ')}>
111:                                             <div className="flex items-start gap-3 overflow-hidden">
112:                                                 <FileIcon extension={proofExt} />
113:                                                 <div className="overflow-hidden min-w-0">
114:                                                     <p className={['text-sm font-bold break-words whitespace-normal', isExpiredOrInvalid ? 'text-gray-500' : 'text-gray-700'].join(' ')}>{invoice.proof_original_name || 'Bukti Pembayaran'}</p>
115:                                                     <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase">{proofExt.toUpperCase()}</p>
116:                                                 </div>
117:                                             </div>
118:                                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
119:                                                 <button onClick={() => onPreview(invoice.proof_preview_path)} className="p-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-600 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm" title="Lihat">
120:                                                     <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
121:                                                 </button>
122:                                                 {!isExpiredOrInvalid && invoice.proof_download_path && (
123:                                                     <a href={invoice.proof_download_path} download className="p-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm" title="Unduh">
124:                                                         <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
125:                                                     </a>
126:                                                 )}
127:                                             </div>
128:                                         </div>
129:                                     </div>
130:                                 )}
131:                             </div>
132:                         </div>
133:                     );
134:                 })}
135:             </div>
136:             <style>{`
137:                 .billing-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
138:                 .billing-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; margin: 8px 0; }
139:                 .billing-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background-color: #d1d5db; border-radius: 9999px; }
140:                 .billing-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background-color: #9ca3af; }
141:                 .billing-scroll { scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: #d1d5db transparent; }
142:             `}</style>
143:         </div>
144:     );
145: }

 4: export default function DocumentPreviewModal({ document, dataRequestId, title, onClose }) {

 6: 
 7:     return (
 8:         <Transition show={show} leave="duration-200">
 9:             <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={onClose}>

12:                     enter="ease-out duration-200"
13:                     enterFrom="opacity-0"
14:                     enterTo="opacity-100"

16:                     leaveFrom="opacity-100"
17:                     leaveTo="opacity-0"
18:                 >
19:                     <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" />
20:                 </TransitionChild>

22:                 {/* Panel Container */}
23:                 <TransitionChild
24:                     enter="ease-out duration-200"
25:                     enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95"
26:                     enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100"
27:                     leave="ease-in duration-150"
28:                     leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100"
29:                     leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95"
30:                 >
31:                     <div className="fixed inset-4 sm:inset-8 flex items-stretch justify-center">
