 57:                                     onClick={() => setDataStatusMode('sesuai')}
 58:                                     className={`flex-1 py-2 text-[10px] font-bold rounded-lg transition-all duration-300 z-10 ${dataStatusMode === 'sesuai' ? 'text-gray-900' : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600'
 59:                                         }`}
 60:                                 >
 61:                                     Ya, Sesuai
 62:                                 </button>
 63:                                 <button
 64:                                     type="button"
 65:                                     onClick={() => !isModeLockedToSesuai && setDataStatusMode('belum_sesuai')}
 66:                                     disabled={isModeLockedToSesuai}
 67:                                     title={isModeLockedToSesuai ? 'Survei sudah dikumpulkan' : undefined}
 68:                                     className={`flex-1 py-2 text-[10px] font-bold rounded-lg transition-all duration-300 z-10 ${dataStatusMode === 'belum_sesuai'
 69:                                         ? 'text-gray-900'
 70:                                         : isModeLockedToSesuai
 71:                                             ? 'text-gray-300 cursor-not-allowed'
 72:                                             : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600'
 73:                                         }`}
 74:                                 >
 75:                                     Belum, Ada Kendala
 76:                                 </button>
 77:                             </div>
 78:                             {isModeLockedToSesuai && (
 79:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-0.5">
 80:                                     <LockClosedIcon className="h-3 w-3 text-gray-300 shrink-0" />
 81:                                     <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400">Pilihan terkunci — survei telah disetujui</p>
 82:                                 </div>
 83:                             )}
 84:                         </div>
 85:                     )}
 86: 
 87:                     {/* ── Bagian: Feedback / Komplain (Mode belum_sesuai) ── */}
 88:                     {dataStatusMode === 'belum_sesuai' && !isUnlockStarted && (
 89:                         <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col gap-4">
 90:                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 91:                                 <ChatBubbleLeftEllipsisIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
 92:                                 <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest">
 93:                                     {!feedbackAlreadySubmitted ? 'Kirim Feedback' : 'Riwayat Feedback'}
 94:                                 </p>
 95:                             </div>
 96: 
 97:                             {!feedbackAlreadySubmitted ? (
 98:                                 <>
 99:                                     <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 leading-relaxed -mt-1 text-justify">
100:                                         Jelaskan bagian data yang perlu diperbaiki secara rinci. Feedback hanya dapat dikirim satu kali dan tidak dapat diubah, sehingga pastikan seluruh koreksi telah disampaikan dengan lengkap. Setelah feedback dikirim, status akan kembali ke tahap menunggu proses untuk ditinjau oleh admin. Apabila masih terdapat kekurangan, komunikasi selanjutnya akan dilakukan melalui WhatsApp/nomor yang tersedia.
101:                                     </p>
102:                                     <FeedbackForm
103:                                         dataRequestId={dataRequestId}
104:                                         onSuccess={() => setFeedbackSent(true)}
105:                                     />
106:                                 </>
107:                             ) : (
108:                                 <div className="space-y-3">
109:                                     <div className="rounded-xl bg-green-50 border border-green-100 px-3.5 py-2.5">
110:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-green-700 mb-0.5">Feedback Terkirim</p>
111:                                         <p className="text-[10px] text-green-600">{formatDate(userFeedbackAt)}</p>
112:                                     </div>
113: 
114:                                     {userFeedback && (
115:                                         <div className="rounded-xl border border-gray-100 bg-gray-50 px-3.5 py-2.5">
116:                                             <p className="text-[9px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Isi Feedback</p>
117:                                             <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-700 leading-relaxed">{userFeedback}</p>
118:                                         </div>
119:                                     )}
120:                                 </div>
121:                             )}
122:                         </div>
123:                     )}
124: 
125:                     {/* ── Bagian: Survei (Mode sesuai, belum unlock) ── */}
126:                     {dataStatusMode === 'sesuai' && !isUnlockStarted && (
127:                         <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col gap-3">
128:                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
129:                                 <ClipboardDocumentCheckIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
130:                                 <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Survei Layanan</p>
131:                             </div>
132: 
133:                             <div className="flex items-start gap-1.5">
134:                                 <ExclamationTriangleIcon className="h-3 w-3 text-amber-500 shrink-0 mt-1" />
135:                                 {requiredSurveys.length > 0 ? (
136:                                     surveys.some(s => s.status === 'approved') ? (
137:                                         <p className="text-[10px] text-amber-600 leading-relaxed font-medium text-justify">
138:                                             Perhatian: Masih ada survei aktif yang sedang diverifikasi atau ditolak. Pastikan seluruh {requiredSurveys.length} survei telah disetujui untuk membuka akses unduh.
139:                                         </p>
140:                                     ) : (
141:                                         <p className="text-[10px] text-amber-600 leading-relaxed font-medium text-justify">
142:                                             Selesaikan pengerjaan {requiredSurveys.length === 2 ? 'kedua' : ''} survei di bawah ini untuk membuka akses unduh data.
143:                                         </p>
144:                                     )
145:                                 ) : (
146:                                     <p className="text-[10px] text-amber-600 leading-relaxed font-medium text-justify">
147:                                         Data sudah siap. Karena tidak ada survei yang diwajibkan, Anda dapat langsung beralih ke mode unduh segera setelah admin memberikan akses.
148:                                     </p>
149:                                 )}
150:                             </div>
151: 
152:                             <div className="space-y-4 divide-y-2 divide-gray-100 w-full min-w-0">
153:                                 {requiredSurveys.map((surveyType) => {
154:                                     const availData = availableSurveys.find(s => s.value === surveyType);
155:                                     const submittedSurvey = surveys.find(s => s.survey_type === surveyType);
156:                                     if (!availData) return null;
157:                                     return (
158:                                         <SurveyUploadForm
159:                                             key={surveyType}
160:                                             dataRequestId={dataRequestId}
161:                                             survey={submittedSurvey}
162:                                             availableSurveyData={availData}
163:                                             onPreviewProof={(url) => setPreviewDoc({ url, type: 'image' })}
164:                                         />
165:                                     );
166:                                 })}
167:                             </div>
168:                         </div>
169:                     )}
170: 
171:                     {/* ── Bagian: Sudah unlock (Akses Terbuka) ── */}
172:                     {isUnlockStarted && (
173:                         <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
174:                             <div className="space-y-4 text-center my-auto py-8">
175:                                 <div className="rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto p-4 bg-green-50 w-fit mb-4">
176:                                     <CheckCircleIcon className="h-16 w-16 text-green-600" />
177:                                 </div>
178:                                 <h4 className="text-base font-bold text-gray-900">
179:                                     {requiredSurveys.length > 0 ? 'Survei selesai, data dapat diunduh.' : 'Data siap diunduh.'}
180:                                 </h4>
181:                                 <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 max-w-[200px] mx-auto leading-relaxed">
182:                                     {requiredSurveys.length > 0
183:                                         ? 'Terima kasih telah mengisi survei. Data Anda kini sudah siap untuk diunduh pada panel file hasil.'
184:                                         : 'Akses unduhan telah dibuka oleh admin. Silakan unduh file Anda pada panel file hasil di samping.'}
185:                                 </p>
186:                             </div>
187:                         </div>
188:                     )}
189: 
190:                     {/* Bantuan */}
191:                     <div className="mt-auto pt-2">
192:                         <a
193:                             href={whatsapp ? `https://wa.me/${whatsapp.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '')}` : '#'}
194:                             target={whatsapp ? "_blank" : "_self"}
195:                             rel={whatsapp ? "noopener noreferrer" : ""}
196:                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-[#25D366] text-white text-[10px] font-bold hover:bg-[#1DA851] transition w-full justify-center"
197:                             onClick={(e) => {
198:                                 if (!whatsapp) {
199:                                     e.preventDefault();
200:                                     alert('Nomor WhatsApp belum dikonfigurasi di pengaturan.');
201:                                 }
202:                             }}
203:                         >
204:                             <svg className="h-3.5 w-3.5 fill-current" viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
205:                                 <path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z" />
206:                             </svg>
207:                             Butuh bantuan? WhatsApp Kami
208:                         </a>
209:                     </div>
210:                 </div>
211:             </div>
212: 
213:         </div>

================
File: resources/js/Pages/DataRequests/Partials/DownloadTab.jsx
================
  1: import { useState } from 'react';
  2: import {
  3:     CircleStackIcon,
  4: } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  5: 
  6: import { ProofPreviewModal, ProductUploadSection, FileIcon } from './DownloadHelpers';
  7: import DownloadLeftPanel from './DownloadLeftPanel';
  8: import DownloadRightPanel from './DownloadRightPanel';
  9: 
 10: // ── Main Component ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 11: export default function DownloadTab({
 12:     status,
 13:     processedDocuments = [],
 14:     dataRequestId,
 15:     dataRequestTitle,
 16:     hasSubmittedFeedback = false,
 17:     userFeedback = null,
 18:     userFeedbackAt = null,
 19:     areSurveysCompleted = false,
 20:     requiredSurveys = [],
 21:     surveys = [],
 22:     availableSurveys = [],
 23:     canUploadProduct = false,
 24:     productUploads = [],
 25:     isNonCommercial = false,
 26: }) {
 27:     const isProcessing = status === 'processing';
 28:     const isCompleted = status === 'completed';
 29: 
 30:     // Default ke 'sesuai' — toggle pill langsung tampil dari awal sebagai Ya/Tidak
 31:     const hasAnySurveySubmitted = surveys.length > 0;
 32:     const initialMode = 'sesuai';
 33: 
 34:     const [dataStatusMode, setDataStatusMode] = useState(initialMode);
 35:     const [feedbackSent, setFeedbackSent] = useState(false);
 36:     const [previewDoc, setPreviewDoc] = useState({ url: null, type: 'image' });
 37: 
 38:     // Selected file for iframe viewer — default ke index 0
 39:     const [selectedDocId, setSelectedDocId] = useState(
 40:         processedDocuments.length > 0 ? processedDocuments[0].id : null
 41:     );
 42:     const selectedDoc = processedDocuments.find((d) => d.id === selectedDocId) ?? processedDocuments[0] ?? null;
 43: 
 44:     const feedbackAlreadySubmitted = hasSubmittedFeedback || feedbackSent;
 45:     const isUnlockStarted = areSurveysCompleted;
 46: 
 47:     // Lock mode:
 48:     // - Sudah ada survey yang dikirim (baik approved, pending, maupun rejected) -> terkunci ke 'sesuai'
 49:     // - Belum ada survey yang dikirim -> slider tetap bebas
 50:     const isModeLockedToSesuai = surveys.length > 0;
 51:     const isModeChangeable = !isModeLockedToSesuai;
 52: 
 53:     // Feedback hanya bisa diakses selama belum ada survey yang dikirim
 54:     const canAccessFeedback = surveys.length === 0;
 55: 
 56:     const formatDate = (isoString) => {
 57:         if (!isoString) return '-';
 58:         return new Date(isoString).toLocaleString('id-ID', {
 59:             day: '2-digit', month: 'long', year: 'numeric',
 60:             hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit',
 61:         });
 62:     };
 63: 
 64:     // ── Processing state ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 65:     if (isProcessing) {
 66:         return (
 67:             <div className="w-full bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-24 px-8 text-center">
 68:                 <CircleStackIcon className="h-24 w-24 text-gray-300 mb-6" />
 69:                 <h4 className="text-xl font-extrabold text-gray-900 mb-3">Admin Sedang Memproses Data yang Diajukan</h4>
 70:                 <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 leading-relaxed max-w-2xl mx-auto">
 71:                     Proses ini memerlukan waktu karena admin BMKG sedang melakukan pengolahan dan penyesuaian data sesuai dengan permintaan Anda. Silakan melakukan pengecekan halaman ini secara berkala. Pemberitahuan juga akan disampaikan melalui email setelah file selesai diproses.
 72:                 </p>
 73:             </div>
 74:         );
 75:     }
 76: 
 77:     if (!isCompleted) return null;
 78: 
 79:     const getExt = (filename = '') => filename.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
 80:     const PREVIEWABLE = ['pdf', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg'];
 81:     const isPreviewable = (doc) => doc && PREVIEWABLE.includes(getExt(doc.original_name));
 82: 
 83:     const rawDocumentUrl = selectedDoc
 84:         ? route('data-requests.preview-document', [dataRequestId, selectedDoc.id])
 85:         : null;
 86:     const previewUrl = selectedDoc && isPreviewable(selectedDoc) ? rawDocumentUrl : null;
 87: 
 88:     // Determine if the research upload banner should show
 89:     const showResearchUpload = isNonCommercial && isUnlockStarted && (canUploadProduct || productUploads.length > 0);
 90: 
 91:     return (
 92:         <div className="flex flex-col gap-8 w-full pb-8">
 93: 
 94:             {/* ── Full-width Research Upload Banner ── */}
 95:             {showResearchUpload && (
 96:                 <div className="w-full bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
 97:                     <div className="px-8 py-5 border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/30 flex items-center justify-between">
 98:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 99:                             <FileIcon extension="pdf" />
100:                             <h3 className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Unggah Laporan Hasil Penelitian</h3>
101:                         </div>
102:                         <span className="text-[9px] text-red-500 font-black uppercase tracking-wider">Wajib</span>
103:                     </div>
104:                     <div className="p-6">
105:                         <ProductUploadSection
106:                             dataRequestId={dataRequestId}
107:                             title={dataRequestTitle}
108:                             canUpload={canUploadProduct}
109:                             uploads={productUploads}
110:                             onPreviewProof={(url) => setPreviewDoc({ url, type: 'pdf' })}
111:                         />
112:                     </div>
113:                 </div>
114:             )}
115: 
116:             {/* ── Two-panel layout ── */}
117:             <div className="flex flex-col-reverse lg:flex-row gap-8 items-start w-full">
118:                 <DownloadLeftPanel
119:                     processedDocuments={processedDocuments}
120:                     selectedDoc={selectedDoc}
121:                     selectedDocId={selectedDocId}
122:                     onSelectDoc={setSelectedDocId}
123:                     isUnlockStarted={isUnlockStarted}
124:                     dataRequestId={dataRequestId}
125:                     previewUrl={previewUrl}
126:                     rawDocumentUrl={rawDocumentUrl}
127:                     getExt={getExt}
128:                 />
129:                 <DownloadRightPanel
130:                     dataRequestId={dataRequestId}
131:                     dataRequestTitle={dataRequestTitle}
132:                     isUnlockStarted={isUnlockStarted}
133:                     isModeLockedToSesuai={isModeLockedToSesuai}
134:                     isModeChangeable={isModeChangeable}
135:                     canAccessFeedback={canAccessFeedback}
136:                     dataStatusMode={dataStatusMode}
137:                     setDataStatusMode={setDataStatusMode}
138:                     feedbackAlreadySubmitted={feedbackAlreadySubmitted}
139:                     setFeedbackSent={setFeedbackSent}
140:                     userFeedback={userFeedback}
141:                     userFeedbackAt={userFeedbackAt}
142:                     requiredSurveys={requiredSurveys}
143:                     surveys={surveys}
144:                     availableSurveys={availableSurveys}
145:                     setPreviewDoc={setPreviewDoc}
146:                     formatDate={formatDate}
147:                 />
148:             </div>
149: 
150:             <ProofPreviewModal
151:                 url={previewDoc.url}
152:                 type={previewDoc.type}
153:                 onClose={() => setPreviewDoc({ url: null, type: 'image' })}
154:             />
155:         </div>
156:     );
157: }

 1: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';
 2: import { XMarkIcon, ChatBubbleLeftRightIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';

 4: export default function FeedbackConfirmationModal({ show, feedback, processing, onClose, onConfirm }) {
 5:     return (
 6:         <Transition show={show} leave="duration-200">
 7:             <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={onClose}>
 8:                 <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0" enterTo="opacity-100" leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100" leaveTo="opacity-0">
 9:                     <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" />
10:                 </TransitionChild>
11:                 <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0 translate-y-4 scale-95" enterTo="opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100" leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100" leaveTo="opacity-0 translate-y-4 scale-95">
12:                     <div className="fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
13:                         <DialogPanel className="w-full max-w-md overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-100">
14:                             <div className="flex items-start justify-between px-6 pt-6 pb-4">

16:                                     <div className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-gray-900">

18:                                     </div>

20:                                         <h2 className="text-base font-extrabold text-gray-900">Konfirmasi Feedback</h2>

22:                                     </div>
23:                                 </div>
24:                                 <button onClick={onClose} className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600">
25:                                     <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
26:                                 </button>
27:                             </div>
28: 
29:                             <div className="px-6 mb-5">

33:                                     [&::-webkit-scrollbar-track]:rounded-full [&::-webkit-scrollbar-track]:bg-gray-100
34:                                     [&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb]:rounded-full [&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb]:bg-gray-300">
35:                                     <p className="text-sm text-gray-800 whitespace-pre-wrap leading-relaxed break-words">{feedback}</p>
36:                                 </div>
37:                             </div>
38: 
39:                             <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3 border-t border-gray-100 px-6 py-4 bg-gray-50/50">

41:                                     Batal
42:                                 </button>
43:                                 <button type="button" onClick={onConfirm} disabled={processing} className="px-6 py-2.5 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-xl font-bold text-sm hover:bg-black transition-all shadow-lg disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2">
44:                                     {processing ? (
45:                                         <>
46:                                             <svg className="animate-spin h-4 w-4 text-white" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
47:                                                 <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4"></circle>

================
File: resources/js/Pages/DataRequests/Partials/FeedbackForm.jsx
================
 1: import { useState } from 'react';
 2: import { useForm } from '@inertiajs/react';
 3: import FeedbackConfirmationModal from './FeedbackConfirmationModal';
 4: 
 5: export default function FeedbackForm({ dataRequestId, onSuccess }) {
 6:     const { data, setData, post, processing, errors, reset } = useForm({ feedback: '' });
 7:     const maxLen = 1000;
 8: 
 9:     const [showConfirm, setShowConfirm] = useState(false);
10: 
11:     const handleSubmit = (e) => {
12:         e.preventDefault();
13:         setShowConfirm(true);
14:     };
15: 
16:     const handleConfirmSubmit = () => {
17:         post(route('data-requests.feedback.store', dataRequestId), {
18:             onSuccess: () => { reset(); setShowConfirm(false); onSuccess?.(); },
19:             onError: () => { setShowConfirm(false); }
20:         });
21:     };
22: 
23:     return (
24:         <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-2.5">
25:             <textarea
26:                 id="feedback-textarea"
27:                 value={data.feedback}
28:                 onChange={(e) => setData('feedback', e.target.value)}
29:                 maxLength={maxLen}
30:                 rows={3}
31:                 placeholder="Tuliskan detail koreksi data di sini..."
32:                 className="w-full rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-2.5 text-xs text-gray-800 placeholder-gray-400 focus:border-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-200 resize-none transition"
33:             />
34:             <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
35:                 <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{data.feedback.length}/{maxLen}</span>
36:                 {errors.feedback && <span className="text-[10px] text-red-500">{errors.feedback}</span>}
37:             </div>
38:             <button
39:                 type="submit"
40:                 disabled={processing || data.feedback.trim().length === 0}
41:                 className="w-full py-2.5 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-bold hover:bg-black transition disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
42:             >
43:                 {processing ? 'Mengirim...' : 'Kirim Feedback'}
44:             </button>
45: 
46:             <FeedbackConfirmationModal
47:                 show={showConfirm}
48:                 feedback={data.feedback}
49:                 processing={processing}
50:                 onClose={() => setShowConfirm(false)}
51:                 onConfirm={handleConfirmSubmit}
52:             />
53:         </form>
54:     );
55: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/DataRequests/Partials/FileIcon.jsx
================
 1: import React from 'react';
 2: 
 3: export default function FileIcon({ extension = '', size = 'sm' }) {
 4:     // Return empty fallback if no extension and we want just a tiny icon maybe? 
 5:     // Usually it should say FILE or the extension.
 6:     const ext = extension ? extension.toLowerCase().replace('.', '') : 'file';
 7:     
 8:     let colorClass = 'bg-gray-600';
 9:     let linesColor = 'bg-gray-200';
10:     
11:     if (['pdf'].includes(ext)) {
12:         colorClass = 'bg-red-600';
13:         linesColor = 'bg-red-100';
14:     } else if (['doc', 'docx'].includes(ext)) {
15:         colorClass = 'bg-blue-600';
16:         linesColor = 'bg-blue-100';
17:     } else if (['xls', 'xlsx', 'csv'].includes(ext)) {
18:         colorClass = 'bg-green-600';
19:         linesColor = 'bg-green-100';
20:     } else if (['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'svg', 'webp', 'bmp'].includes(ext)) {
21:         colorClass = 'bg-indigo-600';
22:         linesColor = 'bg-indigo-100';
23:     } else if (['zip', 'rar', '7z', 'tar', 'gz'].includes(ext)) {
24:         colorClass = 'bg-amber-500';
25:         linesColor = 'bg-amber-100';
26:     }
27:     
28:     const extensionLabels = {
29:         html: 'HTML',
30:         htm: 'HTML',
31:         json: 'JSON',
32:         txt: 'TXT',
33:         xml: 'XML',
34:         jpeg: 'JPEG',
35:     };
36:     
37:     const displayExt = extensionLabels[ext] ?? (ext.length > 4 ? ext.substring(0, 4) : ext).toUpperCase();
38: 
39:     if (size === 'lg') {
40:         return (
41:             <div className="relative w-16 h-20 mx-auto flex-shrink-0">
42:                 <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-white rounded-xl shadow border border-gray-200" />
43:                 <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-5 h-5 bg-gray-100 rounded-bl-lg border-l border-b border-gray-200" />
44:                 <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-center w-full px-2">
45:                     <div className={`${colorClass} px-2 py-1 rounded-md shadow-sm inline-block`}>
46:                         <span className={`text-[12px] font-bold text-white leading-none block uppercase ${displayExt.length > 3 ? 'tracking-tighter' : 'tracking-tight'}`}>
47:                             {displayExt}
48:                         </span>
49:                     </div>
50:                 </div>
51:                 <div className="absolute bottom-3 left-3 right-4">
52:                     <div className={`h-1.5 ${linesColor} rounded mb-1.5`} />
53:                     <div className={`h-1.5 ${linesColor} rounded w-2/3`} />
54:                 </div>
55:             </div>
56:         );
57:     }
58: 
59:     return (
60:         <div className="relative w-6 h-8 flex-shrink-0">
61:             <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-white rounded-md shadow-sm border border-gray-200" />
62:             <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-3 h-3 bg-gray-100 rounded-bl-md border-l border-b border-gray-200" />
63:             <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-center">
64:                 <div className={`${colorClass} px-1 py-0.5 rounded-sm shadow-sm inline-block`}>
65:                     <span className={`text-[8px] font-bold text-white leading-none block ${displayExt.length > 3 ? 'tracking-tighter' : 'tracking-tight'}`}>
66:                         {displayExt}
67:                     </span>
68:                 </div>
69:             </div>
70:         </div>
71:     );
72: }

 1: import { ArrowDownTrayIcon, EyeIcon, DocumentTextIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';

 3: 
 4: export default function InvoicePreviewArea({ invoicePreviewPath, invoiceDownloadPath, invoiceFilename }) {
 5:     const getExt = (filename = '') => filename.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
 6:     const ext = getExt(invoiceFilename || '.pdf');
 7: 
 8:     return (
 9:         <div>
10:             <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 mb-3">Dokumen Virtual Account</p>
11:             {invoicePreviewPath ? (
12:                 <div className="rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden shadow-sm" style={{ minHeight: '360px', height: '50vh' }}>
13:                     <div className="flex items-center justify-between bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-100 px-4 py-2.5">
14:                         <div className="flex items-start gap-3 min-w-0 flex-1">
15:                             <FileIcon extension={ext} />
16:                             <div className="overflow-hidden min-w-0">
17:                                 <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 break-words whitespace-normal">{invoiceFilename || 'Dokumen VA'}</p>
18:                                 <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase">{ext.toUpperCase()}</p>
19:                             </div>
20:                         </div>
21:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-3 shrink-0 ml-2">
22:                             <a href={invoicePreviewPath} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 transition-colors">
23:                                 <EyeIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" /> Lihat
24:                             </a>
25:                             <a href={invoiceDownloadPath} className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 transition-colors">
26:                                 <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" /> Unduh
27:                             </a>
28:                         </div>
29:                     </div>
30:                     <iframe
31:                         src={`${invoicePreviewPath}#toolbar=0&navpanes=0&view=FitW&page=1`}
32:                         className="w-full border-0 bg-white"
33:                         style={{ height: 'calc(100% - 41px)' }}
34:                         title="Invoice Pembayaran"
35:                     />
36:                 </div>
37:             ) : (
38:                 <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 rounded-2xl border-2 border-dashed border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/50 px-6 py-12 text-center">
39:                     <DocumentTextIcon className="h-10 w-10 text-gray-300" />
40:                     <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-400">Dokumen belum tersedia</p>
41:                     <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">Admin sedang menyiapkan Invoice pembayaran Anda.</p>
42:                 </div>
43:             )}
44:         </div>
45:     );
46: }

 1: export default function KetentuanPembayaran() {
 2:     return (
 3:         <div className="space-y-6">
 4: 
 5:             <ol className="text-[12px] text-gray-600 leading-relaxed list-decimal list-outside space-y-3.5 pl-5">
 6:                 <li>Pembayaran hanya dapat dilakukan sebelum tanggal kedaluwarsa. Jika tanggal kedaluwarsa telah tercapai, billing receipt ini tidak berlaku lagi.</li>
 7:                 <li>Cara pembayaran dapat melalui berbagai macam payment channel seperti Over The Counter bank/pos persepsi, ATM, Internet Banking, EDC, dan Dompet Elektronik fintech.</li>
 8:                 <li>Bawalah Bukti Pembuatan Tagihan (Billing Receipt) ini ke tempat-tempat pembayaran resmi. Kode referensi untuk pembayaran adalah kode billing sesuai yang tertera di dokumen ini.</li>
 9:                 <li>Pastikan dokumen ini atau hasil cetakannya dibawa apabila Anda akan melakukan pembayaran di teller bank/pos.</li>
10:                 <li>Pastikan bahwa data detail pembayaran dalam dokumen ini sama dengan data yang tertera/tercantum ketika Anda akan melakukan pembayaran.</li>
11:                 <li>Apabila pembayaran berhasil, Anda akan menerima Tanda Bukti Setor atau struk dari Bank atau payment channel.</li>
12:                 <li>Simpanlah Tanda Bukti Setor/struk/BPN untuk dipergunakan sebagai bukti bayar yang sah.</li>
13:                 <li>Tata cara pembayaran lebih lanjut dapat diakses pada website <a href="https://mpn.kemenkeu.go.id/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" className="text-blue-600 hover:underline font-semibold">mpn.kemenkeu.go.id</a>.</li>
14:                 <li>Untuk pertanyaan yang berkaitan dengan pembayaran dan status billing dapat menghubungi HAI DJPb di nomor <span className="font-bold text-gray-900">14090</span>.</li>
15:                 <li>Apabila mengalami gangguan pada Aplikasi SIMPONI atau membutuhkan bantuan, hubungi call center Kemenkeu Prime di nomor <span className="font-bold text-gray-900">134</span>.</li>
16:             </ol>
17:         </div>
18:     );
19: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/DataRequests/Partials/PaymentActionPanel.jsx

  1: import { useState } from 'react';
  2: import { Link } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import {
  4:     CheckIcon,
  5:     ClipboardIcon,
  6:     CheckCircleIcon,
  7:     ClockIcon,
  8:     ExclamationTriangleIcon,
  9:     ArrowPathIcon,
 10:     ArrowUpTrayIcon,
 11: } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 12: 
 13: import {
 14:     ProofPreviewModal,
 15:     UploadProofSection,
 16:     BillingHistorySection,
 17:     InvoicePreviewArea,
 18:     ProofCard,
 19:     formatCurrency,
 20:     formatDate,
 21: } from './PaymentHelpers';
 22: 
 23: // ── Payment Details Row ─────────────────────────────────────────
 24: const PaymentDetailsRow = ({ paymentAmount, billingCode, expiresAt, paymentVerifiedAt, copied, onCopy, status }) => {
 25:     const isExpired = status === 'expired';
 26:     const isVerified = ['payment_verified', 'processing', 'completed'].includes(status);
 27: 
 28:     return (
 29:         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
 30:             {paymentAmount && (
 31:                 <div className="rounded-xl border border-gray-100 bg-white shadow-sm px-4 py-3 text-left">
 32:                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Nominal Pembayaran</p>
 33:                     <p className="text-lg font-extrabold text-gray-900">{formatCurrency(paymentAmount)}</p>
 34:                 </div>
 35:             )}
 36: 
 37:             {billingCode && (
 38:                 <div className="rounded-xl border border-gray-100 bg-white shadow-sm px-4 py-3 text-left">
 39:                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Kode Billing</p>
 40:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 41:                         <p className="text-lg font-extrabold tracking-widest text-gray-900">{billingCode}</p>
 42:                         <button onClick={() => onCopy(billingCode)} className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-md transition-colors" title="Salin Kode Billing">
 43:                             {copied
 44:                                 ? <CheckIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
 45:                                 : <ClipboardIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
 46:                             }
 47:                         </button>
 48:                     </div>
 49:                 </div>
 50:             )}
 51: 
 52:             {isVerified ? (
 53:                 paymentVerifiedAt && (
 54:                     <div className="rounded-xl border border-gray-100 bg-white shadow-sm px-4 py-3 text-left flex items-start gap-3">
 55:                         <CheckCircleIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
 56:                         <div>
 57:                             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-0.5">Diverifikasi Pada</p>
 58:                             <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-900">{formatDate(paymentVerifiedAt)}</p>
 59:                         </div>
 60:                     </div>
 61:                 )
 62:             ) : (
 63:                 expiresAt && (
 64:                     <div className="rounded-xl border border-gray-100 bg-white shadow-sm px-4 py-3 text-left flex items-start gap-3">
 65:                         <ClockIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
 66:                         <div>
 67:                             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-0.5">
 68:                                 {isExpired ? 'Kedaluwarsa Pada' : 'Batas Waktu Pembayaran'}
 69:                             </p>
 70:                             <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-900">{formatDate(expiresAt)}</p>
 71:                         </div>
 72:                     </div>
 73:                 )
 74:             )}
 75:         </div>
 76:     );
 77: };
 78: 
 79: 
 80: // ── Right action panel ─────────────────────────────────────────
 81: export default function PaymentActionPanel({ status, invoicePreviewPath, invoiceDownloadPath, proofPath, proofPreviewPath, proofOriginalName, proofFileSize, maxReachedStep, onNextTab, dataRequestId, billingHistory, activeInvoiceId, invoiceFilename, paymentAmount, billingCode, expiresAt, paymentVerifiedAt, copied, onCopy }) {
 82:     const [previewUrl, setPreviewUrl] = useState(null);
 83:     const [showUpload, setShowUpload] = useState(false);
 84: 
 85:     const actionTitles = {
 86:         payment_required: 'Unggah Bukti Pembayaran',
 87:         payment_verifying: 'Bukti Pembayaran Dikirim',
 88:         payment_verified: 'Pembayaran Dikonfirmasi',
 89:         payment_invalid: 'Unggah Ulang Bukti Pembayaran',
 90:         expired: 'Pembayaran Kedaluwarsa',
 91:         processing: 'Pembayaran Dikonfirmasi',
 92:         completed: 'Pembayaran Dikonfirmasi',
 93:     };
 94: 
 95:     return (
 96:         <>
 97:             <ProofPreviewModal url={previewUrl} onClose={() => setPreviewUrl(null)} />
 98:             <div className="w-full lg:w-2/3 flex">
 99:                 <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden w-full flex flex-col">
100:                     <div className="px-8 py-6 border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/30">
101:                         <h3 className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest">
102:                             {actionTitles[status] ?? 'Pembayaran'}
103:                         </h3>
104:                     </div>
105: 
106:                     <div className="p-8 flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-0">
107:                         {status === 'payment_required' && (
108:                             <div className="flex flex-col gap-5 flex-1 min-h-0">
109:                                 <InvoicePreviewArea invoicePreviewPath={invoicePreviewPath} invoiceDownloadPath={invoiceDownloadPath} invoiceFilename={invoiceFilename} />
110:                                 <PaymentDetailsRow
111:                                     paymentAmount={paymentAmount}
112:                                     billingCode={billingCode}
113:                                     expiresAt={expiresAt}
114:                                     paymentVerifiedAt={paymentVerifiedAt}
115:                                     copied={copied}
116:                                     onCopy={onCopy}
117:                                     status={status}
118:                                 />
119:                                 <div className="border-t border-gray-100 pt-5 space-y-4">
120:                                     <ProofCard proofPath={proofPath} proofPreviewPath={proofPreviewPath} onPreview={setPreviewUrl} originalName={proofOriginalName} fileSize={proofFileSize} />
121:                                     {invoicePreviewPath && (
122:                                         <div>
123:                                             <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 mb-3">
124:                                                 {proofPath ? 'Perbarui Bukti Pembayaran' : 'Unggah Bukti Pembayaran'}
125:                                             </p>
126:                                             <UploadProofSection dataRequestId={dataRequestId} />
127:                                         </div>
128:                                     )}
129:                                 </div>
130:                                 <BillingHistorySection billingHistory={billingHistory} activeInvoiceId={activeInvoiceId} onPreview={setPreviewUrl} />
131:                             </div>
132:                         )}
133: 
134:                         {status === 'payment_verifying' && (
135:                             <div className="flex flex-col gap-5 flex-1 min-h-0">
136:                                 <InvoicePreviewArea invoicePreviewPath={invoicePreviewPath} invoiceDownloadPath={invoiceDownloadPath} invoiceFilename={invoiceFilename} />
137:                                 <PaymentDetailsRow
138:                                     paymentAmount={paymentAmount}
139:                                     billingCode={billingCode}
140:                                     expiresAt={expiresAt}
141:                                     paymentVerifiedAt={paymentVerifiedAt}
142:                                     copied={copied}
143:                                     onCopy={onCopy}
144:                                     status={status}
145:                                 />
146: 
147:                                 <div className="border-t border-gray-100 pt-5 space-y-4">
148:                                     <ProofCard proofPath={proofPath} proofPreviewPath={proofPreviewPath} onPreview={setPreviewUrl} originalName={proofOriginalName} fileSize={proofFileSize} />
149:                                 </div>
150:                                 <BillingHistorySection billingHistory={billingHistory} activeInvoiceId={activeInvoiceId} onPreview={setPreviewUrl} />
151:                             </div>
152:                         )}
153: 
154:                         {['payment_verified', 'processing', 'completed'].includes(status) && (
155:                             <div className="flex flex-col gap-5 flex-1 min-h-0">
156:                                 <InvoicePreviewArea invoicePreviewPath={invoicePreviewPath} invoiceDownloadPath={invoiceDownloadPath} invoiceFilename={invoiceFilename} />
157:                                 <PaymentDetailsRow
158:                                     paymentAmount={paymentAmount}
159:                                     billingCode={billingCode}
160:                                     expiresAt={expiresAt}
161:                                     paymentVerifiedAt={paymentVerifiedAt}
162:                                     copied={copied}
163:                                     onCopy={onCopy}
164:                                     status={status}
165:                                 />
166: 
167:                                 <div className="border-t border-gray-100 pt-5 space-y-4">
168:                                     <ProofCard proofPath={proofPath} proofPreviewPath={proofPreviewPath} onPreview={setPreviewUrl} originalName={proofOriginalName} fileSize={proofFileSize} />
169:                                 </div>
170:                                 <BillingHistorySection billingHistory={billingHistory} activeInvoiceId={activeInvoiceId} onPreview={setPreviewUrl} />
171:                             </div>
172:                         )}
173: 
174:                         {status === 'payment_invalid' && (
175:                             <div className="flex flex-col gap-5 flex-1 min-h-0">
176:                                 <InvoicePreviewArea invoicePreviewPath={invoicePreviewPath} invoiceDownloadPath={invoiceDownloadPath} invoiceFilename={invoiceFilename} />
177:                                 <PaymentDetailsRow
178:                                     paymentAmount={paymentAmount}
179:                                     billingCode={billingCode}
180:                                     expiresAt={expiresAt}
181:                                     paymentVerifiedAt={paymentVerifiedAt}
182:                                     copied={copied}
183:                                     onCopy={onCopy}
184:                                     status={status}
185:                                 />
186:                                 <div className="border-t border-gray-100 pt-5 space-y-4">
187:                                     <ProofCard proofPath={proofPath} proofPreviewPath={proofPreviewPath} onPreview={setPreviewUrl} label="Bukti Sebelumnya" originalName={proofOriginalName} fileSize={proofFileSize} />
188:                                     <div>
189:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 mb-3">
190:                                             Unggah Ulang Bukti Pembayaran
191:                                         </p>
192:                                         <UploadProofSection dataRequestId={dataRequestId} />
193:                                     </div>
194:                                 </div>
195:                                 <BillingHistorySection billingHistory={billingHistory} activeInvoiceId={activeInvoiceId} onPreview={setPreviewUrl} />
196:                             </div>
197:                         )}
198: 
199:                         {status === 'expired' && (
200:                             <div className="flex flex-col gap-5 flex-1 min-h-0">
201:                                 <InvoicePreviewArea invoicePreviewPath={invoicePreviewPath} invoiceDownloadPath={invoiceDownloadPath} invoiceFilename={invoiceFilename} />
202:                                 <PaymentDetailsRow
203:                                     paymentAmount={paymentAmount}
204:                                     billingCode={billingCode}
205:                                     expiresAt={expiresAt}
206:                                     paymentVerifiedAt={paymentVerifiedAt}
207:                                     copied={copied}
208:                                     onCopy={onCopy}
209:                                     status={status}
210:                                 />
211: 
212:                                 <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-8 pt-4">
213:                                     <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col space-y-5">
214:                                         <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
215:                                             <div className="p-2.5 bg-orange-50 rounded-xl">
216:                                                 <ExclamationTriangleIcon className="h-6 w-6 text-orange-500 shrink-0" />
217:                                             </div>
218:                                             <div>
219:                                                 <p className="text-sm font-bold uppercase text-orange-600 tracking-tight">Sudah Bayar?</p>
220:                                                 <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500 leading-relaxed mt-1.5">
221:                                                     Jika Anda sudah melakukan pembayaran tapi belum mengunggah bukti, Anda tetap bisa mengunggah bukti pembayaran di sini.
222:                                                 </p>
223:                                             </div>
224:                                         </div>
225:                                         <div className="mt-auto pt-2">
226:                                             {!showUpload ? (
227:                                                 <button
228:                                                     onClick={() => setShowUpload(true)}
229:                                                     className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 w-full px-5 py-3 bg-orange-600 text-white rounded-xl text-[11px] font-bold uppercase hover:bg-orange-700 transition-all shadow-sm"
230:                                                 >
231:                                                     <ArrowUpTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
232:                                                     Unggah Bukti Sekarang
233:                                                 </button>
234:                                             ) : (
235:                                                 <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl p-5 border border-gray-100 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-2 duration-300">
236:                                                     <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
237:                                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">
238:                                                             Unggah Bukti Pembayaran
239:                                                         </p>
240:                                                         <button onClick={() => setShowUpload(false)} className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 uppercase">Batal</button>
241:                                                     </div>
242:                                                     <UploadProofSection dataRequestId={dataRequestId} />
243:                                                 </div>
244:                                             )}
245:                                         </div>
246:                                     </div>
247: 
248:                                     {/* Vertical Separator */}
249:                                     <div className="hidden md:block w-px bg-gray-100 self-stretch my-2"></div>
250: 
251:                                     <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col space-y-5">
252:                                         <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
253:                                             <div className="p-2.5 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
254:                                                 <ArrowPathIcon className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-400 shrink-0" />
255:                                             </div>
256:                                             <div>
257:                                                 <p className="text-sm font-bold uppercase text-gray-600 tracking-tight">Belum Bayar?</p>
258:                                                 <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500 leading-relaxed mt-1.5">
259:                                                     Ajukan Invoice baru agar admin menerbitkan dokumen pembayaran yang baru.
260:                                                 </p>
261:                                             </div>
262:                                         </div>
263:                                         <div className="mt-auto pt-2">
264:                                             <Link
265:                                                 href={route('data-requests.request-new-invoice', dataRequestId)}
266:                                                 method="post"
267:                                                 as="button"
268:                                                 className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 w-full px-5 py-3 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-xl text-[11px] font-bold uppercase hover:bg-black transition-all shadow-sm"
269:                                             >
270:                                                 <ArrowPathIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
271:                                                 Minta Invoice Baru
272:                                             </Link>
273:                                         </div>
274:                                     </div>
275:                                 </div>
276: 
277:                                 <div className="border-t border-gray-100 pt-5 space-y-4">
278:                                     <ProofCard proofPath={proofPath} proofPreviewPath={proofPreviewPath} onPreview={setPreviewUrl} originalName={proofOriginalName} fileSize={proofFileSize} />
279:                                 </div>
280:                                 <BillingHistorySection billingHistory={billingHistory} activeInvoiceId={activeInvoiceId} onPreview={setPreviewUrl} />
281:                             </div>
282:                         )}
283:                     </div>
284:                 </div>
285:             </div>
286:         </>
287:     );
288: }

 8: export const formatCurrency = (amount) =>
 9:     new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID', { style: 'currency', currency: 'IDR', minimumFractionDigits: 0 }).format(amount);

11: export const formatDate = (dateString) =>
12:     dateString
13:         ? new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('id-ID', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
14:         : null;

198: // ── Left status panel (now shows status + next button) ─────────
199: export default function PaymentStatusPanel({ status, invoicePreviewPath, rejectionReason, maxReachedStep, onNextTab, dataRequestId }) {
200:     const [showGuide, setShowGuide] = useState(false);
201:     const [showKetentuan, setShowKetentuan] = useState(false);
202: 
203:     const isCompleted = ['payment_verified', 'processing', 'completed'].includes(status);
204: 
205:     const renderDetailedLayout = () => {
206:         const isVerifying = status === 'payment_verifying';
207:         const isInvalid = status === 'payment_invalid';
208:         const isExpired = status === 'expired';
209: 
210:         const headerIcon = isInvalid
211:             ? <XCircleIcon className="h-12 w-12 text-red-500 mx-auto" />
212:             : isExpired
213:                 ? <ExclamationTriangleIcon className="h-12 w-12 text-orange-500 mx-auto" />
214:                 : isVerifying
215:                     ? <ClockIcon className="h-12 w-12 text-yellow-500 mx-auto" />
216:                     : <ClockIcon className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-400 mx-auto" />;
217: 
218:         const headerTitle = isInvalid
219:             ? 'Pembayaran Ditolak'
220:             : isExpired
221:                 ? 'Invoice Kedaluwarsa'
222:                 : isVerifying
223:                     ? 'Menunggu Verifikasi Admin'
224:                     : 'Menunggu Pembayaran';
225: 
226:         const headerSubtitle = isInvalid
227:             ? (
228:                 <>
229:                     Bukti pembayaran yang diunggah tidak valid. Mohon unggah ulang bukti pembayaran yang sesuai pada kolom <b>unggah ulang bukti pembayaran</b>. Silakan lihat alasan penolakan untuk informasi lebih lanjut.
230:                 </>
231:             )
232:             : isExpired
233:                 ? (
234:                     <>
235:                         Batas waktu pembayaran pada Invoice ini telah habis. Jika Anda sudah membayar tetapi lupa mengunggah bukti, silakan tetap unggah bukti bayar Anda. Namun jika belum membayar, silakan tekan tombol <b>Minta Invoice Baru</b> untuk mendapatkan kode billing yang baru.
236:                     </>
237:                 )
238:                 : isVerifying
239:                     ? 'Bukti pembayaran Anda sedang diperiksa oleh admin. Mohon tunggu hingga proses verifikasi selesai.'
240:                     : 'Lakukan pembayaran sesuai dokumen Virtual Account lalu unggah bukti pembayaran Anda.';
241: 
242:         return (
243:             <div className="flex flex-col gap-5 flex-1">
244:                 <div className="text-center space-y-2">
245:                     {headerIcon}
246:                     <h4 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">{headerTitle}</h4>
247:                     <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">{headerSubtitle}</p>
248:                 </div>
249: 
250:                 {isInvalid && (
251:                     <>
252:                         <div className="w-full h-px bg-gray-100"></div>
253:                         <div>
254:                             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Alasan Penolakan</p>
255:                             {rejectionReason ? (
256:                                 <p className="text-xs text-red-800 leading-relaxed">{rejectionReason}</p>
257:                             ) : (
258:                                 <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">Tidak ada keterangan dari admin.</p>
259:                             )}
260:                         </div>
261:                     </>
262:                 )}
263: 
264:                 {isExpired && (
265:                     <div className="w-full h-px bg-gray-100 mt-2"></div>
266:                 )}
267: 
268:                 {!isVerifying && !isInvalid && !isExpired && !invoicePreviewPath && (
269:                     <>
270:                         <div className="w-full h-px bg-gray-100"></div>
271:                         <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
272:                             <DocumentTextIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
273:                             <div>
274:                                 <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase text-gray-500">Dokumen VA Belum Tersedia</p>
275:                                 <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 leading-relaxed mt-0.5">Admin sedang menyiapkan dokumen pembayaran.</p>
276:                             </div>
277:                         </div>
278:                     </>
279:                 )}
280: 
281:                 <div className="mt-8 space-y-3">
282:                     <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 mb-2">Ketentuan & Tata Cara Pembayaran</p>
283: 
284:                     <button
285:                         onClick={() => setShowKetentuan(true)}
286:                         className="w-full flex items-center gap-4 p-4 bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl transition-all text-left group shadow-sm"
287:                     >
288:                         <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gray-900 flex items-center justify-center text-white shrink-0 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform shadow-sm">
289:                             <BookOpenIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
290:                         </div>
291:                         <div className="flex-1">
292:                             <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-900 uppercase tracking-tight">Ketentuan Pembayaran</p>
293:                             <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-medium leading-tight">Aturan & informasi penting</p>
294:                         </div>
295:                         <ArrowRightIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform" />
296:                     </button>
297: 
298:                     {!isCompleted && (
299:                         <button
300:                             onClick={() => setShowGuide(true)}
301:                             className="w-full flex items-center gap-4 p-4 bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl transition-all text-left group shadow-sm"
302:                         >
303:                             <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gray-900 flex items-center justify-center text-white shrink-0 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform shadow-sm">
304:                                 <QuestionMarkCircleIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
305:                             </div>
306:                             <div className="flex-1">
307:                                 <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-900 uppercase tracking-tight">Tata Cara Pembayaran</p>
308:                                 <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-medium leading-tight">Panduan langkah demi langkah</p>
309:                             </div>
310:                             <ArrowRightIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform" />
311:                         </button>
312:                     )}
313:                 </div>
314:             </div>
315:         );
316:     };
317: 
318:     const renderBigIconLayout = () => {
319:         return (
320:             <div className="space-y-4 my-auto text-center">
321:                 <div className="rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto p-8">
322:                     <CheckCircleIcon className="h-20 w-20 lg:h-32 lg:w-32 text-green-600" />
323:                 </div>
324:                 <h4 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">Pembayaran Diterima</h4>
325:                 <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">
326:                     Pembayaran Anda telah diverifikasi. Data Anda sedang diproses oleh admin.
327:                 </p>
328: 
329:                 <button
330:                     disabled={maxReachedStep < 2}
331:                     onClick={onNextTab}
332:                     className={[
333:                         'inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 w-full px-6 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold uppercase transition-all border shadow-sm mt-4',
334:                         maxReachedStep >= 2
335:                             ? 'bg-gray-900 border-gray-900 text-white hover:bg-black'
336:                             : 'bg-gray-50 border-gray-100 text-gray-300 cursor-not-allowed',
337:                     ].join(' ')}
338:                 >
339:                     Lanjut ke Unduh Data <ArrowRightIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
340:                 </button>
341:             </div>
342:         );
343:     };
344: 
345:     return (
346:         <>
347:             <PaymentGuideModal open={showGuide} onClose={() => setShowGuide(false)} />
348:             <KetentuanModal open={showKetentuan} onClose={() => setShowKetentuan(false)} />
349: 
350:             <div className="w-full lg:w-1/3 flex lg:self-start">
351:                 <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden w-full flex flex-col">
352:                     {/* Panel Header */}
353:                     <div className="px-8 py-6 border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/30 shrink-0">
354:                         <h3 className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Status Pembayaran</h3>
355:                     </div>
356: 
357:                     {/* Panel Body — scrollable */}
358:                     <div className="p-8 flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-y-auto custom-scroll">
359:                         {isCompleted
360:                             ? renderBigIconLayout()
361:                             : renderDetailedLayout()
362:                         }
363:                     </div>
364:                 </div>

  1: import { useState } from 'react';
  2: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';
  3: import { CheckCircleIcon, EyeIcon, XMarkIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  4: import { CheckCircleIcon as CheckCircleSolid } from '@heroicons/react/24/solid';
  5: import FileIcon from './FileIcon';
  6: 
  7: export default function ProductUploadConfirmationModal({ show, files, title, processing, onClose, onConfirm }) {
  8:     const [previewFile, setPreviewFile] = useState(null);
  9:     const [previewUrl, setPreviewUrl] = useState(null);
 10: 
 11:     const handlePreview = (file) => {
 12:         const url = URL.createObjectURL(file);
 13:         setPreviewFile(file);
 14:         setPreviewUrl(url);
 15:     };
 16: 
 17:     const handleClosePreview = () => {
 18:         if (previewUrl) URL.revokeObjectURL(previewUrl);
 19:         setPreviewFile(null);
 20:         setPreviewUrl(null);
 21:     };
 22: 
 23:     if (files.length === 0) return null;
 24: 
 25:     return (
 26:         <>
 27:             {/* Sub-preview modal for current files */}
 28:             <Transition show={!!previewFile} leave="duration-150">
 29:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-[70]" onClose={handleClosePreview}>
 30:                     <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-150" enterFrom="opacity-0" enterTo="opacity-100" leave="ease-in duration-100" leaveFrom="opacity-100" leaveTo="opacity-0">
 31:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm" />
 32:                     </TransitionChild>
 33:                     <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-150" enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95" enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100" leave="ease-in duration-100" leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100" leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95">
 34:                         <div className="fixed inset-4 sm:inset-8 flex items-stretch justify-center">
 35:                             <DialogPanel className="flex w-full max-w-5xl flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200">
 36:                                 <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-100 px-5 py-3.5">
 37:                                     <div className="min-w-0">
 38:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Pratinjau File</p>
 39:                                         <p className="mt-0.5 break-words whitespace-normal font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm">{previewFile?.name}</p>
 40:                                     </div>
 41:                                     <button onClick={handleClosePreview} className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600">
 42:                                         <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
 43:                                     </button>
 44:                                 </div>
 45:                                 <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
 46:                                     {previewUrl && <iframe src={`${previewUrl}#view=FitH`} className="h-full w-full border-0" title="Pratinjau Laporan" />}
 47:                                 </div>
 48:                             </DialogPanel>
 49:                         </div>
 50:                     </TransitionChild>
 51:                 </Dialog>
 52:             </Transition>
 53: 
 54:             {/* Main confirmation modal */}
 55:             <Transition show={show} leave="duration-200">
 56:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={onClose}>
 57:                     <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0" enterTo="opacity-100" leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100" leaveTo="opacity-0">
 58:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" />
 59:                     </TransitionChild>
 60:                     <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0 translate-y-4 scale-95" enterTo="opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100" leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100" leaveTo="opacity-0 translate-y-4 scale-95">
 61:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
 62:                             <DialogPanel className="w-full max-w-lg overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-100 flex flex-col max-h-[90vh]">
 63:                                 {/* Header */}
 64:                                 <div className="flex items-start justify-between px-6 pt-6 pb-4 shrink-0">
 65:                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 66:                                         <div className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-gray-900">
 67:                                             <CheckCircleIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-white" />
 68:                                         </div>
 69:                                         <div>
 70:                                             <h2 className="text-base font-extrabold text-gray-900">Konfirmasi Unggah</h2>

 72:                                         </div>
 73:                                     </div>
 74:                                     <button onClick={onClose} className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600">
 75:                                         <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
 76:                                     </button>
 77:                                 </div>
 78: 
 79:                                 {/* Scrollable Content */}
 80:                                 <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto py-2">

 91:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-3">Dokumen yang Dilampirkan ({files.length})</p>
 92:                                         <div className="space-y-2">

 94:                                                 <div key={idx} className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 bg-white px-4 py-3 shadow-sm">

106:                                                         </button>

109:                                             ))}
110:                                         </div>

112:                                 </div>

118:                                     </button>

120:                                         {processing ? (
121:                                             <>

123:                                                     <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4"></circle>
124:                                                     <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"></path>
