 81: 
 82: // ── Main Component ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 83: export default function ProductUploadSection({ dataRequestId, title, canUpload, uploads = [], onPreviewProof }) {
 84:     const { data, setData, post, processing, errors, reset } = useForm({ files: [] });
 85:     const [showConfirm, setShowConfirm] = useState(false);
 86:     const [deleteTarget, setDeleteTarget] = useState(null); // { id, name }
 87:     const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);
 88:     const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);
 89: 
 90:     const MAX_TOTAL = 10;
 91:     const remainingSlots = Math.max(0, MAX_TOTAL - uploads.length);
 92:     const isOverLimit = data.files.length > remainingSlots;
 93: 
 94:     const handleConfirmSubmit = () => {
 95:         post(route('data-requests.product-uploads.store', dataRequestId), {
 96:             forceFormData: true,
 97:             preserveScroll: true,
 98:             onSuccess: () => { reset('files'); setShowConfirm(false); },
 99:             onError: () => { setShowConfirm(false); },
100:         });
101:     };
102: 
103:     const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setShowConfirm(true); };
104: 
105:     const removeFile = (index) => {
106:         const newFiles = [...data.files];
107:         newFiles.splice(index, 1);
108:         setData('files', newFiles);
109:     };
110: 
111:     const handleDeleteClick = (upload) => {
112:         setDeleteTarget({ id: upload.id, name: upload.original_name });
113:     };
114: 
115:     const handleDeleteConfirm = () => {
116:         setDeleting(true);
117:         router.delete(
118:             route('data-requests.product-uploads.destroy', [dataRequestId, deleteTarget.id]),
119:             {
120:                 preserveScroll: true,
121:                 onSuccess: () => { setDeleteTarget(null); setDeleting(false); },
122:                 onError: () => { setDeleteTarget(null); setDeleting(false); },
123:             }
124:         );
125:     };
126: 
127:     if (!canUpload && uploads.length === 0) return null;
128: 
129:     return (
130:         <div className="space-y-4">
131:             {canUpload && (
132:                 <>
133:                     <p className="text-[11px] text-red-500 leading-relaxed font-bold">
134:                         Sebagai bagian dari layanan non-komersial, Anda wajib mengunggah hasil olah data atau laporan penelitian Anda di sini. Maksimal {MAX_TOTAL} file PDF (maks. 20 MB/file){uploads.length > 0 ? `, sisa ${remainingSlots} slot` : ''}.
135:                     </p>
136:                     <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-3">
137:                         <label
138:                             onDragOver={(e) => {
139:                                 e.preventDefault();
140:                                 const items = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.items);
141:                                 const isValid = items.length === 0 || items.some(item => item.kind !== 'file' || item.type === 'application/pdf' || item.type === '');
142:                                 if (isValid) {
143:                                     e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'copy';
144:                                     setIsDragging(true);
145:                                 } else {
146:                                     e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'none';
147:                                     setIsDragging(false);
148:                                 }
149:                             }}
150:                             onDragLeave={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); setIsDragging(false); }}
151:                             onDrop={(e) => {
152:                                 e.preventDefault();
153:                                 setIsDragging(false);
154:                                 if (e.dataTransfer.files && e.dataTransfer.files.length > 0) {
155:                                     const selectedFiles = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files).filter(
156:                                         file => file.type === 'application/pdf' || file.name.toLowerCase().endsWith('.pdf')
157:                                     );
158:                                     if (selectedFiles.length > 0) {
159:                                         const existingNames = new Set(data.files.map(f => f.name));
160:                                         const newUniqueFiles = selectedFiles.filter(f => !existingNames.has(f.name));
161:                                         if (newUniqueFiles.length > 0) {
162:                                             setData('files', [...data.files, ...newUniqueFiles]);
163:                                         }
164:                                     }
165:                                 }
166:                             }}
167:                             className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-6 border-2 border-dashed rounded-xl transition-all cursor-pointer ${
168:                                 isDragging ? 'border-gray-900 bg-gray-100' : 'border-gray-200 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 hover:border-gray-300'
169:                             }`}
170:                         >
171:                             <ArrowUpTrayIcon className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-400" />
172:                             <div className="text-center">
173:                                 <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-700">Pilih File PDF</p>
174:                                 <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5">Klik untuk memilih hingga 10 file</p>
175:                             </div>
176:                             <input
177:                                 type="file" accept=".pdf" multiple className="hidden"
178:                                 onChange={(e) => {
179:                                     const selectedFiles = Array.from(e.target.files);
180:                                     const existingNames = new Set(data.files.map(f => f.name));
181:                                     const newUniqueFiles = selectedFiles.filter(f => !existingNames.has(f.name));
182:                                     if (newUniqueFiles.length > 0) {
183:                                         setData('files', [...data.files, ...newUniqueFiles]);
184:                                     }
185:                                     e.target.value = '';
186:                                 }}
187:                             />
188:                         </label>
189: 
190:                         {data.files.length > 0 && (
191:                             <div className="space-y-2 pt-2">
192:                                 <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest px-1">Siap Diunggah ({data.files.length}/{remainingSlots})</p>
193:                                 <div className="max-h-56 overflow-y-auto space-y-2 pr-0.5
194:                                     [&::-webkit-scrollbar]:w-1
195:                                     [&::-webkit-scrollbar-track]:rounded-full [&::-webkit-scrollbar-track]:bg-gray-100
196:                                     [&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb]:rounded-full [&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb]:bg-gray-300">
197:                                     {data.files.map((file, idx) => (
198:                                         <div key={idx} className="flex items-start justify-between p-2.5 rounded-xl bg-white border-2 border-dashed border-gray-900 text-[11px] group transition-all min-w-0 gap-3">
199:                                             <div className="flex items-start gap-3 min-w-0 flex-1">
200:                                                 <FileIcon extension={file.name.split('.').pop()} />
201:                                                 <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
202:                                                     <p className="break-words whitespace-normal font-bold text-gray-700">{file.name}</p>
203:                                                     <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase">{(file.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1)} MB</p>
204:                                                 </div>
205:                                             </div>
206:                                             <button type="button" onClick={() => removeFile(idx)} className="p-1.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-all flex-shrink-0" title="Hapus">
207:                                                 <XMarkIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
208:                                             </button>
209:                                         </div>
210:                                     ))}
211:                                 </div>
212:                                 <div className="pt-1 space-y-2">
213:                                     {isOverLimit && (
214:                                         <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1">
215:                                             <span className="text-[10px] text-red-500">Dokumen melebihi batas upload. Maksimal {remainingSlots} file lagi (total 10 file).</span>
216:                                         </div>
217:                                     )}
218:                                     <button
219:                                         type="submit"
220:                                         disabled={processing || isOverLimit || remainingSlots === 0}
221:                                         className="w-full py-2.5 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-bold hover:bg-black transition-all disabled:opacity-40 disabled:bg-gray-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed shadow-lg shadow-gray-200"
222:                                     >
223:                                         {processing ? 'Sedang Mengunggah...' : isOverLimit ? `Melebihi Batas (maks. ${remainingSlots} file)` : `Unggah ${data.files.length} File`}
224:                                     </button>
225:                                     <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 text-center mt-2 font-medium">Klik tombol di atas untuk mengunggah file</p>
226:                                 </div>
227:                             </div>
228:                         )}
229:                         {errors.files && <p className="text-[10px] text-red-500 font-bold">{errors.files}</p>}
230:                         {Object.keys(errors).map(key => key.startsWith('files.') && <p key={key} className="text-[10px] text-red-500 font-bold">{errors[key]}</p>)}
231:                     </form>
232:                     <ProductUploadConfirmationModal
233:                         show={showConfirm} files={data.files} title={title} processing={processing}
234:                         onClose={() => setShowConfirm(false)} onConfirm={handleConfirmSubmit}
235:                     />
236:                 </>
237:             )}
238: 
239:             {uploads.length > 0 && (
240:                 <div className="space-y-2">
241:                     {/* Pemisah dengan label */}
242:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2 pt-1">
243:                         <div className="flex-1 h-px bg-gray-100" />
244:                         <p className="text-[9px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest whitespace-nowrap">File Telah Diunggah ({uploads.length})</p>
245:                         <div className="flex-1 h-px bg-gray-100" />
246:                     </div>
247:                     {/* Scrollable list — max 3 rows visible */}
248:                     <div className="max-h-40 overflow-y-auto space-y-2 pr-0.5
249:                         [&::-webkit-scrollbar]:w-1
250:                         [&::-webkit-scrollbar-track]:rounded-full [&::-webkit-scrollbar-track]:bg-gray-100
251:                         [&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb]:rounded-full [&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb]:bg-gray-300">
252:                         {uploads.map((upload) => (
253:                             <div key={upload.id} className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-gray-200 transition-all group">
254:                                 <div className="flex items-start gap-3 overflow-hidden min-w-0 flex-1">
255:                                     <div className="shrink-0 transition-transform group-hover:scale-110 duration-300">
256:                                         <FileIcon extension={upload.original_name.split('.').pop()} />
257:                                     </div>
258:                                     <div className="overflow-hidden min-w-0 flex-1">
259:                                         <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-700 break-words whitespace-normal">{upload.original_name}</p>
260:                                         <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase">{upload.original_name.split('.').pop().toUpperCase()} • {(upload.file_size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1)} MB</p>
261:                                     </div>
262:                                 </div>
263:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0">
264:                                     <button onClick={() => onPreviewProof(route('data-requests.product-uploads.preview', [dataRequestId, upload.id]))} type="button" className="p-1.5 bg-white border border-gray-100 text-gray-400 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white hover:border-gray-900 transition-all shadow-sm" title="Pratinjau">
265:                                         <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
266:                                     </button>
267:                                     <a href={route('data-requests.product-uploads.download', [dataRequestId, upload.id])} className="p-1.5 bg-white border border-gray-100 text-gray-400 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white hover:border-gray-900 transition-all shadow-sm" title="Unduh">
268:                                         <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
269:                                     </a>
270:                                     {canUpload && (
271:                                         <button
272:                                             onClick={() => handleDeleteClick(upload)}
273:                                             className="p-1.5 bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-400 hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-white hover:border-red-500 rounded-xl transition-all shadow-sm"
274:                                             title="Hapus"
275:                                         >
276:                                             <TrashIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
277:                                         </button>
278:                                     )}
279:                                 </div>
280:                             </div>
281:                         ))}
282:                     </div>
283:                 </div>
284:             )}
285: 
286:             {/* Delete confirmation modal */}
287:             <DeleteConfirmModal
288:                 show={!!deleteTarget}
289:                 fileName={deleteTarget?.name}
290:                 processing={deleting}
291:                 onClose={() => setDeleteTarget(null)}
292:                 onConfirm={handleDeleteConfirm}
293:             />
294:         </div>
295:     );
296: }

 1: import { ArrowDownTrayIcon, EyeIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 2: import FileIcon from './FileIcon';
 3: 
 4: export default function ProofCard({ proofPath, proofPreviewPath, onPreview, label, originalName }) {
 5:     if (!proofPath) return null;
 6: 
 7:     const getExt = (filename = '') => filename.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
 8:     const ext = getExt(originalName);
 9: 
10:     return (
11:         <div>
12:             <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400 mb-3">{label || 'Bukti Pembayaran'}</p>
13:             <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 bg-white shadow-sm group hover:border-gray-300 transition-all">
14:                 <div className="flex items-start gap-3 overflow-hidden">
15:                     <FileIcon extension={ext} />
16:                     <div className="overflow-hidden min-w-0">
17:                         <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 break-words whitespace-normal">{originalName || 'Bukti Pembayaran'}</p>
18:                         <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase">{ext || 'File'}</p>
19:                     </div>
20:                 </div>
21:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
22:                     <button
23:                         onClick={() => onPreview(proofPreviewPath || proofPath)}
24:                         className="p-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-600 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm"
25:                         title="Lihat"
26:                     >
27:                         <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
28:                     </button>
29:                     <a
30:                         href={proofPath}
31:                         download
32:                         className="p-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm"
33:                         title="Unduh"
34:                     >
35:                         <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
36:                     </a>
37:                 </div>
38:             </div>
39:         </div>
40:     );
41: }

 1: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';
 2: import { ArrowDownTrayIcon, XMarkIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 3: 
 4: export default function ProofPreviewModal({ url, type = 'image', onClose }) {
 5:     const show = !!url;
 6:     const isPdf = type === 'pdf' || url?.toLowerCase().endsWith('.pdf') || url?.includes('/product-uploads/');
 7: 
 8:     return (
 9:         <Transition show={show} leave="duration-200">
10:             <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={onClose}>
11:                 <TransitionChild
12:                     enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0" enterTo="opacity-100"
13:                     leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100" leaveTo="opacity-0"
14:                 >
15:                     <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" />
16:                 </TransitionChild>
17:                 <TransitionChild
18:                     enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95" enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100"
19:                     leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100" leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95"
20:                 >
21:                     <div className="fixed inset-4 sm:inset-8 flex items-stretch justify-center">
22:                         <DialogPanel className="flex w-full max-w-5xl flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200">
23:                             <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-100 px-5 py-3.5">
24:                                 <div>
25:                                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Pratinjau Dokumen</p>
26:                                     <p className="mt-0.5 font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm">{isPdf ? 'Hasil Produk (PDF)' : 'Bukti Survei'}</p>
27:                                 </div>
28:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
29:                                     <a
30:                                         href={url}
31:                                         download
32:                                         className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 shadow-sm transition hover:bg-gray-50"
33:                                     >
34:                                         <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" /> Unduh
35:                                     </a>
36:                                     <button onClick={onClose} className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600">
37:                                         <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
38:                                     </button>
39:                                 </div>
40:                             </div>
41:                             <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-50 overflow-hidden relative">
42:                                 {url && (
43:                                     isPdf ? (
44:                                         <iframe
45:                                             src={`${url}#toolbar=0`}
46:                                             className="w-full h-full border-0"
47:                                             title="Pratinjau PDF"
48:                                         />
49:                                     ) : (
50:                                         <div className="h-full w-full flex items-center justify-center p-4">
51:                                             <img
52:                                                 src={url}
53:                                                 alt="Pratinjau"
54:                                                 className="max-w-full max-h-full object-contain shadow-sm border border-gray-200 rounded-lg"
55:                                             />
56:                                         </div>
57:                                     )
58:                                 )}
59:                             </div>
60:                         </DialogPanel>
61:                     </div>
62:                 </TransitionChild>
63:             </Dialog>
64:         </Transition>
65:     );

================
File: resources/js/Pages/DataRequests/Partials/ProofUploadConfirmationModal.jsx
================
  1: import { useState } from 'react';
  2: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';
  3: import { CheckCircleIcon, EyeIcon, XMarkIcon, CurrencyDollarIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  4: import { CheckCircleIcon as CheckCircleSolid } from '@heroicons/react/24/solid';
  5: import FileIcon from './FileIcon';
  6: 
  7: export default function ProofUploadConfirmationModal({ show, file, processing, onClose, onConfirm }) {
  8:     const [previewFile, setPreviewFile] = useState(null);
  9:     const [previewUrl, setPreviewUrl] = useState(null);
 10: 
 11:     const handlePreview = (file) => {
 12:         const url = URL.createObjectURL(file);
 13:         setPreviewFile(file);
 14:         setPreviewUrl(url);
 15:     };
 16: 
 17:     const handleClosePreview = () => {
 18:         if (previewUrl) URL.revokeObjectURL(previewUrl);
 19:         setPreviewFile(null);
 20:         setPreviewUrl(null);
 21:     };
 22: 
 23:     if (!file) return null;
 24: 
 25:     const isImage = file.type.startsWith('image/') || /\.(jpg|jpeg|png)$/i.test(file.name);
 26:     const fileExtension = file.name.split('.').pop() || 'FILE';
 27: 
 28:     return (
 29:         <>
 30:             {/* Sub-preview modal for current file */}
 31:             <Transition show={!!previewFile} leave="duration-150">
 32:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-[70]" onClose={handleClosePreview}>
 33:                     <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-150" enterFrom="opacity-0" enterTo="opacity-100" leave="ease-in duration-100" leaveFrom="opacity-100" leaveTo="opacity-0">
 34:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm" />
 35:                     </TransitionChild>
 36:                     <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-150" enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95" enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100" leave="ease-in duration-100" leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100" leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95">
 37:                         <div className="fixed inset-4 sm:inset-8 flex items-stretch justify-center">
 38:                             <DialogPanel className="flex w-full max-w-5xl flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200">
 39:                                 <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-100 px-5 py-3.5">
 40:                                     <div className="min-w-0">
 41:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Pratinjau File</p>
 42:                                         <p className="mt-0.5 break-words whitespace-normal font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm">{previewFile?.name}</p>
 43:                                     </div>
 44:                                     <button onClick={handleClosePreview} className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600">
 45:                                         <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
 46:                                     </button>
 47:                                 </div>
 48:                                 <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-100 overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center">
 49:                                     {previewUrl && isImage ? (
 50:                                         <img src={previewUrl} alt="Preview" className="max-h-full max-w-full object-contain" />
 51:                                     ) : previewUrl ? (
 52:                                         <iframe src={`${previewUrl}#view=FitH`} className="h-full w-full border-0" title="Pratinjau Dokumen" />
 53:                                     ) : null}
 54:                                 </div>
 55:                             </DialogPanel>
 56:                         </div>
 57:                     </TransitionChild>
 58:                 </Dialog>
 59:             </Transition>
 60: 
 61:             {/* Main confirmation modal */}
 62:             <Transition show={show} leave="duration-200">
 63:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={onClose}>
 64:                     <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0" enterTo="opacity-100" leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100" leaveTo="opacity-0">
 65:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" />
 66:                     </TransitionChild>
 67:                     <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0 translate-y-4 scale-95" enterTo="opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100" leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100" leaveTo="opacity-0 translate-y-4 scale-95">
 68:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
 69:                             <DialogPanel className="w-full max-w-lg overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-100 flex flex-col max-h-[90vh]">
 70:                                 {/* Header */}
 71:                                 <div className="flex items-start justify-between px-6 pt-6 pb-4 shrink-0">
 72:                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 73:                                         <div className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-gray-900">
 74:                                             <CurrencyDollarIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-white" />
 75:                                         </div>
 76:                                         <div>
 77:                                             <h2 className="text-base font-extrabold text-gray-900">Konfirmasi Unggah</h2>
 78:                                             <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-0.5">Pastikan bukti pembayaran sudah benar</p>
 79:                                         </div>
 80:                                     </div>
 81:                                     <button onClick={onClose} className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600">
 82:                                         <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
 83:                                     </button>
 84:                                 </div>
 85: 
 86:                                 {/* Scrollable Content */}
 87:                                 <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto py-2">
 88:                                     {/* Daftar Dokumen */}
 89:                                     <div className="px-6 mb-5">
 90:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-3">Dokumen yang Dilampirkan</p>
 91:                                         <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 bg-white px-4 py-3 shadow-sm">
 92:                                             <div className="flex items-start gap-3 min-w-0">
 93:                                                 <FileIcon extension={fileExtension} />
 94:                                                 <div className="min-w-0">
 95:                                                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider">BUKTI BAYAR</p>
 96:                                                     <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-800 break-words whitespace-normal">{file.name}</p>
 97:                                                 </div>
 98:                                             </div>
 99:                                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
100:                                                 <CheckCircleSolid className="h-4 w-4 text-green-500" />
101:                                                 <button type="button" onClick={() => handlePreview(file)} className="inline-flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500 hover:border-blue-500 hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors" title="Preview Bukti">
102:                                                     <EyeIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
103:                                                 </button>
104:                                             </div>
105:                                         </div>
106:                                     </div>
107:                                 </div>
108: 
109:                                 {/* Footer */}
110:                                 <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3 border-t border-gray-100 px-6 py-4 bg-gray-50/50">
111:                                     <button type="button" onClick={onClose} className="px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white text-sm font-bold text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-all">
112:                                         Batal
113:                                     </button>
114:                                     <button type="button" onClick={onConfirm} disabled={processing} className="px-6 py-2.5 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-xl font-bold text-sm hover:bg-black transition-all shadow-lg disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2">
115:                                         {processing ? (
116:                                             <>
117:                                                 <svg className="animate-spin h-4 w-4 text-white" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
118:                                                     <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4"></circle>
119:                                                     <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"></path>
120:                                                 </svg>
121:                                                 Mengunggah...
122:                                             </>
123:                                         ) : 'Ya, Unggah Sekarang →'}
124:                                     </button>
125:                                 </div>
126:                             </DialogPanel>
127:                         </div>
128:                     </TransitionChild>
129:                 </Dialog>
130:             </Transition>
131:         </>
132:     );
133: }

 1: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';
 2: import { XMarkIcon, ArrowDownTrayIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 3: 
 4: export default function PublicDocumentPreviewModal({ document, onClose }) {
 5:     const show = !!document;
 6: 
 7:     return (
 8:         <Transition show={show} leave="duration-200">
 9:             <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={onClose}>
10:                 {/* Backdrop */}
11:                 <TransitionChild
12:                     enter="ease-out duration-200"
13:                     enterFrom="opacity-0"
14:                     enterTo="opacity-100"
15:                     leave="ease-in duration-150"
16:                     leaveFrom="opacity-100"
17:                     leaveTo="opacity-0"
18:                 >
19:                     <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" />
20:                 </TransitionChild>
21: 
22:                 {/* Panel */}
23:                 <TransitionChild
24:                     enter="ease-out duration-200"
25:                     enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95"
26:                     enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100"
27:                     leave="ease-in duration-150"
28:                     leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100"
29:                     leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95"
30:                 >
31:                     <div className="fixed inset-4 sm:inset-8 flex items-stretch justify-center">
32:                         <DialogPanel className="flex w-full max-w-5xl flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200 text-left">
33: 
34:                             {/* Header */}
35:                             <div className="flex flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-100 px-5 py-3.5">
36:                                 <div className="min-w-0">
37:                                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">
38:                                         Pratinjau Dokumen
39:                                     </p>
40:                                     <p className="mt-0.5 truncate font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm">
41:                                         {document?.title}
42:                                     </p>
43:                                 </div>
44:                                 <div className="ml-4 flex items-center gap-2">
45:                                     {document && (
46:                                         <a
47:                                             href={document.downloadUrl}
48:                                             download
49:                                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 shadow-sm transition hover:bg-gray-50"
50:                                         >
51:                                             <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
52:                                             Unduh
53:                                         </a>
54:                                     )}
55:                                     <button
56:                                         onClick={onClose}
57:                                         className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600"
58:                                     >
59:                                         <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
60:                                     </button>
61:                                 </div>
62:                             </div>
63: 
64:                             {/* Iframe */}
65:                             <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
66:                                 {document && (
67:                                     <iframe
68:                                         src={`${document.openUrl}#view=FitH`}
69:                                         className="h-full w-full border-0"
70:                                         title={`Pratinjau ${document.title}`}
71:                                     />
72:                                 )}
73:                             </div>
74:                         </DialogPanel>
75:                     </div>
76:                 </TransitionChild>
77:             </Dialog>
78:         </Transition>
79:     );
80: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/DataRequests/Partials/RequestTimeline.jsx
================
  1: import { CheckCircleIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  2: 
  3: const formatDateTime = (dateString) => {
  4:     if (!dateString) return null;
  5:     return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('id-ID', {
  6:         day: 'numeric',
  7:         month: 'short',
  8:         year: 'numeric',
  9:         hour: '2-digit',
 10:         minute: '2-digit',
 11:     });
 12: };
 13: 
 14: function dotClass(state) {
 15:     switch (state) {
 16:         case 'done': return 'bg-gray-900 border-gray-900 text-white';
 17:         case 'current': return 'ring-4 ring-yellow-100 border-yellow-400 bg-yellow-400 text-gray-900 shadow-lg';
 18:         case 'rejected': return 'bg-red-500 border-red-500 text-white';
 19:         case 'expired': return 'bg-orange-500 border-orange-500 text-white';
 20:         default: return 'bg-white border-gray-200 text-gray-300';
 21:     }
 22: }
 23: 
 24: function labelClass(state) {
 25:     switch (state) {
 26:         case 'done': return 'text-gray-500';
 27:         case 'current': return 'text-gray-900 font-bold';
 28:         case 'rejected': return 'text-red-600 font-bold';
 29:         case 'expired': return 'text-orange-600 font-bold';
 30:         default: return 'text-gray-300';
 31:     }
 32: }
 33: 
 34: function timeClass(state) {
 35:     switch (state) {
 36:         case 'done': return 'text-gray-400';
 37:         case 'current': return 'text-yellow-600';
 38:         case 'rejected': return 'text-red-400';
 39:         case 'expired': return 'text-orange-400';
 40:         default: return 'text-gray-200';
 41:     }
 42: }
 43: 
 44: function lineClass(state) {
 45:     switch (state) {
 46:         case 'done': return 'bg-yellow-400';
 47:         case 'rejected': return 'bg-red-300';
 48:         case 'expired': return 'bg-orange-300';
 49:         default: return 'bg-gray-100';
 50:     }
 51: }
 52: 
 53: // ─── Desktop step ─────────────────────────────────────────────
 54: function DesktopStep({ number, label, sublabel, time, time2, time2Color, state, isLocked, onClick }) {
 55:     return (
 56:         <button
 57:             disabled={isLocked}
 58:             onClick={onClick}
 59:             className={[
 60:                 'relative flex flex-col items-center shrink-0 w-12 group',
 61:                 isLocked ? 'cursor-not-allowed' : 'cursor-pointer',
 62:             ].join(' ')}
 63:         >
 64:             <div className={`flex h-10 w-10 md:h-12 md:w-12 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 transition-all text-sm font-bold ${dotClass(state)}`}>
 65:                 {state === 'done' ? <CheckCircleIcon className="h-6 w-6" /> : number}
 66:             </div>
 67:             <div className="absolute top-14 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-max max-w-[120px] text-center">
 68:                 <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest block leading-tight ${labelClass(state)}`}>
 69:                     {label}
 70:                 </span>
 71:                 {sublabel && (
 72:                     <span className={`mt-0.5 text-[9px] block leading-tight ${timeClass(state)}`}>
 73:                         {sublabel}
 74:                     </span>
 75:                 )}
 76:                 {time && (
 77:                     <span className={`mt-0.5 text-[9px] block leading-tight ${timeClass(state)}`}>
 78:                         {time}
 79:                     </span>
 80:                 )}
 81:                 {time2 && (
 82:                     <span className={`mt-0.5 text-[9px] block leading-tight font-bold ${time2Color ?? timeClass(state)}`}>
 83:                         {time2}
 84:                     </span>
 85:                 )}
 86:             </div>
 87:         </button>
 88:     );
 89: }
 90: 
 91: // ─── Mobile step ──────────────────────────────────────────────
 92: function MobileStep({ number, label, sublabel, time, time2, time2Color, state, isLast, isLocked, onClick }) {
 93:     return (
 94:         <div className="flex flex-col items-start">
 95:             <button
 96:                 disabled={isLocked}
 97:                 onClick={onClick}
 98:                 className={[
 99:                     'flex flex-row items-center gap-4 w-full text-left',
100:                     isLocked ? 'cursor-not-allowed' : 'cursor-pointer',
101:                 ].join(' ')}
102:             >
103:                 <div className={`flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 transition-all text-sm font-bold ${dotClass(state)}`}>
104:                     {state === 'done' ? <CheckCircleIcon className="h-6 w-6" /> : number}
105:                 </div>
106:                 <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
107:                     <span className={`text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest block ${labelClass(state)}`}>
108:                         {label}
109:                     </span>
110:                     {sublabel && (
111:                         <span className={`text-[10px] block ${timeClass(state)}`}>{sublabel}</span>
112:                     )}
113:                     {time && (
114:                         <span className={`text-[10px] block ${timeClass(state)}`}>{time}</span>
115:                     )}
116:                     {time2 && (
117:                         <span className={`text-[10px] block font-bold ${time2Color ?? timeClass(state)}`}>{time2}</span>
118:                     )}
119:                 </div>
120:             </button>
121:             {!isLast && (
122:                 <div className="ml-[19px] my-1">
123:                     <div className={`w-[2px] h-7 rounded-full ${lineClass(state)}`} />
124:                 </div>
125:             )}
126:         </div>
127:     );
128: }
129: 
130: // ─── Main component ───────────────────────────────────────────
131: export default function RequestTimeline({ dataRequest, activeTab, maxReachedStep, onTabChange, isNonCommercial }) {
132:     const s = dataRequest.status;
133:     const isPending = s === 'pending';
134:     const isRejected = s === 'rejected';
135:     const isPaymentRequired = s === 'payment_required';
136:     const isPaymentVerifying = s === 'payment_verifying';
137:     const isPaymentInvalid = s === 'payment_invalid';
138:     const isPaymentVerified = s === 'payment_verified';
139:     const isExpired = s === 'expired';
140:     const isProcessing = s === 'processing';
141:     const isCompleted = s === 'completed';
142: 
143:     // Step 1 state
144:     const step1State = isPending ? 'current'
145:         : isRejected ? 'rejected'
146:             : 'done';
147: 
148:     // Step 2 state
149:     const step2State = (isPending || isRejected) ? 'waiting'
150:         : isExpired ? 'expired'
151:             : isPaymentInvalid ? 'rejected'
152:                 : (isPaymentRequired || isPaymentVerifying) ? 'current'
153:                     : (isPaymentVerified || isProcessing || isCompleted) ? 'done'
154:                         : 'waiting';
155: 
156:     // Step 3 state
157:     const step3State = isProcessing ? 'current'
158:         : isCompleted ? 'done'
159:             : 'waiting';
160: 
161:     const steps = [
162:         {
163:             number: 1,
164:             label: 'Pengajuan Data',
165:             sublabel: isPending ? 'Menunggu verifikasi' : null,
166:             time: 'Diajukan: ' + formatDateTime(dataRequest.created_at),
167:             time2: dataRequest.reviewed_at
168:                 ? (isRejected ? 'Ditolak: ' : 'Disetujui: ') + formatDateTime(dataRequest.reviewed_at)
169:                 : null,
170:             time2Color: isRejected ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-emerald-500',
171:             state: step1State,
172:         },
173:         {
174:             number: 2,
175:             label: 'Pembayaran',
176:             sublabel:
177:                 isNonCommercial && (isPaymentRequired || isPaymentVerified || isProcessing || isCompleted) ? 'Tidak diperlukan'
178:                     : isPaymentInvalid ? 'Bukti pembayaran ditolak'
179:                         : isExpired ? 'Waktu pembayaran habis'
180:                             : isPaymentVerifying ? 'Menunggu verifikasi'
181:                                 : isPaymentRequired ? 'Menunggu pembayaran'
182:                                     : null,
183:             time:
184:                 (isPaymentVerifying || isPaymentInvalid || isPaymentVerified || isProcessing || isCompleted)
185:                     ? 'Dibayar: ' + formatDateTime(dataRequest.active_invoice?.paid_at || dataRequest.updated_at)
186:                     : null,
187:             time2:
188:                 isPaymentInvalid ? 'Ditolak: ' + formatDateTime(dataRequest.active_invoice?.rejected_at || dataRequest.updated_at)
189:                     : (isPaymentVerified || isProcessing || isCompleted) && !isNonCommercial
190:                         ? 'Disetujui: ' + formatDateTime(dataRequest.active_invoice?.verified_at || dataRequest.updated_at)
191:                         : isExpired ? 'Kedaluwarsa: ' + formatDateTime(dataRequest.active_invoice?.expires_at || dataRequest.updated_at)
192:                             : null,
193:             time2Color:
194:                 isPaymentInvalid ? 'text-red-400'
195:                     : isExpired ? 'text-orange-400'
196:                         : 'text-emerald-500',
197:             state: step2State,
198:         },
199:         {
200:             number: 3,
201:             label: 'Unduh Data',
202:             sublabel: isProcessing ? 'Sedang diproses' : null,
203:             time:
204:                 (isProcessing || isCompleted)
205:                     ? 'Diproses: ' + formatDateTime(dataRequest.processed_at || dataRequest.updated_at)
206:                     : null,
207:             time2:
208:                 isCompleted
209:                     ? 'Selesai: ' + formatDateTime(dataRequest.completed_at || dataRequest.updated_at)
210:                     : null,
211:             time2Color: 'text-emerald-500',
212:             state: step3State,
213:         },
214:     ];
215: 
216:     return (
217:         <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40 border border-gray-100">
218:             <div className="border-b border-gray-100 px-8 py-6 bg-gray-50/30">
219:                 <h3 className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Status Pengajuan</h3>
220:             </div>
221: 
222:             {/* Desktop: horizontal stepper */}
223:             <div className="hidden md:flex items-center px-16 lg:px-24 pt-8 pb-24">
224:                 {steps.map((step, i) => (
225:                     <div key={i} className="flex flex-1 items-center last:flex-none">
226:                         <DesktopStep
227:                             {...step}
228:                             isLocked={i > maxReachedStep}
229:                             onClick={() => onTabChange(i)}
230:                         />
231:                         {i < steps.length - 1 && (
232:                             <div className={`h-[2px] flex-1 mx-4 rounded-full ${lineClass(step.state)}`} />
233:                         )}
234:                     </div>
235:                 ))}
236:             </div>
237: 
238:             {/* Mobile: vertical stepper */}
239:             <div className="md:hidden px-6 py-6">
240:                 {steps.map((step, i) => (
241:                     <MobileStep
242:                         key={i}
243:                         {...step}
244:                         isLast={i === steps.length - 1}
245:                         isLocked={i > maxReachedStep}
246:                         onClick={() => onTabChange(i)}
247:                     />
248:                 ))}
249:             </div>
250:         </div>
251:     );
252: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/DataRequests/Partials/SelectPurposeStep.jsx
================
  1: import { useState } from 'react';

  3: import { usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';
  4: import { ArrowDownTrayIcon, ArrowTopRightOnSquareIcon, DocumentTextIcon, EyeIcon, XMarkIcon, ChatBubbleLeftRightIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  5: import PdfFileIcon from './PdfFileIcon';
  6: import { purposeDocuments } from './purposeDocuments';
  7: import PublicDocumentPreviewModal from './PublicDocumentPreviewModal';
  8: 
  9: function WordFileIcon() {
 10:     return (
 11:         <div className="relative w-4 h-5 flex-shrink-0">
 12:             <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-white rounded shadow-sm border border-gray-200"></div>
 13:             <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-bl border-l border-b border-gray-200"></div>
 14:             <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2">
 15:                 <div className="bg-blue-600 px-0.5 py-px rounded-sm">
 16:                     <span className="text-[5px] font-bold text-white tracking-tight leading-none block">DOC</span>
 17:                 </div>
 18:             </div>
 19:         </div>
 20:     );
 21: }
 22: 
 23: function DocumentListModal({ show, title, documents, mode, onClose }) {

  1: import { TableCellsIcon, DocumentTextIcon, PresentationChartBarIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  2: import React from 'react';
  3: 
  4: export default function SimulatedPreview({ extension }) {
  5:     const ext = (extension || '').toLowerCase();
  6:     
  7:     if (['xls', 'xlsx', 'csv'].includes(ext)) {
  8:         // Fake Spreadsheet grid
  9:         const cols = ['A', 'B', 'C', 'D', 'E', 'F'];
 10:         const rows = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7];
 11:         
 12:         return (
 13:             <div className="w-full h-full bg-white flex flex-col select-none">
 14:                 <div className="flex items-center bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200 px-3 py-2 gap-2 shrink-0">
 15:                     <TableCellsIcon className="w-5 h-5 text-green-600" />
 16:                     <div className="space-y-1">
 17:                         <div className="h-2 w-32 bg-gray-300 rounded-full" />
 18:                         <div className="h-1.5 w-16 bg-gray-200 rounded-full" />
 19:                     </div>
 20:                 </div>
 21:                 {/* Header row */}
 22:                 <div className="flex border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100/50 text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 shrink-0">
 23:                     <div className="w-10 border-r border-gray-200 text-center py-1 bg-gray-50"></div>
 24:                     {cols.map(c => (
 25:                         <div key={c} className="flex-1 border-r border-gray-200 text-center py-1">{c}</div>
 26:                     ))}
 27:                 </div>
 28:                 {/* Rows */}
 29:                 {rows.map(r => (
 30:                     <div key={r} className="flex border-b border-gray-100 text-[10px] shrink-0">
 31:                         <div className="w-10 border-r border-gray-200 text-center py-1.5 bg-gray-50 text-gray-400 font-medium">{r}</div>
 32:                         {cols.map((c) => (
 33:                             <div key={c} className="flex-1 border-r border-gray-100 px-2 py-1.5 overflow-hidden">
 34:                                 {r === 1 ? (
 35:                                     <div className="h-1.5 w-full bg-gray-300 rounded-sm" />
 36:                                 ) : (
 37:                                     <div className="h-1.5 rounded-sm bg-gray-200 w-3/4" />
 38:                                 )}
 39:                             </div>
 40:                         ))}
 41:                     </div>
 42:                 ))}
 43:                 
 44:                 <div className="flex-1 bg-white" />
 45:                 <div className="mt-auto px-4 py-2 bg-gray-50 border-t border-gray-200 flex items-center gap-3 shrink-0">
 46:                     <div className="px-3 py-1 bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded text-[9px] font-bold text-green-700">Sheet1</div>
 47:                     <div className="px-3 py-1 bg-transparent text-[9px] font-bold text-gray-400">Sheet2</div>
 48:                 </div>
 49:             </div>
 50:         );
 51:     }
 52:     
 53:     if (['ppt', 'pptx'].includes(ext)) {
 54:         return (
 55:             <div className="w-full h-full bg-gray-100 flex p-4 select-none gap-4">
 56:                 {/* Sidebar */}
 57:                 <div className="w-1/4 bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-3 p-3 overflow-hidden shrink-0">
 58:                     {[1, 2, 3].map(i => (
 59:                         <div key={i} className="flex gap-2">
 60:                             <span className="text-[8px] font-bold text-gray-400">{i}</span>
 61:                             <div className={`w-full aspect-video ${i === 1 ? 'bg-orange-50 border-2 border-orange-400' : 'bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200'} rounded shadow-sm`} />
 62:                         </div>
 63:                     ))}
 64:                 </div>
 65:                 {/* Main slide */}
 66:                 <div className="flex-1 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-center p-8">
 67:                     <div className="w-full aspect-video border-2 border-dashed border-gray-200 rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-6 bg-gray-50/50">
 68:                         <PresentationChartBarIcon className="w-12 h-12 text-gray-300" />
 69:                         <div className="space-y-3 w-2/3">
 70:                             <div className="h-6 bg-gray-300 rounded w-full mx-auto" />
 71:                             <div className="h-3 bg-gray-200 rounded w-3/4 mx-auto" />
 72:                             <div className="h-3 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/2 mx-auto" />
 73:                         </div>
 74:                     </div>
 75:                 </div>
 76:             </div>
 77:         );
 78:     }
 79:     
 80:     if (['doc', 'docx', 'txt', 'rtf'].includes(ext)) {
 81:         return (
 82:             <div className="w-full h-full bg-gray-100 flex justify-center py-6 select-none overflow-hidden">
 83:                 <div className="w-[85%] bg-white shadow-sm border border-gray-200 rounded-sm p-8 flex flex-col gap-4">
 84:                     <DocumentTextIcon className="w-8 h-8 text-blue-500 mb-2" />
 85:                     <div className="h-5 bg-blue-100 rounded w-1/2" />
 86:                     <div className="space-y-2 mt-4">
 87:                         {[...Array(6)].map((_, i) => (
 88:                             <div key={`p1-${i}`} className="h-2.5 bg-gray-100 rounded w-full" />
 89:                         ))}
 90:                     </div>
 91:                     <div className="space-y-2 mt-4">
 92:                         {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
 93:                             <div key={`p2-${i}`} className="h-2.5 bg-gray-100 rounded w-full" />
 94:                         ))}
 95:                     </div>
 96:                 </div>
 97:             </div>
 98:         );
 99:     }
100:     
101:     // Default fallback simple view
102:     return (
103:         <div className="w-full h-full bg-gray-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center select-none">
104:             <div className="text-center p-8 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-2xl bg-white w-2/3 shadow-sm">
105:                 <div className="text-4xl text-gray-200 font-black mb-2 uppercase">{ext || 'FILE'}</div>
106:                 <div className="h-2 w-16 bg-gray-200 rounded-full mx-auto" />
107:                 <div className="mt-4 text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-medium uppercase tracking-widest">
108:                     Simulasi Pratinjau
109:                 </div>
110:             </div>
111:         </div>
112:     );
113: }

 10:     form_pernyataan: 'Surat Pernyataan',
 11:     scan_ktp: 'Scan KTP',
 12:     surat_permohonan: 'Surat Pengajuan',
 13:     proposal: 'Proposal Penelitian',

 18:     'payment_required',
 19:     'payment_verifying',
 20:     'payment_invalid',
 21:     'payment_verified',
 22:     'expired',
 23:     'processing',
 24:     'completed',
 25: ];
 26: 
 27: const getSubmissionStatusDisplay = (status, currentStatusConfig) => {
 28:     if (approvedStatuses.includes(status)) {
 29:         return {
 30:             label: 'Disetujui',
 31:             colorClass: 'text-green-700',
 32:         };
 33:     }
 34: 
 35:     if (status === 'rejected') {
 36:         return {
 37:             label: 'Ditolak',
 38:             colorClass: 'text-red-700',
 39:         };
 40:     }
 41: 
 42:     // pending
 43:     return {
 44:         label: currentStatusConfig.label,
 45:         colorClass: currentStatusConfig.color.split(' ')[0],
 46:     };
 47: };
 48: 
 49: const PdfFileIcon = () => (
 50:     <div className="relative w-6 h-8 flex-shrink-0">
 51:         <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-white rounded-md shadow-sm border border-gray-200"></div>
 52:         <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-3 h-3 bg-gray-100 rounded-bl-md border-l border-b border-gray-200"></div>
 53:         <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-center">

 61:         </div>
 62:     </div>
 63: );

 65: export default function SubmissionDetailPanel({ dataRequest, currentStatusConfig, isRejected, copied, onCopy, onPreview }) {
 66:     const statusDisplay = getSubmissionStatusDisplay(dataRequest.status, currentStatusConfig);
 67: 
 68:     return (
 69:         <div className="w-full lg:w-2/3 flex">
 70:             <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden w-full flex flex-col">
 71:                 <div className="px-8 py-6 border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/30">
 72:                     <h3 className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Detail Informasi</h3>
 73:                 </div>
 74:                 <div className="p-8 space-y-8 flex-1">
 75:                     <div>
 76:                         <h2 className="text-2xl font-extrabold text-gray-900 leading-tight">{dataRequest.title || 'Judul Pengajuan'}</h2>
 77:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2">
 78:                             <p className="text-sm font-mono font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase">{dataRequest.request_code}</p>
 79:                             <button onClick={() => onCopy(dataRequest.request_code)}>
 80:                                 {copied
 81:                                     ? <CheckIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-green-600" />
 82:                                     : <ClipboardIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400" />
 83:                                 }
 84:                             </button>
 85:                         </div>
 86:                     </div>
 87:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-6 pt-6 border-t border-gray-50">
 88:                         <div>
 89:                             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Tipe Pengajuan</p>
 90:                             <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{purposeLabels[dataRequest.purpose_type] || dataRequest.purpose_type}</p>
 91:                         </div>
 92:                         <div>
 93:                             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Atas Nama</p>
 94:                             <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 break-words" title={dataRequest.applicant_type === 'instansi' || dataRequest.purpose_type === 'non_commercial_instansi' ? dataRequest.company_name : dataRequest.user?.name}>
 95:                                 {dataRequest.applicant_type === 'instansi' || dataRequest.purpose_type === 'non_commercial_instansi'
 96:                                     ? dataRequest.company_name
 97:                                     : dataRequest.user?.name?.toLowerCase().replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase())}
 98:                             </p>
 99:                         </div>
100:                         <div>
101:                             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Status</p>
102:                             <span className={['text-[10px] font-bold uppercase', statusDisplay.colorClass].join(' ')}>
103:                                 {statusDisplay.label}
104:                             </span>
105:                         </div>
106:                         <div>
107:                             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Diverifikasi Pada</p>
108:                             <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">
109:                                 {dataRequest.reviewed_at
110:                                     ? new Date(dataRequest.reviewed_at).toLocaleDateString('id-ID', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' })
111:                                     : '-'}
112:                             </p>
113:                         </div>
114:                         {dataRequest.research_target_date && (
115:                             <div>
116:                                 <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">Target Unggah Hasil</p>
117:                                 <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">
118:                                     {new Date(dataRequest.research_target_date).toLocaleDateString('id-ID', { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' })}
119:                                 </p>
120:                             </div>
121:                         )}
122:                     </div>
123:                     <div className="pt-6 border-t border-gray-50">
124:                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-4">Berkas Lampiran</p>
125:                         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
126:                             {dataRequest.documents?.map((doc) => (
127:                                 <div key={doc.id} className="flex flex-col">
128:                                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">
129:                                         {documentLabels[doc.document_type] || doc.document_type}
130:                                     </p>
131:                                     <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 bg-white shadow-sm group hover:border-gray-300 transition-all">
132:                                     <div className="flex items-start gap-3 overflow-hidden">
133:                                             <PdfFileIcon />
134:                                             <div className="overflow-hidden min-w-0">
135:                                                 <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 break-words whitespace-normal">{doc.original_name}</p>
136:                                                 <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase">{(doc.file_size / 1024).toFixed(0)} KB</p>
137:                                             </div>
138:                                         </div>
139:                                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
140:                                             <button
141:                                                 onClick={() => onPreview(doc)}
142:                                                 className="p-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-600 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm"
143:                                             >
144:                                                 <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
145:                                             </button>
146: 
147:                                             <a
148:                                                 href={'/data-requests/' + dataRequest.id + '/documents/' + doc.id}
149:                                                 className="p-2 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm"
150:                                             >
151:                                                 <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
152:                                             </a>
153:                                         </div>
154:                                     </div>
155:                                 </div>
156:                             ))}
157:                         </div>
158:                     </div>
159:                 </div>
160:             </div>
161:         </div>
162:     );

  1: import { CheckCircleIcon, XCircleIcon, ClockIcon, DocumentTextIcon, ArrowDownTrayIcon, ArrowRightIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';

  3: export default function SubmissionStatusPanel({ isApproved, isRejected, currentStatusConfig, rejectionReason, vaDocumentPath, maxReachedStep, onNextTab, user, dataRequest, isNonCommercial }) {
  4:     return (
  5:         <div className="w-full lg:w-1/3 flex">
  6:             <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden w-full flex flex-col">
  7:                 <div className="px-8 py-6 border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/30">
  8:                     <h3 className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest">
  9:                         {isRejected || isApproved ? 'Status Pengajuan' : 'Identitas Pengaju'}
 10:                     </h3>
 11:                 </div>
 12:                 <div className="p-8 flex-1 flex flex-col">
 13:                     {isApproved ? (
 14:                         <div className="space-y-4 text-center">
 15:                             <div className="rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto p-8">
 16:                                 <CheckCircleIcon className="h-20 w-20 lg:h-32 lg:w-32 text-green-600" />
 17:                             </div>
 18:                             <h4 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">Pengajuan Anda Disetujui</h4>
 19:                             <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{currentStatusConfig.subtitle}</p>
 20: 
 21:                             {/* VA Document — only for commercial */}
 22:                             {!isNonCommercial && vaDocumentPath && (
 23:                                 <a
 24:                                     href={vaDocumentPath}
 25:                                     target="_blank"
 26:                                     rel="noopener noreferrer"
 27:                                     className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-xl border border-orange-200 bg-orange-50 px-4 py-3 transition hover:bg-orange-100 group mt-2 text-left"
 28:                                 >
 29:                                     <div className="flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-white border border-orange-200">
 30:                                         <DocumentTextIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-orange-500" />
 31:                                     </div>
 32:                                     <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
 33:                                         <p className="text-xs font-bold text-orange-900">Dokumen Virtual Account</p>
 34:                                         <p className="text-[10px] text-orange-600">Klik untuk unduh &amp; bayar</p>
 35:                                     </div>
 36:                                     <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-orange-400 group-hover:text-orange-600 shrink-0" />
 37:                                 </a>
 38:                             )}
 39: 
 40:                             {/* Tombol Lanjut */}
 41:                             <button
 42:                                 disabled={maxReachedStep < 1}
 43:                                 onClick={onNextTab}
 44:                                 className={[
 45:                                     'inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 w-full px-6 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold uppercase transition-all border shadow-sm mt-4',
 46:                                     maxReachedStep >= 1
 47:                                         ? 'bg-gray-900 border-gray-900 text-white hover:bg-black'
 48:                                         : 'bg-gray-50 border-gray-100 text-gray-300 cursor-not-allowed',
 49:                                 ].join(' ')}
 50:                             >
 51:                                 Lanjut ke Pembayaran <ArrowRightIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
 52:                             </button>
 53:                         </div>
 54:                     ) : isRejected ? (
 55:                         <div className="text-center">
 56:                             <div className="rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto p-8">
 57:                                 <XCircleIcon className="h-20 w-20 lg:h-32 lg:w-32 text-red-600" />
 58:                             </div>
 59:                             <h4 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mt-4">Pengajuan Ditolak</h4>
 60: 
 61:                             <div className="w-full h-px bg-gray-100 my-5"></div>
 62: 
 63:                             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest text-left mb-2">Alasan Penolakan</p>
 64:                             <p className="text-xs text-red-800 italic text-left leading-relaxed">
 65:                                 "{rejectionReason || 'Berkas tidak sesuai kriteria.'}"

 67:                         </div>
 68:                     ) : (
 69:                         <>

 79:                                         </p>
 80:                                     )}

 90:                             </div>
 91:

 93:                                 <div className="w-full h-px bg-gray-100 mb-5"></div>

107:                         </>

  1: import { useState } from 'react';
  2: import { usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';
