  5: import { CheckCircleIcon as CheckCircleSolid } from '@heroicons/react/24/solid';
  6: 
  7: const documentLabels = {
  8:     form_pernyataan: 'Surat Pernyataan',
  9:     scan_ktp: 'Scan KTP',
 10:     surat_permohonan: 'Surat Pengajuan',
 11:     proposal: 'Proposal Penelitian',
 12:     kartu_identitas_instansi: 'Kartu Identitas Instansi',
 13: };
 14: 
 15: const PdfFileIconSmall = () => (
 16:     <div className="relative w-5 h-6 flex-shrink-0">
 17:         <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-white rounded shadow-sm border border-gray-200"></div>
 18:         <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-2 h-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-bl border-l border-b border-gray-200"></div>
 19:         <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2">
 20:             <div className="bg-red-600 px-0.5 py-px rounded-sm">
 21:                 <span className="text-[6px] font-bold text-white tracking-tight leading-none block">PDF</span>
 22:             </div>
 23:         </div>
 24:     </div>
 25: );
 26: 
 27: export default function SubmitConfirmationModal({ show, data, currentPurpose, processing, onClose, onConfirm }) {
 28:     const { auth } = usePage().props;
 29:     const [previewFile, setPreviewFile] = useState(null);
 30:     const [previewUrl, setPreviewUrl] = useState(null);
 31: 
 32:     const requiredDocuments = currentPurpose?.requiredDocuments ?? [];
 33: 
 34:     const handlePreview = (docType) => {
 35:         const file = data[docType];
 36:         if (!file) return;
 37:         const url = URL.createObjectURL(file);
 38:         setPreviewFile({ name: file.name, label: documentLabels[docType] || docType });
 39:         setPreviewUrl(url);
 40:     };
 41: 
 42:     const handleClosePreview = () => {
 43:         if (previewUrl) URL.revokeObjectURL(previewUrl);
 44:         setPreviewFile(null);
 45:         setPreviewUrl(null);
 46:     };
 47: 
 48:     const allFilled = requiredDocuments.every((docType) => !!data[docType]);
 49: 
 50:     return (
 51:         <>
 52:             {/* Sub-preview modal for uploaded file */}
 53:             <Transition show={!!previewFile} leave="duration-150">
 54:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-[60]" onClose={handleClosePreview}>
 55:                     <TransitionChild
 56:                         enter="ease-out duration-150"
 57:                         enterFrom="opacity-0"
 58:                         enterTo="opacity-100"
 59:                         leave="ease-in duration-100"
 60:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100"
 61:                         leaveTo="opacity-0"
 62:                     >
 63:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm" />
 64:                     </TransitionChild>
 65:                     <TransitionChild
 66:                         enter="ease-out duration-150"
 67:                         enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95"
 68:                         enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100"
 69:                         leave="ease-in duration-100"
 70:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100"
 71:                         leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95"
 72:                     >
 73:                         <div className="fixed inset-4 sm:inset-8 flex items-stretch justify-center">
 74:                             <DialogPanel className="flex w-full max-w-5xl flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200">
 75:                                 <div className="flex flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-100 px-5 py-3.5">
 76:                                     <div className="min-w-0">
 77:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">
 78:                                             Pratinjau {previewFile?.label}
 79:                                         </p>
 80:                                         <p className="mt-0.5 break-words whitespace-normal font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm">
 81:                                             {previewFile?.name}
 82:                                         </p>
 83:                                     </div>
 84:                                     <button
 85:                                         onClick={handleClosePreview}
 86:                                         className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600"
 87:                                     >
 88:                                         <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
 89:                                     </button>
 90:                                 </div>
 91:                                 <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
 92:                                     {previewUrl && (
 93:                                         <iframe
 94:                                             src={`${previewUrl}#view=FitH`}
 95:                                             className="h-full w-full border-0"
 96:                                             title={`Pratinjau ${previewFile?.label} - ${previewFile?.name}`}
 97:                                         />
 98:                                     )}
 99:                                 </div>
100:                             </DialogPanel>
101:                         </div>
102:                     </TransitionChild>
103:                 </Dialog>
104:             </Transition>
105: 
106:             {/* Main confirmation modal */}
107:             <Transition show={show} leave="duration-200">
108:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={onClose}>
109:                     <TransitionChild
110:                         enter="ease-out duration-200"
111:                         enterFrom="opacity-0"
112:                         enterTo="opacity-100"
113:                         leave="ease-in duration-150"
114:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100"
115:                         leaveTo="opacity-0"
116:                     >
117:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" />
118:                     </TransitionChild>
119: 
120:                     <TransitionChild
121:                         enter="ease-out duration-200"
122:                         enterFrom="opacity-0 translate-y-4 scale-95"
123:                         enterTo="opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100"
124:                         leave="ease-in duration-150"
125:                         leaveFrom="opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100"
126:                         leaveTo="opacity-0 translate-y-4 scale-95"
127:                     >
128:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
129:                             <DialogPanel className="w-full max-w-lg overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-100 flex flex-col max-h-[90vh]">
130: 
131:                                 {/* Header */}
132:                                 <div className="flex items-start justify-between px-6 pt-6 pb-4">
133:                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
134:                                         <div className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-gray-900">
135:                                             <CheckCircleIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-white" />
136:                                         </div>
137:                                         <div>
138:                                             <h2 className="text-base font-extrabold text-gray-900">Konfirmasi Pengajuan</h2>
139:                                             <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-0.5">Pastikan semua dokumen sudah benar sebelum mengirim</p>
140:                                         </div>
141:                                     </div>
142:                                     <button
143:                                         onClick={onClose}
144:                                         className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600"
145:                                     >
146:                                         <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
147:                                     </button>
148:                                 </div>
149: 
150:                                 {/* Scrollable Content */}
151:                                 <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto py-2">
152:                                     {/* Info Pengajuan */}
153:                                     <div className="mx-6 mb-4 rounded-xl bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 px-4 py-3">
154:                                         {(() => {
155:                                             const isInstansi =
156:                                                 currentPurpose?.value === 'non_commercial_instansi' ||
157:                                                 (currentPurpose?.value === 'commercial' && data.applicant_type === 'instansi');
158:                                             const userName = auth.user.name.toLowerCase().replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase());
159: 
160:                                             return isInstansi ? (
161:                                                 <>
162:                                                     {/* Instansi: nama instansi sebagai entitas utama */}
163:                                                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-0.5">Nama Instansi</p>
164:                                                     <p className="text-base font-extrabold text-gray-900 leading-snug break-words">
165:                                                         {data.company_name || <span className="text-gray-400 italic font-medium">Belum diisi</span>}
166:                                                     </p>
167:                                                     <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5">
168:                                                         Diajukan atas nama instansi oleh <span className="font-semibold text-gray-600">{userName}</span>
169:                                                     </p>
170:                                                 </>
171:                                             ) : (
172:                                                 <>
173:                                                     {/* Individu: nama pribadi sebagai entitas utama */}
174:                                                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-0.5">Nama Pengaju</p>
175:                                                     <p className="text-base font-extrabold text-gray-900 leading-snug">
176:                                                         {userName}
177:                                                     </p>
178:                                                     <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5">
179:                                                         Diajukan atas nama pribadi
180:                                                     </p>
181:                                                 </>
182:                                             );
183:                                         })()}
184: 
185:                                         <div className="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-200 space-y-2">
186:                                             <div>
187:                                                 <p className="text-[9px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-0.5">Judul Pengajuan</p>
188:                                                 <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-600 break-words whitespace-normal">{data.title || <span className="text-gray-400 italic">Belum diisi</span>}</p>
189:                                             </div>
190: 
191:                                             <div>
192:                                                 <p className="text-[9px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-0.5">Nomor Telepon</p>
193:                                                 <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-600">{auth.user.phone || '-'}</p>
194:                                             </div>
195: 
196:                                             <div>
197:                                                 <p className="text-[9px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-0.5">Jenis Pengajuan</p>

199:                                             </div>

206:                                         <div className="space-y-2">
207:                                             {requiredDocuments.map((docType) => {
208:                                                 const file = data[docType];
209:                                                 return (

211:                                                         key={docType}
212:                                                         className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 bg-white px-4 py-3 shadow-sm"

218:                                                                     {documentLabels[docType] || docType}
219:                                                                 </p>

228:                                                             {file ? (
229:                                                                 <>
230:                                                                     <CheckCircleSolid className="h-4 w-4 text-green-500" />
231:                                                                     <button
232:                                                                         type="button"
233:                                                                         onClick={() => handlePreview(docType)}
234:                                                                         className="inline-flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500 hover:border-blue-500 hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors"
235:                                                                         title={`Preview ${documentLabels[docType]}`}
236:                                                                     >
237:                                                                         <EyeIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
238:                                                                     </button>
239:                                                                 </>
240:                                                             ) : (
241:                                                                 <ExclamationTriangleIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-red-400" />
242:                                                             )}
243:                                                         </div>
244:                                                     </div>
245:                                                 );
246:                                             })}
247:                                         </div>
248:                                     </div>
249:                                 </div>
250: 
251:                                 {/* Footer */}
252:                                 <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3 border-t border-gray-100 px-6 py-4 bg-gray-50/50">
253:                                     <button
254:                                         type="button"
255:                                         onClick={onClose}
256:                                         className="px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white text-sm font-bold text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-all"
257:                                     >
258:                                         Batal
259:                                     </button>
260:                                     <button
261:                                         type="button"
262:                                         onClick={onConfirm}
263:                                         disabled={processing || !allFilled}
264:                                         className="px-6 py-2.5 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-xl font-bold text-sm hover:bg-black transition-all shadow-lg disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
265:                                     >
266:                                         {processing ? (
267:                                             <>
268:                                                 <svg className="animate-spin h-4 w-4 text-white" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
269:                                                     <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4"></circle>
270:                                                     <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"></path>
271:                                                 </svg>
272:                                                 Mengirim...
273:                                             </>
274:                                         ) : (
275:                                             'Ya, Ajukan Sekarang →'
276:                                         )}
277:                                     </button>
278:                                 </div>
279:                             </DialogPanel>
280:                         </div>
281:                     </TransitionChild>
282:                 </Dialog>
283:             </Transition>
284:         </>
285:     );
286: }

  1: import { useState } from 'react';
  2: import { Dialog, DialogPanel, Transition, TransitionChild } from '@headlessui/react';
  3: import { EyeIcon, XMarkIcon, DocumentCheckIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  4: import { CheckCircleIcon as CheckCircleSolid } from '@heroicons/react/24/solid';
  5: import FileIcon from './FileIcon';
  6: 
  7: export default function SurveyUploadConfirmationModal({ show, file, surveyName, processing, onClose, onConfirm }) {
  8:     const [previewFile, setPreviewFile] = useState(null);
  9:     const [previewUrl, setPreviewUrl] = useState(null);
 10: 
 11:     const handlePreview = (file) => {
 12:         const url = URL.createObjectURL(file);
 13:         setPreviewFile(file);
 14:         setPreviewUrl(url);
 15:     };
 16: 
 17:     const handleClosePreview = () => {
 18:         if (previewUrl) URL.revokeObjectURL(previewUrl);
 19:         setPreviewFile(null);
 20:         setPreviewUrl(null);
 21:     };
 22: 
 23:     if (!file) return null;
 24: 
 25:     const isImage = file.type.startsWith('image/') || /\.(jpg|jpeg|png|webp|svg)$/i.test(file.name);
 26:     const fileExtension = file.name.split('.').pop() || 'FILE';
 27: 
 28:     return (
 29:         <>
 30:             <Transition show={!!previewFile} leave="duration-150">
 31:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-[70]" onClose={handleClosePreview}>
 32:                     <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-150" enterFrom="opacity-0" enterTo="opacity-100" leave="ease-in duration-100" leaveFrom="opacity-100" leaveTo="opacity-0">
 33:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm" />
 34:                     </TransitionChild>
 35:                     <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-150" enterFrom="opacity-0 scale-95" enterTo="opacity-100 scale-100" leave="ease-in duration-100" leaveFrom="opacity-100 scale-100" leaveTo="opacity-0 scale-95">
 36:                         <div className="fixed inset-4 sm:inset-8 flex items-stretch justify-center">
 37:                             <DialogPanel className="flex w-full max-w-5xl flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-200">
 38:                                 <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-100 px-5 py-3.5">
 39:                                     <div className="min-w-0">
 40:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Pratinjau Bukti Survei</p>
 41:                                         <p className="mt-0.5 break-words whitespace-normal font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm">{previewFile?.name}</p>
 42:                                     </div>
 43:                                     <button onClick={handleClosePreview} className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600">
 44:                                         <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
 45:                                     </button>
 46:                                 </div>
 47:                                 <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-100 overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center">
 48:                                     {previewUrl && isImage ? (
 49:                                         <img src={previewUrl} alt="Preview" className="max-h-full max-w-full object-contain" />
 50:                                     ) : previewUrl ? (
 51:                                         <iframe src={`${previewUrl}#view=FitH`} className="h-full w-full border-0" title="Pratinjau Dokumen" />
 52:                                     ) : null}
 53:                                 </div>
 54:                             </DialogPanel>
 55:                         </div>
 56:                     </TransitionChild>
 57:                 </Dialog>
 58:             </Transition>
 59: 
 60:             <Transition show={show} leave="duration-200">
 61:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={onClose}>
 62:                     <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0" enterTo="opacity-100" leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100" leaveTo="opacity-0">
 63:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" />
 64:                     </TransitionChild>
 65:                     <TransitionChild enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0 translate-y-4 scale-95" enterTo="opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100" leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100" leaveTo="opacity-0 translate-y-4 scale-95">
 66:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
 67:                             <DialogPanel className="w-full max-w-lg overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-gray-100 flex flex-col max-h-[90vh]">
 68:                                 <div className="flex items-start justify-between px-6 pt-6 pb-4 shrink-0">
 69:                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 70:                                         <div className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-gray-900">
 71:                                             <DocumentCheckIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-white" />
 72:                                         </div>
 73:                                         <div>
 74:                                             <h2 className="text-base font-extrabold text-gray-900">Konfirmasi Bukti Survei</h2>
 75:                                             <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-0.5">Pastikan bukti survei sudah benar</p>
 76:                                         </div>
 77:                                     </div>
 78:                                     <button onClick={onClose} className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600">
 79:                                         <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
 80:                                     </button>
 81:                                 </div>
 82: 
 83:                                 <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto py-2">
 84:                                     <div className="mx-6 mb-4 rounded-xl bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 px-4 py-3">

 90:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-3">Dokumen yang Dilampirkan</p>

 93:                                                 <FileIcon extension={fileExtension} />

 95:                                                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider">BUKTI SURVEI</p>

102:                                                     <EyeIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
103:                                                 </button>
104:                                             </div>
105:                                         </div>

================
File: resources/js/Pages/DataRequests/Partials/SurveyUploadForm.jsx
================
  1: import { useState } from 'react';
  2: import { useForm } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import { ArrowUpTrayIcon, ExclamationTriangleIcon, ArrowDownTrayIcon, EyeIcon, ArrowTopRightOnSquareIcon, ClockIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  4: import { CheckCircleIcon as CheckCircleSolid } from '@heroicons/react/24/solid';
  5: import SurveyUploadConfirmationModal from './SurveyUploadConfirmationModal';
  6: import FileIcon from './FileIcon';
  7: 
  8: export default function SurveyUploadForm({ dataRequestId, survey, availableSurveyData, onUploaded, onPreviewProof }) {
  9:     const { data, setData, post, processing, errors, reset } = useForm({
 10:         survey_type: availableSurveyData.value,
 11:         file: null,
 12:     });
 13:     const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);
 14:     const [showConfirm, setShowConfirm] = useState(false);
 15:     const [localError, setLocalError] = useState('');
 16: 
 17:     const handleFileChange = (file) => {
 18:         if (!file) return;
 19:         const maxSizeBytes = 5 * 1024 * 1024; // 5MB
 20: 
 21:         if (file.size > maxSizeBytes) {
 22:             setLocalError('Ukuran file maksimal 5MB.');
 23:             setData('file', null);
 24:             return;
 25:         }
 26: 
 27:         const validTypes = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/jpg', 'image/webp', 'image/svg+xml'];
 28:         const isValidExtension = /\.(jpg|jpeg|png|webp|svg)$/i.test(file.name.toLowerCase());
 29: 
 30:         if (!validTypes.includes(file.type) && !isValidExtension) {
 31:             setLocalError('Format file harus berupa JPG, PNG, WEBP, atau SVG.');
 32:             setData('file', null);
 33:             return;
 34:         }
 35: 
 36:         setLocalError('');
 37:         setData('file', file);
 38:     };
 39: 
 40:     const isRejected = survey?.status === 'rejected';
 41:     const isPending = survey?.status === 'pending';
 42:     const isApproved = survey?.status === 'approved';
 43: 
 44:     const handleSubmit = (e) => {
 45:         e.preventDefault();
 46:         setShowConfirm(true);
 47:     };
 48: 
 49:     const handleConfirmSubmit = () => {
 50:         post(route('data-requests.surveys.store', dataRequestId), {
 51:             preserveScroll: true,
 52:             onSuccess: () => { reset(); setShowConfirm(false); onUploaded?.(); },
 53:             onError: () => { setShowConfirm(false); }
 54:         });
 55:     };
 56: 
 57:     return (
 58:         <div>
 59:             <div className="py-2.5">
 60:                 <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
 61:                     <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-800 leading-snug flex-1">
 62:                         {availableSurveyData.label}
 63:                     </p>
 64:                     {!isApproved && (
 65:                         <a
 66:                             href={availableSurveyData.url}
 67:                             target="_blank"
 68:                             rel="noopener noreferrer"
 69:                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 transition-all shrink-0 px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-400"
 70:                         >
 71:                             Isi survei <ArrowTopRightOnSquareIcon className="h-2.5 w-2.5" />
 72:                         </a>
 73:                     )}
 74:                 </div>
 75: 
 76:                 {(isApproved || isPending || isRejected) && (
 77:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2">
 78:                         {isApproved && (
 79:                             <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-green-700 text-[9px] font-bold">
 80:                                 <CheckCircleSolid className="w-2.5 h-2.5" /> Disetujui
 81:                             </span>
 82:                         )}
 83:                         {isPending && (
 84:                             <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-amber-700 text-[9px] font-bold">
 85:                                 <ClockIcon className="w-2.5 h-2.5" /> Menunggu verifikasi admin
 86:                             </span>
 87:                         )}
 88:                         {isRejected && (
 89:                             <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg  text-red-500 text-[9px] font-bold">
 90:                                 <ExclamationTriangleIcon className="w-2.5 h-2.5" /> Bukti tidak valid. Silakan unggah ulang bukti survei yang sesuai.
 91:                             </span>
 92:                         )}
 93:                     </div>
 94:                 )}
 95:             </div>
 96: 
 97:             {isRejected && (
 98:                 <div className="bg-red-50/50 border-l-4 border-red-500 p-3 my-3 rounded-r-xl">
 99:                     <p className="text-[9px] font-black text-red-700 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Alasan Penolakan:</p>
100:                     <p className="text-[10px] text-red-600 leading-relaxed font-medium">
101:                         "{survey.rejection_reason || 'Screenshot tidak valid atau tidak terbaca. Harap unggah ulang bukti survei yang sesuai.'}"
102:                     </p>
103:                 </div>
104:             )}
105: 
106:             {/* Upload form (belum ada atau ditolak) */}
107:             {(!survey || isRejected) && (
108:                 <>
109:                     <hr className="border-gray-200/60" />
110:                     <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="pt-2.5 pb-1">
111:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
112:                             <label
113:                                 onDragOver={(e) => {
114:                                     e.preventDefault();
115:                                     const isValid = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.items).every(item => {
116:                                         if (item.kind !== 'file' || !item.type) return true;
117:                                         return item.type.startsWith('image/');
118:                                     });
119:                                     if (isValid) {
120:                                         e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'copy';
121:                                         setIsDragging(true);
122:                                     } else {
123:                                         e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'none';
124:                                         setIsDragging(false);
125:                                     }
126:                                 }}
127:                                 onDragLeave={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); setIsDragging(false); }}
128:                                 onDrop={(e) => {
129:                                     e.preventDefault();
130:                                     setIsDragging(false);
131:                                     if (e.dataTransfer.files && e.dataTransfer.files.length > 0) {
132:                                         const file = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
133:                                         handleFileChange(file);
134:                                     }
135:                                 }}
136:                                 className={`flex-1 min-w-0 flex items-center gap-2 border border-dashed rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-[10px] font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors ${isDragging ? 'border-gray-900 bg-gray-100 text-gray-900' :
137:                                     data.file ? 'border-gray-900 bg-gray-50 text-gray-900' : 'border-gray-200 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:border-gray-400'
138:                                     }`}
139:                             >
140:                                 <ArrowUpTrayIcon className="w-3.5 h-3.5 shrink-0" />
141:                                 <span className="break-words whitespace-normal flex-1">{data.file ? data.file.name : 'Pilih gambar bukti…'}</span>
142:                                 <input type="file" accept="image/*" onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e.target.files[0])} className="hidden" />
143:                             </label>
144:                             <button
145:                                 type="submit"
146:                                 disabled={processing || !data.file}
147:                                 className="px-4 py-2 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-xl text-[10px] font-bold hover:bg-black transition-colors disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed shrink-0"
148:                             >
149:                                 {processing ? '...' : 'Kirim'}
150:                             </button>
151:                         </div>
152:                         <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 mt-1.5">Format diterima: JPG, PNG, WEBP, SVG</p>
153:                         {(localError || errors.file) && <p className="text-[10px] text-red-500 font-bold mt-1.5">{localError || errors.file}</p>}
154:                     </form>
155:                 </>
156:             )}
157: 
158:             {/* File bukti yang sudah dikirim (pending/approved) */}
159:             {survey && !isRejected && (
160:                 <>
161:                     <hr className="border-gray-200/60" />
162:                     <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2">
163:                     <div className="flex items-start gap-3 overflow-hidden min-w-0 flex-1">
164:                             <FileIcon extension={survey.proof_original_name?.split('.').pop() || 'IMG'} />
165:                             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-500 break-words whitespace-normal flex-1">{survey.proof_original_name || 'Bukti Survei'}</p>
166:                         </div>
167:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-1 shrink-0">
168:                             <button
169:                                 onClick={() => onPreviewProof(route('data-requests.surveys.preview', [dataRequestId, survey.id]))}
170:                                 type="button"
171:                                 className="p-1.5 text-gray-400 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-700 transition-all"
172:                                 title="Lihat"
173:                             >
174:                                 <EyeIcon className="h-3 w-3" />
175:                             </button>
176:                             <a
177:                                 href={route('data-requests.surveys.download', [dataRequestId, survey.id])}
178:                                 download
179:                                 className="p-1.5 text-gray-400 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-700 transition-all"
180:                                 title="Unduh"
181:                             >
182:                                 <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-3 w-3" />
183:                             </a>
184:                         </div>
185:                     </div>
186:                 </>
187:             )}
188: 
189:             <SurveyUploadConfirmationModal
190:                 show={showConfirm}
191:                 file={data.file}
192:                 surveyName={availableSurveyData.label}
193:                 processing={processing}
194:                 onClose={() => setShowConfirm(false)}
195:                 onConfirm={handleConfirmSubmit}
196:             />
197:         </div>
198:     );
199: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/DataRequests/Partials/UniversalDataPreview.jsx
================
  1: import { PresentationChartBarIcon, DocumentTextIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  2: import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  3: 
  4: export default function UniversalDataPreview({ url, extension }) {
  5:     const ext = (extension || '').toLowerCase();
  6:     
  7:     // =========================================================================
  8:     // 1. FALLBACK UNTUK FORMAT YANG TIDAK BISA DIPARSE LOKAL (PPT, DOC, DLL)
  9:     // =========================================================================
 10:     if (!['xls', 'xlsx', 'csv', 'txt'].includes(ext)) {
 11:         return (
 12:             <div className="w-full bg-gray-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center select-none" style={{ minHeight: '420px', height: '100%' }}>
 13:                 <div className="text-center p-8 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-2xl bg-white w-[80%] max-w-sm shadow-sm flex flex-col items-center">
 14:                     <DocumentTextIcon className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mb-4" />
 15:                     <div className="text-xl text-gray-800 font-black mb-3 uppercase tracking-wider">{ext || 'DOKUMEN'}</div>
 16:                     <div className="h-1 w-12 bg-gray-200 rounded-full mb-5" />
 17:                     <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500 font-medium leading-relaxed px-4">
 18:                         Tipe file ini tidak mendukung pratinjau langsung di dalam browser.<br/><br/>
 19:                         <span className="text-gray-400">Silakan unduh dokumen untuk melihat isi selengkapnya.</span>
 20:                     </p>
 21:                 </div>
 22:             </div>
 23:         );
 24:     }
 25: 
 26:     // =========================================================================
 27:     // 2. REAL DATA MAPPING UNTUK SPREADSHEETS & TEXT!
 28:     // =========================================================================
 29:     const [data, setData] = useState(null);
 30:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
 31:     const [error, setError] = useState(null);
 32:     const [sheetNames, setSheetNames] = useState([]);
 33:     const [activeSheet, setActiveSheet] = useState(0);
 34: 
 35:     useEffect(() => {
 36:         if (!url) return;
 37: 
 38:         let isMounted = true;
 39:         setLoading(true);
 40: 
 41:         const fetchData = async () => {
 42:             try {
 43:                 if (['csv', 'txt'].includes(ext)) {
 44:                     // Fetch real text
 45:                     const response = await fetch(url);
 46:                     if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Network error');
 47:                     const text = await response.text();
 48:                     
 49:                     const rows = text.split('\n').filter(row => row.trim() !== '')
 50:                         .map(row => row.split(',').map(cell => cell.trim()));
 51:                     
 52:                     if (isMounted) {
 53:                         setData([rows]); 
 54:                         setSheetNames(['Sheet 1']);
 55:                         setLoading(false);
 56:                     }
 57:                 } else if (['xls', 'xlsx'].includes(ext)) {
 58:                     // Fetch raw bits
 59:                     const response = await fetch(url);
 60:                     if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Network error');
 61:                     const arrayBuffer = await response.arrayBuffer();
 62: 
 63:                     try {
 64:                         const XLSX = await import('https://cdn.sheetjs.com/xlsx-latest/package/xlsx.mjs');
 65:                         const workbook = XLSX.read(arrayBuffer, { type: 'array' });
 66:                         
 67:                         const parsedSheets = [];
 68:                         const names = [];
 69:                         
 70:                         workbook.SheetNames.forEach(sheetName => {
 71:                             const sheet = workbook.Sheets[sheetName];
 72:                             const sheetData = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(sheet, { header: 1 });
 73:                             if (sheetData.length > 0) {
 74:                                 names.push(sheetName);
 75:                                 parsedSheets.push(sheetData);
 76:                             }
 77:                         });
 78:                         
 79:                         if (isMounted) {
 80:                             setData(parsedSheets);
 81:                             setSheetNames(names);
 82:                             setLoading(false);
 83:                         }
 84:                     } catch (err) {
 85:                         console.error('XLSX Error:', err);
 86:                         if (isMounted) setError("Gagal mengurai file Excel.");
 87:                     }
 88:                 } else {
 89:                     if (isMounted) setError("Format tidak dapat ditampilkan.");
 90:                 }
 91:             } catch (err) {
 92:                 console.error('Fetch error:', err);
 93:                 if (isMounted) setError("Gagal mengambil data aslinya. URL mungkin dilindungi.");
 94:             }
 95:         };
 96: 
 97:         fetchData();
 98: 
 99:         return () => { isMounted = false; };
100:     }, [url, ext]);
101: 
102:     if (error) {
103:         return (
104:             <div className="w-full h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-gray-50 p-8 text-center select-none overflow-y-auto">
105:                 <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase">{error}</p>
106:             </div>
107:         );
108:     }
109: 
110:     if (loading) {
111:         return (
112:             <div className="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-50">
113:                 <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-gray-900"></div>
114:                 <span className="ml-3 text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest">Memuat Data Asli...</span>
115:             </div>
116:         );
117:     }
118: 
119:     if (!data || data.length === 0 || !data[activeSheet]) {
120:         return (
121:             <div className="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-50 text-xs font-bold text-gray-400">
122:                 Data Kosong
123:             </div>
124:         );
125:     }
126: 
127:     const currentData = data[activeSheet];
128: 
129:     return (
130:         <div className="w-full h-full flex flex-col bg-white overflow-hidden text-[10px]">
131:             {/* Height exactly 400px simulates ~13 rows nicely with scrolling for the rest */}
132:             <div className="overflow-auto bg-white" style={{ maxHeight: '420px', flex: '1 1 auto' }}>
133:                 <table className="w-full text-left border-collapse whitespace-nowrap">
134:                     <thead className="bg-gray-50 sticky top-0 z-10 shadow-sm">
135:                         <tr>
136:                             <th className="bg-gray-100 border-r border-b border-gray-200 px-3 py-1.5 w-8 text-center text-gray-400 font-bold">#</th>
137:                             {currentData[0]?.map((_, colIndex) => (
138:                                 <th key={colIndex} className="border-r border-b border-gray-200 px-3 py-1.5 font-bold text-gray-600 bg-gray-100/80">
139:                                     {String.fromCharCode(65 + (colIndex % 26))}
140:                                     {colIndex >= 26 ? Math.floor(colIndex/26) : ''}
141:                                 </th>
142:                             ))}
143:                         </tr>
144:                     </thead>
145:                     <tbody>
146:                         {currentData.map((row, rowIndex) => (
147:                             <tr key={rowIndex} className="border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors">
148:                                 <td className="border-r border-gray-200 px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-50 text-center text-gray-400 font-medium">
149:                                     {rowIndex + 1}
150:                                 </td>
151:                                 {currentData[0]?.map((_, colIndex) => (
152:                                     <td key={colIndex} className="border-r border-gray-100 px-3 py-1.5 text-gray-700 max-w-[200px] truncate" title={row[colIndex] ?? ''}>
153:                                         {row[colIndex] !== undefined && row[colIndex] !== null ? String(row[colIndex]) : ''}
154:                                     </td>
155:                                 ))}
156:                             </tr>
157:                         ))}
158:                     </tbody>
159:                 </table>
160:             </div>
161: 
162:             {/* Tabs for Sheets */}
163:             {sheetNames.length > 1 && (
164:                 <div className="flex bg-gray-50 border-t border-gray-200 shrink-0 overflow-x-auto">
165:                     {sheetNames.map((name, idx) => (
166:                         <button
167:                             key={idx}
168:                             onClick={() => setActiveSheet(idx)}
169:                             className={`px-4 py-2 font-bold whitespace-nowrap transition-all border-r border-gray-200 ${
170:                                 activeSheet === idx 
171:                                     ? 'bg-white text-green-700 shadow-sm border-t-2 border-t-green-500' 
172:                                     : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-100'
173:                             }`}
174:                         >
175:                             {name}
176:                         </button>
177:                     ))}
178:                 </div>
179:             )}
180:         </div>
181:     );
182: }

 69: function DocumentRow({ document, onPreview }) {
 70:     const isContoh = document.type === 'contoh';
 71:     const isTemplate = document.type === 'template';
 72: 
 73:     return (
 74:         <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
 75:             <div className="min-w-0 flex-1 flex items-center gap-2">
 76:                 {isTemplate ? (
 77:                     <WordFileIcon />
 78:                 ) : (
 79:                     <PdfFileIconMini />
 80:                 )}
 81:                 <span title={document.title} className="min-w-0 flex-1 break-words whitespace-normal text-[13px] font-medium leading-5 text-slate-700">
 82:                     {document.title}
 83:                 </span>
 84:             </div>
 85:             <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0">
 86:                 {isContoh && (
 87:                     <button
 88:                         type="button"
 89:                         onClick={() => onPreview(document)}
 90:                         title={`Preview ${document.title}`}
 91:                         aria-label={`Preview ${document.title}`}
 92:                         className="group relative inline-flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white text-gray-500 hover:border-blue-600 hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors"
 93:                     >
 94:                         <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
 95:                         <span className="pointer-events-none absolute -top-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-md bg-gray-900 px-2 py-1 text-[11px] font-medium text-white opacity-0 shadow-sm transition-opacity group-hover:opacity-100">
 96:                             Preview
 97:                         </span>
 98:                     </button>
 99:                 )}
100:                 <a
101:                     href={document.downloadUrl}
102:                     download
103:                     title={`Download ${document.title}`}
104:                     aria-label={`Download ${document.title}`}
105:                     className="group relative inline-flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white text-gray-500 hover:border-gray-900 hover:text-gray-900 transition-colors"
106:                 >
107:                     <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
108:                     <span className="pointer-events-none absolute -top-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-md bg-gray-900 px-2 py-1 text-[11px] font-medium text-white opacity-0 shadow-sm transition-opacity group-hover:opacity-100">
109:                         Download
110:                     </span>
111:                 </a>
112:             </div>
113:         </div>
114:     );

117: function TextDocumentLinks({ documents, onPreview }) {
118:     const templates = documents.filter((d) => d.type === 'template');
119:     const contohs = documents.filter((d) => d.type === 'contoh');
120: 
121:     return (
122:         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 md:gap-0">
123:             {templates.length > 0 && (
124:                 <div className="md:pr-6">
125:                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1.5 px-2">Template Dokumen</p>
126:                     <div className="space-y-0.5">
127:                         {templates.map((doc) => (
128:                             <DocumentRow key={doc.title} document={doc} onPreview={onPreview} />
129:                         ))}
130:                     </div>
131:                 </div>
132:             )}
133:             {contohs.length > 0 && (
134:                 <div className={templates.length > 0 ? "pt-6 md:pt-0 md:pl-6 border-t md:border-t-0 md:border-l border-gray-100" : ""}>
135:                     <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1.5 px-2">Contoh Dokumen</p>
136:                     <div className="space-y-0.5">
137:                         {contohs.map((doc) => (
138:                             <DocumentRow key={doc.title} document={doc} onPreview={onPreview} />
139:                         ))}
140:                     </div>
141:                 </div>
142:             )}
143:         </div>
144:     );
145: }
