148: export default function UploadDocumentStep({ data, setData, errors, processing, currentPurpose, onBack, onSubmit }) {
149:     const { auth, contactSettings } = usePage().props;
150:     const whatsapp = contactSettings?.cs_whatsapp || '';
151:     const [isRegulationHovered, setIsRegulationHovered] = useState(false);
152:     const [previewDoc, setPreviewDoc] = useState(null);
153:     const [showConfirm, setShowConfirm] = useState(false);
154:     const [draggingDocs, setDraggingDocs] = useState({});
155:     const [localErrors, setLocalErrors] = useState({});
156: 
157:     // Set applicant_type based on purpose_type for non-commercial
158:     useEffect(() => {
159:         if (currentPurpose?.value === 'non_commercial_instansi') {
160:             setData('applicant_type', 'instansi');
161:         } else if (currentPurpose?.value === 'non_commercial_individu') {
162:             setData('applicant_type', 'individu');
163:         }
164:     }, [currentPurpose?.value]);
165: 
166:     // Initialize company_name from auth user for instansi types
167:     useEffect(() => {
168:         if (
169:             (data.applicant_type === 'instansi' || currentPurpose?.value === 'non_commercial_instansi') &&
170:             !data.company_name && auth.user.company_name
171:         ) {
172:             setData('company_name', auth.user.company_name);
173:         }
174:     }, [auth.user.company_name, data.applicant_type, currentPurpose?.value]);
175: 
176:     const handleApplicantTypeChange = (type) => {
177:         if (type === 'individu') {
178:             setData(prev => ({ ...prev, applicant_type: 'individu', company_name: '' }));
179:         } else {
180:             setData(prev => ({ ...prev, applicant_type: 'instansi', company_name: auth.user.company_name || '' }));
181:         }
182:     };
183: 
184:     const relatedDocuments = getPurposeDocuments(currentPurpose?.value);
185:     const regulationDoc = relatedDocuments[0];
186:     const supportDocs = relatedDocuments.slice(1);
187: 
188:     const handleFileChange = (docType, file) => {
189:         if (!file) return;
190:         const maxSizeBytes = 5 * 1024 * 1024; // 5MB
191: 
192:         if (file.size > maxSizeBytes) {
193:             setLocalErrors(prev => ({ ...prev, [docType]: 'Ukuran dokumen tidak boleh melebihi 5MB.' }));
194:             setData(docType, null);
195:             return;
196:         }
197: 
198:         if (file.type !== 'application/pdf' && !file.name.toLowerCase().endsWith('.pdf')) {
199:             setLocalErrors(prev => ({ ...prev, [docType]: 'Format dokumen harus berupa PDF.' }));
200:             setData(docType, null);
201:             return;
202:         }
203: 
204:         setLocalErrors(prev => {
205:             const updated = { ...prev };
206:             delete updated[docType];
207:             return updated;
208:         });
209:         setData(docType, file);
210:     };
211: 
212:     const isFormValid = data.title.trim().length > 0 &&
213:         (
214:             (currentPurpose?.value === 'commercial' && (data.applicant_type !== 'instansi' || (data.company_name && data.company_name.trim().length > 0))) ||
215:             (currentPurpose?.value === 'non_commercial_individu') ||
216:             (currentPurpose?.value === 'non_commercial_instansi' && data.company_name && data.company_name.trim().length > 0)
217:         ) &&
218:         (currentPurpose?.value === 'commercial' || currentPurpose?.value === 'non_commercial_instansi' || (data.research_target_date && data.research_target_date.trim().length > 0)) &&
219:         currentPurpose?.requiredDocuments.every((doc) => data[doc] !== null);
220: 
221:     return (
222:         <>
223:             <PublicDocumentPreviewModal document={previewDoc} onClose={() => setPreviewDoc(null)} />
224:             <SubmitConfirmationModal
225:                 show={showConfirm}
226:                 data={data}
227:                 currentPurpose={currentPurpose}
228:                 processing={processing}
229:                 onClose={() => setShowConfirm(false)}
230:                 onConfirm={() => { setShowConfirm(false); onSubmit(); }}
231:             />
232:             <div className="space-y-5 pb-8">
233:                 <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40 border border-gray-100 px-8 py-5 flex items-center justify-between">
234:                     <div>
235:                         <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Jenis Pengajuan Dipilih</p>
236:                         <p className="text-sm font-extrabold text-gray-900">{currentPurpose?.label}</p>
237:                     </div>
238:                     <button
239:                         type="button"
240:                         onClick={onBack}
241:                         className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-900 underline transition-all hover:no-underline hover:bg-gray-50 px-3 py-1 rounded-lg"
242:                     >
243:                         Ganti
244:                     </button>
245:                 </div>
246: 
247: 
248:                 <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40 border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
249:                     <div className="px-6 sm:px-8 py-5 border-b border-gray-100">
250:                         <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Dokumen Informasi</h3>
251:                     </div>
252:                     <div className="px-6 sm:px-8 py-6 space-y-3">
253:                         {regulationDoc && (
254:                             <>
255:                                 <RegulationDocumentCard
256:                                     document={regulationDoc}
257:                                     isHovered={isRegulationHovered}
258:                                     onMouseEnter={() => setIsRegulationHovered(true)}
259:                                     onMouseLeave={() => setIsRegulationHovered(false)}
260:                                 />
261:                                 <div className="border-t border-gray-200" />
262:                             </>
263:                         )}
264:                         <TextDocumentLinks documents={supportDocs} onPreview={setPreviewDoc} />
265:                     </div>
266:                 </div>
267: 
268:                 <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40 border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
269:                     <div className="px-6 sm:px-8 py-5 border-b border-gray-100">
270:                         <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Informasi Pengajuan</h3>
271:                     </div>
272:                     <div className="px-6 sm:px-8 py-6">
273:                         <div className="w-full">
274:                             <label htmlFor="title" className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
275:                                 Judul Pengajuan <span className="text-red-400">*</span>
276:                             </label>
277:                             <input
278:                                 type="text"
279:                                 id="title"
280:                                 value={data.title}
281:                                 onChange={(e) => setData('title', e.target.value)}
282:                                 placeholder="Contoh: Pengajuan Data Curah Hujan untuk Skripsi"
283:                                 className="w-full px-5 py-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-200 focus:border-gray-900 focus:ring-0 transition-all bg-gray-50/50 hover:border-gray-400 text-sm"
284:                             />
285:                             {errors.title && (
286:                                 <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-2">{errors.title}</p>
287:                             )}
288:                             <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">
289:                                 Masukkan judul yang jelas dan deskriptif untuk pengajuan data Anda.
290:                             </p>
291:                         </div>
292: 
293:                         {/* Commercial: Toggle Atas Nama (Pribadi/Instansi) */}
294:                         {currentPurpose?.value === 'commercial' && (
295:                             <>
296:                                 <div className="w-full mt-6">
297:                                     <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
298:                                         Atas Nama <span className="text-red-400">*</span>
299:                                     </label>
300:                                     <div className="flex gap-2">
301:                                         <button
302:                                             type="button"
303:                                             onClick={() => handleApplicantTypeChange('individu')}
304:                                             className={[
305:                                                 'inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg border font-semibold text-xs transition-all duration-200',
306:                                                 data.applicant_type === 'individu'
307:                                                     ? 'border-gray-900 bg-gray-900 text-white shadow-sm'
308:                                                     : 'border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500 hover:border-gray-400 hover:text-gray-700',
309:                                             ].join(' ')}
310:                                         >
311:                                             Pribadi
312:                                         </button>
313:                                         <button
314:                                             type="button"
315:                                             onClick={() => handleApplicantTypeChange('instansi')}
316:                                             className={[
317:                                                 'inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg border font-semibold text-xs transition-all duration-200',
318:                                                 data.applicant_type === 'instansi'
319:                                                     ? 'border-gray-900 bg-gray-900 text-white shadow-sm'
320:                                                     : 'border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500 hover:border-gray-400 hover:text-gray-700',
321:                                             ].join(' ')}
322:                                         >
323:                                             Instansi
324:                                         </button>
325:                                     </div>
326:                                     <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">
327:                                         Pilih apakah pengajuan ini dilakukan atas nama pribadi atau instansi.
328:                                     </p>
329:                                 </div>
330: 
331:                                 {/* Commercial Individu: Nama Pemohon */}
332:                                 {data.applicant_type === 'individu' && (
333:                                     <div className="w-full mt-6">
334:                                         <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
335:                                             Nama Pemohon <span className="text-red-400">*</span>
336:                                         </label>
337:                                         <div className="flex items-center w-full px-5 py-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/80 text-sm">
338:                                             <span className="font-semibold text-gray-700">{auth.user.name.toLowerCase().replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase())}</span>
339:                                         </div>
340:                                         <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">
341:                                             Nama pemohon diambil dari data akun Anda. Nama yang diisi akan menjadi alamat penerima surat dari BMKG (Yth.). Pastikan sesuai dengan nama pribadi Anda yang benar.
342:                                         </p>
343:                                     </div>
344:                                 )}
345: 
346:                                 {/* Commercial Instansi: Nama Instansi */}
347:                                 {data.applicant_type === 'instansi' && (
348:                                     <div className="w-full mt-6">
349:                                         <label htmlFor="company_name" className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
350:                                             Nama Instansi <span className="text-red-400">*</span>
351:                                         </label>
352:                                         <div className="space-y-2">
353:                                             <input
354:                                                 type="text"
355:                                                 id="company_name"
356:                                                 value={data.company_name}
357:                                                 onChange={(e) => setData('company_name', e.target.value)}
358:                                                 placeholder="Contoh: PT. Maju Bersama"
359:                                                 className="w-full px-5 py-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-200 focus:border-gray-900 focus:ring-0 transition-all bg-gray-50/50 hover:border-gray-400 text-sm"
360:                                             />
361:                                             {errors.company_name && (
362:                                                 <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.company_name}</p>
363:                                             )}
364:                                             <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">
365:                                                 Masukkan nama instansi resmi yang mengajukan permintaan data. Nama yang diisi akan menjadi penerima surat dari BMKG (Yth.). Pastikan sesuai dengan nama instansi Anda yang benar.
366:                                             </p>
367:                                         </div>
368:                                     </div>
369:                                 )}
370:                             </>
371:                         )}
372: 
373:                         {/* Non-commercial Individu: Nama Pemohon saja */}
374:                         {currentPurpose?.value === 'non_commercial_individu' && (
375:                             <div className="w-full mt-6">
376:                                 <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
377:                                     Nama Pemohon <span className="text-red-400">*</span>
378:                                 </label>
379:                                 <div className="flex items-center w-full px-5 py-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/80 text-sm">
380:                                     <span className="font-semibold text-gray-700">{auth.user.name.toLowerCase().replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase())}</span>
381:                                 </div>
382:                                 <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">
383:                                     Nama pemohon diambil dari data akun Anda. Nama yang diisi akan menjadi alamat penerima surat dari BMKG (Yth.). Pastikan sesuai dengan nama pribadi Anda yang benar.
384:                                 </p>
385:                             </div>
386:                         )}
387: 
388:                         {/* Non-commercial Instansi: Nama Instansi saja */}
389:                         {currentPurpose?.value === 'non_commercial_instansi' && (
390:                             <div className="w-full mt-6">
391:                                 <label htmlFor="company_name" className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
392:                                     Nama Instansi <span className="text-red-400">*</span>
393:                                 </label>
394:                                 <div className="space-y-2">
395:                                     <input
396:                                         type="text"
397:                                         id="company_name"
398:                                         value={data.company_name}
399:                                         onChange={(e) => setData('company_name', e.target.value)}
400:                                         placeholder="Masukkan nama instansi Anda"
401:                                         className="w-full px-5 py-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-200 focus:border-gray-900 focus:ring-0 transition-all bg-gray-50/50 hover:border-gray-400 text-sm"
402:                                     />
403:                                     {errors.company_name && (
404:                                         <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.company_name}</p>
405:                                     )}
406:                                     <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">
407:                                         Masukkan nama instansi resmi yang mengajukan permintaan data. Nama yang diisi akan menjadi alamat penerima surat dari BMKG (Yth.). Pastikan sesuai dengan nama instansi Anda yang benar.
408:                                     </p>
409:                                 </div>
410:                             </div>
411:                         )}
412: 
413:                         {currentPurpose?.value === 'non_commercial_individu' && (
414:                             <div className="w-full mt-6">
415:                                 <label htmlFor="research_target_date" className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
416:                                     Rencana Tanggal Unggah Hasil Penelitian <span className="text-red-400">*</span>
417:                                 </label>
418:                                 <div className="space-y-2">
419:                                     <input
420:                                         type="date"
421:                                         id="research_target_date"
422:                                         value={data.research_target_date || ''}
423:                                         onChange={(e) => setData('research_target_date', e.target.value)}
424:                                         min={new Date(new Date().setDate(new Date().getDate() + 1)).toISOString().split('T')[0]}
425:                                         className="w-full px-5 py-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-200 focus:border-gray-900 focus:ring-0 transition-all bg-gray-50/50 hover:border-gray-400 text-sm"
426:                                     />
427:                                     {errors.research_target_date && (
428:                                         <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{errors.research_target_date}</p>
429:                                     )}
430:                                     <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">
431:                                         Pilih tanggal kapan Anda merencanakan untuk mengunggah hasil penelitian Anda (harus setelah hari ini).
432:                                     </p>
433:                                 </div>
434:                             </div>
435:                         )}
436:                     </div>
437:                 </div>
438: 
439:                 <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40 border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
440:                     <div className="px-6 sm:px-8 py-5 border-b border-gray-100">
441:                         <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Dokumen yang Dibutuhkan</h3>
442:                     </div>
443:                     <div className="px-6 sm:px-8 py-6">
444:                         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
445:                             {currentPurpose && currentPurpose.requiredDocuments.map((docType) => (
446:                                 <div key={docType} className="flex flex-col">
447:                                     <label className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
448:                                         {documentLabels[docType] || docType}
449:                                         <span className="text-red-400 ml-1">*</span>
450:                                     </label>
451:                                     <label
452:                                         onDragOver={(e) => {
453:                                             e.preventDefault();
454:                                             const isValid = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.items).every(item => item.kind !== 'file' || item.type === 'application/pdf' || item.type === '');
455:                                             if (isValid) {
456:                                                 e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'copy';
457:                                                 setDraggingDocs(prev => ({ ...prev, [docType]: true }));
458:                                             } else {
459:                                                 e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'none';
460:                                                 setDraggingDocs(prev => ({ ...prev, [docType]: false }));
461:                                             }
462:                                         }}
463:                                         onDragLeave={(e) => {
464:                                             e.preventDefault();
465:                                             setDraggingDocs(prev => ({ ...prev, [docType]: false }));
466:                                         }}
467:                                         onDrop={(e) => {
468:                                             e.preventDefault();
469:                                             setDraggingDocs(prev => ({ ...prev, [docType]: false }));
470:                                             if (e.dataTransfer.files && e.dataTransfer.files.length > 0) {
471:                                                 const file = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
472:                                                 handleFileChange(docType, file);
473:                                             }
474:                                         }}
475:                                         className={[
476:                                             'flex items-center gap-4 px-5 py-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-dashed cursor-pointer transition-all transform hover:scale-[1.01] active:scale-[0.99]',
477:                                             draggingDocs[docType]
478:                                                 ? 'border-gray-900 bg-gray-100 scale-[1.02]'
479:                                                 : data[docType]
480:                                                     ? 'border-gray-900 bg-gray-50'
481:                                                     : 'border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-400 bg-gray-50/50',
482:                                         ].join(' ')}>
483:                                         <div className="p-2 bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 shadow-sm shrink-0">
484:                                             <DocumentArrowUpIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" />
485:                                         </div>
486:                                         <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
487:                                             {data[docType] ? (
488:                                                 <>
489:                                                     <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900 break-words whitespace-normal">{data[docType].name}</p>
490:                                                     <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">{(data[docType].size / 1024).toFixed(0)} KB</p>
491:                                                 </>
492:                                             ) : (
493:                                                 <>
494:                                                     <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-500">Klik untuk unggah file</p>
495:                                                     <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">Format PDF, maks. 5MB</p>
496:                                                 </>
497:                                             )}
498:                                         </div>
499:                                         {data[docType] && (
500:                                             <div className="w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-gray-900 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
501:                                                 <CheckIcon className="h-3 w-3 text-white" />
502:                                             </div>
503:                                         )}
504:                                         <input
505:                                             type="file"
506:                                             accept=".pdf"
507:                                             className="hidden"
508:                                             onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(docType, e.target.files[0])}
509:                                         />
510:                                     </label>
511:                                     {(localErrors[docType] || errors[docType]) && (
512:                                         <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-2">{localErrors[docType] || errors[docType]}</p>
513:                                     )}
514:                                 </div>
515:                             ))}
516:                         </div>
517:                     </div>
518:                 </div>
519: 
520:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-end pt-2">
521:                     <button
522:                         type="button"
523:                         onClick={() => setShowConfirm(true)}
524:                         disabled={processing || !isFormValid}
525:                         className="px-8 py-3 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-xl font-bold text-sm hover:bg-black transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transform hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
526:                     >
527:                         Ajukan Pengajuan →
528:                     </button>
529:                 </div>
530:             </div>
531:         </>
532:     );
533: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/DataRequests/Partials/UploadProofSection.jsx
================
  1: import { useState, useRef } from 'react';
  2: import { useForm } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import { ArrowUpTrayIcon, CheckCircleIcon, ArrowPathIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  4: import ProofUploadConfirmationModal from './ProofUploadConfirmationModal';
  5: 
  6: export default function UploadProofSection({ dataRequestId }) {
  7:     const fileInputRef = useRef(null);
  8:     const { data, setData, post, processing, errors, reset } = useForm({ file: null });
  9:     const [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(false);
 10:     const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);
 11:     const [showConfirm, setShowConfirm] = useState(false);
 12:     const [localError, setLocalError] = useState('');
 13: 
 14:     const handleFileChange = (file) => {
 15:         if (!file) return;
 16:         const maxSizeBytes = 5 * 1024 * 1024; // 5MB
 17: 
 18:         if (file.size > maxSizeBytes) {
 19:             setLocalError('Ukuran file maksimal 5MB.');
 20:             setData('file', null);
 21:             return;
 22:         }
 23: 
 24:         const validTypes = ['application/pdf', 'image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/jpg'];
 25:         const isValidExtension = /\.(pdf|jpg|jpeg|png)$/i.test(file.name.toLowerCase());
 26:         
 27:         if (!validTypes.includes(file.type) && !isValidExtension) {
 28:             setLocalError('Format file harus berupa PDF, JPG, atau PNG.');
 29:             setData('file', null);
 30:             return;
 31:         }
 32: 
 33:         setLocalError('');
 34:         setData('file', file);
 35:     };
 36: 
 37:     const handleSubmit = (e) => {
 38:         e.preventDefault();
 39:         setShowConfirm(true);
 40:     };
 41: 
 42:     const handleConfirmSubmit = () => {
 43:         post(route('data-requests.payment-proof.store', dataRequestId), {
 44:             forceFormData: true,
 45:             onSuccess: () => { setSubmitted(true); reset(); setShowConfirm(false); },
 46:             onError: () => { setShowConfirm(false); }
 47:         });
 48:     };
 49: 
 50:     if (submitted) {
 51:         return (
 52:             <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 bg-white shadow-sm px-6 py-8 text-center">
 53:                 <CheckCircleIcon className="h-10 w-10 text-gray-900" />
 54:                 <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900">Bukti pembayaran berhasil diunggah!</p>
 55:                 <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 leading-relaxed max-w-xs">
 56:                     Admin akan memverifikasi pembayaran Anda segera.
 57:                 </p>
 58:             </div>
 59:         );
 60:     }
 61: 
 62:     return (
 63:         <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
 64:             <label
 65:                 onDragOver={(e) => {
 66:                     e.preventDefault();
 67:                     const isValid = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.items).every(item => {
 68:                         if (item.kind !== 'file' || !item.type) return true;
 69:                         return ['application/pdf', 'image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/jpg'].includes(item.type);
 70:                     });
 71:                     if (isValid) {
 72:                         e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'copy';
 73:                         setIsDragging(true);
 74:                     } else {
 75:                         e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'none';
 76:                         setIsDragging(false);
 77:                     }
 78:                 }}
 79:                 onDragLeave={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); setIsDragging(false); }}
 80:                 onDrop={(e) => {
 81:                     e.preventDefault();
 82:                     setIsDragging(false);
 83:                     if (e.dataTransfer.files && e.dataTransfer.files.length > 0) {
 84:                         const file = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
 85:                         handleFileChange(file);
 86:                     }
 87:                 }}
 88:                 className={[
 89:                     'flex items-center gap-4 px-5 py-5 rounded-2xl border-2 border-dashed cursor-pointer transition-all',
 90:                     isDragging ? 'border-gray-900 bg-gray-100 scale-[1.02]' : data.file ? 'border-gray-900 bg-gray-50' : 'border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-400 bg-gray-50/50',
 91:                 ].join(' ')}
 92:             >
 93:                 <div className="p-2.5 bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm shrink-0">
 94:                     <ArrowUpTrayIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" />
 95:                 </div>
 96:                 <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
 97:                     {data.file ? (
 98:                         <>
 99:                             <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900 break-words whitespace-normal">{data.file.name}</p>
100:                             <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">{(data.file.size / 1024).toFixed(0)} KB</p>
101:                         </>
102:                     ) : (
103:                         <>
104:                             <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-500">Klik untuk pilih file</p>
105:                             <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">Format PDF / JPG / PNG, maks. 5MB</p>
106:                         </>
107:                     )}
108:                 </div>
109:                 {data.file && <CheckCircleIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-900 shrink-0" />}
110:                 <input
111:                     ref={fileInputRef}
112:                     type="file"
113:                     accept=".pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png"
114:                     className="hidden"
115:                     onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e.target.files[0])}
116:                 />
117:             </label>
118:             {(localError || errors.file) && <p className="text-red-500 text-xs mt-1">{localError || errors.file}</p>}
119:             <button
120:                 type="submit"
121:                 disabled={!data.file || processing}
122:                 className="w-full py-3 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-xl text-sm font-bold hover:bg-black transition-all disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
123:             >
124:                 {processing ? (
125:                     <><ArrowPathIcon className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" /> Mengunggah...</>
126:                 ) : 'Kirim Bukti Pembayaran'}
127:             </button>
128:             <ProofUploadConfirmationModal
129:                 show={showConfirm}
130:                 file={data.file}
131:                 processing={processing}
132:                 onClose={() => setShowConfirm(false)}
133:                 onConfirm={handleConfirmSubmit}
134:             />
135:         </form>
136:     );
137: }

 95: const documentLabels = {
 96:     form_pernyataan: 'Surat Pernyataan',

103: const getStatusConfig = (status) => {
104:     return statusConfig.find((s) => s.key === status) || statusConfig[0];
105: };
106: 
107: export default function Show({ dataRequest, billingHistory, surveys: initialSurveys, availableSurveys, productUploads }) {
108:     const { auth } = usePage().props;
109:     const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);
110:     const [previewDoc, setPreviewDoc] = useState(null);
111: 
112:     const isNonCommercial = ['non_commercial_individu', 'non_commercial_instansi'].includes(dataRequest.purpose_type);
113: 
114:     const statusMap = {
115:         pending: 0,
116:         rejected: 0,
117:         payment_required: 1,
118:         payment_verifying: 1,
119:         payment_invalid: 1,
120:         payment_verified: 2,
121:         expired: 1,
122:         processing: 2,
123:         completed: 2,
124:     };
125: 
126:     const maxReachedStep = statusMap[dataRequest.status] ?? 0;
127:     const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(maxReachedStep);
128: 
129:     const isApproved = ['payment_required', 'payment_verifying', 'payment_invalid', 'payment_verified', 'expired', 'processing', 'completed'].includes(dataRequest.status);
130:     const isRejected = dataRequest.status === 'rejected';
131:     const currentStatusConfig = getStatusConfig(dataRequest.status);
132: 
133:     const copyToClipboard = (text) => {
134:         navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
135:         setCopied(true);
136:         setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000);
137:     };
138: 
139:     return (
140:         <AuthenticatedLayout header={<h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800">Detail Pengajuan</h2>}>
141:             <Head title={'Pengajuan ' + dataRequest.request_code} />
142: 
143:             <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50/50 pb-20 font-sans text-left">
144:                 <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-4 sm:px-8 py-10 mb-8">
145:                     <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-6">
146:                         <div>
147:                             <h1 className="text-3xl font-extrabold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Detail Pengajuan</h1>
148:                             <p className="mt-2 text-gray-500 text-lg">Pantau status permohonan layanan data Anda secara real-time.</p>
149:                         </div>
150:                         <Link
151:                             href={route('data-requests.index')}
152:                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-sm shrink-0 w-fit"
153:                         >
154:                             <ChevronLeftIcon className="h-4 w-4" /> Kembali
155:                         </Link>
156:                     </div>
157:                 </div>
158: 
159:                 <div className="w-full px-4 sm:px-8 space-y-8">
160:                     <RequestTimeline
161:                         dataRequest={dataRequest}
162:                         activeTab={activeTab}
163:                         maxReachedStep={maxReachedStep}
164:                         onTabChange={setActiveTab}
165:                         isNonCommercial={isNonCommercial}
166:                     />
167: 
168:                     <div className="w-full">
169:                         {activeTab === 0 && (
170:                             <SubmissionTab
171:                                 dataRequest={dataRequest}
172:                                 isApproved={isApproved}
173:                                 isRejected={isRejected}
174:                                 currentStatusConfig={currentStatusConfig}
175:                                 maxReachedStep={maxReachedStep}
176:                                 copied={copied}

178:                                 onPreview={setPreviewDoc}
179:                                 onNextTab={() => setActiveTab(1)}
180:                                 user={auth.user}
181:                                 isNonCommercial={isNonCommercial}
182:                             />
183:                         )}
184: 
185:                         {activeTab === 1 && (() => {
186:                             // Jika user baru saja meminta faktur baru (status request: payment_required)
187:                             // tetapi faktur terakhir yang tercatat masih yang lama (status invoice: expired),
188:                             // kita anggap currentInvoice = null, sehingga sistem menampilkan state "Menunggu admin menyiapkan faktur".
189:                             const isRequestingNewInvoice = dataRequest.status === 'payment_required' && dataRequest.active_invoice?.status === 'expired';
190:                             const currentInvoice = isRequestingNewInvoice ? null : dataRequest.active_invoice;
191:                             
192:                             return (
193:                                 <PaymentTab
194:                                     status={dataRequest.status}
195:                                     invoicePreviewPath={currentInvoice?.invoice_path
196:                                         ? route('data-requests.payment-invoice.preview', dataRequest.id)
197:                                         : null}
198:                                     invoiceDownloadPath={currentInvoice?.invoice_path
199:                                         ? route('data-requests.payment-invoice.download', dataRequest.id)
200:                                         : null}
201:                                     proofPath={currentInvoice?.proof_path ? route('data-requests.payment-proof.download', dataRequest.id) : null}
202:                                     proofPreviewPath={currentInvoice?.proof_path && currentInvoice?.id
203:                                         ? route('data-requests.invoices.proof-preview', [dataRequest.id, currentInvoice.id])
204:                                         : null}
205:                                     proofOriginalName={currentInvoice?.proof_path 
206:                                         ? `bukti-bayar-${dataRequest.request_code}.${currentInvoice.proof_path.split('.').pop().toLowerCase()}`
207:                                         : null}
208:                                     paymentAmount={currentInvoice?.amount ?? null}
209:                                     billingCode={currentInvoice?.billing_code ?? null}
210:                                     paymentVerifiedAt={currentInvoice?.verified_at ?? null}
211:                                     expiresAt={currentInvoice?.expires_at ?? null}
212:                                     rejectionReason={currentInvoice?.rejection_reason ?? null}
213:                                     maxReachedStep={maxReachedStep}
214:                                     onNextTab={() => setActiveTab(2)}
215:                                     dataRequestId={dataRequest.id}
216:                                     billingHistory={billingHistory ?? []}
217:                                     activeInvoiceId={currentInvoice?.id ?? null}
218:                                     isNonCommercial={isNonCommercial}
219:                                     invoiceFilename={currentInvoice?.invoice_path 
220:                                         ? `invoice-${dataRequest.request_code}.${currentInvoice.invoice_path.split('.').pop().toLowerCase()}`
221:                                         : 'Invoice_Tagihan.pdf'}
222:                                     copied={copied}
223:                                     onCopy={copyToClipboard}
224:                                 />
225:                             );
226:                         })()}
227: 
228:                         {activeTab === 2 && (() => {
229:                             const availableSurveysList = auth.user?.isAdmin ? [] : (availableSurveys ?? []);
230:                             const requiredSurveys = dataRequest.effective_required_surveys ?? [];
231:                             
232:                             const currentSurveys = initialSurveys ?? [];
233:                             const areSurveysCompleted = dataRequest.are_surveys_completed ?? false;
234: 
235:                             return (
236:                                 <DownloadTab
237:                                     status={dataRequest.status}
238:                                     processedDocuments={dataRequest.processed_documents ?? []}
239:                                     dataRequestId={dataRequest.id}
240:                                     dataRequestTitle={dataRequest.title}
241:                                     hasSubmittedFeedback={dataRequest.has_submitted_feedback ?? false}
242:                                     userFeedback={dataRequest.user_feedback ?? null}
243:                                     userFeedbackAt={dataRequest.user_feedback_at ?? null}
244:                                     areSurveysCompleted={areSurveysCompleted}
245:                                     requiredSurveys={requiredSurveys}
246:                                     surveys={currentSurveys}
247:                                     availableSurveys={availableSurveysList}
248:                                     canUploadProduct={dataRequest.can_upload_product}
249:                                     productUploads={productUploads}
250:                                     isNonCommercial={isNonCommercial}
251:                                 />
252:                             );
253:                         })()}
254:                     </div>
255:                 </div>
256: 
257:                 <DocumentPreviewModal
258:                     document={previewDoc}
259:                     dataRequestId={dataRequest.id}
260:                     title={previewDoc ? (documentLabels[previewDoc.document_type] || previewDoc.document_type) : ''}
261:                     onClose={() => setPreviewDoc(null)}
262:                 />
263:             </div>
264:         </AuthenticatedLayout>
265:     );
266: }

  1: import React from "react";
  2: 
  3: export default function Error({ status = 404, message = null }) {
  4:     const errorData = {
  5:         403: {
  6:             label: "ACCESS_DENIED",
  7:             msg: "Izin akses ditolak oleh sistem.",
  8:             description: "Anda tidak memiliki hak akses yang cukup untuk melihat halaman ini. Silakan hubungi administrator jika Anda yakin seharusnya dapat mengakses halaman ini."
  9:         },
 10:         404: {
 11:             label: "NOT_FOUND",
 12:             msg: "Sumber daya tidak ditemukan dalam pangkalan data.",
 13:             description: "Halaman yang Anda cari mungkin telah dipindahkan, dihapus, atau tidak pernah ada. Periksa kembali URL yang Anda masukkan."
 14:         },
 15:         419: {
 16:             label: "SESSION_EXPIRED",
 17:             msg: "Masa berlaku sesi telah berakhir.",
 18:             description: "Sesi login Anda telah habis karena terlalu lama tidak beraktivitas. Silakan login kembali untuk melanjutkan."
 19:         },
 20:         429: {
 21:             label: "TOO_MANY_REQUESTS",
 22:             msg: "Terlalu banyak permintaan dalam waktu singkat.",
 23:             description: "Anda telah mengirimkan terlalu banyak permintaan ke server dalam periode waktu tertentu. Silakan tunggu beberapa saat sebelum mencoba kembali."
 24:         },
 25:         500: {
 26:             label: "INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR",
 27:             msg: "Kegagalan pada instruksi server internal.",
 28:             description: "Terjadi kesalahan pada server saat memproses permintaan Anda. Tim teknis kami sedang menangani masalah ini."
 29:         },
 30:         503: {
 31:             label: "SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE",
 32:             msg: "Layanan tidak tersedia saat ini.",
 33:             description: "Sistem sedang dalam pemeliharaan atau mengalami gangguan. Silakan coba lagi dalam beberapa saat."
 34:         },
 35:         default: {
 36:             label: "UNKNOWN_ERROR",
 37:             msg: "Terjadi anomali pada sistem.",
 38:             description: "Kesalahan tidak dikenal telah terjadi. Silakan coba lagi nanti atau hubungi tim dukungan teknis."
 39:         }
 40:     };
 41: 
 42:     const info = errorData[status] || errorData.default;
 43: 
 44:     // Gunakan message dari Laravel jika ada, jika tidak pakai default description
 45:     const displayDescription = message || info.description;
 46: 
 47:     return (
 48:         <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 via-white to-slate-100 flex flex-col font-mono text-slate-800">
 49: 
 50:             {/* Top Bar */}
 51:             <div className="border-b border-slate-200/60 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center backdrop-blur-sm bg-white/60">
 52:                 <span className="text-[10px] tracking-[0.3em] font-bold uppercase text-slate-400">
 53:                     System Diagnostic / {new Date().getFullYear()}
 54:                 </span>
 55:                 <div className="flex gap-1.5">
 56:                     <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-slate-300"></div>
 57:                     <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-slate-300"></div>
 58:                     <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-red-500 animate-pulse"></div>
 59:                 </div>
 60:             </div>
 61: 
 62:             <main className="flex-grow flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-12">
 63:                 <div className="w-full max-w-4xl bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl border border-slate-200/60 overflow-hidden">
 64: 
 65:                     {/* Alert Banner */}
 66:                     <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-red-600 to-red-500 px-8 py-3">
 67:                         <span className="text-white text-xs font-bold tracking-widest uppercase">
 68:                             Critical Alert — {info.label}
 69:                         </span>
 70:                     </div>
 71: 
 72:                     <div className="p-10 md:p-16 grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center">
 73: 
 74:                         {/* Left Big Status */}
 75:                         <div className="relative">
 76:                             <div className="text-[120px] font-black leading-none bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-800 to-slate-400 bg-clip-text text-transparent">
 77:                                 {status}
 78:                             </div>
 79:                             <div className="absolute -bottom-3 left-0 h-2 w-20 bg-red-500 rounded-full"></div>
 80:                         </div>
 81: 
 82:                         {/* Right Content */}
 83:                         <div className="space-y-6">
 84:                             <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold leading-tight text-slate-900 font-sans">
 85:                                 Terjadi kendala dalam pemrosesan permintaan.
 86:                             </h1>
 87: 
 88:                             <p className="text-slate-500 font-sans leading-relaxed">
 89:                                 {info.msg}
 90:                             </p>
 91: 
 92:                             {/* Deskripsi dinamis dari Laravel */}
 93:                             <div className="bg-red-50 border-l-4 border-red-500 p-4 rounded-r-lg">
 94:                                 <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 font-sans leading-relaxed">
 95:                                     <span className="font-bold text-red-600">Deskripsi: </span>
 96:                                     {displayDescription}
 97:                                 </p>
 98:                             </div>
 99: 
100:                             {/* Tampilkan message asli dari exception jika berbeda dengan displayDescription */}
101:                             {message && message !== displayDescription && (
102:                                 <div className="bg-amber-50 border-l-4 border-amber-500 p-4 rounded-r-lg">
103:                                     <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 font-sans leading-relaxed">
104:                                         <span className="font-bold text-amber-600">Detail Teknis: </span>
105:                                         {message}
106:                                     </p>
107:                                 </div>
108:                             )}
109: 
110:                             <p className="text-slate-500 font-sans leading-relaxed text-sm italic">
111:                                 Silakan periksa kembali tautan Anda atau hubungi administrator apabila kendala terus berlanjut.
112:                             </p>
113: 
114:                             <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-5 pt-6">
115:                                 <a
116:                                     href="/"
117:                                     className="px-6 py-3 text-sm font-bold rounded-xl bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-red-600 transition-all duration-300 shadow-md hover:shadow-red-500/20"
118:                                 >
119:                                     Kembali ke Beranda
120:                                 </a>
121: 
122:                                 <button
123:                                     onClick={() => window.history.back()}
124:                                     className="px-6 py-3 text-sm font-bold rounded-xl border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:border-red-500 hover:text-red-600 transition-all duration-300"
125:                                 >
126:                                     Kembali
127:                                 </button>
128:                             </div>
129:                         </div>
130: 
131:                     </div>
132:                 </div>
133:             </main>
134: 
135:             {/* Bottom Info */}
136:             <div className="border-t border-slate-200/60 px-6 py-4 bg-white/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
137:                 <p className="text-[11px] text-center text-slate-400 tracking-widest">
138:                     NETWORK_STATUS: DISCONNECTED_ERROR_LOG_00{status}
139:                     {message && ` | TRACE: ${message.substring(0, 30)}...`}
140:                 </p>
141:             </div>
142:         </div>
143:     );
144: }

File: resources/js/Pages/Help/Partials/FaqSection.jsx

  1: import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
  2: 
  3: const PAGE_SIZE = 10;
  4: 
  5: export default function FaqSection({ initialFaqs = [] }) {
  6:     const [openIndex, setOpenIndex] = useState(-1);
  7:     const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  8:     const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  9: 
 10:     // Filtering data berdasarkan pencarian
 11:     const filtered = useMemo(() => {
 12:         if (!searchQuery.trim()) return initialFaqs;
 13:         const q = searchQuery.toLowerCase();
 14:         return initialFaqs.filter(f => {
 15:             const plainAnswer = (f.answer || '').replace(/<[^>]*>?/gm, '');
 16:             return f.question.toLowerCase().includes(q) || plainAnswer.toLowerCase().includes(q);
 17:         });
 18:     }, [searchQuery, initialFaqs]);
 19: 
 20:     // Logika Paginasi
 21:     const totalPages = Math.ceil(filtered.length / PAGE_SIZE);
 22:     const paged = filtered.slice((page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE, page * PAGE_SIZE);
 23: 
 24:     return (
 25:         <section id="informasi" className="py-16 md:py-24 bg-gradient-to-b from-zinc-50 via-white to-white text-black relative overflow-hidden">
 26:             <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 relative z-10">
 27: 
 28:                 {/* HEADER */}
 29:                 <div className="text-center mb-12 md:mb-16 lg:mb-20">
 30:                     <div className="flex justify-center mb-4 md:mb-6">
 31:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 32:                             <div className="w-8 h-[2px] bg-bmkg-accent rounded-full" />
 33:                             <span className="text-zinc-400 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">FAQ</span>
 34:                             <div className="w-8 h-[2px] bg-bmkg-accent rounded-full" />
 35:                         </div>
 36:                     </div>
 37:                     <h2 className="text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight uppercase leading-[1.1] mb-4 sm:mb-6 text-slate-900">
 38:                         Ada yang Bisa<br className="hidden sm:block" /> Kami Bantu?
 39:                     </h2>
 40: 
 41:                     {/* Search Input */}
 42:                     <div className="relative max-w-xl mx-auto mt-8">
 43:                         <div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-4 flex items-center pointer-events-none">
 44:                             <svg className="w-5 h-5 text-zinc-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2}>
 45:                                 <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
 46:                             </svg>
 47:                         </div>
 48:                         <input
 49:                             type="text"
 50:                             value={searchQuery}
 51:                             onChange={e => { setSearchQuery(e.target.value); setOpenIndex(-1); setPage(1); }}
 52:                             placeholder="Cari pertanyaan..."
 53:                             className="w-full pl-12 pr-10 py-4 rounded-2xl border-2 border-zinc-200 bg-white text-slate-900 font-medium text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-bmkg-accent focus:shadow-md focus:shadow-bmkg-accent/10 transition-all duration-300"
 54:                         />
 55:                     </div>
 56:                 </div>
 57: 
 58:                 {/* FAQ LIST */}
 59:                 {paged.length > 0 ? (
 60:                     <div className="space-y-3">
 61:                         {paged.map((faq, idx) => {
 62:                             const uniqueKey = faq.id || idx;
 63:                             const isOpen = openIndex === uniqueKey;
 64:                             return (
 65:                                 <div key={uniqueKey} style={{ animation: `fadeInUp 0.6s ease-out ${idx * 0.07}s both` }}>
 66:                                     <div className={`group relative border-2 rounded-xl overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 ${isOpen ? 'border-bmkg-accent/40 bg-bmkg-accent' : 'border-zinc-100 bg-zinc-100'}`}>
 67:                                         <div className="ml-[6px] bg-white">
 68:                                             <button onClick={() => setOpenIndex(isOpen ? -1 : uniqueKey)} className="w-full px-6 py-5 text-left focus:outline-none">
 69:                                                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
 70:                                                     <h3 className={`text-sm md:text-base font-bold uppercase transition-colors ${isOpen ? 'text-bmkg-accent' : 'text-slate-900 group-hover:text-bmkg-accent'}`}>
 71:                                                         {faq.question}
 72:                                                     </h3>
 73:                                                     <div className={`shrink-0 w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-bmkg-accent text-black transition-transform ${isOpen ? 'rotate-180' : ''}`}>
 74:                                                         <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={3}><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19 9l-7 7-7-7" /></svg>
 75:                                                     </div>
 76:                                                 </div>
 77:                                             </button>
 78:                                             <div className={`transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden ${isOpen ? 'max-h-96 opacity-100' : 'max-h-0 opacity-0'}`}>
 79:                                                 <div className="px-6 pb-6">
 80:                                                     <div className="h-[1px] w-full bg-zinc-200 mb-4" />
 81:                                                     <div className="text-zinc-600 text-sm leading-relaxed prose prose-sm prose-zinc max-w-none" dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: faq.answer }} />
 82:                                                     {faq.file_path && (
 83:                                                         <a
 84:                                                             href={route('faqs.download-document', faq.id)}
 85:                                                             target="_blank"
 86:                                                             rel="noopener noreferrer"
 87:                                                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 mt-4 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-zinc-100 hover:bg-bmkg-accent/10 border border-zinc-200 hover:border-bmkg-accent/30 text-zinc-700 hover:text-bmkg-accent text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide transition-all duration-300 group"
 88:                                                         >
 89:                                                             <svg className="w-4 h-4 shrink-0 text-red-500" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
 90:                                                                 <path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8l-6-6zm-1 2l5 5h-5V4zM6 20V4h5v7h7v9H6z"/>
 91:                                                                 <path d="M12 18l4-4h-3v-4h-2v4H8l4 4z"/>
 92:                                                             </svg>
 93:                                                             <span className="truncate max-w-[200px]">{faq.original_filename || 'Unduh Lampiran'}</span>
 94:                                                         </a>
 95:                                                     )}
 96:                                                 </div>
 97:                                             </div>
 98:                                         </div>
 99:                                     </div>
100:                                 </div>
101:                             );
102:                         })}
103:                     </div>
104:                 ) : (
105:                     <div className="text-center py-12 text-zinc-400">Tidak ada hasil ditemukan.</div>
106:                 )}
107: 
108:                 {/* Pagination */}
109:                 {totalPages > 1 && (
110:                     <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mt-10">
111:                         {Array.from({ length: totalPages }, (_, i) => i + 1).map(p => (
112:                             <button key={p} onClick={() => { setPage(p); setOpenIndex(-1); }} className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-lg font-black text-xs transition-all ${page === p ? 'bg-bmkg-accent text-slate-900' : 'bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-500'}`}>
113:                                 {p}
114:                             </button>
115:                         ))}
116:                     </div>
117:                 )}
118:             </div>
119: 
120:             <style>{`
121:                 @keyframes fadeInUp {
122:                     from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
123:                     to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
124:                 }
125:             `}</style>
126:         </section>
127:     );
128: }

================

 1: export default function HeroSection() {
 2:     const highlights = [
 3:         {
 4:             icon: '📋',

16:             desc: 'Cara melacak status pengajuan hingga data diterima.',
17:         },
18:         {
19:             icon: '❓',
20:             label: 'FAQ',
21:             desc: 'Pertanyaan yang sering diajukan seputar layanan data meteorologi.',
22:         },
23:     ];

25:     return (

30:                 <img

  7: function PdfFileIcon({ isHovered }) {
  8:     return (
  9:         <div className={['relative w-8 h-10 flex-shrink-0 transform transition-all duration-300', isHovered ? 'scale-110 -translate-y-1' : ''].join(' ')}>
 10:             <div className={['absolute inset-0 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-md border transition-all duration-300', isHovered ? 'border-red-300 shadow-lg shadow-red-100' : 'border-zinc-200'].join(' ')}></div>
 11:             <div className={['absolute top-0 right-0 w-4 h-4 rounded-bl-lg border-l border-b transition-all duration-300', isHovered ? 'bg-red-50 border-red-200' : 'bg-zinc-100 border-zinc-200'].join(' ')}></div>
 12:             <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2">
 13:                 <div className={['px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm shadow-sm transition-all duration-300', isHovered ? 'bg-red-700 shadow-red-200 scale-110' : 'bg-red-600'].join(' ')}>
 14:                     <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-white tracking-tight">PDF</span>
 15:                 </div>
 16:             </div>
 17:             <div className="absolute bottom-2 left-2 right-2">
 18:                 <div className={['h-0.5 rounded mb-0.5 transition-all duration-300', isHovered ? 'bg-red-200' : 'bg-zinc-200'].join(' ')}></div>
 19:                 <div className={['h-0.5 rounded w-2/3 transition-all duration-300', isHovered ? 'bg-red-100' : 'bg-zinc-200'].join(' ')}></div>
 20:             </div>
 21:         </div>
 22:     );

 53: function DocumentListModal({ show, title, documents, mode, onClose }) {
 54:     const [previewDoc, setPreviewDoc] = useState(null);
 55: 
 56:     return (
 57:         <>
 58:             <PublicDocumentPreviewModal document={previewDoc} onClose={() => setPreviewDoc(null)} />
 59: 
 60:             <Transition show={show} leave="duration-200">
 61:                 <Dialog as="div" className="fixed inset-0 z-50" onClose={onClose}>
 62:                     <TransitionChild
 63:                         enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0" enterTo="opacity-100"
 64:                         leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100" leaveTo="opacity-0"
 65:                     >
 66:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm" />
 67:                     </TransitionChild>
 68: 
 69:                     <TransitionChild
 70:                         enter="ease-out duration-200" enterFrom="opacity-0 translate-y-4 scale-95" enterTo="opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100"
 71:                         leave="ease-in duration-150" leaveFrom="opacity-100 translate-y-0 scale-100" leaveTo="opacity-0 translate-y-4 scale-95"
 72:                     >
 73:                         <div className="fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
 74:                             <DialogPanel className="w-full max-w-md overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-zinc-100">
 75:                                 {/* Header */}
 76:                                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-4 border-b border-zinc-100">
 77:                                     <div>
 78:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-bold text-zinc-400 uppercase tracking-widest">
 79:                                             {mode === 'template' ? 'Template Dokumen' : 'Contoh Dokumen'}
 80:                                         </p>
 81:                                         <h2 className="text-sm font-extrabold text-slate-900 mt-0.5">{title}</h2>
 82:                                     </div>
 83:                                     <button
 84:                                         onClick={onClose}
 85:                                         className="rounded-lg p-1.5 text-zinc-400 hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:text-zinc-600 transition"
 86:                                     >
 87:                                         <XMarkIcon className="h-5 w-5" />
 88:                                     </button>
 89:                                 </div>
 90: 
 91:                                 {/* Document list */}
 92:                                 <div className="px-5 py-4 space-y-2">
 93:                                     {documents.map((doc) => (
 94:                                         <div
 95:                                             key={doc.title}
 96:                                             className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-xl border border-zinc-100 bg-zinc-50/50 px-4 py-3 hover:bg-zinc-50 transition"
 97:                                         >
 98:                                             <div className="flex items-center gap-3 min-w-0">
 99:                                                 {mode === 'template' ? <WordFileIcon /> : <PdfFileIconMini />}
100:                                                 <span className="text-[13px] font-medium text-slate-800 truncate">{doc.title}</span>
101:                                             </div>
102:                                             <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0">
103:                                                 {mode === 'contoh' && doc.openUrl && (
104:                                                     <button
105:                                                         type="button"
106:                                                         onClick={() => setPreviewDoc(doc)}
107:                                                         title={`Preview ${doc.title}`}
108:                                                         className="group relative inline-flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-zinc-200 bg-white text-zinc-500 hover:border-blue-500 hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors"
109:                                                     >
110:                                                         <EyeIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
111:                                                     </button>
112:                                                 )}
113:                                                 <a
114:                                                     href={doc.downloadUrl}
115:                                                     download
116:                                                     title={`Download ${doc.title}`}
117:                                                     className="group relative inline-flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-zinc-200 bg-white text-zinc-500 hover:border-slate-900 hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors"
118:                                                 >
119:                                                     <ArrowDownTrayIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
120:                                                 </a>
121:                                             </div>
122:                                         </div>
123:                                     ))}
124:                                 </div>
125: 
126:                                 <div className="border-t border-zinc-100 px-5 py-3 bg-zinc-50/50">
127:                                     <button
128:                                         onClick={onClose}
129:                                         className="w-full py-2 rounded-xl border border-zinc-200 bg-white text-sm font-bold text-zinc-600 hover:bg-zinc-100 transition"
130:                                     >
131:                                         Tutup
132:                                     </button>
133:                                 </div>
134:                             </DialogPanel>
