209: export default function RegulasiSection() {
210:     const [hoveredPdf, setHoveredPdf] = useState(null);
211:     const [previewDoc, setPreviewDoc] = useState(null);
212:     const [modal, setModal] = useState(null);
213: 
214:     const getModalTitle = () => {
215:         const purpose = PURPOSES.find(p => p.id === modal?.purposeValue);
216:         return purpose?.label ?? '';
217:     };
218: 
219:     const getModalDocuments = () => {
220:         if (!modal) return [];
221:         const docs = getPurposeDocuments(modal.purposeValue) ?? [];
222:         return docs.filter(d => d.type === modal.mode);
223:     };
224: 
225:     return (
226:         <section className="py-16 sm:py-24 bg-gradient-to-b from-zinc-50 via-white to-white relative overflow-hidden">
227:             <PublicDocumentPreviewModal document={previewDoc} onClose={() => setPreviewDoc(null)} />
228:             <DocumentListModal
229:                 show={!!modal}
230:                 title={getModalTitle()}
231:                 documents={getModalDocuments()}
232:                 mode={modal?.mode}
233:                 onClose={() => setModal(null)}
234:             />
235:             <div className="absolute -top-24 -left-24 w-96 h-96 bg-bmkg-accent/5 blur-[100px] rounded-full pointer-events-none" />
236: 
237:             <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 relative z-10">
238: 
239:                 {/* Header */}
240:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
241:                     <div className="w-8 h-[2px] bg-bmkg-accent rounded-full" />
242:                     <span className="text-zinc-400 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">
243:                         Regulasi &amp; Tarif
244:                     </span>
245:                 </div>
246:                 <h2 className="text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight uppercase leading-[1.1] mb-4 text-slate-900">
247:                     Ketentuan <span className="text-zinc-400">Layanan</span>
248:                 </h2>
249:                 <p className="text-zinc-600 text-sm sm:text-base max-w-xl font-medium mb-14 leading-relaxed">
250:                     Berdasarkan PP No. 5 Tahun 2021 tentang Tarif PNBP BMKG dan Peraturan Kepala BMKG tentang ketentuan tarif Rp 0,-.
251:                     Pilih kategori yang sesuai dengan kebutuhan Anda.
252:                 </p>
253: 
254:                 <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
255:                     {PURPOSES.map((purpose, idx) => (
256:                         <div
257:                             key={idx}
258:                             className={`group relative rounded-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden
259:                                 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-zinc-200/60
260:                                 ${purpose.accent
261:                                     ? 'bg-bmkg-accent border-2 border-bmkg-accent'
262:                                     : 'bg-white border-2 border-zinc-200'
263:                                 }`}
264:                             style={{ animation: `fadeInUp 0.6s ease-out ${idx * 0.15}s both` }}
265:                         >
266:                             {/* Top accent bar (shows on hover) */}
267:                             <div className={`absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 h-1 rounded-t-2xl opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-300
268:                                 ${purpose.accent ? 'bg-slate-900' : 'bg-bmkg-accent'}`} />
269: 
270:                             {/* Card body */}
271:                             <div className="p-7 sm:p-8 flex flex-col gap-6 flex-1">
272: 
273:                                 {/* Title & tarif */}
274:                                 <div>
275:                                     <h3 className={`text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-tight leading-none mt-2
276:                                         ${purpose.accent ? 'text-slate-900' : 'text-slate-900'}`}>
277:                                         {purpose.label}
278:                                     </h3>
279:                                     <span className={`text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] mt-1 block
280:                                         ${purpose.accent ? 'text-slate-600' : 'text-zinc-400'}`}>
281:                                         {purpose.tarif}
282:                                     </span>
283:                                 </div>
284: 
285:                                 {/* Description */}
286:                                 <p className={`text-sm leading-relaxed font-medium
287:                                     ${purpose.accent ? 'text-slate-800' : 'text-zinc-600'}`}>
288:                                     {purpose.description}
289:                                 </p>
290: 
291:                                 {/* Examples */}
292:                                 <div className={`border-t pt-5 ${purpose.accent ? 'border-slate-900/20' : 'border-zinc-100'}`}>
293:                                     <p className={`text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.15em] mb-3
294:                                         ${purpose.accent ? 'text-slate-600' : 'text-zinc-400'}`}>
295:                                         Contoh Penggunaan
296:                                     </p>
297:                                     <ul className="space-y-1.5">
298:                                         {purpose.examples.map((ex, i) => (
299:                                             <li key={i} className={`flex items-start gap-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-tight
300:                                                 ${purpose.accent ? 'text-slate-800' : 'text-slate-700'}`}>
301:                                                 <span className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full flex-shrink-0 mt-1 ${purpose.accent ? 'bg-slate-900' : 'bg-bmkg-accent'}`} />
302:                                                 {ex}
303:                                             </li>
304:                                         ))}
305:                                     </ul>
306:                                 </div>
307: 
308:                                 {/* Template & Contoh */}
309:                                 <div className={`border-t pt-5 mt-auto space-y-1.5 ${purpose.accent ? 'border-slate-900/20' : 'border-zinc-100'}`}>
310:                                     {getPurposeDocuments(purpose.id).filter(d => d.type === 'template').length > 0 && (
311:                                         <button
312:                                             type="button"
313:                                             onClick={() => setModal({ purposeValue: purpose.id, mode: 'template' })}
314:                                             className={`w-full flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl border transition-all ${
315:                                                 purpose.accent
316:                                                     ? 'bg-slate-900/10 border-slate-900/20 text-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-900/20 hover:border-slate-900/30'
317:                                                     : 'bg-zinc-50 border-zinc-200 text-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:border-zinc-300'
318:                                             } text-xs font-bold`}
319:                                         >
320:                                             <span className="flex items-center gap-2 relative z-10">
321:                                                 <DocumentTextIcon className={`h-4 w-4 ${purpose.accent ? 'text-slate-700' : 'text-zinc-500'}`} />
322:                                                 Lihat Template Dokumen
323:                                             </span>
324:                                             <ArrowTopRightOnSquareIcon className={`h-3 w-3 relative z-10 opacity-50 ${purpose.accent ? 'text-slate-900' : 'text-slate-900'}`} />
325:                                         </button>
326:                                     )}
327: 
328:                                     {getPurposeDocuments(purpose.id).filter(d => d.type === 'contoh').length > 0 && (
329:                                         <button
330:                                             type="button"
331:                                             onClick={() => setModal({ purposeValue: purpose.id, mode: 'contoh' })}
332:                                             className={`w-full flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl border transition-all ${
333:                                                 purpose.accent
334:                                                     ? 'bg-slate-900/10 border-slate-900/20 text-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-900/20 hover:border-slate-900/30'
335:                                                     : 'bg-zinc-50 border-zinc-200 text-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:border-zinc-300'
336:                                             } text-xs font-bold`}
337:                                         >
338:                                             <span className="flex items-center gap-2 relative z-10">
339:                                                 <EyeIcon className={`h-4 w-4 ${purpose.accent ? 'text-slate-700' : 'text-zinc-500'}`} />
340:                                                 Lihat Contoh Dokumen
341:                                             </span>
342:                                             <ArrowTopRightOnSquareIcon className={`h-3 w-3 relative z-10 opacity-50 ${purpose.accent ? 'text-slate-900' : 'text-slate-900'}`} />
343:                                         </button>
344:                                     )}
345:                                 </div>
346: 
347:                                 {/* PDF Download */}
348:                                 <div className={`pt-4 border-t ${purpose.accent ? 'border-slate-900/20' : 'border-zinc-100'}`}>
349:                                     <a
350:                                         href={purpose.pdfHref}
351:                                         target="_blank"
352:                                         rel="noopener noreferrer"
353:                                         className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl border transition-all duration-300 group/pdf
354:                                             ${purpose.accent
355:                                                 ? 'bg-slate-900/10 border-slate-900/20 hover:bg-slate-900/20 hover:border-slate-900/30'
356:                                                 : 'bg-zinc-50 border-zinc-200 hover:border-red-300 hover:bg-red-50/50'
357:                                             }`}
358:                                         onMouseEnter={() => setHoveredPdf(idx)}
359:                                         onMouseLeave={() => setHoveredPdf(null)}
360:                                     >
361:                                         <PdfFileIcon isHovered={hoveredPdf === idx} />
362:                                         <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
363:                                             <span className={`text-sm font-medium transition-colors block
364:                                                 ${purpose.accent
365:                                                     ? 'text-slate-800 group-hover/pdf:text-slate-900'
366:                                                     : 'text-zinc-700 group-hover/pdf:text-red-700'
367:                                                 }`}>
368:                                                 {purpose.pdfLabel}
369:                                             </span>
370:                                             <div className={`flex items-center gap-1 text-xs transition-colors
371:                                                 ${purpose.accent
372:                                                     ? 'text-slate-500 group-hover/pdf:text-slate-700'
373:                                                     : 'text-zinc-400 group-hover/pdf:text-red-400'
374:                                                 }`}>
375:                                                 <span>Klik untuk membuka PDF</span>
376:                                                 <ArrowTopRightOnSquareIcon className="h-3 w-3" />
377:                                             </div>
378:                                         </div>
379:                                     </a>
380:                                 </div>
381:                             </div>
382:                         </div>
383:                     ))}
384:                 </div>
385:             </div>
386: 
387:             <style>{`
388:                 @keyframes fadeInUp {

168: function StatusCard({ title, desc, type, isMini }) {

170:     const isSuccess = type === 'success';
171: 
172:     return (
173:         <div className={`

176:             hover:border-bmkg-accent hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-zinc-200/30 hover:-translate-y-1
177:         `}>
178:             <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
179:                 <h4 className={`font-black uppercase tracking-tight leading-tight text-slate-900 group-hover:text-bmkg-accent transition-colors ${isMini ? 'text-[10px] mb-2' : 'text-[11px] md:text-sm mb-2 md:mb-4'}`}>
180:                     <span className={isDanger ? 'text-red-600' : isSuccess ? 'text-green-600' : ''}>{title}</span>
181:                 </h4>
182:                 <p className={`text-zinc-500 leading-relaxed font-bold mt-auto ${isMini ? 'text-[9px]' : 'text-[10px] md:text-sm'}`}>
183:                     {desc}
184:                 </p>
185:             </div>
186:         </div>
187:     );

  1: import AuthenticatedLayout from '@/Layouts/AuthenticatedLayout';
  2: import { Head, usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import { useState } from 'react';
  4: import { UserIcon, KeyIcon, TrashIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  5: 
  6: // Import Partials
  7: import ProfileContent from './Partials/ProfileContent';
  8: import PasswordContent from './Partials/PasswordContent';
  9: import DeleteAccountContent from './Partials/DeleteAccountContent';
 10: 
 11: export default function Profile({ mustVerifyEmail, status }) {
 12:     const { auth } = usePage().props;
 13:     const user = auth.user;
 14:     const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('profil');
 15: 
 16:     // Cek apakah user adalah admin atau superadmin
 17:     const isAdmin = user.role === 'admin' || user.role === 'superadmin';
 18:     const isSuperAdmin = user.role === 'superadmin';
 19: 
 20:     return (
 21:         <AuthenticatedLayout
 22:             header={<h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800">Profil Saya</h2>}
 23:         >
 24:             <Head title="Profil Saya" />
 25: 
 26:             <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
 27: 
 28:                 {/* Header Section - Tetap Biru BMKG */}
 29:                 <div className="bg-bmkg-primary pt-16 pb-28 px-6 relative overflow-hidden z-0">
 30:                     <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-96 h-96 bg-bmkg-accent opacity-10 rounded-full -mr-20 -mt-20 blur-3xl"></div>
 31: 
 32:                     <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto relative z-10">
 33:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
 34:                             <div className="h-1 w-10 bg-bmkg-accent rounded-full"></div>
 35:                         </div>
 36:                         <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-white tracking-tight leading-tight">
 37:                             Detail <br />
 38:                             <span className="text-white/40">Profil Anda</span>
 39:                         </h1>
 40:                     </div>
 41:                 </div>
 42: 
 43:                 {/* Card Container */}
 44:                 <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 -mt-16 pb-20 relative z-10">
 45:                     <div className="bg-white shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/50 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden border border-gray-100">
 46: 
 47:                         {isSuperAdmin ? (
 48:                             /* --- SUPERADMIN: PROFIL SAJA, MIRIP ADMIN --- */
 49:                             <div className="p-8 md:p-12 max-w-5xl mx-auto">
 50:                                 <ProfileContent user={user} mustVerifyEmail={mustVerifyEmail} status={status} />
 51:                             </div>
 52:                         ) : isAdmin ? (
 53:                             /* --- ADMIN: TIDAK ADA SIDEBAR, LANGSUNG KONTEN --- */
 54:                             <div className="p-8 md:p-12 max-w-5xl mx-auto">
 55:                                 <ProfileContent user={user} mustVerifyEmail={mustVerifyEmail} status={status} />
 56:                             </div>
 57:                         ) : (
 58:                             /* --- USER BIASA: PAKAI SIDEBAR & TAB --- */
 59:                             <>
 60:                                 {/* Mobile Nav User */}
 61:                                 <div className="lg:hidden p-4 bg-gray-50/50 border-b border-gray-100">
 62:                                     <div className="flex bg-white p-1 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-200 gap-1">
 63:                                         <MobileTab active={activeTab === 'profil'} icon={<UserIcon className="w-5 h-5" />} label="Profil" onClick={() => setActiveTab('profil')} />
 64:                                         <MobileTab active={activeTab === 'password'} icon={<KeyIcon className="w-5 h-5" />} label="Sandi" onClick={() => setActiveTab('password')} />
 65:                                         <MobileTab active={activeTab === 'hapus'} icon={<TrashIcon className="w-5 h-5" />} label="Hapus" onClick={() => setActiveTab('hapus')} danger />
 66:                                     </div>
 67:                                 </div>
 68: 
 69:                                 <div className="lg:grid lg:grid-cols-12 min-h-[600px]">
 70:                                     {/* Sidebar User */}
 71:                                     <div className="hidden lg:col-span-3 bg-gray-50/30 border-r border-gray-100 p-6 lg:flex flex-col gap-1">
 72:                                         <SidebarLink active={activeTab === 'profil'} icon={<UserIcon className="w-5 h-5" />} label="Informasi Umum" onClick={() => setActiveTab('profil')} />
 73:                                         <SidebarLink active={activeTab === 'password'} icon={<KeyIcon className="w-5 h-5" />} label="Keamanan Akun" onClick={() => setActiveTab('password')} />
 74:                                         <div className="mt-auto pt-4 border-t border-gray-100">
 75:                                             <SidebarLink active={activeTab === 'hapus'} icon={<TrashIcon className="w-5 h-5" />} label="Hapus Akun" onClick={() => setActiveTab('hapus')} danger />
 76:                                         </div>
 77:                                     </div>
 78: 
 79:                                     {/* Content User */}
 80:                                     <div className="lg:col-span-9 p-8 md:p-12 bg-white">
 81:                                         {activeTab === 'profil' && <ProfileContent user={user} mustVerifyEmail={mustVerifyEmail} status={status} />}
 82:                                         {activeTab === 'password' && <PasswordContent user={user} />}
 83:                                         {activeTab === 'hapus' && <DeleteAccountContent />}
 84:                                     </div>
 85:                                 </div>
 86:                             </>
 87:                         )}
 88:                     </div>
 89:                 </div>
 90:             </div>
 91:         </AuthenticatedLayout>
 92:     );
 93: }
 94: 
 95: function SidebarLink({ icon, label, active = false, onClick, danger = false }) {
 96:     return (
 97:         <button
 98:             onClick={onClick}
 99:             className={`
100:                 group flex items-center gap-3 py-2.5 px-4 text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-300
101:                 border-l-[5px] rounded-r-lg w-full text-left
102:                 ${active && !danger
103:                     ? 'bg-black/[0.07] text-gray-900 border-yellow-400' // Gaya Admin: Kuning di pinggir & abu gelap
104:                     : active && danger
105:                         ? 'bg-red-50 text-red-700 border-red-500'
106:                         : 'border-transparent text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:text-gray-900'
107:                 }
108:             `}
109:         >
110:             <span className={`
111:                 h-5 w-5 shrink-0 transition-colors duration-300 
112:                 ${active && !danger ? 'text-yellow-600' : 'text-gray-400 group-hover:text-gray-600'}
113:                 ${active && danger ? 'text-red-600' : ''}
114:             `}>
115:                 {icon}
116:             </span>
117:             <span className={`${active ? 'font-bold' : ''}`}>
118:                 {label}
119:             </span>
120:         </button>
121:     );
122: }
123: 
124: function MobileTab({ icon, label, active = false, onClick, danger = false }) {
125:     return (
126:         <button
127:             onClick={onClick}
128:             className={`
129:                 flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all duration-300
130:                 ${active && !danger
131:                     ? 'bg-black/[0.07] text-gray-900 ring-1 ring-yellow-400/50' // Background abu tipis & ring kuning
132:                     : active && danger
133:                         ? 'bg-red-50 text-red-600 ring-1 ring-red-200'
134:                         : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-50'
135:                 }
136:             `}
137:         >
138:             <span className={`transition-colors duration-300 ${active && !danger ? 'text-yellow-600' : ''}`}>
139:                 {icon}
140:             </span>
141:             <span className={`${active ? 'font-bold' : ''}`}>
142:                 {label}
143:             </span>
144:         </button>
145:     );
146: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Profile/Partials/DeleteAccountContent.jsx
================
 1: import { useState } from 'react';
 2: import { useForm } from '@inertiajs/react';
 3: import { TrashIcon, ExclamationCircleIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
 4: 
 5: export default function DeleteAccountContent() {
 6:     const [confirming, setConfirming] = useState(false);
 7:     const { data, setData, delete: destroy, processing, errors } = useForm({ password: '' });
 8: 
 9:     const submit = (e) => {
10:         e.preventDefault();
11:         destroy(route('profile.destroy'), {
12:             preserveScroll: true,
13:             onSuccess: () => setConfirming(false)
14:         });
15:     };
16: 
17:     return (
18:         <div className="animate-in fade-in duration-500">
19:             {/* Header Section */}
20:             <div className="mb-8 pb-6 border-b border-gray-100">
21:                 <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900">Hapus Akun</h3>
22:                 <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm mt-1">Pengaturan privasi dan keberadaan akun Anda.</p>
23:             </div>
24: 
25:             {/* Warning Box */}
26:             <div className="bg-red-50/30 rounded-2xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center text-center border border-red-100">
27:                 <div className="p-4 bg-white shadow-sm rounded-xl mb-6 text-red-400">
28:                     <TrashIcon className="w-10 h-10" />
29:                 </div>
30: 
31:                 {/* Teks Deskripsi yang tadi hilang */}
32:                 <div className="max-w-md mb-8">
33:                     <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm leading-relaxed">
34:                         Setelah akun Anda dihapus, semua sumber daya dan data yang terkait akan
35:                         <span className="font-semibold text-red-600"> dihapus secara permanen</span>.
36:                         Sebelum menghapus akun, silakan unduh data atau informasi apa pun yang ingin Anda simpan.
37:                     </p>
38:                 </div>
39: 
40:                 {!confirming ? (
41:                     <button
42:                         onClick={() => setConfirming(true)}
43:                         className="px-8 py-3 bg-red-600 text-white text-sm font-medium rounded-xl hover:bg-red-700 shadow-lg shadow-red-200 transition-all active:scale-95"
44:                     >
45:                         Hapus Akun Saya
46:                     </button>
47:                 ) : (
48:                     <form onSubmit={submit} className="w-full max-w-xs space-y-4">
49:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-red-800 mb-2 justify-center">
50:                             <ExclamationCircleIcon className="w-5 h-5" />
51:                             <p className="text-sm font-medium">Konfirmasi Penghapusan</p>
52:                         </div>
53: 
54:                         <input
55:                             type="password"
56:                             value={data.password}
57:                             onChange={e => setData('password', e.target.value)}
58:                             className="w-full border border-red-200 rounded-xl py-3 px-4 text-sm focus:border-red-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-red-500 outline-none transition-all"
59:                             placeholder="Masukkan password Anda"
60:                             autoFocus
61:                         />
62: 
63:                         {errors.password && (
64:                             <p className="text-xs text-red-500 text-left animate-shake">{errors.password}</p>
65:                         )}
66: 
67:                         <div className="flex gap-2">
68:                             <button
69:                                 type="submit"
70:                                 disabled={processing}
71:                                 className="flex-1 py-3 bg-red-600 text-white text-sm rounded-xl font-medium hover:bg-red-700 disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors"
72:                             >
73:                                 {processing ? 'Menghapus...' : 'Ya, Hapus'}
74:                             </button>
75:                             <button
76:                                 type="button"
77:                                 onClick={() => setConfirming(false)}
78:                                 className="flex-1 py-3 bg-white text-gray-500 text-sm rounded-xl border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
79:                             >
80:                                 Batal
81:                             </button>
82:                         </div>
83:                     </form>
84:                 )}
85:             </div>
86:         </div>
87:     );
88: }

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Profile/Partials/PasswordContent.jsx
================
  1: import { useForm } from '@inertiajs/react';
  2: import { ShieldCheckIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  3: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  4: 
  5: export default function PasswordContent({ user }) {
  6:     const { post, processing, recentlySuccessful } = useForm({ email: user.email });
  7:     const [countdown, setCountdown] = useState(0);
  8: 
  9:     // 1. Inisialisasi: Cek storage saat halaman dimuat
 10:     useEffect(() => {
 11:         const expiry = localStorage.getItem('password_reset_expiry');
 12:         if (expiry) {
 13:             const remaining = Math.round((parseInt(expiry) - Date.now()) / 1000);
 14:             if (remaining > 0) {
 15:                 setCountdown(remaining);
 16:             } else {
 17:                 localStorage.removeItem('password_reset_expiry');
 18:             }
 19:         }
 20:     }, []);
 21: 
 22:     // 2. Timer: Jalankan hitung mundur
 23:     useEffect(() => {
 24:         let timer;
 25:         if (countdown > 0) {
 26:             timer = setInterval(() => {
 27:                 setCountdown((prev) => {
 28:                     const newValue = prev - 1;
 29:                     if (newValue <= 0) {
 30:                         localStorage.removeItem('password_reset_expiry');
 31:                         return 0;
 32:                     }
 33:                     return newValue;
 34:                 });
 35:             }, 1000);
 36:         }
 37:         return () => clearInterval(timer);
 38:     }, [countdown > 0]);
 39: 
 40:     const sendReset = (e) => {
 41:         e.preventDefault();
 42:         post(route('password.email'), {
 43:             onSuccess: () => {
 44:                 const cooldownSeconds = 20;
 45: 
 46:                 const expiryTime = Date.now() + cooldownSeconds * 1000;
 47:                 localStorage.setItem('password_reset_expiry', expiryTime.toString());
 48:                 setCountdown(cooldownSeconds);
 49:             },
 50:         });
 51:     };
 52: 
 53:     return (
 54:         <div className="animate-in fade-in duration-500">
 55:             <div className="mb-8 pb-6 border-b border-gray-100">
 56:                 <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900">Keamanan Akun</h3>
 57:                 <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm mt-1 leading-relaxed max-w-lg">
 58:                     Amankan akun Anda dengan memperbarui kata sandi secara berkala. Kami akan mengirimkan tautan verifikasi ke email Anda.
 59:                 </p>
 60:             </div>
 61: 
 62:             <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center text-center border border-gray-200">
 63:                 <div className="p-4 bg-white shadow-sm rounded-xl mb-6">
 64:                     <ShieldCheckIcon className="w-12 h-12 text-bmkg-accent" />
 65:                 </div>
 66: 
 67:                 <div className="max-w-sm mb-8">
 68:                     <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm leading-relaxed">
 69:                         Instruksi akan dikirimkan ke:
 70:                     </p>
 71:                     <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mt-2 text-base">
 72:                         {user.email}
 73:                     </p>
 74:                 </div>
 75: 
 76:                 {recentlySuccessful && (
 77:                     <div className="mb-6 px-6 py-4 bg-green-50 text-green-700 rounded-xl border border-green-100 text-sm font-medium animate-in zoom-in-95">
 78:                         Tautan reset berhasil dikirim! Silakan cek inbox atau folder spam.
 79:                     </div>
 80:                 )}
 81: 
 82:                 <div className="w-full flex flex-col items-center">
 83:                     <button
 84:                         onClick={sendReset}
 85:                         disabled={processing || countdown > 0}
 86:                         className="px-8 py-3 bg-bmkg-primary text-white text-sm font-medium rounded-xl hover:opacity-90 transition-all active:scale-95 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:bg-gray-400 shadow-md shadow-bmkg-primary/20"
 87:                     >
 88:                         {processing ? (
 89:                             <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
 90:                                 <svg className="animate-spin h-4 w-4 text-white" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
 91:                                     <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" fill="none"></circle>
 92:                                     <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z"></path>
 93:                                 </svg>
 94:                                 Mengirim...
 95:                             </span>
 96:                         ) : (
 97:                             countdown > 0 ? `Kirim Ulang dalam ${countdown}s` : 'Kirim Tautan Reset Kata Sandi'
 98:                         )}
 99:                     </button>
100: 
101:                     <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-4 italic">
102:                         * Pastikan email Anda aktif untuk menerima tautan verifikasi.
103:                     </p>
104:                 </div>
105:             </div>
106:         </div>
107:     );
108: }

 7:     });

================
File: resources/js/Pages/Profile/Partials/ProfileForm.jsx

  1: import { useForm } from '@inertiajs/react';
  2: import { UserIcon, DevicePhoneMobileIcon, EnvelopeIcon, ShieldCheckIcon, BuildingOffice2Icon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  3: import PhoneCountrySelect from '@/Components/PhoneCountrySelect';
  4: 
  5: const BMKG_INSTITUTION_NAME = 'BMKG (Badan Meteorologi, Klimatologi, dan Geofisika)';
  6: 
  7: export default function ProfileForm({ user, mustVerifyEmail, status }) {
  8:     const isAdmin = user.role === 'admin' || user.role === 'superadmin';
  9:     const institutionName = isAdmin ? BMKG_INSTITUTION_NAME : (user.company_name ?? '');
 10:     const { data, setData, patch, errors, processing } = useForm({
 11:         name: user.name,
 12:         email: user.email,
 13:         phone_country: user.phone_country ?? 'ID',
 14:         phone: user.phone ?? '',
 15:         company_name: institutionName,
 16:     });
 17: 
 18:     const submit = (e) => {
 19:         e.preventDefault();
 20:         if (!isAdmin) patch(route('profile.update'));
 21:     };
 22: 
 23:     return (
 24:         <form onSubmit={submit} className="space-y-6">
 25:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
 26:                 <InputGroup label="Nama Lengkap" icon={<UserIcon />} value={data.name} onChange={e => setData('name', e.target.value)} error={errors.name} disabled={isAdmin} />
 27:                 <div className="space-y-1.5 group">
 28:                     <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 ml-1">Nomor Telepon</label>
 29:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 30:                         <PhoneCountrySelect
 31:                             value={data.phone_country}
 32:                             onChange={(country) => setData('phone_country', country)}
 33:                             disabled={isAdmin}
 34:                             compact
 35:                             className="w-32 shrink-0"
 36:                         />
 37:                         <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 space-y-1.5">
 38:                             <div className="relative">
 39:                                 <div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 pl-4 flex items-center pointer-events-none text-gray-300">
 40:                                     <DevicePhoneMobileIcon className="w-5 h-5" />
 41:                                 </div>
 42:                                 <input
 43:                                     type="tel"
 44:                                     value={data.phone}
 45:                                     onChange={e => setData('phone', e.target.value)}
 46:                                     placeholder="08xxxxxxxxxx"
 47:                                     disabled={isAdmin}
 48:                                     className={`w-full h-10 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl pl-11 pr-4 text-sm focus:ring-0 outline-none transition-all ${isAdmin ? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed border-dashed' : 'bg-gray-50 text-gray-900 focus:bg-white focus:border-bmkg-accent'}`}
 49:                                 />
 50:                             </div>
 51:                             {errors.phone && <p className="text-xs text-red-500 ml-1">{errors.phone}</p>}
 52:                         </div>
 53:                     </div>
 54:                     {!errors.phone && !errors.phone_country && <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 ml-1 mt-1">Tidak perlu isi kode negara (+), pilih negara di sebelah kiri.</p>}
 55:                     {errors.phone_country && <p className="text-xs text-red-500 ml-1 mt-1">{errors.phone_country}</p>}
 56:                 </div>
 57:             </div>
 58: 
 59:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
 60:                 <InputGroup
 61:                     label="Perusahaan/Instansi"
 62:                     icon={<BuildingOffice2Icon />}
 63:                     value={isAdmin ? BMKG_INSTITUTION_NAME : data.company_name}
 64:                     onChange={e => setData('company_name', e.target.value)}
 65:                     error={errors.company_name}
 66:                     placeholder="Masukkan nama perusahaan/instansi"
 67:                     disabled={isAdmin}
 68:                 />
 69:             </div>
 70: 
 71:             <div className="relative group">
 72:                 <InputGroup label="Alamat Email (Akun Utama)" icon={<EnvelopeIcon />} type="email" value={data.email} disabled={true} />
 73:                 <div className="absolute right-4 top-[38px]">
 74:                     <ShieldCheckIcon className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-300" />
 75:                 </div>
 76:             </div>
 77: 
 78:             {/* Tombol Simpan HANYA untuk User Biasa */}
 79:             {!isAdmin && (
 80:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-end pt-6 border-t border-gray-100">
 81:                     <button type="submit" disabled={processing} className="px-10 py-3 bg-bmkg-primary text-white text-sm font-medium rounded-xl hover:opacity-90 transition-all shadow-lg disabled:opacity-50">
 82:                         {processing ? 'Menyimpan...' : 'Simpan Perubahan'}
 83:                     </button>
 84:                 </div>
 85:             )}
 86:         </form>
 87:     );
 88: }
 89: 
 90: function InputGroup({ label, icon, value, onChange, error, type = 'text', placeholder = '', helperText = '', disabled = false, hideLabel = false, className = '' }) {
 91:     return (
 92:         <div className={`space-y-1.5 group ${className}`}>
 93:             {!hideLabel && <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 ml-1">{label}</label>}
 94:             <div className="relative">
 95:                 <div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 pl-4 flex items-center pointer-events-none text-gray-300 group-focus-within:text-bmkg-accent transition-colors">
 96:                     <div className="w-5 h-5">{icon}</div>
 97:                 </div>
 98:                 <input type={type} value={value} onChange={onChange} placeholder={placeholder} disabled={disabled} className={`w-full border border-gray-200 rounded-xl py-3 pl-11 pr-4 text-sm focus:ring-0 outline-none transition-all ${disabled ? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed border-dashed' : 'bg-gray-50 text-gray-900 focus:bg-white focus:border-bmkg-accent'}`} />
 99:             </div>
100:             {!error && helperText && <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 ml-1 mt-1">{helperText}</p>}
101:             {error && <p className="text-xs text-red-500 ml-1 mt-1">{error}</p>}
102:         </div>
103:     );
104: }

  1: import { ChevronLeftIcon, ChevronRightIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  2: import TableActionTextButtons from '@/Components/TableActionTextButtons';
  3: 
  4: const ROLE_CONFIG = {
  5:     superadmin: { label: 'Superadmin', text: 'text-purple-700', border: 'border-purple-200' },
  6:     admin: { label: 'Admin', text: 'text-blue-700', border: 'border-blue-200' },
  7:     user: { label: 'User', text: 'text-gray-600', border: 'border-gray-200' },
  8: };
  9: 
 10: export function RoleBadge({ role }) {
 11:     const cfg = ROLE_CONFIG[role] ?? ROLE_CONFIG.user;
 12:     return (
 13:         <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-lg border px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest bg-transparent ${cfg.text} ${cfg.border}`}>
 14:             {cfg.label}
 15:         </span>
 16:     );
 17: }
 18: 
 19: export default function UserTable({ users, currentUserId, onEdit, onDelete }) {
 20:     const { data, links, from, current_page, last_page } = users;
 21: 
 22:     const handlePageChange = (url) => {
 23:         if (!url) return;
 24:         const current = new URL(window.location.href);
 25:         const target = new URL(url);
 26:         current.searchParams.forEach((v, k) => {
 27:             if (!target.searchParams.has(k)) target.searchParams.set(k, v);
 28:         });
 29:         window.location.href = target.toString();
 30:     };
 31: 
 32:     return (
 33:         <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl shadow-gray-200/40 border-2 border-gray-300 overflow-hidden min-h-[500px] flex flex-col w-full">
 34:             {data.length === 0 ? (
 35:                 <div className="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-20 px-6 text-center">
 36:                     <p className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Tidak ada akun ditemukan</p>
 37:                     <p className="text-gray-500 mt-2 text-sm">Sesuaikan filter atau kata pencarian Anda.</p>
 38:                 </div>
 39:             ) : (
 40:                 <div className="flex-grow">
 41:                     <div className="hidden md:block overflow-x-auto">
 42:                         <table className="w-full border-collapse">
 43:                             <thead className="bg-gray-50/50 border-b-2 border-gray-300 text-left">
 44:                                 <tr>
 45:                                     <th className="px-6 py-5 text-xs font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest text-center">No</th>
 46:                                     <th className="px-6 py-5 text-xs font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Nama</th>
 47:                                     <th className="px-6 py-5 text-xs font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Email</th>
 48:                                     <th className="hidden px-6 py-5 text-xs font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest lg:table-cell">Telepon</th>
 49:                                     <th className="px-6 py-5 text-xs font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest text-center">Role</th>
 50:                                     <th className="border-l-2 border-gray-300 px-6 py-5 text-center text-xs font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Aksi</th>
 51:                                 </tr>
 52:                             </thead>
 53:                             <tbody className="divide-y-2 divide-gray-300">
 54:                                 {data.map((u, index) => (
 55:                                     <tr key={u.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50/80 transition-all">
 56:                                         <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-gray-400 text-center">{(from || 1) + index}</td>
 57:                                         <td className="px-6 py-5">
 58:                                             <span className="font-bold text-gray-900 text-sm">{u.name}</span>
 59:                                             {u.id === currentUserId && (
 60:                                                 <span className="ml-2 rounded-full bg-yellow-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold text-yellow-700">Anda</span>
 61:                                             )}
 62:                                         </td>
 63:                                         <td className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-gray-600">{u.email}</td>
 64:                                         <td className="hidden px-6 py-5 text-sm text-gray-600 lg:table-cell">
 65:                                             {u.phone || <span className="text-gray-300">-</span>}
 66:                                         </td>
 67:                                         <td className="px-6 py-5 text-center">
 68:                                             <RoleBadge role={u.role} />
 69:                                         </td>
 70:                                         <td className="relative border-l-2 border-gray-300 p-0 text-center">
 71:                                             <TableActionTextButtons
 72:                                                 mode="split"
 73:                                                 showIcons={false}
 74:                                                 onEdit={() => onEdit(u)}
 75:                                                 onDelete={() => onDelete(u)}
 76:                                                 showEdit={u.role === 'admin'}
 77:                                                 showDelete={u.role === 'admin' || (u.role === 'user' && u.id !== currentUserId)}
 78:                                                 fillCell
 79:                                             />
 80:                                         </td>
 81:                                     </tr>
 82:                                 ))}
 83:                             </tbody>
 84:                         </table>
 85:                     </div>
 86: 
 87:                     <div className="md:hidden divide-y-2 divide-gray-300">
 88:                         {data.map((u) => (
 89:                             <div key={u.id} className="p-5 space-y-4">
 90:                                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-100 pb-3">
 91:                                     <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
 92:                                         <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-1.5">
 93:                                             <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900 uppercase tracking-tight">{u.name}</p>
 94:                                             {u.id === currentUserId && (
 95:                                                 <span className="rounded-full bg-yellow-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold text-yellow-700">Anda</span>
 96:                                             )}
 97:                                         </div>
 98:                                     </div>
 99:                                     <RoleBadge role={u.role} />
100:                                 </div>
101:                                 <div className="space-y-1">
102:                                     <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 truncate">{u.email}</p>
103:                                     {u.phone ? <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">{u.phone}</p> : <p className="text-xs text-gray-300">-</p>}
104:                                 </div>
105:                                 {(u.role === 'admin' || (u.role === 'user' && u.id !== currentUserId)) && (
106:                                     <div className="flex gap-2">
107:                                         <TableActionTextButtons
108:                                             mode="split"
109:                                             showIcons={false}
110:                                             onEdit={() => onEdit(u)}
111:                                             onDelete={() => onDelete(u)}
112:                                             showEdit={u.role === 'admin'}
113:                                             showDelete
114:                                         />
115:                                     </div>
116:                                 )}
117:                             </div>
118:                         ))}
119:                     </div>
120:                 </div>
121:             )}
122: 
123:             {last_page > 1 && (
124:                 <div className="mt-auto flex items-center justify-center border-t border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/30 px-4 py-8">
125:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
126:                         <button
127:                             type="button"
128:                             onClick={() => handlePageChange(users.prev_page_url)}
129:                             disabled={current_page === 1}
130:                             className="p-2.5 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-all"
131:                         >
132:                             <ChevronLeftIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
133:                         </button>
134: 
135:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2">
136:                             {links.slice(1, -1).map((link, i) => (
137:                                 <button
138:                                     key={i}
139:                                     type="button"
140:                                     onClick={() => handlePageChange(link.url)}
141:                                     className={`min-w-[38px] h-10 px-3 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold border transition-all ${link.active ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white border-gray-900 shadow-lg' : 'bg-white text-gray-500 border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50'}`}
142:                                     dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: link.label }}
143:                                 />
144:                             ))}
145:                         </div>
146: 
147:                         <button
148:                             type="button"
149:                             onClick={() => handlePageChange(users.next_page_url)}
150:                             disabled={current_page === last_page}
151:                             className="p-2.5 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-all"
152:                         >
153:                             <ChevronRightIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
154:                         </button>
155:                     </div>
156:                 </div>
157:             )}
158:         </div>
159:     );
160: }
