 53: 
 54: // ─── Confirm Modal ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 55: function ConfirmModal({ open, title, message, confirmLabel, confirmClass, onConfirm, onCancel }) {
 56:     if (!open) return null;
 57:     return (
 58:         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
 59:             <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl border border-gray-200 max-w-sm w-full p-6">
 60:                 <h3 className="text-base font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">{title}</h3>
 61:                 <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-6">{message}</p>
 62:                 <div className="flex gap-3 justify-end">
 63:                     <button onClick={onCancel} className="px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors">
 64:                         Batal
 65:                     </button>
 66:                     <button onClick={onConfirm} className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-semibold text-white transition-colors ${confirmClass}`}>
 67:                         {confirmLabel}
 68:                     </button>
 69:                 </div>
 70:             </div>
 71:         </div>
 72:     );
 73: }
 74: 
 75: // ─── Credentials Flash ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 76: function CredentialsCard({ flash }) {
 77:     const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);
 78:     const handleCopy = () => {
 79:         navigator.clipboard.writeText(`Email: ${flash.credentials.email}\nPassword: ${flash.credentials.password}`);
 80:         setCopied(true);
 81:         setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000);
 82:     };
 83:     return (
 84:         <div className="rounded-2xl border border-green-300 bg-green-100 px-5 py-4 shadow-sm">
 85:             <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
 86:                 <div className="mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0 w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-green-600 flex items-center justify-center">
 87:                     <CheckIcon className="w-3 h-3 text-white" />
 88:                 </div>
 89:                 <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
 90:                     <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-green-900">{flash.success}</p>
 91:                     <div className="mt-3 bg-white rounded-xl border border-green-300 px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-gray-700 flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between gap-3">
 92:                         <div className="space-y-1">
 93:                             <p><span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">Email:</span> {flash.credentials.email}</p>
 94:                             <p><span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">Password:</span> {flash.credentials.password}</p>
 95:                         </div>
 96:                         <button
 97:                             onClick={handleCopy}
 98:                             className={`shrink-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full border px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-all ${copied ? 'border-green-400 bg-green-200 text-green-800' : 'border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100'}`}
 99:                         >
100:                             {copied ? <><CheckIcon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Tersalin</> : 'Salin Kredensial'}
101:                         </button>
102:                     </div>
103:                     <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-green-800 opacity-90">Simpan kredensial ini sekarang — password tidak bisa dilihat lagi.</p>
104:                 </div>
105:             </div>
106:         </div>
107:     );
108: }
109: 
110: // ─── Password Strength Checker ────────────────────────────────────────────────
111: const PASSWORD_CHECKS = [
112:     { key: 'length',    label: 'Minimal 8 karakter',              test: (p) => p.length >= 8 },
113:     { key: 'mixedCase', label: 'Huruf besar & kecil',             test: (p) => /[A-Z]/.test(p) && /[a-z]/.test(p) },
114:     { key: 'number',    label: 'Mengandung angka',                test: (p) => /[0-9]/.test(p) },
115:     { key: 'symbol',    label: 'Mengandung simbol (!@#$...)',      test: (p) => /[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(p) },
116: ];
117: 
118: function PasswordChecker({ password }) {
119:     if (!password) return null;
120:     return (
121:         <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-1">
122:             {PASSWORD_CHECKS.map(({ key, label, test }) => {
123:                 const ok = test(password);
124:                 return (
125:                     <div key={key} className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[11px] font-medium transition-colors ${ok ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>
126:                         <div className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 transition-colors ${ok ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-gray-200'}`}>
127:                             {ok && <CheckIcon className="w-2.5 h-2.5 text-white" />}
128:                         </div>
129:                         {label}
130:                     </div>
131:                 );
132:             })}
133:         </div>
134:     );
135: }
136: 
137: // ─── Add Admin Modal ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
138: function AddAdminModal({ open, onClose }) {
139:     const { data, setData, post, processing, errors, reset } = useForm({
140:         name: '', email: '', phone_country: 'ID', phone: '', password: '',
141:     });
142:     const [manualPassword, setManualPassword] = useState(false);
143:     const [showManualPassword, setShowManualPassword] = useState(false);
144: 
145:     const allChecksPass = PASSWORD_CHECKS.every(({ test }) => test(data.password));
146: 
147:     const handleToggleManual = (checked) => {
148:         setManualPassword(checked);
149:         if (!checked) {
150:             setData('password', '');
151:             setShowManualPassword(false);
152:         }
153:     };
154: 
155:     const handleClose = () => {
156:         reset();
157:         setManualPassword(false);
158:         setShowManualPassword(false);
159:         onClose();
160:     };
161: 
162:     const submit = (e) => {
163:         e.preventDefault();
164:         post(route('users.store'), { onSuccess: () => { reset(); setManualPassword(false); onClose(); } });
165:     };
166: 
167:     if (!open) return null;
168:     return (
169:         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
170:             <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl border border-gray-200 w-full max-w-lg">
171:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-5 border-b border-gray-100">
172:                     <div>
173:                         <h3 className="text-base font-bold text-gray-900">Tambah Akun Admin</h3>
174:                         <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-0.5">
175:                             {manualPassword ? 'Password yang dimasukkan langsung aktif.' : 'Password akan dibuat otomatis dan ditampilkan setelah akun dibuat.'}
176:                         </p>
177:                     </div>
178:                     <button onClick={handleClose} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors">
179:                         <XMarkIcon className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-500" />
180:                     </button>
181:                 </div>
182:                 <form onSubmit={submit} className="px-6 py-5 space-y-4">
183:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
184:                         {[
185:                             { key: 'name',  label: 'Nama Lengkap', type: 'text',  placeholder: 'Nama Admin' },
186:                             { key: 'email', label: 'Alamat Email',  type: 'email', placeholder: 'admin@bmkg.go.id' },
187:                         ].map(({ key, label, type, placeholder }) => (
188:                             <div key={key} className="space-y-1">
189:                                 <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wider">{label}</label>
190:                                 <input
191:                                     type={type}
192:                                     value={data[key]}
193:                                     onChange={(e) => setData(key, e.target.value)}
194:                                     placeholder={placeholder}
195:                                     className={`w-full h-10 px-3 bg-white border rounded-xl text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 transition-all shadow-sm
196:                                         ${errors[key] ? 'border-red-400 focus:ring-red-500/20' : 'border-gray-300 focus:border-bmkg-primary focus:ring-bmkg-primary/20'}`}
197:                                 />
198:                                 {errors[key] && <p className="text-xs text-red-500">{errors[key]}</p>}
199:                             </div>
200:                         ))}
201: 
202:                         <div className="space-y-1 sm:col-span-2">
203:                             <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wider">Nomor Telepon</label>
204:                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
205:                                 <PhoneCountrySelect
206:                                     value={data.phone_country}
207:                                     onChange={(country) => setData('phone_country', country)}
208:                                     compact
209:                                     className="w-32 shrink-0"
210:                                 />
211:                                 <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
212:                                     <input
213:                                         type="tel"
214:                                         value={data.phone}
215:                                         onChange={(e) => setData('phone', e.target.value)}
216:                                         placeholder="08xxxxxxxxxx"
217:                                         className={`w-full h-10 px-3 bg-white border rounded-xl text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 transition-all shadow-sm
218:                                             ${errors.phone ? 'border-red-400 focus:ring-red-500/20' : 'border-gray-300 focus:border-bmkg-primary focus:ring-bmkg-primary/20'}`}
219:                                     />
220:                                 </div>
221:                             </div>
222:                             <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Tidak perlu isi kode negara (+), pilih negara di sebelah kiri.</p>
223:                             {errors.phone_country && <p className="text-xs text-red-500">{errors.phone_country}</p>}
224:                             {errors.phone && <p className="text-xs text-red-500">{errors.phone}</p>}
225:                         </div>
226:                     </div>
227: 
228:                     {/* Password toggle */}
229:                     <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2.5 px-3.5 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl border border-gray-200">
230:                         <div>
231:                             <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-700">Atur password manual</p>
232:                             <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5">Jika dinonaktifkan, password dibuat otomatis</p>
233:                         </div>
234:                         <button
235:                             type="button"
236:                             onClick={() => handleToggleManual(!manualPassword)}
237:                             className={`relative inline-flex h-5 w-9 shrink-0 cursor-pointer rounded-full border-2 border-transparent transition-colors duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-bmkg-primary/30
238:                                 ${manualPassword ? 'bg-bmkg-primary' : 'bg-gray-300'}`}
239:                             role="switch"
240:                             aria-checked={manualPassword}
241:                         >
242:                             <span className={`pointer-events-none inline-block h-4 w-4 rounded-full bg-white shadow-sm ring-0 transition-transform duration-200 ${manualPassword ? 'translate-x-4' : 'translate-x-0'}`} />
243:                         </button>
244:                     </div>
245: 
246:                     {/* Manual password input */}
247:                     {manualPassword && (
248:                         <div className="space-y-1">
249:                             <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wider">Password</label>
250:                             <div className="relative">
251:                                 <input
252:                                     type={showManualPassword ? 'text' : 'password'}
253:                                     value={data.password}
254:                                     onChange={(e) => setData('password', e.target.value)}
255:                                     placeholder="Min. 8 karakter"
256:                                     autoFocus
257:                                     className={`w-full h-10 px-3 pr-10 bg-white border rounded-xl text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 transition-all shadow-sm
258:                                         ${errors.password ? 'border-red-400 focus:ring-red-500/20' : 'border-gray-300 focus:border-bmkg-primary focus:ring-bmkg-primary/20'}`}
259:                                 />
260:                                 <button
261:                                     type="button"
262:                                     onClick={() => setShowManualPassword((current) => !current)}
263:                                     className="absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 rounded-lg p-1 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-700"
264:                                     aria-label={showManualPassword ? 'Sembunyikan password' : 'Tampilkan password'}
265:                                 >
266:                                     {showManualPassword ? <EyeSlashIcon className="h-4 w-4" /> : <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" />}
267:                                 </button>
268:                             </div>
269:                             {errors.password && <p className="text-xs text-red-500">{errors.password}</p>}
270:                             <PasswordChecker password={data.password} />
271:                         </div>
272:                     )}
273: 
274:                     <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-1 border-t border-gray-100">
275:                         <button type="button" onClick={handleClose} className="px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors">
276:                             Batal
277:                         </button>
278:                         <button
279:                             type="submit"
280:                             disabled={processing || (manualPassword && !allChecksPass)}
281:                             className="flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2 bg-gray-900 text-white text-sm font-semibold rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
282:                         >
283:                             {processing ? 'Membuat...' : <><UserPlusIcon className="w-4 h-4" /> Buat Akun Admin</>}
284:                         </button>
285:                     </div>
286:                 </form>
287:             </div>
288:         </div>
289:     );
290: }
291: 
292: // ─── Edit Admin Modal (full: name, email, phone, password optional) ──────────────────
293: function EditAdminModal({ target, onClose }) {
294:     const { data, setData, patch, processing, errors, reset } = useForm({
295:         name:     target?.name  ?? '',
296:         email:    target?.email ?? '',
297:         phone_country: target?.phone_country ?? 'ID',
298:         phone:    target?.phone ?? '',
299:         password: '',
300:     });
301: 
302:     const [passwordMode, setPasswordMode] = useState('keep'); // 'keep' | 'manual' | 'generate'
303:     const [genProcessing, setGenProcessing] = useState(false);
304:     const [showManualPassword, setShowManualPassword] = useState(false);
305: 
306:     const allChecksPass = PASSWORD_CHECKS.every(({ test }) => test(data.password));
307: 
308:     const handleModeChange = (mode) => {
309:         setPasswordMode(mode);
310:         if (mode !== 'manual') {
311:             setData('password', '');
312:             setShowManualPassword(false);
313:         }
314:     };
315: 
316:     const handleClose = () => {
317:         reset();
318:         setPasswordMode('keep');
319:         setShowManualPassword(false);
320:         onClose();
321:     };
322: 
323:     const handleGenerate = () => {
324:         setGenProcessing(true);
325:         router.post(route('users.reset-password', target.id), {}, {
326:             onFinish: () => { setGenProcessing(false); handleClose(); },
327:         });
328:     };
329: 
330:     const submit = (e) => {
331:         e.preventDefault();
332:         patch(route('users.update', target.id), { onSuccess: () => { reset(); handleClose(); } });
333:     };
334: 
335:     if (!target) return null;
336:     return (
337:         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
338:             <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl border border-gray-200 w-full max-w-lg">
339:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-5 border-b border-gray-100">
340:                     <div>
341:                         <h3 className="text-base font-bold text-gray-900">Edit Akun Admin</h3>
342:                         <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-0.5 truncate max-w-[260px]">{target.email}</p>
343:                     </div>
344:                     <button onClick={handleClose} className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors">
345:                         <XMarkIcon className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-500" />
346:                     </button>
347:                 </div>
348:                 <form onSubmit={submit} className="px-6 py-5 space-y-4">
349:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
350:                         {[
351:                             { key: 'name',  label: 'Nama Lengkap', type: 'text',  placeholder: 'Nama Admin' },
352:                             { key: 'email', label: 'Alamat Email',  type: 'email', placeholder: 'admin@bmkg.go.id' },
353:                         ].map(({ key, label, type, placeholder }) => (
354:                             <div key={key} className="space-y-1">
355:                                 <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wider">{label}</label>
356:                                 <input
357:                                     type={type}
358:                                     value={data[key]}
359:                                     onChange={(e) => setData(key, e.target.value)}
360:                                     placeholder={placeholder}
361:                                     className={`w-full h-10 px-3 bg-white border rounded-xl text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 transition-all shadow-sm
362:                                         ${errors[key] ? 'border-red-400 focus:ring-red-500/20' : 'border-gray-300 focus:border-bmkg-primary focus:ring-bmkg-primary/20'}`}
363:                                 />
364:                                 {errors[key] && <p className="text-xs text-red-500">{errors[key]}</p>}
365:                             </div>
366:                         ))}
367: 
368:                         <div className="space-y-1 sm:col-span-2">
369:                             <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wider">Nomor Telepon</label>
370:                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
371:                                 <PhoneCountrySelect
372:                                     value={data.phone_country}
373:                                     onChange={(country) => setData('phone_country', country)}
374:                                     compact
375:                                     className="w-32 shrink-0"
376:                                 />
377:                                 <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
378:                                     <input
379:                                         type="tel"
380:                                         value={data.phone}
381:                                         onChange={(e) => setData('phone', e.target.value)}
382:                                         placeholder="08xxxxxxxxxx"
383:                                         className={`w-full h-10 px-3 bg-white border rounded-xl text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 transition-all shadow-sm
384:                                             ${errors.phone ? 'border-red-400 focus:ring-red-500/20' : 'border-gray-300 focus:border-bmkg-primary focus:ring-bmkg-primary/20'}`}
385:                                     />
386:                                 </div>
387:                             </div>
388:                             <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">Tidak perlu isi kode negara (+), pilih negara di sebelah kiri.</p>
389:                             {errors.phone_country && <p className="text-xs text-red-500">{errors.phone_country}</p>}
390:                             {errors.phone && <p className="text-xs text-red-500">{errors.phone}</p>}
391:                         </div>
392:                     </div>
393: 
394:                     {/* Password section */}
395:                     <div className="space-y-3">
396:                         <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wider">Password</label>
397: 
398:                         {/* Mode selector */}
399:                         <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
400:                             {[
401:                                 { mode: 'keep',     label: 'Tidak diubah' },
402:                                 { mode: 'manual',   label: 'Atur manual' },
403:                                 { mode: 'generate', label: 'Generate otomatis' },
404:                             ].map(({ mode, label }) => (
405:                                 <button
406:                                     key={mode}
407:                                     type="button"
408:                                     onClick={() => handleModeChange(mode)}
409:                                     className={`rounded-xl border px-3 py-2 text-xs font-semibold transition-all ${
410:                                         passwordMode === mode
411:                                             ? 'border-gray-900 bg-gray-900 text-white'
412:                                             : 'border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-500 hover:border-gray-300 hover:text-gray-700'
413:                                     }`}
414:                                 >
415:                                     {label}
416:                                 </button>
417:                             ))}
418:                         </div>
419: 
420:                         {/* Manual input */}
421:                         {passwordMode === 'manual' && (
422:                             <div className="space-y-1">
423:                                 <div className="relative">
424:                                     <input
425:                                         type={showManualPassword ? 'text' : 'password'}
426:                                         value={data.password}
427:                                         onChange={(e) => setData('password', e.target.value)}
428:                                         placeholder="Min. 8 karakter"
429:                                         autoFocus
430:                                         className={`w-full h-10 px-3 pr-10 bg-white border rounded-xl text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 transition-all shadow-sm
431:                                             ${errors.password ? 'border-red-400 focus:ring-red-500/20' : 'border-gray-300 focus:border-bmkg-primary focus:ring-bmkg-primary/20'}`}
432:                                     />
433:                                     <button
434:                                         type="button"
435:                                         onClick={() => setShowManualPassword((current) => !current)}
436:                                         className="absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 rounded-lg p-1 text-gray-400 transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-700"
437:                                         aria-label={showManualPassword ? 'Sembunyikan password' : 'Tampilkan password'}
438:                                     >
439:                                         {showManualPassword ? <EyeSlashIcon className="h-4 w-4" /> : <EyeIcon className="h-4 w-4" />}
440:                                     </button>
441:                                 </div>
442:                                 {errors.password && <p className="text-xs text-red-500">{errors.password}</p>}
443:                                 <PasswordChecker password={data.password} />
444:                             </div>
445:                         )}
446: 
447:                         {/* Generate info */}
448:                         {passwordMode === 'generate' && (
449:                             <div className="rounded-xl border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 px-4 py-3 text-xs text-amber-800 leading-relaxed">
450:                                 Password baru akan dibuat otomatis dan ditampilkan setelah dikonfirmasi. Simpan kredensial tersebut karena tidak bisa dilihat lagi.
451:                             </div>
452:                         )}
453:                     </div>
454: 
455:                     <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-1 border-t border-gray-100">
456:                         <button type="button" onClick={handleClose} className="px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors">
457:                             Batal
458:                         </button>
459: 
460:                         {passwordMode === 'generate' ? (
461:                             <button
462:                                 type="button"
463:                                 onClick={handleGenerate}
464:                                 disabled={genProcessing}
465:                                 className="flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2 bg-gray-900 text-white text-sm font-semibold rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
466:                             >
467:                                 {genProcessing ? 'Memproses...' : <><PencilSquareIcon className="w-4 h-4" /> Generate & Simpan</>}
468:                             </button>
469:                         ) : (
470:                             <button
471:                                 type="submit"
472:                                 disabled={processing || (passwordMode === 'manual' && !allChecksPass)}
473:                                 className="flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2 bg-gray-900 text-white text-sm font-semibold rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
474:                             >
475:                                 {processing ? 'Menyimpan...' : <><PencilSquareIcon className="w-4 h-4" /> Simpan Perubahan</>}
476:                             </button>
477:                         )}
478:                     </div>
479:                 </form>
480:             </div>
481:         </div>
482:     );
483: }
484: 
485: // ─── Main Page ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
486: export default function UserManagement({ users, stats, filters = {} }) {
487:     const { flash, auth } = usePage().props;
488:     const currentUserId = auth?.user?.id;
489: 
490:     const [showAddModal, setShowAddModal] = useState(false);
491:     const [editTarget, setEditTarget] = useState(null);
492:     const [confirm, setConfirm] = useState(null);
493:     const [search, setSearch] = useState(filters?.search ?? '');
494:     const [roleFilter, setRoleFilter] = useState(filters?.role ?? 'all');
495: 
496:     // Debounce server-side filter
497:     useEffect(() => {
498:         const timer = setTimeout(() => {
499:             router.get(
500:                 route('users.index'),
501:                 { search: search || undefined, role: roleFilter !== 'all' ? roleFilter : undefined },
502:                 { preserveState: true, replace: true },
503:             );
504:         }, 400);
505:         return () => clearTimeout(timer);
506:     }, [search, roleFilter]);
507: 
508:     const handleReset = () => {
509:         setSearch('');
510:         setRoleFilter('all');
511:         router.get(route('users.index'));
512:     };
513: 
514:     const openConfirm = (type, u) => setConfirm({ type, user: u });
515:     const closeConfirm = () => setConfirm(null);
516: 
517:     const handleDelete = () => {
518:         router.delete(route('users.destroy', confirm.user.id));
519:         closeConfirm();
520:     };
521: 
522:     return (
523:         <AuthenticatedLayout header={<h2 className="text-xl font-semibold leading-tight text-gray-800">Kelola Pengguna</h2>}>
524:             <Head title="Kelola Pengguna" />
525: 
526:             {/* Add Admin Modal */}
527:             <AddAdminModal open={showAddModal} onClose={() => setShowAddModal(false)} />
528: 
529:             {/* Edit Admin Modal */}
530:             <EditAdminModal key={editTarget?.id} target={editTarget} onClose={() => setEditTarget(null)} />
531: 
532:             {/* Confirm Modal */}
533:             <ConfirmModal
534:                 open={confirm?.type === 'delete'}
535:                 title="Hapus Akun"
536:                 message={`Akun ${confirm?.user?.name} akan dinonaktifkan. Tindakan ini dapat dipulihkan melalui database.`}
537:                 confirmLabel="Hapus Akun"
538:                 confirmClass="bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700"
539:                 onConfirm={handleDelete}
540:                 onCancel={closeConfirm}
541:             />
542: 
543:             <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50/50 pb-10 w-full">
544: 
545:                 {/* ── Page Header — full-width white section ── */}
546:                 <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-4 sm:px-8 py-10 mb-8">
547:                     <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-6">
548:                         <div>
549:                             <h1 className="text-3xl font-extrabold text-gray-900 tracking-tight">Kelola Pengguna</h1>
550:                             <p className="mt-2 text-gray-500 text-lg">Kelola akun admin dan pengguna yang terdaftar dalam sistem.</p>
551:                         </div>
552:                         <AddActionButton
553:                             label="Tambah Admin"

557:                         />
558:                     </div>

560: 
561:                 <div className="w-full px-4 sm:px-8">
562: 
563:                     {/* Flash notifications */}
564:                     {flash?.credentials && <CredentialsCard flash={flash} />}
565:                     {flash?.success && !flash?.credentials && (
566:                         <div className="mb-5 flex items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-green-200 bg-green-50 px-5 py-3 text-sm text-green-800">

569:                         </div>

573:                             <XMarkIcon className="w-4 h-4 shrink-0" />
574:                             {flash.error}
575:                         </div>
576:                     )}
577:

579:                     <div className="mb-8">

581:                     </div>
582:

  1: import React, { memo } from 'react';
  2: import Marquee from 'react-fast-marquee';
  3: 
  4: const DEFAULT_IMAGE = '/images/iklim.webp';
  5: 
  6: const formatItem = (item) => ({
  7:     ...item,
  8:     image_path: item.image_path || DEFAULT_IMAGE,
  9: });
 10: 
 11: const DataCard = memo(({ item }) => {
 12:     const imageSrc = item.image_path || DEFAULT_IMAGE;
 13: 
 14:     return (
 15:         <div className="shrink-0 relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl w-[240px] h-[160px] sm:w-[320px] sm:h-[200px] bg-slate-900 border-2 border-white shadow-sm group cursor-pointer">
 16:             {/* Background Image */}
 17:             <div className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full overflow-hidden">
 18:                 <img
 19:                     src={imageSrc}
 20:                     alt={item.title}
 21:                     className="w-full h-full object-cover brightness-[0.7] group-hover:scale-110 group-hover:rotate-2 transition-transform duration-700"
 22:                     fetchPriority="high"
 23:                     loading="eager"
 24:                 />
 25:                 <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-slate-900 via-slate-900/20 to-transparent pointer-events-none" />
 26:             </div>
 27:

 29:             <div className="absolute inset-0 p-5 sm:p-6 flex flex-col justify-between z-10 group-hover:opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-300 text-left">
 30:                 <div>
 31:                     <span className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-black/40 border border-white/20 text-[8px] sm:text-[10px] font-black text-white uppercase tracking-widest backdrop-blur-sm">
 32:                         {item.category}
 33:                     </span>
 34:                 </div>
 35:                 <h4 className="text-white text-base sm:text-lg font-black uppercase tracking-tight leading-tight">
 36:                     {item.title}
 37:                 </h4>
 38:             </div>
 39: 
 40:             {/* Hover Content (Price & Unit) */}
 41:             <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-bmkg-primary/90 backdrop-blur-md flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 text-center opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-500 translate-y-4 group-hover:translate-y-0 z-20">
 42:                 <div className="space-y-2">
 43:                     <span className="text-[9px] font-black text-white/40 uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">Tarif PNBP</span>
 44:                     <div className="text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tighter">
 45:                         {item.price}
 46:                     </div>
 47:                     <div className="h-px w-8 bg-bmkg-accent mx-auto"></div>
 48:                     <div className="text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-bold text-gray-300">
 49:                         {item.unit}
 50:                     </div>
 51:                 </div>
 52:                 <div className="absolute bottom-4 left-0 right-0 text-[8px] font-bold text-white/20 uppercase tracking-[0.1em] px-2">
 53:                     Sesuai Peraturan Pemerintah No. 47 Tahun 2018
 54:                 </div>
 55:             </div>
 56: 
 57:             {/* Bottom accent bar */}
 58:             <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 h-[4px] w-0 bg-bmkg-accent group-hover:w-full transition-all duration-700 z-30" />
 59:         </div>
 60:     );
 61: });
 62: 
 63: DataCard.displayName = 'DataCard';
 64: 
 65: /**
 66:  * Greedy interleave — guarantees no two same-category cards sit adjacent,
 67:  * as long as no single category has more than ⌈total/2⌉ items.
 68:  *
 69:  * Odd/even count doesn't matter — what matters is the ratio:
 70:  *   safe  → max_category_count ≤ Math.ceil(total / 2)
 71:  *   unsafe → one category dominates > half the total (fallback kicks in)
 72:  *
 73:  * Fallback: if no different category is left, place the least-bad duplicate.
 74:  */
 75: function interleaveByCategory(items) {
 76:     if (items.length === 0) return [];
 77: 
 78:     // Group by category
 79:     const groupMap = {};
 80:     items.forEach((item) => {
 81:         const cat = item.category || 'Lainnya';
 82:         if (!groupMap[cat]) groupMap[cat] = [];
 83:         groupMap[cat].push(item);
 84:     });
 85: 
 86:     let buckets = Object.values(groupMap);
 87:     const result = [];
 88: 
 89:     while (buckets.some((b) => b.length > 0)) {
 90:         // Sort descending by remaining count — drain the largest first
 91:         buckets.sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length);
 92: 
 93:         const lastCat =
 94:             result.length > 0 ? result[result.length - 1].category || 'Lainnya' : null;
 95: 
 96:         // Pick the first bucket that differs from lastCat
 97:         let picked = false;
 98:         for (let i = 0; i < buckets.length; i++) {
 99:             if (buckets[i].length === 0) continue;
100:             const cat = buckets[i][0].category || 'Lainnya';
101:             if (cat !== lastCat) {
102:                 result.push(buckets[i].shift());
103:                 picked = true;
104:                 break;
105:             }
106:         }
107: 
108:         // Fallback: one category is so dominant it's mathematically unavoidable
109:         // — just pick the largest remaining (already sorted)
110:         if (!picked) {
111:             const fallback = buckets.find((b) => b.length > 0);
112:             if (fallback) result.push(fallback.shift());
113:         }
114: 
115:         buckets = buckets.filter((b) => b.length > 0);
116:     }
117: 
118:     return result;
119: }
120: 
121: export default function DataTypesSection({ catalogItems = [] }) {
122:     const items = catalogItems.filter(Boolean).map(formatItem);
123:     const interleaved = interleaveByCategory(items);
124:     const firstRow = interleaved;
125:     const secondRow = [...interleaved].reverse();
126: 
127:     return (
128:         <section id="katalog" className="relative py-24 bg-white overflow-hidden">
129:             <div className="absolute -top-24 -right-24 w-96 h-96 bg-bmkg-accent/5 blur-[100px] rounded-full pointer-events-none" />
130: 
131:             {/* Header */}
132:             <div className="relative z-10 max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 mb-14">
133:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
134:                     <div className="w-8 h-[2px] bg-bmkg-accent rounded-full"></div>
135:                     <span className="text-zinc-400 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">
136:                         Katalog Informasi
137:                     </span>
138:                 </div>
139:                 <h2 className="text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight uppercase leading-[1.1] mb-6 sm:mb-8 text-slate-900 break-words">
140:                     Katalog <span className="text-zinc-400">Parameter</span>
141:                 </h2>
142:                 <p className="text-zinc-600 text-sm sm:text-base md:text-lg max-w-2xl leading-relaxed font-medium">
143:                     Lampiran{' '}
144:                     <a
145:                         href="/dokumen/pp-no-47-tahun-2018.pdf"
146:                         target="_blank"
147:                         rel="noopener noreferrer"
148:                         className="font-bold text-bmkg-primary underline underline-offset-2 hover:text-bmkg-accent transition-colors duration-200"
149:                     >
150:                         Peraturan Pemerintah No. 47 Tahun 2018
151:                     </a>{' '}
152:                     tentang PNBP BMKG.
153:                 </p>
154:             </div>
155: 
156:             {items.length > 0 ? (
157:                 <div className="relative z-10 space-y-6 sm:space-y-10">
158:                     <Marquee gradient={false} speed={35} pauseOnHover={true} autoFill={true}>
159:                         {firstRow.map((item, index) => (
160:                             <div key={`r1-${index}`} className="mx-3 sm:mx-4">
161:                                 <DataCard item={item} />
162:                             </div>
163:                         ))}
164:                     </Marquee>
165: 
166:                     <Marquee gradient={false} speed={30} pauseOnHover={true} direction="right" autoFill={true}>
167:                         {secondRow.map((item, index) => (
168:                             <div key={`r2-${index}`} className="mx-3 sm:mx-4">
169:                                 <DataCard item={item} />
170:                             </div>
171:                         ))}
172:                     </Marquee>
173:                 </div>
174:             ) : (
175:                 <div className="relative z-10 max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 sm:px-8">
176:                     <div className="rounded-3xl border border-dashed border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 px-6 py-10 text-center text-sm font-medium text-gray-500">
177:                         Katalog belum tersedia.
178:                     </div>
179:                 </div>
180:             )}
181:         </section>
182:     );
183: }

  6:         { label: 'Data Klimatologi', href: '#layanan' },

File: resources/js/Pages/Welcome/Partials/HeroSection.jsx
================
  1: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  2: import { Link, useForm, usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';
  3: import TrackingForm from './TrackingForm';
  4: import TrackingResult from './TrackingResult';
  5: 
  6: const BACKGROUND_VARIANTS = [
  7:   {
  8:     name: 'Meteorologi',
  9:     icon: '🌤️',
 10:     description: 'Mendukung proses pengajuan yang terstruktur dan transparan serta memudahkan dalam memantau status permintaan data.',
 11:     image: '/images/meteorologi2.webp',
 12:   },
 13:   {
 14:     name: 'Klimatologi',
 15:     icon: '🌡️',
 16:     description: 'Mendukung proses pengajuan yang terstruktur dan transparan serta memudahkan dalam memantau status permintaan data.',
 17:     image: '/images/klimatologi2.webp',
 18:   },
 19:   {
 20:     name: 'Geofisika',
 21:     icon: '⚡',
 22:     description: 'Mendukung proses pengajuan yang terstruktur dan transparan serta memudahkan dalam memantau status permintaan data.',
 23:     image: '/images/geofisika2.webp',
 24:   },
 25: ];
 26: 
 27: export default function HeroSection() {
 28:   const { trackingResult, trackingError } = usePage().props;
 29: 
 30:   const [active, setActive] = useState(0);
 31:   const [loadedImages, setLoadedImages] = useState({ 0: true });
 32:   const [autoplayActive, setAutoplayActive] = useState(true);
 33:   const [showResult, setShowResult] = useState(!!trackingResult);
 34: 
 35:   const { data, setData, get, processing, errors } = useForm({
 36:     email: '',
 37:     request_code: '',
 38:   });
 39: 
 40:   useEffect(() => {
 41:     if (trackingResult) setShowResult(true);
 42:   }, [trackingResult]);
 43: 
 44:   useEffect(() => {
 45:     BACKGROUND_VARIANTS.forEach((variant, index) => {
 46:       if (index === 0) return;
 47:       const img = new Image();
 48:       img.src = variant.image;
 49:       img.onload = () => setLoadedImages(prev => ({ ...prev, [index]: true }));
 50:     });
 51:   }, []);
 52: 
 53:   useEffect(() => {
 54:     if (!autoplayActive) return;
 55:     const interval = setInterval(() => {
 56:       setActive(prev => (prev + 1) % BACKGROUND_VARIANTS.length);
 57:     }, 5000);
 58:     return () => clearInterval(interval);
 59:   }, [autoplayActive]);
 60: 
 61:   useEffect(() => {
 62:     const handleKeyDown = (e) => {
 63:       if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') handlePrevious();
 64:       if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') handleNext();
 65:     };
 66:     window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
 67:     return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
 68:   }, []);
 69: 
 70:   const handlePrevious = () => { setAutoplayActive(false); setActive(p => (p - 1 + BACKGROUND_VARIANTS.length) % BACKGROUND_VARIANTS.length); };
 71:   const handleNext = () => { setAutoplayActive(false); setActive(p => (p + 1) % BACKGROUND_VARIANTS.length); };
 72:   const handleDotClick = (i) => { setAutoplayActive(false); setActive(i); };
 73: 
 74:   const handleSubmit = (e) => {
 75:     e.preventDefault();
 76:     get(route('track-request'), { preserveScroll: true, preserveState: true });
 77:   };
 78: 
 79:   return (
 80:     <section className="relative w-full min-h-screen flex flex-col overflow-hidden bg-[#0a0a0a]">
 81: 
 82:       {/* BACKGROUND */}
 83:       {BACKGROUND_VARIANTS.map((item, idx) => (
 84:         <div
 85:           key={idx}
 86:           className={[
 87:             'absolute inset-0 transition-all duration-1000 ease-in-out',
 88:             active === idx ? 'opacity-100 z-10 scale-100' : 'opacity-0 z-0 scale-105 pointer-events-none',
 89:           ].join(' ')}
 90:         >
 91:           {loadedImages[idx] ? (
 92:             <>
 93:               <img
 94:                 src={item.image}
 95:                 alt={item.name}
 96:                 fetchPriority={idx === 0 ? 'high' : 'auto'}
 97:                 loading={idx === 0 ? 'eager' : 'lazy'}
 98:                 className="w-full h-full object-cover brightness-[1.0] contrast-[1.0] saturate-[1.2]"
 99:               />
100:               <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-tr from-black/30 via-black/10 to-transparent" />
101:               <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent via-transparent to-[#0a0a0a]/70" />
102:             </>
103:           ) : (
104:             <div className={['w-full h-full bg-gray-900 flex items-center justify-center', active === idx ? 'visible' : 'hidden'].join(' ')}>
105:               <div className="w-10 h-10 border-2 border-white/20 border-t-white rounded-full animate-spin" />
106:             </div>
107:           )}
108:         </div>
109:       ))}
110: 
111:       {/* CONTENT */}
112:       <div className="relative z-10 w-full flex-grow flex items-center pt-32 pb-12 lg:pt-20 lg:pb-0">
113:         <div className="max-w-[1440px] mx-auto px-6 md:px-12 w-full grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-10 lg:gap-16 items-center">
114: 
115:           {/* LEFT */}
116:           <div className="space-y-6 lg:space-y-8 text-center lg:text-left">
117:             <div key={'title-' + active} className="animate-fade-soft">
118:               <h1 className="text-4xl sm:text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl xl:text-8xl 
119: uppercase font-black leading-[0.9] tracking-tighter text-white drop-shadow-2xl">
120:                 Portal Pengajuan Data BMKG
121:               </h1>
122:             </div>
123:             <div key={'desc-' + active} className="animate-fade-soft">
124:               <p className="text-base md:text-lg lg:text-xl text-white/90 max-w-xl mx-auto lg:mx-0 font-medium leading-relaxed">
125:                 {BACKGROUND_VARIANTS[active].description}
126:               </p>
127:             </div>
128:             <div className="pt-4 flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 items-center justify-center lg:justify-start">
129:               <Link
130:                 href={route('register')}
131:                 className="group relative px-10 py-4 bg-white text-black font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-xs transition-all duration-300 active:scale-95 shadow-2xl rounded-xl hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:shadow-white/20"
132:               >
133:                 Buat Akun
134:               </Link>
135: 
136:               {/* Tombol Katalog dengan tag <a> yang sudah diperbaiki */}
137:               <a
138:                 href="#katalog"
139:                 className="group font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-xs text-white hover:text-white flex items-center gap-2 transition-colors"
140:                 onClick={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); document.getElementById('katalog')?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); }}
141:               >
142:                 Lihat Katalog
143:                 <svg className="w-4 h-4 transition-transform group-hover:translate-x-1" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
144:                   <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={3} d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" />
145:                 </svg>
146:               </a>
147:             </div>
148:           </div>
149: 
150:           {/* RIGHT: CARD */}
151:           <div className="flex justify-center lg:justify-end">
152:             <div className="w-full max-w-sm md:max-w-md bg-white/[0.12] backdrop-blur-xl p-6 md:p-8 rounded-[2rem] border border-white/20 shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 hover:bg-white/[0.15]">
153:               {(!showResult || !trackingResult) ? (
154:                 <TrackingForm
155:                   data={data}
156:                   setData={setData}
157:                   processing={processing}
158:                   errors={errors}
159:                   trackingError={trackingError}
160:                   onSubmit={handleSubmit}
161:                 />
162:               ) : (
163:                 <TrackingResult
164:                   trackingResult={trackingResult}
165:                   onBack={() => setShowResult(false)}
166:                 />
167:               )}
168:             </div>
169:           </div>
170:         </div>
171:       </div>
172: 
173:       {/* DOTS */}
174:       <div className="relative z-20 w-full pb-10">
175:         <div className="max-w-[1440px] mx-auto px-10 flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
176:           <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
177:             {BACKGROUND_VARIANTS.map((_, idx) => (
178:               <button
179:                 key={idx}
180:                 onClick={() => handleDotClick(idx)}
181:                 className={[
182:                   'transition-all duration-500 rounded-full',
183:                   active === idx ? 'w-10 h-1.5 bg-white' : 'w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-white/40 hover:bg-white/70',
184:                 ].join(' ')}
185:                 aria-label={'Go to slide ' + (idx + 1)}
186:               />
187:             ))}
188:           </div>
189:           <p className="text-white/60 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.3em]">
190:             {BACKGROUND_VARIANTS[active].name} — 0{active + 1}
191:           </p>
192:         </div>
193:       </div>
194:     </section>
195:   );
196: }

  1: import { Link } from '@inertiajs/react';
  2: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  3: 
  4: export default function Navbar({ auth }) {
  5:     const [scrolled, setScrolled] = useState(false);
  6:     const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false);
  7: 
  8:     useEffect(() => {
  9:         const handleScroll = () => setScrolled(window.scrollY > 20);
 10:         window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);
 11:         return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);
 12:     }, []);
 13: 
 14:     return (
 15:         <nav
 16:             className={`fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 transition-all duration-500 ${scrolled
 17:                     ? 'bg-slate-900/95 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-lg shadow-black/10 border-b border-white/5'
 18:                     : 'bg-transparent'
 19:                 }`}
 20:         >
 21:             <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
 22:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between h-16 lg:h-18">
 23:                     {/* Brand */}
 24:                     <Link href="/" className="flex items-center gap-3">
 25:                         <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center">
 26:                             <svg className="w-5 h-5 text-white" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2}>
 27:                                 <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3.055 11H5a2 2 0 012 2v1a2 2 0 002 2 2 2 0 012 2v2.945M8 3.935V5.5A2.5 2.5 0 0010.5 8h.5a2 2 0 012 2 2 2 0 104 0 2 2 0 012-2h1.064M15 20.488V18a2 2 0 012-2h3.064M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" />
 28:                             </svg>
 29:                         </div>
 30:                         <div className="hidden sm:block">
 31:                             <span className="text-white font-semibold text-base tracking-tight">BMKG</span>
 32:                             <span className="text-slate-400 text-xs block">Permohonan Data</span>
 33:                         </div>
 34:                     </Link>
 35: 
 36:                     {/* Desktop Nav */}
 37:                     <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-1">
 38:                         <a href="#layanan" className="px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-white/5 transition-all">
 39:                             Layanan
 40:                         </a>
 41:                         <a href="#prosedur" className="px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-white/5 transition-all">
 42:                             Prosedur
 43:                         </a>
 44:                         <a href="#tentang" className="px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-white/5 transition-all">
 45:                             Tentang
 46:                         </a>
 47:                         <a href="#faq" className="px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-white/5 transition-all">
 48:                             FAQ
 49:                         </a>
 50: 
 51:                         <div className="w-px h-5 bg-white/10 mx-3" />
 52: 
 53:                         {auth.user ? (
 54:                             <Link
 55:                                 href={route('dashboard')}
 56:                                 className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white bg-blue-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-500 transition-colors"
 57:                             >
 58:                                 Dashboard
 59:                             </Link>
 60:                         ) : (
 61:                             <>
 62:                                 <Link
 63:                                     href={route('login')}
 64:                                     className="px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
 65:                                 >
 66:                                     Masuk
 67:                                 </Link>
 68:                                 <Link
 69:                                     href={route('register')}
 70:                                     className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white bg-blue-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-500 transition-colors"
 71:                                 >
 72:                                     Daftar
 73:                                 </Link>
 74:                             </>
 75:                         )}
 76:                     </div>
 77: 
 78:                     {/* Mobile Toggle */}
 79:                     <button
 80:                         onClick={() => setMobileOpen(!mobileOpen)}
 81:                         className="md:hidden p-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"

 87:                             ) : (

 89:                             )}
 90:                         </svg>
 91:                     </button>
 92:                 </div>

 95:                 {mobileOpen && (

 97:                         <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
 98:                             <a href="#layanan" onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)} className="px-3 py-3 text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-white/5 transition-all">Layanan</a>

105:                             ) : (

107:                                     <Link href={route('login')} className="px-3 py-3 text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-white/5 transition-all">Masuk</Link>

File: resources/js/Pages/Welcome/Partials/StatsSection.jsx
================
  1: import React, { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
  2: import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, CartesianGrid, Cell } from 'recharts';
  3: import { ChevronLeftIcon, ChevronRightIcon, UsersIcon, ChartBarIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline';
  4: 
  5: const MONTH_LABELS = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'Mei', 'Jun', 'Jul', 'Agu', 'Sep', 'Okt', 'Nov', 'Des'];
  6: 
  7: export default function StatsSection({ stats = {} }) {
  8:     const monthlyData = stats.monthly_stats || {};
  9:     const availableYears = Object.keys(monthlyData).sort((a, b) => b - a);
 10:     
 11:     // Default to current year or the latest available year
 12:     const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear().toString();
 13:     const [selectedYear, setSelectedYear] = useState(availableYears.includes(currentYear) ? currentYear : (availableYears[0] || currentYear));
 14: 
 15:     const chartData = useMemo(() => {
 16:         const yearData = monthlyData[selectedYear] || Array(12).fill(0);
 17:         return MONTH_LABELS.map((month, index) => ({
 18:             name: month,
 19:             value: yearData[index] || 0
 20:         }));
 21:     }, [selectedYear, monthlyData]);
 22: 
 23:     const handlePrevYear = () => {
 24:         const currentIndex = availableYears.indexOf(selectedYear);
 25:         if (currentIndex < availableYears.length - 1) {
 26:             setSelectedYear(availableYears[currentIndex + 1]);
 27:         }
 28:     };
 29: 
 30:     const handleNextYear = () => {
 31:         const currentIndex = availableYears.indexOf(selectedYear);
 32:         if (currentIndex > 0) {
 33:             setSelectedYear(availableYears[currentIndex - 1]);
 34:         }
 35:     };
 36: 
 37:     // Visitor Stats - Unified color to BMKG Accent (Yellow)
 38:     const visitorStats = [
 39:         { label: 'Online', value: 0, color: 'bg-bmkg-accent' },
 40:         { label: 'Hari ini', value: 0, color: 'bg-bmkg-accent' },
 41:         { label: 'Bulan ini', value: 0, color: 'bg-bmkg-accent' },
 42:         { label: 'Tahun ini', value: 0, color: 'bg-bmkg-accent' },
 43:         { label: 'Total', value: 0, color: 'bg-bmkg-accent' },
 44:     ];
 45: 
 46:     return (
 47:         <section className="py-16 bg-slate-50 relative overflow-hidden">
 48:             
 49:             <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 relative z-10 overflow-visible">
 50:                 
 51:                 {/* Header */}
 52:                 <div className="mb-10">
 53:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
 54:                         <div className="w-8 h-[2px] bg-bmkg-accent rounded-full"></div>
 55:                         <span className="text-zinc-400 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">
 56:                             Indikator Kinerja
 57:                         </span>
 58:                     </div>
 59:                     <h2 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-black tracking-tight uppercase leading-none text-slate-900">
 60:                         Statistik <span className="text-zinc-400">Layanan & Pengunjung</span>
 61:                     </h2>
 62:                 </div>
 63: 
 64:                 <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 items-stretch">
 65:                     
 66:                     {/* LEFT: Monthly Requests Bar Chart */}
 67:                     <div className="lg:col-span-8 border transition-all duration-500 rounded-[2rem] p-6 flex flex-col bg-white border-zinc-200 shadow-sm">
 68:                         <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4 mb-8">
 69:                             <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 70:                                 <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center border transition-colors bg-slate-50 border-zinc-100">
 71:                                     <ChartBarIcon className="w-5 h-5 text-bmkg-accent" />
 72:                                 </div>
 73:                                 <div>
 74:                                     <h3 className="text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-tight text-slate-900">Statistik Permohonan</h3>
 75:                                     <p className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-zinc-400">Pengajuan per bulan</p>
 76:                                 </div>
 77:                             </div>
 78: 
 79:                             {/* Year Selector */}
 80:                             <div className="flex items-center rounded-xl p-0.5 border transition-all scale-90 sm:scale-100 bg-slate-50 border-zinc-200">
 81:                                 <button 
 82:                                     onClick={handlePrevYear}
 83:                                     disabled={availableYears.indexOf(selectedYear) === availableYears.length - 1}
 84:                                     className="p-1.5 rounded-lg transition-all hover:bg-zinc-200 text-zinc-400 disabled:opacity-10"
 85:                                 >
 86:                                     <ChevronLeftIcon className="w-4 h-4" />
 87:                                 </button>
 88:                                 <span className="px-4 py-0.5 font-black tracking-widest text-[11px] text-slate-900">
 89:                                     {selectedYear}
 90:                                 </span>
 91:                                 <button 
 92:                                     onClick={handleNextYear}
 93:                                     disabled={availableYears.indexOf(selectedYear) === 0}
 94:                                     className="p-1.5 rounded-lg transition-all hover:bg-zinc-200 text-zinc-400 disabled:opacity-10"
 95:                                 >
 96:                                     <ChevronRightIcon className="w-4 h-4" />
 97:                                 </button>
 98:                             </div>
 99:                         </div>
100: 
101:                         <div className="flex-1 min-h-[240px] w-full">
102:                             <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
103:                                 <BarChart data={chartData} margin={{ top: 5, right: 5, left: -25, bottom: 0 }}>
104:                                     <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#94a3b8" vertical={false} />
105:                                     <XAxis 
106:                                         dataKey="name" 
107:                                         axisLine={false} 
108:                                         tickLine={false} 
109:                                         tick={{ fill: '#64748b', fontSize: 10, fontWeight: 700 }}
110:                                         dy={8}
111:                                     />
112:                                     <YAxis 
113:                                         axisLine={false} 
114:                                         tickLine={false} 
115:                                         tick={{ fill: '#64748b', fontSize: 10, fontWeight: 700 }}
116:                                     />
117:                                     <Tooltip 
118:                                         cursor={{ fill: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02)' }}
119:                                         formatter={(value) => [value, "Pengajuan"]}
120:                                         labelStyle={{ color: '#0f172a', marginBottom: '4px' }}
121:                                         contentStyle={{ 
122:                                             backgroundColor: '#fff', 
123:                                             border: '1px solid #f1f5f9',
124:                                             borderRadius: '12px',
125:                                             padding: '12px',
126:                                             fontSize: '11px',
127:                                             fontWeight: '800',
128:                                             boxShadow: '0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)'
129:                                         }}
130:                                         itemStyle={{ color: '#FCD34D', padding: 0 }}
131:                                     />
132:                                     <Bar dataKey="value" radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} barSize={32}>
133:                                         {chartData.map((entry, index) => (
134:                                             <Cell 
135:                                                 key={`cell-${index}`} 
136:                                                 fill={entry.value > 0 ? '#FCD34D' : '#f1f5f9'} 
137:                                                 fillOpacity={entry.value > 0 ? 1 : 0.5}
138:                                             />
139:                                         ))}
140:                                     </Bar>
141:                                 </BarChart>
142:                             </ResponsiveContainer>
143:                         </div>
144:                     </div>
145: 
146:                     {/* RIGHT: Visitor Statistics */}
147:                     <div className="lg:col-span-4 border transition-all duration-500 rounded-[2rem] p-6 flex flex-col bg-white border-zinc-200 shadow-sm">
148:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-8">
149:                             <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center border transition-colors bg-slate-50 border-zinc-100">
150:                                 <UsersIcon className="w-5 h-5 text-bmkg-accent" />
151:                             </div>
152:                             <div>
153:                                 <h3 className="text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-tight text-slate-900">Statistik Pengunjung</h3>
154:                                 <p className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-zinc-400">Online Traffic</p>
155:                             </div>
156:                         </div>
157: 
158:                         <div className="space-y-4">
159:                             {visitorStats.map((item, idx) => (
160:                                 <div key={item.label} className="group">
161:                                     <div className="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
162:                                         <span className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-zinc-400">{item.label}</span>
163:                                         <span className="text-base font-black leading-none text-slate-900">{item.value.toLocaleString()}</span>
164:                                     </div>
165:                                     <div className="h-1.5 w-full rounded-full overflow-hidden bg-slate-100">
166:                                         <div 
167:                                             className={`h-full ${item.color} opacity-20 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-700 ease-out`}
168:                                             style={{ width: item.value > 0 ? '100%' : '2%' }}
169:                                         />
170:                                     </div>
171:                                 </div>
172:                             ))}
173:                         </div>
174: 
175:                         {/* Mini Summary */}
176:                         <div className="mt-auto pt-6">
177:                             <div className="rounded-2xl p-4 border transition-all bg-slate-50 border-zinc-100">
178:                                 <div className="text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] mb-1 text-zinc-400">Total Akumulasi</div>
179:                                 <div className="text-xl font-black tracking-tighter text-slate-900">
180:                                     0 <span className="text-[10px] font-bold ml-1 uppercase text-zinc-400">Pengunjung</span>
181:                                 </div>
182:                             </div>
183:                         </div>
184:                     </div>
185: 
186:                 </div>
187:             </div>
188:         </section>
189:     );
190: }

File: resources/js/Pages/Welcome/Partials/TrackingForm.jsx
================
 1: export default function TrackingForm({ data, setData, processing, errors, trackingError, onSubmit }) {
 2:     const serverError = trackingError ?? errors?.email ?? errors?.request_code ?? null;
 3: 
 4:     return (
 5:         <div className="animate-fade-in">
 6:             <div className="mb-8 border-l-4 border-bmkg-accent pl-5 text-left">
 7:                 <h3 className="text-white text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tight">Lacak Pengajuan</h3>
 8:                 <p className="text-white/70 text-xs font-medium mt-1">Masukkan kredensial pengajuan</p>
 9:             </div>
10: 
11:             <form className="space-y-5 text-left" onSubmit={onSubmit}>
12:                 <div className="space-y-2">
13:                     <label className="text-white/80 text-[10px] font-black tracking-[0.2em] uppercase ml-1">Email Terdaftar</label>
14:                     <input
15:                         type="email"
16:                         required
17:                         value={data.email}
18:                         placeholder="nama@email.com"
19:                         onChange={(e) => setData('email', e.target.value)}
20:                         className="w-full bg-black/30 border border-white/20 rounded-xl px-5 py-4 text-white placeholder:text-white/40 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-bmkg-accent focus:bg-black/40 transition-all text-sm"
21:                     />
22:                 </div>
23:                 <div className="space-y-2">
24:                     <label className="text-white/80 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] ml-1">Kode Pengajuan</label>
25:                     <input
26:                         type="text"
27:                         required
28:                         value={data.request_code}
29:                         placeholder="BMKG-26C-XXXX"
30:                         onChange={(e) => setData('request_code', e.target.value)}
31:                         className="w-full bg-black/30 border border-white/20 rounded-xl px-5 py-4 text-white placeholder:text-white/40 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-bmkg-accent focus:bg-black/40 transition-all text-sm"
32:                     />
33:                 </div>
34: 
35:                 {serverError && (
36:                     <div className="bg-red-500/20 border border-red-500/40 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-red-300 text-xs font-medium">
37:                         {serverError}
38:                     </div>
39:                 )}
40: 
41:                 <button
42:                     type="submit"
43:                     disabled={processing}
44:                     className="w-full py-4 bg-bmkg-accent hover:bg-bmkg-accent/90 disabled:opacity-60 disabled:cursor-not-allowed text-white font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-xs rounded-xl transition-all shadow-lg shadow-bmkg-accent/30 mt-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
45:                 >
46:                     {processing ? (
47:                         <>
48:                             <svg className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
49:                                 <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" />
50:                                 <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8v8H4z" />
51:                             </svg>
52:                             Mencari…
53:                         </>
54:                     ) : 'Cek Status Data'}
55:                 </button>
56:             </form>
57:         </div>
58:     );
59: }

  3: const STATUS_MESSAGES = {
  4:     pending: 'Permohonan Anda telah diterima dan saat ini sedang dalam tahap verifikasi dokumen oleh tim teknis.',
  5:     rejected: 'Mohon maaf, permohonan Anda tidak dapat diproses. Silakan hubungi petugas atau periksa alasan penolakan untuk pengajuan kembali.',
  6:     payment_required: 'Verifikasi dokumen berhasil. Mohon lakukan pembayaran sesuai dengan kode billing yang telah diterbitkan.',
  7:     payment_required_awaiting: 'Permintaan invoice baru sedang dalam antrean proses. Mohon tunggu admin menerbitkan tagihan terbaru Anda.',
  8:     payment_verifying: 'Bukti pembayaran telah kami terima. Saat ini sedang dalam tahap validasi oleh bagian keuangan.',
  9:     payment_invalid: 'Validasi pembayaran gagal. Silakan unggah kembali bukti pembayaran yang sah melalui halaman detail permohonan.',

 19: const STATUS_COLOR = {
 20:     pending: 'text-yellow-400',
 21:     rejected: 'text-red-400',
 22:     payment_required: 'text-orange-400',
 23:     payment_invalid: 'text-red-400',
 24:     expired: 'text-gray-400',
 25:     processing: 'text-blue-400',
 26:     completed_survey_required: 'text-yellow-400',

 33:     pending: 'Menunggu Verifikasi',
 34:     rejected: 'Ditolak',
 35:     payment_required: 'Menunggu Pembayaran',
 36:     payment_required_awaiting: 'Menunggu Invoice Baru',
