 46: export default function TrackingResult({ trackingResult, onBack }) {
 47:     const isFree = trackingResult.is_free;
 48:     const isNonComm = trackingResult.is_non_commercial;
 49:     const hasReport = trackingResult.has_uploaded_report;
 50: 
 51:     // Define steps dynamically
 52:     let steps = isFree ? [
 53:         { id: 1, title: 'Pengajuan' },
 54:         { id: 2, title: 'Verifikasi' },
 55:         { id: 3, title: 'Proses Data' },
 56:         { id: 4, title: isNonComm ? 'Unduh Data' : 'Selesai' },
 57:     ] : [
 58:         { id: 1, title: 'Pengajuan' },
 59:         { id: 2, title: 'Verifikasi' },
 60:         { id: 3, title: 'Pembayaran' },
 61:         { id: 4, title: 'Proses Data' },
 62:         { id: 5, title: isNonComm ? 'Unduh Data' : 'Selesai' },
 63:     ];
 64: 
 65:     if (isNonComm) {
 66:         steps.push({ id: steps.length + 1, title: 'Unggah Hasil' });
 67:     }
 68: 
 69:     // Status to Step mapping
 70:     const getStep = (status, free, nonCommercial, uploaded) => {
 71:         let step = 1;
 72:         if (free) {
 73:             const mapping = {
 74:                 pending: 2, rejected: 2,
 75:                 processing: 3,
 76:                 completed: 4,
 77:             };
 78:             step = mapping[status] ?? 1;
 79:         } else {
 80:             const mapping = {
 81:                 pending: 2, rejected: 2,
 82:                 payment_required: 3, payment_verifying: 3, payment_invalid: 3, payment_verified: 3,
 83:                 processing: 4,
 84:                 completed: 5,
 85:                 expired: 3,
 86:             };
 87:             step = mapping[status] ?? 1;
 88:         }
 89: 
 90:         // Special logic for Non-Commercial: 
 91:         // If already completed and user has uploaded the report, move to the last bullet
 92:         if (status === 'completed' && nonCommercial && uploaded) {
 93:             step += 1;
 94:         }
 95:         return step;
 96:     };
 97: 
 98:     // Detect "awaiting new invoice" state:
 99:     const isAwaitingNewInvoice =
100:         trackingResult.status === 'payment_required' &&
101:         trackingResult.expires_at &&
102:         new Date(trackingResult.expires_at) < new Date();
103: 
104:     const isCompleted = trackingResult.status === 'completed';
105:     const areSurveysCompleted = trackingResult.are_surveys_completed;
106:     const hasPendingSurveys = trackingResult.has_pending_surveys;
107:     const hasRejectedSurveys = trackingResult.has_rejected_surveys;
108:     const hasMissingSurveys = trackingResult.has_missing_surveys;
109: 
110:     let currentStep = getStep(trackingResult.status, isFree, isNonComm, hasReport);
111:     
112:     // Gating logic: if completed but surveys not done, stay at "Proses Data" step
113:     if (isCompleted && !areSurveysCompleted) {
114:         currentStep = isFree ? 3 : 4;
115:     }
116: 
117:     let effectiveStatusKey = trackingResult.status;
118:     if (isAwaitingNewInvoice) {
119:         effectiveStatusKey = 'payment_required_awaiting';
120:     } else if (isCompleted && !areSurveysCompleted) {
121:         if (hasRejectedSurveys) {
122:             effectiveStatusKey = 'completed_survey_rejected';
123:         } else if (hasMissingSurveys) {
124:             effectiveStatusKey = 'completed_survey_required';
125:         } else if (hasPendingSurveys) {
126:             effectiveStatusKey = 'completed_survey_pending';
127:         } else {
128:             effectiveStatusKey = 'completed_survey_required'; // Fallback
129:         }
130:     }
131: 
132:     const statusMessage = (trackingResult.status === 'processing' && isFree)
133:         ? 'Pengajuan disetujui. Admin sedang memproses data Anda.'
134:         : STATUS_MESSAGES[effectiveStatusKey] ?? STATUS_MESSAGES[trackingResult.status];
135: 
136:     const statusLabel = isAwaitingNewInvoice
137:         ? STATUS_LABEL['payment_required_awaiting']
138:         : (isCompleted && !areSurveysCompleted
139:             ? STATUS_LABEL[effectiveStatusKey]
140:             : (trackingResult.status_label ?? STATUS_LABEL[trackingResult.status] ?? trackingResult.status));
141: 
142:     const statusColorClass = isAwaitingNewInvoice
143:         ? 'text-blue-400'
144:         : (STATUS_COLOR[effectiveStatusKey] ?? STATUS_COLOR[trackingResult.status] ?? 'text-white');
145: 
146:     // Timeline rows — dummy untuk step 2 & 3 sampai field tersedia
147:     const timelineRows = [
148:         {
149:             label: 'Pengajuan Diajukan',
150:             value: trackingResult.submitted_at,
151:             show: true,
152:             color: 'text-white',
153:         },
154:         {
155:             label: 'Dokumen Diverifikasi',
156:             value: trackingResult.reviewed_at,
157:             show: !!trackingResult.reviewed_at,
158:             color: trackingResult.status === 'rejected' ? 'text-red-300' : 'text-green-400',
159:         },
160:         {
161:             label: 'Tagihan Diterbitkan',
162:             value: trackingResult.invoice_issued_at,
163:             show: !isFree && !!trackingResult.invoice_issued_at,
164:             color: 'text-white',
165:         },
166:         {
167:             label: 'Bukti Bayar Diunggah',
168:             value: trackingResult.payment_submitted_at,
169:             show: !isFree && !!trackingResult.payment_submitted_at,
170:             color: 'text-white',
171:         },
172:         {
173:             label: 'Pembayaran Diverifikasi',
174:             value: trackingResult.payment_verified_at,
175:             show: !isFree && !!trackingResult.payment_verified_at,
176:             color: trackingResult.status === 'payment_invalid' ? 'text-red-300' : 'text-green-400',
177:         },
178:         {
179:             label: 'Mulai Diproses',
180:             value: trackingResult.reviewed_at, // Use reviewed_at as start of processing if free
181:             show: isFree && (trackingResult.status === 'processing' || trackingResult.status === 'completed'),
182:             color: 'text-white',
183:         },
184:         {
185:             label: isCompleted && !areSurveysCompleted
186:                 ? (hasRejectedSurveys ? 'Unggah Ulang Survey' : hasMissingSurveys ? 'Isi Survey untuk Unduh' : 'Verifikasi Survey')
187:                 : 'Selesai & Siap Unduh',
188:             value: trackingResult.completed_at,
189:             show: !!trackingResult.completed_at,
190:             color: (isCompleted && !areSurveysCompleted && hasRejectedSurveys) ? 'text-red-400 font-bold' : 'text-bmkg-accent font-bold',
191:         },
192:     ];
193: 
194:     return (
195:         <div className="animate-fade-in space-y-6">
196:             <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
197:                 <div className="border-l-4 border-bmkg-accent pl-4 text-left">
198:                     <h3 className="text-white text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tight">Status Progres</h3>
199:                     <p className="text-bmkg-accent text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] mt-1.5">
200:                         ID: {trackingResult.request_code}
201:                     </p>
202:                 </div>
203:                 <button
204:                     onClick={onBack}
205:                     className="text-white/60 hover:text-white text-[10px] uppercase font-black tracking-widest transition-colors"
206:                 >
207:                     Kembali
208:                 </button>
209:             </div>
210: 
211:             {/* PROGRESS BAR */}
212:             <div className="relative pt-2 pb-6 px-1">
213:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between relative">
214:                     <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-0 w-full h-[2px] bg-white/20 -translate-y-1/2" />
215:                     <div
216:                         className="absolute top-1/2 left-0 h-[2px] bg-bmkg-accent -translate-y-1/2 transition-all duration-1000"
217:                         style={{ width: `${((currentStep - 1) / (steps.length - 1)) * 100}%` }}
218:                     />
219:                     {steps.map((step) => (
220:                         <div key={step.id} className="relative z-10 flex flex-col items-center">
221:                             <div className={[
222:                                 'w-4 h-4 rounded-full transition-all duration-500 border-2',

224:                                     ? 'bg-bmkg-accent border-white scale-125 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(var(--bmkg-accent-rgb),0.7)]'

230:                             ].join(' ')}>
231:                                 {step.title}
232:                             </span>
233:                         </div>
234:                     ))}
235:                 </div>
236:             </div>

240:                 <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
241:                     <span className="text-white/50 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest font-black">Status</span>
242:                     <span className={['text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest', statusColorClass].join(' ')}>

244:                     </span>

251:                         <span className="text-white/50 uppercase tracking-widest font-black">Kode Billing</span>

267:                     </div>
268:                 )}
269:

275:                 )}

283:                     </div>
284:                 ))}

290:                             <span className="text-white/50 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest font-black">Alasan Penolakan</span>

292:                         </div>
293:                     </>
294:                 )}

296:

302:                             halaman detail permohonan

================
File: resources/js/Utils/formatters.js
================
  1: /**
  2:  * Date Formatting Utilities
  3:  * 
  4:  * Format dates for Indonesian locale
  5:  */
  6: 
  7: /**
  8:  * Format date with various formats
  9:  * @param {string|Date} date - Date to format
 10:  * @param {string} format - Format type: 'short', 'long', 'iso'
 11:  * @returns {string} Formatted date string
 12:  */
 13: export function formatDate(date, format = 'short') {
 14:     if (!date) return '-';
 15:     
 16:     const d = new Date(date);
 17:     
 18:     if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return 'Invalid Date';
 19:     
 20:     if (format === 'short') {
 21:         return d.toLocaleDateString('id-ID', {
 22:             year: 'numeric',
 23:             month: 'short',
 24:             day: 'numeric',
 25:         });
 26:     }
 27:     
 28:     if (format === 'long') {
 29:         return d.toLocaleDateString('id-ID', {
 30:             weekday: 'long',
 31:             year: 'numeric',
 32:             month: 'long',
 33:             day: 'numeric',
 34:         });
 35:     }
 36:     
 37:     if (format === 'iso') {
 38:         return d.toISOString().split('T')[0];
 39:     }
 40:     
 41:     return d.toLocaleDateString('id-ID');
 42: }
 43: 
 44: /**
 45:  * Format date with time
 46:  * @param {string|Date} date - Date to format
 47:  * @returns {string} Formatted date with time
 48:  */
 49: export function formatDateTime(date) {
 50:     if (!date) return '-';
 51:     
 52:     const d = new Date(date);
 53:     
 54:     if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return 'Invalid Date';
 55:     
 56:     return d.toLocaleDateString('id-ID', {
 57:         year: 'numeric',
 58:         month: 'short',
 59:         day: 'numeric',
 60:         hour: '2-digit',
 61:         minute: '2-digit',
 62:     });
 63: }
 64: 
 65: /**
 66:  * Format relative time (e.g., "2 hours ago")
 67:  * @param {string|Date} date - Date to format
 68:  * @returns {string} Relative time string
 69:  */
 70: export function formatRelativeTime(date) {
 71:     if (!date) return '-';
 72:     
 73:     const d = new Date(date);
 74:     const now = new Date();
 75:     const seconds = Math.floor((now - d) / 1000);
 76:     
 77:     if (seconds < 60) return 'Just now';
 78:     if (seconds < 3600) return `${Math.floor(seconds / 60)} minutes ago`;
 79:     if (seconds < 86400) return `${Math.floor(seconds / 3600)} hours ago`;
 80:     if (seconds < 604800) return `${Math.floor(seconds / 86400)} days ago`;
 81:     
 82:     return formatDate(date);
 83: }
 84: 
 85: /**
 86:  * Currency Formatting Utilities
 87:  */
 88: 
 89: /**
 90:  * Format number as Indonesian Rupiah
 91:  * @param {number} amount - Amount to format
 92:  * @returns {string} Formatted currency string
 93:  */
 94: export function formatCurrency(amount, currency = 'IDR') {
 95:     if (amount === null || amount === undefined) return '-';
 96:     
 97:     return new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID', {
 98:         style: 'currency',
 99:         currency: currency,
100:         minimumFractionDigits: 0,
101:         maximumFractionDigits: 0,
102:     }).format(amount);
103: }
104: 
105: /**
106:  * Format number with thousand separators
107:  * @param {number} number - Number to format
108:  * @returns {string} Formatted number
109:  */
110: export function formatNumber(number) {
111:     if (number === null || number === undefined) return '-';
112:     
113:     return new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID').format(number);
114: }
115: 
116: /**
117:  * File Size Formatting
118:  */
119: 
120: /**
121:  * Format bytes to human-readable size
122:  * @param {number} bytes - File size in bytes
123:  * @param {number} decimals - Number of decimal places
124:  * @returns {string} Formatted file size
125:  */
126: export function formatFileSize(bytes, decimals = 2) {
127:     if (bytes === 0) return '0 Bytes';
128:     if (!bytes) return '-';
129:     
130:     const k = 1024;
131:     const sizes = ['Bytes', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
132:     const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
133:     
134:     return parseFloat((bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(decimals)) + ' ' + sizes[i];
135: }
136: 
137: /**
138:  * Percentage Formatting
139:  */
140: 
141: /**
142:  * Format number as percentage
143:  * @param {number} value - Value to format (0-1 or 0-100)
144:  * @param {number} decimals - Number of decimal places
145:  * @param {boolean} isDecimal - Whether value is decimal (0-1) or percentage (0-100)
146:  * @returns {string} Formatted percentage
147:  */
148: export function formatPercentage(value, decimals = 1, isDecimal = true) {
149:     if (value === null || value === undefined) return '-';
150:     
151:     const percentage = isDecimal ? value * 100 : value;
152:     return `${percentage.toFixed(decimals)}%`;
153: }

================
File: resources/js/Utils/helpers.js
================
  1: /**
  2:  * General Helper Utilities
  3:  * 
  4:  * Miscellaneous utility functions for common tasks
  5:  */
  6: 
  7: /**
  8:  * Class Name Utilities
  9:  */
 10: 
 11: /**
 12:  * Combine class names (like classnames/clsx library)
 13:  * Filters out falsy values and joins valid class names
 14:  * @param {...(string|undefined|null|boolean)} classes - Class names to combine
 15:  * @returns {string} Combined class names
 16:  * 
 17:  * @example
 18:  * cn('btn', isActive && 'active', 'text-white')
 19:  * // Returns: "btn active text-white"
 20:  */
 21: export function cn(...classes) {
 22:     return classes.filter(Boolean).join(' ');
 23: }
 24: 
 25: /**
 26:  * String Utilities
 27:  */
 28: 
 29: /**
 30:  * Truncate text to specified length
 31:  * @param {string} text - Text to truncate
 32:  * @param {number} length - Maximum length
 33:  * @param {string} suffix - Suffix to add (default: '...')
 34:  * @returns {string} Truncated text
 35:  */
 36: export function truncate(text, length = 100, suffix = '...') {
 37:     if (!text) return '';
 38:     if (text.length <= length) return text;
 39:     
 40:     return text.substring(0, length).trim() + suffix;
 41: }
 42: 
 43: /**
 44:  * Capitalize first letter of string
 45:  * @param {string} str - String to capitalize
 46:  * @returns {string} Capitalized string
 47:  */
 48: export function capitalize(str) {
 49:     if (!str) return '';
 50:     return str.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + str.slice(1).toLowerCase();
 51: }
 52: 
 53: /**
 54:  * Convert string to slug (URL-friendly)
 55:  * @param {string} str - String to slugify
 56:  * @returns {string} Slug string
 57:  */
 58: export function slugify(str) {
 59:     if (!str) return '';
 60:     
 61:     return str
 62:         .toLowerCase()
 63:         .trim()
 64:         .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '')
 65:         .replace(/[\s_-]+/g, '-')
 66:         .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
 67: }
 68: 
 69: /**
 70:  * Array Utilities
 71:  */
 72: 
 73: /**
 74:  * Split array into chunks
 75:  * @param {Array} array - Array to chunk
 76:  * @param {number} size - Chunk size
 77:  * @returns {Array[]} Array of chunks
 78:  * 
 79:  * @example
 80:  * chunk([1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 2)
 81:  * // Returns: [[1, 2], [3, 4], [5]]
 82:  */
 83: export function chunk(array, size) {
 84:     if (!array || !array.length) return [];
 85:     
 86:     return Array.from(
 87:         { length: Math.ceil(array.length / size) },
 88:         (_, i) => array.slice(i * size, i * size + size)
 89:     );
 90: }
 91: 
 92: /**
 93:  * Remove duplicates from array
 94:  * @param {Array} array - Array with potential duplicates
 95:  * @returns {Array} Array without duplicates
 96:  */
 97: export function unique(array) {
 98:     if (!array) return [];
 99:     return [...new Set(array)];
100: }
101: 
102: /**
103:  * Group array by key
104:  * @param {Array} array - Array to group
105:  * @param {string|Function} key - Key to group by (property name or function)
106:  * @returns {Object} Grouped object
107:  * 
108:  * @example
109:  * groupBy([{type: 'a', val: 1}, {type: 'b', val: 2}], 'type')
110:  * // Returns: { a: [{type: 'a', val: 1}], b: [{type: 'b', val: 2}] }
111:  */
112: export function groupBy(array, key) {
113:     if (!array || !array.length) return {};
114:     
115:     return array.reduce((result, item) => {
116:         const groupKey = typeof key === 'function' ? key(item) : item[key];
117:         (result[groupKey] = result[groupKey] || []).push(item);
118:         return result;
119:     }, {});
120: }
121: 
122: /**
123:  * Object Utilities
124:  */
125: 
126: /**
127:  * Deep clone object (simple version, doesn't handle complex types)
128:  * @param {Object} obj - Object to clone
129:  * @returns {Object} Cloned object
130:  */
131: export function deepClone(obj) {
132:     if (obj === null || typeof obj !== 'object') return obj;
133:     return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj));
134: }
135:  
136: /**
137:  * Check if object is empty
138:  * @param {Object} obj - Object to check
139:  * @returns {boolean} True if empty
140:  */
141: export function isEmpty(obj) {
142:     if (!obj) return true;
143:     return Object.keys(obj).length === 0;
144: }
145: 
146: /**
147:  * Pick specific properties from object
148:  * @param {Object} obj - Source object
149:  * @param {string[]} keys - Keys to pick
150:  * @returns {Object} Object with only picked keys
151:  */
152: export function pick(obj, keys) {
153:     if (!obj) return {};
154:     
155:     return keys.reduce((result, key) => {
156:         if (key in obj) {
157:             result[key] = obj[key];
158:         }
159:         return result;
160:     }, {});
161: }
162: 
163: /**
164:  * Omit specific properties from object
165:  * @param {Object} obj - Source object
166:  * @param {string[]} keys - Keys to omit
167:  * @returns {Object} Object without omitted keys
168:  */
169: export function omit(obj, keys) {
170:     if (!obj) return {};
171:     
172:     const result = { ...obj };
173:     keys.forEach(key => delete result[key]);
174:     return result;
175: }
176: 
177: /**
178:  * Async Utilities
179:  */
180: 
181: /**
182:  * Sleep for specified milliseconds
183:  * @param {number} ms - Milliseconds to sleep
184:  * @returns {Promise} Promise that resolves after delay
185:  * 
186:  * @example
187:  * await sleep(1000); // Wait 1 second
188:  */
189: export function sleep(ms) {
190:     return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
191: }
192: 
193: /**
194:  * Debounce function execution
195:  * @param {Function} func - Function to debounce
196:  * @param {number} wait - Wait time in milliseconds
197:  * @returns {Function} Debounced function
198:  * 
199:  * @example
200:  * const debouncedSearch = debounce((query) => search(query), 300);
201:  */
202: export function debounce(func, wait) {
203:     let timeout;
204:     
205:     return function executedFunction(...args) {
206:         const later = () => {
207:             clearTimeout(timeout);
208:             func(...args);
209:         };
210:         
211:         clearTimeout(timeout);
212:         timeout = setTimeout(later, wait);
213:     };
214: }
215: 
216: /**
217:  * Throttle function execution
218:  * @param {Function} func - Function to throttle
219:  * @param {number} limit - Time limit in milliseconds
220:  * @returns {Function} Throttled function
221:  */
222: export function throttle(func, limit) {
223:     let inThrottle;
224:     
225:     return function executedFunction(...args) {
226:         if (!inThrottle) {
227:             func(...args);
228:             inThrottle = true;
229:             setTimeout(() => inThrottle = false, limit);
230:         }
231:     };
232: }
233: 
234: /**
235:  * Random Utilities
236:  */
237: 
238: /**
239:  * Generate random ID
240:  * @param {number} length - Length of ID
241:  * @returns {string} Random ID
242:  */
243: export function randomId(length = 8) {
244:     return Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 2 + length);
245: }
246: 
247: /**
248:  * Generate random number in range
249:  * @param {number} min - Minimum value (inclusive)
250:  * @param {number} max - Maximum value (inclusive)
251:  * @returns {number} Random number
252:  */
253: export function randomNumber(min, max) {
254:     return Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min;
255: }

================
File: resources/js/Utils/validators.js
================
  1: /**
  2:  * Validation Utilities
  3:  * 
  4:  * Client-side validation helpers (not replacement for server-side validation)
  5:  */
  6: 
  7: /**
  8:  * Email Validation
  9:  */
 10: 
 11: /**
 12:  * Validate email address format
 13:  * @param {string} email - Email to validate
 14:  * @returns {boolean} True if valid email format
 15:  */
 16: export function validateEmail(email) {
 17:     if (!email) return false;
 18:     
 19:     const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
 20:     return emailRegex.test(email);
 21: }
 22: 
 23: /**
 24:  * Phone Number Validation
 25:  */
 26: 
 27: /**
 28:  * Validate Indonesian phone number
 29:  * Accepts formats: +62xxx, 62xxx, 0xxx
 30:  * @param {string} phone - Phone number to validate
 31:  * @returns {boolean} True if valid Indonesian phone format
 32:  */
 33: export function validatePhone(phone) {
 34:     if (!phone) return false;
 35:     
 36:     const phoneRegex = /^(\+62|62|0)[0-9]{9,12}$/;
 37:     return phoneRegex.test(phone.replace(/[\s-]/g, ''));
 38: }
 39: 
 40: /**
 41:  * File Validation
 42:  */
 43: 
 44: /**
 45:  * Validate file type against allowed extensions
 46:  * @param {File} file - File object to validate
 47:  * @param {string[]} allowedTypes - Array of allowed extensions (e.g., ['pdf', 'doc'])
 48:  * @returns {boolean} True if file type is allowed
 49:  */
 50: export function validateFileType(file, allowedTypes) {
 51:     if (!file || !allowedTypes || !allowedTypes.length) return false;
 52:     
 53:     const extension = file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();
 54:     return allowedTypes.includes(extension);
 55: }
 56: 
 57: /**
 58:  * Validate file size
 59:  * @param {File} file - File object to validate
 60:  * @param {number} maxSize - Maximum size in bytes
 61:  * @returns {boolean} True if file size is within limit
 62:  */
 63: export function validateFileSize(file, maxSize) {
 64:     if (!file) return false;
 65:     
 66:     return file.size <= maxSize;
 67: }
 68: 
 69: /**
 70:  * Password Validation
 71:  */
 72: 
 73: /**
 74:  * Validate password strength
 75:  * Requirements: min 8 chars, at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number
 76:  * @param {string} password - Password to validate
 77:  * @returns {object} { isValid: boolean, errors: string[] }
 78:  */
 79: export function validatePassword(password) {
 80:     const errors = [];
 81:     
 82:     if (!password) {
 83:         return { isValid: false, errors: ['Password is required'] };
 84:     }
 85:     
 86:     if (password.length < 8) {
 87:         errors.push('Password must be at least 8 characters');
 88:     }
 89:     
 90:     if (!/[A-Z]/.test(password)) {
 91:         errors.push('Password must contain at least one uppercase letter');
 92:     }
 93:     
 94:     if (!/[a-z]/.test(password)) {
 95:         errors.push('Password must contain at least one lowercase letter');
 96:     }
 97:     
 98:     if (!/[0-9]/.test(password)) {
 99:         errors.push('Password must contain at least one number');
100:     }
101:     
102:     return {
103:         isValid: errors.length === 0,
104:         errors,
105:     };
106: }
107: 
108: /**
109:  * URL Validation
110:  */
111: 
112: /**
113:  * Validate URL format
114:  * @param {string} url - URL to validate
115:  * @returns {boolean} True if valid URL
116:  */
117: export function validateUrl(url) {
118:     if (!url) return false;
119:     
120:     try {
121:         new URL(url);
122:         return true;
123:     } catch {
124:         return false;
125:     }
126: }
127: 
128: /**
129:  * Date Validation
130:  */
131: 
132: /**
133:  * Validate date is in the past
134:  * @param {string|Date} date - Date to validate
135:  * @returns {boolean} True if date is in the past
136:  */
137: export function isDateInPast(date) {
138:     if (!date) return false;
139:     
140:     const d = new Date(date);
141:     return d < new Date();
142: }
143: 
144: /**
145:  * Validate date is in the future
146:  * @param {string|Date} date - Date to validate
147:  * @returns {boolean} True if date is in the future
148:  */
149: export function isDateInFuture(date) {
150:     if (!date) return false;
151:     
152:     const d = new Date(date);
153:     return d > new Date();
154: }
155: 
156: /**
157:  * Validate date range (from <= to)
158:  * @param {string|Date} from - Start date
159:  * @param {string|Date} to - End date
160:  * @returns {boolean} True if from date is before or equal to to date
161:  */
162: export function validateDateRange(from, to) {
163:     if (!from || !to) return false;
164:     
165:     const fromDate = new Date(from);
166:     const toDate = new Date(to);
167:     
168:     return fromDate <= toDate;
169: }
170: 
171: /**
172:  * Number Validation
173:  */
174: 
175: /**
176:  * Validate number is within range
177:  * @param {number} value - Value to validate
178:  * @param {number} min - Minimum value (inclusive)
179:  * @param {number} max - Maximum value (inclusive)
180:  * @returns {boolean} True if value is within range
181:  */
182: export function validateNumberRange(value, min, max) {
183:     if (value === null || value === undefined) return false;
184:     
185:     return value >= min && value <= max;
186: }
187: 
188: /**
189:  * Validate number is positive
190:  * @param {number} value - Value to validate
191:  * @returns {boolean} True if value is positive
192:  */
193: export function isPositive(value) {
194:     return value > 0;
195: }

File: routes/api.php

 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: declare(strict_types=1);
 4: 
 5: use App\Http\Controllers\ChatbotController;
 6: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;
 7: 
 8: /*
 9: |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
10: | API Routes
11: |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
12: |
13: | These routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group that
14: | is assigned the "api" middleware group. They are stateless (no sessions).
15: | However, we use session middleware for chatbot to track guest limits.
16: |
17: */
18: 
19: // Chatbot API Routes
20: Route::prefix('chatbot')->name('chatbot.')->group(function (): void {
21:     // Public routes
22:     Route::get('/status', [ChatbotController::class, 'status'])->name('status');
23:     Route::get('/suggested-questions', [ChatbotController::class, 'suggestedQuestions'])->name('suggested.questions');
24: 
25:     // Message routes (supports guests and authenticated users)
26:     Route::post('/message', [ChatbotController::class, 'sendMessage'])
27:         ->name('message')
28:         ->middleware(['web', 'throttle:15,1']); // Rate limit: 15 requests per minute
29: 
30:     // Conversation routes
31:     Route::get('/conversations', [ChatbotController::class, 'getConversations'])
32:         ->name('conversations.index')
33:         ->middleware(['web', 'auth']);
34: 
35:     Route::get('/conversations/{conversation}', [ChatbotController::class, 'getConversation'])
36:         ->name('conversation.show')
37:         ->middleware(['web']);
38: 
39:     Route::post('/conversations/{conversation}/archive', [ChatbotController::class, 'archiveConversation'])
40:         ->name('conversation.archive')
41:         ->middleware(['web', 'auth']);
42: });

  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: use App\Enums\UserRole;
  4: use App\Http\Controllers\Auth\GoogleController;

 13: use App\Http\Controllers\HelpController;
 14: use App\Http\Controllers\Admin\SurveySettingController;
 15: use App\Http\Controllers\Admin\ContactSettingController;
 16: use App\Http\Controllers\Admin\DataRequestReportController;
 17: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;
 18: use Inertia\Inertia;
 19: 
 20: Route::get('/', function () {
 21:     $faqService   = app(\App\Services\FaqService::class);
 22:     $statsService = app(\App\Services\StatsService::class);
 23:     $showChatbot = !auth()->user() || auth()->user()->role === UserRole::User;
 24: 
 25:     $faqs = $faqService->getFeaturedFaqs()->take(5);
 26: 
 27:     if ($faqs->isEmpty()) {
 28:         $faqs = $faqService->getActiveFaqs()->take(5);
 29:     }
 30: 
 31:     return Inertia::render('Welcome/Index', [
 32:         'canLogin'    => Route::has('login'),
 33:         'canRegister' => Route::has('register'),
 34:         'faqs'        => $faqs,
 35:         'stats'       => $statsService->getLandingStats(),
 36:         'showChatbot' => $showChatbot,
 37:     ]);
 38: });
 39: 
 40: Route::get('/help', [HelpController::class, 'index'])->name('help');
 41: 
 42: Route::get('/dashboard', function () {
 43:     if (!auth()->user()->isAdmin()) {
 44:         return redirect()->route('data-requests.index');
 45:     }
 46:     return redirect()->route('admin.data-requests.index');
 47: })->middleware(['auth', 'verified'])->name('dashboard');
 48: 
 49: // ── Public API / Open Routes ─────────────────────────────────
 50: Route::get('/faqs/{faq}/download', \App\Http\Controllers\DownloadFaqDocumentController::class)->name('faqs.download-document');
 51: 
 52: Route::middleware('auth')->group(function () {
 53:     Route::get('/profile', [ProfileController::class, 'edit'])->name('profile.edit');
 54:     Route::patch('/profile', [ProfileController::class, 'update'])->name('profile.update');
 55:     Route::delete('/profile', [ProfileController::class, 'destroy'])->name('profile.destroy');
 56: 
 57:     // Profile Completion (for OAuth users)
 58:     Route::get('/profile/complete', [CompleteProfileController::class, 'edit'])->name('profile.complete');
 59:     Route::put('/profile/complete', [CompleteProfileController::class, 'update'])->name('profile.complete.update');
 60: });

 65: });
 66:

 68: Route::middleware(['auth', 'verified'])->group(function () {
 69:     Route::get('/data-requests', [DataRequestController::class, 'index'])->name('data-requests.index');

File: tailwind.config.js

  1: import defaultTheme from 'tailwindcss/defaultTheme';
  2: import forms from '@tailwindcss/forms';
  3: import typography from '@tailwindcss/typography';
  4: 
  5: /** @type {import('tailwindcss').Config} */
  6: export default {
  7:     content: [
  8:         './vendor/laravel/framework/src/Illuminate/Pagination/resources/views/*.blade.php',
  9:         './storage/framework/views/*.php',
 10:         './resources/views/**/*.blade.php',
 11:         './resources/js/**/*.jsx',
 12:     ],
 13: 
 14:     theme: {
 15:         fontFamily: {
 16:             // Inter jadi font utama global
 17:             sans: ['Inter', ...defaultTheme.fontFamily.sans],
 18:         },
 19: 
 20:         extend: {
 21:             colors: {
 22:                 bmkg: {
 23:                     primary: '#000000',
 24:                     secondary: '#0C2B4E',
 25:                     accent: '#FFC300',
 26:                     accent_secondary: '#FFC300',
 27:                     dark: '#0F172A',
 28:                     light: '#F0F9FF',
 29:                 },
 30:             },

 38:                         filter: 'blur(3px)',
 39:                     },
 40:                     '100%': {

 44:                     },
 45:                 },
 46:

 49:                     '0%': { opacity: '0' },
 50:                     '100%': { opacity: '1' },

================
File: test_lang.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';
 3: $app = require_once __DIR__ . '/bootstrap/app.php';
 4: $kernel = $app->make(Illuminate\Contracts\Console\Kernel::class);
 5: $kernel->bootstrap();
 6: 
 7: echo "Locale: " . app()->getLocale() . "\n";
 8: echo "Fallback: " . config('app.fallback_locale') . "\n";
 9: echo "Lang Path: " . lang_path() . "\n";
10: echo "Validation required: " . __('validation.required') . "\n";

================
File: test_preview.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';
 4: $app = require_once __DIR__ . '/bootstrap/app.php';
 5: $kernel = $app->make(Illuminate\Contracts\Console\Kernel::class);
 6: $kernel->bootstrap();
 7: 
 8: $output = "";
 9: 
10: // Find a regular user who has a data request with a document
11: $user = \App\Models\User::where('role', '!=', 'superadmin')->where('role', '!=', 'admin')
12:     ->whereHas('dataRequests.documents')
13:     ->first();
14: 
15: if (!$user) {
16:     file_put_contents('output_preview.txt', "No suitable user found.\n");
17:     exit(1);
18: }
19: 
20: $dr = $user->dataRequests()->whereHas('documents')->first();
21: $doc = $dr->documents()->first();
22: 
23: $output .= "Testing as User ID: {$user->id}\n";
24: $output .= "Testing DataRequest ID: {$dr->id}\n";
25: $output .= "Testing Document ID: {$doc->id}\n";
26: 
27: $url = "/data-requests/" . $dr->id . "/documents/" . $doc->id . "/preview";
28: $output .= "Hitting URL: {$url}\n";
29: 
30: $request = Illuminate\Http\Request::create($url, 'GET');
31: $request->setUserResolver(function () use ($user) {
32:     return $user; });
33: 
34: // Simulate auth
35: auth()->login($user);
36: 
37: try {
38:     $response = app()->handle($request);
39:     $output .= "Status: " . $response->getStatusCode() . "\n";
40:     if ($response->getStatusCode() === 403 || $response->getStatusCode() === 500) {
41:         if (property_exists($response, 'exception') && $response->exception) {
42:             $output .= "Exception: " . $response->exception->getMessage() . "\n";
43:             $output .= "Trace: " . $response->exception->getTraceAsString() . "\n";
44:         }
45:     }
46: } catch (\Exception $e) {
47:     $output .= "Exception caught globally: " . $e->getMessage() . "\n";
48: }
49: 
50: file_put_contents('output_preview.txt', $output);
51: echo "Done.";

File: vite.config.js

 1: import { defineConfig } from 'vite';
 2: import laravel from 'laravel-vite-plugin';
 3: import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react';
 4: 
 5: export default defineConfig({
 6:     plugins: [
 7:         laravel({
 8:             input: 'resources/js/app.jsx',
 9:             refresh: true,
10:         }),
11:         react(),
12:     ],
13:     // --- TAMBAHKAN BLOK INI ---
14:     server: {
15:         host: '0.0.0.0',
16:         hmr: {
17:             host: 'localhost',
18:         },
19:         cors: true,
20:         // Wajib jika pakai ngrok
21:         allowedHosts: ['all'],
22:     },
23: });
